Matthew1:1 Bhuku renhoroondo yamadzinza aJesu Kristu, Mwanakomana waDhavhidhi, mwanakomana waAbhurahamu." 
Matthew1:2 Abhurahamu wakabereka Isaka, Isaka akabereka Jakobho; Jakobho akabereka Judha navana vamai vake," 
Matthew1:3 Judha akabereka Faresi naZara kunaTamari; Faresi akabereka Esiromi; Esiromi akabereka Arami; 
Matthew1:4 Arami akabereka Aminadhabhi; Aminadhabhi akabereka Naasoni; Naasoni akabereka Sarimoni; 
Matthew1:5 Sarimoni akabereka Bhowazi kunaRahabhi, Bhowazi akabereka Obhedhi kuna Rute; Obhedhi akabereka Jese;" 
Matthew1:6 Jese akabereka Dhavhidhi mambo; Dhavhidhi mambo akabereka Soromoni ku\add mukadzi\add* \add waiva\add* waUria; 
Matthew1:7 Soromoni akabereka Robhoami; Robhoami akabereka Abhiya; Abhiya akabereka Asa; 
Matthew1:8 Asa akabereka Josafati; Josafati akabereka Joramu; Joramu akabereka Oziasi; 
Matthew1:9 Oziasi akabereka Jotamu; Jotamu akabereka Akazi; Akazi akabereka Hezekia; 
Matthew1:10 Hezekia akabereka Manase; Manase akabereka Amoni; Amoni akabereka Josiya; 
Matthew1:11 Josiya akabereka Jekonia navana vamai vake nenguva yavakatapirwa kuBhabhironi. 
Matthew1:12 Zvino shure kokutapirwa kuBhabhironi, Jekonia akabereka Saratieri; Saratieri akabereka Zerubhabheri;" 
Matthew1:13 Zerubhabheri akabereka Abhiudhi; Abhiudhi akabereka Eriakimi; Eriakimi akabereka Azori; 
Matthew1:14 Azori akabereka Sadhoki; Sadhoki akabereka Akimu; Akimi akabereka Eriyudhi; 
Matthew1:15 Eriyudhi akabereka Eriazari; Eriazari akabereka Matan; Matani akabereka Jakobho; 
Matthew1:16 Jakobho akabereka Josefa murume waMaria, unova ndiye wakazvara Jesu, unonzi Kristu." 
Matthew1:17 Naizvozvo mazera ose kubva kunaAbhurahamu kusvikira kuna Dhavhidhi mazera anegumi namana, kubva kuna Dhavhidhi kusvikira pakutapirwa kuBhabhironi, mazera anegumi namana, kubva pakutapirwa kuBhabhironi kusvikira kuna Jesu Kristu, mazera anegumi namana." 
Matthew1:18 Zvino kuberekwa kwaJesu Kristu kwaiva kwakadai; apo mai vake Maria, wakati atsidzirana kuwanana naJosefa, vasati vasangana, wakavonekwa ava nemimba noMweya Mutsvene." 
Matthew1:19 Zvino Josefa murume wake zvaakanga ari wakarurama, asingadi kumufumura, wakafunga kumuramba muchivande." 
Matthew1:20 Asi zvino wakati acharangarira zvinhu izvozvi, tarira, mutumwa waShe akavonekwa kwaari pakurota achiti: Josefa mwanakomana waDhavhidhi, usatya kuzvitorera Maria mukadzi wako, nokuti icho chakaberekwa maari ndecheMweya Mutsvene." 
Matthew1:21 Iye uchabereka Mwanakomana, uye uchatumidza zita rake \add kuti\add* Jesu, nokuti uchaponesa vanhu vake pazvivi zvavo." 
Matthew1:22 Zvino zvose izvozvi zvakaitwa kuti zvizadziswe zvakarehwa naShe, nomuporofita achiti:" 
Matthew1:23 Tarira, mhandara ichava nemimba, ichazvara Mwanakomana, vachatumidza zita rake Emanueri, ndokuti kana zvichishandurwa, Mwari unesu." 
Matthew1:24 Zvino Josefa amuka pahope akaita sezvaakarairwa nomutumwa waShe, akazvitorera mukadzi wake;" 
Matthew1:25 asi haana kumuziva kusvikira azvara mwanakomana wake wedangwe, akatumidza zita rake \add kuti\add* Jesu." 
Matthew2:1 Zvino Jesu wakati aberekwa muBhetirehemu reJudhiya, pamazuva aHerodhe mambo, tarira, kwakauya vachenjeri vachibva mabvazuva kuJerusarema," 
Matthew2:2 vachiti: Uripiko iye wakazvarwa Mambo wavaJudha? Nokuti tavona nyeredzi yake kumabvazuva, tavuya kuzomunamata." 
Matthew2:3 Zvino Herodhe mambo wakati anzwa, akatambudzika, neJerusarema rose naye." 
Matthew2:4 Zvino wakati avunganidza vaprista vakuru vose navanyori vavanhu, akavabvunza kunofanira kuzvarirwa Kristu." 
Matthew2:5 Zvino vakati kwaari: MuBhetirehemu reJudhiya; nokuti ndizvo zvakanyorwa nomuporofita \add zvichinzi\add*: 
Matthew2:6 Newe Bhetirehemu, nyika yaJudha, hauzi mudukusa kuvabati vaJudha; nokuti kwauri kuchabuda mutongi, uchafudza vanhu vangu vaIsraeri." 
Matthew2:7 Zvino Herodhe, wakati adana vachenjeri muchivande, akabvunzisisa kwavari nguva yakavonekwa nyeredzi nayo." 
Matthew2:8 Akavatuma Bhetirehemu, akati: Endai munyatso-bvunzisisa zvomwana; kana ma\add mu\add*wana munditumirevo shokozve, kuti ndiuye kuzomunamatavo." 
Matthew2:9 Vakati vanzwa mambo, vakabva; zvino tarira, nyeredzi yavakavona kumabvazuva yakavatungamirira, kusvikira yandomira pamusoro pepakanga panomwana." 
Matthew2:10 Vakati vavona nyeredzi vakafara nomufaro mukuru kwazvo. 
Matthew2:11 Vakati vapinda mumba, vakavona mwana naMaria mai vake, vakawira pasi vakamunamata; zvino vakati vasunungura fuma yavo, vakamupa zvipo; ndarama, nezvipfungaidzo zvinonhuwira nemura." 
Matthew2:12 Vakati vanyeverwa naMwari pakurota, kuti varege kudzokera kuna Herodhe, vakaenda kunyika yavo neimwe nzira." 
Matthew2:13 Vakati vaenda, tarira, mutumwa waShe wakavonekwa kunaJosefa pakurota, achiti: Muka utore mwana namai vake, utizire Ijipiti, ugareko kusvikira ndichikutumira shoko; nokuti Herodhe uchatsvaka mwana kuti amuparadze." 
Matthew2:14 Wakati amuka, akatora mwana namai vake vusiku, akabva akaenda Ijipiti;" 
Matthew2:15 akavako kusvikira pakufa kwaHerodhe: kuti zvizadzisike zvakarehwa naShe nomuporofita, achiti: Ndakadana mwanakomana wangu abve Ijipiti." 
Matthew2:16 Zvino Herodhe, wakati avona kuti anyengerwa navachenjeri, akatsamwa zvikurusa, akatuma, akaponda vanakomana vose vaiva muBhetirehemu napamigumo yayo yose, vaiva namakore maviri zvichiburuka, iri nguva yaakanga abvunzisisa kuvachenjeri." 
Matthew2:17 Zvino zvakazadzisika zvakarehwa naJeremiya muporofita achiti: 
Matthew2:18 MuRama rakanzwika inzwi, kuungudza nokuchema nokurira kukuru, Rakeri achichema vana vake, asinganyaradziki, nokuti hava\add chi\add*po." 
Matthew2:19 Asi Herodhe wakati afa, tarira, mutumwa waShe akavonekwa pakurota naJosefa muIjipiti," 
Matthew2:20 achiti: Simuka, tora mwana muduku namai vake, uende kunyika yavaIsraeri; nokuti vakafa, avo vaitsaka upenyu hwomwana." 
Matthew2:21 Akasimuka ndokutora mwana muduku namai vake akasvika kunyika yavaIsraeri. 
Matthew2:22 Asi wakati achinzwa kuti Akerawo unotonga muJudhiya panzvimbo yababa vake Herodhe, akatya kuendako, asi akanyeverwa naMwari pakurota, akatendevukira kumativi eGariri." 
Matthew2:23 Akasvika akandogara muguta rinonzi Nazareta, kuti zvizadziswe zvakarehwa navaporofita, \add kuti\add*: Uchanzi muNazareta." 
Matthew3:1 Pamazuva iwayo kwakauya Johwani Mubhabhatidzi, achiparidza murenje reJudhiya," 
Matthew3:2 achiti: Tendevukai imwi: nokuti ushe hwokudenga hwava pedo. 
Matthew3:3 Nokuti uyu ndiye wakarehwa nezvake naIsaya muporofita, achiti: Inzwi rounodana murenje, gadzirirai mugwagwa waShe, ruramisai nzira yake." 
Matthew3:4 Iyezve Johwani waiva nenguvo yake yamambava ekamera nebhanhire redehwe pachivuno chake; nezvokudya zvake zvaiva mhashu nouchi hwedondo. 
Matthew3:5 Zvino kwakabudira kwaari Jerusarema neJudhiya rose nedunhu rose rakapoteredza Jorodhani," 
Matthew3:6 vakabhabhatidzwa naye muna Joridhani vachirevurura zvivi zvavo. 
Matthew3:7 Asi wakati achivona vazhinji vavaFarisi navaSajusi vachivuya kurubhabhatidzo rwake, akati kwavari: Vana venyoka, ndianiko wakakunyeverai kuti mutize kutsamwa kunovuya?" 
Matthew3:8 Naizvozvo berekai zvibereko zvakafanira kutendevuka. 
Matthew3:9 Musafunga kutaura mukati menyu \add muchiti\add*: Tina Abhurahamu baba \add vedu\add*, nokuti ndinoti kwamuri: Mwari unokwanisa kubva pamatombo awa kumutsira Abhurahamu vana." 
Matthew3:10 Zvinovo sanhu ratoiswa pamidzi yemiti, naizvozvo muti mumwe nomumwe usingabereki zvibereko zvakanaka unotemwa ugokandirwa mumoto." 
Matthew3:11 Ini zvirokwazvo ndinokubhabhatidzai nemvura mupinde mukutendevuka, asi uyo unovuya shure kwangu unesimba kupfuvureni, neshangu dzake handina kufanira kudzitakura, Iye uchakubhabhatidzai noMweya Mutsvene nomoto." 
Matthew3:12 Rusero rwake \add ruri\add* muruvoko rwake, uchatsvaira buriro rake kwazvo, agovunganidzira zviyo mudura, asi hundi ucha\add i\add*pisa nemoto usingadzimwi." 
Matthew3:13 Zvino Jesu wakabva Gariri akasvika paJoridhani kuna Johwani, kuzobhabhatidzwa naye." 
Matthew3:14 Asi Johwani wakamudzivisa achiti: Ndini ndinofanira kubhabhatidzwa nemwi, asi movuya kwandiri \add sei\add*?" 
Matthew3:15 Asi Jesu achipindura wakati kwaari: Tenda hako zvino nokuti saizvozvo zvakafanira kuti tizadzise kururama kose. Ipapo akamutendera. 
Matthew3:16 Asi Jesu, wakati abhabhatidzwa, akabuda pakarepo mumvura: Zvino tarira, kudenga kwakamuzarurirwa, akavona Mweya waMwari achiburuka senjiva, achivuya pamusoro pake." 
Matthew3:17 Zvino tarira inzwi rakabva kudenga richiti: Uyu ndiye Mwanakomana wangu unodikamwa, wandinofadzwa naye kwazvo!" 
Matthew4:1 Zvino Jesu wakatungamirirwa noMweya kurenje kunoidzwa naDhiabhorosi. 
Matthew4:2 Wakati atsanya mazuva anamakumi mana novusiku makumi mana, akanzwa nzara." 
Matthew4:3 Zvino muidzi wakati avuya kwaari, akati: Kana uri Mwanakomana waMwari, raira kuti matombo awa aitwe zvingwa." 
Matthew4:4 Asi wakapindura akati: Kwakanyorwa \add kuchinzi\add*: Munhu haangararami nechingwa chete, asi neshoko rimwe nerimwe rinobuda mumuromo maMwari." 
Matthew4:5 Zvino Dhiabhorosi akamutora akakwira naye muguta dzvene, akamuisa pachiruvu chetembere," 
Matthew4:6 akati kwaari: Kana uri Mwanakomana waMwari, uzvikandire pasi, nokuti kwakanyorwa \add kuchinzi\add*: Iye ucharaira vatumwa vake pamusoro pako: pamavoko avo vachakutakura, kuti urege kugumbusa rutsoka rwako pabwe." 
Matthew4:7 Jesu akati kwaari: Kwakanyorwavo, usaidza Ishe Mwari wako." 
Matthew4:8 Dhiabhorosi akamuisazve pagomo refusa, akamuratidza ushe hwose hwenyika, nokubwinya kwahwo." 
Matthew4:9 Akati kwaari: Izvi zvose ndichapa kwauri kana ukawira pasi ukandinamata. 
Matthew4:10 Ipapo Jesu akati kwaari: Ibvapo Satani nokuti kwakanyorwa \add kuchinzi\add*: Uchamata Ishe Mwari wako, umushumire Iye woga." 
Matthew4:11 Ipapo Dhiabhorosi akamurega; zvino tarira vatumwa vakavuya vakamushumira. 
Matthew4:12 Zvino Jesu wakati anzwa kuti Johwani wakandirwa mutirongo, akaenda Gariri." 
Matthew4:13 Zvino wakabva Nazareta, akasvika akandogara muKapenaumi riri pamahombekombe egungwa, pamiganhu yeZebhuroni neNafitarimi," 
Matthew4:14 kuti zvizadzisike zvakarehwa naIsaya muporofita, achiti:" 
Matthew4:15 Nyika yeZebhuroni nenyika yeNefitarimi, \add pa\add*nzira yegungwa, mhiri kwaJoridhani, Gariri ravahedheni." 
Matthew4:16 Vanhu vakanga vagere murima vakavona chiedza chikuru; navakanga vagere panharaunda nomumumvuri worufu, chiedza chakavabudira." 
Matthew4:17 Kubva panguva iyoyo Jesu wakatanga kuparidza, nokuti: Tendevukai nokuti ushe hwokudenga hwaswedera." 
Matthew4:18 Zvino Jesu, \add wakati\add* achifamba pagungwa reGariri, akavona vana vomunhu mumwe vaviri, Simoni unonzi Petro naAndiriya munun'una wake vachikandira mimbure mugungwa nokuti vakanga vari varedzi." 
Matthew4:19 Akati kwavari: Nditeverei, ndigokuitai varedzi vavanhu." 
Matthew4:20 Pakarepo vakasiya mimbure vakamutevera. 
Matthew4:21 Zvino wakati apfuvurira mberi akavona vamwe vaviri vana vemunhu umwe muchikepe, Jakobho mwanakomana waZebhedhi naJohwani munun'una wake vana Zebhedhi baba vavo, vachigadzira mimbure yavo, akavadana." 
Matthew4:22 Pakarepo vakasiya chikepe nababa vavo vakamutevera. 
Matthew4:23 Jesu akapota neGariri rose achidzidzisa mumasinagoge avo. Achiparidza evhangeri youshe, achiporesa hosha dzamarudzi ose namarwere amarudzi ose pavanhu." 
Matthew4:24 Mukurumbira wake ukapararira kuSiria yose; vakavuyisa kwaari varwere vose, vakabatwa nehosha dzamarudzi mazhinji namarwadzo, navakanga vanemweya yakaipa, navaiva nezvipusha, navakanga vakawoma mitezo; akavaporesa." 
Matthew4:25 Zvino akateverwa \add ne\add*chaunga chevanhu, vaibva Gariri neDhekapori, neJerusarema, neJudhiya, nemhiri kwaJoridhani." 
Matthew5:1 Zvino wakati achivona chaunga, akakwira mugomo, zvino wakati agara pasi, vadzidzi vake vakauya kwaari;" 
Matthew5:2 akashamisa muromo wake, akavadzidzisa, achiti:" 
Matthew5:3 Vakaropafadzwa varombo mumweya; nokuti ushe hwokudenga ndohwavo. 
Matthew5:4 Vakaropafadzwa vanochema; nokuti ivo vachanyaradzwa. 
Matthew5:5 Vakaropafadzwa vanyoro; nokuti vachagara nhaka yenyika. 
Matthew5:6 Vakaropafadzwa vanenzara nenyota yokururama; nokuti vachagutiswa. 
Matthew5:7 Vakaropafadzwa vanengoni; nokuti ndivo vachawana ngoni. 
Matthew5:8 Vakaropafadzwa vakachena pamoyo; nokuti ndivo vachavona Mwari. 
Matthew5:9 Vakaropafadzwa vanoyananisa; nokuti ndivo vachanzi vana vaMwari. 
Matthew5:10 Vakaropafadzwa vanotambudzwa nokuda kokururama; nokuti ushe hwokudenga ndohwavo. 
Matthew5:11 Makaropafadzwa imwi, kana vanhu vachikuzvidzai, vachikutambudzai, vachikupomerai zvakaipa zvose dziri nhema nokuda kwangu." 
Matthew5:12 Farai mupembere kwazvo, nokuti mubairo wenyu mukuru kudenga; nokuti vakatambudza saizvozvo vaporofita vakakutangirai." 
Matthew5:13 Imwi muri munyu wenyika, asi kana munyu usingachavavi, ucharungwa neiko? Hauchabatsiri chinhu, asi kurashirwa kunze, utsikwe navanhu." 
Matthew5:14 Imwi muri chiedza chenyika, guta rakateyiwa pagomo haringavanziki;" 
Matthew5:15 nomwenje havangautungidzi, vakauisa pasi pedengu, asi pachigadziko chemwenje, uvhenekere vose vari mumba." 
Matthew5:16 Saizvozvo chiedza chenyu ngachivhenekere pamberi pavanhu, kuti vavone mabasa enyu akanaka, vakudze Baba venyu vari kudenga." 
Matthew5:17 Musafunga kuti ndavuya kuzoparadza murairo, kana vaporofita; handina kuvuya kuzoparadza, asi kuzozadzisa." 
Matthew5:18 Nokuti zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Kusvikira denga nenyika zvichipfuvura, vara duku rimwe kana chidodzi chimwe chomurairo hazvingatongopfuvuri, kusvikira zvose zvaitika." 
Matthew5:19 Naizvozvo ani nani unodarika mumwe wemirairo miduku iyi, akadzidzisa vanhu saizvozvo, uchanzi muduku muushe hwokudenga. Asi ani nani unoiita, akaidzidzisa saizvozvo uchanzi mukuru muushe hwokudenga;" 
Matthew5:20 nokuti ndinoti kwamuri: Kana kururama kwenyu kukasapfuvura kwavanyori nokwavaFarisi, hamungatongopindi muushe hwokudenga." 
Matthew5:21 Makanzwa kuti zvakanzi kunevekare, Usavuraya; ani nani unovuraya uchava munjodzi yokutongwa." 
Matthew5:22 Asi ini ndinoti kwamuri: Ani nani unotsamwira mumwe wake pasina mhaka, uchapara mhosva ingatongwa; nounoti kuhama yake: Dununu! uchava munjodzi yamakurukota, unoti benzi uchava munjodzi yegehena remoto." 
Matthew5:23 Naizvozvo kana iwe uchivuya nechipo chako kuaritari, ipapo ukarangarira kuti mumwe wako une mhosva newe," 
Matthew5:24 siya ipapo chipo chako pamberi pearitari, uende umbondotanga wayanana nemumwe wako, ugozovuya wopa chipo chako." 
Matthew5:25 Tenderana nomudzivisi wako nokukurumidza, uchiri munzira naye, kuti mudzivisi arege kukukumikidza kumutongi, mutongi kukukumikidza kumutariri, ukakandirwa mutirongo." 
Matthew5:26 Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwauri: Haungatongobudimo, usati waripa kamari kokupedzisira" 
Matthew5:27 Makanzwa kuti zvakanzi kune vekare: Usaita upombwe. 
Matthew5:28 Asi ini ndinoti kwamuri: Mumwe nomumwe unotarisa mukadzi achimuchiva, watoita upombwe naye nechekare mumoyo make." 
Matthew5:29 Zvino kana ziso rako rorudyi richikugumbusa, uridzure urashire kure newe; nokuti zvirinani kwauri kuti mutezo wako umwe ufe pane kuti muviri wako wose ukandirwe mugehena." 
Matthew5:30 Zvino kana ruvoko rwako rworudyi ruchikugumbusa, ugure, ururashire kure newe nokuti zvirinani kwauri kuti mutezo wako umwe ufe, pane kuti muviri wako wose ukandirwe mugehena." 
Matthew5:31 Zvakanzivo: Aninani unoramba mukadzi wake, ngaamupe rugwaro rwokurambana;" 
Matthew5:32 Asi ini ndinoti kwamuri: Mumwe nomumwe unoramba mukadzi wake, asi \add bedzi\add* nemhosva youpombwe, unomuitisa upombwe, uye aninani unowana wakarambwa unoita upombwe." 
Matthew5:33 Uyezve imwi makanzwavo kuti zvakanzi kunavekare, usapika nhema, asi uripire Ishe zvawakapikira." 
Matthew5:34 Asi ini ndinoti kwamuri: Musatongopika; kana nedenga nokuti ndicho chigaro chaMwari choushe; 
Matthew5:35 kana nenyika, nokuti ndicho chitsiko chetsoka dzake; kana neJerusarema nokuti ndiro guta raMambo mukuru;" 
Matthew5:36 usapika kana nomusoro wako, nokuti haugoni kuita ruvhudzi rumwe kuti ruve ruchena kana rutema." 
Matthew5:37 Asi kutaura kwenyu ngakuve, hongu, hongu, kwete, kwete; zvinopfuvura izvozvi zvinobva kune wakaipa," 
Matthew5:38 Makanzwa kuti zvakanzi, ziso \add rinotsihwa\add* neziso, zino nezino." 
Matthew5:39 Asi ini ndinoti kwamuri: Musapikisa wakaipa; asi aninani unokurova padama rako rorudyi, umurinzire rimwevo." 
Matthew5:40 Kana munhu achida kukukumikidza kumutemo, kuti akutorere shati yako, umutendere nejazi rakovo." 
Matthew5:41 Aninani unokumanikidza kuenda newe maira imwe uende naye mbiri. 
Matthew5:42 Ipa unokumbira kwauri, usafuratira unoda kukwereta kwauri." 
Matthew5:43 Makanzwa kuti zvakanzi: Ude wokwako, uvenge muvengi wako;" 
Matthew5:44 Asi ini ndinoti kwamuri: Idai vavengi venyu, ropafadzai vanokutukai, itirai zvakanaka vanokuvengai, munyengeterere vanokushandisai zvakaipa vachikutambudzai." 
Matthew5:45 Kuti muve vanakomana vaBaba venyu vari kudenga, nokuti vanobudisira zuva ravo kune vakaipa navakanaka, nemvura vanoitumira vakarurama navasakarurama." 
Matthew5:46 Nokuti kana muchida vanokudai, munomubairo weiko? vateresi havaiti saizvozvovo here?" 
Matthew5:47 Kana muchikwazisa hama dzenyu bedzi, munopfuvura \add vamwe\add* neiko? Ko navateresi havaiti saizvozvovo here?" 
Matthew5:48 Naizvozvo muve vakakwana saBaba venyu vari kudenga vakakwana. 
Matthew6:1 Chenjerai kuti murege kupa varombo pamberi pavanhu, kuti muvonekwe navo; kana madaro hamuna mubairo kuna Baba venyu vari kudenga." 
Matthew6:2 Zvino kana muchipa varombo, rega kuridza hwamanda pamberi pako, sezvinoita vanyengeri mumasinagoge nomunzira dzomumisha, kuti vakudzwe navanhu. Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Vagamuchira mubairo wavo." 
Matthew6:3 Asi iwe kana uchipa varombo, ruvoko rwako rworuboshwe ngarurege kuziva chinoitwa noruoko rwako rworudyi." 
Matthew6:4 Kuti kupa kwako varombo kuve pakavanda; ipapo Baba vako vanovona pakavanda vachakupa mubairo ivo pachena. 
Matthew6:5 Zvino kana muchinyengetera, musava savanyengeri: nokuti vanofarira kunyengetera vamire mumasinagoge napamharadzano dzenzira dzomumisha kuti vavonekwe navanhu. Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Vawana mubairo wavo." 
Matthew6:6 Asi iwe kana uchinyengetera, pinda muimba yako yomukati; kana wazarira mukova wako, unyengetere kuna Baba vako vari pakavanda; zvino baba vako vanovona pakavanda vachakupa mubairo pachena." 
Matthew6:7 Asi kana muchinyengetera, musapamhidza zvisina maturo savahedheni; nokuti ivo vanofunga kuti vachanzwikwa nokutaura kwavo kuzhinji." 
Matthew6:8 Naizvozvo musafanana navo; nokuti Baba venyu vanoziva zvamunoshaiwa, musati mavakumbira." 
Matthew6:9 Zvino imwi nyengeterai kudai: Baba vedu vari kudenga, zita renyu ngarikudzwe." 
Matthew6:10 ushe hwenyu ngahwuuye, kuda kwenyu ngakuitwe panyika se\add zvakunoitwa\add* kudenga;" 
Matthew6:11 mutipei nhasi zvokudya zvedu zvemisi yose. 
Matthew6:12 Mutikangamwire mhosva dzedu, sezvatinokangamwiravo vane mhosva nesu;" 
Matthew6:13 uye regai kutipinza pakuidzwa, asi mutisunungure panezvakaipa. Nokuti ushe ndohwenyu, nesimba nokubwinya nokusingaperi. Ameni." 
Matthew6:14 Nokuti kana muchikangamwira vanhu kudarika kwavo, Baba venyu vari kudenga vachakukangamwiraivo." 
Matthew6:15 Asi kana musingakangamwiri vanhu kudarika kwavo, Baba venyu havangakukangamwiriivo kudarika kwenyu." 
Matthew6:16 Uyezve kana muchitsanya, musava savanyengeri, regai kuva nechiso chinopunyaira; nokuti vanoipisa zviso zvavo, kuti vavonekwe navanhu kuti vanotsanya. Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Vapiwa mubairo wavo." 
Matthew6:17 Asi iwe kana uchitsanya, zodza musoro wako, ugeze chiso chako," 
Matthew6:18 kuti urege kuvonekwa navanhu kuti unotsanya, asi naBaba vako vari pakavanda; zvino Baba vako vanovona pakavanda, vachakupa mubairo pachena." 
Matthew6:19 Regai kuzvivunganidzira fuma panyika, pane zvifusi nengura zvinovodza napane mbavha dzinopaza dzichiba;" 
Matthew6:20 asi muzvivunganidzire fuma kudenga, kusina zvifusi kana ngura zvinovodza, kusina mbavha dzinopaza dzichiba." 
Matthew6:21 Nokuti panefuma yako, ndipo pachava nomoyo wakovo." 
Matthew6:22 Mwenje womuviri iziso; zvino kana ziso rako rakanakisisa, muviri wako wose uchazara nechiedza." 
Matthew6:23 Asi kana ziso rako rakaipa, muviri wako wose uchazara nerima. Zvino kana chiedza chiri mauri riri rima, rima iro iguru sei!" 
Matthew6:24 Hapana munhu ungashumira vatenzi vaviri; nokuti uchavenga mumwe, akada mumwe; kana uchanamatira mumwe, akazvidza mumwe. Hamungabatiri Mwari naMamona*." 
Matthew6:25 Naizvozvo ndinoti kwamuri: Musafunganya pamusoro peupenyu hwenyu, kuti muchadyei kana muchamwei, kana pamusoro pomuviri wenyu, kuti muchafukeiko? Upenyu hahwupfuvuri zvokudya here, nomuviri zvokufuka here?" 
Matthew6:26 Tarirai shiri dzokudenga, hadzidzvari, hadzikohwi, hadzivunganidziri mumatura, asi Baba venyu vokudenga vanodzirurira. Imwi hamudzipfuvuri zvikuru here?" 
Matthew6:27 Ndianiko kwamuri nokufunganya ungawedzera kubhiti* rimwe pavurefu hwake? 
Matthew6:28 Nezvokufuka munozvifungireiko? Fungai maruva enyika, kuti anokura sei, haabati, haaruki;" 
Matthew6:29 Asi ndinoti kwamuri: Kunyange naSoromoni pakubwinya kwake kose haana kushongedzwa serimwe rawo. 
Matthew6:30 Zvino kana Mwari achifukidza saizvozvo vuswa hwedondo buripo nhasi, huchakandirwa muchoto mangwana, haanga\add kufukidziyi\add* nokupfuurisa imwi vokutenda kuduku here?" 
Matthew6:31 Naizvozvo musafunga, muchiti: Tichadyei? Kana: Tichamwei? Kana: Tichafukei?" 
Matthew6:32 Nokuti izvozvi zvose vahedheni vanozvitsvaka\add vo\add*, nokuti Baba venyu vokudenga vanoziva kuti munoshaiwa izvozvi zvose." 
Matthew6:33 Asi tangai imwi kutsvaka ushe bwaMwari, nokururama kwake, zvino izvozvi zvose zvichawedzerwa kwamuri." 
Matthew6:34 Naizvozvo musafunganya nezvamangwana, nokuti mangwana achazvifungira zvawo. Zuva rakakwanirwa nezvakaipa zvaro." 
Matthew7:1 Musatonga, kuti imwi murege kutongwa," 
Matthew7:2 nokuti nokutonga kwamunotonga nako, muchatongwa nako; nechiyero chamunoyera nacho, muchayerwa nachovo." 
Matthew7:3 Unotaririreiko rubanzu ruri muziso reumwe wako, asi usingarangariri danda riri muziso rako?" 
Matthew7:4 Kana ungataura seiko kuneumwe wako uchiti: Rega ndivhomore rubanzu muziso rako, asi tarira danda riri muziso rako?" 
Matthew7:5 Iwe munyengeri, tanga kubvisa danda muziso rako, ugovona kwazvo kubvisa rubanzu muziso reumwe wako." 
Matthew7:6 Musapa zvitsvene kumbwa, kana kukandira maparera* enyu pamberi penguruve, kuti dzirege kumatsika netsoka dzadzo, dzikatendevuka dzikakubvamburai." 
Matthew7:7 Kumbirai, muchapiwa; tsvakai, muchawana; gogodzai, muchazarurirwa." 
Matthew7:8 Nokuti mumwe nomumwe unokumbira unogamuchira, nounotsvaka unowana, nounogogodza unozarurirwa." 
Matthew7:9 Kana ndoupiko munhu kwamuri, kana mwanakomana wake akakumbira chingwa, unomupa ibwe?" 
Matthew7:10 Kana akakumbira hove, unomupa nyoka here?" 
Matthew7:11 Zvino kana imwi makaipa muchiziva kupa vana venyu zvipo zvakanaka, Baba venyu vari kudenga vachapfuvurisa seiko kupa zvinhu zvakanaka ivo vanomukumbira?" 
Matthew7:12 Saka pazvinhu zvose zvipi nezvipi zvamunoda kuti vanhu vakuitirei, muvaitirevo ivo saizvozvo nokuti uyu ndiwo murairo navaporofita." 
Matthew7:13 Pindai nesuvo rakamanikana, nokuti suvo rakafara nenzira yakapamhamha inoenda kukuparadzwa, vazhinji vanopinda naro." 
Matthew7:14 Nokuti suvo rakamanikana nenzira nhete inoenda kuupenyu, vanoiwana vashoma." 
Matthew7:15 Asi chenjerai vaporofita venhema, vanovuya kwamuri nenguvo dzamakwai, asi mukati ari mapere anoparadza." 
Matthew7:16 Muchavaziva nezvibereko zvavo; Vanhu vanombotanha mazambiringa pamhinzwa here, kana mavonde parukato?" 
Matthew7:17 Saizvozvo muti mumwe nomumwe wakanaka unobereka zvibereko zvakanaka asi muti wakaipa unobereka zvibereko zvakaipa; 
Matthew7:18 muti wakanaka haungabereki zvibereko zvakaipa nomuti wakaipa haubereki zvibereko zvakanaka. 
Matthew7:19 Muti mumwe nomumwe usingabereki zvibereko zvakanaka unotemwa wokandirwa mumoto. 
Matthew7:20 Naizvozvo muchavaziva nezvibereko zvavo. 
Matthew7:21 Havazi vose vanoti kwandiri: Ishe, Ishe, vachapinda muushe hwokudenga; asi uyo unoita kuda kwaBaba vangu vari kudenga." 
Matthew7:22 Vazhinji vachati kwandiri pazuva iro, Ishe, Ishe, hatina kuporofita muzita renyu here? nokudzinga mweya yakaipa muzita renyu? nokuita mabasa anoshamisa mazhinji muzita renyu?" 
Matthew7:23 Zvino ndichavapupurira \add ndichiti\add*: Handina kutongokuzivai; ibvai kwandiri imwi vaiti vezvakaipa. 
Matthew7:24 Naizvozvo mumwe nomumwe unonzwa mashoko angu awa, akaaita, ndichamufananidza nomurume wakachenjera, wakavaka imba yake paruware." 
Matthew7:25 Mvura ikaturuka, mafashame akavuya, mitutu ikavhuvhuta, ikarova paimba, iyo ikasawa; nokuti yakanga yakateyiwa paruware." 
Matthew7:26 Zvino mumwe nomumwe unonzwa mashoko angu awa, akasaaita, uchafananidzwa nomurume benzi, wakavaka imba yake pajecha;" 
Matthew7:27 mvura ikaturuka, mafashame akavuya, mitutu ikavhuvhuta, ikarova imba iyo, ikawa, kuwa kwayo kukava kukuru." 
Matthew7:28 Jesu wakati apedza mashoko iwawa, vanhu vazhinji vakashamiswa nedzidziso yake." 
Matthew7:29 Nokuti wakavadzidzisa sounesimba, asingaiti savanyori." 
Matthew8:1 Wakati aburuka mugomo, chaunga chikuru chikamutevera." 
Matthew8:2 Zvino tarira kwakauya munhu unamaperembudzi, akamugombedzera achiti: Ishe, kana muchida, munogona kundinatsa." 
Matthew8:3 Jesu akatandavadza ruvoko rwake, akamubata, achiti: Ndinoda, chinatswa. Pakarepo maperembudzi ake akanatswa." 
Matthew8:4 Zvino Jesu akati kwaari: Vona kuti usavudza munhu asi enda unozviratidza kumuprista, ubayire chipo chakarairwa naMozisi chive chapupu kwavari." 
Matthew8:5 Zvino Jesu wakati apinda Kapenaume, kwakauya kwaari mumwe mukuru wezana, achimukumbirisa," 
Matthew8:6 achiti: Ishe, muranda wangu uvete kumba, murwere wakafa mutezo, unotambudzika kwazvo." 
Matthew8:7 Zvino Jesu akati kwaari: Ndichavuya ndizomuporesa. 
Matthew8:8 Mukuru wezana akapindura akati: Ishe, handina kufanira kuti mupinde pasi pedenga \add remba\add* yangu; asi taurai henyu shoko chete, zvino muranda wangu uchapora." 
Matthew8:9 Nokuti nenivo ndiri pasi pemasimba, ndina varwi pasi pangu; zvino ndinoti kune uyu: Enda, unoenda, nokunomumwe: Vuya, unovuya. nokumuranda wangu: Ita chichi, unoita." 
Matthew8:10 Jesu wakati achinzwa \add izvozvo,\add* akashamiswa, akati kuna vai\add mu\add*tevera: Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Handina kumbowana kutenda kukuru kwakadai kunyangwe napakati paIsraeri." 
Matthew8:11 Zvino ndinoti kwamuri: Vazhinji vachavuya vachibva kumabvazuva nokumavirira, vachagara naAbhurahamu naIsaka naJakobho, muushe hwokudenga," 
Matthew8:12 asi vanakomana voushe vachakandirwa kurima rokunze; ipo pachava nokuchema nokugeda-geda kwameno. 
Matthew8:13 Zvino Jesu akati kumukuru wezana, enda, uitirwe sezvawakatenda. Muranda wake akapora nenguva iyo." 
Matthew8:14 Jesu, wakati apinda mumba maPetro, akavona mbuyawasha vake vavete vane fivhiri." 
Matthew8:15 Akabata ruvoko rwavo, fivhiri ikabva kwavari: vakasimuka vakavashandira." 
Matthew8:16 Akati ava madekwana vakavuya kwaari navazhinji vaiva vakabatwa nemweya yakaipa; akabudisa mweya neshoko, akaporesa vose vairwara;" 
Matthew8:17 kuti zvizadzisike zvakarehwa naIsaya muporofita achiti: Iye wakatora vutera \add hwedu\add*, akatakura vurwere hwedu." 
Matthew8:18 Jesu wakati achivona chaunga chikuru chakamukomba, akaraira kuti vabve vaende mhiri." 
Matthew8:19 Zvino mumwe munyori akavuya akati kwaari: Mudzidzisi ndichakuteverai kose kwamunoenda. 
Matthew8:20 Zvino Jesu akati kwaari: Mhungubwe dzine mwena, neshiri dzokudenga matendere; asi Mwanakomana womunhu haana paangatsamhidza musoro." 
Matthew8:21 Mumwe wavadzidzi vake akati kwaari: Ishe, ndiregei nditange ndambonoviga baba vangu." 
Matthew8:22 Asi Jesu wakati kwaari: Nditevere, urege vakafa vavige vakafa vavo." 
Matthew8:23 Wakati apinda muchikepe, vadzidzi vake vakamutevera." 
Matthew8:24 Zvino tarira dutu guru remhepo rakamuka mugungwa, zvokuti igwa rakanga rofukidzwa namafungu. Asi Iye wakanga avete." 
Matthew8:25 Zvino vadzidzi vake vakavuya, vakamumutsa, vachiti: Ishe tiponesei toparara!" 
Matthew8:26 Zvino Akati kwavari: Munotyireiko, imwi vokutenda kushoma? Zvino akamuka, akaraira mitutu negungwa; Kudzikama kukuru kukavapo." 
Matthew8:27 Vanhu vakashamiswa vachiti: Uyu munhu rudzii anoti kunyange nemitutu negungwa zvinomuteerera? 
Matthew8:28 Wakati asvika mhiri kunyika yavaGerigesi, akasangana navaviri vaiva nemweya yakaipa, vachibuda kumarinda, vane hasha kwazvo-kwazvo zvokuti kwakanga kusina munhu wagona kupfuvura nenzira iyo." 
Matthew8:29 Zvino tarira vakadanidzira vachiti: Tineiko nemwi, Jesu, Mwanakomana waMwari? Mavuya pano kuzotitambudza nguva isati yasvika here?" 
Matthew8:30 Zvino kure navo kwakanga kune boka guru renguruve dzichifura. 
Matthew8:31 Mweya yakaipa ikamukumbirisa ichiti: Kana muchitibudisa, titenderei kuti tiende tinopinda muboka renguruve." 
Matthew8:32 Zvino akati kwairi: Endai. Zvino yakati yabuda, ikapinda muboka renguruve; zvino tarira boka rose rakamhanyira kwazvo kumateru kugungwa, rikapararira mumvura." 
Matthew8:33 Zvino vaidzifudza vakatiza, vakaenda kuguta, vakataura zvose nezvakaitirwa vakanga vane mweya yakaipa." 
Matthew8:34 Zvino tarira, guta rose rakabuda kundosangana naJesu; vakati vamuvona, vakakumbira zvikuru kwaari kuti abve pamiganhu yavo." 
Matthew9:1 Zvino wakapinda muchikepe, akayambuka ndokusvika muguta rake." 
Matthew9:2 Zvino tarira, vakavuya kwaari nomunhu wakanga akawoma mitezo, avete panhovo; zvino Jesu achivona kutenda kwavo akati kumunhu wakanga akawoma mitezo: Mwana, tsunga moyo, wakangamwirwa zvivi zvako." 
Matthew9:3 Zvino tarira, vamwe vavanyori vakati mumoyo yavo: Uyu unomhura Mwari." 
Matthew9:4 Asi Jesu achiziva mifungo yavo akati: Munofungireiko zvakaipa mumoyo yenyu? 
Matthew9:5 Nokuti chinyiko chakareruka, kuti: Wakangamwirwa zvivi zvako; kana kuti: Simuka ufambe?" 
Matthew9:6 Asi kuti muzive kuti Mwanakomana womunhu unesimba panyika rokukangamwira zvivi, (Akati kumunhu wakanga akafa mitezo): Simuka, tora nhovo yako uende kumba kwako." 
Matthew9:7 Akasimuka, akaenda kumba kwake." 
Matthew9:8 Vanhu vazhinji vakati vachi\add zvi\add*vona vakashamiswa, vakarumbidza Mwari, wakapa simba rakadai kuvanhu." 
Matthew9:9 Zvino Jesu wakati achipfuvurapo, akavona munhu, wainzi Matewu agere panotereswa. Akati kwaari: Nditevere! Ipapo akasimuka, akamutevera." 
Matthew9:10 Zvino kwakati Jesu agere pakudya mumba, tarira, vateresi vazhinji navatadzi vakavuya vakagara pakudya naye navadzidzi vake." 
Matthew9:11 Zvino vaFarisi vachi\add zvi\add*vona, vakati kuvadzidzi vake: Mudzidzisi wenyu unodyireiko navateresi navatadzi?" 
Matthew9:12 Asi Jesu wakati anzwa, akati kwavari: Vasingarwari havatsvaki murapi asi vanorwara." 
Matthew9:13 Asi endai mudzidze kuti zvinorevei \add kuti\add*: Ndinoda ngoni handidi chibayiro; nokuti handina kuvuya kuzodana vakarurama, asi vatadzi mukutendevuka." 
Matthew9:14 Zvino kwakavuya kwaari vadzidzi vaJohwani, vachiti: Isu navaFarisi tinotsanyireiko kazhinji asi vadzidzi venyu havatsanyi?" 
Matthew9:15 Zvino Jesu akati kwavari: Vana veimba yomuchato vangachema seiko chikomba chichiri navo? Asi mazuva achasvika, achabviswa chikomba kwavari, zvino nenguva iyo vachatsanya." 
Matthew9:16 Hakuna munhu unoisa chigamba chitsva panguvo sharu, nokuti chigamba chinobvarura nguvo buri rikanyanya." 
Matthew9:17 Havadirivo waini itsva muhombodo sharu nokuti hombodo dzingaputika, waini ikatevuka nehombodo dzikapararawo, Asi vanodira waini itsva muhombodo itsva zvichengetwe pamwechete" 
Matthew9:18 Wakati achivavudza zvinhu izvozvi, tarira, mumwe mubati akasvika, akamufugamira, achiti: Mukunda wangu uchangofa; asi vuyai muise ruvoko rwenyu pamusoro pake, iye uchararama." 
Matthew9:19 Zvino Jesu akasimuka akamutevera, navadzidzi vake." 
Matthew9:20 Zvino, tarira, mukadzi waiva novurwere hwokubuda ropa makore anegumi namaviri, wakavuya shure kwake, akabata mupendero wenguvo dzake." 
Matthew9:21 Nokuti wakati mumoyo make: Kana ndikangobata chete nguvo yake, ndichaporeswa." 
Matthew9:22 Asi Jesu wakatendevuka akati amuvona, akati: Mukunda, tsunga moyo, kutenda kwako kwakuponesa. Zvino mukadzi akaponeswa kubva panguva iyo." 
Matthew9:23 Zvino Jesu wakasvika mumba momubati akavona varidzi venyere navanhu vazhinji vachiita mhere-mhere," 
Matthew9:24 akati kwavari, Ibvai nokuti musikana haana kufa asi uvete. Vakamuseka." 
Matthew9:25 Asi ruzhinji rwakati rwabudiswa, akapinda, akamubata ruvoko, musikana ndokumuka." 
Matthew9:26 Mukurumbira wazvo ukabudira kunyika iyo yose. 
Matthew9:27 Zvino Jesu wakati achipfuvurapo, mapofu maviri akamutevera, achidanidzira achiti: Mwanakomani waDhavhidhi, tinzwirei ngoni!" 
Matthew9:28 Zvino wakati apinda mumba, mapofu akavuya kwaari; Jesu akati kwaari: Munotenda kuti ndinogona kuita izvozvi here? Akati kwaari: Hongu, Ishe." 
Matthew9:29 Zvino wakabata meso avo achiti: Ngazviitwe kwamuri sokutenda kwenyu. 
Matthew9:30 Zvino meso avo akasvinudzwa; Jesu akavarairisa achiti: Vonai kuti zvirege kuzikamwa nomunhu. 
Matthew9:31 Asi ivo vakati vabuda, vakaparidzira mukurumbira wake munyika iyo yose." 
Matthew9:32 Zvino vakati vachibuda, tarira, vakavuya kwaari nembeveve yaiva nomweya wakaipa." 
Matthew9:33 Zvino mweya wakaipa wakati wabudiswa, mbeveve ikataura; chaunga chikashamiswa chikati: Hakuna kumbovonekwa zvakadai pakati pavaIsraeri." 
Matthew9:34 Asi vaFarisi vakati: Unobudisa mweya yakaipa namambo wemweya yakaipa. 
Matthew9:35 Zvino Jesu wakapota namaguta ose nemisha, achidzidzisa mumasinagoge avo, achiparidza evhangeri youshe, nokuporesa vukosha hwose, nevurwere hwose pakati pavanhu." 
Matthew9:36 Asi wakati achivona chaunga \add chevanhu\add*, akavanzwira tsitsi, nokuti vakanga vaneta, vakapararira kose samakwai asina mufudzi." 
Matthew9:37 Zvino akati kuvadzidzi vake: Zvirokwazvo kukohwa kukuru asi vabati vashoma; 
Matthew9:38 naizvozvo kumbirai kunaShe wokukohwa, kuti atumire vabati pakukohwa kwake." 
Matthew10:1 Zvino wakadanira kwaari vadzidzi vake vanegumi navaviri, akavapa simba pamusoro pemweya yetsvina, kuti vaibudise nokuporesa vukosha hwose novurwere hwose." 
Matthew10:2 Zvino mazita avapositora vanegumi navaviri ndiwawa; wokutanga, Simoni, anonzi Petro, naAndiriya munun'una wake; Jakobho waZebedhi naJohwani munun'una wake;" 
Matthew10:3 Firipi, naBhatoromeo; Tomasi, naMatewu muteresi, Jakobho waArifiyo, naRabheu wainzivo Tadhiyo;" 
Matthew10:4 Simoni muKenani, naJudhasi Isikarioti uyavo wakamutengesa." 
Matthew10:5 Ava vanegumi navaviri Jesu akavatuma, akavaraira, achiti: Musaenda munzira yavahedheni, musapinda muguta ravaSamaria;" 
Matthew10:6 asi zviri nani muende kumakwai akarashika eimba yaIsraeri. 
Matthew10:7 Zvino kana muchifamba, muparidze muchiti: Ushe hwokudenga hwaswedera." 
Matthew10:8 Poresai vanorwara, natsai vanamaperambudzi, mutsai vakafa, budisai mweya yakaipa: Makapiwa pachena, chipai pachena." 
Matthew10:9 Musatora ndarama, kana sirivheri, kana ndarira muzvikwama zvenyu," 
Matthew10:10 kana hombodo yerwendo, kana majazi maviri, kana shangu, kana tsvimbo; nokuti mubati wakafanirwa nezvokudya zvake." 
Matthew10:11 Muguta ripi neripi kana mumusha upi noupi wamunopinda, bvunzai kuti ndiani urimo wakafanira, mugarepo, kusvikira muchibva." 
Matthew10:12 Zvino kana muchipinda mumba, muikwazise." 
Matthew10:13 Kana imba yakafanira, rugare rwenyu ngaruuye pamusoro payo, asi kana isingafaniri, rugare rwenyu ngarudzokere kwamuri." 
Matthew10:14 Ani nani usingakugamuchiriyi, kana kunzwa mashoko enyu, kana muchibva paimba iyo kana paguta iro, muzuze guruva riri patsoka dzenyu." 
Matthew10:15 Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Zvicharerukira nyika yeSodhoma neyeGomora nezuva rokutonga kupfuvura guta iro. 
Matthew10:16 Tarirai ndinokutumai samakwai pakati pamapere; saka chenjerai senyoka mururame senjiva. 
Matthew10:17 Asi chenjerai vanhu; nokuti vachakukumikidzai kumakurukota, uye vachakurovai zvikuru mumasinagoge avo;" 
Matthew10:18 Zvino muchaiswavo pamberi pavabati namadzimambo nokuda kwangu, chive chapupu kwavari nokuvahedheni." 
Matthew10:19 Asi kana vachikukumikidzai, musafunganya muchiti muchataura sei kana chinyiko; nokuti muchapiwa nenguva iyo zvamunofanira kutaura." 
Matthew10:20 Nokuti hamuzimi munotaura asi Mweya waBaba venyu unotaura mamuri. 
Matthew10:21 Mukoma uchaburusira munun'una kurufu, nababa mwana \add wavo\add*; vana vachamukira vabereki vavo nokuvavurayisa." 
Matthew10:22 Uye muchavengwa navose nokuda kwezita rangu; asi unotsungirira kusvika pakuguma, uchaponeswa." 
Matthew10:23 Asi kana vachikutambudzai muguta iri, tizirai kune rimwe; nokuti zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Hamungapedzi maguta avaIsraeri, kusvikira Mwanakomana womunhu asvika." 
Matthew10:24 Mudzidzi haasi pamusoro pemudzidzisi \add wake\add*, kana muranda pamusoro paishe wake." 
Matthew10:25 Zvakaringana kuti mudzidzi ave somudzidzisi wake, nomuranda ave saShe wake. Zvavakaidza Ishe weimba \add kuti\add* Bheerizebhuri, \add vachadaro \add*zvikuru sei veimba yake?" 
Matthew10:26 Naizvozvo musavatya; nokuti hakuna chinhu chakafukidzwa, chisingazobvundunurwi; kana chakavanzika chisingazozikamwi." 
Matthew10:27 Zvandinokuvudzai murima, taurai pachena, zvamunonzwa munzeve, paridzirai pamusoro pedzimba." 
Matthew10:28 Zvino musatya vanovuraya muviri, asi vasingagoni kuvuraya mweya; asi mutye uyo unogona kuparadza zvose mweya nomuviri mugehena." 
Matthew10:29 Ko vuvangu vuviri hahutengeswi nehafu yepeni here? Asi kamwe kahwo hakangawiri pasi kunze \add kokuda\add* kwaBaba venyu. 
Matthew10:30 Kana muri imwi nevhudzi romusoro wenyu rakaverengwa rose. 
Matthew10:31 Naizvozvo musatya, nokuti imwi munopfuvura vuvangu vuzhinji." 
Matthew10:32 Mumwe nomumwe uchandipupura pamberi pavanhu, naiye ndichamupupuravo pamberi paBaba vangu vari kudenga." 
Matthew10:33 Asi mumwe nomumwe unondiramba pamberi pavanhu, naiye ndichamurambavo pamberi paBaba vangu vari kudenga." 
Matthew10:34 Musafunga kuti ndakavuya kuzoisa rugare panyika; handina kuvuya kuzoisa rugare, asi munondo." 
Matthew10:35 Nokuti ndakavuya kuzopesanisa munhu nababa vake, nomwanasikana namai vake, nomurovora navamwene vake;" 
Matthew10:36 navavengi vomunhu ndeveimba yake. 
Matthew10:37 Unoda baba kana mai kupfuvureni haana kufanireni; nounoda mwanakomana nomwanasikana kupfuvureni haana kufanireni; 
Matthew10:38 Zvino usingatori muchinjikwa wake akanditevera, haana kufanireni." 
Matthew10:39 Unowana upenyu hwake ucharashikirwa nahwo; asi unorashikirwa noupenyu hwake nokuda kwangu uchahwuwana. 
Matthew10:40 Uyo unokugamuchirai unondigamuchira; nounogamuchira ini unogamuchira iye wakandituma. 
Matthew10:41 Unogamuchira muporofita muzita romuporofita uchapiwa mubairo womuporofita; nounogamuchira munhu wakarurama muzita romunhu wakarurama uchapiwa mubairo womunhu wakarurama. 
Matthew10:42 Uye aninani unopa mumwe wavaduku ava mukombe chete \add wemvura\add* inotonhora kuti amwe muzita romudzidzi, zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Haangatongorashikirwi nomubairo wake." 
Matthew11:1 Zvino Jesu wakati apedza kuraira vadzidzi vake vanegumi navaviri, akabva akandodzidzisa nokuparidza pamaguta avo." 
Matthew11:2 Zvino Johwani wakati anzwa ari mutirongo mabasa aKristu, akatuma vaviri vavadzidzi vake," 
Matthew11:3 akati kwaari: Ko ndimwi unovuya here, kana titarisire mumwe?" 
Matthew11:4 Jesu akapindura akati kwavari: Endai mundovudza Johwani zvamunonzwa nezvamunovona: 
Matthew11:5 Mapofu anovona, zvirema zvinofamba, vanamaperembudzi vanonatswa, vematsi vanonzwa, vakafa vanomutswa navarombo vanoparidzirwa evhangeri;" 
Matthew11:6 wakaropafadzwa aninani usingagumbuswi neni. 
Matthew11:7 Ava vakati vachienda, Jesu akatanga kuvudza chaunga pamusoro paJohwani \add akati\add*: Makanga mabuda kurenje kunovoneiko? Rutsanga runozungunuswa nemhepo here?" 
Matthew11:8 Zvino makanga mabuda kundovoneiko? Munhu wakapfeka nguvo dzakapfava here? Tarirai, vanopfeka zvakapfava vari mudzimba dzamadzimambo." 
Matthew11:9 Asi makanga mabuda kunooneiko? Muporofita here? Hongu, ndinoti kwamuri: Unopfuvura kwazvo muporofita;" 
Matthew11:10 Nokuti uyu ndiye wakanyorwa pamusoro pake \add zvichinzi\add*: Tarira, ndinotuma mutumwa wangu pamberi pechiso chako, uchakugadzirira nzira yako pamberi pako." 
Matthew11:11 Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Kuna vakaberekwa navakadzi, hakuna kumuka mukuru kuna Johwani Mubhabhatidzi. Asi muduku muushe hwokudenga mukuru kwaari." 
Matthew11:12 Kubva pamazuva aJohwani Mubhabhatidzi kusvikira zvino, ushe hwokudenga hwunopambwa, nevapambi vanohwutora nesimba." 
Matthew11:13 Nokuti vaporofita vose nomurairo vakaporofita kusvikira kuna Johwani; 
Matthew11:14 kana muchida ku\add zvi\add*gamuchira, uyu ndiye Eria wakanga achizovuya." 
Matthew11:15 Une nzeve dzokunzwa, ngaanzwe." 
Matthew11:16 Asi ndicharufananidza neiko rudzi urwu? Rwakafanana navana vagere pamisika, vanodanidzira kushamwari dzavo," 
Matthew11:17 vachiti: Takakuridzirai nyere, mukasatamba; takakuririrai, mukasachema." 
Matthew11:18 Nokuti Johwani wakavuya asingadyi kana kumwa, zvino vanoti: Unomweya wakaipa." 
Matthew11:19 Mwanakomana womunhu wakavuya achidya, achimwa, zvino vanoti: Tarirai munhu unokara mumwi wewaini, shamwari yavateresi navatadzi. Asi njere dzinoruramiswa navana vake." 
Matthew11:20 Zvino wakatanga kusvora maguta makanga maitwa mabasa ake esimba mazhinji, nokuti haana kutendevuka, \add akati\add*:" 
Matthew11:21 Une nhamo iwe Korazini! une nhamo iwe, Bhetisaidha! Nokuti mabasa makuru akaitwa mukati menyu, dai aiitwa muTire neSidhoni, vangadai vakatendevuka kare vanamasaga nemadota." 
Matthew11:22 Asi ndinoti kwamuri: Zvicharerukira Tire neSidhoni nezuva rokutongwa kupfuvuremwi. 
Matthew11:23 Newevo Kapenaume, wakasimudzirwa kudenga, uchaburukira kuHadhesi; nokuti dai iwo mabasa esimba akaitwa mauri akaitwa muSodhoma, ringadai richipo kusvikira zuva ranhasi." 
Matthew11:24 Asi ndinoti kwamuri: Zvichava nyore kunyika yeSodhoma nezuva rokutongwa kupfuvura iwe. 
Matthew11:25 Nenguva iyo Jesu akapindura akati: Ndinokutendai, Baba, Ishe wokudenga napanyika, kuti makavanzira zvinhu izvi vakachenjera navakangwara, mukazvizarurira vacheche." 
Matthew11:26 Hongu Baba nokuti ndizvo zvakakufadzai. 
Matthew11:27 Zvinhu zvose zvakakumikidzwa kwandiri naBaBa vangu. Hakuna unoziva Mwanakomana asi Baba; hakuna unoziva Baba asi Mwanakomana, naiye Mwanakomana waanenge achida kuzarurira." 
Matthew11:28 Vuyai kwandiri mose makaneta makaremerwa, zvino ndichakupai zororo." 
Matthew11:29 Torai joko rangu \add muise\add* pamusoro penyu, mudzidze kwandiri nokuti ndiri munyoro, ndinomoyo unozvininipisa kuti muwane zororo pamweya yenyu." 
Matthew11:30 Nokuti joko rangu rakanaka, nomutoro wangu wakareruka." 
Matthew12:1 Nenguva iyo. Jesu wakafamba nomusi wesabata nemuzviyo; zvino vadzidzi vake vakanga vane nzara, vakatanga kutanha hura vachidya." 
Matthew12:2 Asi vaFarisi vakati vachivona; vakati, kwaari: Tarira vadzidzi vako vanoita zvisingatenderwi kuitwa nomusi wesabata." 
Matthew12:3 Asi wakati kwavari: Ko hamuna kurava here zvakaitwa naDhavhidhi musi waakanga aziya, navakanga vanaye;" 
Matthew12:4 kuti wakapinda sei mumba maMwari, akadya zvingwa zvokuratidza, zvisina kutenderwa kudyiwa naye kana navaiva naye asi navaprista chete?" 
Matthew12:5 Ko hamuna kurava here pamurairo, kuti nesabata vaprista vanosvibisa sabata mutembere asi vasina chavangapomerwa?" 
Matthew12:6 Asi ndinoti kwamuri: Uri pano mukuru kutembere. 
Matthew12:7 Asi dai maiziva kuti zvinorevei \add kuti\add*: Ndinoda ngoni handidi chibayiro, mungadai musina kupa mhosva vasine-mhosva." 
Matthew12:8 Nokuti Mwanakomana womunhu ndiye Ishe kunyangwe wesabata. 
Matthew12:9 Zvino wakati abvapo, akapinda musinagoge ravo." 
Matthew12:10 Zvino tarira, kwakanga kunomunhu wakanga anoruvoko rwakawonyana. Vakamubvunza vachiti: Zvakatenderwa kuporesa nemasabata here? Kuti vamupomere mhosva." 
Matthew12:11 Akati kwavari: Ndiani kwamuri ungava negwai rimwe kana rikawira mugomba nezuva resabata ungarega kuribata aka\add ri\add*budisa? 
Matthew12:12 Munhu unopfuvura gwai zvikuru sei! Saka zvakatenderwa kuita zvakanaka nesabata. 
Matthew12:13 Zvino akati kumunhu: Tambanudza ruvoko rwako. Akarutambanudza, rukaporeswa rukava sorumwe." 
Matthew12:14 Zvino vaFarisi vakabuda, vakarangana pamusoro pake kuti vangamuparadza sei." 
Matthew12:15 Asi Jesu wakati achi\add zvi\add*ziva, akabvapo; chaunga chikuru chikamutevera, akavaporesa vose." 
Matthew12:16 Akavaraira kuti varege kumuzivisa \add pachena\add*. 
Matthew12:17 Kuti zvizadzisike zvakarehwa nomuporofita Isaya achiti: 
Matthew12:18 Tarira muranda wangu wandakasanangura, mudikamwa wangu, unofarirwa nomweya wangu. Ndichaisa mweya wangu pamusoro pake, Iye uchazivisa vahedheni kutonga." 
Matthew12:19 Haangarwisi kana kudanidzira, uye hakunomunhu uchanzwa inzwi rake munzira dzomumisha." 
Matthew12:20 Rutsanga rwakapwanyika haangaruvhuni, nomwenje unopfungaira haangaudzimi. Kusvikira achituma kutonga mukukunda." 
Matthew12:21 Vahedheni vachaita zita rake tariro yavo. 
Matthew12:22 Zvino kwakavuyiswa kwaari mumwe akagarwa nomweya wakaipa, bofu nembeveve; akamuporesa, naizvozvo bofu mbeveve rakataura nokuvona." 
Matthew12:23 Chaunga chose chikashamiswa chikati: Ko uyu haazi mwanakomana waDhavhidhi here? 
Matthew12:24 Asi vaFarisi vakati vachi\add zvi\add*nzwa, vakati: Uyu haabudisi mweya yakaipa, asi naBheerizebhuri muchinda womweya yakaipa." 
Matthew12:25 Zvino Jesu akaziva fungwa dzavo, akati kwavari: Ushe hwumwe nohwumwe hwunozvipesanisa hwunoparadzwa, neguta kana imba inozvipesanisa haingamiri." 
Matthew12:26 NaSatani kana achibudisa Satani unozvipesanisa; ushe hwake hwuchamira seiko? 
Matthew12:27 Uye kana ini ndichibudisa mweya yakaipa naBheerizebhuri, ko vanakomana venyu vanoibudisa nani? Nokuda kwaizvozvo ivo vachava vatongi venyu." 
Matthew12:28 Asi kana ndichibudisa mweya yakaipa noMweya waMwari, ipapo ushe hwaMwari hwatosvika kwamuri." 
Matthew12:29 Munhu ungapinda seiko mumba momunhu unesimba akapamba nhumbi dzake kana asati ambosunga uyo unesimba? Ipapo uchapamba imba yake. 
Matthew12:30 Uyo usineni, unopesana neni nousingavunganidzi neni unoparadzira." 
Matthew12:31 Naizvozvo ndinoti kwamuri: Vanhu vachakangamwirwa zvivi zvose nokumhura Mwari, asi kumhura Mweya mutsvene hakungakangamwirwi munhu." 
Matthew12:32 Aninani unotaura shoko rakaipa kuMwanakomana womunhu uchakangamwirwa. Asi ani nani unotaura shoko rakaipa kuMweya Mutsvene haangakangamwirwi, kana panguva ino kana kune inovuya." 
Matthew12:33 Itai muti uve wakanaka nezvibereko zvawo zvakanakavo, kana itai muti uve wakaipa nezvibereko zvawo zvakaipavo, nokuti muti unozikamwa nezvibereko." 
Matthew12:34 Vana venyoka, mungagona seiko, imwi makaipa kutaura zvinhu zvakanaka? Nokuti muromo unotaura zvizere mumoyo." 
Matthew12:35 Munhu wakanaka unobudisa zvinhu zvakanaka pafuma yake yakanaka yomoyo; nomunhu wakaipa unobudisa zvinhu zvakaipa pafuma yake yakaipa. 
Matthew12:36 Asi ndinoti kwamuri: Shoko rimwe nerimwe risina maturo, rinorehwa navanhu, vachazvidavirira \add pamusoro paro\add* nezuva rokutonga." 
Matthew12:37 Nokuti namashoko ako ucharuramiswa, uye namashoko ako ucharashiwa." 
Matthew12:38 Zvino vamwe vavanyori navaFarisi vakapindura vakati: Mudzidzisi tinoda kuvona chiratidzo kubva kwamuri. 
Matthew12:39 Asi wakapindura akati kwavari: Rudzi rwakaipa runofeva runotsvaka chiratidzo asi hakuna chiratidzo chingapiwa kwavari. Asi chiratidzo chomuporofita Jona. 
Matthew12:40 Nokuti Jona sezvaakava mudumbu rehunga mazuva matatu novusiku vutatu, saizvozvo Mwanakomana womunhu uchava mumoyo wenyika mazuva matatu novusiku vutatu." 
Matthew12:41 Varume veNinivhi vachasimuka mukutongwa norudzi urwu, vacharupa mhosva; nokuti vakatendevuka nokuparidza kwaJona. Tarirai mukuru kuna Jona uri pano." 
Matthew12:42 Mambokadzi wekuchamhembe uchasimuka mukutongwa norudzi urwu, ucharupa mhosva; nokuti wakabva pamagumisiro enyika kuzonzwa vuchenjeri hwaSoromoni. Zvino tarirai, mukuru kunaSoromoni pano." 
Matthew12:43 Zvino kana mweya wetsvina wabuda kumunhu, unotenderera panzvimbo dzakawoma, uchitsvaka zororo uchishaiwa." 
Matthew12:44 Zvino unoti: Ndichadzokera kumba kwangu kwandakabuda; asi uchisvika unoiwana isine-chiro, yakatsvairwa yakarongedzwa." 
Matthew12:45 Zvino unoenda ndokutora pamwechete naye mimwe mweya minomwe yakaipa kumupfuvura, zvino ndokupinda, ndokugaramo; \add chimiro\add* chokupedzisira chomunhu uyu chakaipa kupfuvura chokutanga. Zvichaita saizvozvovo norudzi urwu rwakaipa." 
Matthew12:46 Wakati achataura nechaunga, tarira, mai navana vamai vake vakamira panze, vachitsvaka kutaura naye." 
Matthew12:47 Mumwe akati kwaari: Tarirai, mai venyu navana vamai venyu vamire panze, vachitsvaka kutaura nemwi." 
Matthew12:48 Asi wakapindura akati kuna iye wakamuvudza: Mai vangu ndianiko? navana vamai vangu ndivanaaniko? 
Matthew12:49 Zvino wakatandavadzira ruvoko rwake kuvadzidzi vake, akati: Tarirai, mai vangu navanun'una vangu." 
Matthew12:50 Nokuti aninani unoita kuda kwaBaba vangu vari kudenga, ndiye munun'una wangu, nehanzvadzi namai." 
Matthew13:1 Nezuva rimwechetero, Jesu wakabuda mumba akandogara pasi nechekugungwa." 
Matthew13:2 Zvino chaunga chikuru chakavungana kwaari, nokudaro akapinda muchikepe, akagara pasi; vazhinji vose vakamira pamahombekombe." 
Matthew13:3 Ipapo akataura zvinhu zvizhinji kwavari nemifananidzo, akati: Tarirai, mukushi wakabuda kundokusha." 
Matthew13:4 Zvino pakukusha kwake, dzimwe \add mbeu\add* dzakawira kunzira; shiri dzikasvika dzikadzidya dzose." 
Matthew13:5 Dzimwe dzakawira parukangarahwe, padzakanga dzisinevhu zhinji, dzikamera pakarepo nokuti dzakanga dzisinavhu rakadzika." 
Matthew13:6 Asi zuva rakati rabuda, dzikapiswa, uye nokuti dzakanga dzisinomudzi, dzakasvava." 
Matthew13:7 Dzimwe dzikawira mumhinzwa; mhinzwa ikakura, ikadzivhunga." 
Matthew13:8 Asi dzimwe dzakawira muvhu rakanaka, dzikabereka zvibereko, dzimwe zana, dzimwe makumi matanhatu, dzimwe makumi matatu." 
Matthew13:9 Une nzeve dzokunzwa, ngaanzwe." 
Matthew13:10 Zvino vadzidzi vakavuya, vakati kwaari: Munotaurireiko kwavari nemifananidzo?" 
Matthew13:11 Akapindura akati kwavari: Nokuti kwamuri kwakapiwa kuziva zvakavanzika zvoushe hwokudenga asi ava havana kupiwa. 
Matthew13:12 Nokuti ani nani unazvo uchapiwa ave nezvakawanda. Asi ani nani usina uchatorerwa kunyange nezvaanazvo. 
Matthew13:13 Naizvozvo ini ndinotaura kwavari nemifananidzo, kuti vachivona, asi havangavoni; vachinzwa asi havanganzwi, kana kunzwisisa." 
Matthew13:14 Kuporofita kwaIsaya kwakazadziswa kwavari kunoti: Nokunzwa muchanzwa, musingatongonzwisisi; nokuvona, muchavona, musingatongovonesesi." 
Matthew13:15 Nokuti moyo yavanhu ava yava mikukutu, nenzeve \add dzavo\add* havanyatsonzwa; nameso avo vakaatsinzina. Kuti varege kutongovona nameso, nokunzwa nenzeve, uye vanzwisise nemoyo, uye vatendevuke ndivaporese." 
Matthew13:16 Asi akaropafadzwa meso enyu, nokuti anovona; nenzeve dzenyu, nokuti dzinonzwa." 
Matthew13:17 Nokuti zvirokwazvo ndinoti, kwamuri: Vaporofita navakarurama vazhinji vakanga vachishuva kuvona zvamunovona, asi havana kuzvivona nokunzwa zvamunonzwa asi havana kunzwa." 
Matthew13:18 Naizvozvo imwi inzwai mufananidzo womukushi. 
Matthew13:19 Mumwe nomumwe unonzwa shoko roushe, akasarinzwisisa, wakaipa unosvika ndokubvuta chakakushwa mumoyo make. Uyu ndiye wakakushwa panzira." 
Matthew13:20 Asi wakakushwa parukangarahwe, ndiye unonzwa shoko ndokurigamuchira pakarepo nomufaro." 
Matthew13:21 Asi haana mudzi maari, asi ndiye wechinguvana, kana kushushwa nokutambudzika zvichivuya nokuda kweshoko, pakarepo unogumburwa." 
Matthew13:22 Wakakushwa pakati pemhinzwavo ndiye unonzwa shoko zvino kufunganya kwenyika nokunyengera kwefuma zvinovhunga shoko rikashaiwa zvibereko. 
Matthew13:23 Asi wakakushwa muvhu rakanaka, ndiye unonzwa shoko akanzwisisa, unobereka zvibereko, achiita, mumwe zana, mumwe makumi matanhatu mumwe makumi matatu." 
Matthew13:24 Wakaisa pamberi pavo mumwe mufananidzo, achiti: Ushe hwokudenga hwunofananidzwa nomunhu wakakusha mbeu yakanaka mumunda make." 
Matthew13:25 Asi vanhu vavete, muvengi wake wakavuya, akakusha mashawi pakati pezviyo, akaenda." 
Matthew13:26 Asi chirimwa chakati chamera nokubereka, zvino mashawi akavonekwavo." 
Matthew13:27 Zvino varanda vomwene weimba vakavuya vakati kwaari: Ishe, hamuna kukusha mbeu yakanaka mumunda menyu here? Munda wawanepiko mashawi?" 
Matthew13:28 Akati kwavari: Muvengi waita izvozvo. Varanda vakati kwaari: Ko munoda kuti tindoavunganidza here? 
Matthew13:29 Akati: Kwete zvimwe kana muchivunganidza mashawi, mungadzura nezviyovo nawo." 
Matthew13:30 Regai zvikure zvose kusvikira pakukohwa; zvino nenguva yokukohwa ndichati kuvakohwi: Tangai kuvunganidza mashawi, muasunge mwanda kuti apiswe; asi muvunganidze zviyo mudura rangu." 
Matthew13:31 Wakaisa pamberi pavo mumwe mufananidzo achiti: Ushe hwokudenga hwakafanana netsanga yembeu yemasitadha yakatorwa nomunhu akaidzvara mumunda make. 
Matthew13:32 Iyo iduku kwazvo kumbeu dzose, asi kana yakura ihuru pamirivo yose, inoita muti wokuti shiri dzokudenga dzinovuya dzichigara pamatavi awo." 
Matthew13:33 Akataura mumwe mufananidzo kwavari \add akati\add*: Ushe hwokudenga hwakafanana nembiriso, yakatorwa nomukadzi, akaiviga muzviyero zvitatu zvovupfu kusvikira hwose hwaviriswa." 
Matthew13:34 Izvi zvinhu zvose Jesu wakavudza chaunga nemifananidzo, Haana kutaura chinhu kwavari pasina mifananidzo;" 
Matthew13:35 kuti zvizadziswe zvakarehwa nomuporofita, achiti: Ndichazarura muromo wangu nemifananidzo; ndichataura zvinhu zvakanga zvakavanzika kubva pakuvambwa kwenyika." 
Matthew13:36 Zvino Jesu wakati aendisa ruzhinji, akapinda mumba; vadzidzi vake vakaswedera kwaari, vakati: Tidudzirei mufananidzo wamashawi omumunda." 
Matthew13:37 Akapindura akati kwavari: Unokusha mbeu yakanaka ndiye Mwanakomana womunhu; 
Matthew13:38 munda inyika; mbeu yakanaka, ndivo vanakomana voushe; asi mashawi ndivo vanakomana vowakaipa." 
Matthew13:39 Muvengi wakaakusha ndiye Dhiabhorosi; kukohwa ndiko kuguma kwenguva; vakohwi ndivo vatumwa. 
Matthew13:40 Naizvozvo mashawi sezvaanovunganidzwa achipiswa mumoto, zvichava saizvozvo pakuguma kwenyika." 
Matthew13:41 Mwanakomana womunhu uchatuma vatumwa vake, vagovunganidza muushe hwake zvinhu zvose zvinogumbusa navanoita zvisakafanira;" 
Matthew13:42 zvino vachavakandira muvira romoto; ipapo pachava nokuchema nokugeda-geda kwameno. 
Matthew13:43 Ipapo vakarurama vachapenya sezuva muushe bwaBaba vavo. Une nzeve dzokunzwa, ngaanzwe." 
Matthew13:44 Zvekare ushe hwokudenga hwakafanana nefuma yakavigwa mumunda, iyo yakawanikwa nomunhu akaivigazve; zvino nokufara kwake unoenda, akanotengesa zvose zvaanazvo akatenga munda uwoyo." 
Matthew13:45 uyevo ushe hwokudenga hwakafanana nomushambadziri unotsvaka maparera* akanaka; 
Matthew13:46 akati awana parera* rimwe rinomutengo mukuru, akaenda akandotengesa zvose zvaakanga anazvo, akaritenga." 
Matthew13:47 Ushe hwokudenga hwakafananavo nomumbure unokandirwa mugungwa, unovunganidza marudzi ose \add ehove\add*." 
Matthew13:48 Kana wazara vanoukwevera pamahombekombe, vogara pasi, vovunganidzira dzakanaka mumidziyo, asi dzakaipa vanodzirashira kunze." 
Matthew13:49 Ndizvo zvichaitwa pakuguma kwenyika. Vatumwa vachabuda, vachazungura vakaipa pakati pavakarurama," 
Matthew13:50 vachavakandira muvira romoto; ipapo pachava nokuchema nokugeda-geda kwameno. 
Matthew13:51 Jesu akati kwavari: Manzwisisa izvi zvose here? Vakati kwaari: Hongu Ishe. 
Matthew13:52 Zvino akati kwavari: Naizvozvo munyori mumwe nomumwe wakadzidziswa zvoushe hwokudenga wakafana nomunhu, mwene weimba unobudisa zvinhu zvitsva nezvisharu pafuma yake." 
Matthew13:53 Jesu wakati apedza mifananidzo iyi akabvapo. 
Matthew13:54 Akasvika kunyika yake akavadzidzisa musinagoge ravo, kusvikira vashamiswa vakati: Uyu munhu wakawanepiko kuchenjera uku namabasa esimba?" 
Matthew13:55 Ko haazi mwanakomana womuvezi here? Ko mai vake havanzi Maria here, navanunu'una vake Jakobho, naJose, naSimoni naJudhasi here?" 
Matthew13:56 Nehanzvadzi dzake hadzizi pakati pedu dzose here? Ko iye wakagowanepi zvinhu izvozvi zvose. 
Matthew13:57 Vakagumbuswa naye. Asi, Jesu akati kwavari: Muporofita haangashaiwi kukudzwa asi munyika yake nomumba make." 
Matthew13:58 Akasaita mabasa esimba mazhinji ipapo nokuda kokusatenda kwavo. 
Matthew14:1 Nenguva iyo Herodhe mumwe wavatongi vana wakanzwa mukurumbira waJesu. 
Matthew14:2 Akati kuvaranda vake: Uyu ndiJohwani Mubhabhatidzi; wakamuka kuvakafa, saka mabasa esimba awa anobata maari." 
Matthew14:3 Nokuti Herodhe wakanga abata Johwani akamusunga, aka\add mu\add*isa mutirongo nokuda kwaHerodhiasi mukadzi waFiripi munun'ina wake." 
Matthew14:4 Nokuti Johwani akati kwaari: Hazvitenderwi kuti uve naye. 
Matthew14:5 Zvino wakanga achida kumuvuraya, akatya chaunga, nokuti vaimutora somuporofita." 
Matthew14:6 Asi vachichengetedza zuva rokuberekwa kwaHerodhe, mukunda waHerodhiasi akatamba pamberi pavo, akafadza Herodhe." 
Matthew14:7 Naizvozvo wakamuvimbisa nemhiko kuti uchamupa chinhu chipi nechipi chaaizokumbira. 
Matthew14:8 Zvino iye, wakati arairwa namai vake, akati: Ndipei pano mundiro musoro waJohwani Mubhabhatidzi." 
Matthew14:9 Mambo akashungurudzika, asi nokuda kwemhiko, uye nokuda kwavakanga vagere naye pakudya, akaraira kuti apiwe." 
Matthew14:10 Akatuma \add vanhu\add* vakandogura musoro waJohwani mutirongo. 
Matthew14:11 Musoro wake ukavuyiwa nawo uri mundiro, ukapiwa musikana, aka\add u\add*isa kuna mai vake." 
Matthew14:12 Vadzidzi vake vakavuya vakatora mutumbi, vakauviga, ndokuenda kundovudza Jesu." 
Matthew14:13 Jesu wakati a\add zvi\add*nzwa, akabvapo nechikepe, akaenda kurenje ari oga; zvino vanhu vakati vachinzwa vakabva kumaguta vakamutevera netsoka." 
Matthew14:14 Zvino Jesu wakati achibuda muchikepe, akavona chaunga chikuru, akachinzwira tsitsi, akaporesa varwere vacho." 
Matthew14:15 Zvino ava madekwana, vadzidzi vake vakavuya kwaari vakati: Pano inzvimbo yerenje, nguva dzaenda; regai chaunga chiyende; kuti vaende kumisha vandozvitengera zvokudya." 
Matthew14:16 Asi Jesu wakati kwavari: Havafaniri kuenda; vapei imwi zvavangadya. 
Matthew14:17 Asi vakati kwaari: Hatina chinhu pano kunze kwezvingwa zvishanu nehove mbiri. 
Matthew14:18 Iye akati: Vuyai nazvo vuno kwandiri. 
Matthew14:19 Akaraira chaunga kuti chigare pasi pavuswa, akatora zvingwa zvishanu nehove mbiri, ndokutarira kudenga, akazviropafadza, akamedura zvingwa ndokupa vadzidzi, vadzidzi vakapa chaunga." 
Matthew14:20 Vakadya vose, vakaguta, vakavunganidza zvimedu zvakasara, matengu azere anegumi nemaviri." 
Matthew14:21 Vakanga vadya vaiva varume vane zvuru zvishanu vakadzi navana vasingaverengwi. 
Matthew14:22 Pakarepo Jesu wakagombedzera vadzidzi vake kuti vapinde muchikepe, vamutungamirire mhiri, iye akasara achiendisa chaunga." 
Matthew14:23 Zvino wakati aendisa chaunga, akakwira mugomo ari oga kundonyengetera; madekwana akasvika aripo ari oga." 
Matthew14:24 Asi chikepe zvino chakanga chava pakati pegungwa chichitambudzika namafungu; nokuti mhepo yakanga ichivarwisa. 
Matthew14:25 Nenguva yechina yovusiku Jesu akaenda kwavari achifamba pamusoro pegungwa. 
Matthew14:26 Zvino vadzidzi vakati vachimuvona achifamba pamusoro pegungwa, vakamanikidzwa vachiti madzangaradzimu. Vakadanidzira nokutya." 
Matthew14:27 Asi pakarepo Jesu akataura navo akati: Tsungai moyo; ndini; musatya. 
Matthew14:28 Zvino Petro akamupindura akati: Ishe, kana murimwi ndirairei kuti ndiuye kwamuri pamusoro pemvura." 
Matthew14:29 Iye akati: Vuya. Petro akaburuka muchikepe akafamba pamusoro pemvura, akaenda kuna Jesu." 
Matthew14:30 Asi wakati achivona mhepo ine simba akatya; zvino otanga kunyura, akadanidzira, achiti: Ishe, ndiponesei!" 
Matthew14:31 Pakarepo Jesu wakatandavadza ruvoko, akamubata, akati kwaari: Iwe unokutenda kuduku, unokahadzikireiko?" 
Matthew14:32 Vakati vapinda muchikepe, mhepo ikanyarara." 
Matthew14:33 Ipapo vakanga vari muchikepe vakauya vakamunamata vachiti: Zvirokwazvo ndimwi Mwanakomana waMwari. 
Matthew14:34 Vakati vayambukira mhiri, vakasvika panyika yeGenesareti." 
Matthew14:35 Varume venzvimbo iyo vakati vamuziva, vakatuma \add shoko\add* panyika yose iyo yakapoteredza, vakavuya kwaari navose vairwara." 
Matthew14:36 Vakakumbira zvikuru kwaari kuti vabate chete mupendero wenguvo yake, vose vakabata vakaporeswa zvirokwazvo." 
Matthew15:1 Zvino vakavuya kuna Jesu, vaFarisi navanyori vachibva Jerusarema vakati:" 
Matthew15:2 Seiko vadzidzi venyu vachidarika tsika dzavakuru? Nokuti havashambi mavoko kana vachidya zvokudya? 
Matthew15:3 Akapindura akati kwavari: Nemwivo munodarikireiko murairo waMwari nokuda kwetsika dzenyu? 
Matthew15:4 Nokuti Mwari wakaraira akati: Kudza baba vako namai vako; nokuti unotuka baba kana mai, ngaafe rufu." 
Matthew15:5 Asi imwi munoti: Aninani unoti kuna baba kana mai: Chipi nechipi chamungabatsirwa neni chibayiro," 
Matthew15:6 naizvozvo haachakudzi baba vake kana mai vake; naizvozvo makashayisa murairo waMwari simba netsika dzenyu. 
Matthew15:7 Vanyengeri, Isaya wakaporofita kwazvo pamusoro penyu achiti:" 
Matthew15:8 Vanhu ava vanoswedera kwandiri nemiromo yavo, vachindikudza nemiromo; asi moyo wavo iri kure neni." 
Matthew15:9 Asi vanondinamata pasina, vachidzidzisa dzidziso \add dze\add*mirairo yavanhu." 
Matthew15:10 Zvino akadanira chaunga pedo, akati kwachiri: Teererai munzwisise." 
Matthew15:11 Izvo zvinopinda mumuromo, hazvisvibisi munhu; asi zvinobuda mumuromo, ndizvo zvinosvibisa munhu." 
Matthew15:12 Zvino vadzidzi vakaswedera vakati kwaari: Munoziva kuti vaFarisi vakagumburwa vanzwa shoko iri here? 
Matthew15:13 Asi wakapindura akati: Muti mumwe nomumwe, usina kusimwa naBaba vangu vokudenga uchadzurwa." 
Matthew15:14 Varegei vakadaro; mapofu anotungamirira mapofu; zvino kana bofu richitungamiraira bofu, vose achawira mugomba." 
Matthew15:15 Petro akapindura akati kwaari: Tidudzireivo mufananidzo uyu. 
Matthew15:16 Zvino Jesu akati: Nazvino nemwivo muchigere kunzwisisa here? 
Matthew15:17 Hamunzwisisi here, kuti zvose zvinopinda mumuromo, zvinoenda mudumbu, zvichizorashwa kunze?" 
Matthew15:18 Asi zvinhu izvo zvinobuda mumuromo zvinobva mumoyo; ndizvo zvinosvibisa munhu. 
Matthew15:19 Nokuti mumoyo munobuda ndangariro dzakaipa, vumhondi, vufeve, upombwe, kuba, kupupura nhema, nokumhura Mwari." 
Matthew15:20 Izvi ndizvo zvinosvibisa munhu; asi kudya namavoko asati ashambwa hazvisvibisi munhu. 
Matthew15:21 Zvino Jesu wakabvapo akaenda kumiganhu yeTire neSidhoni. 
Matthew15:22 Zvino tarira, mukadzi muKanani wakabva kumiganhu iyo akadana achiti: Ndinzwirei ngoni! Haiwa Ishe, Mwanakomana waDhavhidhi, mwanasikana wangu wakabatwa zvakasimba nomweya wakaipa." 
Matthew15:23 Asi haana kumupindura kana shoko rimwe. Ipapo vadzidzi vake vakavuya kwaari vakakumbira vachiti: Muendesei, nokuti unodanidzira shure kwedu." 
Matthew15:24 Asi wakapindura akati: Handina kutumwa \add zvimwe\add*, asi kumakwai akarashika eimba yaIsraeri." 
Matthew15:25 Zvino akavuya akamugombedzera akati: Ishe, dondibatsirai henyu." 
Matthew15:26 Akapindura akati: Hazvina kunaka kutora chingwa chavana, ndokukandira imbwanana." 
Matthew15:27 Asi iye akati: Hongu, Ishe, kunyange nembwananavo dzinodya zvimedu zvinowa patafura yavatenzi vadzo." 
Matthew15:28 Zvino Jesu akapindura akati kwaari: Haiwa mukadzi, kutenda kwako kukuru! ngazvive kwauri sezvaunoda. Mwanasikana wake akapora kubva panguva iyoyo." 
Matthew15:29 Jesu wakati achibva ipapo akaenda pedo negungwa reGariri; Akakwira mugomo, akagara pasi ipapo." 
Matthew15:30 Zvino chaunga chikuru chikavuya kwaari nemhetamakumbo, namapofu nembeveve nezvirema, navamwe vazhinji vakakanda patsoka dzaJesu; akavaporesa." 
Matthew15:31 Naizvozvo chaunga chakashamisika chichivona mbeveve dzichitaura, nezvirema zvichiporeswa, nemhetamakumbo dzichifamba, namapofu achivona; vakarumbidza Mwari wavaIsraeri." 
Matthew15:32 Zvino Jesu wakadana vadzidzi vake akati: Ndinetsitsi nechaunga, nokuti vakagara neni mazuva matatu, vasina chavakadya; handingavaindisi vasina kudya, zvimwe vangaziya panzira." 
Matthew15:33 Vadzidzi vake vakati kwaari: Ticha\add wane\add*piko zvingwa zvakawanda zvakadaro murenje, kuti tigutise chaunga chakadai?" 
Matthew15:34 Jesu akati kwavari: Munezvingwa zvinganiko? Vakati: Zvinomwe, nehove duku shomanene." 
Matthew15:35 Zvino akaraira chaunga kuti chigare pasi pavhu. 
Matthew15:36 Akatora zvingwa zvinomwe nehove, akavonga, akamedura, ndokupa vadzidzi vake, vadzidzi \add vakapa\add* chaunga." 
Matthew15:37 Vakadya vose vakaguta; vakanonga zvimedu zvakasara, matengu manomwe azere." 
Matthew15:38 Zvino avo vakadya vakanga vari varume vane zvuru zvina, vakadzi navana vasingaverengwi." 
Matthew15:39 Zvino wakati aendisa chaunga, akapinda muchikepe, akasvika kumiganhu yeMagadhani." 
Matthew16:1 VaFarisi navaSajusi vakati vavuya vachiidza; vakamukumbira kuti avaratidze chiratidzo chinobva kudenga. 
Matthew16:2 Asi wakapindura akati kwavari: Kana ava madekwana munoti: Kunze kwakanaka nokuti denga rakatsvuka. 
Matthew16:3 Mangwanani \add munoti\add*: Nhasi kunze kwakaipa; nokuti denga rakatsvuka richikwidibira. Haiwa vanyengeri, munoziva kuparadzanisa mamiriro edenga, asi hamugoni \add kuparadzanisa\add* zviratidzo zvenguva." 
Matthew16:4 Rudzi rwakaipa runofeva, runotsvaka chiratidzo, asi hapana chiratidzo chingapiwa kwarwuri, asi chiratidzo chomuporofita Jona. Ipapo akavasiya, akaenda." 
Matthew16:5 Zvino vadzidzi vakati vaenda mhiri, vakakangamwa kutora zvingwa." 
Matthew16:6 Zvino Jesu akati kwavari: Chenjerai mungwarire mbiriso yavaFarisi navaSajusi. 
Matthew16:7 Vakarangana pakati pavo vachiti: \add Unodaro\add* nokuti hatina kutora chingwa. 
Matthew16:8 Zvino Jesu achizviziva akati kwavari: Haiwa, imwi vokutenda kuduku, munorangana pakati penyu nemhaka yeiko nezvokusatora zvingwa?" 
Matthew16:9 Hamunzwisisi nazvino here, kana kurangarira zvingwa zvishanu zvavanezvuru zvishanu, uye matengu mangani amakawana?" 
Matthew16:10 Kana zvingwa zvinomwe zvavanezvuru zvina, uye matengu mangani amakavunganidza?" 
Matthew16:11 Hamunzwisisi neiko, kuti handina kutaura kwamuri pamusoro pezvingwa kuti muchenjere mbiriso yavaFarisi navaSajusi?" 
Matthew16:12 Zvino vakanzwisisa kuti haana kutaura kuti vachenjere mbiriso yezvingwa asi dzidziso yavaFarisi navaSajusi. 
Matthew16:13 Jesu wakati asvika kumativi enyika yeKesaria Firipi, akabvunza vadzidzi vake, akati: Vanhu vanoti ini Mwanakomana womunhu ndini aniko?" 
Matthew16:14 Vakati: Vamwe \add vanoti\add* Johwani Mubhabhatidzi, vamwe Eria, vamwevo Jeremiya, kana mumwe wavaporofita." 
Matthew16:15 Akati kwavari: Ko imwi munoti ndini ani? 
Matthew16:16 Ipapo Simoni Petro akapindura akati: Ndimwi Kristu, Mwanakomana waMwari mupenyu." 
Matthew16:17 Jesu akapindura akati kwaari: Wakaropafadzwa iwe, Simoni mwanakomana waJona, nokuti nyama neropa hazvina kukuzarurira \add izvozvo\add*, asi Baba vangu vari kudenga." 
Matthew16:18 Nenivo ndinoti kwauri: Ndiwe Petro, zvino pamusoro poruware urwu ndichavaka kereke yangu, masuvo ehedhesi* haangaikundi." 
Matthew16:19 Zvino ndichapawo kwauri kiyi dzoushe hwokudenga; chinhu chipi nechipi chauchasunga panyika, chichasungwa kudenga; nechinhu chipi nechipi chauchasunungura panyika, chichasunungurwa kudenga." 
Matthew16:20 Ipapo akarairisa vadzidzi vake kuti varege kuvudza munhu kuti ndiye Jesu unova Kristu. 
Matthew16:21 Kubva panguva iyo Jesu wakatanga kuratidza vadzidzi vake kuti unofanira kuenda sei Jerusarema, uye kutambudzwa zvizhinji navakuru, navaprista vakuru navanyori, nokuvurawa nokumutswazve nezuva retatu." 
Matthew16:22 Petro akamutora parutivi, akatanga kumutsiura akati: Ngazvirege kuva kwamuri, Ishe; izvi hazvingaitiki kwamuri." 
Matthew16:23 Asi wakatendeuka akati kuna Petro: Ibva shure kwangu, Satani! Uri chigumbuso kwandiri; nokuti haurangariri zvinhu zvaMwari, asi zvinhu zvavanhu." 
Matthew16:24 Zvino Jesu akati kuvadzidzi vake: Kana aninani achida kunditevera, ngaazvirambe, atakure muchinjikwa wake, anditevere." 
Matthew16:25 Nokuti aninani unoda kuponesa upenyu hwake ucharashikirwa nahwo; asi ani nani unorashikirwa noupenyu hwake nokuda kwangu uchahwuwana. 
Matthew16:26 Nokuti munhu unomubairo weiko kana akawana nyika yose, akarashikirwa nomweya wake? kana munhu ucharipeiko kuti adzikunure mweya wake?" 
Matthew16:27 Nokuti Mwanakomana womunhu uchavuya nokubwinya kwaBaba vake navatumwa vake, ipapo uchapa mubairo mumwe nomumwe zvichienderana namabasa ake." 
Matthew16:28 Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Vamwe varipo kuna vamire pano, vasingazoraviri rufu kusvikira vavona Mwanakomana womunhu achivuya muushe hwake." 
Matthew17:1 Shure kwemazuva matanhatu Jesu akatora Petro, naJakobho, naJohwani munun'una wake, akaenda navo mugomo refu vari voga." 
Matthew17:2 Akashandurwa chimiro pamberi pavo, chiso chake chikapenya sezuva, nguvo dzake dzikachena sechiedza." 
Matthew17:3 Zvino tarira, Mozisi naEria vakavonekwa kwavari, vachitaura naye." 
Matthew17:4 Zvino Petro akapindura, akati kunaJesu: Ishe, zvakatinakira kuva pano; kana muchida, ndichavaka matumba matatu pano, rimwe renyu, rimwe raMozisi rimwe raEria." 
Matthew17:5 Wakati achataura, tarira, gore rinobwinya rakavafukidza; zvino tarirazve inzwi rikabva mugore, richiti: Uyu Mwanakomana wangu unodikamwa, unondifadza kwazvo mumunzwei." 
Matthew17:6 Vadzidzi vakati vachi\add zvi\add*nzwa, vakawa nezviso zvavo, vakatya zvikuru." 
Matthew17:7 Asi Jesu akaswedera akavabata, akati: Simukai, musatya." 
Matthew17:8 Vakati vachisimudza meso avo, havana kuzovona munhu, asi Jesu chete." 
Matthew17:9 Zvino vakati vachiburuka mugomo, Jesu akavaraira, akati: Musavudza munhu chiratidzo, kusvikira Mwanakomana womunhu amuka kuvakafa." 
Matthew17:10 Vadzidzi vakamubvunza, vachiti: Vanyori vanogotaurireiko, vachiti: Eria unofanira kutanga kuvuya?" 
Matthew17:11 Jesu akapindura, akati kwavari: Eria uchatanga kuvuya zvirokwazvo, avandudze zvinhu zvose." 
Matthew17:12 Asi ndinotaura kwamuri kuti Eria wakatosvika, asi havana kumuziva, asi vakamuitira chipi nechipi chavakada; saizvozvovo Mwanakomana womunhu uchabva wotambudzwa navo." 
Matthew17:13 Zvino vadzidzi vakanzwisisa kuti wakataura kwavari zvaJohwani Mubhabhatidzi. 
Matthew17:14 Vakati vasvika kuchaunga, kwakavuya kwaari munhu, akamufugamira, akati:" 
Matthew17:15 Ishe, donzwirai mwanakomana wangu ngoni, nokuti unezvipusha, unotambudzika kwazvo; nokuti kazhinji unowira mumoto, kazhinji mumvura." 
Matthew17:16 Ndakamuvuyisa kuvadzidzi venyu, vakasagona kumuporesa." 
Matthew17:17 Jesu akapindura, akati: Haiwa! Rudzi rusingatendi, rwakatsauka, ndichagara nemwi kusvikira rinhiko? Ndichakuitirai moyo murefu kusvikira rinhiko? Vuyai naye pano kwandiri." 
Matthew17:18 Zvino Jesu akatsiura, mweya wakaipa ukabuda kwaari, mukomana akapora kubva panguva iyoyo." 
Matthew17:19 Zvino vadzidzi vakavuya kunaJesu parutivi, vakati: Ko isu takanga tisingagoni neiko kuubudisa?" 
Matthew17:20 Jesu akati kwavari: Nemhaka yokusatenda kwenyu. Nokuti zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Kana munokutenda kwakaita setsanga yemasitadha, mungati kugomo iri: Ibva pano, enda koko; ringaenda; hakune chinhu chingakukundai." 
Matthew17:21 Asi rudzi urwu runongobva chete nokunyengetera nokutsanya. 
Matthew17:22 Zvino vachigara muGariri, Jesu akati kwavari: Mwanakomana womunhu wobva wokumikidzwa mumavoko avanhu," 
Matthew17:23 zvino vachamuvuraya, asi nezuva retatu uchamutswazve. Vakashurukirwa zvikuru." 
Matthew17:24 Vakati vachisvika Kapenaume, vanhu vaigamuchira mutero vakavuya kuna Petro, vakati: Mudzidzisi wenyu haaripi muripo wetembere here?" 
Matthew17:25 Akati: Hongu. Zvino wakati achipinda mumba, Jesu akatanga kutaura kwaari, achiti: Unofungeiko Simoni? Madzimambo enyika anotora muripo nomutero kunavana aniko? Kuvanakomana vavo kana kuvaeni?" 
Matthew17:26 Peturo akati kwavari: Kuveni. Jesu akati kwaari: Saka vanakomana vakasununguka. 
Matthew17:27 Asi, kuti tirege kuvagumbusa, enda kugungwa ukande chiredzo; ubate hove inotanga kubuda; kana washamisa muromo wayo, uchawana mari; uitore, uvape iyo, ive yangu neyako." 
Matthew18:1 Nenguva iyo vadzidzi vakavuya kuna Jesu vakati: Ndianiko mukurusa paushe hwokudenga? 
Matthew18:2 Jesu akadanira kwaari mwana muduku akamumisa pakati pavo," 
Matthew18:3 Akati: Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Kana musingashanduki mukava savana vaduku, hamungatongopindi muushe hwokudenga." 
Matthew18:4 Naizvozvo aninani unozvininipisa somwana muduku uyu ndiye mukurusa muushe hwokudenga. 
Matthew18:5 Zvino aninani unogamuchira mwana muduku mumwe wakadai nezita rangu unogamuchira ini. 
Matthew18:6 Asi aninani unogumbusa mumwe wavaduku ava vanotenda kwandiri, zvirinani kwaari kuti guyo rinoremesa risungirirwe pamutsipa wake, anyudzwe mugungwa pakadzika." 
Matthew18:7 Inenhamo nyika, nemhaka yezvigumbuso! Nokuti zvinofanira kuti zvigumbuso zviuye hazvo; asi une nhamo munhu uyo unovuya nezvigumbuso!" 
Matthew18:8 Zvino kana ruvoko rwako kana rutsoka rwako zvichikugumbusa, uzvigure, urashire kure newe; zviri nani kwauri kuti upinde muupenyu uri chirema kana uchikamhina pakukandirwa mumoto wokusingaperi unamavoko maviri kana tsoka mbiri" 
Matthew18:9 Kana ziso rako richikugumbusa uridzure urashire kure newe; zviri nani kwauri kuti upinde muupenyu uneziso rimwe pakuti unameso maviri ukandirwe mugehena romoto. 
Matthew18:10 Chenjerai kuti murege kuzvidza mumwe wavaduku ava, nokuti ndinoti kwamuri: Kudenga vatumwa vavo vanogarovona chiso chaBaba vangu vari kudenga." 
Matthew18:11 Nokuti Mwanakomana womunhu wakavuya kuzoponesa chakarashika. 
Matthew18:12 Munofungeiko? Kana munhu anezana ramakwai, rimwe rawo rikarashika, haangasiyi makumi mapfumbamwe namapfumbamwe, akaenda kumakomo kundotsvaka rakarashika here?" 
Matthew18:13 Kana zvikaitika kuti ariwana, zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Unorifarira kupfuvura makumi mapfumbamwe namapfumbamwe asina kurashika." 
Matthew18:14 Nokudaro hakuzi kuda kwaBaba venyu vari kudenga, kuti mumwe wavaduku ava aparare." 
Matthew18:15 Asi kana hama yako yakutadzira, enda umuvudze mhosva yake, iwe naiye muri moga; kana akakunzwa, watsiura hama yako." 
Matthew18:16 Asi kana asinganzwi, tora mumwe kana vaviri newe, kuti shoko rimwe nerimwe risimbiswe nemiromo yezvapupu zviviri kana zvitatu." 
Matthew18:17 Kana asina hanya nokuanzwa, uvudze kereke; kana asina hanya nokunzwa kereke, ngaave kwauri somuhedheni nomuteresi." 
Matthew18:18 Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Chipi nechipi chamuchasunga panyika, chichasungwa kudenga; uye chipi nechipi chamunosunungura panyika, chichasunungurwa kudenga." 
Matthew18:19 Zvekare ndinoti kwamuri: Kana vaviri venyu vakatenderana panyika pamusoro pechinhu chipi nechipi chavanokumbira, vachachiitirwa naBaba vangu vari kudenga." 
Matthew18:20 Nokuti apo pakavungana vaviri kana vatatu muzita rangu, neni ndiripo pakati pavo." 
Matthew18:21 Zvino Petro wakavuya kwaari akati: Ishe, hama yangu ichanditadzira kanganiko, ndikaikangamwira? Kusvikira kanomwe here?" 
Matthew18:22 Jesu akati kwaari: Handiti kwauri kusvikira kanomwe, asi kusvikira makumi manomwe; akapamhidzirwa kanomwe." 
Matthew18:23 Naizvozvo ushe hwokudenga hwunofananidzwa nomumwe mambo, wakanga achida kuongorora varanda vake." 
Matthew18:24 Zvino wakati achitanga kuongorora, mumwe akavuyiswa kwaari wakanga anechikwereti chamatarenda* anezvuru zvamazana zvinegumi." 
Matthew18:25 Asi wakati achishaiwa chaangaripa nacho, ishe wake akaraira kuti atengeswe nomukadzi navana, nezvose zvaakanga anazvo, kuti muripo uitwe." 
Matthew18:26 Naizvozvo muranda akawira pasi, akamunamata, akati: Ishe, ivai nomoyo murefu neni, ndichazokuripirai zvose." 
Matthew18:27 Zvino ishe womuranda uyo akamunzwira tsitsi, akamusunungura, akamukangamwira chikwereti." 
Matthew18:28 Asi muranda uyo wakati achibuda, akawana mumwe muranda \add waibata\add* pamwe chete naye, wakanga anechikwereti kwaari chamadhenari* anezana; akamubata, aka\add mu\add*dzipa, akati: Ndiripe chikwereti changu." 
Matthew18:29 Zvino muranda uyo waibata pamwe chete naye akawira pasi patsoka dzake akakumbira zvikuru kwaari, akati: Uve nomoyo murefu neni, ndichazokuripira zvose." 
Matthew18:30 Asi iye wakaramba, akaenda, akamuisa mutirongo, kusvikira achizoripa chikwereti." 
Matthew18:31 Zvino vamwe varanda vaibata pamwe chete naye vakati vachivona zvakanga zvaitika, vakashungurudzika kwazvo, vakaenda kundovudza ishe wavo zvose zvakaitwa." 
Matthew18:32 Zvino ishe wake wakati amudana, akati kwaari: Iwe muranda wakaipa, ndakakukangamwira chikwereti icho chose, nokuti iwe wakandigombedzera zvikuru." 
Matthew18:33 Ko iwe hauzaifanira kunzwira tsitsi mumwe muranda \add unobata\add* pamwe chete newe, seni ndakakunzwira tsitsi here?" 
Matthew18:34 Zvino ishe wake akatsamwa, akamukumikidza kuvarwadzisi, kusvikira achizoripa zvose zvakafanira." 
Matthew18:35 Saka saizvozvo Baba vangu vari kudenga vachakuitiraivo, kana musingakangamwiri mumwe nomumwe hama yake nomoyo yenyu yose." 
Matthew19:1 Zvino Jesu wakati apedza mashoko iwayo, akabva Gariri, akasvika kumiganhu yeJudhiya mhiri kweJorodhani." 
Matthew19:2 chaunga chikamutevera, akavaporesapo." 
Matthew19:3 VaFarisi vakavuyavo kwaari, vakamuidza, vachiti kwaari: Ko munhu unotenderwa kuramba mukadzi wake nemhaka ipi neipi here?" 
Matthew19:4 Akapindura, akati kwavari: Hamuna kurava here, kuti uyo waka\add va\add*sika pakutanga wakavaita murume nomukadzi?" 
Matthew19:5 Akati: Nokuda kwaizvozvo murume uchasiya baba namai, akanamatira mukadzi wake; ava vaviri vachava nyama imwe." 
Matthew19:6 Nokudaro havachisiri vaviri, asi nyama imwe. Naizvozvo izvo Mwari zvaakasonganisa, munhu ngarege kuzviparadzanisa." 
Matthew19:7 Vakati kwaari: Mozisi wakagoraireiko kupa rugwaro rwokurambana, nokumudzinga?" 
Matthew19:8 Akati kwavari: Nokuda kovukukutu hwemoyo yenyu Mozisi wakakutenderai kuramba vakadzi venyu, asi kubva pakutanga zvakanga zvisina kudaro." 
Matthew19:9 Asi ndinoti kwamuri: Ani nani unoramba mukadzi wake, kunze kwemhaka youpombwe, akawana mumwe, unoita upombwe; nounowana wakarambwa unoita upombwe." 
Matthew19:10 Vadzidzi vake vakati kwaari: Kana zvakadaro pakati pomurume nomukadzi, hazvina kunaka kuwana." 
Matthew19:11 Asi iye akati kwavari: Vose havagamuchiri shoko iri, asi avo vakaripiwa." 
Matthew19:12 Nokuti dziripo ngomwa, dzakaberekwa dzakadaro kubva mudumbu ramai; uye kune ngomwa, dzakaitwa ngomwa navanhu; ngomwa dziripo dzakazviita ngomwa nokuda koushe hwokudenga. Unogona kugamuchira \add shoko iri\add*, ngaagamuchire." 
Matthew19:13 Zvino vakavuya kwaari navana vaduku, kuti aise mavoko pavari, anyengetere; asi vadzidzi vakavatsiura." 
Matthew19:14 Asi Jesu wakati: Tenderai vana vaduku, musavadzivisa kuvuya kwandiri; nokuti ushe hwokudenga ndohwavakadai." 
Matthew19:15 Akaisa mavoko pamusoro pavo, akabvapo." 
Matthew19:16 Zvino tarira, mumwe wakavuya akati kwaari: Mudzidzisi wakanaka, ndingaita chinhu chakanaka chipiko, kuti ndive noupenyu hwusingaperi?" 
Matthew19:17 Akati kwaari: Unondiidzireiko wakanaka? Hakuna wakanaka, asi mumwe, \add ndiye\add* Mwari. Asi kana uchida kupinda muupenyu, chengeta mirairo." 
Matthew19:18 Akati kwaari: Ipiko? Jesu akati: Usavuraya, usaita upombwe, usaba, usapupura nhema;" 
Matthew19:19 kudza baba vako namai, ude muvakidzani wako sezvaunozvida iwe." 
Matthew19:20 Jaya rikati kwaari: Izvozvo zvose ndakazvichengeta kubva pavuduku hwangu; ndichiri kushaiweiko? 
Matthew19:21 Jesu akati kwaari: Kana uchida kukwana, enda utengese zvaunazvo, upe varombo, ugova nefuma kudenga; ugovuya unditevere." 
Matthew19:22 Asi jaya rakati richinzwa shoko iro, rikaenda richishungurudzika; nokuti rakanga rine midziyo mizhinji." 
Matthew19:23 Jesu akati kuvadzidzi vake: Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Mufumi ucharemerwa kupinda muushe hwokudenga. 
Matthew19:24 Ndinotizve kwamuri: Kamera ingarerukirwa kupinda paburi retsono, kumufumi kupinda muushe hwaMwari." 
Matthew19:25 Vadzidzi vakati va\add zvi\add*nzwa, vakashamisika kwazvo, vakati: Ndianiko ungagona kuponeswa?" 
Matthew19:26 Asi Jesu wakatarira akati kwavari: Kuvanhu izvi hazvibviri, asi kuna Mwari zvose zvinobvira." 
Matthew19:27 Zvino Petro akapindura, akati kwaari: Tarirai, isu takasiya zvose, tikakuteverai; tichagowaneiko?" 
Matthew19:28 Jesu akati kwavari: Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Imwi makanditevera, pakuberekwa kutsva kana Mwanakomana womunhu achizogara pachigaro choushe chokubwinya kwake, imwivo muchagara pazvigaro zvinegumi nezviviri, muchitonga marudzi anegumi namaviri aIsraeri." 
Matthew19:29 Uye mumwe nomumwe wakasiya dzimba, kana vanun'una namadzikoma, kana hanzvadzi, kana baba, kana mai, kana mukadzi, kana vana, kana minda, nokuda kwezita rangu, uchapiwa zvinezana, akagara nhaka youpenyu hwusingaperi."
