Matthew19:30 Asi vazhinji vokutanga vachava vokupedzisira, novokupedzisira, vokutanga." 
Matthew20:1 Nokuti ushe hwokudenga hwakafana nomunhu, mwene weimba, wakabuda mangwanani-ngwanani kundotsvakira munda wake wemizambiringa vabati." 
Matthew20:2 Wakati atenderana navabati padhenari* pazuva, akavatuma kumunda wake wemizambiringa." 
Matthew20:3 Akabuda nenguva inenge yechitatu, akavona vamwe vamire pamisika, vasina chavaiita;" 
Matthew20:4 akati kwavari: Endai imwivo mumunda wemizambiringa, ndigokupai chero zvakafanira, vakaenda." 
Matthew20:5 Akabudazve nenguva inenge yechitanhatu neyepfumbamwe, akaita saizvozvozve." 
Matthew20:6 Zvino nenguva inenge yegumi neimwe, akabuda, akawana vamwe vamire vasina chavaiita, akati kwavari: Makamirireiko pano zuva rose musina chamunoita?" 
Matthew20:7 Vakati kwaari: Nokuti hapanomunhu wakatipa basa. Akati kwavari: Endai nemwivo mumunda wemizambiringa muchawana zvose zvakafanira. 
Matthew20:8 Ava madekwana, mwene womunda wemizambiringa wakati kumutariri wake: Dana vabati, uvape mubairo, uchitanga kunovokupedzisira, kuswikira kunovokutanga." 
Matthew20:9 Zvino vakati vachivuya, nenguva inenge yegumi neimwe, vakawana mumwe nomumwe dhenari*." 
Matthew20:10 Asi vokutanga vakati vachivuya, vakafunga kuti vachapiwa zvakapfuvura; asi ivo vakapiwavo mumwe nomumwe dhenari*." 
Matthew20:11 Vakati vagamuchira, vakagunun'unira mwene weimba," 
Matthew20:12 vakati: Ava vokupedzisira, vakabata nguva imwe chete, asi mavaenzanisa nesu takatakura mutoro zuva rose tichitsva nezuva." 
Matthew20:13 Akapindura, akati kunomumwe wavo: Shamwari, handikuitiri zvisakarurama; hatina kutenderana padhenari* here?" 
Matthew20:14 Tora zvako uende, ndichapa kune wokupedzisira sewe." 
Matthew20:15 Ko handina kutenderwa kuita zvandinoda nezvangu here? Ziso rako rakaipa, nokuti ini ndakanaka here?" 
Matthew20:16 Saizvozvo vokupedzisira vachava vokutanga, novokutanga vachava vokupedzisira: nokuti vazhinji vachadamwa, asi vashoma vachasarudzwa." 
Matthew20:17 Jesu wakati okwira Jerusarema, akatora vadzidzi vanegumi navaviri vari voga munzira, akati kwavari:" 
Matthew20:18 Tarirai, tinokwira Jerusarema, zvino Mwanakomana womunhu uchakumikidzwa kuvaprista vakuru navanyori, vachamutongera rufu." 
Matthew20:19 Vachamukumikidza kuvahedheni, kuti vaseke, varove, nokurovera pamuchinjikwa, asi nezuva retatu uchamukazve." 
Matthew20:20 Zvino kwakavuya kwaari mai vavanakomana vaZebhedhi navanakomana vavo, vakagombedzera vachikumbira chimwe chinhu kwaari." 
Matthew20:21 Akati kwavari: Munodeiko? Vakati kwaari: Rairai kuti vanakomana vangu ava vaviri vagare, mumwe kuruvoko rwenyu rworudyi, mumwe kuruboshwe, muushe hwenyu." 
Matthew20:22 Asi Jesu akapindura, akati: Hamuzivi zvamunokumbira. Mungagona kumwa zvomukombe wandichamwa here? Kana kubhabhatidzwa nerubhabhatidzo rwandinobhabhatidzwa narwo here? Vakati kwaari: Tingagona." 
Matthew20:23 Akati kwavari: Muchamwa zvirokwazvo zvomukombe wangu nokubhabhatidzwa nerubhabhatidzo rwandinobhabhatidzwa narwo, asi kugara kuruvoko rwangu rworudyi, nokuruboshwe, handizini ndinopa, asi ndezvavakazvigadzirirwa naBaba vangu." 
Matthew20:24 Vanegumi vakati vanzwa, vakatsamwira avo vana vaviri vomunhu mumwe." 
Matthew20:25 Asi Jesu akavadanira kwaari, akati: Munoziva kuti machinda enyika anovatsikirira, navakuru vavo vanoratidza simba pamusoro pavo." 
Matthew20:26 Asi hazvingadaro pakati penyu; asi aninani unoda kuva mukuru pakati penyu, ngaave mushandiri wenyu." 
Matthew20:27 Aninani unoda kuva mukuru pakati penyu, ngaave muranda wenyu." 
Matthew20:28 Sezvakaitavo Mwanakomana womunhu usina kuvuya kuzoshandirwa, asi kuzoshandira, nokupa upenyu hwake ruve rudzikinuro rwavazhinji." 
Matthew20:29 Vakati vachibva Jeriko, chaunga chikamutevera." 
Matthew20:30 Zvino tarira, mapofu maviri akanga agere paritivi rwenzira, akati achinzwa kuti Jesu wopfuvura, akadanidzira, achiti: Tinzwirei ngoni! Haiwa Ishe, Mwanakomana waDhavhidhi!" 
Matthew20:31 Chaunga chikaaraira kuti anyarare; asi akanyanya kudanidzira, achiti: Ishe, tinzwirei ngoni! Mwanakomana waDhavhidhi." 
Matthew20:32 Ipapo Jesu akamira, akaadana, akati: Munoda kuti ndikuitireiko?" 
Matthew20:33 Akati kwaari: Ishe, kuti meso edu asvinudzwe:" 
Matthew20:34 Jesu akanzwa tsitsi, akabata meso awo; pakarepo meso avo akasvinudzwa, akamutevera." 
Matthew21:1 Vakati vachiswedera Jerusarema, vasvika Betefage, pagomo reMiorivhi, ipapo Jesu akatuma vadzidzi vaviri," 
Matthew21:2 akati kwavari: Endai kumusha wakatarisana nemwi, pakarepo muchawana mbongoro yakasungirwa, inedhongwana; sunungurai, muvuyise kwandiri." 
Matthew21:3 Kana aninani achitaura chinhu kwamuri, muchati: Ishe unozvida; pakarepo uchazvitumira," 
Matthew21:4 Izvozvo zvakaitwa, kuti zvizadziswe zvakataurwa nomuporofita. achiti:" 
Matthew21:5 Vudzai mwanasikana weZiyoni: Tarira Mambo wako unovuya kwauri; ari munyoro, akatasva mbongoro, nedhongwana mwana wembongoro." 
Matthew21:6 Vadzidzi vakaenda, vakaita sezvavakarairwa naJesu," 
Matthew21:7 vakavuya nembongoro nedhongwana, vakaisa nguvo dzavo pamusoro pazvo; vaka\add mu\add*gadza pamusoro pazvo." 
Matthew21:8 Chaunga chikuru chikawarira nguvo dzacho munzira; vamwe vakatema matavi pamiti vakawarira munzira. 
Matthew21:9 chaunga chakanga chakamutungamirira nechakanga chichitevera chikadanidzira, chichiti: Hosana* kuMwanakomana waDavhidhi! Ngaarumbidzwe iye unovuya muzita raShe! Hosana* kumusoro-soro!" 
Matthew21:10 Wakati apinda Jerusarema, guta rose rikazungunuswa, vakati: Uyu ndianiko?" 
Matthew21:11 chaunga chikati: Uyu ndiJesu muporofita weNazareta reGariri. 
Matthew21:12 Zvino Jesu wakapinda mutembere yaMwari, akabudisa vose vaitengesa navaitenga mutembere, akakwidibira matafura avaitsinhanha mari, nezvigaro zvavaitengesa njiva." 
Matthew21:13 Akati kwavari: Kwakanyorwa \add kuchinzi\add*: Imba yangu ichanzi imba yomunyengetero, asi imwi munoiita bako ramakororo." 
Matthew21:14 Zvino mapofu navaikamhina vakavuya kwaari mutembere; akavaporesa. 
Matthew21:15 Asi vaprista vakuru navanyori vakati vachivona zvinhu zvinoshamisa zvaakanga achiita, navana vachidanidzira mutembere vachiti: Hosana* kuMwanakomana waDhavhidhi! Vakatsamwa zvikuru," 
Matthew21:16 vakati kwaari: Unonzwa zvavanotaura ivava here? Jesu akati kwavari: Hongu, imwi hamuna kutongorava here, kuti: Mumuromo mavacheche navanomwa makazadza kukudza?" 
Matthew21:17 Akavasiya, akabuda muguta, akaenda Bhetaniya, ndokuvatapo." 
Matthew21:18 Mangwanani wakati achidzokera kuguta, akanzwa nzara." 
Matthew21:19 Zvino, wakati achivona muvonde panzira, akaenda kwauri, akasawana chinhu kwauri, asi mashizha chete; akati kwawuri: Ngakurege kuva nezvibereko kwauri nokusingaperi. Muvonde ukaswava pakarepo." 
Matthew21:20 Vadzidzi vakati vachivona, vakashamiswa, vakati: Muvonde wasvava pakarepo seiko?" 
Matthew21:21 Jesu akapindura akati kwavari: Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Dai maiva nokutenda, musingakahadziki, hamungaiti izvi kumuvonde chete, asi kana mukati kugomo iri: Simudzwa, ukandirwe mugungwa, zvichaitwa." 
Matthew21:22 Nezvose zvamunokumbira muchinyengetera, kana muchitenda, muchazvipiwa." 
Matthew21:23 Wakati apinda mutembere, vaprista vakuru navakuru vavanhu vakavuya kwaari achidzidzisa, vakati: Munoita zvinhu izvozvi nesimba ripiko? Ndiani wakakupai simba iri?" 
Matthew21:24 Jesu akapindura akati kwavari: Neni ndichakuvhunzaivo shoko rimwe; kana mukandivudza iro, neni ndichakuvudzaivo kuti ndinoita izvi nesimba ripi." 
Matthew21:25 Rubhabhatidzo rwaJohwani rwakabvepiko? Kudenga here kana kuvanhu? Vakataurirana vachiti: Kana tikati: Kudenga, uchati kwatiri: Makagoregerei kumutenda?" 
Matthew21:26 Asi kana tikati: Kuvanhu, tinotya vanhu vazhinji; nokuti vose vakatora, Johwani somuporofita." 
Matthew21:27 Vakapindura Jesu vakati: Hatizivi, akati kwavari: Neni handingakuvudziyivo simba randinoita naro zvinhu izvi." 
Matthew21:28 Zvino munofungeiko? Munhu waiva navanakomana vaviri; akavuya kunowokutanga, akati: Mwana, enda nhasi kundobata mumunda wangu wemizambiringa." 
Matthew21:29 Iye akapindura akati: Handidi; asi pashure akatendeuka akenda. 
Matthew21:30 Akaenda kunowechipiri akataura saizvozvo. Iye akapindura akati: Ndino\add enda\add*, Ishe; akasaenda." 
Matthew21:31 Ndoupiko kunaivavo vaviri wakaita kuda kwababa? Vakati kwaari: Wokutanga. Jesu akati kwavari: Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Vateresi nezvifeve vanokutangirai kupinda muushe hwaMwari. 
Matthew21:32 Nokuti Johwani wakavuya kwamuri nenzira yokururama, mukasamutenda; asi vateresi nezvifeve vakamutenda. Imwi makati muchivona izvozvo, hamuna kuzotendevuka kuti mumutende." 
Matthew21:33 Inzwai mumwe mufananidzo. Kwaiva nomumwe, mwene weimba, wakasima munda wake wemizambiringa; akaukomba noruzhowa, akachera pokusvinira waini mauri, akavaka shongwe, akaupa varimi, akaenda kune imwe nyika." 
Matthew21:34 Nguva yezvibereko yakati yaswedera, akatuma varanda vake kuvarimi kundotora zvibereko zvawo." 
Matthew21:35 Asi varimi vakabata varanda vake, vakarova mumwe vakavuraya mumwe, vakataka mumwe namatimbo." 
Matthew21:36 Akatumazve vamwe varanda, vazhinji kunovokutanga; vakavaitira saizvozvo." 
Matthew21:37 Asi pakupedzisira akatuma mwanakomana wake kwavari, achiti: Vacharemekedza mwanakomana wangu." 
Matthew21:38 Asi varimi vakati vachivona mwanakomana, vakataurirana, vachiti: Uyu ndiye mugari wenhaka; vuyai, ngatimuvurayeyi titore nhaka yake." 
Matthew21:39 Zvino vakamubata vakabudisira kunze komunda wemizambiringa vakamuvuraya. 
Matthew21:40 Naizvozvo kana mwene womunda wemizambiringa achizouya, uchaiteiko kuvarimi ivavo?." 
Matthew21:41 Vakati kwaari: Uchaparadza zvakaipa vanhu avo vakaipa, akapa vamwe varimi munda wemizambiringa, vachazomupa zvibereko nenguva dzazvo." 
Matthew21:42 Jesu akati kwavari: Hamuna kutongorava here pamagwaro \add panoti\add*: Ibwe rakarambwa navavaki, ndirovo rakazova musoro wekona; uku kuita kwaShe, zvinoshamisa pameso edu?" 
Matthew21:43 Naizvozvo ndinoti kwamuri: Ushe hwaMwari hwuchatorwa kubva kwamuri, hwukapiwa vanhu vanobereka zvibereko zvahwo," 
Matthew21:44 Unowira pamusoro pebwe iri, uchavhunika; asi upi noupi warinowira richamukuya akaita vupfu." 
Matthew21:45 Vaprista vakuru navaFarisi vakati vachinzwa mifananidzo yake, vakaziva kuti unovareva ivo." 
Matthew21:46 Zvino vakatsvaka kumubata \add asi\add* vakatya chaunga nokuti chaimuidza muporofita. 
Matthew22:1 Zvino Jesu wakapindura, akataurazve navo nemifananidzo, akati:" 
Matthew22:2 Ushe hwokudenga hwakafananidzwa nomumwe mambo, wakaitira mwanakomana wake mutambo wokuwana;" 
Matthew22:3 akatuma varanda vake kundodana avo vakanga vakokwa kumutambo wokuwana, vakaramba kuvuya." 
Matthew22:4 Akatumazve vamwe varanda, akati: Vudzai vakakokerwa \add muti\add*: Tarirai, ndagadzira chisvusvuro changu, nzombe dzangu nezvakakora zvabayiwa, zvinhu zvose zvagadzirwa; vuyai kumutambo wokuwana." 
Matthew22:5 Asi havana kuzviisa mufungwa, vakaenda, mumwe kumunda wake, mumwe kukutengeserana kwake;" 
Matthew22:6 vakasara vakabata varanda vake, vaka\add va\add*itira zvakaipa, vakavavuraya." 
Matthew22:7 Zvino mambo wakati a\add zvi\add*nzwa, wakatsamwa, akatuma hondo dzake, akaparadza vavurayi avo, akapisa guta ravo." 
Matthew22:8 Zvino akati kuvaranda vake: Mutambo wokuwana wakagadzirwa, asi vakanga vakokwa vakanga vasina kufanirwa." 
Matthew22:9 Naizvozvo, endai kumharadzano dzenzira, mukokere kumutambo wokuwana vose vamunowana." 
Matthew22:10 Varanda ivavo vakabudira kunzira, vakavunganidza vose vavakawana, vakaipa navakanaka; imba yokuwana ikazara navagere pakudya." 
Matthew22:11 Zvino mambo wakati achipinda kuzovona vakokwa, akavona munhu usina kupfeka nguvo yomutambo wokuwana;" 
Matthew22:12 akati kwaari: Shamwari, wapinda pano seiko, usinenguvo yomutambo wokuwana? Akashaya romuromo." 
Matthew22:13 Zvino mambo akati kuvaranda: Musungei makumbo namavoko, mumutore, mumukandire kurima rokunze; apo pachava nokuchema nokugeda-geda kwameno." 
Matthew22:14 Nokuti vazhinji vakadamwa, asi vakasanangurwa vashoma." 
Matthew22:15 Zvino vaFarisi vakaenda kundorangana kuti vangamubata sei pakutaura. 
Matthew22:16 Vakatuma kwaari vadzidzi vavo navaHerodhe, vachiti: Mudzidzisi, tinoziva kuti ndimwi wechchokwadi, munodzidzisa nzira yaMwari muchokwadi, musingarangariri zvomunhu, nokuti hamutariri chimiro chomunhu." 
Matthew22:17 Naizvozvo tivudzei, Imwi munofungei? Zvinotenderwa kuripira Kesari mutero here kana kwete?" 
Matthew22:18 Asi Jesu wakaziva kuipa kwavo, akati: Munondiidzireiko, imwi vanyengeri?" 
Matthew22:19 Ndiratidzei mari yomutero. Vakamuvigira dhenari.* 
Matthew22:20 Zvino akati kwavari: Mufananidzo uyu nechinyorwa ichi ndezvani? 
Matthew22:21 Vakati kwaari: ZvaKesari. Akati kwavari: Naizvozvo, ipai Kesari zvinhu zvaKesari, naMwari zvinhu zvaMwari." 
Matthew22:22 Vakati vanzwa vakashamiswa, vakamusiya, vakaenda." 
Matthew22:23 Nezuva iroro vaSajusi vakasvika kwaari, ivo vanoti hakuna kumuka kwavakafa, vakamubvunza," 
Matthew22:24 vachiti: Mudzidzisi, Mozisi wakati, kana munhu akafa asina vana, munun'una wake ngaawane mukadzi wake, agomutsira mukoma wake vana." 
Matthew22:25 Takanga tine vanakomana vomunhu mumwe vanomwe; wedangwe akawana mukadzi, akafa asina vana, akasiyira munun'una wake mukadzi wake;" 
Matthew22:26 Saizvozvovo wechipiri, nowechitatu, kusvikira kunowechinomwe." 
Matthew22:27 Pakupedzisira mukadzi akafavo. 
Matthew22:28 Zvino pakumuka kwavakafa, uchava mukadzi waaniko pavanomwe, nokuti vose vaiva naye." 
Matthew22:29 Jesu akapindura, akati kwavari: Marashika, nokusaziva magwaro, kana simba raMwari;" 
Matthew22:30 nokuti pakumuka kwavakafa havawani, kana kuwaniswa; asi vakaita savatumwa vaMwari kudenga." 
Matthew22:31 Asi maererano nokumuka kwavakafa, hamuna kurava here zvakataurwa kwamuri naMwari, achiti:" 
Matthew22:32 Ini ndiri Mwari waAbhurahamu, naMwari waIsaka, naMwari waJakobho? Mwari haazi Mwari wavakafa, asi wavapenyu." 
Matthew22:33 Zvino chaunga chichinzwa izvozvo, chakashamiswa nedzidziso yake." 
Matthew22:34 VaFarisi vakati vachinzwa kuti wapwisa vaSajusi, vakavungana pamwe chete." 
Matthew22:35 Zvino mumwe wavo, nyanzvi yomutemo, yakamubvunza, ichimuidza, ikati:" 
Matthew22:36 Mudzidzisi, ndoupiko murairo mukuru pamirairo?" 
Matthew22:37 Jesu akati kwaari: Ida Ishe Mwari wako, nomoyo wako wose, nomweya wako wose, nefungwa dzako dzose." 
Matthew22:38 Ndiwo murairo wokutanga uye mukuru. 
Matthew22:39 Wechipiri unofanana nawo, \add ndiwoyu\add*: Ida muvakidzani wako se\add zvaunozvida\add* iwe." 
Matthew22:40 Murairo wose navaporofita zvakabatanidzwa pamirairo iyi miviri. 
Matthew22:41 Zvino vaFarisi vachakavungana pamwechete, Jesu akavabvunza," 
Matthew22:42 akati: Munofungeiko pamusoro paKristu? Mwanakomana waaniko? Vakati kwaari: WaDhavhidhi," 
Matthew22:43 Akati kwavari: Dhavhidhi wakagomudana seiko muMweya \add kuti\add* Ishe, achiti:" 
Matthew22:44 Ishe wakati kunaShe wangu: Gara kurudyi rwangu, kusvikira ndaita vavengi vako chitsiko chetsoka dzako?" 
Matthew22:45 Zvino, kana Dhavhidhi achimuti Ishe, ungagova mwanakomana wake seiko?" 
Matthew22:46 Zvino kukashaikwa munhu wakagona kumupindura shoko; uye kwakanga kusinomunhu kubva pazuva iro wakatsunga kumubvunzazve. 
Matthew23:1 Zvino Jesu wakataura kuchaunga navadzidzi vake," 
Matthew23:2 akati: Vanyori navaFarisi vagere pachigaro chaMozisi; 
Matthew23:3 saka zvose zvavanokuvudzai kuti muzvichengete, muzvichengete nokuzviita, asi musatevera mabasa avo; nokuti vanotaura, asi havaiti." 
Matthew23:4 Vanosunga mitoro inorema, inorwadza kutakura, vachiisa pamafudzi avanhu, asi ivo havadi kuibata nemimwe yavo." 
Matthew23:5 Asi mabasa avo ose vanoaita kuti vavonekwe navanhu; nokuti vanofarisa mafirakitera* avo, vanorebesa mipendero yenguvo dzavo," 
Matthew23:6 vanofarira zvigaro zvapamusoro pamabiko, nezvigaro zvikuru mumasinagoge," 
Matthew23:7 nokukwaziswa pamisika, nokuidzwa mudzidzisi, mudzidzisi navanhu." 
Matthew23:8 Asi imwi musaidzwa mudzidzisi, nokuti Mudzidzisi wenyu ndomumwe, Kristi; imwi mose muri hama." 
Matthew23:9 Musaidza uri panyika baba venyu; nokuti mumwe chete ndiBaba venyu, ivo vari kudenga." 
Matthew23:10 Musaidzwavo vatenzi; nokuti mumwe chete ndiTenzi wenyu, \add iye\add* Kristu." 
Matthew23:11 Asi mukuru pakati penyu uchava muranda wenyu. 
Matthew23:12 Aninani unozvikudza uchaninipiswa; ani nani unozvininipisa, uchakudzwa." 
Matthew23:13 Asi Vurombo kwamuri, imwi vanyori navaFarisi, vanyengeri! Nokuti munopfigira vanhu ushe hwokudenga; nokuti imwi hamupindi, naivo, vanopinda, hamuvatenderi kupinda." 
Matthew23:14 Vurombo kwamuri, imwi vanyori navaFarisi, vanyengeri, nokuti munoparadza dzimba dzechirikadzi muchiita mano-mano eminyengetero mirefu; naizvozvo muchatongerwa kurashiwa nokupfuvurisa." 
Matthew23:15 Vurombo kwamuri, imwi vanyori navaFaisi, vanyengeri, nokuti munofamba pagungwa napanyika kuzoita mumwe ave muJudha; kana awanikwa, munomuita mwanakomana wegehena kukunda imwi kaviri." 
Matthew23:16 Vurombo kwamuri, imwi vatungamiriri vakapofumara, munoti: Ani nani unopika netembere, hachizi chinhu asi ani nani unopika nendarama yetembere, ndiye unemhosva." 
Matthew23:17 Imwi mapenzi namapofu! Chikuru ndechipiko, ndarama kana tembere, inoita ndarama ive tsvene?" 
Matthew23:18 Uyezve; aninani unopika nearitari, hachizi chinhu; asi aninani unopika nechipo chiri pamusoro payo, ndiye unemhosva." 
Matthew23:19 Mapenzi namapofu! Chikuru ndechipiko, chipo kana aritari, inoita chipo chive chitsvene?" 
Matthew23:20 Naizvozvo, unopika nearitari, unopika nayo nezvose zviri pamusoro payo." 
Matthew23:21 Nounopika netembere, unopika nayo, nounogara mairi," 
Matthew23:22 Nounopika nokudenga, unopika nechigaro choushe chaMwari, nounogara pamusoro pacho." 
Matthew23:23 Vurombo kwamuri, imwi vanyori navaFarisi, vanyengeri! Nokuti munopa chegumi cheminte*, neanise*, nekumini*, muchirega zvikuru zvomurairo \add zvinoti\add*: Kutonga, nengoni, nokutendeka; maifanira kuzviita izvi nokusarega kuita zvimwe." 
Matthew23:24 imwi vatungamiriri vakapofumara, munomimina rutunga, muchimedza kamera." 
Matthew23:25 Vurombo kwamuri, imwi vanyori navaFarisi, vanyengeri! Nokuti munonatsa kunze komukombe nendiro, asi mukati muzere nokupamba nokusazvidzora." 
Matthew23:26 MuFarisi wakapofumara, tanga kunatsa mukati momukombe, nendiro, kuti kunze kwazvo kugochenavo." 
Matthew23:27 Vurombo kwamuri, imwi vanyori navaFarisi, vanyengeri! Nokuti makafanana namarinda akacheneswa, anovonekwa saakanaka zvirokwazvo kunze kwawo, asi mukati muzere namafupa a\add va\add*kafa netsvina yose." 
Matthew23:28 Saizvozvo nemwivo munovonekwa navanhu kunze kwenyu makaita semakarurama, asi mukati muzere nokunyengera nokuipa." 
Matthew23:29 Vurombo kwamuri, imwi vanyori navaFarisi vanyengeri! Nokuti munovaka marinda avaporofita, nokushongedza marinda avakarurama," 
Matthew23:30 muchiti: Dai taivapo pamazuva amadzibaba edu, tingadai tisina kuvabatsira paropa ravaporofita." 
Matthew23:31 Saka munozvipupurira kuti muri vanakomana vavakavuraya vaporofita. 
Matthew23:32 Zvino chizadzisai chiyero chamadzibaba enyu," 
Matthew23:33 \add Imwi\add* nyoka; vana venyoka, muchatiza seiko kutonga kwegehena?" 
Matthew23:34 Saka, tarirai, ndinotumira kwamuri vaporofita, navakachenjera, navanyori; muchavuraya \add vamwe\add* vavo, nokuvarovera pamuchinjikwa; mucharovesa \add vamwe\add* vavo mumasinagoge enyu, nokuvatambudza mumaguta ose." 
Matthew23:35 Kuti ropa rose ravakarurama, rakatevurirwa panyika, riuye pamusoro penyu, kubva paropa raAberi wakanga akarurama, kusvikira paropa raZakaria, mwanakonana waBarakia, wamakavuraya pakati petembere nearitari." 
Matthew23:36 Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Izvi zvose zvichavuya pamusoro porudzi urwu. 
Matthew23:37 Jerusarema! Jerusarema! Iwe unovuraya vaporofita, nokutaka namabwe avo vakatumwa kwauri! Ndakanga ndichida kazhinji sei kuvunganidza vana vako pamwechete, semhambo inovunganidza hukwana dzayo munyasi mamapapiro, asi mukaramba!" 
Matthew23:38 Tarirai, masiirwa imba yenyu rava dongo." 
Matthew23:39 Nokuti ndinoti kwamuri: Kubva zvino hamuchazondivoni, kusvikira muchiti: Wakaropafadzwa iye unovuya nezita raShe." 
Matthew24:1 Zvino Jesu wakabuda akabva patembere; vadzidzi vake vakavuya kwaari kuzomuratidza dzimba dzetembere. 
Matthew24:2 Jesu akati kwavari: Hamuvoni zvinhu izvi zvose here? Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Hakungazosiiwi ibwe rimwe pamusoro pebwe risingazowisirwi pasi. 
Matthew24:3 Wakati agara pagomo reMiorivhi, vadzidzi vakavuya kwaari pachivande vakati: Tivudzei, izvozvo zvichagova rinhiko? Nechiratidzo chokuvuya kwenyu nechokuguma kwenyika chichava chipiko?" 
Matthew24:4 Jesu akapindura akati kwavari: Chenjerai kuti murege kutsauswa nomunhu; 
Matthew24:5 nokuti vazhinji vachavuya nezita rangu, vachiti: Ndini Kristu; vachitsausa vazhinji." 
Matthew24:6 Zvino muchanzwa zvehondo neguhu rehondo chenjerai musamanikidzwa nokuti zvose zvinofanira kumboitika; asi kuguma kuchigere kusvika. 
Matthew24:7 Nokuti rudzi ruchamukira rudzi, noushe \add hwuchamukira\add* ushe, uye kuchava nenzara, nehosha, nokudengenyika kwenyika kunzvimbo dzakasiyana-siyana." 
Matthew24:8 Asi zvose izvozvi kutanga kwenhamo. 
Matthew24:9 Zvino vachakukumikidzai kumatambudziko, vachakuvurayai; muchavengwa namarudzi ose nokuda kwezita rangu." 
Matthew24:10 Zvino vazhinji vachagumburwa, vachatengesana, nokuvengana." 
Matthew24:11 Vaporofita vazhinji venhema vachamuka, vatsause vazhinji." 
Matthew24:12 Nokuti kusarurama kuchawanda, rudo rwavazhinji ruchatonhora." 
Matthew24:13 Asi unotsungirira kusvikira pakuguma, ndiye uchaponeswa." 
Matthew24:14 evhangeri iyi youshe ichaparidzwa munyika dzose chive chapupu kumarudzi ose, ipapo kuguma kuchasvika." 
Matthew24:15 Naizvozvo kana muchivona nyangadzi yokuparadza yakarehwa nomuporofita Dhanyeri imire panzvimbo tsvene (unorava ngaacherekedze). 
Matthew24:16 Zvino vari muJudhiya ngavatizire kumakomo; 
Matthew24:17 uri pamusoro pedenga reimba ngaarege kuburuka kuzotora zviri mumba make; 
Matthew24:18 nouri kumunda ngaarege kudzokera shure kuzotora nguvo dzake. 
Matthew24:19 Vachava nenhamo vanemimba navanomwisa namazuva iwayo! 
Matthew24:20 Nyengeterai kuti kutiza kwenyu kurege kuva muchando, kana nesabata." 
Matthew24:21 Nokuti nenguva iyo kuchavapo kutambudzika kukuru, kusati kwakambovapo kwakadaro kubva pakutanga kwenyika kusvikira zvino, uye hakuchazovipozve." 
Matthew24:22 Dai mazuva iwayo asaitapudzwa, hakuna nyama yairarama, asi nokuda kwavasanangurwa, mazuva iwayo achatapudzwa." 
Matthew24:23 Zvino kana munhu akati kwamuri: Tarirai, Kristu pano kana apo, musatenda." 
Matthew24:24 Nokuti kuchamuka vanaKristu venhema navaporofita venhema, vacharatidza zviratidzo zvikuru nezvishamiso, kuti kana zvichibvira, vatsause navasanagurwavo." 
Matthew24:25 Tarirai, ndagara ndakuvudzai." 
Matthew24:26 Zvino kana vakati kwamuri: Tarirai, uri kurenje, musabuda; tarirai uri mudzimba dzomukati, musatenda." 
Matthew24:27 Nokuti semheni inobva kumabvazuva ichipenyavo kumavirira, ndizvo zvichaita kuvuya koMwanakonana womunhu." 
Matthew24:28 Apo pane chitunha ndipo pachavunganira magora. 
Matthew24:29 Pakarepo shure kokutambudzika kwamazuva iwayo, zuva richasviba, nomwedzi hauchazopi chiedza chawo. Nyeredzi dzichawa kudenga namasimba okudenga achazungunuswa." 
Matthew24:30 Ipapo chiratidzo choMwanakomana womunhu chichavonekwa kudenga; zvino marudzi ose enyika achachema achivona Mwanakomana womunhu achivuya pamakore okudenga nesimba nokubwinya kukuru. 
Matthew24:31 Uchatuma vatumwa vake nekurira kwehwamanda kukuru, vachavunganidza vasanangurwa vake kubva kumhepo ina kubva kumuganhu mumwe wedenga kusvikira kunomumwe muganhu." 
Matthew24:32 Asi dzidzai mufananidzo womuvonde; Kana davi rawo rava nyoro, mashizha achitunga, munoziva kuti munakamwe w\add ava\add* pedo." 
Matthew24:33 Saizvozvo nemwivo kana movona izvozvo zvose, zivai kuti wava pedo pamukova." 
Matthew24:34 Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Rudzi urwu harungatongo-pfuvuri kusvikira izvozvi zvose zvaitika. 
Matthew24:35 Denga nenyika zvichapfuvura, asi mashoko angu haangatongopfuvuri." 
Matthew24:36 Asi kana riri zuva iro nenguva iyo hakuna unozviziva, kunyangwe vatumwa vokudenga, asi Baba vangu voga." 
Matthew24:37 Asi sapamazuva aNowa ndizvo zvichaitavo kuvuya koMwanakomana womunhu. 
Matthew24:38 Nokuti sepamazuva mafashame asati asvika, vaidya nokumwa, nokuwana, nokuwaniswa kusvikira zuva Nowa raakapinda naro muareka." 
Matthew24:39 Vasingazivi kusvikira mvura zhinji yavabvisa vose, ndozvichaita kuvuya koMwanakomana womunhu." 
Matthew24:40 Ipapo vaviri vachava mumunda; mumwe uchatorwa mumwe akasiyiwa. 
Matthew24:41 Vaviri vachakuya paguyo rimwe; mumwe uchatorwa mumwe akasiyiwa. 
Matthew24:42 Rindai naizvozvo, nokuti hamuzivi nguva Ishe wenyu yaanovuya nayo." 
Matthew24:43 Asi zivai izvi, kuti dai mwene weimba aiziva nguva ichasvika mbavha ungadai airinda akasatendera imba yake kuti ipazwe." 
Matthew24:44 Naizvozvo nemwivo garai makazvigadzirira; nokuti nenguva yamusingafungiri, Mwanakomana womunhu uchavuya." 
Matthew24:45 Ndianiko muranda wakatendeka, wakangwara, wakagadzwa nashe wake kuti ave mutariri weimba yake kuti avape zvokudya nenguva yakafanira?" 
Matthew24:46 Wakaropafadzwa muranda uyo, unoti kana ishe wake achisvika anomuwana achiita saizvozvo." 
Matthew24:47 Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Uchamugadza pamusoro pezvose zvaanazvo. 
Matthew24:48 Asi kana muranda uyo wakaipa akati mumoyo make: Ishe wangu wanonoka kuvuya. 
Matthew24:49 Akatanga kurova vamwe varanda \add vanobata\add* pamwe chete naye, akadya nokumwa nezvidhakwa." 
Matthew24:50 Ishe womuranda uyo uchasvika nezuva raasingatariri nenguva yaasingazivi," 
Matthew24:51 akamugura napakati, akamupa mugove wake pamwe chete navanyengeri apo pachava nokuchema nokugeda-geda kwameno." 
Matthew25:1 Ipapo ushe hwokudenga hwuchafananidzwa navasikana vanegumi. Vakatora marambi avo, vakabuda kundochingamidza chikomba." 
Matthew25:2 Zvino vashanu vavo vakanga vakachenjera, vashanu vari mapenzi." 
Matthew25:3 Avo vakanga vari mapenzi vakatora marambi avo vakasatora mafuta pamwechete navo. 
Matthew25:4 Asi vakanga vakachenjera vakatora mafuta mumidziyo yavo nemarambi avo. 
Matthew25:5 Zvino chikomba chakati chichinonoka, vakatsumwaira vose vakavata." 
Matthew25:6 Asi pakati povusiku kwakaitwa mhere-mhere: Tarirai, chikomba chovuya, budai mundochichingamidza!" 
Matthew25:7 Zvino vasikana vose vakamuka, vakagadzira marambi avo." 
Matthew25:8 Mapenzi akati kunavakachenjera: Tipeiwo mamwe mafuta enyu nokuti marambi edu odzima. 
Matthew25:9 Asi vakachenjera vakapindura vachiti: Zvimwe haangakwaniri isu nemwi tose; endai henyu kuna vanotengesa munozvitengera. 
Matthew25:10 Asi vakati vachienda kundotenga, chikomba chikasvika. Zvino vakanga vakazvigadzirira vakapinda nacho mumutambo wokuwana, mukova ukapfigwa." 
Matthew25:11 Pashure kwakavuyavo vamwe vasikana, vakati: Ishe, Ishe, tizarurirei!" 
Matthew25:12 Asi akapindura akati: Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: handikuziviyi imwi. 
Matthew25:13 Naizvozvo rindai, nokuti hamuzivi zuva kana nguva Mwanakomana womunhu yaanovuya nayo." 
Matthew25:14 Nokuti zvakaita somunhu wakaenda kuneimwe nyika, akadana varanda vake, akavapa midziyo yake." 
Matthew25:15 Akapa mumwe matarenda* mashanu, mumwe maviri, mumwe rimwe, mumwe nomumwe zvakakwanirana nesimba rake, pakarepo akafamba rwendo." 
Matthew25:16 Uye wakapiwa matarenda* mashanu akaenda akaita mhindu nawo, akawana mamwe matarenda mashanu." 
Matthew25:17 Saizvozvovo wemaviri akawana mamwe maviri. 
Matthew25:18 Asi wakapiwa rimwe wakaenda akachera pasi, akaviga mari yashe wake." 
Matthew25:19 Shure kwenguva refu, ishe wavaranda ivavo akasvika, akagadzira mashoko \add emari\add* navo." 
Matthew25:20 Wakanga apiwa matarenda* mashanu akavuya namamwe matarenda* mashanu akati: Ishe makandikumikidza matarenda* mashanu, tarirai, ndawana pamusoro pawo mamwe matarenda* mashanu." 
Matthew25:21 Ishe wake akati kwaari: Waita zvakanaka, muranda wakanaka, wakatendeka. Wakanga wakatendeka pazvinhu zvishoma, ndichakuisa pamusoro pezvinhu zvizhinji; pinda mumufaro washe wako." 
Matthew25:22 Uyo wakanga apiwa matarenda* maviri akavuyavo akati: Ishe, makandikumikidza matarenda* maviri; tarirai, ndawana mamwe matarenda* maviri pamusoro pawo." 
Matthew25:23 Ishe wake akati kwaari: Waita zvakanaka, muranda wakanaka, wakavimbika, wakanga wakavimbika pazvinhu zvishoma, ndichakuisa pamusoro pezvinhu zvizhinji; pinda mumufaro washe wako." 
Matthew25:24 Asi wakanga apiwa tarenda* rimwe naiye wakavuya akati: Ishe ndakanga ndichikuzivai imwi kuti muri munhu wakawoma, munokohwa pamusati makadzvara, munovunganidza pamusina kukusha;" 
Matthew25:25 Zvino ndakatya, ndikanoviga tarenda* renyu muvhu; tarirai, mava nechenyu!" 
Matthew25:26 Ishe wake akapindura akati kwaari: Muranda wakaipa unovusimbe, wakanga uchiziva kuti ndinokohwa pandisina kudzvara, ndichivunganidza pandisina kukusha." 
Matthew25:27 Saka waifanira kuisa mari yangu kuvatsinhanisi, kuti pakusvika kwangu ndingadai ndapiwa zvangu zvawanda;" 
Matthew25:28 Naizvozvo mutorerei tarenda*, mupe kune unamatarenda* anegumi." 
Matthew25:29 Nokuti mumwe nomumwe unazvo uchapiwa ave nezvizhinji; asi usina uchatorerwa nezvaanazvo. 
Matthew25:30 Budisirai muranda pasina kurima rokunze, ipapo pachava nokuchema nokugeda-geda kwameno." 
Matthew25:31 Zvino kana Mwanakomana womunhu achivuya mukubwinya kwake, navatumwa vatsvene vose vanaye, ipapo uchagara pachigaro choushe chinobwinya." 
Matthew25:32 Zvino pamberi pake pachavunganidzwa ndudzi dzose; uchadziparadzanisa imwe kubva kune imwe; somufudzi unoravura makwai kubva kumbudzi. 
Matthew25:33 Uchamisa makwai kuruoko rwake rworudyi, asi mbudzi kuruboshwe." 
Matthew25:34 Zvino Ishe uchati kuna vari kuruoko rwake rworudyi: Vuyai, imwi makaropfadzwa vaBaba vangu, mugare nhaka youshe hwakagadzirirwemwi kubva pakuvamba kwenyika." 
Matthew25:35 Nokuti ndakanga ndinenzara, mukandipa chokudya; ndakanga ndine nyota, imwi mukandipa chokumwa; ndakanga ndiri mweni, mukandigamuchira;" 
Matthew25:36 ndisina nguvo, mukandipfekedza; ndakanga ndichirwara, mukandishanyira; ndakanga ndiri mutirongo mukavuya kwandiri." 
Matthew25:37 Zvino vakarurama vachamupindura vachiti: Ishe, takakuvonai rinhiko isu munenzara, tika\add ku\add*pai chokudya? Kana munenyota tikapa chokumwa?" 
Matthew25:38 Takakuvonai rinhiko muri mweni tikagamuchira, Kana musinenguvo tikapfekedza?" 
Matthew25:39 Takakuvonai rinhiko isu muchirwara, kana mutirongo, tikavuya kwamuri?" 
Matthew25:40 Ipao mambo uchapindura achiti kwavari: Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Pamakaitira mumwe wavaduku vehama dzangu idzi, makaitireni." 
Matthew25:41 Ipapo uchativo kuna vari kuruoko rworuboshwe: Ibvai kwandiri, imwi makatukwa, \add muende\add* kumoto usingaperi, wakagadzirirwa Diaborosi navatumwa vake." 
Matthew25:42 Nokuti ndakanga ndine nzara, mukasandipa chokudya; ndakanga ndine nyota, mukasandipa chokumwa;" 
Matthew25:43 ndakanga ndiri mweni, mukasandigamuchira; ndisinenguvo, mukasandipfekedza; ndichirwara, nomutirongo, mukasandishanyira." 
Matthew25:44 Ipapo naivava vachapinduravo vachiti: Ishe, takakuvonai rinhiko munenzara kana munenyota, kana muri mweni, kana musinenguvo kana muchirwara, kana muri mutirongo, tikasakushumirai?" 
Matthew25:45 Zvino uchavapindura achiti: Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Pamusati makaitira mumwe wavaduku ava, hamuzakaitireni." 
Matthew25:46 Ava vachaenda kukurangwa kusingaperi; asi vakarurama kuupenyu hwusingaperi. 
Matthew26:1 Jesu wakati apedza mashoko iwayo ose, akati kuvadzidzi vake:" 
Matthew26:2 Munoziva kuti kana mazuva maviri apfuvura ichava paseka, Mwanakomana womunhu uchakumikidzwa \add kuvatongi\add* kuti aroverwe." 
Matthew26:3 Zvino kwakavungana vaprista vakuru navanyori navakuru vavanhu muruvazhe rwomuprista mukuru wainzi Kayafasi. 
Matthew26:4 Vakarangana kuti vabate Jesu namano, vago\add mu\add*vuraya." 
Matthew26:5 Asi vakati: Kwete pamutambo, kuti kurege kuva nebope pakati pavanhu." 
Matthew26:6 Zvino Jesu wakati ari paBhetaniya mumba maSimoni wamaperembudzi," 
Matthew26:7 Kwakavuya kwaari mukadzi nechinu chearibhasiteri chechizoro chinokosha zvikuru, akadurura mumusoro wake agere pakudya." 
Matthew26:8 Asi vadzidzi vake vakati vachivona, vakatsamwa kwazvo vakati: kurasikirwa kwakadaro kwaitirweiko?" 
Matthew26:9 Nokuti chizoro ichi chingadai chatengeswa nemari zhinji, ikapiwa varombo." 
Matthew26:10 Asi Jesu aziva akati kwavari: Munotambudzireko mukadzi? Nokuti waita basa rakanaka kwandiri; 
Matthew26:11 nokuti varombo munavo nguva dzose, asi ini hamuneni nguva dzose." 
Matthew26:12 Nokuti pakundidira chizoro ichi pamuviri wangu, waitira kuvigwa kwangu." 
Matthew26:13 Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Kose kunozoparidzirwa evhangeri iyi panyika dzose izvivo zvaitwa nomukadzi zvicharehwa, chive chirangaridzo chake." 
Matthew26:14 Zvino mumwe wavanegumi navaviri, wainzi Judhasi Isikariyoti, wakaenda kuvaprista vakuru," 
Matthew26:15 akati: Muchandipeiko, ndigomuisa kwamuri? Vakatenderana naye pamasirivheri anamakumi matatu,*" 
Matthew26:16 Zvino kubva ipapo akatsvaka nguva yakafanira yokumukumikidza kwavari nayo. 
Matthew26:17 Ne\add zuva\add* rokutanga rezvingwa zvisina mbiriso, vadzidzi vakavuya kuna Jesu vakati kwaari: Munoda kupiko kwatingakugadzirirai pasika kuti mudye?" 
Matthew26:18 Akati: Endai muguta kuna nyakuti, muti kwaari: Mudzidzisi unoti: Nguva yangu yava pedo; ndichaita paseka paimba yako navadzidzi vangu." 
Matthew26:19 Vadzidzi vakaita sezvavakarairwa naJesu; vakagadzira paseka. 
Matthew26:20 Zvino ava madekwana akagara pasi navanegumi navaviri. 
Matthew26:21 Vakati vachidya akati: Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Mumwe wenyu uchanditengesa. 
Matthew26:22 Zvino vakashungurudzika kwazvo, vakatanga mumwe nomumwe kuti kwaari: Ishe ndini here?" 
Matthew26:23 Asi wakapindura akati: Unoisa ruvoko neni mundiro ndiye uchanditengesa. 
Matthew26:24 Mwanakomana womunhu uchaenda hake sezvazvakanyorwa pamusoro pake; asi unenhamo munhu uyo Mwanakomana womunhu waanotengeswa naye. Zvaiva nani kumunhu uyu kana asina kuberekwa. 
Matthew26:25 Zvino Judhasi uyo wakamutengesa akapindura akati: Mudzidzisi, ndini here? Akati kwaari: Wataura iwe." 
Matthew26:26 Zvino vakati vachidya, Jesu akatora chingwa akaropafadza, akamedura ndokupa vadzidzi achiti: Torai, idyai uyu ndiwo muviri wangu." 
Matthew26:27 Akatora mukombe, akavonga, akavapa achiti: Imwai mose pauri." 
Matthew26:28 Nokuti uyu iropa rangu resungano itsva, rinoteurirwa vazhinji rokukangamwirwa kwezvivi." 
Matthew26:29 Asi ndinoti kwamuri: Handichatongomwizve zvechibereko chomuzambiringa, kusvikira zuva iro randichazomwa naro nemwi zvava zvitsva muushe hwaBaba vangu." 
Matthew26:30 Zvino vakati vaimba rwiyo vakabuda vakaenda kugomo reMiorivhi. 
Matthew26:31 Zvino Jesu wakati kwavari: Imwi mose muchagumburwa nokuda kwangu vusiku hwuno; Nokuti kwakanyorwa \add kuchinzi\add*: Ndicharova mufudzi namakwai eboka achapararira. 
Matthew26:32 Asi shure kokumutswa kwangu, ndichakutungamirirai Gariri." 
Matthew26:33 Asi Petro wakapindura akati kwaari: Kunyange vose vakagumburwa; nokuda kwenyu, ini handingatongogumburwi." 
Matthew26:34 Jesu akati kwaari: Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwauri: Kuti vusiku hwuno, jongwe risati rarira, uchandiramba katatu." 
Matthew26:35 Petro akati kwaari: Kunyange ndichifanira kufa nemwi, handingatongokurambiyi ini. Vadzidzi vose vakadarovo." 
Matthew26:36 Zvino Jesu wakasvika navo panzvimbo inonzi Getsemani, akati kuvadzidzi: Garai pano ini ndichienda kunonyengetera uko." 
Matthew26:37 Akatora Petro navanakomana vaviri vaZebhedhi, akatanga kushungurudzika nokuzarirwa." 
Matthew26:38 Akati kwavari: Mweya wangu unoshungurudzika kwazvo kunyange kusvikira pakufa, garai pano murinde neni." 
Matthew26:39 Akapfuvura mberi zvishomanene, akawa nechiso chake, akanyengetera achiti: Haiwa Baba vangu, kana zvichibvira, mukombe uyu ngaupfuvure kwandiri. Asi kwete sokuda kwangu asi kwenyu." 
Matthew26:40 Akaenda kuvadzidzi, akavawana vavete, akati kunaPetro: Saka makoniwa kurinda neni awa rimwe here?" 
Matthew26:41 Rindai munyengetere, kuti murege kupinda mukuidzwa, mweya unoda zvirokwazvo asi nyama hainesimba." 
Matthew26:42 Akaendazve rwechipiri akanyengetera, achiti: Haiwa Baba vangu kana mukombe uyu usingagoni kupfuvura kubva kwandiri, ndisina kuumwa, kuda kwenyu ngakuitwe." 
Matthew26:43 Akadzoka, akavawana vavatazve, nokuti meso avo akanga orema." 
Matthew26:44 Akavasiya, akaendazve akanyengetera rwechitatu, achitaurazve mashoko, iwawo." 
Matthew26:45 Zvino akavuya kuvadzidzi akati kwavari: Chivatai henyu muzorore; tarirai, nguva yaswedera, Mwanakomana womunhu wotengeswa mumavoko avatadzi." 
Matthew26:46 Simukai, ngatiende, tarirai, wonditengesa kwavari wava pedo." 
Matthew26:47 Zvino achataura, tarira, Judhasi mumwe wavanegumi navaviri akasvika, ane chaunga chikuru vakabata minondo netsvimbo vachibva kuvaprista vakuru navakuru vavanhu." 
Matthew26:48 Zvino iye wakamutengesa wakavapa chiratidzo achiti: Uyo wandichasveta ndiye, mumubate." 
Matthew26:49 Pakarepo akasvika kuna Jesu, akati: Hekanhi Mudzidzisi! Akamusveta." 
Matthew26:50 Jesu akati kwaari: Shamwari, wavingeiko?. Ipapo vakavuya vakaisa mavoko pana Jesu vakamubata." 
Matthew26:51 Zvino tarirai, mumwe wavaiva naJesu akatambanudza ruvoko, akavhomora munondo wake akatema muranda womuprista mukuru, akagura nzeve yake." 
Matthew26:52 Zvino Jesu akati kwaari: Dzosera munondo wako munzvimbo mawo nokuti vose vanobata munondo vanoparadzwa nomunondo. 
Matthew26:53 Unofunga here kuti handigoni kukumbira kuna Baba vangu vakandipa ikozvino mapoka avarwi anopfuvura makumi maviri? 
Matthew26:54 Zvino magwaro angazadziswa seiko anoti: Zvinofanira kuti zvidaro? 
Matthew26:55 Nenguva iyo Jesu akati kuchaunga: Mabuda semunovinga gororo neminondo netsvimbo kuzondibata here? Ndaigara nemwi mazuva ose ndichidzidzisa mutembere mukasandibata. 
Matthew26:56 Asi izvi zvose zvaitwa, kuti magwaro avaporofita azadziswe. Zvino vadzidzi vose vakamusiya, vakatiza." 
Matthew26:57 Avo vakanga vabata Jesu vaka\add mu\add*endesa kunaKayafasi muprista mukuru, apo pakanga pavungana vanyori navakuru." 
Matthew26:58 Asi Petro akamutevera ari kure kusvikira pamuzinda womuprista mukuru, akapinda mukati, akagara navaranda kuzovona kupera kwazvo." 
Matthew26:59 Zvino vaprista vakuru navakuru namakurukota ose vakatsvaka vuchapupu hwenhema kuti vapomere Jesu, vamuvuraye." 
Matthew26:60 Asi havana ku\add vu\add*wana, kunyange zvapupu zvizhinji zvenhema zvakavuya. Pakupedzisira zviviri zvakasvika," 
Matthew26:61 zvikati: Munhu uyu wakati: Ndinogona kuputsa tembere yaMwari, nokuivakazve namazuva matatu." 
Matthew26:62 Zvino muprista mukuru akasimuka akati kwaari: Haupinduri chinhu here? Vuchapupu hwei hwunopupurirwa iwe? 
Matthew26:63 Asi Jesu wakaramba anyerere. Muprista mukuru akapindura akati kwaari: Ndinokupikisa naMwari mupenyu kuti utivudze kana uri Kristu, Mwanakomana waMwari." 
Matthew26:64 Jesu akati kwaari: Wataura iwe; asi ndinoti kwamuri: Kubva zvino muchavona Mwanakomana womunhu agere kuruoko rworudyi rwesimba, achivuya pamusoro pamakore okudenga." 
Matthew26:65 Ipapo muprista mukuru akabvarura nguvo dzake akati: Wamhura Mwari; tichadireiko hwumwe vuchapupu? Tarirai, manzwa zvino kumhura Mwari kwake." 
Matthew26:66 Munofungeiko? Vakapindura vakati: Unemhoswa yorufu. 
Matthew26:67 Zvino vakamupfira mate pachiso, vakamurova netsiva, vamwe vakamurova nembama," 
Matthew26:68 vachiti: Porofita kwatiri, iwe Kristu, ndiani wakurova." 
Matthew26:69 Petro wakanga agere panze pamuzinda. Zvino murandakadzi wakavuya kwaari akati: Newevo wakanga una Jesu weGariri. 
Matthew26:70 Asi iye wakaramba pamberi pavose achiti: Handizivi zvaunoreva. 
Matthew26:71 Zvino wakati abuda pasuvo, mumwe akamuvona, akati kuna vaivapo: Uyu wakanga anaJesu weNazareta." 
Matthew26:72 Akarambazve nokupika, \add achiti\add*: Handimuzivi munhu uyu." 
Matthew26:73 Chava chinguva vakanga vamirepo vakavuya vakaswedera vachiti kunaPetro: Zvirokwazvo newevo uri wavo nokuti kutaura kwako kunokutengesa. 
Matthew26:74 Zvino wakatanga kutuka nokupika \add achiti\add*: Handimuzivi munhu uyu. Pakarepo jongwe rikarira. 
Matthew26:75 Ipapo Petro akarangarira shoko raJesu raakati kwaari: Jongwe risati rarira, uchandiramba katatu, Ipapo akabuda panze akandochema zvikuru." 
Matthew27:1 Kwakati kwaedza vaprista vakuru vose navakuru vavanhu vakarangana pamusoro paJesu kuti vamuvuraye. 
Matthew27:2 Vakati vamusunga vakaendesa kuna Pondiyo Pirato mubati. 
Matthew27:3 Zvino Judhasi wakanga amutengesa avona kuti warashwa, ndokuzvidya moyo akadzosera masirivheri aya anamakumi matatu kuvaprista vakuru navakuru," 
Matthew27:4 Achiti: Ndatadza, ndatengesa ropa risinemhosva. Vakati: Tinei nazvo? Tavona iwe." 
Matthew27:5 Akakandira pasi masirivheri mutembere, akabva akaenda akandozvisungirira." 
Matthew27:6 Vaprista vakuru vakatora makobiri esirivheri vakati, hazvina kufanira kuti tiaise muchivigiro chemari, nokuti mutengo weropa." 
Matthew27:7 Vakarangana, vakatenga nawo munda womuvumbi wehari, kuzovigapo vasugwa." 
Matthew27:8 Naizvozvo munda uyo wakanzi munda weropa kusvikira zuva ranhasi. 
Matthew27:9 Zvino zvakazadziswa zvakarehwa naJeremiya muporofita achiti: Vakatora makobiri esirivheri anamakumi, matatu, mutengo waiye wakatarirwa mutengo iye navana vaIsiraeri wavakatarira mutengo." 
Matthew27:10 Vakaaripira munda womuvumbi wehari, sezvandakarairwa naShe." 
Matthew27:11 Zvino Jesu wakamira pamberi pomubati. Mubati akamubvunza akati: Ndiwe mambo wavaJudha here? Jesu akati kwaari: Wataura iwe. 
Matthew27:12 Asi wakati achipomerwa mhosva navaprista vakuru navakuru, haana kupindura chinhu." 
Matthew27:13 Zvino Pirato akati kwaari: Haunzwi zvinhu \add kuti\add* zvingani zvavanokupupurira here? 
Matthew27:14 Asi haana kumupindura kunyange neshoko rimwe chete, zvokuti mambo wakashamiswa kwazvo." 
Matthew27:15 Zvino pamutambo mubati aisunungurira chaunga musungwa wavanenge vada. 
Matthew27:16 Zvino vaiva nenguva iyo nomusungwa wakakurumbira wainzi Bharabhasi. 
Matthew27:17 Naizvozvo vakati vavungana pamwechete, Pirato akati kwavari: Munoda kuti ndikusunungurirei aniko? Bharabhasi kana Jesu unonzi Kristu?" 
Matthew27:18 Nokuti wakanga achiziva kuti vakanga vamuisa kwaari negodo. 
Matthew27:19 Zvino wakati agere pachigaro chokutonga, mukadzi wake akatumira kwaari, achiti: Usava nechokuita nomunhu uyo wakarurama, nokuti ndatambudzika zvinhu zvizhinji nhasi pakurota nokuda kwake." 
Matthew27:20 Asi vaprista vakuru navakuru vakagombedzera chaunga kuti vakumbire Bharabhasi, Jesu aparadzwe." 
Matthew27:21 Mubati akapindura akati kwavari: Ndoupiko pavaviri wamunoda kuti ndikusunungurirei? Vakati: Bharabhasi. 
Matthew27:22 Pirato akati kwavari: Ndichagoiteiko naJesu unonzi Kristu? Vose vakati kwaari: Ngaaroverwe. 
Matthew27:23 Mubati akati: Nemhaka yeyi? Chiiko chakaipa chaakagoita? Asi vakanyanyisa kudanidzira vachiti: Ngaaroverwe! 
Matthew27:24 Zvino Pirato achivona kuti haangadzivisi chinhu asi kuti pamuka bope, wakatora mvura akageza mavoko pamberi pechaunga achiti: Handina mhosva yeropa romunhu uyu wakarurama, Zvivonerei imwi!" 
Matthew27:25 Vanhu vose vakapindura vakati: Ropa rake \add ngarive\add* pamusoro pedu napamusoro pevana vedu. 
Matthew27:26 Zvino akavasunungurira Bharabhasi, asi wakati arova Jesu, aka\add mu\add*kumikidza kwavari kuti aroverwe pamuchinjikwa." 
Matthew27:27 Zvino varwi vomubati vakaisa Jesu mumba momubati, hondo yose ikavunganira kwaari." 
Matthew27:28 Vakamukurura, vakamufukidza nguvo shava," 
Matthew27:29 Vakaruka korona yemhinzwa, ndokuisa pamusoro wake, norutsanga muruvoko rwake rworudyi. Vakafugama mabvi pamberi pake vakamusweveredza vachiti: Hekanhi, Mambo wavaJudha!" 
Matthew27:30 Vakamupfira mate, vakatora rutsanga vakamurova musoro." 
Matthew27:31 Vakati vamusweveredza, vakamubvisa nguvo tsvuku, vakamupfekedza nguvo dzake vakaenda naye kundorovera." 
Matthew27:32 Vakati vachibuda, vakawana murume wekurini, wainzi Simoni. Iye vakamumanikidza kuti atakure muchinjikwa wake." 
Matthew27:33 Vakati vasvika panzvimbo inonzi Gorogota, ndokuti: Nzvimbo yedhehenya." 
Matthew27:34 Vakamupa vhiniga yakavhenganiswa nenduru kuti amwe asi wakati aravira akaramba kumwa. 
Matthew27:35 Vakati vamurovera pamuchinjikwa, vakagovana nguvo dzake pakati pavo, vachikanda mijenya kuti zvakarehwa nomuporofita zviitike zvinoti: Vakagovana nguvo dzangu, vakakanda mijenya pamusoro pezvokufuka zvangu." 
Matthew27:36 Uye vakagara pasi, vakamurindapo." 
Matthew27:37 Vakaisa pamusoro pemusoro wake \add rugwaro rwe\add*mhosva yake rwakanyorwa \add kuti\add*: UYU NDIJESU MAMBO WAVAJUDHA. 
Matthew27:38 Kwaiva namakororo maviri akaroverwa pamwe chete naye, mumwe kurudyi, mumwe kuruboshwe." 
Matthew27:39 Vakanga vachipfuvura vakamunyomba, vachidzungudza misoro yavo," 
Matthew27:40 vachiti: Iwe wokuputsa tembere noku\add i\add*vakazve namazuva matatu, zviponese; kana uri Mwanakomana waMwari, buruka pamuchinjikwa." 
Matthew27:41 Saizvozvovo vaprista vakuru navanyori navakuru vakamusweveredza vachiti: 
Matthew27:42 Wakaponesa vamwe, iye haagoni kuzviponesa. Kana ari Iye mambo wavaIsraeri, ngaaburuke zvino pamuchinjikwa tigomutenda." 
Matthew27:43 Waivimba naMwari; ngaachimusunungura zvino kana achimuda. Nokuti wakati ndiri Mwanakomana waMwari. 
Matthew27:44 Namakororo akaroverwa pamwe chete naye, akamuzvidza saizvozvo." 
Matthew27:45 Zvino kubva paora rechitanhatu rima rakavapo panyika yose kusvikira paora repfumbamwe. 
Matthew27:46 Neora rinenge repfumbamwe Jesu akadanidzira nenzwi guru achiti: Eri, Eri ramasabakatani?"" Ndokuti: Mwari wangu, Mwari wangu mandisiyireiko?" 
Matthew27:47 Vamwe vakanga vamirepo vakati vanzwa vakati: Uyo unodana Eria. 
Matthew27:48 Pakarepo mumwe wavo akamhanya, akatora chipanje, akazadza nevhiniga ndokuisa parutsanga, akamupa kuti amwe." 
Matthew27:49 Asi vamwe vakati: Regai timbovona kana Eria achivuya kuzomuponesa. 
Matthew27:50 Zvino Jesu akadanidzirazve nenzwi guru akabudisa mweya. 
Matthew27:51 Zvino tarira, vheiri retembere rakabvaruka kuita \add mapandi\add* maviri, kubva kumusoro kusvikira pasi. Nyika ikadengenyeka, mabwe akatsemuka." 
Matthew27:52 Mahwiro akazaruka; nemitumbi mizhinji yavatsvene vakanga vavete yakamutswa; 
Matthew27:53 vakabuda pamahwiro iye amuka vakapinda muguta dzvene, vakavonekwa kuvazhinji." 
Matthew27:54 Zvino mukuru wezana navaiva naye vakarinda Jesu vakati vachivona kudengenyeka kwenyika nezvakaitwa, vakatya zvikuru vakati: Zvirokwazvo uyu wakanga ari Mwanakomana waMwari." 
Matthew27:55 Vakadzi vazhinji vakanga varipo, vakatarira vari kure, vakanga vatevera Jesu vachibva Gariri vachimushandira." 
Matthew27:56 Pakati pavo kwakanga kunaMaria Magidharini, naMaria mai vaJakobho naJose, namai vavanakomana vaZebhedhi." 
Matthew27:57 Zvino ava manheru kukasvika mumwe mufumi weArimatiya wainzi Josefa. Iyevo pachake waiva mudzidzi waJesu. 
Matthew27:58 Akaenda kunaPirato akakumbira mutumbi waJesu. Pirato akaraira kuti agamuchidzwe mutumbi. 
Matthew27:59 Josefa wakati atora mutumbi, akauputira nomucheka werineni wakachena." 
Matthew27:60 Akauviga muhwiro hwake hwutsva, hwaakanga achera muhwe; akakungurusira ihwe guru pamuromo wehwiro akabva." 
Matthew27:61 Paivavo naMaria Magadharini nomumwe Maria vagere vakatarisana nehwiro. 
Matthew27:62 Nezuva raitevera ndiro zuva raitevera zuva rokugadzirira, vaprista vakuru navaFarisi vakavungana kunaPirato," 
Matthew27:63 vakati: Ishe tinorangarira kuti munyengeri uyu achiri mupenyu wakati: Mazuva matatu apfuvura ndichamuka. 
Matthew27:64 Saka rairai kuti hwiro hwuchengetwe kusvikira nezuva retatu; zvimwe vadzidzi vake vangavuya vusiku vakamuba. Vagoti kuvanhu: Wakamutswa kuvakafa. Kurashika kokupedzisira kukazopfuvura kokutanga. 
Matthew27:65 Pirato akati kwavari: Imwi munavarindi, endai muhwuchengete sezvamunoziva." 
Matthew27:66 Vakaenda, vakandochengeta hwiro, vakaisa chiratidzo chokusimbisa pabwe, vakaisa varindi." 
Matthew28:1 Nokupera kwesabata kotanga kuidza, no\add musi\add* wokutanga kwevhiki, Maria Magadarene nomumwe Maria vakavuya kuzovona hwiro." 
Matthew28:2 Zvino tarira kukavapo kudengenyeka kwenyika kukuru, nokuti mutumwa waShe wakaburuka kubva kudenga, akavuya, akakungurusa ibwe kubva pamukova, akagara pamusoro paro." 
Matthew28:3 Kuvonekwa kwake kwakanga kwakaita semheni nezvokufuka zvake zvichena semagada echando. 
Matthew28:4 Zvino varindi vakadedera nokutya, vakaita savakafa." 
Matthew28:5 Zvino mutumwa akapindura akati kuvakadzi: Musatya imwi; nokuti ndinoziva kuti munotsvaka Jesu wakanga aroverwa. 
Matthew28:6 Haapo pano; nokuti wakamuka sezvaakareva. Vuyai muvone pakanga pavete Ishe. 
Matthew28:7 Kurumidzai muende mundovudza vadzidzi vake kuti wamuka kuvakafa; zvino tarirai unokutungamirirai Gariri, muchandomuvonapo; tarirai, ndakuvudzai." 
Matthew28:8 Zvino vakakurumidza kubva pabwiro vachitya nomufaro mukuru. Vakamhanyira kunovudza vadzidzi vake. 
Matthew28:9 Zvino vakati vachindovudza vadzidzi vake, tarira, Jesu wakasongana navo, akati: Hekanhi waro! Vakavuya vakabata tsoka dzake vakamunamata." 
Matthew28:10 Zvino Jesu akati kwavari: Musatya; endai, mundovudza hama dzangu kuti vaende Gariri ndiko kwavachanondivona." 
Matthew28:11 Zvino vachiri munzira, tarira, vamwe varindi vakasvika muguta, vakapira vaprista vakuru zvose zvakaitwa." 
Matthew28:12 Vakati vavungana navakuru, vakarangana, vakapa varwi mari zhinji," 
Matthew28:13 vachiti: Taurai muchiti, vadzidzi vake vakavuya vusiku vakamuba isu tivete." 
Matthew28:14 Kana zvikazikamwa nomubati tichamunyengerera, Tikudzivirirei \add pamhoswa\add*" 
Matthew28:15 Zvino vakatora mari vakaita sezvavakadzidziswa. Shoko iri rikaparidzirwa pakati pavaJudha kusvikira zuva ranhasi. 
Matthew28:16 Zvino vadzidzi vanegumi nomumwe vakaenda Gariri, kugomo ravakarairwa naJesu;" 
Matthew28:17 vakati vachimuvona, vakamunamata; asi vamwe vakasagutsikana." 
Matthew28:18 Ipapo Jesu wakasvika akataura kwavari, akati: Simba rose rakapiwa kwandiri kudenga napanyika." 
Matthew28:19 Endai naizvozvo mudzidzise marudzi ose, muvabhabhatidze muzita raBaba nero Mwanakomana neroMweya Mutsvene;" 
Matthew28:20 Muvadzidzise kuchengeta zvose zvandakakurairai imwi; zvino tarirai ndinemwi mazuva ose, kusvikira pakuguma kwenyika. Ameni." 
Mark1:1 Kutanga kweevhangeri yaJesu Kristu, Mwanakomana waMwari;" 
Mark1:2 sezvazvakanyorwa muvaprofita \add zvichinzi\add*: Tarira, ndinotuma mutumwa wangu pamberi pechiso chako, uchagadzira nzira yako pamberi pako." 
Mark1:3 Inzwi rounodana murenje, \add richiti\add*: Gadzirai imwi nzira yaShe; ruramisai migwagwa yake." 
Mark1:4 Johwani wakabhabhatidza murenje, akaparidza rubhabhatidzo rwokutendevuka \add \add*kuitira kangamwiro yezvivi." 
Mark1:5 Zvino kwakabudira kwaari nyika yose yeJudhiya, naveJerusarema, vose vakabhabhatidzwa naye murwizi rweJoridhani vachirevurura zvivi zvavo." 
Mark1:6 Zvino Johwani wakanga akapfeka makushe ekamera, nebhanire rechikumba muchivuno chake, waidya mhashu novuchi hwesango." 
Mark1:7 Akaparidza, achiti: Kunovuya mumwe unesimba kupfuvureni shure kwangu. Wandisina kufanira kukotama kuti ndisununugure tambo yeshangu dzake." 
Mark1:8 Ini zvirokwazvo ndakakubhabhatidzai nemvura; asi iye uchakubhabhatidzai noMweya Mutsvene. 
Mark1:9 Zvino zvakaitika namazuva iwayo kuti Jesu wakabva Nazareta yeGariri, akabhabhatidzwa naJohwani muJoridhani." 
Mark1:10 Pakarepo achibuda mumvura, wakavona matenga akazarurwa, noMweya wakaita senjiva uchiburuka pamusoro pake." 
Mark1:11 Zvino kwakauya inzwi richibva kudenga \add richiti\add*: Ndiwe Mwanakomana wangu unodikamwa, unondifadza kwazvo." 
Mark1:12 Zvino pakarepo Mweya wakamubudisira kurenje. 
Mark1:13 Akavako murenje mazuva makumi mana achiidzwa naSatani, uye wakanga ane mhuka dzesango, vatumwa vachimushumira." 
Mark1:14 Zvino shure kokuiswa kwaJohwani mutirongo, Jesu akasvika Gariri, achiparidza evhangeri youshe hwaMwari," 
Mark1:15 achiti: Nguva yazadziswa, uye ushe hwaMwari hwaswedera pedo; tendevukai, mutende evhangeri." 
Mark1:16 Wakati achifamba napagungwa reGariri, akavona Simoni naAndiriya munun'una wake vachikandira mimbure mugungwa; nokuti vakanga vari varedzi vehove." 
Mark1:17 Jesu akati kwavari: Nditeverei, ndichakuitai muve varedzi vevanhu." 
Mark1:18 Pakarepo vakasiya mimbure yavo, vakamutevera." 
Mark1:19 Wakati apfuvura ipapo zvishoma, akavona Jakobho waZebhedhi, naJohwani munun'una wake vari muchikepe vachigadzira mimbure." 
Mark1:20 Pakarepo akavadana; vakasiya baba vavo Zebhedhi muchikepe navashandi, vakamutevera." 
Mark1:21 Vakapinda muKapenaume; zvino pakarepo nomusi wesabata wakapinda musinagoge, akadzidzisa." 
Mark1:22 Vakashamiswa nedzidziso yake; nokuti wakavadzidzisa somunhu unesimba, asingaiti savanyori." 
Mark1:23 Zvino kwaivapo musinagoge ravo nomunhu wakanga anomweya wetsvina, akadanidzira" 
Mark1:24 achiti: Tiregei, tineiko nemwi, Jesu weNazareta? Mavuya kuzotiparadza kanhi? Ndinokuzivai kuti ndimwi ani: Mutsvene waMwari." 
Mark1:25 Zvino Jesu akamutsiura achiti: Nyarara, ubude kwaari!" 
Mark1:26 Zvino mweya wetsvina wakati amubvundisa, ndokudanidzira nenzwi guru, ndokubuda kwaari." 
Mark1:27 Vakashamiswa vose, zvikuru kudai kuti vakavhunzana pakati pavo, vachiti: Chinyiko ichi? Idzidziso itswa yei iyi? nokuti nesimba unoraira kunyange mweya yakaipa, uye inomuteerera." 
Mark1:28 Zvino pakarepo mukurumbira wake ukanzwikwa kunze panyika yose yakapoteredza Gariri. 
Mark1:29 Zvino pakarepo vakati vachibuda musinagoge, vakapinda mumba maSimoni naAndiriya, vanaJakobho naJohwani." 
Mark1:30 Asi mbuyawasha vaSimoni vakanga vavete vachirwara nefivhiri, pakarepo vakamuvudza nezvavo;" 
Mark1:31 akaenda, akavabata ruvoko, akavamutsa; fivhiri ikavarega pakarepo vakavashandira." 
Mark1:32 Zvino madekwana, zuva ravira, vakaisa kwaari vose vakanga vachirwara navakanga vakabatwa nomweya yakaipa." 
Mark1:33 Zvino guta rose rakanga rakavungana pamwechete pamukova. 
Mark1:34 Akaporesa vazhinji vakanga vachirwara nezvirwere zvakasiyana-siyana, akabudisa mweya yakaipa mizhinji; asi wakanga asingatenderi mweya yakaipa kutaura, nokuti yakanga ichimuziva." 
Mark1:35 Zvino mangwanani kuchinerima guru, wakasimuka, akabuda, akaenda kunzvimbo murenje, akandonyengeterapo." 
Mark1:36 Simoni navakanga vanaye vakatevera vachimutsvaka. 
Mark1:37 Zvino vakati vamuwana vakati kwaari: Vose vanokutsvakai. 
Mark1:38 Akati kwavari: Ngatiende kumisha inotevera, kuti ndindoparidzavo ikoko, nokuti ndizvo zvandakavinga." 
Mark1:39 Zvino akaparidza mumasinagoge avo paGariri rose, achibudisa mweya yakaipa." 
Mark1:40 Zvino kwakavuya kwaari munhu unamaperembudzi, achimukumbirisa ndokufugama pamberi pake akati kwaari: Kana muchida munogona kundinatsa." 
Mark1:41 Jesu akanzwa ngoni, akatandavadza ruvoko, akamubata akati kwaari: Ndinoda, chinatswa;" 
Mark1:42 pakarepo achangopedza kutaura, maperembudzi akabva kwaari, akanatswa." 
Mark1:43 Zvino akamuraira kwazvo, akamuendisa pakarepo," 
Mark1:44 Akati kwaari: Vona kuti urege kuvudza munhu chinhu; asi enda, uzviratidze kumuprista, ubayire pamusoro pokunatswa kwako zvinhu izvo zvakarairwa naMozisi, chive chapupu kwavari." 
Mark1:45 Asi iye wakabuda akatanga kuparidza zvikuru nokuvavaza kunze shoko iro, zvokuti Jesu wakanga asingagoni kupinda muguta pachena, asi wakanga ari kunze kunzvimbo dzerenje. Vakavuya kwaari vachibva kumativi ose." 
Mark2:1 Zvino akapindazve muKapenaume pashure pamazuva; zvikanzwikwa kuti uri mumba. 
Mark2:2 Zvino pakarepo vazhinji vakavungana pamwechete zvokuti pakanga pasina nzvimbo, kunyange pamukova, akataura shoko kwavari." 
Mark2:3 Vakavuya kwaari, vakaisa munhu wakanga akawoma mitezo, akatakurwa na\add vanhu\add* vana." 
Mark2:4 Zvino vakati vachikonewa kusvika pedo naye nokudzvinyidzirwa, vakazarura denga paakanga ari, vakati va\add ri\add*putsa vakaburusira nhovo yakanga ivete munhu wakanga akawoma mitezo." 
Mark2:5 Jesu wakati avona kutenda kwavo akati kunowakanga akawoma mitezo: Mwana zvivi zvako ngazvikangamwirwe iwe. 
Mark2:6 Zvino vamwe vavanyori vakanga vagerepo, vakafunga mumoyo yavo \add vachiti\add*:" 
Mark2:7 Uyu unoiteiko achimhura Mwari? ndianiko unogona kukangamwira zvivi kunze komumwe chete, Mwari?" 
Mark2:8 Zvino pakarepo Jesu paakanzwa mumweya wake kuti vanofunga kudaro mukati mavo akati kwavari: Munofungireiko zvinhu izvi mumoyo yenyu? 
Mark2:9 Chinyiko chakareruka, kuti kunowakawoma mitezo: Zvivi zvako zvakangamwirwa, kana kuti: Simuka, utore nhovo dzako, ufambe?" 
Mark2:10 Asi kuti muzive kuti Mwanakomana womunhu unesimba panyika rokukangamwira zvivi, (akati kuwakanga akawoma mitezo):" 
Mark2:11 Ndinoti kwauri: Simuka utore nhovo yako, uende kumba kwako." 
Mark2:12 Zvino pakarepo akasimuka, akatora nhovo, ndokubuda pamberi pavo vose; zvokuti vose vakashamiswa, vakarumbidza Mwari, vachiti: Hatina kumbozvivona zvakadai." 
Mark2:13 Wakabudazve \add akaenda\add* kurutivi rwegungwa, chaunga chose chikavuya kwaari, akachidzidzisa." 
Mark2:14 Wakati achipfuvura, akavona Revhi waArifiyosi agere panogamuchirwa mutero, akati kwaari: Nditevere. Akasimuka akamutevera." 
Mark2:15 Zvino zvakaitika kuti wakati agere pakudya mumba make, vateresi vazhinji navatadzi vakagaravo pamwechete naJesu navadzidzi vake nokuti vakanga vari vazhinji vakamutevera." 
Mark2:16 Zvino vanyori navaFarisi vakati vamuvona achidya navateresi navatadzi, vakati kuvadzidzi vake: Nemhaka yeiko achidya nokumwa navateresi navatadzi?" 
Mark2:17 Jesu wakati achi\add zvi\add*nzwa akati kwavari: Avo vasingarwari havatsvaki chiremba, asi avo vanorwara. Handina kuvuya kuzodana vakarurama, asi vatadzi mukutendevuka." 
Mark2:18 Zvino vadzidzi vaJohwani navavaFarisi vaigara vachitsanya; vakavuya vakati kwaari: Nemhaka yeyi vadzidzi vaJohwani navadzidzi vavaFarisi vachitsanya asi vadzidzi venyu havatsanyi? 
Mark2:19 Jesu akati kwavari: Vana veimba yomuchato vangatsanya here chikomba chichiri kwavari? Kana vachingova nechikomba kwavari, havangatsanyi;" 
Mark2:20 asi mazuva achasvika apo chikomba chichabviswa kwavari, ipapo mazuva iwayo vachatsanya." 
Mark2:21 Hakuna munhu unosoneravo chigamba chitsva panguvo yakashakara zvimwe chigamba chitsva chinoiswa chinobvarura nguvo yakashakara vuri rikanyanya. 
Mark2:22 Hakunomunhu unodira waini itsva muhombodo sharu, nokuti waini itsva inoparusa hombodo, waini ikatevuka nehombodo ikaparara, asi waini itsva inofanira kudirwa muhombodo itsva." 
Mark2:23 Zvino zvakaitika kuti wakapuvura nemuminda yezviyo nomusi wesabata, vadzidzi vake vakatanga vachifamba kutanha hura dzezviyo." 
Mark2:24 VaFarisi vakati kwaari: Tarirai, vanoitireiko nomusi wesabata zvisiri pamutemo?" 
Mark2:25 Akati kwavari: Hamuna kutomborava here zvakaitwa naDhavhidhi, musi waakanga ashaiwa, ava nenzara, iye navakanga vanaye?" 
Mark2:26 Kuti wakapinda sei mumba maMwari namazuva aAbhiatari muprista mukuru, akadya zvingwa zvokuratidza zvakanga zvisiri pamutemo kudyiwa asi navaprista \add voga\add*, akapavo kwavari vaaiva naye?" 
Mark2:27 Akati kwavari: Sabata rakaitirwa munhu, kwete munhu \add kuitirwa\add* sabata." 
Mark2:28 Naizvozvo Mwanakomana womunhu ndiShevo wesabata. 
Mark3:1 Zvino wakapindazve musinagoge, zvino kwakanga kunomunhuko wakanga anoruvoko rwakawonyana." 
Mark3:2 Zvino vakamutarisisa \add kuvona\add* kana angamuporesa nomusi wesabata, kuti vamupomere mhosva." 
Mark3:3 Zvino iye akati kumunhu wakanga anoruvoko rwakawonyana: Simuka uuye pakati. 
Mark3:4 Akati kwavari: Zviri pamutemo here kuita zvakanaka namazuva esabata, kana kuita zvakaipa? Kuponesa upenyu, kana kuvuraya? Asi vakanyarara." 
Mark3:5 Zvino wakati aringa-ringa kwavari, achivatarira nokutsamwa, ane shungu nokuda kokuwoma kwemoyo yavo; akati kumunhu: Tambanudza ruvoko rwako. Akatambanudza ruvoko rwake rukaporeswa rukava sorumwe." 
Mark3:6 Zvino vaFarisi vakati vabuda pakarepo vakarangana navaHerodhe pamusoro pake kuti vangamuparazda sei. 
Mark3:7 Zvino Jesu akabva navadzidzi vake \add vakaenda\add* kugungwa, chaunga chikuru chikamutevera chichibva Gariri nokuJudhiya," 
Mark3:8 neJerusarema, neIdhumeya, nemhiri kwaJoridhani navakapoteredza Tire neSidhoni; chaunga chikuru, chakati chanzwa zvinhu zvikuru zvaanoita chikavuya kwaari." 
Mark3:9 Akataura kuvadzidzi vake kuti kachikepe kadiki kamugarire nokuda kwechaunga, zvimwe vangamutsikirira." 
Mark3:10 Nokuti wakanga aporesa vazhinji zvokuti vaitsikirirana pamuoro pake kuti vamubate vose vakanga vane zvirwere. 
Mark3:11 Nemweya yetsvina, payakamuvona yakawira pasi pamberi pake, ikadanidzira ichiti: Ndiwe Mwanakomana waMwari!" 
Mark3:12 Akairairisa zvikuru kuti irege kumuzivisa \add pachena\add*. 
Mark3:13 Zvino wakakwira mugomo, akadana vaakanga achida, vakavuya kwaari." 
Mark3:14 Akagadza vanegumi navaviri, kuti vagare naye, nokuti avatume kunoparidza," 
Mark3:15 uye vave nesimba rekuporesa vurwere nokubudisa mweya yakaipa. 
Mark3:16 NaSimoni aka\add mu\add*tumidza zita rinonzi Petro," 
Mark3:17 naJakobho waZebhedhi, naJohwani munun'una waJakobho akavatumidza ivo mazita anonzi Bowanegesi, ndokuti vanakomana vokutinhira;" 
Mark3:18 naAndiriya, naFiripi, naBhatoromiyo naMatewu naTomasi naJakobho waArifiyosi, naTadhiyo, naSimoni muKenani," 
Mark3:19 naJudhasi Isikariyoti, iyevo wakamutengesa. Zvino wakapinda mumba." 
Mark3:20 Chaunga chikavunganazve pamwechete zvokuti vakanga vasingagoni kunyange kudya chingwa. 
Mark3:21 Vanhu vokwake vakati vachi\add zvi\add*nzwa vakabuda kuzomubata; nokuti vakati: Unopenga. 
Mark3:22 Navanyori vakaburuka vachibva Jerusarema vakati: Una Bheerizebhuri, uye unobudisa mweya yakaipa nomuchinda wemweya yakaipa." 
Mark3:23 Zvino akavadana, akati kwavari nemifananidzo: Satani ungabudisa Satani seiko?" 
Mark3:24 Kana ushe hwukazvipesanisa, ushe uhwo hahwungagoni kumira." 
Mark3:25 Kana imba ikazvipesanisa, imba iyo haigoni kumira." 
Mark3:26 Zvino kana Satani achizvimukira, akazvipesanisa, haangagoni kumira, asi unopera." 
Mark3:27 Hakuno munhu ungapinda mumba momurume unesimba, akapamba nhumbi dzake, kunze kokuti ambosunga murume unesimba, zvino ungapamba imba yake." 
Mark3:28 Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Zvivi zvose zvichakangamwirwa vanakomana vavanhu, nokumhura Mwari kose kwavanomhura Mwari nako;" 
Mark3:29 asi ani nani wamhura Mwari Mweya Mutsvene haangatongokangamwirwi asi uri panjodzi yokutongerwa mhosva yokusingaperi. 
Mark3:30 Nokuti vakati: Unomweya wetsvina. 
Mark3:31 Zvino kwakavuya vanunu'una vake namai vake, vakamira kunze, vakatumira \add nhume\add* kwaari vachimudana." 
Mark3:32 Chaunga chakanga chigere chakamukomba; chikati kwaari: Tarirai, mai venyu navana vamai venyu vari panze vanokutsvakai." 
Mark3:33 Akavapindura achiti: Mai vangu ndiyaniko kana vanun'una vangu? 
Mark3:34 Zvino akaringa-ringa avo vakanga vagere vakamukomba akati: Tarirai mai vangu navana vamai vangu. 
Mark3:35 Nokuti ani nani unoita kuda kwaMwari, ndiye mwana wamai vangu nehanzvadzi yangu namai." 
Mark4:1 Zvino wakatangazve kudzidzisa parutivi rwegungwa; kukavungana kwaari chaunga chikuru zvokuti wakapinda muchikepe akagara mugungwa; chaunga chose chakanga chiri parutivi rwegungwa panyika. 
Mark4:2 Akavadzidzisa zvinhu zvizhinji nemifananidzo, akati kwavari mukudzidzisa kwake:" 
Mark4:3 Teererai; tarirai, mukushi wakabuda kundokusha." 
Mark4:4 Zvino zvkaitika paakanga achikusha, imwe mbeu yakawira panhivi dzenzira; shiri dzokudenga dzikavuya dzikaidya yose." 
Mark4:5 Imwe yakawira parukangarabwe, payakanga isinevhu zhinji; ikamera pakarepo, nokuti yakanga isinevhu rakadzika;" 
Mark4:6 asi zuva rakati rabuda, ikapiswa nokuti yakanga isina mudzi ikawoma." 
Mark4:7 Imwe yakawira pakati pemhinzwa, mhinzwa ikakura ikaivhunga, ikasabereka chibereko." 
Mark4:8 Imwe yakawira muvhu rakanaka; ikabereka zvibereko zvakakura zvikawedzera, ikabereka imwe makumi matatu imwe makumi matanhatu imwe zana." 
Mark4:9 Akati kwavari: Une nzeve dzokunzwa, ngaanzwe." 
Mark4:10 Zvino wakati ari oga, vakanga vakamukomba navanegumi navaviri vakamubvunza zvemufananidzo." 
Mark4:11 Akati kwavari: Zvakavanzika zvoushe hwaMwari zvakapiwa kwamuri; asi kuna avo vari kunze, zvose zvinoitwa nemifananidzo." 
Mark4:12 Kuti kuvona vavone asi varege kuvonesesa nokunzwa vanzwe asi varege kunzwisisa kuti zvimwe varege kutendevuka, vakangamwirwe zvivi \add zvavo\add*." 
Mark4:13 Zvino akati kwavari: Hamuzivi here mufanandizo uyu? Zvino muchaziva seiko mifananidzo yose? 
Mark4:14 Mukushi unokusha shoko. 
Mark4:15 Zvino ava ndivo vari munzira, panokushwa shoko, vanoti kana vanzwa, pakarepo Satani unovuya ndokubvisa shoko rakakushwa mumoyo mavo." 
Mark4:16 Saizvozvo Ava ndivovo vakakushwa parukangarabwe, kana vanzwa shoko, pakarepo vanorigamuchira nomufaro," 
Mark4:17 asi havanomudzi mavari, asi vanotsungirira kwechinguvana. Pashure kana matambudziko nokumanikidwa zvichivuya nokuda kweshoko, pakarepo vanogumburwa." 
Mark4:18 Zvino ava ndivo vanokushwa mumhinzwa, vanonzwa shoko," 
Mark4:19 asi kufunganya kwenyika nokunyengera kwefuma nokuchiva zvimwe zvinhu zvinopinda, zvichivhunga shoko, roshaiwa zvibereko." 
Mark4:20 Zvino ana ndivo vakakushwa muvhu rakanaka, ndivo vanonzwa shoko, nokugamuchira, vagobereka zvibereko mumwe makumi matatu, mumwe makumi matanhatu, mumwe zana." 
Mark4:21 Zvino wakati kwavari: Mwenje uripo kuti uiswe pasi pedengu kana pasi pomubhedha here? Hauzipo kuti uiswe pachigadziko here? 
Mark4:22 Nokuti hapana chinhu chakavigwa chisingazobudi pachena, kana chakavanzika chisingazobudi pachena." 
Mark4:23 Kana pane munhu ane nzeve dzokunzwa, ngaanzwe." 
Mark4:24 Zvino wakati kwavari: Chenjererai zvamunonzwa; chiyero chamunoyera nacho muchayerwa nacho, nekwamuri imwi munonzwa, chichawedzerwa." 
Mark4:25 Nokuti ani nani unacho uchapiwa, asi usina uchatorerwa kunyange nechaanacho." 
Mark4:26 Zvino akati: Ndizvo zvakaita ushe hwaMwari, somunhu unokusha mbeu muvhu." 
Mark4:27 Zvino akavata, nokumuka, vusiku namasikati, mbeu inomera ichikura iye asingazivi kuti zvinoitika sei." 
Mark4:28 Ivhu rinongobereka zvibereko zvaro, pakutanga chipande, pashure hura, pashure zviyo zvakakora pahura." 
Mark4:29 Kana zvibereko zvaibva, pakarepo unotuma jeko nokuti kukohwa kwasvika" 
Mark4:30 Zvino wakati: Tichafananidza neiko ushe hwaMwari? Tichahwuenzanisa neiko? 
Mark4:31 Setsanga yemasitadha*, iyo kana ichidzvarwa muvhu, iduku kumbeu dzose dzapanyika;" 
Mark4:32 asi kana yadzvarwa, inokura ichiva huru kumirivo yose, ichiita matavi makuru akadaro kuti shiri dzokudenga dzinogara pamumvuri wawo." 
Mark4:33 Zvino nemifananidzo mizhinji yakadaro, akataura shoko kwavari, pavaigona kunzwa napo." 
Mark4:34 Asi kunze kwemifananidzo haana kutaura kwavari; asi vava voga, wakadudzira vadzidzi vake." 
Mark4:35 Zvino nezuva iroro ava madekwana, wakati kwavari: Ngatiyambukire mhiri." 
Mark4:36 Vakarega vanhu vazhinji vachiinda, vakaenda naye akangodaro muchikepe. Zvino kwaivavo nezvimwe zvikepe zvidiki naye." 
Mark4:37 Zvino dutu guru remhepo rakamuka, mafungu akarova chikepe, chikange zvino chozadwa." 
Mark4:38 Asi Iye wakanga ari mushure mechikepe avete pamutsago, vakamumutsa, vakati kwaari: Mudzidzisi, hamunehanya kuti tofa here?" 
Mark4:39 Akamuka akatsiura mhepo, akati kugungwa: Nyarara, ugadzikane! Mhepo ikanyarara, kukavapo kudzikama kukuru." 
Mark4:40 Zvino akati kwavari: Munotyireiko zvakadaro? Hamunokutenda seiko? 
Mark4:41 Vakatya nokutya kukuru, vakati mumwe kunomumwe: Munhu rudziiko uyu, kuti kunyange mhepo negungwa zvinomuteerera?" 
Mark5:1 Vakasvika mhiri kwegungwa, kunyika yavaGadharini." 
Mark5:2 Zvino wakati abuda muchikepe, pakarepo akasongana nomunhu achibva kumarinda anomweya wetsvina," 
Mark5:3 uyo wakanga ane vugaro kumarinda, uye kwakanga kusina munhu wakanga achigona kumusunga kunyange neketani," 
Mark5:4 nokuti kazhinji waisungwa nezvisungo zvamakumbo namaketani, asi maketani aidamburwa napakati naye, nezvisungo waidambura kuita zvidimbu; saizvozvo kwakanga kusina waigona kumupingudza." 
Mark5:5 Zvino nguva dzose, vusiku namasikati, waiva mumakomo nokumarinda achidanidzira, achizvicheka namabwe." 
Mark5:6 Zvino wakati achivona Jesu ari kure, akamhanya, ndokumunamata;" 
Mark5:7 akadanidzira nenzwi guru akati: Ndineiko nemwi Jesu, Mwanakomana waMwari Wokumusorosa? Ndinokupikirai naMwari kuti murege kunditambudza." 
Mark5:8 Nokuti akati kwaari: Buda pamunhu, \add iwe\add* mweya wetsvina." 
Mark5:9 Akamubvunza \add akati\add*: Zita rako ndianiko? Akapindura achiti kwaari: Zita rangu \add rinonzi\add* Rigiyoni nokuti tiri vazhinji. 
Mark5:10 Vakamukumbira zvikuru kuti arege kuvadzinga panyika iyo. 
Mark5:11 Zvino kwakanga kuripo pedo negomo boka guru renguruve dzichifura. 
Mark5:12 Mweya yakaipa yose ikamukumbira zvikuru ichiti: Titumirei kunguruve kuti tindopinda madziri. 
Mark5:13 Pakarepo Jesu akaitendera. Mweya yetsvina ikabuda ikapinda munguruve; boka rikamhanyira zvinesimba kumawere kugungwa, dzinenge dzaiva zvuru zviviri, dzikafira mugungwa." 
Mark5:14 Zvino avo vaifudza nguruve vakatiza, vakandoreva muguta naparuwa. Vakavuya kuzovona kuti chii chainge chaitwa." 
Mark5:15 Vakasvika kuna Jesu, vakavona uyo wakanga ane mweya yakaipa, iye waiva neRigiyoni agere, akapfeka ari munhu kwaye; vakatya." 
Mark5:16 Vaya vakanga va\add zvi\add*vona, vakavarondedzera zvakaitirwa iye wakanga ane mweya yakaipa nenguruvevo." 
Mark5:17 Vakatanga kumugombedzera zvikuru kuti abve kumiganhu yavo. 
Mark5:18 Zvino wakati achipinda muchikepe, iye waiva nemweya yakaipa akamukumbirisa zvikuru kuti agare naye." 
Mark5:19 Asi Jesu haana kumutendera, asi wakati kwaari: Enda kumba kwako, kuhama dzako, undovaudze kuti zvikuru sei zvawakaitirwa naShe, napawakaitirwa ngoni napo." 
Mark5:20 Akaenda akabva akatanga kuparidza muDhekapori kukura kwezvinhu zvaakaitirwa naJesu; vose vakashamiswa. 
Mark5:21 Jesu wakati ayambukazve nechikepe kune rimwe divi, vanhu vazhinji vakavunganira kwaari ava pedo negungwa." 
Mark5:22 Zvino tarira, kwakasvika mumwe wavakuru vesinagoge; nezita \add wainzi\add* Jairosi, zvino wakati amuvona, akawira patsoka dzake." 
Mark5:23 Akamugombedzera zvikuru achiti: Mukunda wangu muduku wotandadza, vuyai muise mavoko enyu pamusoro pake aponeswe uye uchararama." 
Mark5:24 Akaenda naye; chaunga chikuru chikamutevera, chichimutsikirira." 
Mark5:25 Zvino mumwe mukadzi waiva ne\add chirwere\add* chokubuda ropa makore anegumi namaviri," 
Mark5:26 wakanga atambura zvikuru kuvarapi vazhinji, wakanga apedza zvose zvaakanga anazvo, asina kutongobatsirika, asi kungonyanyisa." 
Mark5:27 Wakati anzwa zvaJesu, akavuya napakati pechaunga chaiva mushure, akabata nguvo yake." 
Mark5:28 Nokuti wakati: Kana ndikabata nguvo yake chete, ndichaporeswa." 
Mark5:29 Zvino pakarepo chitubu cheropa rake chikapwa, akanzwa mumuviri kuti waporeswa pakurwara uku." 
Mark5:30 Zvino pakarepo Jesu achiziva mukati make kuti simba rabuda kwaari, akatendevuka pakati pechaunga akati: Ndianiko wabata nguvo dzangu?" 
Mark5:31 Vadzidzi vake vakati kwaari: Munovona chaunga chikuru chinokutsimbirirai, zvino moti ndiani wandibata?" 
Mark5:32 Zvino wakaringa-ringa kuvona uyo wakanga aita chinhu ichi. 
Mark5:33 Asi mukadzi achitya, nokubvunda, achiziva zvakanga zvaitiwa maari, akavuya ndokuwira pasi pamberi pake, ndokumuvudza chokwadi chose." 
Mark5:34 Zvino akati kwaari: Mukunda, kutenda kwako kwakuponesa, enda norugare, upore pachifo chako." 
Mark5:35 Wakati achataura, kwakasvika \add vamwe\add* \add vacibva kumba\add* kwemukuru wesinagoge vakati: Mukunda wenyu wafa, muchagotambudzireiko mudzidzisi?" 
Mark5:36 Pakarepo Jesu achinzwa shoko rakataurwa akati kumukuru wesinagoge: Usatya, tenda chete." 
Mark5:37 Akasatendera munhu kumutevera, kunze kwaPetro naJakobho naJohwani munun'una waJakobho." 
Mark5:38 Vakasvika mumba momukuru wesinagoge, akavona mhere-mhere navaichema nokurira zvikuru." 
Mark5:39 Zvino wakati apinda, akati kwavari: Munoitireiko mhere-mhere iyi muchichema? Mwana haana kufa asi uvete." 
Mark5:40 Vakamuseka vachimumhura. Asi iye wakati avabudisa vose panze, akatora baba vomwana namai navaakanga anavo, akapinda kwakanga kuvete mwana." 
Mark5:41 Akabata ruvoko rwomwana, akati kwaari: ""Tarita kumi;"" ndokuti kana zvichishandurwa: Musikana, Muka!" 
Mark5:42 Pakarepo musikana wakasimuka, akafamba, nokuti waiva wamakore anegumi namaviri; vakashamiswa nokushama kukuru." 
Mark5:43 Akavaraira zvikuru kuti hakuna munhu unofanira kuzviziva; akati apiwe zvokudya. 
Mark6:1 Zvino wakabvapo, akasvika kunyika yokwake; vadzidzi vake vakamutevera." 
Mark6:2 Zvino musi wesabata wakati wasvika, akatanga kudzidzisa musinagoge, vazhinji vachimunzwa, vakashamiswa vachiti: Uyu wakawanepiko izvozvi? Njere dzakapiwa munhu uyu ndedzeiko? kuti namabasa esimba akadai anoitwa namavoko ake?" 
Mark6:3 Ko uyu haazi muvezi here, mwanakomana waMaria, nomukoma waJakobho naJose naJudha naSimoni? Nehanzvadzi dzake hadzisi pano nesu here? Vakagumburwa naye." 
Mark6:4 Asi Jesu akati kwavari: Muporofita haangashaiwi kukudzwa, asi munyika yake, napakati pehama dzake, nomumba make." 
Mark6:5 Akasagona kubata chero basa resimba ipapo, kunze kokuti wakaisa mavoko ake pamusoro pavairwara vashoma, akaporesa." 
Mark6:6 Akashamiswa nokusatenda kwavo. Ipapo akapota nemisha achidzidzisa. 
Mark6:7 Zvino wakadana vanegumi navaviri, akatanga kuvatuma vaviri-vaviri, akavapa simba pamusoro pemweya yetsvina." 
Mark6:8 Akavaraira kuti varege kutongotora chinhu cherwendo asi mudonzvo chete; \add varege kutora\add* kana chingwa nehombodo nemari muchikwama. 
Mark6:9 Asi vafuke manyatera, varege kupfeka nguvo mbiri." 
Mark6:10 Zvino akati kwavari: Pose pamunopinda mumba, mugaremo, kusvikira muchibvapo." 
Mark6:11 Asi ani nani usingakugamuchiriyi nokukunzwai, kana muchibvapo, muzuze guruva pasi petsoka dzenyu, chive chapupu kwavari. Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Zvicharerukira Sodhoma neGomora nezuva rokutonga kupfuvura guta iro." 
Mark6:12 Vakabuda, vakaparidza kuti vatendevuke." 
Mark6:13 Zvino vakabudisa mweya yakaipa mizhinji, vakazodza mafuta vazhinji vairwara, vachiporesa." 
Mark6:14 Zvino mambo Herodhe waka\add zvi\add*nzwa, nokuti zita rake rakanga rakurumbira kose, akati: Johwani Mubhabhatidzi wakamuka kuvakafa, naizvozvo masimba awa anobata maari." 
Mark6:15 Vamwe vakati: NdiEria; vamwe vakati: Muporofita kana \add kuti\add* \add unoita\add* somumwe wavaporofita. 
Mark6:16 Asi Herodhe wakati anzwa, akati: Uyu ndiJohwani uya wandakagura ini musoro wamuka kuvakafa." 
Mark6:17 Nokuti Herodhe pachake wakanga atuma \add vanhu\add* akabata Johwani, akamusunga mutirongo nokuda kwaHerodhiasi, mukadzi waFiripi, munun'una wake; nokuti \add Herodhe\add* wakanga amuwana." 
Mark6:18 Nokuti Johwani wakanga ati kuna Herodhe: Hauna kutenderwa kuti uve nomukadzi womunun'una wako. 
Mark6:19 Herodhiasi akamuvenga nechemumoyo, akada kumuvuraya, akasagona;" 
Mark6:20 nokuti Herodhe wakanga achitya Johwani, achiziva kuti munhu wakarurama, mutsvene, akamuchengeta zvakanaka. Zvino paakamunzwa wakaita zvinhu zvakawanda, akamunzwa nomufaro." 
Mark6:21 Asi zuva rakafanira rakati rasvika, Herodhe nezuva rokuberekwa kwake akaitira chirairo madzishe ake navakuru vezvuru zvamazana navabati vakuru veGariri," 
Mark6:22 zvino mwanasikana waHerodhiasi uyo paakapinda akatamba, akafadza Herodhe navakanga vagere \add pakudya\add* naye; mambo akati kumwanasikana: Kumbira kwandiri chipi zvacho chaunoda, ndichakupa." 
Mark6:23 Zvino akamupikira \add achiti\add*: Chingava chii chaunokumbira kwandiri ndichakupa, kusvikira pahafu youshe hwangu." 
Mark6:24 Akabuda, akati kunamai vake: Ndichakumbireiko? Vakati: Musoro waJohwani Mubhabhatidzi." 
Mark6:25 Pakarepo akakurumidza kupinda kunamambo, akakumbira achiti: Ndinoda kuti mundipe mundiro ikozvino musoro waJohwani mubhabhatidzi." 
Mark6:26 Ipapo mambo akashungurudzika zvikuru, \add asi \add*nokuda kokupika kwake, uye nokuda kwavakanga vagere naye pakudya, wakanga asingagoni kumurambira." 
Mark6:27 Pakarepo mambo akatuma murwi, akaraira kuti musoro wake uvuyiswe. Akaenda, akamugura musoro mutirongo," 
Mark6:28 akavuya nomusoro wake mundiro, akaupa kumusikana, musikana ndokuupa mai vake." 
Mark6:29 Vadzidzi vake vakati vachi\add zvi\add*nzwa, vakavuya vakatora chitunha chake, vakachiviga muhwiro." 
Mark6:30 Zvino vapositora vakavunganira kunaJesu, vakamuvudza zvose zvavakanga vaita, nezvavakanga vadzidzisa." 
Mark6:31 Akati kwavari: Vuyai imwi pachenyu muri moga kunzvimbo yerenje, muzorore zvishoma: Nokuti kwakanga kunavazhinji vaivuya nokuenda, vakasava nemukana kunyange wokudya." 
Mark6:32 Vakaenda nechikepe kunzvimbo yerenje pachivande. 
Mark6:33 Vanhu vakavavona vachienda, vazhinji vakamuziva, vakamhanyirako netsoka vose, vachibva pamaguta ose, vakavatangira, kusvika pamwechete kwaari." 
Mark6:34 Zvino Jesu wakati achibuda, akavona vanhu vazhinji, akavanzwira tsitsi, nokuti vakanga vakaita samakwai asinomufudzi; akatanga kuvadzidzisa zvinhu zvizhinji." 
Mark6:35 Zvino nguva yakati yaenda, vadzidzi vake vakavuya kwaari vakati: Pano inzvimbo yerenje, zvino nguva yaenda;" 
Mark6:36 vaendesei, kuti vaende kuruwa rwakapoteredza nemumisha vandozvitengera zvingwa. Nokuti havana chavangadya." 
Mark6:37 Akapindura akati kwavari: Imwi muvapei kuti vadye. Vakati kwaari: Tingaenda here kundotenga zvingwa zvamadhenari* anamazana maviri, tivape vadye?" 
Mark6:38 Akati kwavari: Munezvingwa zvinganiko? Endai munovona. Vakati vaziva vakati: Zvishanu, nehove mbiri." 
Mark6:39 Zvino akavaraira kuti vavagarise vose pasi mumapoka-mapoka pavuswa vunyoro. 
Mark6:40 Zvino vakagara pasi vakaita mapoka akarongwa amazana naamakumi mashanu. 
Mark6:41 Zvino wakati atora zvingwa zvishanu nehove mbiri, akatarira kumusoro kudenga, akavonga, akamedura zvingwa, akapa kuvadzidzi vake, kuti vazviise pamberi pavo; nehove mbiri akadzigovera pakati pavo vose." 
Mark6:42 Zvino vakadya vose, vakaguta." 
Mark6:43 Vakanunga matengu anegumi namaviri azere nezvimedu, nezvehovevo." 
Mark6:44 Zvino avo vakadya zvingwa vaiva varume vanenge zvuru zvishanu. 
Mark6:45 Pakarepo akamanikidza vadzidzi vake kuti vapinde muchikepe, vatungamire kuenda mhiri kuBhetisaidha, iye achiendisa vanhu vazhinji." 
Mark6:46 Akati awonekana navo, akabva akaenda mugomo kundonyengetera." 
Mark6:47 Zvino ava madekwana chikepe chakanga chiri pakati pegungwa, iye ari oga panyika." 
Mark6:48 Zvino wakavavona vachitambudzika nokukwasva, nokuti mhepo yakanga ichipesana navo, akavuya kwavari nenguva inenge seyechina yovusiku, achifamba pamusoro pegungwa; achida kuvapfuvura." 
Mark6:49 Zvino vakati vachimuvona achifamba pamusoro pegungwa, vakafunga kuti idzimudzangara, vakaridza mhere." 
Mark6:50 Nokuti vose vakamuvona, vakatambudzika; pakarepo akataura navo, akati kwavari: Tsungai moyo, ndini, musatya." 
Mark6:51 Akakwira kwavari muchikepe, mhepo ikanyarara; vakashamiswa kwazvo-kwazvo mukati mavo vakashamiswa." 
Mark6:52 Nokuti vakanga vasina kunzwisisa zvezvingwa, nokuti moyo wavo wakanga uri mukukutu." 
Mark6:53 Vakati vayambukira mhiri, vakasvika kunyika yeGenesareti, vakasungira chikepe pamhenderekedzo." 
Mark6:54 Vakati vabuda muchikepe, pakarepo vakamuziva," 
Mark6:55 vakamhanyira munharaunda yose yakapoteredza, vakatanga kutakura vairwara panhovo, \add vakavaisa\add* kwavainzwa kuti ndiko kwaari." 
Mark6:56 Zvino pose paakapinda pamisha kana pamaguta, kana paruwa, vakaradzika vairwara panzira dzomumisha, vakamukumbira zvikuru kuti \add varwere\add* vabate kunyange mupendero wenguvo dzake chete; uye vose vakamubata vakaporeswa." 
Mark7:1 Zvino kwakavunganira kwaari vaFarisi navamwe vavanyori vaibva Jerusarema; 
Mark7:2 vakati vavona vamwe vavadzidzi vake vachidya chingwa namavoko anetsvina, ndiko kuti asina kushambwa vakatsutsumwa." 
Mark7:3 Nokuti vaFarisi, navaJudha vose havadyi kunze kokuti vamboshamba mavoko kwazvo, vachichengeta tsika dzavakuru." 
Mark7:4 Kana vachibva pamisika, kunze kokuti vamboshamba, havadyi; nezvimwe zvinhu zvizhinji zviripo zvavakanga vagamuchira, kuti vazvichengete, \add zvinoti\add*: Kusuka mikombe, nehari, nemidziyo yendarira neyematafura." 
Mark7:5 Ipapo vaFarisi navanyori vakamubvunza, \add vachiti\add*: Nemhaka yeiko vadzidzi venyu vasingafambi netsika yavakuru, asi vanodya chingwa namavoko asina kugezewa?" 
Mark7:6 Akapindura akati kwavari: Isaya wakaporofita kwazvo pamusoro penyu imwi vanyengeri, sezvazvakanyorwa, \add zvichinzi\add*: Vanhu ava vanondikudza nemiromo, asi moyo yavo iri kure neni." 
Mark7:7 Asi vanondinamata pasina, Vachidzidzisa dzidziso, \add iri\add* mirairo yavanhu." 
Mark7:8 Nokuti munosiya mirairo yaMwari, muchichengeta tsika dzavanhu, \add se\add*kusuka mapoto nemikombe nezvimwe zvakadaro munozviita." 
Mark7:9 Zvino akati kwavari: Zvirokwazvo, munoramba murairo waMwari, kuti muchengete tsika dzenyu."
