Mark7:10 nokuti Mozisi wakati: Kudza baba vako namai vako; uye aninani unotuka baba kana mai, ngaafe rufu." 
Mark7:11 Asi imwi munoti: Kana munhu achiti kunababa vake kana mai: Chinhu chipi nechipi chamunobatsirwa nacho neni iKorbani*, ndokuti chava chipo \add kunaMwari\add*," 
Mark7:12 hamuchamutenderi kuitira baba vake namai vake chinhu," 
Mark7:13 muchishayisa shoko raMwari simba netsika dzenyu dzamunogamuchidzana, nezvinhu zvizhinji zvakadaro munozviita." 
Mark7:14 Zvino wakati adanira chaunga chose \add kwaari\add* akati kwavari: Nditeererei mose, munzwisise." 
Mark7:15 Hapana chinhu chinobva kunze komunhu, chinoti kana chichipinda maari chingamusvibisa; asi zvinhu zvinobuda maari, ndizvo zvinosvibisa munhu." 
Mark7:16 Kana ariko anenzeve dzokunzwa, ngaanzwe." 
Mark7:17 Zvino wakati apinda mumba achibva kuchaunga, vadzidzi vake vakamubvunza pamusoro pemufananidzo." 
Mark7:18 Akati kwavari: Nemwi hamunzwisisivo here? Hamunzwisisi here kuti chipi nechipi chinobva kunze, chichipinda mumunhu hachigoni kumusvibisa?" 
Mark7:19 Nokuti hachipindi mumoyo make, asi mudumbu, chichibuda kunze; \add nokutaura kwakadaro\add* wakanatsa zvokudya zvose." 
Mark7:20 Ipapo akati: Izvo zvinobuda mumunhu, ndizvo zvinosvibisa munhu." 
Mark7:21 Nokuti kubva mukati, mumoyo yavanhu munobuda mifungo yakaipa, vupombwe, vufeve, umhondi," 
Mark7:22 umbavha, ruchiva, kuipa, kunyengera, meso-meso, neziso rakaipa, kumhura Mwari, kuzvikudza, vupenzi;" 
Mark7:23 zvakaipa izvozvi zvose zvinobva mukati, zvichisvibisa munhu." 
Mark7:24 Zvino kubva ipapo wakasimuka akaenda kumiganhu yeTire neSidoni; akapinda mumba, asingadi kuti zvizikamwe nomunhu, asi akakoniwa kuzvivanza." 
Mark7:25 Nokuti \add mumwe \add*mukadzi, waiva nomwanasikana muduku, wakanga anomweya wetsvina, wakanzwa nezvake, akavuya akawira patsoka dzake." 
Mark7:26 Zvino mukadzi waiva muGiriki, muSirofenike pakuzvarwa; akamugombedzera kuti abudise mweya wakaipa pamwanasikana wake." 
Mark7:27 Asi Jesu akati kwaari: Regai vana vatange kuguta, nokuti hazvina kunaka kutora chingwa chavana, ndokukandira kuimbwanana." 
Mark7:28 Akapindura akati kwaari: Hongu, Ishe; kunyange nembwananavo \add dziri \add*pasi petafura dzinodya zvimedu zvavana." 
Mark7:29 Akati kwaari: Nokuda kweshoko iro, enda; mweya wakaipa wabva pamwanasikana wako" 
Mark7:30 Zvino akaenda kumba kwake, akawana mweya wakaipa wabuda, mwana avete panhovo." 
Mark7:31 Zvino wakatizve achibva kumiganhu yeTire neSidhoni, akasvika kugungwa reGariri, napakati pemuganhu weDhekapori." 
Mark7:32 Vakaisa kwaari umwe waiva matsi waikakamira, vakamugombedzera kuti aise ruvoko rwake pamusoro pake." 
Mark7:33 Akamutora parutivi kubva pachaunga, akapinza mimwe yake munzeve dzake, akapfira, ndokubata rurimi rwake." 
Mark7:34 Ipapo akatarira kudenga, akagomera, akati kwaari: ""Efata""; ndiko kuti: Zarurwa!" 
Mark7:35 Pakarepo nzeve dzake dzakadzivuka, chisungo chorurimi rwake chikasununguka, akataura zvakanaka." 
Mark7:36 Zvino wakavaraira, kuti varege kuvudza munhu; asi iye achinyanya kuvaraira, ivovo vakanyanyisa kuparidza \add izvozvo\add*." 
Mark7:37 Vakashamiswa zvikuru-kuru, vachiti: Wakaita zvose zvakanaka; wakaita matsi kuti dzinzwe, nembeveve kuti dzitaure." 
Mark8:1 Namazuva iwayo zvakwakanga kune chaunga chikuru, vasina zvavangadya, Jesu akadana vadzidzi vake, akati kwavari:" 
Mark8:2 Ndinetsitsi nechaunga, nokuti chakagara neni mazuva atova matatu vasina zvavangadya." 
Mark8:3 Kana ndikavaendisa kumba kwavo vasina kudya, vachaziya panzira; nokuti vamwe vavo vanobva kure." 
Mark8:4 Vadzidzi vake vakamupindura, \add vakati\add*: Zvingabvepiko zvingwa munhu zvaangagutsa nazvo vanhu ava murenje muno?" 
Mark8:5 Akavabvunza, \add akati\add*: Munezvingwa zvinganiko? Vakati: Zvinomwe." 
Mark8:6 Zvino akaraira vanhu vazhinji kuti vagare pasi pavhu; akatora zvingwa zvinomwe, akavonga, aka\add zvi\add*medura, ndokupa vadzidzi vake, kuti vaise pamberi \add pavo\add*; vakazviisa pamberi pavazhinji." 
Mark8:7 Uye vakanga vanehove duku shomanene; zvino aka\add dzi\add*ropafadza, akaraira kuti zviiswevo pamberi \add pavo\add*." 
Mark8:8 Naizvozvo vakadya, vakaguta; ndokuvunganidza zvimedu zvakasara, matengu manomwe." 
Mark8:9 Avo vakange vadya vainge vaiva zvuru zvina; akavaendisa. 
Mark8:10 Pakarepo akapinda muchikepe navadzidzi vake, akasvika kumativi eDharimanuta." 
Mark8:11 Zvino vaFarisi vakabuda, vakatanga kupikisana naye, vachitsvaka kwaari chiratidzo chinobva kudenga, vachimuidza." 
Mark8:12 Akagomera zvikuru pamweya wake, akati: Rudzi urwu runotsvakireiko chiratidzo? Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Hakuna chiratidzo chingapiwa kurudzi urwu." 
Mark8:13 Ipapo akavasiya, akapindazve muchikepe, akabva akayambukira kune gumwe rutivi." 
Mark8:14 Zvino vakanga vakangamwa kutora zvingwa; uyevo vakanga vasina \add c\add*hinhu muchikepe chingapfuvura chingwa chimwe chete. 
Mark8:15 Zvino akavaraira, achiti: Ngwarirai, muchenjere, mbiriso yavaFarisi nembiriso yaHerodhe." 
Mark8:16 Vakarangana pakati pavo vachiti: Nokuti hatine zvingwa. 
Mark8:17 Zvino Jesu wakati achi\add zvi\add*ziva, akati kwavari: Munorangana nemhaka yeiko kuti hamunezingwa? Hamusati maziva, kana kunzwisisa here? Moyo yenyu ichiri mikukutu here?" 
Mark8:18 Munameso hamuvoni here? Uye munenzeve, hamunzwi here? Zvekare hamurangariri here?" 
Mark8:19 Musi wandakamedurira vanezvuru zvishanu zvingwa zvishanu, matengu azere manganiko ezvimedu amakanonga? Vakati kwaari: Gumi namaviri." 
Mark8:20 uye nomusi wezvinomwe pavanezvuru zvina, matengu manganiko akazadzwa nezvimedu amakanonga? Vakati: Manomwe." 
Mark8:21 Akati kwavari: Nemhaka yeyi musinganzwisisi? 
Mark8:22 Zvino wakasvika Bhetisaidha; vakavuya nebofu kwaari, vakamugombedzera kuti arinyangate." 
Mark8:23 akabata bofu neruvoko \add rwaro\add*, akaribudisira kunze komusha, akati apfira meso aro, akaisa mavoko pamusoro paro, akaribvunza kana richivona chinhu." 
Mark8:24 Iro rikatarira kumusoro rikati: Ndinovona vanhu vakaita semiti, vachifamba." 
Mark8:25 Mushure maizvozvo akaisazve mavoko pamusoro pameso ake akamutaridza kudenga, akaporeswa, akavona zvose zvakanaka." 
Mark8:26 Akamuendesa kumba kwake, achiti: Usatongopinda mumusha kana kuvudza chero munhu mumusha." 
Mark8:27 Zvino Jesu akabuda navadzidzi vake vakaenda kumisha yeKesaria Firipi; \add vari\add* munzira akabvunza vadzidzi vake achiti kwavari: Vanhu vanoti ndini aniko? 
Mark8:28 Vakapindura \add vachiti\add*: Johwani Mubhabhatidzi; asi vamwe: Eria, vamwezve, mumwe wavaporofita." 
Mark8:29 Zvino akati kwavari: Ko imwi munoti ndini ani? Petro akapindura akati kwaari: Imwi muri Kristu. 
Mark8:30 Akavaraira zvikuru kuti varege kuzivisa munhu pamusoro pake. 
Mark8:31 Zvino akatanga kuvadzidzisa kuti Mwanakomana womunhu unofanira kutambudzika zvinhu zvizhinji nokurambwa navakuru, navaprista vakuru, navanyori, agovurawa, mushure mamazuva matatu, amukezve." 
Mark8:32 Akataura shoko iro pachena. Zvino Petro akamutora, akatanga kumutsiura." 
Mark8:33 Asi iye wakatendevuka, ndokutarira vadzidzi vake, akatsiura Petro achiti: Ibva shure kwangu, Satani, nokuti haurangariri zvinhu zvaMwari, asi zvinhu zvavanhu." 
Mark8:34 Zvino wakadanira kwaari chaunga navadzidzi vakevo, akati kwavari: Aninani unoda kuvuya shure kwangu, ngaazvirambe, atakure muchinjikwa wake, anditevere." 
Mark8:35 Nokuti ani nani unoda kuponesa upenyu hwake, ucharashikirwa nahwo, asi ani nani ucharashikirwa noupenyu hwake nokuda kwangu nokweevhangeri, ndiye uchahwuponesa." 
Mark8:36 Nokuti zvinobatsireiko munhu, kana akawana nyika yose akarashikirwa nomweya wake?" 
Mark8:37 Kana kuti munhu ucharipeiko kuti adzikinure mweya wake? 
Mark8:38 Nokuti aninani unonyara pamusoro pangu namashoko angu parudzi urwu rwovupombwe nokutadza, Mwanakomana womhunhu uchanyaravo pamusoro pake, paanovuya mukubwinya kwake naBaba vake navatumwa vatsvene." 
Mark9:1 Zvino wakati kwavari: Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Vamwe varipo kunavamire pano, vasingazoraviri rufu, vasati vavona ushe hwaMwari hwuchivuya nesimba." 
Mark9:2 Zvino mushure mamazuva matanhatu, Jesu akatora Petro, naJokobho, naJohwani, akavatungamirira mugomo refu, vari voga; akashandurwa pamberi pavo." 
Mark9:3 Nguvo dzake dzikapenya, dzikachenesesa zvikuru semagada echando; zvokuti hakunomusuki pano panyika, ungagona kudzichenesa \add dzikadaro\add*." 
Mark9:4 Zvino kwakavonekwa kwavari Eria naMozisi, vachitaurirana naJesu." 
Mark9:5 Petro akapindura akati kunaJesu: Mudzidzisi, zvakanaka kuti tive pano; ngativake matumba matatu, rimwe renyu, uye rimwe raMozisi, nerimwe raEria." 
Mark9:6 Nokuti wakanga asingazivi chokutaura; nokuti vaitya zvikuru. 
Mark9:7 Zvino kwakava negore rakavafukidza, inzwi rikabuda mugore, richiti: Uyu Mwanakomana wangu unodikamwa, mumunzwei!" 
Mark9:8 Kamwe-kamwe, vakati varinga-ringa, havana kuzovona munhuzve, asi Jesu chete anavo." 
Mark9:9 Zvino vakati vachiburuka mugomo, akavaraira kuti varege kuvudza munhu zvavakanga vavona kusvikira Mwanakomana womunhu amuka kuvakafa." 
Mark9:10 Vakachengeta shoko iro mukati mavo, vachibvunzana kuti zvinorevei kuti kumuka kwavakafa?" 
Mark9:11 Vakamubvunza, vachiti: Nemhaka yei vanyori vachiti Eria unofanira kutanga kuvuya?" 
Mark9:12 Akapindura akati kwavari: Eria zvirokwazvo uchatanga kuvuya hake, avandudze zvinhu zvose; asi kwakagonyorwa seiko zvoMwanakomana womunhu, kuti unofanira kutambudzika zvinhu zvizhinji nokuzvidzwa?" 
Mark9:13 Asi ndinoreva kwamuri kuti Eriavo wakatosvika, vakamuitira zvose zvavaida, sezvazvakanyorwa pamusoro pake." 
Mark9:14 Zvino wakati asvika kuvadzidzi, vakavona chaunga chikuru chakavakomba, navanyori vachipikisana navo." 
Mark9:15 Pakarepo chaunga chose chakati chichimuvona chikashamiswa kwazvo, chikamhanyira \add kwaari\add*, chikamukwazisa." 
Mark9:16 Akabvunza vanyori \add akati\add*: Munopikisaneiko navo? 
Mark9:17 Mumwe wechaunga akapindura, akati: Mudzidzisi, ndavuya kwamuri nomwanakomana wangu, unomweya wembeveve;" 
Mark9:18 pose paunomubata, unomubvambura; opupuma furo, nokugeda-geda meno ake, uye unowoma mutezo; zvino ndakataura navadzidzi venyu kuti vaubudise, vakasagona." 
Mark9:19 Akamupindura akati: Haiwa rudzi rusina kutenda, ndichagara nemwi kusvikira rinhiko? Ndichakuitirai moyo murefu kusvikira rinhiko? Vuyai naye kwandiri." 
Mark9:20 Vakavuya naye kwaari; wakati achimuvona, pakarepo mweya ukamubvambura; akawira pasi, akakunguruka achipupuma furo." 
Mark9:21 Zvino akabvunza baba vake \add akati\add*: Yava nguva yakadiniko kubvira izvozvi zvichimuwira? Akati: Kubva pavuduku. 
Mark9:22 Kazhinji wakamuwisira mumoto nomumvura, kuti umuparadze; asi kana muchigona kuita chinhu, mutinzwire tsitsi, mutibatsire." 
Mark9:23 Jesu akati kwaari: Kana iwe uchigona kutenda, zvinhu zvose zvinokwanisika kunounotenda." 
Mark9:24 Zvino pakarepo baba vomwana vakadanidzira nemisodzi vakati: Ndinotenda Ishe, ndibatsirei pakusatenda kwangu." 
Mark9:25 Zvino Jesu wakati achivona chaunga chichimhanyirana pamwe chete, akatsiura mweya wetsina, akati kwauri: \add Iwe\add*, mweya wembeveve namatsi, ndinokuraira \add kuti\add* ubve maari, urege kupindazve maari." 
Mark9:26 Zvino ukadanidzira, ukamubvundisa zvikuru ukabuda maari; akaita somunhu wakafa, nokudaro vazhinji vakati: Wafa." 
Mark9:27 Asi Jesu wakabata ruvoko rwake, akamusimudza, iye akasimuka." 
Mark9:28 Zvino wakati apinda mumba, vadzidzi vake vakamubvunza pachivande vachiti: Nemhaka yei isu takanga tisingagoni kuubudisa?" 
Mark9:29 Ipapo akati kwavari: Rudzi urwu harungatongobudi nechinhu, asi nokunyengetera nekutsanya." 
Mark9:30 Vakabva ipapo, vakagura neGariri, akaramba kuti zvizikamwe nomunhu." 
Mark9:31 Nokuti wakadzidzisa vadzidzi vake, akati kwavari: Mwanakomana womunhu uchakumikidzwa mumavoko avanhu, vachamuvuraya; kana avurawa, uchamuka nezuva retatu." 
Mark9:32 Asi havana kunzwisisa shoko iro, vakatya kumubvunza." 
Mark9:33 Zvino wakasvika Kapenaume; akati ava mumba, akavabvunza, \add achiti\add*: Makanga muchikakavadzanireiko munzira?" 
Mark9:34 Asi vakaramba vanyerere, nokuti munzira vakanga vaita nharo pakati pavo \add kuti\add* mukuru ndiani." 
Mark9:35 Ipapo akagara pasi, akadana vanegumi navaviri, akati kwavari: Kana munhu achida kuva wokutanga, uchava wekupedzisira kunavose nomuranda wavose." 
Mark9:36 Akatora mwana muduku, akamuisa pakati pavo; akati amufungatira mumavoko, akati kwavari:" 
Mark9:37 Aninani unogamuchira mumwe wavana vaduku vakadai muzita rangu, unondigamuchireni; uye ani nani unogamuchira ini, haandigamuchiri ini, asi uyo wakandituma." 
Mark9:38 Zvino Johwani akamupindura, achiti: Mudzidzisi, tavona mumwe achibudisa mweya yakaipa muzita renyu, asingatiteveri tikamudzivisa, nokuti haana kutitevera." 
Mark9:39 Asi Jesu wakati: Musamudzivisa, nokuti hakunomunhu ungaita basa resimba muzita rangu, ungakurumidza kutaura zvakaipa pamusoro pangu." 
Mark9:40 Nokuti usingapesani nesu, ndowedu." 
Mark9:41 Nokuti aninani unokupai mukombe wemvura kuti mumwe muzita rangu, nemhaka yokuti muri vaKristu, zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Haangarashikirwi nomubairo wake." 
Mark9:42 Uye aninani unogumbusa mumwe wavaduku \add ava\add* vanotenda kwandiri, zvirinani kwaari kuti guyo guru riremberedzwe pamutsipa wake, akandirwe mugungwa." 
Mark9:43 Kana ruvoko rwako ruchikugumbusa, rugure; zvirinani kwauri kuti upinde muupenyu uri chirema, pakuenda mugehena, mumoto usingazodzimwi, unamavoko maviri." 
Mark9:44 Apo pasingafi honye yavo, napasingadzimwi moto." 
Mark9:45 Kana rutsoko rwako ruchikugumbusa, rugure; zviri nani kwauri kuti upinde muupenyu uchikamhina, pane kuti une tsoka mbiri ukandirwe mugehena mumoto usingazofi wakadzimwa." 
Mark9:46 Apo pasingafi honye yavo, nomoto usingadzimwipo." 
Mark9:47 Zvino kana ziso rako richikugumbusa, ridzure; zvirinani kwauri kupinda muushe hwaMwari uneziso rimwe, pakuti une maziso maviri, ukandirwe mugehena remoto." 
Mark9:48 Apo pasingafi honye yavo, nomoto usingadzimwipo." 
Mark9:49 Nokuti mumwe nomumwe ucharungwa nomoto nechibayiro chimwe nechimwe chicharungwa nemunyu. 
Mark9:50 Munyu wakanaka; asi kana munyu usingacharungi, mungaurunga neiko? Ivai nomunyu mamuri, muve norugare pakati penyu." 
Mark10:1 Zvino wakati asimukapo, akasvika kumiganhu yeJudhiya, nemhiri kwaJoridhani, chaunga chikavunganirazve kwaari; zvino akavadzidzisa zvese zvaakanga ajaira." 
Mark10:2 VaFarisi vakavuya kwaari, vakamubvunza, \add vachiti\add*: Zviri pamutemo here kuti murume arambe mukadzi \add wake\add*? vachimuidza." 
Mark10:3 Akapindura, akati kwavari: Mozisi wakakurairai chiiko?" 
Mark10:4 Zvino vakati: Mozisi wakatendera kunyora rugwaro rwokurambana, noku\add mu\add*ramba." 
Mark10:5 Jesu akapindura akati kwavari: Nokuda kovukukutu hwemoyo yenyu, wakakunyorerai murairo uyu." 
Mark10:6 Asi kubva pakutanga kokusikwa, Mwari wakavaita murume nomukadzi." 
Mark10:7 Nokuda kwaizvozvo murume uchasiya baba namai vake, anamatire mukadzi wake;" 
Mark10:8 zvino avo vaviri vachava nyama imwe. Nokudaro havasichiri vaviri, asi nyama imwe." 
Mark10:9 Naizvozvo Mwari zvaakabatanidza pamwechete, ngapasava nomunhu unoparadzanisa." 
Mark10:10 Zvino \add vava\add* mumba vadzidzi vake vakamubvunzazve pamusoro paizvozvo. 
Mark10:11 Zvino akati kwavari: Ani nani unoramba mukadzi wake, akawana mumwe, unoita vupombwe kwaari." 
Mark10:12 Uye kana mukadzi wakaramba murume wake, akawanikwa nomumwe, unoita vupombwe." 
Mark10:13 Zvino vakavuya navana vaduku kwaari, kuti avanyangate; asi vadzidzi vakadzivisa avo vaivuya \add navo.\add*" 
Mark10:14 Zvino Jesu wakati a\add zvi\add*vona, akatsamwa zvikuru, akati kwavari: Regai vana vaduku vauye kwandiri, uye musavadzivisa, nokuti ushe hwaMwari ndohwavakadai." 
Mark10:15 Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Ani nani usingagamuchiri ushe hwaMwari somwana muduku, haangapindi mahwuri" 
Mark10:16 Ipapo akavafungatira mumavoko, ndokuisa mavoko pamusoro pavo, akavaropafadza." 
Mark10:17 Zvino wakati achibudira kunzira, kwakavuya mumwe achimhanya, akamufugamira akamubvunza, \add achiti\add*: Mudzidzisi wakanaka, ndingaiteko kuti ndigare nhaka youpenyu hwusingaperi?" 
Mark10:18 Jesu akati kwaari: Unondiidzireiko wakanaka? Hakuna wakanaka, kunze komumwe, \add iye\add* Mwari." 
Mark10:19 Unoiziva mirairo \add inoti\add*: Usaita vupombwe, usavuraya, usaba, usapupura nhema, usanyengera, kudza baba namai vako." 
Mark10:20 Zvino akapindura akati kwaari: Mudzidzisi, izvi zvose ndakazvichengeta kubva pavuduku hwangu." 
Mark10:21 Ipapo Jesu akamutarira akamuda, akati kwaari: Chinhu chimwe chaunoshaiwa; enda, utengese zvose zvaunazvo upe varombo, ipapo uchava nefuma kudenga; ugovuya utakure muchinjikwa, unditevere." 
Mark10:22 Asi wakatsamwa neshoko iro, akaenda neshungu nokuti wakanga anefuma zhinji." 
Mark10:23 Ipapo Jesu akaringa-ringa, akati kuvadzidzi vake: Vacharemerwa sei vane fuma kupinda paushe hwaMwari!" 
Mark10:24 Vadzidzi vakashamiswa namashoko ake. Asi Jesu wakapindurazve, akati kwavari: Vana, zvinorema sei kunavanovimba nefuma kupinda muushe hwaMwari;" 
Mark10:25 zvingarerukira kamera kupinda nemuburi retsono, kumufumi kupinda muushe hwaMwari." 
Mark10:26 Ipapo vakashamiswa zvikurusa, vakataurirana \add vachiti\add*: Ndiani zvino ungagoponeswa?" 
Mark10:27 Zvino Jesu wakati achivatarira, akati: Kuvanhu hazvibviri, asi kwete kuna Mwari nokuti kuna Mwari zvinhu zvose zvinobvira." 
Mark10:28 Petro akatanga kuti kwaari: Tarirai, isu takasiya zvose tikakuteverai." 
Mark10:29 Jesu akapindura akati: Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Hakunomunhu wakasiya imba, kana vanun'una namadzikoma, kana hanzvadzi, kana baba, kana mai, kana mukadzi, kana vana, kana minda, nokuda kwangu nokweevhangeri," 
Mark10:30 usingazopiwi zvinezana nenguva ino, dzimba navanun'una namadzikoma, nehanzvadzi, nanamai, navana, neminda, nokutambudzwa, noupenyu hwusingaperi munguva inovuya." 
Mark10:31 Asi vazhinji vokutanga vachava vokupedzisira, novokupedzira vokutanga." 
Mark10:32 Zvino vakanga vari munzira, vachikwira Jerusarema; Jesu akavatungamirira; vakashamiswa; zvino pavaitevera, vaitya. Ipapo akatorazve vanegumi navaviri, akatanga kuvavudza zvinhu zvakanga zvoda kuitika kwaari, \add achiti\add*:" 
Mark10:33 Tarirai, tinokwira Jerusarema, Mwanakomana womunhu uchakumikidzwa kuvaprista vakuru nokuvanyori, vachamutongera rufu, nokumukumikidza kuvahedheni." 
Mark10:34 Vachamusveveredza, vachamurovesa, nokumupfira mate, nokumuvuraya; zvino nezuva retatu uchamukazve." 
Mark10:35 Zvino Jakobho naJohwani, vanakomana vaZebhedhi, vakavuya kwaari vachiti: Mudzidzisi, tinoda kuti mutiitire chero chatinokumbira kwamuri." 
Mark10:36 Akati kwavari: Chii chamunoda kuti ndikuitirei? 
Mark10:37 Vakati kwaari: Tipei kuti tigare, mumwe kuruvoko rwenyu rworudyi, mumwe kuruboshwe mukubwinya kwenyu," 
Mark10:38 Asi Jesu wakati kwavari: Hamuzivi zvamunokumbira. Mungagona kumwa zvomukombe wandinomwa here? nokubhabhatidzwa norubhabhatidzo rwandinobhabhatidzwa narwo here? 
Mark10:39 Vakati kwaari: Tingagona, Jesu akati kwavari: Muchamwa zvirokwazvo zvomukombe wandinomwa ini, nokubhabhatidzwa norubhabhatidzo rwandinobhabhatidzwa narwo ini;" 
Mark10:40 asi kugara kuruvoko rwangu rworudyi, kana kuruboshwe, hazvisi zvangu kuti ndikupei, asi \add ndezva\add*vakazvigadzirirwa izvo." 
Mark10:41 Vanegumi vakati vachi\add zvi\add*nzwa, vakatanga kutsamwira zvikuru Jakobho naJohwani." 
Mark10:42 Asi Jesu akavadana akati kwavari: Munoziva kuti avo vanonzi machinda avahedheni vanovatonga, navakuru vavo vanobata nesimba pamusoro pavo." 
Mark10:43 Zvino hazvingadaro pakati penyu; asi ani nani unoda kuva mukuru pakati penyu, ngaave mushandiri wenyu;" 
Mark10:44 aninani wenyu unoda kuva wokutanga, ngaave mushandi wavose." 
Mark10:45 Nokuti kunyange Mwanakomana womunhu haana kuvuya kuzoshumirwa, asi kushumira, nokupa upenyu hwake \add ruve\add* rudzikinuro rwavazhinji." 
Mark10:46 Vakasvika Jeriko; zvino wakati achibuda Jeriko navadzidzi vake nechaunga chikuru, Bartimeo bofu, mwanakomana waTimeo, akanga agere padivi penzira achipemha." 
Mark10:47 Wakati anzwa, kuti ndiJesu weNazareta, akatanga kudanidzira, nokuti: Jesu Mwanakomana waDhavhidhi, ndinzwirei ngoni!" 
Mark10:48 Vazhinji vakamuraira kuti anyarare; asi iye wakanyanya kudanidzira kwazvo, \add achiti\add*; Mwanakomana waDhavhidhi, ndinzwirei ngoni!" 
Mark10:49 Ipapo Jesu akaramba amire, akaraira kuti adamwe; vakadana bofu vachiti kwariri: Tsunga moyo; simuka, unokudana." 
Mark10:50 Ipapo akarasha nguvo yake akasimuka, akaenda kunaJesu." 
Mark10:51 Jesu akapindura, akati kwaari: Unoda kuti ndikuitireiko? Bofu rikati kwaari: Raboni*, kuti ndivonezve." 
Mark10:52 Jesu akati kwaari: Enda hako; kutenda kwako kwakuponesa. Pakarepo akavonazve, akatevera Jesu munzira." 
Mark11:1 Vakati vasvika pedo neJerusarema, paBhetifage neBhetaniya, pagomo reMiorivhi, akatuma vaviri vavadzidzi vake," 
Mark11:2 akati kwavari: Endai kumusha wakatarisana nemwi; pakarepo kana muchangopinda mauri, muchawana dhongwana rakasungirwa, risina-kumbotaswa nomunhu; murisunugure, mugovuya \add naro\add*." 
Mark11:3 Kana munhu akati kwamuri: Munoitireiko izvi? Muti: Ishe unorida. Pakarepo ucharitumira pano. 
Mark11:4 Vakaenda, vakandowana dhongwana rakasungirwa pamukova kunze, pamharadzano dzenzira; vakarisunungura." 
Mark11:5 Vamwe vavakanga vamirepo vakati kwavari: Munoiteiko muchisunungura dhongwana? 
Mark11:6 Vakavavudza sezvakarairwa naJesu; vakavarega vachiinda. 
Mark11:7 Zvino vakavuya nedhongwana kunaJesu; vakakandira nguvo dzavo pamusoro paro, akagara pamusoro paro." 
Mark11:8 Navazhinji vakawarira nguvo dzavo munzira, navamwe vakatema matavi pamiti vakawarira munzira." 
Mark11:9 Zvino avo vakanga vachitungamira, navakanga vachitevera, vakadanidzira, vachiti: Hosana*! Wakaropafadzwa iye unovuya muzita raShe;" 
Mark11:10 hwakaropafadzwa ushe hwaBaba vedu Dhavhidhi, hwunovuya muzita raIshe! Hosana* kumusoro-soro!" 
Mark11:11 Ipapo Jesu wakapinda Jerusarema nemutembere; akati aringa-ringa zvinhu zvose, zuva zvarakanga ravira, akabuda, akaenda Bhetaniya navanegumi navaviri." 
Mark11:12 Zvino fume mangwana vakati vachibva Bhetaniya, akanzwa nzara." 
Mark11:13 Zvino \add wakati\add* achivona muvonde uri kure, unamashizha, akaendako achiti zvimwe angawana chinhu pauri; zvino achisvika pauri, haana kuwana chinhu, asi mashizha; nokuti yakanga isi nguva yamavonde." 
Mark11:14 Zvino Jesu akapindura, akati kwauri: Kusava nomunhu unozodya zvibereko pauri kubva zvino nokusingaperi. Vadzidzi vake vaka\add zvi\add*nzwa." 
Mark11:15 Vakasvika Jerusarema; Jesu akapinda mutembere, akatanga kudzingira panze avo vaitengesa navaitenga mutembere; akakwidibira matafura avaitsinhanhisa mari, nezvigaro zvaivo vaitengesa njiva." 
Mark11:16 Zvino akasatendera munhu kuti atakure mudziyo achipfuvura nemutembere. 
Mark11:17 Akadzidzisa, achiti kwavari: Hakuna kunyorwa here \add kuchinzi\add*: Imba yangu ichanzi imba yokunyengetera yamarudzi ose? Asi imwi makaiita bako ramakororo." 
Mark11:18 Zvino vanyori navaprista vakuru vaka\add zvi\add*nzwa, vakatsvaka kuti vangamuparadza sei; nokuti vakanga vachimutya, nokuti chaunga chose chakashamiswa nedzidziso yake." 
Mark11:19 Zvino ava madekwana, wakabuda kunze kweguta," 
Mark11:20 Zvino mangwanani vakati vachipfuvura, vakavona muvonde wawoma kubva pamidzi." 
Mark11:21 Petro akarangarira akati kwaari: Mudzidzisi, tarirai muvonde wamakatuka wawoma." 
Mark11:22 Jesu akapindura, akati kwavari: Ivai nokutenda kunaMwari." 
Mark11:23 Nokuti zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Mumwe nomumwe unoti kugomo iri: Simudzwa, ukandwe mugungwa, asingakahadziki mumoyo make, asi achitenda kuti zvinhu izvo zvaanoreva zvichaitika, zvuchaitika kwaari zvose zvaanoreva." 
Mark11:24 Naizvozvo ndinoti kwamuri: Zvinhu zvose zvose zvamunokumbira muchinyengetera, tendai kuti muchagamuchira, zvino muchawana." 
Mark11:25 Kana mukamira muchinyengetera, kangamwirai kana munemhaka nomumwe; kuti naBaba venyuvo vari kudenga, vakukangamwirei kudarika kwenyu." 
Mark11:26 Asi kana imwi musingakangamwiri naBaba venyu vari kudenga havakangamwirivo kudarika kwenyu. 
Mark11:27 Vakasvikazve Jerusarema; zvino wakati achifamba mutembere, vaprista vakuru navanyori navakuru vakavuya kwaari," 
Mark11:28 zvino vakati kwaari: Unoita zvinhu izvozvi nesimba ripiko? Ndianiko wakakupa simba rokuita zvinhu izvi? 
Mark11:29 Jesu akapindura akati kwavari: Nenivo ndichakubvunzai mubvunzo mumwe, mundipindure, neni ndichakuvudzaivo simba randinoita naro zvinhu izvozvi." 
Mark11:30 Rubhabhatidzo rwaJohwani rwakabva kudenga, kana kuvanhu? Ndipindurei," 
Mark11:31 Vakataurirana, vachiti: Kana tikati: Kudenga, uchati: Makagoregerei kumutenda?" 
Mark11:32 Asi kana tikati: Kuvanhu; vakanga vachitya vanhu; nokuti vose vakanga vachiverenga Johwani kuti muporofita zvirokwazvo. 
Mark11:33 Vakapindura vachiti kuna Jesu: Hatizivi. Jesu akapindura akati kwavari: Nenivo handingakuvudziyivo kuti ndinoita zvinhu izvi nesimba ripi. 
Mark12:1 Zvino wakatanga kutaura kwavari nemifananidzo, \add achiti\add*: Munhu wakasima munda wemizambiringa, akaukomba noruzhowa, akachera pokusvinira, akavaka shongwe, akaukumikidza kuvarimi, ndokuenda kune imwe nyika." 
Mark12:2 Nenguva yakafanira, akatumira muranda kuvarimi, kuti agamuchire kubva kuvarimi zvezvibereko zvomunda wemizambiringa." 
Mark12:3 Vakabata vakamurova, vakadzosa asina chinhu," 
Mark12:4 Akatumazve kwavari mumwe muranda; vakamuposhera mambwe, vaka\add mu\add*kuvadza musoro, vakamudzingira kure achinyara." 
Mark12:5 Akatumazve mumwe; iye vakamuvuraya; navamwe vazhinji, vachirova vamwe, nokuvuraya vamwe." 
Mark12:6 Naizvozvo wakanga achinomwanakomana mumwe, mudikamwa wake, akamutumiravo kwavari pakupedzisira, achiti: Vachakudza mwanakomana wangu." 
Mark12:7 Asi varimi ivavo vakataurirana, vachiti: Uyu ndiye mugari wenhaka; vuyai ngatimuvurayei, zvino nhaka igova yedu." 
Mark12:8 Vakamutora, vakavuraya, vakaposhera kunze komunda wemizambiringa." 
Mark12:9 Zvino mwene womunda wemizambiringa uchaiteiko? Uchavuya akaparadza varimi, akapa munda wemizambiringa kune vamwe." 
Mark12:10 Ko hamuna kutongorava here rugwaro urwu \add runoti\add*: Ibwe rakarashwa navavaki, ndiro rava musoro wekona;" 
Mark12:11 Izvozvo zvakaitwa naShe, uye zvinoshamisa pameso edu?" 
Mark12:12 Ipapo vakatsvaka kumubata, asi vakatya chaunga; nokuti vaiziva kuti wakanga ataura nomufananidzo iwoyo pamusoro pavo. Vakamusiya vakabvapo." 
Mark12:13 Zvino vakatuma kwaari vamwe vavaFarisi navavaHerodhe, kuti vamubate pamashoko ake." 
Mark12:14 Zvino vakati vavuya, vakati kwaari: Mudzidzisi, tinoziva kuti ndimi wechokwadi, hamutariri munhu; nokuti hamutariri chimiro chomunhu, asi munodzidzisa nzira yaMwari muchokwadi: Zviri pamutemo kuterera Kesari mutero here, kana kwete?" 
Mark12:15 Titere here, kana tirege kutera? Asi iye achiziva kunyengera kwavo, akati kwavari: Munondiidzireiko? Ndivigirei dhenari*, kuti ndivone." 
Mark12:16 Vaka\add ri\add*vuyisa. Ipapo akati kwavari: Mufananidzo uyu norunyoro urwu ndezvani? Vakati kwaari: ZvaKesari. 
Mark12:17 Jesu akpindura akati kwavari: Ipai kuna Kesarai zvinhu zvaKesari, nokunaMwari zvinhu zvaMwari. Vakashamiswa naye." 
Mark12:18 Zvino kwakavuya kwaari vaSajusi, vanoti hakuna kumuka kwavakafa, vakamubvunza vachiti:" 
Mark12:19 Mudzidzisi, Mozisi wakatinyorera \add kuti\add*: Kana mukoma womunhu akafa, akasiya mukadzi, akasasiya vana, munun'una wake atore mukadzi wake, amutsire mukoma wake vana." 
Mark12:20 Zvino kwakanga kunavanakomana vanomwe vomunhu mumwe; wedangwe akawana mukadzi, akafa akasasiya vana." 
Mark12:21 Wechipiri akamutora, akafa, akasasiyavo vana; nowechitatu; saizvozvovo," 
Mark12:22 navanomwe vose vakamuwana, vakasasiya mwana; shure kwavose mukadzi akafavo." 
Mark12:23 Naizvozvo pakumuka kwavakafa, kana vachimuka, uchava mukadzi waniko kwavari? Nokuti vanomwe vakava naye somukadzi." 
Mark12:24 Jesu akapindura akati kwavari: Hamuna kurashika here, nekuti hamuzivi magwaro kana simba raMwari?" 
Mark12:25 Nokuti kana vachimuka kuvakafa, havawani, kana kuwaniswa, asi vakaita savatumwa vari kudenga." 
Mark12:26 Zvino maererano navakafa, kuti vanomutswa, hamuna kurava here mubhuku raMozisi, \add kuti\add* Mwari wakataura naye sei mugwenzi, achiti: Ini Mwari waAbhurahamu, naMwari waIsaka, naMwari waJakobho?" 
Mark12:27 Haazi Mwari wavakafa, asi wavapenyu; imwi naizvozvo marashika kwazvo." 
Mark12:28 Zvino mumwe wavanyori wakasvika, wakati anzwa vachirangana, achiziva kuti wakanga avapindura zvakanaka, akamubvunza \add achiti\add*: Ndoupiko murairo wokutanga kune yose?" 
Mark12:29 Jesu akamupindura, \add achiti\add*: Wokutanga kumirayiro yose \add ndiwoyu\add*: Inzwa Israeri, Ishe Mwari wedu, ndiIshe mumwe chete!" 
Mark12:30 Uye ida Ishe Mwari wako nomoyo wako wose, nomweya wako wose, nefungwa dzako dzose, nesimba rako rose. Uyu murairo wokutanga." 
Mark12:31 Nowechipiri wakadai uyu: Ida muvakidzani wako sezvauno\add zvida\add*. Hakunomumwe murairo mukuru kune iyeyi," 
Mark12:32 Zvino munyori akati kwaari: Zvakanaka, Mudzidzisi, mareva zvirokwazvo kuti kuna Mwari mumwe chete, uye hakuno mumwe kunze kwake;" 
Mark12:33 nokumuda nomoyo wose, nokunzwisisa kose,, nomweya wose nesimba rose, nokuda wokwako sewe, zvinopfuvura zvipiriso zvose zvinopiswa nezvibayiro." 
Mark12:34 Zvino, Jesu wakati achizvivona kuti wapindura nenjere, akati kwaari: Hausi kure noushe hwaMwari. Kukasava nomunhu shure kwaizvozvo wakazotsunga kumubvunza." 
Mark12:35 Zvino Jesu wakati achidzidzisa mutembere, akapindura akati: Vanyori vanoreva seiko kuti Kristu ndiye mwanakomana waDhavhidhi?" 
Mark12:36 Dhavhidhi amene wakati noMweya Mutsvene: Ishe wakati kunaShe wangu: Gara kuruoko rwangu rworudyi, kusvikira ndaita vavengi vako chitsiko chetsoka dzako." 
Mark12:37 Naizvozvo Dhavhidhi amene unomuidza Ishe, \add ungagova\add* mwanakomana wake seiko? Vazhinji-zhinji vakamunzwa nomufaro." 
Mark12:38 Zvino wakati kwavari pakudzidzisa kwake: Chenjerai vanyori, vanoda kufamba nenguvo refu, nokukwaziswa pamisika," 
Mark12:39 nezvigaro zvapamusoro mumasingagoge, nenzvimbo dzakakwirira pazvirairo;" 
Mark12:40 vachidya dzimba dzechirikadzi, uye nokunyengera vachiita minyengetero mirefu; ivava vachagamuchira kurashwa kukuru." 
Mark12:41 Zvino wakanga agere akatarisana nechivigiro chemari, akatarira kuti chaunga chinokanda sei mari muchivigiro; zvino vafumi vazhinji vakanga vachiisa zvizhinji." 
Mark12:42 Zvino kwakasvika imwe chirikadzi yaitambura, ikakanda tumari tuviri tuduku tunoita fadzingi*." 
Mark12:43 Akadana vadzidzi vake, akati kwavari: Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Chirikadzi iyi murombo yakanda zvizhinji kupfuvura vose vakanda muchivigiro;" 
Mark12:44 nokuti avo vose vakanda pazvizhinji zvavo; asi iye pakushaiwa kwake wakanda zvose zvaanazvo, zvose zvoupenyu hwake." 
Mark13:1 Zvino wakati achibuda mutembere, mumwe wavadzidzi vake wakati kwaari: Mudzidzisi, tarirai mabwe, \add kuti\add* akadini nezvivakwa \add kuti\add* zvakadini!" 
Mark13:2 Jesu achipindura akati kwaari: Unovona zvivakwa izvi zvikuru here? hakungasiiwi ibwe pamusoro pebwe, risingazowisirwi pasi." 
Mark13:3 Zvino wakati agere pagomo reMiorivhi, mhiri pakatarisana netembere, Petro, naJakobho, naJohwani, naAndiriya vakamubvunza pachivande, \add vachiti\add*:" 
Mark13:4 Tivudzei, izvozvi zvichagova riniko? Nechiratidzo \add chichava\add* chipiko, kana izvozvi zvose zvozadziswa?" 
Mark13:5 Zvino Jesu achivapindura akatanga kuti: Chenjerai kusava nounokutsausai. 
Mark13:6 Nokuti vazhinji vachavuya muzita rangu, vachiti: Ndini \add iye\add*, vachitsausa vazhinji." 
Mark13:7 Asi kana muchinzwa zvehondo, nerunyerekupe rwehondo, musatambudzika; nokuti zvinofanira kumboitika; asi kuguma kuchigere." 
Mark13:8 Nokuti rudzi ruchamukira rudzi; noushe hwuchamukira ushe; uye kuchava nekudengenyika kwenyika kunzvimbo dzakasiyana-siyana, uye kuchava nenzara, nematambudziko; izvi kutanga kwekurwadziwa." 
Mark13:9 Zvichenjererei imwi, nokuti vachakukumikidzai kumakurukota, uye nomumasinagoge mucharohwa, muchakumikidzwa pamberi pavatongi namadzimambo nokuda kwangu, chive chapupu kwavari." 
Mark13:10 Asi evhangeri inofanira kutanga kumboparidzirwa pakati pemarudzi ose. 
Mark13:11 Asi kana vachi\add ku\add*kwevai, vachikukumikidzai \add kumakurukota\add*, musambofunganya pakutanga zvamuchataura kana kufanorangarira, asi chero zvamunenge mapiwa nenguva iyo imwi taurai izvozvo; nokuti hamuzimwi munotaura, asi Mweya Mutsvene." 
Mark13:12 Zvino mukoma uchatengesera munun'una kurufu, nababa mwanakomana; navana vachamukira vabereki nokuvavurayisa." 
Mark13:13 Uye muchavengwa navose nokuda kwezita rangu; asi unotsungirira kusvikira pakuguma, ndiye uchaponeswa." 
Mark13:14 Zvino kana muchivona nyangadzi yokuparadza yakataurwa naDhanyeri muporofita, imire paisingafaniri (unorava ngaanzwisise), zvino vari muJudhiya ngavatizire kumakomo;" 
Mark13:15 nouri pamusoro pedenga reimba ngaarege kuburukira mumba, kana kupinda kunotora chinhu mumba make." 
Mark13:16 Nouri mumunda ngaarege kutendevukira shurezve kunotora nguvo yake. 
Mark13:17 Asi vurombo kune avo vanemimba naavo vanomwisa namazuva iwayo! 
Mark13:18 Asi nyengeterai kuti kutiza kwenyu kurege kuva muchando. 
Mark13:19 Nokuti \add mu\add*mazuva iwayo kuchavapo kutambudzika, kusati kwambovapo kubva pakutanga kokusikwa kwakasikwa naMwari kusvikira zvino, uye hakuchazovipo." 
Mark13:20 Dai Ishe asina kutapudza mazuva iwayo, hakunenyama yaiponeswa; asi nokuda kwavakasanangurwa,vaakasanangura, wakatapudza mazuva \add iwawo\add*." 
Mark13:21 Zvino kana munhu achiti kwamuri: Tarirai, Kristu pano, tarirai papo, musatenda." 
Mark13:22 Nokuti vana Kristu venhema, navaporofita venhema vachamuka, vagoratidza zviratidzo nezvishamiso, kuti vatsause kana zvichibvira kunyange vasanangurwa." 
Mark13:23 Asi chenjerai imwi; tarirai, ndagara ndakuvudzai zvinhu zvose." 
Mark13:24 Asi namazuva iwayo, shure kokutambudzika ikoko, zuva richasviba, nomwedzi hauchazopi chiedza chawo," 
Mark13:25 nenyeredzi dzokudenga dzichawa, namasimba ari kudenga achazungunuswa." 
Mark13:26 Ipapo vachavona Mwanakomana womunhu achivuya mumakore nesimba guru nokubwinya," 
Mark13:27 ipapo uchatuma vatumwa vake, vakavunganidza pamwechete vasangangurwa vake kubva kumhepo ina, kubva kumugumo wenyika kusvikira kumugumo wokudenga." 
Mark13:28 Zvino dzidzai pamufananidzo womuvonde; kana davi rawo rava nyoro, mashizha achitunga, munoziva kuti munakamwe wava pedo." 
Mark13:29 Saizvozvo imwivo, kana movona izvozvo zvichiitika, zivai kuti wava pedo watova pamukova." 
Mark13:30 Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Rudzi urwu harungatongopfuvuri, kusvikira zvinhu izvi zvose zvaitika." 
Mark13:31 Denga nenyika zvichapfuvura; asi mashoko angu haangapfuvuri. 
Mark13:32 Asi zvezuva iro nenguva, hakuna unoziva, kunyange vatumwa vari kudenga, kunyange Mwanakomana, asi Baba." 
Mark13:33 Chenjerai, murinde, munyengetere; nokuti hamuzivi kuti nguva ndeyarini." 
Mark13:34 Somunhu wakaenda kuneimwe nyika, akasiya imba yake, akapa simba kuvaranda vake, kunomumwe nomumwe basa rake, akarairavo murindi womukova kuti arinde." 
Mark13:35 Naizvozvo rindai imwi; nokuti hamuzivi kuti mwene weimba unovuya rinhi, manheru, kana pakati povusiku, kana pakurira kwejongwe, kana mangwanani;" 
Mark13:36 kuti arege kuvuya kamwekamwe, akakuwanai muvete." 
Mark13:37 Zvandinokuvudzai imwi, ndinovudza vose, Rindai!" 
Mark14:1 Shure kwamazuva maviri kwaiva nepasika no\add mutambo \add*wezvingwa zvisinembiriso; vaprista vakuru navanyori vakanga vachitsvaka mutovo wavangamubata nawo noumhare, uye va\add mu\add*vuraye." 
Mark14:2 Asi vakati: Kwete pamutambo, zvimwe kungava nebope ravanhu." 
Mark14:3 Zvino wakati ari paBhetaniya, mumba maSimoni wamaperembudzi, agere pakudya, kwakavuya mumwe mukadzi, anechinu chearibhasiteri* chechizoro chenaridho* chakakosha zvikuru; akaputsa chinu chearibhsiteri, akachidurura pamusoro wake." 
Mark14:4 Asi kwaiva nevamwe vakatsamwa mukati mavo, vakati: Kutambisa ikoku kwechizoro kwaitirweiko?" 
Mark14:5 Nokuti chingadai chatengeswa namadhenari* anopfuvura mazana matatu, akapiwa varombo. Vakamutsutsumwira." 
Mark14:6 Asi Jesu wakati: Musiyei akadaro; munomutambudzireiko? Wandiitira basa rakanaka. 
Mark14:7 Nokuti varombo munavo nguva dzose, uye nguva ipi neipi yamunoda, mungavaitira zvakanaka; asi ini hamuneni nguva dzose." 
Mark14:8 Waita zvaanogona; wakagara azodzera muviri wangu kuvigwa. 
Mark14:9 Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Kose kose kunozoparidzirwa evhangeri iyi panyika dzose, zvaakaitavo zvicharehwa, chive chirangaridzo chake." 
Mark14:10 Zvino Judhasi Isikariyoti, mumwe wavanegumi navaviri, wakaenda kuvaprisita vakuru, kuti amutengese kwavari."

Mark14:12 Nezuva rokutanga rechingwa chisinembiriso, pavaibaya paseka nawo, vadzidzi vake vakati kwaari: Munoda kuti tiende kupi kunogadzira kuti mudye paseka?"

Mark14:14 Paanenge angopinda, muti kumwene weimba: Mudzidzisi wati: Imba yavaeni iripiko, pandingadyira paseka navadzidzi vangu?" 
Mark14:15 Zvino iye uchakutaridzai imba huru yokumusoro ikarongedzwa, yakagadzirwa; tigadzirirei ipapo." 
Mark14:16 Vadzidzi vake vakabuda, vakasvika muguta, vakandowana sezvaakanga areva kwavari; vakagadzirira paseka." 
Mark14:17 Ava madekwana akasvika navanegumi navaviri. 
Mark14:18 Zvino vakati vakagara vachidya, Jesu akati: Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Mumwe wenyu unodya neni uchanditengesa." 
Mark14:19 Ipapo vakatanga kushungurudzika, mumwe nomumwe akati kwaari: Ndini here? Mumwe ndini here?" 
Mark14:20 Asi wakavapindura akati kwavari: Mumwe wavanegumi navaviri, unoisa ruvoko neni mundiro."

Mark14:22 Zvino vakati vachidya, Jesu akatora chingwa, akaropafadza, akamedura, ndokupa kwavari, achiti: Torai, mudye, uyu muviri wangu." 
Mark14:23 Akatora mukombe, akati avonga, akapa kwavari, vakamwa vose pauri." 
Mark14:24 Zvino akati kwavari: Iri iropa rangu resungano itsva, rinotevurirwa vazhinji." 
Mark14:25 Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Handichazomwizve zvezvibereko zvomuzambiringa, kusvikira nezuva iro randichazomwa naro zvava zvitsva, muushe hwaMwari." 
Mark14:26 Zvino vakati vaimba rwiyo rwokurumbidza, vakabuda, vakaenda kugomo reMiorivhi." 
Mark14:27 Zvino Jesu wakati kwavari: imwi mose muchagumburwa nokuda kwangu vusiku hwuno, nokuti kwakanyorwa \add kuchinzi\add*: Ndicharova mufudzi, makwai agopararira." 
Mark14:28 Asi kana ndamuka, ndichatungamira mberi kwenyu kuGariri." 
Mark14:29 Asi Petro akati kwaari: Kunyange vose vakagumburwa, asi kwete ini." 
Mark14:30 Jesu akati kwaari: Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwauri: Nhasi, vusiku hwuno, jongwe risati rarira kaviri, uchandiramba katatu." 
Mark14:31 Asi iye wakareva nesimba, \add achiti\add*: Kunyange ndikafanira kufa nemwi, handingatongokurambiyi. Navose vakadarovo." 
Mark14:32 Zvino vakasvika panzvimbo yainzi Getsemani; akati kuvadzidzi vake: Garai pano, ini ndichi\add ndo\add*nyengetera." 
Mark14:33 Akatora pamwechete naye Petro naJakobho naJohwani, akatanga kuvhunduka kwazvo nokuzarirwa." 
Mark14:34 Akati kwavari: Mweya wangu unoshungurudzika kwazvo kusvikira pakufa; garai pano murinde. 
Mark14:35 Akapfuvura mberi zvishoma, akawira pasi, akanyengetera, kuti kana zvichibvira, nguva ipfuvure kwaari." 
Mark14:36 Zvino akati: Abha*, Baba, zvinhu zvose zvinogoneka kwamuri. bvisai mukombe uyu kwandiri, asi kwete zvandinoda ini, asi zvamunoda imwi." 
Mark14:37 Zvino akasvika, akavawana vavete; akati kunaPetro: Simoni, uvete here? Wakonewa kurinda awa rimwe here?" 
Mark14:38 Rindai, munyengetere, kuti murege kupinda mukuidzwa. Mweya unoda hawo, asi nyama hainesimba." 
Mark14:39 Akaendazve, akanyengetera achireva mashoko iwayo." 
Mark14:40 Zvino paakadzoka, akavawana vavatazve, nokuti meso avo akanga orema kwazvo; vakasaziva zvavangamupindura." 
Mark14:41 Akavuyazve rwechitatu, akati kwavari: Chivatai henyu zvino muzorore. Zvaringana, nguva yasvika; tarirai, Mwanakomana womunhu wokumikidzwa mumavoko avatadzi." 
Mark14:42 Simukai, tiende; tarirai, wondikumikidza kwavari wava pedo." 
Mark14:43 Pakarepo, achataura, akabva asvika Judhasi, mumwe wavanegumi navaviri, ane chaunga chikuru vane minondo netsvimbo, vachibva kuvaprista vakuru navanyori navakuru." 
Mark14:44 Zvino iye, wakamutengesa wakanga avapa chiratidzo, achiti: Uyo wandinongosveta ndiye, mumutore muende naye makamuchengetedza." 
Mark14:45 Zvino wakati asvika, pakarepo akaswedera kwaari akati: Mudzidzisi! Mudzidzisi! Akamusveta." 
Mark14:46 Ipapo vakaisa mavoko kwaari, vakamubata." 
Mark14:47 Zvino mumwe wavakanga vamirepo wakavhomora munondo akatema muranda womuprista mukuru, akagura nzeve yake." 
Mark14:48 Ipapo Jesu akapindura akati kwavari: Mabuda somunorwisa gororo neminondo netsvimbo kuzondibata here? 
Mark14:49 Ndakanga ndinemwi mutembere mazuva ose, ndichidzidzisa, asi hamuna kundibata, asi \add izvi zvaitwa\add*, kuti magwaro azadziswe." 
Mark14:50 Ipapo vose vakamusiya, vakatiza." 
Mark14:51 Zvino rimwe jaya rakamutevera, rakamonera mucheka werineni rakashama, majaya akaribata;" 
Mark14:52 asi rakasiya mucheka werineni, rikatiza kwavari rakashama." 
Mark14:53 Zvino vakabudisira Jesu kumuprista mukuru vakavunganira kwaari vaprista vakuru vose navakuru navanyori. 
Mark14:54 Petro akamutevera ari kure kusvikira pamuzinda womuprista mukuru; akanga agere navatariri, achidziya moto." 
Mark14:55 Zvino vaprista vakuru nedare rose vakatsvaka vuchapupu pamusoro paJesu kuti vamuvuraye; asi vakashaiwa 
Mark14:56 Nokuti vazhinji vaimupupurira nhema, asi kupupura kwavo hakuna kupindirana." 
Mark14:57 Zvino vamwe vakasimuka vakamupupurira nhema vachiti: 
Mark14:58 Isu takamunzwa achiti: Ndichaputsa tembere iyi; yakaitwa namavoko, uye mumazuva matatu ndichavaka imwe, isina kuitwa namavoko." 
Mark14:59 Asi kunyange zvakadaro kupupura kwavo kwakapesana. 
Mark14:60 Zvino muprista mukuru akasimuka pakati \add pavo\add*, akabvunza Jesu, achiti: Haupinduri chinhu here? Vuchapupu hwei hwavanokupomedzera?" 
Mark14:61 Asi iye wakanyarara, akasapindura chinhu. Muprista mukuru akamubvunzazve, akati kwaari: Ndiwe Kristu, Mwanakomana wowakaropafadzwa here?" 
Mark14:62 Jesu akati: Ndini iye. nemwi muchavona Mwanakomana womunhu agere kuruoko rworudyi rwesimba, achivuya mumakore okudenga." 
Mark14:63 Ipapo muprista mukuru akabvarura nguvo dzake akati: Tichatsvakireiko zvimwe zvapupu? 
Mark14:64 Imwi manzwa kumhura Mwari; munofungeiko? Ipapo vose vakamurasha kuti ave nemhosva yorufu. 
Mark14:65 Vamwe vakatanga kumupfira, vakafukidza chiso chake, vakamurova netsiva, vachiti kwaari: Porofita; navaranda vakamurova nembama dzamavoko avo." 
Mark14:66 Zvino Petro achiri paruvazhe pasi, ipapo pakasvika mumwe vavarandakadzi vomuprista mukuru," 
Mark14:67 zvino akavona Petro achizvidziyisa, akamutarira akati: Newevo wakanga unaJesu weNazareta." 
Mark14:68 Asi iye wakaramba, achiti: Handizivi kana kunzwisisa ini zvaunoreva. Akabuda akaenda kumusuwo, jongwe rikarira." 
Mark14:69 Zvino murandakadzi akamuvonazve, akatanga kuti kunavakanga vamirepo\add:\add* Uyu ndowavo!" 
Mark14:70 Asi iye wakarambazve. Zvino nguva duku yakati yapfuvura, vakanga vamirepo vakatizve kuna Petro: Zvirokwazvo, uri wavo, nokuti iwe uri muGariri nomutauriro wako unotenderana \add nazvo\add*." 
Mark14:71 Ipapo akatanga kutuka nokupika, \add achiti\add*: Handimuzivi munhu uyu wamunoreva." 
Mark14:72 Zvino jongwe rikarira rwechipiri. Ipapo Petro akarangarira shoko rakanga rarehwa kwaari naJesu \add rokuti\add*: Jongwe risati rarira kaviri, uchandiramba katatu. Zvino wakati achifunga izvozvo, akachema." 
Mark15:1 Pakarepo mangwanani vaprista vakuru vakarangana navakuru navanyori nedare rose, vakasunga Jesu, vakamutakura, vaka\add mu\add*kumikidza kunaPirato." 
Mark15:2 Pirato akamubvunza \add akati\add*: Ndiwe Mambo wavaJudha here? Akapindura, akati kwaari: Unoreva iwe." 
Mark15:3 Vaprista vakuru vakamupomera zvinhu zvizhinji, asi haana kupindura chinhu." 
Mark15:4 Pirato akamubvunzazve achiti: Haupinduri chinhu here? Tarira, zvinhu zvinganiko zvavanokupomera!" 
Mark15:5 Asi Jesu haana kuzopindurazve chinhu, zvokuti Pirato wakashamiswa." 
Mark15:6 Zvino pamabiko waivasunungurira musungwa mumwe, wavaikumbira." 
Mark15:7 Zvino kwakanga kune wainzi Barabhasi, akasungwa navamwe vakanga vamutsa bope naye, vakavuraya pabope irero." 
Mark15:8 Zvino chaunga chakadanidzirisa, vakatanga kukumbira sezvaaisivaitira kuti avaitire." 
Mark15:9 Asi Pirato akavapindura, achiti: Munoda kuti ndikusunungurirei Mambo wavaJudha here?" 
Mark15:10 Nokuti wakanga achiziva kuti vaprista vakuru vakanga vamukumikidza \add kwaari\add* negodo. 
Mark15:11 Zvino vaprista vakuru vakakurudzira chaunga kuti zvirinani avasunungurire Barabhasi. 
Mark15:12 Pirato akapindura, akatizve kwavari: Zvino munoda kuti ndi\add mu\add*itireiko, wamunoti ndiMambo wavaJudha?" 
Mark15:13 Vakadanidzirazve \add vachiti\add*: Muroverei! 
Mark15:14 Asi Pirato akati kwavari: Nemhaka yei? Wakaiteiko chakaipa? Vakanyanyisa kudanidzira \add vachiti\add*: Murovere! 
Mark15:15 Zvino Pirato, achida kufadza vanhu vazhinji, akavasunungurira Bharabhasi, asi wakakumikidza Jesu, a\add mu\add*rova netyava kuti aroverwe." 
Mark15:16 Zvino varwi vakamuisa mukati moruvazhe, rweimba yomubati, vakavunganidza hondo yose;" 
Mark15:17 vakamupfekedza nguvo shava, vakaruka korona yemhinzwa, vakamudzika." 
Mark15:18 Vakatanga kumukwazisa, \add vachiti\add*: Hekanhi, Mambo wavaJudha!" 
Mark15:19 Vakamurova musoro norutsanga, vakamupfira, vakafugama mabvi, vakamunamata." 
Mark15:20 Zvino vakati vamusweveredza, vakamubvisa nguvo shava, ndokumupfekedza nguvo dzake, vakaenda naye kundomurovera." 
Mark15:21 Zvino vakamanikidza mumwe waipfuvura \add wainzi\add* Simoni muKurini, achibva kuruwa, baba vaArekizandiro naRufo, kuti atakure muchnjikwa wake." 
Mark15:22 Vakamuisa kunzvimbo \add yainzi\add* Gorogota, ndokuti kana zvichishandurwa: Nzvimbo yedehenya." 
Mark15:23 Vakamupa waini, yakavhenganiswa negavakava kuti amwe, asi haana kugamuchira." 
Mark15:24 Zvino vakati vamurovera, vakagovana nguvo dzake, vachikanda mijenya pamusoro padzo, kuti mumwe nomumwe uchatorei." 
Mark15:25 Yakanga yava nguva yechitatu, vakamurovera." 
Mark15:26 Norugwaro rwemhosva yake rwakanga rwakanyorwa pamusoro, \add ruchiti\add*: MAMBO WAVAJUDHA." 
Mark15:27 Pamwechete naye vakarovera makororo maviri, mumwe kurudyi rwake, mumwe kuruboshwe." 
Mark15:28 Rugwaro rukaitika, runoti: Wakaverengwa pamwechete navadariki." 
Mark15:29 Navaipfuvura vakamunyomba, vachidzungudza misoro yavo, vachiti: Haiwa, Iwe, wokuputsa tembere, nokuvaka namazuva matatu," 
Mark15:30 zviponese, uburuke pamuchinjikwa!" 
Mark15:31 Saizvozvo vaprista vakuru navanyori vakamusweveredza pakati pavo, \add vachiti\add*: Wakaponesa vamwe, zvino haagoni kuzviponesa." 
Mark15:32 Kristu, Mambo wavaIsraeri ngaaburuke zvino pamuchinjikwa, kuti tivone titende. Navakanga varoverwa pamwe chete naye vakamuzvidza." 
Mark15:33 Zvino nguva yechitanhatu yakati yasvika, rima rikavapo panyika yose kusvikira panguva yepfumbamwe." 
Mark15:34 Zvino nenguva yepfumbamwe, Jesu akadana nenzwi guru, achiti: ""Eroi, Eroi, rama Sabhakitani!"" Ndokuti, kana zvichishandurwa: Mwari wangu, Mwari wangu, mandisiyireiko?" 
Mark15:35 Vamwe vavakanga vamirepo vakati vachi\add zvi\add*nzwa, vakati: Tarirai, unodana Eria." 
Mark15:36 Ipapo mumwe wakamhanya, akazadza chipanje nevhiniga, akaisa parutsanga, akamupa kuti amwe, achiti: Regai timboona kana Eria achizovuya kumuburusa." 
Mark15:37 Ipapo Jesu akadanidzira nenzwi guru, akabudisa mweya wake." 
Mark15:38 Vheiri retembere rikabvaruka kuita \add mapandi\add* maviri, kubva kumusoro kusvikira pasi." 
Mark15:39 Zvino mukuru wezana wakanga amirepo akatarisana naye, wakati achivona kuti wadanidzira akapa mweya, akati: Zvirokwazvo, munhu uyu wanga ari Mwanakomana waMwari." 
Mark15:40 Kwakanga kune vakadzivo vakatarira vari kure, pakati pavo kwakanga kuna Maria Magidharini, naMaria mai vaJakobho muduku naJose, naSarome," 
Mark15:41 (Vaimutevera achi muGariri, vachimushandira), navamwe vakadzi vazhinji vakanga vakwira Jerusarema naye." 
Mark15:42 Zvino ava manheru, zvarakanga riri gadziriro, ndokuti zuva rinotangira sabata," 
Mark15:43 Josefa weArimatea, gurukota rairemekedzwa wakanga akamiriravo ushe hwaMwari wakavuya akapinda kunaPirato akatsunga, akakumbira chitunha chaJesu." 
Mark15:44 Pirato akashamiswa nokuti wakanga atofa; akadana mukuru wezana, akamubvunza kana akanguva afa." 
Mark15:45 Zvino wakati a\add zvi\add*nzwa nomukuru wezana, akapa Josefa chitunha." 
Mark15:46 Iye wakatenga \add mucheka\add* werineni, akamuburusa, akamuputira nerineni, ndokumuradzika muhwiro hwakanga hwakacherwa paruware, ndokukungurusira ihwe pamukova wehwiro." 
Mark15:47 Zvino Maria Magidharini, naMaria \add mai\add* vaJose, vakavona paakavigwa." 
Mark16:1 Sabata rakati rapfuvura, Maria Magidharini, naMaria \add mai\add* vaJakobho, naSarome vakatenga zvinonhuhwira, kuti vaende kunomuzodza." 
Mark16:2 Mangwanani-ngwanani omusi wokutanga wevhiki, vakaenda, kuhwiro, zuva robuda." 
Mark16:3 Vakati pakati pavo: Ndianiko uchatikungurusira ibwe kubva pamukova wehwiro? 
Mark16:4 Zvino vakati vachitarira, vakavona kuti ibwe rakanga ratokungurusirwa kure, nokuti raiva guru-guru." 
Mark16:5 Zvino vakati vapinda muhwiro, vakavona murume wechiduku wakanga agere kurutivi rworudyi, akapfeka nguvo chena yakareba, vakavhunduka;" 
Mark16:6 akati kwavari: Musatya; munotsvaka Jesu weNazareta wakaroverwa here? Wamuka, haapo pano; tarirai pavakanga vamuradzika." 
Mark16:7 Asi endai, mundovudza vadzidzi vake naPetro, kuti unokutungamirirai Gariri, muchandomuvonako, sezvaakakuvudzai." 
Mark16:8 Vakabuda nokukurumidza vakatiza pahwiro; nokuti vakanga vabatwa nokudedera nokushamiswa; vakasataura chinhu kuna ani zvake, nokuti vakanga vachitya." 
Mark16:9 Zvino wakati amuka mangwanani nowokutanga wevhiki, wakavonekwa pakutanga kunaMaria Magidharini, waakanga abudisa mweya yakaipa minomwe kwaari." 
Mark16:10 Iye akaenda kundovudza avo vaaiva navo, pavaichichema nokurira." 
Mark16:11 Naivo pavakanzwa kuti mupenyu, uye kuti wakanga avonekwa naye, havana kutenda." 
Mark16:12 Shure kwaizvozvo wakazviratidza nechimwe chimiro kuvaviri vavo vachifamba, vachienda muruwa." 
Mark16:13 Naivovo vakaenda, vakandovudza vakanga vasara; naivo vakasavatendavo." 
Mark16:14 Pashure wakazviratidza kunavanegumi nomumwe vagere pakudya, akavasvora nokusatenda kwavo novukukutu hwemoyo, nokuti havana kutenda vaya vakanga vamuvona amuka." 
Mark16:15 Akati kwavari: Endai munyika yose muparidze evhangeri kuchisikwa choga-choga. 
Mark16:16 Uyo unotenda akabhabhatidzwa uchaponeswa; asi usingatendi ucharashwa. 
Mark16:17 Zviratidzo izvi zvichatevera vanotenda; muzita rangu vachabudisa mweya yakaipa, vachitaura nendimi itsva;" 
Mark16:18 vachanonga nyoka; kunyange vakamwa chinhu chinovuraya, hachingavakuvadzi; vachaisa mavoko pavarwere, vakapora." 
Mark16:19 Zvino Ishe wakati ataura kwavari, akagamuchirwa kumusoro kudenga, akagara kuruvoko rworudyi rwaMwari." 
Mark16:20 Ivo vakaenda, vakaparidza kose-kose, Ishe achibata \add navo\add*, achisimbisa shoko nezviratidzo zvaitevera. Amen." 
Luke1:1 Vazhinji sezvavakaisa ruvoko kuronga zvakafanira rondedzero yemashoko ezvinhu izvo zvamazvirokwazvo pakati pedu," 
Luke1:2 sezvavakapa kwatiri ivo avo kubva pakutanga vakazvionera nameso, vari varanda veshoko," 
Luke1:3 Zvakavonekwa zvakanaka nokwandirivo, ndanyatsoongorora zvinhu zvose kubva pakutanga, kuti ndikunyorereivo nokutevedzanisa, imwi Teofiro, makakurumbira," 
Luke1:4 kuti muzive chokwadi chezvinhu izvi zvamakadzidziswa. 
Luke1:5 Kwaivapo namazuva aHerodhe mambo weJudhiya mumwe muprista wainzi Zakaria, weboka raAbhiya; nomukadzi wake \add waiva\add* wavanasikana vaAroni, zita rake riri Erizabheti." 
Luke1:6 Zvino vose vakanga vakarurama pamberi paMwari, vachifamba nemurairo nezvimiso zvose zvaShe; vasina chavangapomerwa." 
Luke1:7 Uye vakanga vasinomwana, nokuda kokuti Erizabheti wakanga ari mhanje, uye vose vakanga vakwegura pamakore." 
Luke1:8 Zvino zvakaitika kuti wakati achibata basa rovuprista pamberi paMwari, padzoro reboka rake," 
Luke1:9 netsika dzebasa rovuprista, wakabatwa nemujenya kuti apise zvipfungaidzo zvinonhuwira kana apinda mutembere yaShe." 
Luke1:10 Zvino chaunga chose chavanhu chakanga chichinyengetera kunze nenguva yezvinonhuhwira. 
Luke1:11 Zvino kwakavonekwa kwaari mutumwa waShe, amire kurutivi rworudyi rwearitari yezvifungaidzo zvinonhuhwira." 
Luke1:12 Zvino Zakaria wakati achi\add mu\add*vona akatambudzika, kutya kukamuwira." 
Luke1:13 Asi mutumwa akati kwaari: Usatya Zakaria; nokuti munyengetero wako wanzwikwa, nomukadzi wako Erizabheti uchakuberekera mwanakomana, ugotumidza zita rake Johwani." 
Luke1:14 Uye uchava nomufaro nokupembera, navazhinji vachafarira kuberekwa kwake." 
Luke1:15 Nokuti iye uchava mukuru pamberi paShe; haangatongomwi waini kana zvinobata; uchazadzwa noMweya Mutsvene kubva padumbu ramai vake. 
Luke1:16 Zvino vazhinji vavana vaIsraeri uchadzorera kunaShe Mwari wavo; 
Luke1:17 uye iye uchafamba pamberi pake muMweya nesimba raEria, kuti adzorere moyo yamadzibaba kuvana, navasingateereri kuvuchenjeri hwavakarurama, agadzirire vanhu vakagadzirirwa \add kugamuchira\add* Ishe," 
Luke1:18 Zakaria akati kumutumwa: Izvozvi ndichazviziva seiko? Nokuti ini ndava munhu wakwegura, nomukadzi wangu wakwegura kwazvo pamakore." 
Luke1:19 Mutumwa achipindura akati kwaari: Ndini Gabhirieri, ndinomira pamberi paMwari; ndatumwa kuti nditaure kwauri, ndikukumikidze mashoko awa akanaka." 
Luke1:20 Zvino tarira, uchava mbeveve, usingagoni kutaura, kusvikira zuva rinoitwa zvinhu izvi, nokuti hauna kutenda mashoko angu, achazadziswa nenguva yawo." 
Luke1:21 Vanhu vakanga vakamirira Zakaria vakashamiswa nokunonoka kwake mutembere. 
Luke1:22 Zvino wakati abuda, akasagona kutaura kwavari; vakaziva kuti wakanga avona chiratidzo mutembere; iye akavaninira namavoko, akaramba ari mbeveve." 
Luke1:23 Zvino zvakaitika kuti mazuva okushumira kwake akati achangopera, akaenda kumba kwake." 
Luke1:24 Zvino shure kwamazuva iwayo, mukadzi wake Erizabheti akatora mimba, akazvivanza mwedzi mishanu, achiti:" 
Luke1:25 Ndizvo zvandakaitirwa naShe namazuva aaka\add ndi\add*tarira, kuti abvise kunyadzwa kwangu pakati pavanhu." 
Luke1:26 Zvino nomwedzi wechitanhatu mutumwa Gabrieri wakatumwa naMwari kuguta reGariri rinonzi Nazareta," 
Luke1:27 kumhandara, yakanga yatsidza kuwanikwa nomurume, zita rake raiva Josefa, weimba yaDhavhidhi; zita remhandara \add rainzi\add* Maria." 
Luke1:28 Mutumwa akapinda kwaari, akati: Hekanhi, iwe unodikamwa! Ishe \add u\add*newe, wakaropafadzwa iwe pakati pavakadzi." 
Luke1:29 Iye wakati achi\add mu\add*vona akatambudzika nokutaura kwake, akafunga mumoyo make \add kuti\add* kukwazisa kwakadai kunorevei." 
Luke1:30 Zvino mutumwa akati kwaari: Usatya, Maria; nokuti wawana nyasha kunaMwari." 
Luke1:31 Zvino tarira, uchava nemimba, ugozvara mwanakomana, ugotumidza zita rake \add kuti\add* Jesu." 
Luke1:32 Iye uchava mukuru, iye uchanzi Mwanakomana woWokumusoro-soro; Ishe Mwari uchapa kwaari chigaro choushe chababa vake Dhavhidhi." 
Luke1:33 Uchatonga imba yaJakobho nokusingaperi, noushe hwake habvungavi nomugumo." 
Luke1:34 Ipapo Maria akati kumutumwa: Izvozvi zvingaitika seiko, zvandisingazivi murume?" 
Luke1:35 Mutumwa akapindura akati kwaari: Mweya Mutsvene uchavuya pamusoro pako, nesimba roWokumusorosoro richakufukidza; saka icho chitsvene chichaberekwa newe chichanzi Mwanakomana waMwari." 
Luke1:36 Uye tarira, Erizabheti hama yako, naiyevo wava nemimba yomwanakomana pakuchembera kwake; nomwedzi uno wava wechitanhatu kunaiye wainzi mhanje." 
Luke1:37 Nokuti naMwari hakuna chinhu chisingagoneki. 
Luke1:38 Ipapo Maria akati: Tarirai, murandakadzi waShe; ngazvive kwandiri seshoko renyu, Mutumwa akabva kwaari." 
Luke1:39 Zvino Maria akasimuka namazuva iwayo akaenda kunyika yazvikomo nokukurumidza, kuguta reJudhiya;" 
Luke1:40 akapinda mumba maZakaria, akakwazisa Erizabheti." 
Luke1:41 Zvino zvakaitika kuti Erizabheti wakati achinzwa kukwazisa kwaMaria, mwana akatamba mudumbu rake; naErizabheti akazadzwa noMweya Mutsvene," 
Luke1:42 akadana nenzwi guru, akati: Wakaropafadzwa iwe pakati pavakadzi, uye chakaropafadzwa chibereko chedumbu rako!" 
Luke1:43 Ko zvandibvira nepiko, kuti mai vaShe wangu vauye kandiri?" 
Luke1:44 Nokuti tarira, inzwi rokukwazisa kwako rangoti richisvika munzeve dzangu, mwana akatamba mudumbu rangu nomufaro." 
Luke1:45 Uye wakaropafadzwa unotenda, nokuti zvirokwazvo zvakataurwa naShe kwaari zvichazadziswa." 
Luke1:46 Maria akati: Moyo wangu unokudza Ishe," 
Luke1:47 Mweya wangu unofara munaMwari Muponesi wangu; 
Luke1:48 Zvaakavona kuzvidzwa komurandakadzi wake; Nokuti, tarira, kubva zvino mazera ose achati ndakaropafadzwa;" 
Luke1:49 Nokuti uyo unamasimba wakandiitira zvinhu zvikuru; nezita rake \add i\add*dzvene. 
Luke1:50 Ngoni dzake \add dziri\add* kuna avo vanomutya kubva kumazera namazera. 
Luke1:51 Wakaita zvinesimba noruvoko rwake; Wakaparadzira vaizvikudza mundangariro dzemoyo yavo; 
Luke1:52 Wakaburusa vanemasimba pazvigaro zvoushe, akasimudza vakazvininipisa;" 
Luke1:53 Vanenzara wakavagutsa nezvinhu zvakanaka, asi vafumi wakavadzosera vasina chinhu;" 
Luke1:54 wakabatsira muranda wake Israeri kuti arangarire ngoni," 
Luke1:55 sezvaakataura kumadzibaba edu, kunaAbhurahamu nokuvana vake nokusingaperi." 
Luke1:56 Maria akagara naye mwedzi inenge mitatu, akadzokera kumusha kwake." 
Luke1:57 Zvino nguva yaErizabheti yokusununguka kwake yakakwana; akabereka mwanakomana. 
Luke1:58 Zvino vakavakidzana navo nehama dzake vakati vanzwa kuti Ishe wakanga amuitira ngoni huru, vakafara naye." 
Luke1:59 Zvino zvakaitika kuti nezuva rorusere vakavuya kuzodzingisa mwana, vakamutumidza zita rababa vake, Zakaria." 
Luke1:60 Asi mai vake vakapindura vakati: Kwete, asi uchanzi Johwani." 
Luke1:61 Vakati kwaari: Hakunomunhu kuhama dzenyu unodaidzwa nezita iro. 
Luke1:62 Vakataura namavoko kunababa vake, kuti vanoda kuti anzi ani." 
Luke1:63 Vakakumbira pokunyorera, vakanyora vachiti: Johwani, ndiro zita rake; vakashamiswa vose." 
Luke1:64 Muromo wake ukashamiswa pakarepo, norurimi rwake \add rukasununguka\add*, akataura, achirumbidza Mwari." 
Luke1:65 Kutya kukawira vose vaigara vakamukomba; namashoko iwayo ose akanzwikwa kunyika yose yamakomo eJudhiya. 
Luke1:66 Zvino vose vakanzwa, vaka\add zvi\add*chengeta mumoyo mavo, vachiti: Uchazova mwana wakadiniko? Zvino ruvoko rwaShe rwakava naye." 
Luke1:67 Zvino baba vake Zakaria vakazadzwa noMweya Mutsvene, vakaporofita, vachiti:" 
Luke1:68 Ngaarumbidzwe Ishe Mwari waIsraeri, nokuti wakashanyira vanhu vake, nokuvadzikunura," 
Luke1:69 akatisimudzira runyanga rworuponeso mumba momuranda wake Dhavhidhi," 
Luke1:70 sezvaakataura nomuromo wavaporofita vake vatsvene, vakanga varipo kubva pakuvamba kwenyika," 
Luke1:71 ruponeso pavavengi vedu, naparuvoko rwavose vanotivenga;" 
Luke1:72 kuitira madzibaba edu ngoni, nokurangarira sungano yake tsvene," 
Luke1:73 Mhiko yaakapika nayo kunababa vedu Abhurahamu," 
Luke1:74 kuti atipe isu, kuti tasunungurwa mumavoko avavengi vedu, timushumire tisingatyi," 
Luke1:75 muvutsvene nokururama pamberi pake mazuva ose eupenyu hwedu. 
Luke1:76 Newe, Mwana, uchanzi muporofita Wokumusoro-soro, nokuti iwe uchatungamira pamberi pechiso chaShe, kumugadzirira nzira dzake;" 
Luke1:77 Kupa ruzivo rweruponeso kuvanhu vake nokukangamwirwa kwezvivi zvavo. 
Luke1:78 Nomoyo munyoro waMwari wedu, mahwuri mambakwedza okudenga anotishanyira," 
Luke1:79 Kupa chiedza kune vagere murima nemumvuri worufu; nokururamisa tsoka dzedu munzira yorugare. 
Luke1:80 Mwana akakura, akasimba mumweya, akagara mumarenje, kusvikira zuva rokuratidzwa kwake kuvaIsraeri." 
Luke2:1 Zvino zvakaitika kuti namazuva iwayo, chirevo chakabuda kubva kunaKesari Agasto, kuti nyika yose inyorwe mazita." 
Luke2:2 Kunyorwa uku ndokwaiva kokutanga kwakaitwa Kuriniosi ari mutongi weSiria. 
Luke2:3 Vose vakaenda kundonyorwa, mumwe nomumwe kuguta rake." 
Luke2:4 NaJosefavo akakwira achibva Gariri, muguta reNazareta, akaenda Judhiya, kuguta raDhavhidhi, rinonzi Bhetirehemu, nokuti waiva weimba nedzinza raDhavhidhi;" 
Luke2:5 kuti anyorwe naMaria mukadzi wake wakanga atsidzira kuwanikwa naye, ava nemimba." 
Luke2:6 Zvakaitika kuti vachipo, mazuva okuzvara kwake akasvika;" 
Luke2:7 akazvara mwanakomana wake wedangwe, akamuputira nemicheka, akamuvanzarika muchidyiro chezvipfuwo, nokuti makanga musina nzvimbo yavo muimba yavaeni." 
Luke2:8 Zvino kwakanga kunavafudzi munyika iyoyo, vaigara kuvuragu vachirinda mapoka avo vusiku." 
Luke2:9 Zvino tarira, mutumwa waShe akamira pedo navo, nokubwinya kwaShe kukaratidzwa kwakavakomba, vakatya nokutya kukuru." 
Luke2:10 Ipapo mutumwa akati kwavari: Musatya; nokuti tarirai, ndinokuparidzirai mashoko akanaka omufaro mukuru, uchava kuvanhu vose;" 
Luke2:11 nokuti mazvarirwa nhasi muguta raDhavhidhi Muponesi, ndiye Kristu Ishe." 
Luke2:12 Ichi chiratidzo kwamuri: Muchandowana mwana akaputirwa nemicheka, avete muchidyiro chezvipfuwo." 
Luke2:13 Ipapo kamwe-kamwe kukavapo pamwe chete nomutumwa, chaunga chehondo yokudenga, chichirumbidza Mwari, chichiti:" 
Luke2:14 Rumbidzo kunaMwari wokumusoro-soro, norugare panyika; moyo muchena kuvanhu." 
Luke2:15 Zvino kwakaitika kuti vatumwa vabva kwavari, vaenda kudenga, vafudzi vakataurirana, vachiti: Ngatiende zvino Bhetirehemu, tindovona chinhu ichi chakaitika, chatakaziviswa naShe." 
Luke2:16 Ipapo vakakurumidza kusvika, vakawana vose Maria naJosefa, norusvava ruvete muchidyiro chezvipfuwo." 
Luke2:17 Vakati vavona, vakazivisa kose shoko ravakanga vavudzwa maererano nomwana uyo." 
Luke2:18 Zvino vose vakanzwa vakashamiswa nezvinhu izvi zvavakavudzwa navafudzi. 
Luke2:19 Asi Maria wakachengeta zvinhu izvi zvose, achifungisisa mumoyo make." 
Luke2:20 Zvino vafudzi vakadzokera kwakare, vachikudza nokurumbidza Mwari pamusoro pezvinhu zvose zvavakanga vanzwa nekuvona, sezvavakanga vavudzwa." 
Luke2:21 Mazuva masere akati apera kuti mwana adzingiswe, zita rake rikanzi Jesu, raakanga atumidzwa nomutumwa, asati agamuchirwa mudumbu." 
Luke2:22 Zvino mazuva okuzvinatsa kwake nomurairo waMozisi akati apera, vakavuya naye Jerusarema, kuti va\add mu\add*kumikidze kunaShe;" 
Luke2:23 (sezvazvakanyorwa pamurairo waShe kuti \add mwana\add*rume mumwe nomumwe unotanga kuzarura chizvaro, uchanzi mutsvene kunaShe)," 
Luke2:24 uye vabayire chibayiro sezvazvakarehwa pamurairo waShe, njiva mbiri, kana hangaiwa mbiri duku." 
Luke2:25 Zvino tarira, kwakanga kunomunhu muJerusarema, zita rake \add rainzi\add* Simiyoni, ndiyevo munhu waiva akarurama akazvipira kushumira Mwari, akamirira kunyaradzwa kwavaIsraeri, noMweya Mutsvene wakanga uri pamusoro pake." 
Luke2:26 Zvino zvakanga zvaratidzwa kwaari noMweya Mutsvene, kuti haangavoni rufu asati avona Kristu waShe." 
Luke2:27 Wakapinda mutembere noMweya; zvino vabereki vakati vachivuya nomwana Jesu, kuti vaite pamusoro pake setsika yomurairo," 
Luke2:28 iye akamutora akamubata mumavoko ake akavonga Mwari, achiti:" 
Luke2:29 Tenzi zvino regai henyu muranda wenyu aende norugare, sezvakareva shoko renyu;" 
Luke2:30 Nokuti meso angu avona ruponeso rwenyu," 
Luke2:31 rwamakagadzirira pamberi pezviso zvavanhu vose; 
Luke2:32 chiedza chokuvhenekera vahedheni, nokubwinya kwavanhu venyu vaIsraeri." 
Luke2:33 Josefa namai vake vakashamiswa nezvakarehwa pamusoro pake. 
Luke2:34 Ipapo Simiyoni akavaropafadza, akati kunaMaria mai vake: Tarira, uyu wakaisirwa kuwa nokumuka kwavazhinji pavaIsraeri, nokuva chiratidzo chichapikiswa;" 
Luke2:35 uye newe munondo uchabaya mweya wakovo; kuti ndangariro dzemoyo mizhinji dzibvundunurwe. 
Luke2:36 Zvino kwakanga kuno mumwe Ana muporofitakadzi, mukunda waFanueri, wedzinza raAsheri; iye wakanga akwegura kwazvo, wakanga anomurume makore manomwe kubvira pavumhandara hwake." 
Luke2:37 Iye ari chirikadzi yamakore makumi masere namana, wakanga asingabvi mutembere, achishumira nokutsanya nokunyengetera vusiku namasikati:" 
Luke2:38 Naiye wakati achisvika nenguva iyo akatendavo Mwari, akataura pamusoro pake kunavose vakanga vachitarisira kusunungurwa kweJerusarema." 
Luke2:39 Zvino vakati vapedza zvinhu zvose zvomurairo waShe, vakadzokera Gariri, kuguta ravo Nazareta." 
Luke2:40 Mwana akakura akasimba mumweya, akazara nenjere; nenyasha dzaMwari dzakanga dziri pamusoro pake." 
Luke2:41 Zvino vabereki vake vaienda Jerusarema makore ose pamutambo wepaseka. 
Luke2:42 Zvino wakati ava namakore anegumi namaviri, vakakwira Jerusarema netsika yomutambo," 
Luke2:43 vakati mazuva apera, pakudzoka kwavo mwana Jesu akasara Jerusarema, Josefa namai vake vasingazvizivi," 
Luke2:44 asi vaifunga kuti uri munavamwe vavakanga vachifamba navo, vakafamba mufambo wezuva rimwe, vakazomutsvaka pakati pehama nokuvazikani." 
Luke2:45 Asi vakati vamushaiwa, vakadzokera shurezve kuJerusarema vachimutsvaka." 
Luke2:46 Zvino zvakaitika kuti kwapera mazuva matatu, vakamuwana mutembere, agere pakati pavadzidzisi achivateerera nokuvabvunza." 
Luke2:47 Vose vakanga vachimunzwa, vakashamiswa nokuziva kwake nemhinduro dzake." 
Luke2:48 Zvino vakati vamuvona vakakatyamara; mai vake vakati kwaari: Mwana, waitireiko zvakadai kwatiri? Tarira, baba vako neni tanga tichikutsvaka tichishungurudzika." 
Luke2:49 Akati kwavari: Makanga muchinditsvakireiko? Makanga musingazivi kuti ndinofanira kuva pazvinhu zvaBaba vangu here? 
Luke2:50 Asi ivo havana kunzwisisa shoko raakataura kwavari. 
Luke2:51 Ipapo akaburuka navo, akasvika Nazareta, akavateerera. Asi mai vake vakachengeta mashoko iwayo ose mumoyo mavo." 
Luke2:52 Jesu akawedzera panjere nokukura, napakudiwa naMwari navanhu." 
Luke3:1 Zvino negore regumi namashanu rokutonga kwaTiberio Kesari, Pontio Pirato ari mutongi weJudhiya, Herodhe ari mutongi wechina weGariri, Firipi munun'una wake, ari mutongi wechina weIturea nedunhu reTrakoniti, Risanio ari mutongi weAbhirene," 
Luke3:2 Anasi naKayafasi vari vaprista vakuru, shoko raMwari rakasvika kunaJohwani mwanakomana waZakaria murenje." 
Luke3:3 Iye akasvika munyika yose yakapoteredza yaJoridani, akaparidza rubhabhatidzo rwokutendevuka kuti kuve nekukangamwirwa kwezvivi;" 
Luke3:4 sezvazvakanyorwa mubhuku ramashoko aIsaya muporofita zvichinzi: Inzwi rounodana murenje \add richiti\add*: Gadzirai nzira yaShe, ruramisai migwagwa yake." 
Luke3:5 Mipata yose ichafusirwa, makomo ose nezvikomo zvose zvichaderedzwa; zvakakombama zvicharuramiswa, nzira dzamakwiringwindi dzienzaniswe;" 
Luke3:6 uye nyama yose ichavona ruponeso rwaMwari. 
Luke3:7 Naizvozvo wakati kuchaunga chaibudira kuzobhabhatidzwa naye: Vana venyoka, ndianiko wakakuyambirai kuti mutize kutsamwa kunovuya?" 
Luke3:8 Naizvozvo berekai zvibereko zvakafanira kutendevuka; musatanga kureva mumoyo menyu, muchiti: Tina Abhurahamu baba \add vedu\add*; nokuti ndinoti kwamuri: Mwari unogona kubva pamabwe awa kumutsira Abhurahamu vana." 
Luke3:9 Zvinovo sanhu ratoiswa pamudzi wemiti; naizvozvo muti mumwe nomumwe usingabereki chibereko chakanaka, unotemerwa pasi, ukandirwe mumoto." 
Luke3:10 Chaunga chikamubvunza, chichiti: Zvino todiniko?" 
Luke3:11 Akapindura akati kwavari: Une nguvo mbiri, ngaagovane nousina; nounezvokudya ngaaite saizvozvo." 
Luke3:12 Zvino kwakavuyavo vateresi kuzobhabhatidzwa, vakati kwaari: Mudzidzisi, toiteiko?" 
Luke3:13 Akati kwavari: Musareva kupfuvura pamakatemerwa napo. 
Luke3:14 Navarwivo vakamubvunza, vachiti: Ko isu todiniko? Akati kwavari: Musatyityidzira munhu kana kupomera munhu nhema; uye migutsikane nemubairo wenyu." 
Luke3:15 Zvino vanhu vakati vachatarisira, vose vachirangarira mumoyo mavo pamusoro paJohwani, kuti zvimwe ndiKrustu," 
Luke3:16 Johwani akapindura achiti kunavose: Ini zvirokwazvo ndinokubhabhatidzai nemvura; asi mumwe unesimba kupfuvureni unovuya, wandisina kufanira kusunungura rukanda rweshangu dzake; iye uchakubhabhatidzai neMweya mutsvene nomoto" 
Luke3:17 Rusero rwake \add rwuri\add* muruvoko rwake; uchanatsa kwazvo buriro rake; uye uchavunganidza zviyo mudura rake, asi hundi iye uchaipisa nemoto usingadzimwi." 
Luke3:18 Uye mukukurudzira kwake nezvinhu zvizhinji, akaparidzira vanhu evhangeri." 
Luke3:19 Asi Herodhe mutongi wechina, wakati asvorwa naye pamusoro paHerodhiasi, mukadzi womunun'una wake, nezvakaipa zvose zvaakanga zvaitwa naHerodhe," 
Luke3:20 wakawedzerazve pamusoro pezvose nezvizvi, kuti wakapfigira Johwani mutirongo." 
Luke3:21 Zvino zvakaitika \add kuti\add* vanhu vose vabhabhatidzwa, naJesuvo abhabhatidzwa, achinyengetera, denga rakazarurwa." 
Luke3:22 Mweya Mutsvene akaburukira pamusoro pake nechimiro chomuviri sowenjiva, inzwi rikabva kudenga, richiti: Ndiwe Mwanakomana wangu, unodikamwa; wandinofadzwa naye kwazvo." 
Luke3:23 Zvino iye Jesu wakanga achitanga kusvika makore anenge makumi matatu, ari sezvaifungidzirwa, mwanakomana waJosefa, wakanga ari waHeri," 
Luke3:24 wakanga ari waMatati, wakanga ari waRevhi, wakanga ari waMeriki, wakanga ari waJanasi, wakanga ari waJosefa," 
Luke3:25 wakanga ari waMatatiasi, wakanga ari waAmosi, wakanga ari waNaumi, wakanga ari waEsiri, wakanga ari waNagai," 
Luke3:26 wakanga ari waMaati, wakanga ari waMatatiasi, wakanga ari waSimeyini, wakanga ari waJosefa, wakanga ari waJudha," 
Luke3:27 wakanga ari waJohwanani, wakanga ari waResa, wakanga ari waZerubhabheri, wakanga ari waSaratieri, wakanga ari waNeri," 
Luke3:28 wakanga ari waMeriki, wakanga ari waAdhi, wakanga ari waKosamu, wakanga ari waErimodhamu, wakanga ari waEri," 
Luke3:29 wakanga ari waJose, wakanga ari waEriazeri, wakanga ari waJorimu, wakanga ari waMatati, wakanga ari waRevhi," 
Luke3:30 wakanga ari waSimiyoni, wakanga ari waJudha, wakanga ari waJosefa, wakanga ari waJonanu, wakanga ari waEriakimu," 
Luke3:31 wakanga ari waMerea, wakanga ari waMenani, wakanga ari waMatata, wakanga ari waNatatani, wakanga ari waDhavhidhi," 
Luke3:32 wakanga ari waJese, wakanga ari waObhedhi, wakanga ari waBhowazi, wakanga ari waSarimoni, wakanga ari waNaasoni," 
Luke3:33 wakanga ari waAminadhabhi, wakanga ari waAramu, wakanga ari waEziromi, wakanga ari waFaresi, wakanga ari waJudha," 
Luke3:34 wakanga ari waJakobho, wakanga ari waIsaka, wakanga ari waAbhurahamu, wakanga ari waTera, wakanga ari waNahori," 
Luke3:35 wakanga ari waSerugi, wakanga ari waRagau, wakanga ari waFareki, wakanga ari waEberi, wakanga ari waSarah," 
Luke3:36 wakanga ari waKainani, wakanga ari waArifakisadhi, wakanga ari waSemu, wakanga ari waNowa, wakanga ari waRameki," 
Luke3:37 wakanga ari waMatusara, wakanga ari waEnoki, wakanga ari waJaredhi, wakanga ari waMarereeri, wakanga ari waKainani," 
Luke3:38 wakanga ari waEnosi, wakanga ari waSeti, wakanga ari waAdhamu, wakanga ari waMwari." 
Luke4:1 Zvino Jesu azere noMweya Mutsvene, wakadzoka achibva paJorodhani, akatungamirirwa noMweya kuinda murenje," 
Luke4:2 achiidzwa naDhiabhorosi mazuva anamakumi mana. Wakanga asingadyi chinhu namazuva iwayo; zvino akati apera pashure akazonzwa nzara. 
Luke4:3 Zvino Dhiabhorosi akati kwaari: Kana uri Mwanakomana waMwari, vudza ibwe iri kuti rive chingwa." 
Luke4:4 Jesu akamupindura, achiti: Kwakanyorwa kuti: Munhu haangararami nechingwa chete asi neshoko rimwe nerimwe raMwari." 
Luke4:5 Zvino Satani akamutora akamukwidza pagomo refu, akamuratidza ushe hwose hwenyika nenguva duku." 
Luke4:6 Dhiabhorosi akati kwaari: Simba iri rose ndichakupa nokukudzwa kwahwo, nokuti ndakahwupiwa ini, kuti ndihwupe aninani wandinoda." 
Luke4:7 Naizvozvo iwe kana ukandinamata, zvose zvichava zvako." 
Luke4:8 Jesu akapindura akati kwaari: Ibva shure kwangu, Satani; nokuti kwakanyorwa \add kuchinzi\add*: Namata Ishe, Mwari wako, umushumire iye oga." 
Luke4:9 Akaenda naye kuJerusarema, akamuisa pachiruvu chetembere, akati kwaari: Kana uri Mwanakomana waMwari, zviwisire pasi uchibva pano;" 
Luke4:10 Nokuti kwakanyorwa \add kuchinzi\add*: Ucharaira vatumwa vake pamusoro pako, kuti vakuchengete;" 
Luke4:11 uye pamavoko vachakusimudza, kuti urege kurovera rutsoka rwako pabwe." 
Luke4:12 Jesu achipindura, akati kwaari: Kwakanzi: Usaidza Ishe Mwari wako." 
Luke4:13 Dhiabhorosi akati apedza kuidza kose, akabva kwaari kusvikira pane imwe nguva." 
Luke4:14 Zvino Jesu wakadzokera Gariri nesimba roMweya; mukurumbira wake ukabudira kunyika yose yakapoteredza. 
Luke4:15 Iye akadzidzisa mumasinagoge avo, achikudzwa navose." 
Luke4:16 Akasvika paNazareta, paakanga arerwa; netsika yake wakapinda musinagoge nomusi wesabata, akasimuka kuti arave." 
Luke4:17 Akapiwa rugwaro rwomuporofita Isaya. Zvino wakati avhura rugwaro, akawana pakanga pakanyorwa \add kuti\add*:" 
Luke4:18 Mweya waShe \add uri\add* pamusoro pangu, nokuti wakandizodza, kuti ndiparidzire evhangeri kuvarombo; wakandituma kuti ndiporese vakavodzwa moyo, kuparidza kusunungurwa kunavakatapwa, kuvona kumapofu, ndisunungure vakatsikirirwa," 
Luke4:19 nokuparidza gore rakanaka raShe. 
Luke4:20 Akapeta rugwaro akadzosera kumuranda, akagara pasi; meso avose vaiva musinagoge akamutarisisa." 
Luke4:21 Zvino akatanga kuti kwavari: Nhasi rugwaro urwu rwazadziswa munzeve dzenyu. 
Luke4:22 Vose vakamupupurira, vakashamiswa namashoko enyasha akabuda mumuromo make, vakati: Ko uyu haazi mwanakomana waJosefa here?" 
Luke4:23 Akati kwavari: Zvirokwazvo muchataura kwandiri shumo iyi: Murapi, zvirape iwe; zvose izvo zvatakanzwa zvakaitwa paKapenaumi, uzviitevo nomuno munyika yako." 
Luke4:24 Akati: Zvirokwazvo, ndinoti kwamuri: Hakunomuporofita unogamuchirika munyika yake." 
Luke4:25 Asi chokwadi ndinoti kwamuri: Chirikadzi zhinji dzaivako kuvaIsraeri pamazuva aEria, panguva yakazarirwa denga makore matatu nemwedzi mitanhatu, nzara huru ikavapo panyika yose;" 
Luke4:26 asi Eria haana kutumwa kunomumwe wavo, kunze kwekuna Sarepita weSidhoni, kumukadzi chirikadzi." 
Luke4:27 Uye vanemaperembudzi vazhinji vaivako kuvaIsraeri pamazuva omuporofita Erisha; asi hakunomumwe wavo vakanatswa, kunze kwaNaamani muSiria." 
Luke4:28 Ipapo vose vakanga vari musinagoge vakazara nehasha, vachinzwa zvinhu izvi." 
Luke4:29 vakasimuka, vakamudzingira kunze kweguta, vakaenda naye kumawere egomo, pakanga pakavakwa guta ravo, kuti vamuwisire pasi nomusoro." 
Luke4:30 Asi iye wakapinda napakati pavo akaenda. 
Luke4:31 Zvino wakaburukira Kapenaume, guta reGariri; uye waivadzidzisa nemasabata." 
Luke4:32 Vakashamiswa nedzidziso yake, nokuti shoko rake rakanga rinesimba." 
Luke4:33 Zvino musinagoge makanga munomunhu waiva anomweya wetsvina wakaipa; akadanidzira nenzwi guru," 
Luke4:34 akati: Tisiyeyi! tineiko nemwi, Jesu weNazareta? Mavuya kuzotiparadza kanhi? Ndinokuzivai kuti ndimwi ani: Mutsvene waMwari." 
Luke4:35 Ipapo Jesu akautsiura, achiti: Nyarara, ubude kwaari! Mweya wakaipa wakati wamuwisira pakati, ukabuda kwaari, usina kutongomukuvadza." 
Luke4:36 Kushamisika kukawira vose, vakataurirana, vachiti: Ishokoiko? Nokuti nesimba nechikuriri unoraira mweya yetsvina, ikabuda." 
Luke4:37 Mukurumbira wake ukabuda kunzvimbo dzose dzenyika yakapoteredza. 
Luke4:38 Zvino wakasimuka akabuda musinagoge, akanopinda mumba maSimoni; zvino mbuyawasha vaSimoni vakanga vakabatwa nefivhiri huru; vakavakumbirira kwaari," 
Luke4:39 Ipapo akamira pavari, atsiura fivhiri, ikavarega; pakarepo vakasimuka vakavashandira." 
Luke4:40 Zvino zuva rakati rovira, vose vaiva navarwere vezvirwere zvakasiyana-siyana vakavuya navo kwaari; akaisa mavoko ake pamusoro pomumwe nomumwe wavo akavaporesa." 
Luke4:41 Nemweya yakaipa yakabuda kuvazhinji, ichidanidzira ichiti: Ndimwi Kristu mwanakomana waMwari. Iye aka\add i\add*tsiura akasaitendera kutaura nokuti yakanga ichiziva kuti ndiKristu" 
Luke4:42 Zvino kwakati kwaedza akabuda, akaenda kunzvimbo yerenje, chaunga chikamutsvaka, chikasvika kwaari, chikamubatirira kuti arege kubva kwavari," 
Luke4:43 Asi wakati kwavari: Ndinofanira kuparidzira evhangeri youshe hwaMwari mamwe magutavo; nokuti ndizvo zvandakatumirwa. 
Luke4:44 Akasiparidza mumasinagoge eGariri. 
Luke5:1 Zvino zvakaitika kuti vanhu vazhinji vakati vachimumbandidzira kuti vanzwe shoko raMwari, iye akamira parutivi rwegungwa reGenesareta;" 
Luke5:2 akavona zvikepe zviviri zvimire parutivi rwegungwa; asi vabati vehove vakanga vabuda mazviri vachisuka mimbure. 
Luke5:3 Akapinda mune chimwe chikepe chaiva chaSimoni, akakumbira kwaari kuti abve pamhenderekedzo zvishoma. Zvino akagara, akadzidzisa chaunga ari muchikepe." 
Luke5:4 Wakati apedza kutaura, akati kunaSimoni: Pinda kwakadzika ukande mimbure yenyu kuti ubate." 
Luke5:5 Simoni akapindura, akati kwaari: Tenzi, tabhindauka vusiku hwose, tikasabata chinhu, asi zvamadaro imwi, ndichadzikisa mumbure." 
Luke5:6 Vakati vaita izvozvo, vakakomba dutu rehove zhinji; mimbure yavo ikange yobvaruka." 
Luke5:7 Vakaninira vamwe \add vavo\add* vakanga vari mune chimwe chikepe, kuti vauye kuzovabatsira; vakavuya vakazadza zvikepe zvose zviri zviviri, zvokuti zvakatanga kunyura." 
Luke5:8 Zvino Simoni Petro wakati achivona, akawira pasi pamabvi aJesu, akati: Ibvai kwandiri, Ishe, nokuti ndiri munhu mutadzi." 
Luke5:9 Nokuti wakanga abatwa nokushamiswa, iye navose vaakanga anavo nokubatwa kwehove dzavakanga vabata;" 
Luke5:10 saizvozvovo Jakobho naJohwani, vanakomana vaZebedhi, vaiva pamwechete naSimoni. Ipapo Jesu akati kuna Simoni: Usatya, kubva zvino uchabata vanhu." 
Luke5:11 Zvino, vakati vaisa zvikepe kunyika, vakasiya zvose vakamutevera." 
Luke5:12 Zvino zvakaitika, ari kune rimwe guta, tarira, murume wakanga azere maperembudzi; wakati achivona Jesu akawa nechiso, ndokumukumbira, achiti: Ishe, kana muchida, munogona kundinatsa." 
Luke5:13 Ipapo akatambanudza ruvoko, akamubata, achiti: Ndinoda, chinatswa. Pakarepo maperembudzi akabva kwaari." 
Luke5:14 Akamuraira kuti asavudza munhu; \add akati\add*: Asi enda undozviratidza kumuprista, ubayire pamusoro pakunatswa kwako, sezvakarairwa naMozisi, chive chapupu kwavari." 
Luke5:15 Asi mukurumbira wake wakanyanya kupararira kose; zvaunga zvikuru zvakavungana kuzomunzwa, nokuporeswa naye matenda avo." 
Luke5:16 Asi iye waienda kunzvimbo dzerenje achinnoyengetera. 
Luke5:17 Zvino zvakaitika nerimwe ramazuva, iye wakanga achidzidzisa; zvino vaFarisi navadzidzisi vomurairo vakanga vagerepo, vaibva kumisha yose yeGariri neJudhiya neJerusarema; nesimba raShe rakanga riri\add po\add* kuvaporesa." 
Luke5:18 Zvino tarira, varume vakanga vakatakura munhu panhovo wakanga akawoma mitezo; vakatsvaka kumupinza vamuise pamberi pake." 
Luke5:19 Zvino, vakati vachishaiwa pavangamupinza napo, nokuda kwechaunga, vakakwira pamusoro peimba, vakamuburusira mukati nenhovo \add yake\add*, pamapfuriro pakati pamberi paJesu." 
Luke5:20 Iye wakati avona kutenda kwavo, akati kwaari: Murume, zvivi zvako wazvikangamwirwa." 
Luke5:21 Zvino vanyori navaFarisi vakatanga kufunga, vachiti: Ndianiko uyu unotaura achimhura Mwari? Ndianiko ungakangamwira zvivi, kunze kwaMwari oga?" 
Luke5:22 Zvino Jesu, paakaziva mifungo yavo, akapindura, akati kwavari: Munofungeiko mumoyo yenyu?" 
Luke5:23 Chinyiko chakareruka, kuti: Zvivi zvako wazviregererwa; kana kuti: Simuka, ufambe?" 
Luke5:24 Asi kuti muzive kuti Mwanakomana womunhu unesimba panyika rokuregerera zvivi, (akati kunowairwara nokuwoma mitezo) Ndinoti kwauri: Simuka, utore nhovo yako, uende kumba kwako." 
Luke5:25 Pakarepo akasimuka pamberi pavo, akatora chaakanga avete pamusoro pacho, akaenda kumba kwake, achirumbidza Mwari." 
Luke5:26 Kushamisika kukabata vose, vakarumbidza Mwari, vakazadzwa nokutya, vachiti: Tavona chisivonekwe nhasi." 
Luke5:27 Zvino shure kwaizvozvo wakabuda, akavona muteresi, nezita \add wainzi\add* Revhi, agere paimba inotererwa, akati kwaari: Nditevere." 
Luke5:28 Iye akasiya zvose, akasimuka akamutevera." 
Luke5:29 Revhi akamuitira mutambo mukuru mumba make; kukavapo chaunga chikuru chavateresi navamwe vakanga vanavo pakudya. 
Luke5:30 Asi vanyori vavo navaFarisi vakanyunyutira vadzidzi vake, vachiti: Nemhaka yei muchidya nokumwa navateresi navatadzi?" 
Luke5:31 Jesu akapindura akati kwavari: Vasingarwari havatsvaki murapi, asi avo vanorwara." 
Luke5:32 Handina kuvuya kuzodana vakarurama, asi vatadzi, vauye mukutendevuka." 
Luke5:33 Zvino vakati kwaari: Nemhaka yei vadzidzi vaJohwani vachitsanya kazhinji, vachiita minyengetero, navavaFarisi vanodarovo, asi venyu vanodya nokumwa." 
Luke5:34 Asi wakati kwavari: Mungatsanyisa vana veimba yomuchato chikomba chiri kwavari here? 
Luke5:35 Asi mazuva achasvika, apo chikomba chichabviswa kwavari, zvino ipapo vachatsanya namazuva iwayo." 
Luke5:36 Akatauravo mufananidzo kwavari, \add akati\add*: Hakunomunhu unoisa chigamba chitsva panguvo sharu; kana zvakadaro naichovo chitsva chinobvarura, nechigamba chakabva \add panguvo\add* itsva hachipindirani nechisharu." 
Luke5:37 Uye hakunomunhu unodira waini itsva muhombodo sharu; kana zvakadaro, waini itsva ichaparusa hombodo, ikatevuka, uye nehombodo dzikaparara." 
Luke5:38 Asi waini itsva inofanira kuiswa muhombodo itsva zvose zvichengetedzeke.
