Luke19:47 Waidzidzisa zuva rimwe nerimwe mutembere; asi vaprista vakuru navanyori navakuru vavanhu vakanga vachitsvaka kumuparadza. 
Luke19:48 Asi vakanga vasingawani zvavangaita, nokuti vanhu vose vakamunamatira vachimunzwa." 
Luke20:1 Zvino zvakaitika nerime ramazuva iwayo, achidzidzisa vanhu mutembere, nokuparidza evhangeri, vaprista vakuru navanyori vakasvika navakuru," 
Luke20:2 vakataura kwaari vachiti: Tivudzei; munoita zvinhu izvi nesimba ripi, kana ndianiko iye wakakupai simba iri?" 
Luke20:3 Akapindura akati kwavari: Ndichakubvunzaivo ini shoko rimwe; ndivudzei: 
Luke20:4 Rubhabhatidzo rwaJohwani rwakabva kudenga kana kuvanhu? 
Luke20:5 Vakataurirana, vachiti: Kana tikati: Kudenga, uchati: Zvino makagoregerei imwi kumutenda?" 
Luke20:6 Asi kana tikati: Kuvanhu, vanhu vose vachatitaka namabwe; nokuti ivo vaiva nechokwadi kuti Johwani waiva muporofita." 
Luke20:7 Vakapindura, vachiti havazivi kwa\add rwa\add*kabva." 
Luke20:8 Zvino Jesu akati kwavari: Nenivo handingakuvudziyi kuti ndinoita zvinhu izvi nesimba ripi. 
Luke20:9 Zvino wakatanga kuvudza vanhu mufananidzo uyu: Mumwe munhu wakasima munda wemizambiringa, akaupa varimi, akaenda kune imwe nyika nguva refu;" 
Luke20:10 nenguva yakafanira wakatuma muranda kuvarimi, kuti vamupe zvezvibereko zvomunda wemizambiringa; asi varimi vakamurova, vaka\add mu\add*dzosa asina chinhu." 
Luke20:11 Akatumazve mumwe muranda; naiyevo vakamurova vaka\add mu\add*nyadzisa, vaka\add mu\add*dzosa asina chinhu." 
Luke20:12 Akatumazve wechitatu; zvino uyuvo vakamukuvadza, vaka\add mu\add*dzingira kunze." 
Luke20:13 Zvino mwene womunda wemizambiringa akati: Ndichaiteiko? Ndichatuma mwanakomana wangu unodikamwa, zvimwe vakavona iye vachamukudza." 
Luke20:14 Asi varimi vakati vachimuvona vakarangana pakati pavo, vachiti: Uyu ndiye mugari wenhaka; vuyai, ngatimuvuraye, kuti nhaka igova yedu." 
Luke20:15 Vakamudzingira kunze komunda wemizambiringa, vakavuraya. Zvino mwene womunda wemizambiringa uchavaitireiko?" 
Luke20:16 Uchavuya, akaparadza varimi ivava, akapa munda womuzambiringa vamwe. Zvino vachinzwa, vakati: Zvisadaro!" 
Luke20:17 Asi wakavatarisa, akati: Zvino chinyiko ichi chakanyorwa, \add chinoti\add*: Ibwe rakarambwa navavaki, Ndiro rakazova musoro wekona?" 
Luke20:18 Mumwe nomumwe unowira pamusoro pebwe iro, uchavhunika; asi ani nani warinowira richamukuya kuita upfu." 
Luke20:19 Zvino vaprista vakuru navanyori nenguva iyoyo vakatsvaka kumubata, asi vakatya vanhu; nokuti vakaziva kuti wakavareva ivo nomufananidzo uyo." 
Luke20:20 Vaka\add mu\add*cherekedza, vakatumira vashori vakazviita savanhu vakarurama, kuti vamubate pakutaura kwake, kuti vamukumikidze kuushe nesimba romutongi." 
Luke20:21 Vakamubvunza, vachiti: Mudzidzisi, Tinoziva kuti munotaura nokudzidzisa zvakarurama, uye hamugamuchiri \add zvinovonekwa zvo\add*munhu, asi munodzidzisa nzira yaMwari muchokwadi," 
Luke20:22 Zviri pamutemo here kwatiri kuripira Kesari mutero, kana kwete?" 
Luke20:23 Asi iye achiziva vumhare bwavo, akati kwavari: Munondiidzireiko?" 
Luke20:24 Ndiratidzei dhenari*; Rinomufananidzo norunyoro rwaaniko? Vakapindura vakati: ZvaKesari. 
Luke20:25 Ipapo akati kwavari: Naizvozvo ipai kunaKesari zvinhu zvaKesari, nokunaMwari zvinhu zvaMwari." 
Luke20:26 Vakakoniwa kumubata namashoko ake pamberi pavanhu; vakashamiswa nokupindura kwake; ndokunyarara. 
Luke20:27 Zvino kwakavuya kwaari vamwe vavaSajusi, ivo vanoramba kuti kune kumuka kwavakafa, vakamubvunza," 
Luke20:28 vachiti: Mudzidzisi, Mozisi wakatinyorera \add kuti\add* kana mukoma womunhu akafa anomukadzi, asi iye akafa asina vana, munun'una wake unofanira kutora mukadzi wake, amutsire mukoma wake rudzi." 
Luke20:29 Zvino kwakanga kuna vanakomana vomunhu mumwe vanomwe; wedangwe akatora mukadzi, akafa asina vana;" 
Luke20:30 nowechipiri akatora mukadzi, akafa asina mwana;" 
Luke20:31 nowechitatu akamutora. zvikadarovo navanomwe vakasasiya vana, vakafa." 
Luke20:32 Pakupedzisira mukadzi akafavo. 
Luke20:33 Naizvozvo pakumuka kwavakafa, uchava mukadzi waaniko kwavari? Nokuti vanomwe vakava naye somukadzi." 
Luke20:34 Zvino Jesu akapindura akati kwavari: Vanakomana venyika ino vanowana; uye vanowaniswa; 
Luke20:35 asi avo vachanzi vakafanira kuwana nyika iyo nokumuka kwavakafa, havawani, kana kuwaniswa." 
Luke20:36 Nokuti havazofizve; nokuti vachaenzana navatumwa, uye vava vanakomana vaMwari zvavari vanakomana vokumuka kwavakafa." 
Luke20:37 Asi kuti vakafa vanomutswazve, kunyange Mozisivo wakaratidza pagwenzi, paakati Ishe ndiye Mwari waAbhurahamu, naMwari waIsaka, naMwari waJakobho." 
Luke20:38 Nokuti Mwari haazi Mwari wavakafa, asi wavapenyu; nokuti vose vapenyu kwaari." 
Luke20:39 Ipapo vamwe vavanyori vakapindura vakati: Mudzidzisi, mataura zvakanaka." 
Luke20:40 Pashure paizvozvo havana kuzotsunga kumubvunzazve chinhu. 
Luke20:41 Zvino akati kwavari: Vanoreva seiko kuti Kristu Mwanakomana waDavhidhi? 
Luke20:42 Nokuti Dhavhidhi pachake wakareva mubhuku yaMapisarema \add achiti\add*: Ishe wakati kuna She wangu: Gara kuruoko rwangu rworudyi," 
Luke20:43 Kusvikira ndaita vavengi vako chitsiko chetsoka dzako. 
Luke20:44 Naizvozvo Dhavhidhi unomuidza Ishe, zvino ungagova Mwanakomana wake seiko?" 
Luke20:45 Zvino vanhu vose vachizvinzwa, wakati kuvadzidzi vake:" 
Luke20:46 Chenjerai vanyori, vanoda kufamba nenguvo refu, vachida kukwaziswa pamisika, nezvigaro zvapamusorosa mumasinagoge, novugaro bwapamberi pamabiko;" 
Luke20:47 vanoparadza dzimba dzechirikadzi, vanonyengera nokuita minyengetero mirefu; ivavo vachatongerwa kurashwa kukuru." 
Luke21:1 Zvino wakatarira kumusoro akavona vafumi vachikanda zvipo zvavo muchivigiro chemari. 
Luke21:2 Akavonavo imwe chirikadzi murombo, achikandamo tumari tuviri tuduku." 
Luke21:3 Akati: Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Chirikadzi iyi murombo, yakanda kupfuvura vamwe vose;" 
Luke21:4 nokuti avo vose vakanda muzvipo zvaMwari pazvizhinji zvavo, asi iye, pakushaiwa kwake, wakanda chose chaaiva nacho chaaifanira kurarama \add nacho\add*." 
Luke21:5 Zvino vamwe vakataura pamusoro petembere, kuti yakanga yakashongedzwa sei namabwe akanaka nezvipo, akati:" 
Luke21:6 Zvinhu izvi zvamunovona, mazuva achasvika, asingazoregwi ibwe pamusoro pebwe, risingazowisirwi pasi." 
Luke21:7 Zvino vakamubvunza, vachiti: Mudzidzisi, kozvinhu izvozvi zvichagova riniko? Nechiratidzo \add chichava\add* chipi, kana izvozvi zvoitwa?" 
Luke21:8 Iye akati: Chenjerai, kuti murege kunyengerwa; nokuti vazhinji vachavuya muzita rangu, vachiti: Ndini \add Kristu\add*; nguva yaswedera. Naizvozvo musavatevera." 
Luke21:9 Kana muchinzwa zvehondo, nenyonganiso, musavhunduswa henyu, nokuti izvozvi zvinofanira kumboitika; asi kuguma haku\add sviki\add* pakarepo." 
Luke21:10 Akati kwavari: Rudzi ruchamukira rudzi, noushe \add hwucha\add*mukira ushe." 
Luke21:11 Uye kudengenyeka kukuru kwenyika kuchavapo kunzvimbo dzakasiyana siyana, nenzara nehosha, nezvinotyisa kuvona, uye zviratidzo zvikuru zvichabva kudenga zvichavapo." 
Luke21:12 Asi mberi kwaizvozvi zvose, vachakubatai, nokutambudza, vachi\add ku\add*kumikidzai kumasinagoge nomumatirongo, muchiiswa pamberi pamadzimambo navabati, nokuda kwezita rangu." 
Luke21:13 Izvi zvichashanduka vuchapupu kwamuri. 
Luke21:14 Naizvozvo zviisei mumoyo menyu, kuti murege kufanofungisisa zvamuchapindura." 
Luke21:15 Nokuti ndichakupai muromo nokuchenjera, kuchakonekamwa kupikiswa kana kurambwa navavengi venyu vose." 
Luke21:16 Muchatengeswa kunyange navabereki, navana vamai venyu, nehama, neshamwari, \add vamwe\add* venyu vachavurawa." 
Luke21:17 Muchavengwa navose nokuda kwezita rangu. 
Luke21:18 Asi hakungaparari kunyange ruvhudzi rumwe rwomusoro wenyu. 
Luke21:19 Nokutsungirira kwenyu wanai mweya yenyu. 
Luke21:20 Zvino kana muchivona Jerusarema rakombwa nehondo, zivai kuti kuparadzwa kwaro kwaswedera." 
Luke21:21 Musi uyo vari muJudhiya ngavatizire kumakomo; navari mukati maro ngavabude; navari kuruwa ngavarege kupindamo. 
Luke21:22 Nokuti iwayo ndiwo mazuva okutsiva, kuti zvose zvakanyorwa zvizadziswe." 
Luke21:23 Asi vurombo kune vanemimba navanomwisa namazuva iwayo, nokuti kuchavapo kutambudzika kukuru panyika, nokutsamwa pamusoro pavanhu ivava." 
Luke21:24 Vachawira pamuromo womunondo, nokutapwa kumarudzi ose; Jerusarema richatsikirwa pasi navahedheni, kusvikira nguva dzavahedheni dzazadziswa." 
Luke21:25 Zviratidzo zvichavapo pazuva napamwedzi, napanyeredzi; napanyika kutambudzika kwamarudzi, nokukanganiswa, gungwa namafungu zvichivomba," 
Luke21:26 vanhu vachapera simba nokutya nokutarira zvinhu izvo zvinovuya panyika; nokuti masimba okudenga achazungunuswa. 
Luke21:27 Ipapo vachavona Mwanakomana womunhu achivuya ari mugore, nesimba nokubwinya kukuru." 
Luke21:28 Asi kana izvozvi zvichitanga kuitika, zvino tarirai kumusoro, musimudze misoro yenyu, nokuti kudzikunurwa kwenyu kwaswedera." 
Luke21:29 Zvino akavataurira mufananidzo \add achiti\add*: Tarirai muvonde nemiti yose; 
Luke21:30 kana yotunga, munozvivonera nokuzvizivira mumene, kuti zvino munakamwe wava pedo." 
Luke21:31 Saizvozvo, nemwivo, kana movona zvinhu izvozvi zvoitika, zivai kuti ushe bwaMwari hwava pedo." 
Luke21:32 Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri: Zera iri haringatongopfuvuri, kusvikira zvose zvazadziswa." 
Luke21:33 Denga nenyika zvichapfuvura, asi mashoko angu haangatongopfuvuri." 
Luke21:34 Zvino zvichenjererei kuti moyo yenyu irege kuremedzwa nokudyisa nokubatwa, nokufunganya zvoupenyu hwuno, zuva iro rikuwirei makarivara." 
Luke21:35 Nokuti seriva richawira vose vagere pachiso chenyika yose. 
Luke21:36 Naizvozvo rindai nenguva dzose, munyengetere, kuti muverengwe samakafanira kupukunyuka zvinhu izvo zvose zvichaitika, nokumira pamberi poMwanakomana womunhu." 
Luke21:37 Zvino waidzidzisa masikati mutembere; asi vusiku waibuda, achindogara mugomo rinonzi reMiorivhi." 
Luke21:38 Vanhu vose vakavuya kwaari mutembere mangwanani-ngwanani kuzomunzwa. 
Luke22:1 Zvino mabiko ezvingwa zvisinembiriso aiswedera, anonzi paseka." 
Luke22:2 Vaprista vakuru navanyori vakatsvaka kuti vangamuvuraya sei; nokuti vakanga vachitya vanhu. 
Luke22:3 Zvino wakapinda Satani kuna Judhasi wainzi Isikariyoti, waiverengwa pavanegumi navaviri." 
Luke22:4 Akaenda, akandorangana navaprista vakuru namachinda, kuti ungamutengesa kwavari sei." 
Luke22:5 Vakafara, vakatenderana kumupa mari." 
Luke22:6 Iye akatenda, akatsvaka nguva yakafanira yokumutengesa nayo kwavari pasina chaunga." 
Luke22:7 Zvino zuva rezvingwa zvisinembiriso rakati rasvika, raifanira kubayiwa paseka naro." 
Luke22:8 akatuma Petro naJohwani, achiti: Endai mundotigadzirira paseka, kuti tidye." 
Luke22:9 Zvino vakati kwaari: Munoda kuti tigadzirirepiko? 
Luke22:10 Akati kwavari: Tarirai, kana mapinda muguta, munhu uchasangana nemwi akatakura chirongo chemvura; mumutevere iye mumba maanopinda." 
Luke22:11 Muti kumwene weimba: Mudzidzisi unoti kwauri: Imba yavaeni iripiko, mandingadyira paseka navadzidzi vangu?" 
Luke22:12 Uchakuratidzai imba huru yokumusoro yakarongedzwa; gadzirai ipapo. 
Luke22:13 Vakaenda, vakandowana sezvaakanga avavudza; vakagadzira paseka." 
Luke22:14 Zvino nguva yakati yasvika, akagara pasi navapositora vanegumi navaviri vanaye." 
Luke22:15 Akati kwavari: Nechishuvo ndakashuva zvikuru kudya paseka iyi nemwi ndisati ndatambudzika. 
Luke22:16 Nokuti ndinoti kwamuri: Handichazoidyizve, kusvikira yazadziswa muushe hwaMwari." 
Luke22:17 Zvino akatora mukombe; akavonga, akati: Torai ichi, mugovane pakati penyu." 
Luke22:18 Nokuti ndinoti kwamuri: Handichatongomwizve zvibereko zvomuzambiringa, kusvikira ushe bwaMwari bwasvika." 
Luke22:19 Akatora chingwa, akavonga, akamedura, akavapa, achiti: uyu muviri wangu, unopiwemwi; itai izvi muchindirangarira." 
Luke22:20 Saizvozvovo mukombe vapedza kurayira, achiti: Mukombe uyu, sungano itsva muropa rangu, rinotevurirwa imwi." 
Luke22:21 Asi tarirai, ruvoko rwaiye unondipandukira runeni patafura." 
Luke22:22 Zvino zvirokwazvo mwanakomana womunhu unoenda hake sezvazvakatemwa; asi vurombo kumunhu uyo waanotengeswa naye! 
Luke22:23 Ipapo vakatanga kubvunzana pakati pavo kuti ndianiko pavari uchaita chinhu ichi. 
Luke22:24 Zvino nharo dzakamukavo pakati pavo \add kuti\add* ndiani kwavari uchaverengwa somukuru. 
Luke22:25 Akati kwavari: Madzimambo avahedheni anotonga pamusoro pavo, navanoratidza simba pamusoro pavo vanonzi vabatsiri." 
Luke22:26 Zvino imwi zvisadaro, asi mukuru kwamuri ngaave somuduku, nomutungamiriri somushandiri." 
Luke22:27 Nokuti ndianiko mukuru, uyo ugere pakudya kana unoshandira? Haazi iye ugere pakudya here? Asi ini ndiri pakati penyu sounoshandira." 
Luke22:28 Imwi ndimwi makagara neni pamiidzo yangu. 
Luke22:29 Ndinokugoverai ushe, saBaba vangu vakandisarudza." 
Luke22:30 kuti mugodya nokumwa patafura yangu muushe bwangu, mugare pazvigaro zvoushe, muchitonga marudzi anegumi namaviri avaIsraeri." 
Luke22:31 Ishe akati: Simoni! Simoni! Tarira Satani wakakumbira kuti a\add ku\add*zungure iwe sezviyo; 
Luke22:32 asi ini ndakunyengeterera iwe, kuti kutenda kwako kurege kupera; iwe kana watendevuka, usimbise hama dzako." 
Luke22:33 Asi wakati kwaari: Ishe, ndakazvigadzirira kuenda nemwi mutirongo, kunyange kurufu." 
Luke22:34 Asi iye wakati: Ndinokuvudza, Petro, jongwe haringariri nhasi usati waramba katatu kuti unondiziva." 
Luke22:35 Zvino akati kwavari: Pandakakutumai, musinechikwama nehombodo neshangu, makashaiwa chinhu here? Vakati: Hapana." 
Luke22:36 Zvino akati kwavari: Asi zvino, unechikwama, ngaatore, saizvozvovo unehombodo; neusina, ngaatengese nguvo yake atenge munondo." 
Luke22:37 Nokuti ndinoti kwamuri: Izvi zvakanyorwa zvinofanira kuzadziswa kwandiri, \add zvinoti\add*: Wakaverengwa pamwe chete navadariki vomurairo; nokuti izvo zvakanyorwa pamusoro pangu zvine mugumo." 
Luke22:38 Ipapo vakati: Ishe, tarirai, heyi minondo miviri. Akati kwavari: Zvaringana." 
Luke22:39 Zvino wakabuda, akaenda sezvaaisiita kugomo reMiorivhi; navadzidzi vakevo vakamutevera." 
Luke22:40 Wakati asvika panzvimbo, akati kwavari: Nyengeterai kuti murege kupinda pakuidzwa." 
Luke22:41 Akabva kwavari, chinhambwe chingasvika ibwe kana rikaposherwa; akafugama akanyengetera," 
Luke22:42 achiti: Baba, kana muchida, bvisai mukombe uyu kwandiri; Asi zvirokwazvo kusava kuda kwangu, asi kwenyu ngakuitwe." 
Luke22:43 Ipapo kwakavonekwa mutumwa kwaari, wakabva kudenga achimusimbisa." 
Luke22:44 Zvino, ari pakutambudzika kukuru, wakanyanya kunyengetera; ziya rake rikaita samadomwe makuru eropa achidonhera pasi." 
Luke22:45 Zvino wakati asimuka pakunyengetera, akaenda kuvadzidzi vake, akavawana vavata neshungu." 
Luke22:46 Akati kwavari: Mavatireiko? Mukai munyengetere, kuti murege kupinda pakuidzwa." 
Luke22:47 Wakati achataura, tarira, chaunga naiye wainzi Judhasi, mumwe wavanegumi navaviri, akavatungamirira, akaswedera kunaJesu, kuti amusvete." 
Luke22:48 Asi Jesu wakati kwaari: Judhasi, unotengesa Mwanakomana womunhu nokusveta here?" 
Luke22:49 Zvino vaiva vakamukomba vakati vachivona zvaizoitika, vakati kwaari: Ishe, totema nemunondo here?" 
Luke22:50 Ipapo mumwe wavo akatema muranda womuprista mukuru, akagura nzeve yake yorudyi." 
Luke22:51 Jesu akapindura akati: Regai zvisvike ipapo. Akabata nzeve yake, akamuporesa." 
Luke22:52 Zvino Jesu akati kuvaprista vakuru namachinda etembere, navakuru vakanga vavuya kwaari: Mabuda neminondo netsvimbo semunorwisa gororo here?" 
Luke22:53 Ini ndaiva nemwi mutembere mazuva ose, mukasatandavadzira ruvoko kwandiri; asi zvino inguva yenyu, nesimba rerima." 
Luke22:54 Zvino vakamutora, vakaenda naye, vakandomuisa kumba komuprista mukuru. Petro akatevera ari kure." 
Luke22:55 Vakati vavesa moto pakati pebiravira, vakagara pasi pamwechete, Petro akagara pasi pakati pavo." 
Luke22:56 Zvino mumwe murandakadzi wakamuvona agere pamoto akamutarisisa, akati: Uyu munhuvo wakanga anaye." 
Luke22:57 Asi iye wakaramba, achiti: Mukadzi, handimuzivi." 
Luke22:58 Shure kwechinguvana, mumwezve akamuvona, akati: Iwevo uri mumwe wavo. Petro akati: Murume, handizini." 
Luke22:59 Nguva inenge seora rimwe yakati yapfuvura, mumwezve akasimbisa ane chokwadi, achiti: Zvirokwazvo uyu wakanga anayevo; nokuti muGariri." 
Luke22:60 Petro akati: Murume, handizivi zvaunoreva. Pakarepo, achataura jongwe rikarira." 
Luke22:61 Ipapo Ishe akatendevuka akatarira Petro. Petro akarangarira shoko raShe, kuti akamuvudza sei, \add achiti\add*: Jongwe risati rarira, uchandiramba katatu." 
Luke22:62 Petro akabuda, akachema zvikuru." 
Luke22:63 Varume vakanga vabata Jesu, vakamusweveredza, noku\add mu\add*rova." 
Luke22:64 Vakati vamuvhara kumeso, vakamurova kumeso, vakamubvunza, vachiti: Profita! Ndiani wakurova?" 
Luke22:65 Nezvimwe zvizhinji vakareva kwaari, vachimunyomba." 
Luke22:66 Zvino kwakati kwaedza, vakuru vavanhu navaprista vakuru navanyori vakavungana, vakamuisa kumakurukota avo vachiti:" 
Luke22:67 Kana uri Kristu, tivudze. Akati kwavari: Kana ndikakuvudzai, hamungatendi;" 
Luke22:68 uye kana ndikabvunza, hamungandipinduri kana ku\add ndi\add*sunungura." 
Luke22:69 Kubva zvino Mwanakomana womunhu uchagara kurudyi rwesimba rwaMwari. 
Luke22:70 Ipapo vose vakati: Saka uri Mwanakomana waMwari kanhi? Iye akati kwavari: Mareva kuti ndini iye. 
Luke22:71 Ivo vakati: Tichadireiko vuchapupu? Nokuti isu timene tazvinzwira pamuromo wake. 
Luke23:1 Zvino chaunga chavo chose chikasimuka, vakamutungamirira kuna Pirato." 
Luke23:2 Zvino vakatanga kumupomera mhosva, vachiti: Takawana uyu achitsausa rudzi, achidzivisa kupa mutera kuna Kesari; achiti iye pachake ndiKristu Mambo." 
Luke23:3 Ipapo Pirato akamubvunza achiti: Ko uri Mambo wavaJudha here? Akamupindura, akati: Unoreva iwe." 
Luke23:4 Zvino Pirato akati kuvaprista vakuru nechaunga: Handiwani mhosva kumunhu uyu. 
Luke23:5 Ivo vakanyanya kusimbisa, vachiti: Unomutsa vanhu, achidzidzisa muJudhiya rose, achitanga paGariri kusvikira pano." 
Luke23:6 Pirato wakati anzwa zveGariri, akabvunza kana munhu uyu ari muGariri." 
Luke23:7 Akangoti anzwa kuti ndoweushe bwaHerodhe, akamutumira kunaHerodhe, iye wakanga ari muJerusarema amene pamazuva iwayo." 
Luke23:8 Zvino Herodhe wakati achivona Jesu akafara kwazvo-kwazvo; nokuti waishuva kumuvona kwe\add nguva\add* refu, nokuti wakanga anzwa zvinhu zvizhinji pamusoro pake; akatarisira kuti uchavona chimwe chiratidzo chingaitwa naye." 
Luke23:9 Akamubvunza namashoko mazhinji; asi iye haana kumupindura chinhu. 
Luke23:10 Zvino vaprista vakuru navanyori vakamira vakamupomera mhosva zvine simba. 
Luke23:11 NaHerodhe navarwi vake vakamuzvidza, nokusweveredza; vakazomupfekedza, nguvo dzinobwinya, vakamudzosera kunaPirato." 
Luke23:12 Nomusi iwoyo Pirato naHerodhe vakava shamwari; nokuti paimbova neruvengo pakati pavo. 
Luke23:13 Zvino Pirato wakati adanira pamwechete vaprista vakuru navatongi navanhu. 
Luke23:14 akati kwavari: Mavuya nomunhu uyu kwandiri sounotsausa vanhu; zvino tarirai ini ndabvunzisisa pamberi penyu, ndikasawana mumunhu uyu mhosva yezvinhu zvamunomupomera;" 
Luke23:15 kwete, kunyange naHerodhevo; nokuti ndinokutumaizve kwaari; zvino tarirai, hapana chakafanira rufu chakaitwa naye." 
Luke23:16 Naizvozvo ndichamurova ndigo\add mu\add*sunungura. 
Luke23:17 Nokuti waifanira kuvasunungurira mumwe pamutambo. 
Luke23:18 Asi vose vakadanidzira pamwe chete vachiti: Kure nouyu, mutisunungurire Bharabhasi!" 
Luke23:19 Iye wakanga akandirwa mutirongo nemhaka yerimwe bope rakanga ramutswa muguta, nokuvuraya." 
Luke23:20 Zvino Pirato achida kusunungura Jesu, akataurazve kwavari." 
Luke23:21 Asi ivo vakadanidzira, vachiti: Rovera, murovere!" 
Luke23:22 Akati kwavari rwechitatu: Nemhaka yei, waita chakaipa chipiko? Handina kuwana mhosva yorufu maari; naizvozvo ndichamurova ndigo\add mu\add*sunungura." 
Luke23:23 Asi ivo vakasimbisa namanzwi makuru, vachikumbira kuti aroverwe. Manzwi avo naavaprista vakuru akakunda." 
Luke23:24 Zvino Pirato akapa mutongo kuti zviitwe sezvavakakumbira; 
Luke23:25 akavasunungurira uyo wavakakumbira, wakanga akandwa mutirongo nemhaka yebope neyokuvuraya; akakumikidza Jesu kuzvodo zvavo." 
Luke23:26 Zvino vakati vachienda naye, vakabata mumwe, \add wainzi\add* Simoni muKurini, achibva kuruwa vakaisa muchinjikwa pamusoro pake, kuti atakure shure kwaJesu." 
Luke23:27 Akateverwa nechaunga chikuru, navakadzi vaimuririravo nokumuchema." 
Luke23:28 Asi Jesu wakatendevukira kwavari, akati: Vakunda veJerusarema, musachema ini, asi muzvicheme imwi navana venyu;" 
Luke23:29 nokuti tarirai, mazuva anovuya avachati nawo: Dzakaropafadzwa mhanje, nezvizvaro zvisina kutongobereka, namazamu asina kutongomwisa." 
Luke23:30 Zvino vachatanga kuti kumakomo: Wirai pamusoro pedu; nokuzvikomo: Tifukidzei. 
Luke23:31 Nokuti kana vachiita zvinhu izvi kumuti munyoro, zvinyi zvichaitwa kunowakawoma?" 
Luke23:32 Zvino kwakanga kuna vamwe vaiti vezvakaipa vavirivo, kuti vavurawe pamwe chete naye." 
Luke23:33 Zvino vakati vasvika panzvimbo inonzi Dehenya, ipapo vakamurovera navaiti vezvakaipa mumwe kuruoko rworudyi nomumwe kuruboshwe." 
Luke23:34 Ipapo Jesu akati: Baba, vakangamwirei, nokuti havazivi chavanoita. Vakagovana nguvo dzake, vachikanda mijenya." 
Luke23:35 Vanhu vakamira, vakatarira. Navatongivo pamwechete navo vaka\add mu\add*sweveredza, vachiti: Wakaponesa vamwe; ngaazviponese; kana ari Kristu, musanangurwa waMwari." 
Luke23:36 Navarwivo vakamusweveredza, vakavuya \add kwaari\add* vakamupa vhiniga," 
Luke23:37 vachiti: Kana uri Mambo wavaJudha, zviponese." 
Luke23:38 Zvino; kwakanga kuno rugwarovo rwakanyorwa pamusoro pake namavara echiGiriki nechiRoma nechiHebheru, \add rwaiti\add*: UYU NDIMAMBO WAVAJUDHA." 
Luke23:39 Zvino mumwe wavaiti vezvakaipa vakanga vakaremberedzwa wakamutuka achiti: Kana uri Kristu, zviponese iwe nesu." 
Luke23:40 Mumwe akapindura, akamutsiura, achiti: Iwe hautyi kunyange naMwari kanhi, zvauri pakutongwa kumwe?" 
Luke23:41 Isu zvirokwazvo zvakatiruramira, nokuti isu tinogamuchira mubairo wemabasa edu; asi uyu haana kuita chinhu chisakafanira." 
Luke23:42 Zvino akati kuna Jesu: Ishe mundirangarire kana masvika muushe bwenyu. 
Luke23:43 Jesu akati kwaari: Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwauri: Nhasi uchava neni muParadhiso. 
Luke23:44 Zvino yakanga yava nguva inenge yechitanhatu; kukavapo rima panyika yose, kusvikira panguva yepfumbamwe." 
Luke23:45 Zuva rikasvibiswa, vheiri retembere rikabvaruka napakati." 
Luke23:46 Zvino Jesu wakati adanidzira nenzwi guru, akati: Baba, mumavoko enyu ndinokumikidza mweya wangu; akati areva izvozvo, akapa mweya." 
Luke23:47 Ipapo mukuru wezana wakati avona zvakaitika, akarumbidza Mwari, achiti: Zvirokwazvo uyu wakanga ari munhu wakarurama." 
Luke23:48 Vazhinji vose vakanga vakavungana kuzovona izvozvo, vakati vachivona zvakaitika, vakadzoka vachirova zvifuva zvavo." 
Luke23:49 Navazikanwi vake vose, navakadzi vaimutevera vachibva Gariri, vakamira kure, vachivona zvinhu izvozvi." 
Luke23:50 Zvino tarira, murume wainzi Josefa, gurukota, murume wakanaka wakarurama;" 
Luke23:51 iye wakanga asina kutenderana navo pakurangana nokuita kwavo; \add waiva\add* weArimatia, guta ravaJudha, iyevo wakanga achimirira ushe bwaMwari;" 
Luke23:52 iye wakaenda kunaPirato akandokumbira mutumbi waJesu," 
Luke23:53 akauburusa, akauputira nerineni yakapfava, akauradzika mubwiro bwakanga bwakacherwa pabwe, makanga musina kumbovigwa munhu." 
Luke23:54 Zvino waiva musi wokugadzirira, sabata roswedera." 
Luke23:55 Navakadzivo, vakanga vavuya naye vachibva Gariri, vakatevera mumashure, vakavona bwiro, nomuisirwe womutumbi wake." 
Luke23:56 Vakadzoka, vakagadzira zvinonhuhwira nezvizoro vakazorora nesabata sezvinoreva murairo." 
Luke24:1 Zvino no\add mu\add*si wokutanga wevhiki, mambakwedza, vakavuya kubwiro, vakabata zvinonhuhwira, zvavakanga vagadzira nevamwe navo." 
Luke24:2 Vakawana ibwe rakakunguruswa, rabviswa pabwiro." 
Luke24:3 vakapinda, vakasawana mutumbi waShe Jesu." 
Luke24:4 Zvino zvakaitika vachakakanganiswa nazvo, tarira, varume vaviri vakamira navo vanenguvo dzinopenya;" 
Luke24:5 zvino vachiri kutya vakakotamira pasi nezviso, \add vatumwa\add* vakati kwavari: Munotsvakireiko mupenyu pakati pavakafa?" 
Luke24:6 Haapo pano, asi wamuka; rangarirai kuti wakataura sei kwamuri achiri muGariri," 
Luke24:7 achiti: Mwanakomana womunhu unofanira kukumikidzwa mumavoko avanhu vezvivi, nokuroverwa, nezuva retatu agomukazve." 
Luke24:8 Ipapo vakarangarira mashoko ake. 
Luke24:9 Vakadzoka vachibva kubwiro, vakavudza zvinhu izvi zvose vanegumi nomumwe navamwe vose." 
Luke24:10 Vaiva Maria Magadarene naJohwana naMaria \add mai\add* vaJakobho, navamwe vavaiva navo, vakandovudza vapositora izvozvo." 
Luke24:11 Mashoko awa akaita sengano dzisina maturo kwavari; vakasaatenda. 
Luke24:12 Zvino Petro akasimuka, akamhanyira kubwiro; akadongorera akakotama, akavona micheka yerineni yakaradzikwa yoga; ndokudzoka, ashamiswa nezvakanga zvaitika." 
Luke24:13 Zvino tarira, pazuva irero vamwe vaviri vavo vakanga vachienda kumusha wainzi Emausi, wakanga uri kure neJerusarema masitadhia* anamakumi matanhatu;" 
Luke24:14 vakanga vachitaurirana pamusoro pezvinhu zvose zvakanga zvaitika. 
Luke24:15 Zvino zvakaitika kuti vachitaurirana nokubvunzana, Jesu amene akaswedera, akafamba navo," 
Luke24:16 asi meso avo akanga abatwa kuti vasamuziva. 
Luke24:17 Akati kwavari: Inhauriano dzeiko idzi dzamunadzo pakati penyu muchifamba makatsamwa? 
Luke24:18 Mumwe wavo, zita rake rainzi Kiriyopasi, akapindura, akati kwaari: Ko ndiwe woga mutorwa muJerusarema, usati aziva zvakaitikamo mazuva ano here?" 
Luke24:19 Akati kwavari: Zvinyiko? Vakati kwaari: Maererano naJesu weNazareta, waiva amuporofita unesimba pabasa napashoko pamberi paMwari napavanhu vose;" 
Luke24:20 uye kuti vaprista vakuru navatongi vedu vakamukumikidza sei kuvatongi kuti atongerwe rufu, vakamurovera." 
Luke24:21 Asi isu takanga tichivimba kuti ndiye waizodzikunura vaIsraeri. Asi pamusoro paizvozvo zvose, nhasi rava zuva retatu zvinhu izvi zvaitika." 
Luke24:22 Asi vamwe vakadzi vokwedu vatishamisa, vanga vafumira kubwiro;" 
Luke24:23 zvino vati vachishaiwa muviri wake, vakavuya vachiti vavona chiratidzo chavatumwa, vakati mupenyu." 
Luke24:24 Zvino vamwe vaiva nesu, vaenda kubwiro, vakandowana sezvanga zvarebwa navakadzi; asi iye havana kumuvona." 
Luke24:25 Zvino iye akati kwavari: Imwi vokusanzwisisa, munemoyo inononoka kutenda zvose zvakataurwa navaporofita!" 
Luke24:26 Ko Kristu wakanga asingafaniri kutambudzika zvinhu izvi, nokupinda pakubwinya kwake here?" 
Luke24:27 Ipapo akatanga kunaMozisi navaporofita vose, akadudzira kwavari magwaro ose zvinhu zviri maererano naye." 
Luke24:28 Zvino vakaswedera pedo nemusha kwavakanga vachienda; iye akaita sowoda kupfuvura. 
Luke24:29 Asi vakamugombedzera, vachiti: Garai nesu, nokuti ava madekwana, zuva raenda. Ipapo akapinda kundogara navo." 
Luke24:30 Zvino zvakaitika agere navo pakudya, akatora chingwa akaropafadza, akamedura ndokupa kwavari." 
Luke24:31 Ipapo meso avo akasvinudzwa, vakamuziva; akanyangarika pameso avo." 
Luke24:32 Vakataurirana \add vachiti\add*: Ko moyo yedu yakanga isingapisi mukati medu here paanga achitaura nesu munzira, nepaanga achitizarurira magwaro here?" 
Luke24:33 Vakasimuka nenguva iyoyo, vakadzokera Jerusarema, vakawana vanegumi nomumwe vakavungana pamwechete navaiva navo." 
Luke24:34 Vachiti: Ishe wamuka zvirokwazvo; wavonekwa naSimoni. 
Luke24:35 Vakarondedzera zvinhu \add zvakaitika\add* munzira, uye kuti wakazikamwa navo sei pakumedura chingwa." 
Luke24:36 Zvino vakati vachataura zvinhu izvozvi, Jesu amene akamira pakati pavo, akati kwavari: Rugare kwamuri." 
Luke24:37 Asi vakavhunduka, vakatya kwazvo, vakafunga kuti zvimwe vavona mweya." 
Luke24:38 Akati kwavari: Munotambudzika nemhaka yeiko? Mifungo inomukireiko mumoyo yenyu? 
Luke24:39 Tarirai zvanza zvangu netsoka dzangu, kuti ndini ndimene. Ndibatei, muvone, nokuti mweya haunenyama namafupa, sezvamunovona ini ndinazvo." 
Luke24:40 Zvino wakati areva izvozvo akavaratidza zvanza netsoka \add dzake\add*. 
Luke24:41 Zvino vakati vachigere kutenda nokufara vachishamiswa, akati kwavari: Munezvokudya pano here?" 
Luke24:42 Vakamupa nhindi yehove yakagochwa nezinga rovuchi. 
Luke24:43 Akatora akadya pamberi pavo. 
Luke24:44 Akati kwavari: Awa mashoko andakakuvudzai ndichiri nemwi, kuti zvinhu zvose zvinofanira kuzadziswa, zvakanyorwa pamurairo waMozisi, \add na\add*pavaporofita napaMapisarema pamusoro pangu." 
Luke24:45 Ipapo akadzivura kunzwisisa kwavo, kuti vanzwisise magwaro." 
Luke24:46 Akati kwavari: Ndizvo zvakanyorwa, uye Kristu unofanira kutambudzika, nokumuka kuvakafa zuva retatu;" 
Luke24:47 kuti kutendevuka nokukangamwirwa kwezvivi kunofanira kuparidzirwa marudzi ose muzita rake, kutanga paJerusarema." 
Luke24:48 Imwi muri zvapupu zvezvinhu izvi. 
Luke24:49 Zvino tarirai, ndinotuma chipikirwa chaBaba vangu pamusoro penyu; asi imwi garai muguta reJerusarema kusvikira mafukidzwa nesimba rinobva kumusoro." 
Luke24:50 Zvino akavatungamirira kunze kusvikira Bhetaniya, ndokusimudza mavoko ake akavaropafadza." 
Luke24:51 Zvino zvakaitika achavaropafadza, akaparadzana navo, akakwidzwa kudenga." 
Luke24:52 Ipapo vakamunamata, vakadzokera Jerusarema vanomufaro mukuru;" 
Luke24:53 vakarambira mutembere, vachirumbidza nokutenda Mwari." 
John1:1 Pakutanga Shoko wakanga aripo, Shoko wakanga anaMwari, Shoko wakanga ari Mwari." 
John1:2 Iyeyu wakanga anaMwari pakutanga. 
John1:3 Zvinhu zvose zvakaitwa naye, uye kunze kwake hakuna kunyange chinhu chimwe chakaitwa." 
John1:4 Upenyu bwaiva maari: upenyu bwaiva chiedza chavanhu," 
John1:5 nechiedza chinovhenekera murima; asi rima harina kuchigamuchira. 
John1:6 Kwakanga kunomunhu wakatumwa kubva kunaMwari, zita rake \add richinzi\add* Johwani." 
John1:7 Iye wakavuyira vuchapupu, ape vuchapupu bwechiedza, kuti vose vatende naye." 
John1:8 Uyo wakanga asati ari icho chiedza, \add asi\add* wakatumwa kuzopupura pamusoro pechiedza." 
John1:9 Ichi chaiva chiedza chechokwadi, chinovhenekera munhu mumwe nomumwe unovuya panyika." 
John1:10 Wakanga ari munyika nenyika yakaitwa naye, asi nyika haina kumuziva." 
John1:11 Wakavuya kunezvake, asi vokwake havana kumugamuchira." 
John1:12 Asi vose vakamugamuchira, iye wakavapa simba kuti vave vana vaMwari, kuna ivo vanotenda kuzita rake;" 
John1:13 avo vakaberekwa kwete neropa, kana nokuda kwenyama. Kana nokuda komurume, asi naMwari." 
John1:14 Shoko wakazova nyama, akagara pakati pedu, tikavona kubwinya kwake, kubwinya sokowakaberekwa mumwe chete wababa, azere nenyasha nechokwadi." 
John1:15 Johwani akamupupurira, akadanidzira achiti: Uyu ndiye wandaireva ndichiti; uyu unouya shure kwangu wakavapo mberi kwangu; nokuti wakanditangira." 
John1:16 Nokuti pakuzara kwake isu tose takagamuchira nyasha pamusoro penyasha. 
John1:17 Nokuti murairo wakapiwa naMozisi, nyasha nechokwadi zvakavuya naJesu Kristu." 
John1:18 Hakunomunhu wakatongovona Mwari chero nguva ipi, mwanakomana wakaberekwa mumwe woga, ari pachifuva chaBaba, ndiye wakamuzivisa." 
John1:19 Ubwu ndibwo vuchapupu bwaJohwani, apo vaJudha vakatuma vaprista navaRevhi, kubva Jerusarema kundomubvunza kuti: Iwe ndiwe aniko?" 
John1:20 Akatenda pachena, haana kuramba, akatenda pachena, \add achiti\add*: Handizi Kristu." 
John1:21 Vakamubvunza \add vachiti\add*: Asi kudiniko? Ndiwe Eria here? Akati: Handizi. Ko uri uya muporofita here? Akapindura \add akati\add*: Kwete," 
John1:22 Zvino vakati kwaari: Ndiwe aniko? Kuti tigondopindura vakatituma; unozviti aniko? 
John1:23 Akati: Ini \add ndini\add* inzwi rounodana murenje: Ruramisai nzira yaShe; sezvakarebwa nomuporofita Isaya. 
John1:24 Ava vakanga vatumwa vaiva vavaFarisi," 
John1:25 Vakamubvunza vakati kwaari: Unogobhabhatidzireiko kana iwe usi Kristu, kana Eria, kana muporofita uya?" 
John1:26 Johwani akavapindura achiti: Ini ndinobhabhatidza nemvura; asi pakati penyu pamire mumwe wamusingazivi; 
John1:27 ndiye unovuya shure kwangu, asi uri mberi kwangu, wandisina kufanira ini kuti ndisunungure rukanda rweshangu yake." 
John1:28 Izvozvi zvakaitika paBhetaniya, mhiri kwaJoridhani, kwaibhabhatidza Johwani." 
John1:29 Ava mangwana Johwani wakavona Jesu achivuya kwaari, akati: Tarirai, gwayana raMwari, rinobvisa rotakura zvivi zvenyika." 
John1:30 Uyu ndiye wandaitaura nezvake ndichiti: Shure kwangu kunovuya murume, wakavapo mberi kwangu, nokuti wakanditangira." 
John1:31 Neni ndakanga ndisingamuzivi; asi kuti aziviswe vaIsraeri, ndizvo zvandakavuyira, ndichibhabhatidza nemvura." 
John1:32 Johwani akapupura, achiti: Ndakavona Mweya achiburuka kudenga senjiva, akagara pamusoro pake." 
John1:33 Neni ndakanga ndisingamuzivi; asi wakandituma kubhabhatidza nemvura, ndiye wakati kwandiri: Uyo waunovona Mweya achiburuka pamusoro pake, nokugara pamusoro pake, ndiye unobhabhatidza noMweya Mutsvene." 
John1:34 Ini ndakavona ndikapupura kuti uyu ndiye Mwanakomana waMwari. 
John1:35 Ava mangwanazve Johwani wakanga amire navadzidzi vake vaviri; 
John1:36 akatarisisa Jesu achifamba, akati: Tarirai, gwayana raMwari!" 
John1:37 Vadzidzi vaviri, vakamunzwa achitaura, vakatevera Jesu." 
John1:38 Ipapo Jesu akatendevuka akavavona vachitevera, akati kwavari: Munotswakeiko? Ivo Vakati kwaari: Rabhi (ndokuti Mudzidzisi, kana zvichishandurwa), munogarepiko?" 
John1:39 Akati kwavari: Vuyai, muvone. Vakaenda vakandovona kwaaigara, vakagara naye zuva iroro; yakanga iri nguva inenge yegumi." 
John1:40 Mumwe wavaviri, vakanga vanzwa Johwani vakamutevera, vaiva Andiriyasi munun'una waSimoni Petro." 
John1:41 Akatanga kuwana mukoma wake Simoni, akati kwaari: Tawana Mesiasi (ndokuti Kristu, kana zvichishandurwa,)" 
John1:42 Akamuisa kunaJesu. Jesu akati amutarira, akati: Ndiwe Simoni, mwanakomana waJona, uchanzi Kefasi (ndiko kuti dombo kana zvichishandurwa.)" 
John1:43 Ava mangwana Jesu akada kuenda Gariri, akawana Firipi, akati kwaari: Nditevere." 
John1:44 Zvino Firipi wakanga ari weBhetisaidha, guta raAndiriyasi naPetro." 
John1:45 Firipi akawana Nataniyeri, akati kwaari: Tamuwana iye, wakanyorwa zvake naMozisi pamurairo navaporofita, Jesu weNazareta, mwanakomana waJosefa." 
John1:46 Nataniyeri akati kwaari: Kune chinhu chakanaka chingabuda muNazareta here? Firipi akati kwaari: Vuya uvone. 
John1:47 Jesu akavona Nataniyeri achivuya kwaari, akati pamusoro pake: Tarirai, muIsraeri wechokwadi, usinokunyengera maari." 
John1:48 Nataniyeri akati kwaari: Mandizivirepiko? Jesu akapindura, akati kwaari: Firipi asati akudana, pawanga uri munyasi momuvonde, ndakakuvona." 
John1:49 Nataniyeri akapindura, akati kwaari: Mudzidzisi, ndimwi Mwanakomana waMwari, ndimwi Ishe waIsraeri." 
John1:50 Jesu akapindura, akati kwaari: Unotenda nokuti ndati kwauri, ndakakuvona munyasi momuvonde here? Uchavona zvinhu zvikuru kunaizvozvi." 
John1:51 Akati kwaari: Zvirokwazvo, zvirokwazvo, ndinoti kwamuri: Kubva zvino muchavona kudenga kwazarurwa, navatumwa vaMwari vachikwira, nokuburukira pamusoro poMwanakomana womunhu." 
John2:1 Zvino nezuva retatu, mutambo wokuwana waivapo paKana yeGariri; namai vaJesu vakanga varipo." 
John2:2 NaJesuvo navadzidzi vake vakadamwa kumutambo wokuwana. 
John2:3 Waini yakati ichishaikwa, mai vaJesu vakati kwaari: Havana waini." 
John2:4 Jesu akati kwavari: Ndineiko newe, mukadzi? Nguva yangu ichigere kusvika." 
John2:5 Mai vake vakati kuvaranda: Zvose zvaanokuvudzai, muzviite." 
John2:6 Zvino kwakanga kwakaiswa zvirongo zvitanhatu zvamabwe, netsika yokunatsa yavaJudha, chimwe nechimwe chaizadzwa nezviyero zviviri kana zvitatu." 
John2:7 Jesu akati kwavari: Zadzai zvirongo nemvura. Vakazvizadza kusvikira pamiromo. 
John2:8 Akati kwavari: Cherai zvino mukumikidze kumubati womutambo. Vakaita saizvozvo. 
John2:9 Mubati womutambo wakati aravira mvura ikava waini, asingazivi payabva, (asi varanda, vakanga vachera mvura, vaiziva), mukuru womutambo akadana chikomba," 
John2:10 akati kwaari: Munhu mumwe nomumwe pakutanga unopa waini yakanaka, neisinganaki kana vamwa kwazvo, asi iwe wachengeta waini yakanaka kusvikira zvino." 
John2:11 Ndiko kutanga kwezvishamiso kwakaitwa naJesu paKana yeGariri, akaratidza kubwinya kwake; vadzidzi vake vakatenda kwaari." 
John2:12 Shure kwaizvozvo wakaburukira Kapenaume, iye namai vake navanun'una vake, navadzidzi vake; akagarapo mazuva asiri mazvinji." 
John2:13 Zvino paseka yavaJudha yakanga yava pedo, Jesu akakwira Jerusarema." 
John2:14 Akawana mutembere avo vaitengesa mombe namakwai nenjiva, navatsinhanisi vemari vagere." 
John2:15 Zvino wakati aruka tyava yorwonzi rudiki, akavabudisa vose mutembere, namakwai nemombe; akatevura mari yavatsinhanisi, ndokukwidibira matafura avo." 
John2:16 Akati kuna vaitengesa njiva: Bvisai zvinhu izvi pano; musaita imba yaBaba vangu imba yokutengesera. 
John2:17 Vadzidzi vake vakarangarira kuti kwakanyorwa \add kuchinzi\add*: Kushingairira imba yenyu kwakandipedza. 
John2:18 Zvino vaJudha vakapindura, vakati kwaari: Ungatiratidza chiratidzo cheiko, chokuti unoita zvinhu izvi?" 
John2:19 Jesu akapindura, akati kwavari: Putsai tembere iyi, uye namazuva matatu ndichaimutsa." 
John2:20 Ipapo vaJudha vakati: Makore anamakumi mana namatanhatu tembere iyi ichivakwa, zvino iwe ungaimutsa namazuva matatu here?" 
John2:21 Asi iye waireva zvetembere yomuviri wake. 
John2:22 Zvino wakati amutswa kuvakafa, vadzidzi vake vakarangarira, kuti wakanga areva izvozvi kwavari; vakatenda magwaro neshoko rakanga rarebwa naJesu." 
John2:23 Zvino wakati ava muJerusarema papaseka pamutambo, vazhinji vakatenda kuzita rake, pavakavona zviratidzo zvaaiita." 
John2:24 Asi Jesu haana kuzvikumikidza kwavari, nokuti wakanga achivaziva vose." 
John2:25 Wakanga asingatsvaki kuti ani nani apupure zvomunhu; nokuti wakanga achiziva zvakanga zviri mumunhu. 
John3:1 Kwaivapo nomumwe murume wavaFarisi, Nikodhimo riri zita rake, mutungamiriri wavaJudha." 
John3:2 Iye wakavuya kuna Jesu vusiku, akati kwaari: Mudzidzisi, tinoziva kuti muri Mudzidzisi wakabva kunaMwari; nokuti hakuna munhu unogona kuita zvishamiso izvi zvamunoita, kunze kokuti Mwari anaye." 
John3:3 Jesu akapindura akati kwaari: Zvirokwazvo, zvirokwazvo, ndinoti kwauri: Kunze kokuti munhu aberekwa kutsva, haangavoni ushe bwaMwari." 
John3:4 Nikodhimo akati kwaari: Munhu ungagoberekwa seiko ava mukuru? Ungapinda rwechipiri mudumbu ramai vake agoberekwa here? 
John3:5 Jesu akapindura, \add akati\add*: Zvirokwazvo, zvirokwazvo, ndinoti kwauri: Kunze kokuti munhu aberekwa nemvura noMweya, haangagoni kupinda muushe bwaMwari." 
John3:6 Icho chakaberekwa nenyama inyama; nechakaberekwa noMweya, mweya." 
John3:7 Usashamiswa nokuti ndati kwauri: Unofanira kuberekwa kutsva? 
John3:8 Mhepo inovhuvhuta painoda napo, unonzwa inzwi rayo, asi hauzivi painobva napainoenda; ndizvo zvakaita mumwe nomumwe wakaberekwa noMweya." 
John3:9 Nikodhimo akapindura, akati kwaari: Zvinhu izvi zvingagoitika seiko?" 
John3:10 Jesu akapindura, akati kwaari: Iwe uri mudzidzisi wavaIsraeri asi haunzwisisi zvinhu izvozvi here?" 
John3:11 Zvirokwazvo, zvirokwazvo, ndinoti kwauri: Tinotaura zvatinoziva tichipupura zvatakavona; asi imwi hamugamuchiri vuchapupu bwedu." 
John3:12 Kana ndakakuvudzai zvinhu zvenyika, mukasatenda, mungagotenda seiko, kana ndichikuvudzai zvinhu zvokudenga?" 
John3:13 uye hakuna munhu wakakwira kudenga, asi iye wakaburuka kubva kudenga, Mwanakomana womunhu uri kudenga." 
John3:14 Zvekare Mozisi sezvaakasimudza nyoka murenje, saizvozvovo Mwanakomana womunhu unofanira kusimudzwa," 
John3:15 kuti aninani unotenda kwaari, arege kuparara asi ave noupenyu bwusingaperi." 
John3:16 Nokuti Mwari wakada nyika zvakadai, kuti wakapa Mwanakomana wake wakaberekwa \add ari\add* mumwe woga, kuti aninani unotenda kwaari, arege kuparara, asi ave noupenyu bwusingaperi." 
John3:17 Nokuti Mwari haana kutumira Mwanakomana wake panyika, kuti ape nyika mhosva, asi kuti nyika nokuda kwake iponeswe." 
John3:18 Unotenda kwaari, haapiwi mhosva; asi usingatendi, watopiwa mhoswa, nokuti haana kutenda kuzita roMwanakomana waMwari wakaberekwa \add ari\add* mumwe woga." 
John3:19 Uku ndiko kupiwa mhosva, kuti chiedza chakasvika panyika, asi vanhu vakada rima pane chiedza, nokuti mabasa avo akanga akaipa." 
John3:20 Nokuti mumwe nomumwe unoita zvakaipa unovenga chiedza, uye haavuyi pachiedza, kuti mabasa ake arege kusvorwa." 
John3:21 Asi unoita chokwadi unovuya pachiedza, kuti mabasa ake aratidzwe kuti akaitwa munaMwari" 
John3:22 Shure kwaizvozvo Jesu navadzidzi vake vakasvika munyika yeJudhiya, ipapo akagara navo achibhabhatidza." 
John3:23 NaJohwani wakanga achibhabhatidzavo muAinoni pedo neSarimi, nokuti paiva nemvura zhinji ipapo; vakavuya vakabhabhatidzwa." 
John3:24 Nokuti Johwani wakanga achigere kukandwa mutirongo. 
John3:25 Zvino nharo dzikamuka pakati pavadzidzi vaJohwani navaJudha pamusoro pokuzvinatsa. 
John3:26 Vakavuya kuna Johwani, vakati kwaari: Mudzidzisi, uya waiva nemwi mhiri kwaJorodhani, wamaimbopupurira, tarirai, ndiye unobhabhatidza, uye vose vanoenda kwaari." 
John3:27 Johwani akapindura, akati: Munhu haangagamuchiri chinhu, kunze kokuti chapiwa kwaari kubva kudenga." 
John3:28 Imwi mumene munondipupurira, kuti ndakati: Handizi Kristu ini, asi kuti ndakatumwa pamberi pake." 
John3:29 Uyo unomwenga ndiye chikomba; asi shamwari yechikomba inomira ichimunzwa, inofara zvikuru nekuda kwenzwi rechikomba. Mufaro wangu uyu wazadziswa." 
John3:30 Iye unofanira kukura, asi ini kudukupiswa." 
John3:31 Unobva kumusoro ndiye uri pamusoro pezvose. Unobva panyika ndowenyika, unotaura zvenyika; unobva kudenga ndiye uri pamusoro pezvose." 
John3:32 Zvaakavona nezvaakanzwa, ndizvo zvaanopupura; asi hakuna munhu unogamuchira kupupura kwake." 
John3:33 Uyo wakagamuchira kupupura kwake, wakasimbisa kuti Mwari ndowechokwadi." 
John3:34 Nokuti wakatumwa naMwari, ndiye unotaura mashoko aMwari; nokuti haapi Mweya nechiyero." 
John3:35 Baba vanoda Mwanakomana, vakapa zvose muruvoko rwake." 
John3:36 Unotenda kuMwanakomana, unoupenyu bwusingaperi; asi usingateereri Mwanakomana, haangavoni upenyu, asi kutsamwa kwaMwari kunogara pamusoro pake." 
John4:1 Zvino Ishe wakati aziva kuti vaFarisi vakanga vanzwa kuti Jesu wakaita nokubhabhatidza vadzidzi vakawanda kupfuvura Johwani," 
John4:2 kunyange Jesu pachake wakanga asingabhabhatidzi, asi vadzidzi vake," 
John4:3 akabva Judhiya, akaendazve muGariri." 
John4:4 Asi wakanga achifanira kupfuvura neSamaria. 
John4:5 Zvino wakasvika iye paguta reSamaria, rinonzi Sikari, pedo nenzvimbo yakanga yapa Jakobho mwanakomana wake Josefa." 
John4:6 Zvino tsime raJakobho rakanga riripo. Zvino Jesu aneta nokufamba wakagara zvake patsime. Yaiva nguva inenge yechitanhatu. 
John4:7 Ipapo kwakasvika mukadzi weSamaria kuzochera mvura; Jesu akati kwaari: Ndipevo ndimwe. 
John4:8 (Nokuti vadzidzi vake vakanga vaenda muguta kundotenga zvokudya). 
John4:9 Ipapo mukadzi muSamaria akati kwaari: Ko zvingaitika sei kuti iwe uri muJudha, ukumbire kumwa kwandiri, ini ndiri mukadzi muSamaria? Nokuti vaJudha havadyidzani navaSamaria." 
John4:10 Jesu akapindura, akati kwaari: Dai waiziva chipo chaMwari, uye kuti ndiani unoti kwauri: Ndipevo ndimwe; ungadai waikumbira kwaari, uye ungadai akupa mvura mhenyu." 
John4:11 Mukadzi akati kwaari: Ishe, hamuna chinhu chamungachera nacho, uye tsime rakadzika, zvino mungaiwanepiko mvura mhenyu?" 
John4:12 Ko muri mukuru kuna baba vedu Jakobho, vakatipa tsime \add iri\add*, vakamwa pariri vamene navana vavo nenzombe dzavo here?" 
John4:13 Jesu akapindura, akati kwaari: Mumwe nomumwe, unomwa mvura iyi, uchava nenyotazve." 
John4:14 Asi aninani, unomwa mvura yandichamupa ini, haachazovi nenyota nokusingaperi asi mvura, yandichamupa, ichava maari tsime remvura, inovhaira kusvika kuupenyu bwusingaperi." 
John4:15 Mukadzi akati kwaari: Ishe, ndipei mvura iyi, kuti ndirege kuzova nenyota, kana kuvuya pano kuzochera." 
John4:16 Jesu akati kwaari: Enda, undodana murume wako, ugovuya pano." 
John4:17 Mukadzi akapindura, akati: Handina murume. Jesu akati kwaari: Wareva zvakanaka, \add zvawati\add*: Handina murume." 
John4:18 Nokuti watova navarume vashanu, uyo waunaye zvino haazi murume wako; apo wareva chokwadi." 
John4:19 Mukadzi akati kwaari: Ishe, ndinovona kuti muri muporofita." 
John4:20 Madzibaba edu ainamata mugomo iri; asi imwi munoti muJerusarema ndimo muzvimbo munhu maanofanira kushumira. 
John4:21 Jesu akati kwaari: Mai, nditendei, kuti nguva inovuya, yamusingazonamati Baba mugomo iri, kana paJerusarema." 
John4:22 Imwi munonamata chamusingazivi; isu tinonamata chatinoziva; nokuti ruponeso runobva kuvaJudha. 
John4:23 Asi nguva inovuya, nazvino yatova iyo, apo vashumiri vechokwadi vachashumira Baba mumweya nemuchokwadi; nokuti Baba vanotsvaka vakadaro kuti vamunamate." 
John4:24 Mwari Mweya; naavo vanomunamata, vanofanira kunamata mumweya nemuchokwadi." 
John4:25 Mukadzi akati kwaari: Ndinoziva kuti Mesiasi unovuya unonzi Kristu; kana iye asvika, uchativudza zvinhu zvose." 
John4:26 Jesu akati kwaari: Ini, ndinotaura kwauri, ndini." 
John4:27 Zvino nenguva iyoyo vadzidzi vake vakasvika, vakashamiswa kuti unotaura nomukadzi; kunyange zvakadaro hakuno mumwe wakati: Munotsvakeiko? Kana: Munotaurireiko naye?" 
John4:28 Ipapo mukadzi akasiya chirongo chake, akaenda muguta, akati kuvanhu:" 
John4:29 Vuyai muvone munhu, wakandivudza zvinhu zvose zvandakaita. Ko uyu haasi iye Kristu here?" 
John4:30 Zvino vakabuda muguta, vakaenda kwaari." 
John4:31 Nenguva iyo vadzidzi vake vakafanomunyengetedza, vachiti: Mudzidzisi, idyai." 
John4:32 Asi iye akati kwavari: Ini ndine zvokudya zvandinodya, zvamusingazivi," 
John4:33 zvino vadzidzi vakataurirana, \add vachiti\add*: kune mumwe wamuvigira zvokudya kanhi?" 
John4:34 Jesu akati kwavari: Zvokudya zvangu kuita kuda kwaiye wakandituma, nokupedza basa rake." 
John4:35 Ko imwi hamuti: Kwasara mwedzi mina, \add kuti\add* kukohwa kusvike? Tarirai, ini ndinoti kwamuri: Simudzai meso enyu, mutarire kuminda, kuti yatochena yamirira kukohwa." 
John4:36 Unokohwa unopiwa mubairo, unovunganidza zvibereko muupenyu bwusingaperi; kuti vose unokusha nounokohwa vafare pamwechete." 
John4:37 Nokuti pano iyi shumo ndeyechokwadi, inoti: Mumwe unokusha, mumwe achikohwa." 
John4:38 Ndakakutumai kundokohwa zvamusakabatira; vamwe vakabata, zvino imwi mapinda pabasa ravo" 
John4:39 Zvino vaSamaria veguta iro vakatenda kwaari nekuda kweshoko romukadzi wakapupura, \add achiti\add*: Wandivudza zvose zvandakaita." 
John4:40 Zvino vaSamaria vakati vachisvika kwaari, vakamunyengetera kuti agare navo; akagarapo mazuva maviri." 
John4:41 Navamwezve vazhinji vakatenda nekuda kweshoko rake. 
John4:42 Vakati kumukadzi: Ikozvino hatichatendi nokureva kwako; nokuti tazvinzwira timene, tinoziva kuti uyu ndiye zvirokwazvo Kristu Muponesi wenyika." 
John4:43 Zvino mazuva maviri akati apfuvura akabvapo, akaenda Gariri." 
John4:44 Nokuti Jesu amene wakapupura kuti muporofita haana rukudzo munyika yake. 
John4:45 Zvino wakati achisvika Gariri, vaGariri vakamugamuchira, nokuti vakanga vavona zvinhu zvose zvaakaita Jerusarema pamutambo, nokuti naivo vakanga vaendavo kumutambo." 
John4:46 Zvino Jesu wakasvikazve paKana yeGariri, paakanga aita mvura \add ive\add* waini. Zvino ipapo pakanga pane rimwe jinda, mwanakomana waro wakanga achirwara paKapenaume." 
John4:47 rakati richinzwa kuti Jesu wabva Judhiya, wasvika Gariri, rikaenda kwaari, rikamugombedzera kuti aburukire kuzoporesa mwanakomana waro; nokuti wakanga wotandadza." 
John4:48 Zvino Jesu akati kwariri: Kunze kokuti mavona zviratidzo nezvishamiso, hamungatongotendi." 
John4:49 Jinda rikati kwaari: Ishe, burukai henyu, mwana wangu asati afa." 
John4:50 Jesu akati kwaari: Enda hako, mwanakomana wako mupenyu. Munhu uyu akatenda shoko rakarebwa naJesu kwaari, akaenda." 
John4:51 Zvino wakati oburuka, varanda vake vakamuchingamidza vaka\add mu\add*vudza, vachiti: Mwana wenyu mupenyu." 
John4:52 Zvino akavabvunza nguva yaakatanga kunaya nayo. Vakati kwaari: Zuro nenguva yechinomwe fivhiri yakabva kwaari. 
John4:53 Zvino baba vakaziva kuti ndiyovo nguva Jesu yaakati kwaari: Mwanakomana wako mupenyu. Iye akatenda neimba yake yose. 
John4:54 Ichizve chishamiso chechipiri chakaitwa naJesu, abva Judhiya asvika Gariri." 
John5:1 Shure kwaizvozvo kwaiva nemutambo wavaJudha; Jesu akakwira Jerusarema. 
John5:2 Zvino paJerusarema pedo \add nesuvo\add* ramakwai paiva nedziva rinonzi Bhetisaidha nechiHebheru, rine mabiravira mashanu." 
John5:3 Mukati mawo makanga muvete chaunga chavairwara namapofu, zvirema, navakawonyana, vakamirira kubvongodzwa kwemvura." 
John5:4 Nokuti mutumwa waiburukira neimwe nguva mudziva iro, achibvongodza mvura; zvino aninani waitanga kupinda shure kokubvongodzwa kwemvura waiporeswa, pachirwere chipi zvacho chaaiva nacho." 
John5:5 Zvino kwaivapo mumwe munhu, wakanga anechifo kwamakore makumi matatu namasere." 
John5:6 Jesu wakati amuvona avete, achiziva kuti wakanga \add akadaro\add* nguva huru, akati kwaari: Unoda kuporeswa here?" 
John5:7 Murwere akamupindura, \add akati\add*: Ishe, handina munhu, kana mvura ichibvongodzwa, unondiwisira mudziva; asi kana kana ndoenda, mumwe unoburukira mberi kwangu." 
John5:8 Jesu akati kwaari: Simuka, tora nhovo yako, ufambe." 
John5:9 Pakarepo munhu uyo akaporeswa, akatora nhovo dzake akafamba. Musi uwoyo waiva sabata." 
John5:10 Zvino vaJudha vakati kunowakaporeswa: Isabata, hazvisi pamutemo kuti utakure nhovo." 
John5:11 Iye akavapindura, \add akati\add*: Uyo wandiporesa ndiye wati kwandiri: Tora nhovo yako, ufambe?" 
John5:12 Vakamubvunza, \add vachiti\add*: Ndianiko munhu uyo unoti kwauri: Tora nhovo yako, ufambe?" 
John5:13 Zvino wakanga aporeswa haana kuziva kuti ndiani; nokuti Jesu wakanga abva, zvakwaiva nechaunga panzvimbo \add iyoyo\add*." 
John5:14 Shure kwezvinhu izvi Jesu akamuwana mutembere, akati kwaari: Tarira iwe waporeswa; usatadzazve, zvimwe chinhu chakaipa nokupfuvurisa chingakubata." 
John5:15 Munhu akabva akandovudza vaJudha kuti ndiJesu wakamuporesa. 
John5:16 Saka naizvozvo vaJudha vakatambudza Jesu, vakatsvaka kumuvuraya, nokuti wakaita zvinhu izvi nesabata." 
John5:17 Asi Jesu wakavapindura, \add akati\add*: Baba vangu vanoshanda kusvikira zvino, neni ndinoshandavo." 
John5:18 Naizvozvo vaJudha vakawedzera kutsvaka kumuvuraya, nokuti wakanga asingadariki sabata bedzi, asi wakativo Mwari ndiBaba vake, achizvienzanisa naMwari." 
John5:19 Zvino Jesu akapindura, akati kwavari: Zvirokwazvo, zvirokwazvo, ndinoti kwamuri: Mwanakomana haagoni kuita chinhu chomusoro wake, kana asingavoni Baba vachichiita; nokuti zvose zvavanoita ndizvo zvinoitavo Mwanakomana." 
John5:20 Nokuti Baba vanoda Mwanakomana, vanomuratidza zvose zvavanoita ivo; vachamuratidza mabasa makuru anopfuvura awa, kuti mushamiswe." 
John5:21 Nokuti Baba sezvavanomutsa vakafa, vachivararamisa, saizvozvo Mwanakomana unoraramisavo vaanoda." 
John5:22 Nokuti naBaba havatongi munhu, asi vakapa Mwanakomana kutonga kose," 
John5:23 kuti vose vakudze Mwanakomana sezvavanokudza baba. Usingakudzi Mwanakomana, haakudzi naBaba, vakamutuma." 
John5:24 Zvirokwazvo, zvirokwazvo, ndinoti kwamuri: Unonzwa shoko rangu, nokutenda kunowakandituma, unoupenyu bwusingaperi; haasviki mukupiwa mhosva, asi wapfuvura murufu, waenda muupenyu." 
John5:25 Zvirokwazvo, zvirokwazvo, ndinoti kwamuri: Nguva inovuya, nazvino yatovapo, apo vakafa vachanzwa inzwi roMwanakomana waMwari; uye vanonzwa vachararama." 
John5:26 Nokuti baba sezvavanoupenyu mavari, saizvozvovo vakapa Mwanakomana kuti ave noupenyu maari." 
John5:27 Uye vakamupa simba rokutongavo, nokuti Mwanakomana womunhu." 
John5:28 Musashamiswa nezvizvi; nokuti nguva inovuya, apo vose vari mumabwiro vachanzwa inzwi rake," 
John5:29 zvino vachabuda avo vakaita zvakanaka, mukumukira muupenyu avo vakaita zvakaipa, mukumukira mukurashiwa." 
John5:30 Handigoni kuita chinhu chomusoro wangu; sezvandinonzwa, ndinotonga; uye kutonga kwangu kwakarurama, nokuti handitsvaki kuda kwangu, asi kuda kwaBaba vakandituma." 
John5:31 Kana ndichizvipupurira, kupupura kwangu hakuzi kwechokwadi." 
John5:32 Uripo mumwe unondipupurira; ndinoziva kuti kupupura kwake kwaanondipupurira ndokwechokwadi 
John5:33 Makatuma Johwani, iye akapupurira chokwadi." 
John5:34 Ini handigamuchiri kupupura kunobva kumunhu, asi ndinoreva zvinhu izvi kuti muponeswe." 
John5:35 Iye wakanga achipfuta, ari mwenje unopfuta nokuvhenekera; imwi makanga muchishuva kufara kwechinguvana muchiedza chake." 
John5:36 Asi ini ndinevuchapupu vukuru \add bwa\add*Johwani; nokuti mabasa andakapiwa naBaba kuti ndiapedze, ndiwo mabasa andinoita, anondipupurira kuti Baba vakandituma." 
John5:37 NaBaba pachavo vakandituma, vakandipupurira. Hamuna kutongorinzwa inzwi rake, kana kuvona chimiro chake." 
John5:38 Uye hamuna shoko rake rinogara mamuri, nokuti uyo waakatuma, hamuna kutenda kwaari." 
John5:39 Nzverai magwaro, nokuti maari, munofunga kuti mune upenyu bwusingaperi ndiwo anondipupurira ini." 
John5:40 Asi hamudi kuvuya kwandiri, kuti muve noupenyu." 
John5:41 Handigamuchiri rukudzo kubva kuvanhu; 
John5:42 asi ndinokuzivai, kuti hamunorudo rwaMwari mamuri." 
John5:43 Ini ndakavuya muzita raBaba vangu, asi imwi hamuna kundigamuchira; kana mumwe akasvika muzita rake, muchamugamuchira iye." 
John5:44 Mungatenda seiko imwi munogamuchira rukudzo mumwe kunomumwe, asi musingatsvaki rukudzo rwunobva kunaMwari oga?" 
John5:45 Musati ndichakupomerai mhosva kuna Baba; mumwe uriko unokupomerai mhosva, \add ndiye\add* Mozisi wamunovimba naye." 
John5:46 Nokuti dai maitenda Mozisi, mungadai mainditenda ini, nokuti iye wakanyora nezvangu." 
John5:47 Asi kana musingatendi magwaro ake, mungatenda seiko mashoko angu?" 
John6:1 Shure kwezvinhu izvi Jesu wakaenda mhiri kwegungwa reGariri, ndiro reTibheriasi." 
John6:2 Zvino chaunga chikamutevera, nokuti vakavona zvishamiso zvaaiita kuvarwere." 
John6:3 Jesu akakwira mugomo, ipapo akagara anavadzidzi vake." 
John6:4 Zvino paseka mutambo wavaJudha, wakanga wava pedo." 
John6:5 Zvino Jesu paakasimudza meso, wakavona chaunga chikuru chichivuya kwaari, akati kuna Firipi: Tingatengepiko zvingwa, kuti vanhu ava vadye?" 
John6:6 Wakareva izvozvo achimuidza, nokuti iye amene waiziva zvaakanga achida kuita." 
John6:7 Firipi akamupindura \add achiti\add*: Zvingwa zvamadenari* anamazana maviri hazvingavaringani, kuti mumwe nomumwe atore chimedu." 
John6:8 Mumwe wavadzidzi vake, Andiriyasi, munun'una waSimoni Petro, akati kwaari:" 
John6:9 Pano pane kamukomana, kanezvingwa zvishanu zvebhari nehove mbiri duku; asi zvingava zvinyiko kuvazhinji vakadai?" 
John6:10 Asi Jesu wakati: Garisai vanhu pasi. Zvino kwakanga kunovuswa vuzhinji panzvimbo iyo. Naizvozvo varume vakagara pasi, muvuwandu vainge zvuru zvishanu." 
John6:11 Zvino Jesu akatora zvingwa; akati avonga, akagovanisa vadzidzi vadzidzi \add vakagovanisa\add* vakanga vagere pasi; nehovevo saizvozvo pavaida napo." 
John6:12 Zvino vakati vaguta, akati kuvadzidzi vake; Vunganidzai zvimedu zvakasara, kuti kurege kurashika chinhu." 
John6:13 Naizvozvo vakazvivunganidza pamwechete, vakazadza matengu anegumi namaviri nezvimedu zvezvingwa zvishanu zvebari, zvakanga zvasara kuna vakadya." 
John6:14 Zvino vanhu avo vakati vavona chishamiso chakaitwa naJesu, vakati: Zvirokwazvo uyu ndiye uya muporofita, unofanira kuvuya panyika." 
John6:15 Zvino Jesu, zvaakaziva kuti voda kuvuya kuzomubata nesimba, kuzomuita mambo, akabvazve akaenda mugomo ari oga." 
John6:16 Zvino ava madekwana, vadzidzi vake vakaburukira kugungwa," 
John6:17 vakapinda muchikepe, vakatanga kuyambuka gungwa kuenda Kapenaume. Zvino kwakanga kwasviba, asi Jesu wakanga asati asvika kwavari." 
John6:18 Gungwa rikatanga kumutswa nemhepo huru yaivhuvhuta. 
John6:19 Zvino vakati vakwasva zvikuru masitadhiya* anenge makumi maviri namashanu kana makumi matatu, vakavona Jesu achifamba pamusoro pegungwa, achiswedera pedo nechikepe; vakatya." 
John6:20 Asi iye wakati kwavari: Ndini, musatya." 
John6:21 Zvino vakafara kumugamuchira muchikepe, pakarepo chikepe chikasvika kunyika kwavakanga vachienda." 
John6:22 Fume mangwana chaunga chakanga chimire kune rumwe rutivi rwegungwa, pachakavona kuti pakanga pasina chimwe chikepe chiduku ipapo, kunze kwechimwe makanga mapinda vadzidzi vake, machiri, uye kuti Jesu haana kupinda navadzidzi vake muchikepe chidiki, asi vadzidzi vake vakaenda voga." 
John6:23 Asi kwakasvika zvimwe zvikepe zvidiki zvaibva Tibheriyasi pedo nenzvimbo pavakambodyira zvingwa, mushure mokunge Ishe ambovonga." 
John6:24 Zvino naizvozvo chaunga chakati chavona, kuti Jesu haapo, kana vadzidzi vake, vakapindavo vamene muzvikepe zvidiki, vakasvika Kapenaume, vachitsvaka Jesu." 
John6:25 Zvino vakati vamuwana kune rumwe rutivi rwegungwa, vakati kwaari: Mudzidzisi, masvika pano rinhiko?" 
John6:26 Jesu akavapindura, akati: Zvirokwazvo, zvirokwazvo, ndinoti kwamuri: Hamunditsvaki nokuti makavona zvishamiso, asi nokuti makadya zvingwa mukaguta." 
John6:27 Musashandira zvokudya zvinoparara, asi zvokudya zvinogara kusvika kuupenyu bwusingaperi, zvamuchapiwa noMwanakomana womunhu; nokuti Mwari Baba, vakaisa chisimbiso kwaari." 
John6:28 Zvino ivo vakati kwaari: Tichaiteiko, kuti tibate mabasa aMwari?" 
John6:29 Jesu akapindura akati kwavari: Iri ndiro basa raMwari, kuti mutende kuna iye waakatuma." 
John6:30 Naizvozvo vakati kwaari: Munoita chiratidzo chipiko zvino kuti tivone, tikutendei? Imwi munobateiko?" 
John6:31 Madzibaba edu akadya mana* murenje, sezvazvakanyorwa, \add zvichinzi\add*: Wakavapa chingwa chakabva kudenga, kuti vadye." 
John6:32 Zvino Jesu akati kwavari: Zvirokwazvo, zvirokwazvo, ndinoti kwamuri: Mozisi haana kukupai chingwa chakabva kudenga, asi ndiBaba vangu vanokupai chingwa chechokwadi, chinobva kudenga." 
John6:33 Nokuti chingwa chaMwari ndiye unoburuka achibva kudenga, achipa upenyu kunyika." 
John6:34 Zvino vakati kwaari: Ishe, garai muchitipa chingwa ichi." 
John6:35 Jesu akati kwavari: Ndini chingwa choupenyu; uyo unovuya kwandiri, haangatongovi nenzara, nounotenda kwandiri haangatongovi nenyota." 
John6:36 Asi ndakati kwamuri: Nemwivo makandivona, asi hamutendi." 
John6:37 Zvose Baba zvavanondipa zvichavuya kwandiri; nounovuya kwandiri, handingatongomudzingiri kunze." 
John6:38 Nokuti handina kuburuka kubva kudenga, kuti ndiite kuda kwangu, asi kuda kwaiye wakandituma." 
John6:39 Uku ndiko kuda kwababa vakandituma, kuti pazvose zvaakandipa, ndisarasikirwa nechinhu, asi kuti ndichimutse nezuva rokupedzisira." 
John6:40 Uye ndiko kuda kowakandituma, kuti mumwe nomumwe, unotarira Mwanakomana, nokutenda kwaari, ave noupenyu bwusingaperi; neni ndichamumutsa nezuva rokupedzisira." 
John6:41 Zvino vaJudha vakagunun'una pamusoro pake, nokuti wakati: Ndini chingwa chakaburuka kubva kudenga." 
John6:42 Vakati: Uyu haazi Jesu Mwanakomana waJosefa, baba namai vake vatinoziva here? Zvino ungagoti seiko: Ndakaburuka kubva kudenga." 
John6:43 Jesu akapindura naizvozvo, akati kwavari: Musagunun'una pakati penyu." 
John6:44 Hakuna munhu ungavuya kwandiri, kunze kokuti Baba vakandituma vamukweva; neni ndichamumutsa nezuva rokupedzisira." 
John6:45 Zvakanyorwa muvaporofita \add zvichinzi\add*: Vachadzidziswa vose naMwari. Mumwe nomumwe naizvozvo wakanzwa akadzidza naBaba, unovuya kwandiri." 
John6:46 Kwete kuti kune munhu wakavona Baba; kunze kweuyo unobva kunaMwari, ndiye wakavona Baba." 
John6:47 Zvirokwazvo, zvirokwazvo, ndinoti kwamuri: Unotenda, kwandiri unoupenyu bwusingaperi." 
John6:48 Ndini chingwa icho choupenyu. 
John6:49 Madzibaba enyu akadya mana* murenje, akafa." 
John6:50 ichi ndicho chingwa chinoburuka kubva kudenga, kuti munhu achidye agorega kufa." 
John6:51 Ndini chingwa chipenyu, chakaburuka kubva kudenga; kana munhu achidya chingwa ichi, uchararama nokusingaperi. Chingwa chandichapa inyama yangu, yandichapa bwuve upenyu bwenyika." 
John6:52 Naizvozvo vaJudha vakakakavadzana pakati pavo vachiti: Munhu uyu ungatipa seiko nyama tidye? 
John6:53 Naizvozvo Jesu akati kwavari: Zvirokwazvo, zvirokwazvo, ndinoti kwamuri: Kunze kokuti madya nyama yoMwanakomana womunhu, uye mamwa ropa rake, hamunoupenyu mamuri." 
John6:54 Aninani unodya nyama yangu, nokumwa ropa rangu, unoupenyu bwusingaperi; uye ini ndichamumutsa nezuva rokupedzisira." 
John6:55 Nokuti nyama yangu izvokudya zirokwazvo, neropa rangu izvokumwa zvirokwazvo." 
John6:56 Unodya nyama yangu, nokumwa ropa rangu, unogara mandiri, neni maari." 
John6:57 Baba vapenyu sezvavakandituma, neni ndinorarama naBaba; saizvozvo unondidya, naiyevo uchararama neni." 
John6:58 Ichi ndicho chingwa chiya chakaburuka kubva kudenga; hazvina kuita samadzibaba enyu akadya mana* akafa; unodya chingwa ichi uchararama nokusingaperi. 
John6:59 Zvinhu izvi wakazvireva musinagoge, achidzidzisa paKapenaume." 
John6:60 Naizvozvo vazhinji vavadzidzi vake vakati vachinzwa, vakati: Iri shoko igukutu; ndianiko ungarinzwa?" 
John6:61 Asi Jesu, aziva mumoyo make kuti vadzidzi vake vanon'un'una nazvo, wakati kwavari: Izvi zvinokugumbusai kanhi?" 
John6:62 \add Muchagodiniko\add* kana muchivona Mwanakomana womunhu achikwira kwaaiva pakutanga? 
John6:63 Mweya ndiye unoraramisa, nyama haibatsiri chinhu; mashoko andinotaura kwamuri, ndiwo mweya noupenyu." 
John6:64 Asi variko vamwe venyu vasingatendi nokuti Jesu wakanga achiziva kubva pakutanga, kuti ndivanaani vaisatenda, uye kuti ndiani waizomutengesa," 
John6:65 Akati: Naizvozvo ndati kwamuri: Hakuna munhu ungavuya kwandiri, kunze kokuti azvipiwa naBaba." 
John6:66 Kubva ipapo vazhinji vavadzidzi vake vakadzokera shure, vakasazofambazve naye," 
John6:67 Jesu akati kuna vanegumi navaviri: nemwi munoda kuendavo here? 
John6:68 Zvino Simoni Petro akamupindura, \add akati\add*: Ishe, tichagoenda kunaaniko? Ndimwi muna mashoko oupenyu bwusingaperi," 
John6:69 Isu tinotenda, uye tine chokwadi kuti ndimwi uya Kristu Mwanakomana waMwari mupenyu." 
John6:70 Jesu akapindura \add akati\add*: Ini handina kukusanangurai, imwi vanegumi navaviri here? asi mumwe wenyu ndiDhiabhurosi." 
John6:71 Waireva Judhasi, Isikarioti, waSimoni, nokuti iye ndiye waizomutengesa, ari mumwe wavanegumi navaviri." 
John7:1 Shure kwezvinhu izvi Jesu wakafamba muGariri; nokuti wakanga asingadi kufamba muJudhiya, nokuti vaJudha vakanga vachitsvaka kumuvuraya." 
John7:2 Zvino mutambo wavaJudha wamatumba wakanga wava pedo. 
John7:3 Naizvozvo vanun'una vake vakati kwaari: Ibvai pano, muende Judhiya, kuti vadzidzi venyu vavonevo mabasa enyu amunoita." 
John7:4 Nokuti hakuna munhu unoita chinhu muchivande, kana iye amene achitsvaka kuzikamwa pachena. Kana iwe uchiita zvinhu izvi, zviratidze kunyika." 
John7:5 Nokuti kunyange navanun'una vake vakanga vasingatendi kwaari. 
John7:6 Naizvozvo Jesu akati kwavari: Nguva yangu ichigere kusvika; asi nguva yenyu inogara yakagadzirwa. 
John7:7 Nyika haingakuvengiyi imwi; asi ini inondivenga, nokuti ndinoipupurira, kuti mabasa ayo akaipa." 
John7:8 Kwirai imwi kumutambo uyu; ini handisati ndokwira kumutambo, nokuti nguva yangu ichigere kuzadzisika." 
John7:9 Wakati areva zvinhu izvozvi kwavari, wakagara Gariri." 
John7:10 Asi vanun'una vake vakati vakwira, iyevo pachake akabva okwira kumutambo, asingaendi pachena, asi panenge sapakavanda." 
John7:11 Zvino vaJudha vakamutsvaka pamutambo, vakati: Uripiko iye?" 
John7:12 Kun'un'una kukuru kukavapo pakati pechaunga pamusoro pake, vamwe vachiti: Wakanaka; asi vamwe vachiti: Kwete, asi unotsausa chaunga." 
John7:13 Kunyange zvakadaro kwakanga kusinomunhu waitaura pachena pamusoro pake, nokutya vaJudha." 
John7:14 Zvino kwakati pava pakati pomutambo, Jesu akakwira kutembere, akadzidzisa." 
John7:15 Naizvozvo vaJudha vakashamiswa, vachiti: Munhu uyu unoziva seiko magwaro, asina kumbodzidza?" 
John7:16 Jesu akavapindura, akati: Dzidziso yangu haizi yangu, asi yake wakandituma." 
John7:17 Kana munhu achida kuita kuda kwake, uchaziva zvedzidziso kana ichibva kunaMwari, kana kuti ndinotaura zvemusoro wangu." 
John7:18 Unozvitaurira nezvake, unotsvaka kurubidzwa kwake; asi unotsvaka kurumbidzwa kowakamutuma, ndiye wechokwadi, hapana kusarurama maari." 
John7:19 Mozisi haana kukupai murairo here? Asi hakunomumwe wenyu unochengeta murairo. Munotsvakireiko kundivuraya? 
John7:20 Chaunga chikapindira chikati: Unomweya wakaipa iwe; ndianiko unotsvaka kukuvuraya? 
John7:21 Jesu akapindura akati kwavari: Ndakaita basa rimwe, mukashamiswa mose." 
John7:22 Naizvozvo Mozisi wakakupai dzingiso, (kusiri kuti ndeyaMozisi, asi yamadzibaba); zvino imwi nemusi wesabata munodzingisa munhu." 
John7:23 Zvino kana munhu akagamuchira dzingiso nesabata, kuti murairo waMozisi urege kuputswa, ko imwi monditsamwira nokuti ndaporesa munhu zvakakwana nemusi wesabata here?" 
John7:24 Musatonga nezvinovonekwa, asi tongai kutonga kwakarurama." 
John7:25 Naizvozvo vamwe vaveJerusarema vakati: Ko haazi iye wavanotsvaka kuvuraya here? 
John7:26 Asi tarirai, unotaura pachena vasingarevi chinhu kwaari. Ko vakuru vanoziva kwazvo here kuti ndiye Kristu?" 
John7:27 Zvino uyu tinoziva kwaanobva; asi Kristu kana achisvika, hakunomunhu ungaziva kwaanobva." 
John7:28 Zvino Jesu akadanidzira mutembere, achidzidzisa, achiti: Imwi mose munondiziva, uye imwi mose munoziva kwandakabva; handina kuvuya zvomusoro wangu, asi wakandituma ndowechokwadi, wamusingazivi imwi." 
John7:29 Ini ndinomuziva, nokuti ndinobva kwaari, uye ndiye wakandituma." 
John7:30 Naizvozvo vakatsvaka kumubata, asi hakuna munhu wakaisa ruvoko paari, nokuti nguva yake yakanga isati yasvika." 
John7:31 Asi vazhinji vechaunga vakatenda kwaari, vakati: Kana Kristu achizosvika, ungaita zvishamiso zvizhinji kunezvizvi zvakaitwa nouyu here." 
John7:32 Zvino vaFarisi vakanzwa vanhu vazhinji vachin'un'una zvinhu zvakadaro pamusoro pake; vaprista vakuru navaFarisi vakatuma vatariri kundomubata. 
John7:33 Ipapo Jesu akati kwavari: Ndichiri nemwi chinguvana, ndoenda kunowakandituma." 
John7:34 Imwi muchanditsvaka, mukasa\add ndi\add*wana; uye apo pandiri, imwi hamungasvikipo." 
John7:35 Zvino vaJudha vakataurirana, \add vachiti\add*: Unoda kuendepiko, kwatisingazomuwani? Ko unoda kuenda kuna vakapararira pakati pavaGiriki, kuti andodzidzisa vaGiriki here?" 
John7:36 Ishokoiko iri \add raanoti\add*: Muchanditsvaka, asi hamungandiwani, nepandiri, imwi hamungasvikipo?" 
John7:37 Zvino nezuva rokupedzisira, guru romutambo, Jesu wakasimuka, akadanidzira, akati: Kana aninani anenyota, ngaauye kwandiri, amwe." 
John7:38 Unotenda kwandiri, sezvakarebwa norugwaro, mudumbu make muchaerera nzizi dzemvura mhenyu." 
John7:39 Asi izvi wakareva zvoMweya, waizogamuchirwa navo vaitenda kwaari, nokuti Mweya Mutsvene wakanga asati \add avapo\add*, nokuti Jesu wakanga asati akudzwa." 
John7:40 Naizvozvo vazhinji vechaunga vakati vachinzwa shoko iri vakati: Zvirokwazvo uyu muporofita. 
John7:41 Vamwe vakati: Uyu ndiye Kristu. Asi vamwe vakati: Ko Kristu ungabva Gariri here? 
John7:42 Rugwaro haruna kureva here kuti Kristu uchabva kuzvizvarwa zvaDhavhidhi, napamusha weBhetirehemu, paiva naDhavhidhi?" 
John7:43 Naizvozvo pakava nekupesana pakati pechaunga pamusoro pake. 
John7:44 Vamwe vavo vakanga vachida kumubata; asi kwakanga kusina wakaisa mavoko kwaari. 
John7:45 Zvino vatariri vakavuya kuvaprista vakuru nokuvaFarisi; ivo vakati kwavari: Nemhaka yei musina kuvuya naye? 
John7:46 Vatariri vakapindura, \add vakati\add*: Hakuna munhu wakatongotaura somunhu uyu." 
John7:47 Zvino vaFarisi vakavapindura, \add vakati\add*: Nemwivo matsauswa kanhi?" 
John7:48 Kunomumwe wavakuru nowavaFarisi wakatongotenda kwaari here? 
John7:49 Asi chaunga ichi chisingazivi murairo, chakatukwa." 
John7:50 Nikodhimo, uya akavuya kwaari vusiku, ari mumwe wavo, akati kwavari:" 
John7:51 Murairo wedu unotonga munhu, usati wambomunzwa, nokuziva chaanoita here?" 
John7:52 Vakapindura vakati kwaari: Ko newevo uri weGariri here? Nzvera, uvone kuti hakuna kumuka muporofita, unobva Gariri." 
John7:53 Ipapo mumwe nomumwe wakaenda kumba kwake. 
John8:1 Asi Jesu wakaenda kugomo reMiorivhi. 
John8:2 Zvino mambakwedza akadzokerazve kutembere, vanhu vose vakavuya kwaari; akagara pasi akavadzidzisa." 
John8:3 Zvino vanyori navaFarisi vakamuvigira mukadzi wakabatwa achifeva, vakamugadzika pakati pavo." 
John8:4 Vakati kwaari: Mudzidzisi, mukadzi uyu wakabatwa achifeva, panzvimbo pomene." 
John8:5 Zvino Mozisi pamurairo wakatiraira kuti vakadaro vatakwe namabwe; zvino imwi munoti kudiniko? 
John8:6 Izvozvi vakareva, vachimuidza, kuti vawane chavangamupomera mhosva nacho. Asi Jesu wakakotama, akanyora pasi nomumwe sousina kuvanzwa." 
John8:7 Zvino ivo vakati vachiramba vachimubvunza, akakotoroka, akati kwavari: Usine chivi pakati penyu, ngaatange kukanda ibwe kwaari." 
John8:8 Zvino akakotamazve, akanyora pasi." 
John8:9 Zvino ivo vakati vachi\add zvi\add*nzwa, nokurova kwehana dzavo, vakabuda mumwe-mumwe, kutanga vakuru kusvikira kuno wokupedzisira; Jesu akasara ari oga, nomukadzi amire pakati." 
John8:10 Jesu wakati akotoroka akasavona munhu, asi mukadzi oga, wakati kwaari: Mai, varipiko vaya vakupomerai mhosva? Hakuna wakutongai here?" 
John8:11 Iye akati: Hakuna, Ishe! Jesu akati kwaari: Nenivo handikupi mhosva. Enda hako, usatadzazve." 
John8:12 Zvino Jesu wakataurazve kwavari, akati: Ndini chiedza chenyika; unonditevera haangatongofambi murima, asi uchava nechiedza choupenyu." 
John8:13 Naizvozvo vaFarisi vakati kwaari: Unozvipupurira iwe; kupupura kwako hakuzi kwechokwadi. 
John8:14 Jesu akapindura akati kwavari: Kunyange ndichizvipupurira, kupupura kwangu ndokwechokwadi; nokuti ndinoziva kwandakabva, nokwandinoenda; asi imwi hamuzivi kwandakabva, nokwandinoenda." 
John8:15 imwi munotonga nenyama; ini handitongi munhu. 
John8:16 Asi kunyange ndichitonga, kutonga kwangu ndokwechokwadi; nokuti handizi ndoga, asi ini naBaba vakandituma." 
John8:17 Uye mumurairo wenyu makanyorwa kuti kupupura kwavanhu vaviri ndokwechokwadi. 
John8:18 Ndini ndinozvipupurira, naBaba vakandituma vanondipupurira." 
John8:19 Zvino ivo vakati kwaari: Baba vako varipiko? Jesu akapindura, \add akati\add*: Hamundizivi ini, kunyange naBaba vanguvo; dai maindiziva ini, mungadai maizivavo naBaba vangu." 
John8:20 Jesu wakataura mashoko awa paimba yezvipo achidzidzisa mutembere; asi hakuna munhu wakaisa ruvoko kwaari, nokuti nguva yake yakanga isati yasvika." 
John8:21 Naizvozvo Jesu wakatizve kwavari: Ndinoenda, uye muchanditsvaka, mukafira muzvivi zvenyu; pandinoenda, imwi hamungavuyipo." 
John8:22 Naizvozvo vaJudha vakati: Uchazvivuraya kanhi? zvaanoti: Pandinoenda, imwi hamungavuyipo?" 
John8:23 Akati kwavari: Imwi munobva pasi, ini ndinobva kumusoro; imwi muri venyika ino, ini handizi wenyika ino." 
John8:24 Naizvozvo ndati kwamuri: Muchafira muzvivi zvenyu, nokuti kana musinganditendi kuti ndini iye, muchafira muzvivi zvenyu." 
John8:25 Zvino vakati kwaari: Iwe ndiwe aniko? Jesu akati kwavari: Ndizvo zvandagara ndichikuvudzai kubva pakutanga. 
John8:26 Ndine zvinhu zvizhinji zvokutaura nokutonga pamusoro penyu; asi uyo wakandituma ndowechokwadi; izvo zvandakanzwa kwaari, ndizvo zvandinotaura kunyika." 
John8:27 Havana kunzwisisa kuti unotaura kwavari zvaBaba. 
John8:28 Naizvozvo Jesu wakati kwavari: Kana masimudza Mwanakomana womunhu, ipapo muchaziva kuti ndini \add iye\add*, uye handiiti chinhu chomusoro wangu, asi sezvandakadzidziswa naBaba vangu, ndinotaura zvinhu izvi." 
John8:29 Zvino uyo wakandituma uneni; Baba havana kundisiya ndoga; nokuti ini ndinoita nguva dzose zvinomufadza. 
John8:30 Wakati achareva izvozvi, vazhinji vakatenda kwaari." 
John8:31 Zvino Jesu wakati kuvaJudha avo vakatenda kaari: Kana imwi muchirambira mushoko rangu, muri vadzidzi vangu zvirokwazvo;" 
John8:32 muchaziva chokwadi, uye chokwadi chichakusunungurai." 
John8:33 Vakamupindura, \add vakati\add*: Tiri zvizvarwa zvaAbhurahamu isu, hatina kutongova varanda vomunhu chero nguva ipi zvayo; zvino iwe ungareva seiko \add kuti\add* muchasunungurwa?" 
John8:34 Jesu akavapindura, \add akati\add*: Zvirokwazvo, zvirokwazvo, ndinoti kwamuri: Mumwe nomumwe unoita chivi, muranda wechivi." 
John8:35 Muranda haagari mumba nokusingaperi; mwanakomana unogara nokusingaperi. 
John8:36 Naizvozvo kana Mwanakomana achikusunugurai, muchava vakasununguka zvirokwazvo." 
John8:37 Ndinoziva kuti muri zvizvarwa zvaAbhurahamu; asi munotsvaka kundivuraya, nokuti shoko rangu harina nzvimbo mamuri." 
John8:38 Ini ndinoreva izvo zvandakavona kunaBaba vangu; imwi munoita izvo zvamakavona kunababa venyu. 
John8:39 Vakapindura, vakati kwaari: Baba vedu ndiAbhurahamu. Jesu akati kwavari: Dai maiva vana vaAbhurahamu, maiita mabasa aAbhurahamu." 
John8:40 Asi zvino munotsvaka kundivuraya, munhu wakakuvudzai chokwadi, chandakanzwa kunaMwari. Abhurahamu haana kuzviita." 
John8:41 Imwi munoita mabasa ababa venyu. Zvino ivo vakati kwaari: Hatina kuberekwa novupombwe; tina baba vamwe, Mwari." 
John8:42 Jesu akati kwavari: Dai Mwari aiva baba venyu, maindida; nokuti ini ndakabuda, ndikabva kunaMwari. Nokuti handinavo kuzvivuyira, asi ndiye wakandituma." 
John8:43 Nemhaka yei musinganzwisisi nhaurwa yangu? Nokuti hamugoni kunzwa shoko rangu. 
John8:44 Imwi muri vababa \add venyu\add* Dhiabhorosi munoda kuita zvido zvababa venyu. Iye wakanga ari muvurai kubva pakutanga, asingagari muchokwadi, nokuti maari hamuna chokwadi. Kana achireva nhema, unoreva zvemusoro wake nokuti ndiye murevi wenhema uye baba vadzo." 
John8:45 Asi nokuti ini ndinoreva chokwadi, hamunditendi." 
John8:46 Ndianiko kwamuri ungandipomera chivi? Uye kana ndichireva chokwadi, munoregereiko kunditenda?" 
John8:47 Uyo uri waMwari unonzwa mashoko aMwari; imwi hamunzwi nemhaka iyi, nokuti hamuzati muri vaMwari." 
John8:48 Naizvozvo vaJudha vakapindura, vakati kwaari: Hatina kureva kwazvo here kuti iwe uri muSamaria, unomweya wakaipa?" 
John8:49 Jesu akapindura, \add akati\add*: Handina mweya wakaipa, asi ndinokudza baba vangu: zvino imwi mondizvidza." 
John8:50 Ini handitsvaki kurumbidzwa kwangu; uriko mumwe unotsvaka nokutonga.. 
John8:51 Zvirokwazvo, zvirokwazvo, ndinoti kwamuri: Kana munhu akachengeta shoko rangu, haangatongovoni rufu nokusingaperi." 
John8:52 Naizvozvo vaJudha vakati kwaari: Zvino toziva kuti unomweya wakaipa; Abhurahamu wakafa, navaporofita, zvino iwe unoti: Kana munhu akachengeta shoko rangu, haangatongoraviri rufu." 
John8:53 Ko iwe uri mukuru kunaBaba vedu Abhurahamu vakafa navaporofita vakafa here? Unozviita aniko? 
John8:54 Jesu akapindura, \add akati\add*: Kana ini ndichizvikudza, kuzvikudza kwangu hakuna maturo; ndiBaba vangu vanondikudza, avo vamunoti ndiMwari wenyu." 
John8:55 Asi imwi hamuna kuvaziva; asi ini ndinovaziva, kana ini ndikati handivazivi, ndichava murevi wenhema semwi; asi ndinovaziva ini, ndinochengeta shoko ravo." 
John8:56 Abhurahamu, baba venyu, vakafara, vachiti vachavona zuva rangu; vaka\add ri\add*vona, vakafara." 
John8:57 Ipapo vaJudha vakati kwaari: Iwe ugere kusvika makore anamakumi mashanu, wakavona Abhurahamu here?" 
John8:58 Jesu akati kwavari: Zvirokwazvo, zvirokwazvo, ndinoti kwamuri: Abhurahamu asati avapo, ini ndiripo." 
John8:59 Ipapo vakanonga mabwe kuti vamuposhere; asi Jesu wakazvivanza, akabuda mutembere achipinda napakati pavo, akapfuvura saizvozvo." 
John9:1 Wakati achipfuvura, akavona munhu wakanga ari bofu kubva pakuberekwa." 
John9:2 Vadzidzi vake vakamubvunza, vachiti: Mudzidzisi, ndianiko wakatadza, uyu munhu kana vabereki vake, zvaakazvarwa ari bofu?" 
John9:3 Jesu akapindura, \add akati\add*: Uyu haana kutadza, kunyange navabereki vake; asi \add izvi zvakaitwa \add*kuti mabasa aMwari aratidzwe maari." 
John9:4 Ndinofanira kushanda mabasa owakandituma, achiri masikati; vusiku bwunovuya, apo pasina munhu angagona kushanda." 
John9:5 Kana ndichingori panyika chete, ndiri chiedza chenyika." 
John9:6 Wakati areva izvozvo, akapfira pasi, akakanya dope namate, akazodza meso ebofu nedope;" 
John9:7 akati kwaari: Enda \add undo\add*shamba mudziva reSiroami, (ndokuti, kana zvichishandurwa, wakatumwa) Naizvozvo wakaenda akandoshamba, akadzoka achivona." 
John9:8 Naizvozvo vavakidzani navaisimbomuvona kuti wakanga ari bofu, vakati: Ko uyu haazi iye waigara achipemha here?" 
John9:9 Vamwe vakati: Uyu ndiye; vamwe \add vakati\add*: Wakatodzana naye. Iye akati: Ndini. 
John9:10 Naizvozvo ivo vakati kwaari: Meso ako akasvinudzwa seiko? 
John9:11 Akapindura akati: Munhu unonzi Jesu wakanya dope, akazodza meso angu, akati kwandiri: Enda kudziva reSiroami, undoshamba. Zvino ndikaenda ndikashamba, ndikavonazve." 
John9:12 Ipapo vakati kwaari: Iye uripiko? Akati: Handizivi. 
John9:13 Vakamuisa kuvaFarisi, iye waimbova bofu." 
John9:14 Zvino raiva zuva resabata apo Jesu akakanya dope, akasvinudza meso ake." 
John9:15 Ipapo zvekare vaFarisi vakamubvunzavo, kuti wakavonazve sei. Akati kwavari: Waisa dope pameso angu, ndikandoshamba, zvino ndovona." 
John9:16 Naizvozvo vamwe vavaFarisi vakati: Munhu uyu haabvi kunaMwari, nokuti haachengeti sabata. Vamwe vakati: Ko munhu uri mutadzi ungaita seiko zvishamiso zvakadai? Kukava nokupesana pakati pavo." 
John9:17 Vakatizve kubofu: Iwe unoti kudiniko pamusoro pake, sezvo akasvinudza meso ako? Akati: Muporofita." 
John9:18 Naizvozvo vaJudha havana kutenda pamusoro pake, kuti wakanga ari bofu, akavonazve, kusvikira vadana vabereki vowakavoneswa," 
John9:19 vakavabvunza, vachiti: Uyu mwanakomana wenyu wamunoti wakaberekwa riri bofu here? Zvino unogovona seiko?" 
John9:20 Vabereki vake vakavapindura vakati: Tinoziva kuti uyu mwanakomana wedu, uye kuti wakaberekwa ari bofu;" 
John9:21 kuti zvino wovona sei, hatizivi; nowakasvinudza meso ake, hatizivi; wayaruka, iye pachake uchazvitaurira." 
John9:22 Vabereki vake vakareva izvozvo, nokuti vaitya vaJudha, nokuti vaJudha vakanga vatotenderana kare kuti aninani unopupura kuti ndiye Kristu, abudiswe musinagoge." 
John9:23 Naizvozvo vabereki vake vakati: Wayaruka, mubvunzei." 
John9:24 Zvino vakamudanazve rwechipri, iye munhu wakanga ari bofu, vakati kwaari: Ipa Mwari rumbidzo; isu tinoziva kuti munhu uyu mutadzi." 
John9:25 Iye akapindura, akati: Kunyange ari mutadzi ini handizivi; chinhu chimwe chandinoziva, kuti ndaiva bofu, zvino ndovona." 
John9:26 Ipapo vakatizve kwaari: Wakaiteiko kwauri? Wakasvinudza meso ako sei? 
John9:27 Akavapindura, \add akati\add*: ndakuvudzai kare, mukasanzwa, munodireiko kunzwa zvekare? Nemwi munoda kuva vadzidzi vakevo kanhi?" 
John9:28 Naizvozvo vakamutuka, vachiti: Iwe ndiwe mudzidzi wake, asi isu tiri vadzidzi vaMozisi." 
John9:29 Tinoziva kuti Mwari wakataura naMozisi; asi uyu hatizivi kwaakabva. 
John9:30 Munhu akapindura akati kwavari: Nyambera chinhu ichi chinoshamisa, kuti imwi hamuzivi kwaanobva, kunyange zvakadaro wakasvinudza meso angu." 
John9:31 Zvino toziva kuti Mwari haanzwi vatadzi; asi kana munhu ari mushumiri waMwari, achiita kuda kwake, unomunzwa iye." 
John9:32 Kubvira rinhi hakuna kumbonzwika kuti mumwe wakasvinudza meso omunhu wakaberekwa ari bofu. 
John9:33 Dai uyu anga asingabvi kunaMwari, haazaigona kuita chinhu." 
John9:34 Vakapindura, vakati kwaari: Iwe chigariro wakaberekerwa muzvivi, zvino iwe wotidzidzisa here? Vakamudzingira kunze." 
John9:35 Jesu akanzwa kuti vamudzingira kunze; akati amuwana, akati kwaari: Iwe unotenda kuMwanakomana waMwari here" 
John9:36 Akapindura, akati: Iye ndianiko, Ishe, kuti nditende kwaari?" 
John9:37 Jesu akati kwaari: Iwe wamuvona, uye ndiye unotaura newe." 
John9:38 Ipapo akati: Ishe ndinotenda; akamunamata. 
John9:39 Jesu akati: Kutonga ndiko kwandakavuyira panyika ino, kuti vasingavoni vavone; navanovona vave mapofu." 
John9:40 Avo vavaFarisi vaiva naye vakanzwa zvhinhu izvi, vakati kwaari: Ko nesuvo tiri mapofu here?" 
John9:41 Jesu akati kwavari: dai maiva mapofu, hamuzaiva nezvivi. Asi zvino munoti: Tinovona; zvivi zvenyu zvinoramba zviripo." 
John10:1 Zvirokwazvo, zvirokwazvo, ndinoti kwamuri: Usingapindi napamukova mudanga ramakwai, asi unokwira nokumwe, ndiye mbavha negororo." 
John10:2 Asi unopinda napamukova, mufudzi wamakwai." 
John10:3 Murindi womukova unomuzarurira iye, namakwai anonzwa inzwi rake, uye unodana makwai ake nezita rawo, nokuakokera kunze." 
John10:4 Kana abudisa makwai ake, unoatungamirira; namakwai anomutevera, nokuti anoziva inzwi rake." 
John10:5 Asi mweni haangatongomuteveri, asi anomutiza; nokuti haazivi inzwi ravaeni." 
John10:6 Jesu akareva mufananidzo uyu kwavari; asi ivo havana kunzwisisa, kuti zvinhu zvei zvaakavataurira." 
John10:7 Zvino Jesu akati kwavarizve: Zvirokwazvo, zvirokwazvo, ndinoti kwamuri: Ndini mukova wamakwai." 
John10:8 Vose vakanditangira kuvuya imbavha namakororo, asi makwai haana kuvanzwa." 
John10:9 Ndini mukova; kana munhu apinda neni, uchaponeswa, uchapinda, nokubuda, uchawana mafuro." 
John10:10 Mbavha haivuyi asi kungozoba nokuvuraya nokuparadza. Ini ndakavuya, kuti ave noupenyu, uye ave nobwakawanda."
