John10:11 Ndini mufudzi wakanaka. Mufudzi wakanaka unoradzikira pasi makwai ake upenyu bwake. 
John10:12 Asi muranda, usati ari mufudzi, makwai asati ari ake, unovona bere richivuya, akasiya makwai, ndokutiza; bere rinoabata, nokuparadzira makwai;" 
John10:13 Muranda unotiza nokuti muranda, uye haanehanya namakwai." 
John10:14 Ini ndini mufudzi wakanaka, ndinoziva angu, ndinozikamwa neangu," 
John10:15 Baba sezvavanondiziva, saizvozvo nenivo ndinoziva Baba; ndinoradzikira pasi makwai angu upenyu bwangu." 
John10:16 Namamwe makwai ndinawo, asati ari edanga rino. Naiwo ndinofanira kuvuya nawovo, achanzwa inzwi rangu; richava boka rimwe, nomufudzi mumwe." 
John10:17 Naizvozvo Baba vanondida, nokuti ndinoradzika upenyu bwangu pasi, kuti ndigobwutorazve." 
John10:18 Hakuna munhu ungabwutora kubva kwandiri; asi ndinobwuradzika pasi pachangu. Simba ndinaro rokubwuradzika pasi, uye ndine simba rokubwutorazve. Uyu murairo ndakaugamuchira kunababa vangu." 
John10:19 Ipapo kukavapo kupesana pakati pavaJudha nokuda kwamashoko iwawo. 
John10:20 Vazhinji vavo vakati: Unomweya wakaipa uye unopenga; munomuteerereiko? 
John10:21 Vamwe vakati: Mashoko awa haasati ari owakabatwa nomweya wakaipa; ko mweya wakaipa ungagona kusvinudza meso amapofu here? 
John10:22 Yaiva nguva yomutambo wokuvandudza paJerusarema, chaiva chando." 
John10:23 Jesu akafamba mutembere mubiravira raSoromoni. 
John10:24 Zvino vaJudha vakavuya vakamukomba, vakati kwaari: Uchatikahadzikisa kusvikira riniko? Kana uri Kristu iwe, tivudze pachena." 
John10:25 Jesu akavapindura akati: Ndakakuvudzai, mukasatenda; mabasa andinoita nezita rababa, ndiwo anondipupurira ini;" 
John10:26 asi imwi hamutendi; nokuti hamuzi vamakwai angu sezvandakareva kwamuri. 
John10:27 Makwai angu anonzwa inzwi rangu, neni ndinoaziva, uye anonditevera;" 
John10:28 ndinopa kwaari upenyu bwusingaperi; uye haangafi nokusingaperi, uye hakunomunhu ungaabvuta muruvoko rwangu." 
John10:29 Baba vangu vakandipa \add iwo\add* vakuru kunavose; hakuna unogona kuabvuta muruvoko rwaBaba vangu. 
John10:30 Ini naBaba tiri mumwe. 
John10:31 Zvino vaJudha vakanongazve mabwe, kuti vamutake." 
John10:32 Jesu akavapindura \add akati\add*: Ndakakuratidzai mabasa mazhinji akanaka kubva kunaBaba vangu; nderipiko ramabasa awa ramunonditakira? 
John10:33 VaJudha vakamupindura vakati: Hatikutakiri basa rakanaka; asi kumhura Mwari; uye nokuti iwe uri munhu unozviita Mwari. 
John10:34 Jesu akavapindura \add akati\add*; Hazvina kunyorwa here mumurairo wenyu, \add zvichinzi\add*: Ini ndakati: Muri vamwari?" 
John10:35 Zvino kana akavaidza vamwari, ivo shoko raMwari rakasvika kwavari, (Rugwaro harungaputswi);" 
John10:36 uyo wakatsaurwa naBaba, nokutumwa panyika, asi imwi munoti: Unomhura Mwari, nokuti ndati: Ndiri Mwanakomana waMwari?" 
John10:37 Asi kana ndisingaiti mabasa aBaba vangu, regai kunditenda." 
John10:38 Asi kana ndichi\add a\add*ita, kunyange musinganditendi ini, tendai mabasa; kuti mugoziva nokutenda kuti Baba \add vari\add* mandiri, neni mavari." 
John10:39 Zvino vakatsvakazve kumubata, asi iye wakapukunyuka pamavoko avo." 
John10:40 Zvino akaendazve mhiri kwaJoridhani, panzvimbo paibhabhatidza Johwani pakutanga; akagarapo," 
John10:41 Zvino vazhinji vakavuya kwaari, vakati: Johwani haana kuita chiratidzo, asi zvose zvakareva Johwani pamusoro pomunhu uyu zvaiva zvechokwadi." 
John10:42 Vazhinji vakatenda kwaari ipapo. 
John11:1 Kwaiva noumwe wakanga achirwara, \add wainzi\add* Razaro weBhetaniya, musha waMaria nomukoma wake Marita." 
John11:2 Ndiye Maria wakazodza Ishe namafuta, akapusika tsoka dzake nevhudzi rake; hanzvadzi yake Razaro wakanga achirwara." 
John11:3 Naizvozvo hanzvadzi dzake dzakatumira \add shoko\add* kwaari, dzichiti: Ishe, tarirai uyo wamunoda unorwara." 
John11:4 Jesu wakati anzwa akati: Kurwara uku hakusviki murufu, asi ndokwembiri yaMwari, kuti noMwanakomana waMwari arumbidzwe nazvo." 
John11:5 Zvino Jesu wakanga achida Marita nomunun'una wake naRazaro. 
John11:6 Naizvozvo wakati anzwa kuti unorwara, akambogara mazuva maviri panzvimbo paakanga ari." 
John11:7 Shure kwaizvozvo akati kuvadzidzi: Hendeizve Judhiya. 
John11:8 Vadzidzi vakati kwaari: Mudzidzisi, vaJudha vakanga vachitsvaka kukutakai namabwe ikozvinozvino; zvino moendazve ikoko here?" 
John11:9 Jesu akapindura \add akati\add*: Hapana maora gumi nemaviri pazuva here? Kana munhu achifamba masikati, haagumburwi, nokuti unovona chiedza chenyika ino." 
John11:10 Asi kana munhu achifamba vusiku, unogumburwa, nokuti hakuna chiedza maari." 
John11:11 Wakataura zvinhu izvi, shure kwaizvozvo akazoti kwavari: Shamwari yedu Razaro wavata; asi ndinoenda kuti ndimumutse pahope." 
John11:12 Zvino vadzidzi vake vakati: Ishe, kana avete uchanaya." 
John11:13 Asi Jesu wakareva kufa kwake; asi ivo vakafunga kuti unoreva kuzorora kwehope. 
John11:14 Ipapo Jesu akavavudza pachena: Razaro wafa. 
John11:15 Zvino Ndinofara nokuda kwenyu, kuti ndakanga ndisipo, kuti mugotenda; asi zvino hendei kwaari." 
John11:16 Ipapo Tomasi, wainzi Batya, akati kuna vamwe vadzidzi pamwe naye: Hendei nesuvo kuti tindofa naye." 
John11:17 Zvino Jesu wakati achisvika, akawana kuti wakanga atova mubwiro mazuva mana." 
John11:18 Zvino Bhetaniya rakanga riri pedo neJerusarema, masitadhiya* anenge gumi namashanu kubva \add ipapo\add*;" 
John11:19 navazhinji vavaJudha vakanga vavuya kunaMarita naMaria, kuti vavanyaradze pamusoro pehanzvadzi yavo." 
John11:20 Zvino Marita wakati achingonzwa kuti Jesu wovuya, akaenda kundomuchingamidza; asi Maria wakagara mumba." 
John11:21 Ipapo Marita akati kuna Jesu: Ishe, dai maiva pano, hanzvadzi yangu ingadai isina kufa." 
John11:22 Kunyange zvino ndinoziva kuti zvipi zvazvo zvamunokumbira kunaMwari, Mwari uchakupai." 
John11:23 Jesu akati kwaari: Hanzvadzi yako ichamukazve. 
John11:24 Marita akati kwaari: Ndinoziva kuti uchamukazve pakumuka nezuva rokupedzisira. 
John11:25 Jesu akati kwaari: Ndini kumuka noupenyu; unotenda kwandiri, kunyange akafa, uchararama;" 
John11:26 uye mumwe nomumwe mupenyu unotenda kwandiri, haangatongofi nokusingaperi. Unotenda izvozvi here?" 
John11:27 Akati kwaari: Hongu, Ishe; ndinotenda kuti ndimwi Kristu, Mwanakomana waMwari, unofanira kuvuya panyika." 
John11:28 Wakati areva izvozvo akabuda akandodana Maria, munun'una wake pchivande, akati: Mudzidzisi wasvika, unokudana." 
John11:29 Iye wakati achi\add zvi\add*nzwa, akakurumidza kusimuka akaenda kwaari." 
John11:30 Zvino Jesu wakanga asati asvika pamusha, asi wakanga achiri panzvimbo iya paakachingamidzwa naMarita." 
John11:31 Naizvozvo vaJudha vakanga vari mumba naye vachimunyaradza, vakati vachivona Maria achikurumidza kusimuka achibuda, vakamutevera, vachiti unoenda kubwiro kundochemako." 
John11:32 Zvino Maria wakati achisvika pakanga panaJesu, achimuvona, akawira pasi patsoka dzake, achiti kwaari: Ishe, dai maiva pano, hanzvadzi yangu ingadai isina kufa." 
John11:33 Zvino Jesu wakati achimuvona achichema, navaJudha vachichemavo vakanga vavuya naye, akagomera \add neshungu\add* mumweya, akatambudzika," 
John11:34 akati: Mamuradzikepiko? Vakati kwaari: Ishe, vuyai muvone." 
John11:35 Jesu akachema. 
John11:36 Ipapo vaJudha vakati: Tarirai kuti waimuda sei. 
John11:37 Asi vamwe vavo vakati: Uyu wakasvinudza meso ebofu, haazaiita here kuti uyu asafa?" 
John11:38 Ipapo Jesu akagomerazve \add neshungu \add*mukati make asvika pabwiro. Iro raiva bako, nebwe rakanga riri pamusoro paro." 
John11:39 Jesu akati: Bvisai ibwe. Marita hanzvadzi yowakafa akati kwaari: Ishe, ikozvino wotonhuhwa, nokuti unamazuva mana." 
John11:40 Jesu akati kwaari: Handina kutaura here kwauri, kuti kana ukatenda, uchavona kubwinya kwaMwari?" 
John11:41 Ipapo vakabvisa ibwe, apo pakanga paradzikwa wakafa. Zvino Jesu akasimudza meso, akati: Baba, ndinokuvongai, nokuti imwi mandinzwa." 
John11:42 Asi ndanga ndichiziva kuti munogara muchindinzwa; asi nokuda kwavazhinji vakandikomba ndareva kuti vatende kuti makandituma. 
John11:43 Wakati areva izvozvi, akadanidzira nenzwi guru, \add akati\add*: Razaro, buda!" 
John11:44 Zvino uyo wakanga afa akabuda, akapombwa mavoko namakumbo nemicheka yebwiro, nechiso chake chakapombwa netauro, Jesu akati kwavari: Musunungurei, aende." 
John11:45 Naizvozvo vazhinji vavaJudha, vakanga vavuya kunaMaria vakati vavona zvakaitwa naJesu, vakatenda kwaari." 
John11:46 Asi vamwe vavo vakaenda kuvaFarisi, vakandovavudza zvinhu zvakanga zvaitwa naJesu." 
John11:47 Naizvozvo vaprista vakuru navaFarisi vakavunganidza dare, vakati: Todiniko? Nokuti uyu munhu unoita zviratidzo zvizhinji." 
John11:48 Kana tikamurega akadaro, vose vachatenda kwaari; navaRoma vachavuya vakatitorera nzvimbo yedu norudzi rwedu." 
John11:49 Asi mumwe wavo, Kayafasi, wakanga ari muprista mukuru gore iroro, akati kwavari: Hamuzivi chinhu imwi," 
John11:50 uye hamurangariri kuti zvakatinakira, kuti munhu mumwe afire vanhu, rudzi rwose rurege kufa." 
John11:51 Asi haana kureva zvomusoro wake, asi zvaakanga ari muprista mukuru gore iro, wakaporofita kuti Jesu waifanira kufira rudzi urwo;" 
John11:52 rusati ruri rudzi rwoga, asi kutivo avunganidze pamwe chete vana vaMwari vakapararira vave mumwe." 
John11:53 Zvino kubva pazuva iro vakarangana pamwechete kuti vamuvuraye. 
John11:54 Naizvozvo Jesu haana kuzofamba pachena pakati pavaJudha, asi wakabvapo akaenda kunyika iri pedo nerenje, kuguta rainzi Efuremu, akagarako navadzidzi vake." 
John11:55 Zvino paseka yavaJudha yakanga yava pedo; vanhu vazhinji vakabuda munyika iyo vakakwira Jerusarema paseka isati yasvika, kuti vazvinatse." 
John11:56 Naizvozvo vakatsvaka Jesu, vakataurirana vamire mutembere, \add vachiti\add*: Munofungeiko? Kuti haangavuyi kumutambo here?" 
John11:57 Zvino vose vaprista vakuru navaFarisi vakanga varaira, kuti, kana aninani achiziva kwaari, azivise, kuti vamubate." 
John12:1 Zvino mazuva matanhatu paseka ichigere kusvika, Jesu wakasvika Bhetaniya, paiva naRazaro, wakanga afa, waakamutsa kuvakafa." 
John12:2 Ipapo vakamuitira chirayiro, Marita aka\add va\add*shandira; naRazaro wakanga ari mumwe wavakanga vagere naye pakudya." 
John12:3 Zvino Maria akatora paundi yamafuta enadhi*, anomutengo mukuru, akazodza tsoka dzaJesu, akapusika tsoka dzake nevhudzi rake; imba ikazadzwa nokunhuhwira kwamafuta." 
John12:4 Ipapo mumwe wavadzidzi vake, Judhasi Isikariyoti, waSimoni wakanga achazomutengesa, akati:" 
John12:5 Mafuta awa aregereiko kutengeswa namadhenari* mazana matatu, akapiwa varombo?" 
John12:6 wakareva izvozvi kwete kuti wakarangarira varombo, asi nokuti waiva mbavha; waigara nechikwama, achisiba zvaiiswamo." 
John12:7 Asi Jesu wakati: Muregei akadaro; wazviitira kuvigwa kwangu. 
John12:8 Nokuti varombo munavo nguva dzose; asi ini hamuneni nguva dzose. 
John12:9 Zvino chaunga chikuru chavaJudha chakanzwa kuti uripo; vakavuya, asi havana kuvuya nokuda kwaJesu chete, asi kuti vavone Razarovo, waakanga amutsa kuvakafa." 
John12:10 Asi vaprista vakuru vakarangana kuti vavuraye naRazarovo; 
John12:11 nokuti nokuda kwake vaJudha vazhinji vaibva, vachitenda kunaJesu." 
John12:12 Zvino ava mangwana chaunga chikuru chakanga chavuya kumutambo, chakati chanzwa kuti Jesu wovuya Jerusarema," 
John12:13 vakatora matavi emichindwe, vakabuda kundomuchingamidza, vakadanidzira, \add vachiti\add*: Hosana*! Wakaropafadzwa unovuya muzita raShe, Mambo wavaIsraeri." 
John12:14 Zvino Jesu wakati awana dhongwana, akagara pamusoro paro, sezvazvakanyorwa, \add zvichinzi\add*:" 
John12:15 Usatya, mukunda weZiyoni; tarira, Mambo wako unovuya, agere pamusoro pedhongwana." 
John12:16 Vadzidzi vake havana kunzwisisa izvozvi pakutanga; asi Jesu wakati akudzwa, vakazorangarira kuti zvinhu izvozvi zvakanga zvakanyorwa pamusoro pake, uye vakanga vamuitira zvinhu izvozvo." 
John12:17 Naizvozvo chaunga chikuru chaiva naye pakudana kwake Razaro kuti abude mubwiro, nokumumutsa kuvakafa, chakapupura," 
John12:18 Saka chaunga chakamuchingamidzavo, nokuti vakanga vanzwa kuti wakaita chishamiso ichochi." 
John12:19 Naizvozvo vaFarisi vakataurirana, \add vachiti\add*: Munovona henyu kuti hamubatsiri chinhu; tarirai nyika inomutevera." 
John12:20 Zvino kwaiva navamwe vaGiriki pakati pavakanga vakwira kunoshumira kumutambo; 
John12:21 ndivo vakavuya kunaFiripi weBhetisaidha reGariri, vakamukumbira, vachiti: Ishe, tinoda kuvona Jesu." 
John12:22 Firipi akasvika akavudza Andiriyasi; zvinovo Andiriyasi naFiripi, vakavudza Jesu." 
John12:23 Jesu akavapindura akati: Nguva yasvika yokuti Mwanakomana womunhu akudzwe. 
John12:24 Zvirokwazvo, zvirokwazvo, ndinoti kwamuri: Kunze kokuti tsanga yezviyo yawira muvhu ikafa, inogara iri yoga; asi kana ikafa, inobereka zvibereko zvizhinji." 
John12:25 Uyo unoda upenyu bwake ucharashikirwa nabwo; nounovenga upenyu bwake panyika ino uchabwuchengeta kusvikira kuupenyu bwusingaperi. 
John12:26 Kana munhu achindishumira, ngaanditevere; napandinenge ndiri ini, nomuranda wangu uchavapovo. Kana munhu achindishumira, Baba vachamukudza." 
John12:27 Zvino mweya wangu unomanikidzwa; ndichatiyiko? Baba, ndiponesei panguva ino. Asi ndizvo zvandavuyira panguva ino." 
John12:28 Baba, kudzai zita renyu, Ipapo inzwi rakavuya, richibva kudenga, \add richiti\add*: Ndatorikudza, ndicharikudzazve." 
John12:29 Zvino chaunga chakanga chimirepo chichizvinzwa, chakati: Kwatinhira. Vamwe vakati: Mutumwa wataura naye." 
John12:30 Jesu akapindura akati: Inzwi iri harina kuvuya nokuda kwangu, asi nokuda kwenyu." 
John12:31 Zvino ndiko kutongwa kwenyika ino; zvino muchinda wenyika ino uchadzingirwa panze. 
John12:32 Neni, kana ndasimudzwa panyika, ndichakwevera vose kwandiri." 
John12:33 Wakareva izvozvi, achiratidza kufa, kwaaizofa nako." 
John12:34 Zvino chaunga chakamupindura, chichiti: Isu takanzwa pamurairo kuti Kristu uchagara nokusingaperi; zvino moreva seiko imwi, kuti Mwanakomana womunhu unofanira kusimudzwa? Ndianiko uyu Mwanakomana womunhu?" 
John12:35 Ipapo Jesu akati kwavari: Chiedza chichinemwi chinguva chiduku. Fambai muchine chiedza, zvimwe rima ringakukundai; unofamba murima haazivi kwaanoenda," 
John12:36 Muchine chiedza, tendai kuchiedza, muve vana vechiedza. Jesu wakareva izvozvi, akabva, akazvivanza kwavari." 
John12:37 Asi kunyange akanga aita zvishamiso zvizhinji zvakadaro pamberi pavo, havana kutenda kwaari;" 
John12:38 kuti shoko raIsaya muporofita riitike, raakareva, \add achiti\add*: Ishe, ndianiko wakatenda zvatakaparidza? Noruvoko rwaShe rwakaratidzwa kunaniko?" 
John12:39 Naizvozvo vakanga vasingagoni kutenda, nokuti Isaya wakatizve:" 
John12:40 Wakapofumadza meso avo, akawomesa moyo wavo; kuti varege kuvona nameso, nokunzwisisa nemoyo, Vatendevuke ndigovaporesa." 
John12:41 Isaya wakareva zvinhu izvozvi, paakavona kubwinya kwake, akamureva iye." 
John12:42 Asi kunyange zvakadaro, pakati pavatongi, vazhinji vakatenda kwaari; asi vakanga vasingamupupuri nokuda kwavaFarisi, kuti varege kubudiswa musinagoge;" 
John12:43 nokuti vakanga vachida kukudza kwavanhu kupfuvura kukudza kwaMwari. 
John12:44 Zvino Jesu wakadanidzira akati: Unotenda kwandiri, haatendi kwandiri, asi kunowakandituma." 
John12:45 Unondivona, unovona wakandituma." 
John12:46 Ini ndakavuya ndiri chiedza panyika, kuti aninani unotenda kwandiri arege kugara murima." 
John12:47 Zvino kana aninani achinzwa mashoko angu, akasatenda, handimutongi ini; nokuti handina kuvuya kuzotonga nyika, asi kuzoponesa nyika." 
John12:48 Uyo unondiramba asingagamuchiri mashoko angu unomumwe, unomutonga; shoko randakareva ndiro richamutonga nezuva rokupedzisira." 
John12:49 Nokuti handina kureva zvomusoro wangu, asi Baba vakandituma, ndivo vakandipa murairo, zvandichareva nezvandichataura." 
John12:50 Uye ndinoziva kuti murairo wavo upenyu bwusingaperi; naizvozvo zvose zvandinotaura, ndinotaura sezvandakavudzwa naBaba." 
John13:1 Zvino mutambo wepaseka usati wasvika, Jesu woziva kuti nguva yake yasvika, kuti abve munyika ino, aende kunaBaba, ada vake vaiva munyika, wakavada kusvikira pakuguma." 
John13:2 Zvino kuraira kwakati kwapera, Dhiabhorosi atoisa mumoyo maJudhasi Isikariyoti, waSimoni, kuti amupandukire," 
John13:3 Jesu achiziva kuti Baba vakapa zvinhu zvose mumavoko ake, uye kuti wakabva kuna Mwari uye kuti anoenda kunaMwari," 
John13:4 akasimuka pakurayira, akabvisa nguvo \add dzake\add*, akatora tauro akazvisunga chivuno." 
John13:5 Zvino akadira mvura mubhavhu, akatanga kushambidza tsoka dzavadzidzi, akadzipusika netauro, raakanga akazvisunga naro." 
John13:6 Akasvika kunaSimoni Petro, iye akati kwaari: Ishe, imwi moshambidza tsoka dzangu here?" 
John13:7 Jesu akapindura akati kwaari: Chandinoita ini hauzivi ikozvino; asi uchaziva pashure. 
John13:8 Petro akati kwaari: Hamungatongoshambidzi tsoka dzangu nokusingaperi. Jesu akamupindura \add akati\add*: Kana ndisingakushambidzi, haunomugove neni." 
John13:9 Simoni Petro akati kwaari: Dzirege kuva tsoka dzangu dzoga, asi mavoko nomusorovo." 
John13:10 Jesu akati kwaari: Wakashambidzwa haashaiwi chinhu asi kushamba tsoka chete, asi wakachena iye wose; imwi makachena asi kwete mose." 
John13:11 Nokuti wakanga achiziva uyo waizomutengesa, naizvozvo wakati: Hamuna kuchena mose." 
John13:12 Zvino wakati ashambidza tsoka dzavo, akatora nguvo dzake, agarazve pasi, akati kwavari: Munoziva zvandakuitirai here?" 
John13:13 Munondiidza Mudzidzisi, uye Ishe; munoreva zvakanaka, nokuti \add ndizvo\add* zvandiri." 
John13:14 Zvino kana ini, Ishe noMudzidzisi, ndashambidza tsoka dzenyu, nemwivo munofanira kushambidzana tsoka dzenyu." 
John13:15 Nokuti ndakuratidzai muenzaniso kuti muite imwi sezvandaita kwamuri. 
John13:16 Zvirokwazvo, zvirokwazvo, ndinoti kwamuri: Muranda haazi mukuru kuna She wake, uye wakatumwa \add haazi\add* mukuru kuno wakamutuma." 
John13:17 Kana muchiziva zvinhu izvi, makaropafadzwa kana muchizviita." 
John13:18 Handirevi imwi mose; ini ndinoziva avo vandakasanagura; asi kuti rugwaro ruzadzisike, \add runoti\add*: Uyo unodya chingwa neni, wakandisimudzira chitsitsinho chake." 
John13:19 Kubva zvino ndinokuvudzai zvisati zvaitika, kuti kana zvichiitika, mugotenda kuti ndini." 
John13:20 Zvirokwazvo, zvirokwazvo, ndinoti kwamuri: Unogamuchira aninani wandinotuma, unogamuchireni, nounondigamuchira ini, unogamuchira wakandituma." 
John13:21 Zvino Jesu wakati areva kudaro akatambudzika mumweya, akapupura akati: Zvirokwazvo, zvirokwazvo, ndinoti kwamuri: Mumwe wenyu uchanditengesa." 
John13:22 Naizvozvo vadzidzi vakatarirana, vachikahadzika kuti wareva ani." 
John13:23 Zvino kwakanga kwakasendama pachifuva chaJesu mumwe wavadzidzi vake waidikamwa naJesu. 
John13:24 Simoni Petro akamuninira, kuti abvunze kuti ndianiko waanoreva." 
John13:25 Iye akasendama pachifuva chaJesu, akati kwaari: Ishe, ndianiko?" 
John13:26 Ipapo Jesu akapindura akati: Ndiye wandichapa chimedu kana ndachiseva. Zvino wakati aseva chimedu, akapa Judhasi Isikariyoti waSimoni." 
John13:27 Zvino shure kwechimedu, Satani akapinda maari. Ipapo Jesu akati kwaari: Zvaunoita, ita uchikurumidza." 
John13:28 Asi hakuna kuna vakanga vagere pakudya, wakaziva kuti wakareverei izvozvi kwaari." 
John13:29 Nokuti vamwe vakafunga \add kuti\add*, sezvo Judhasi aigara anechikwama, Jesu wakati kwaari: Tenga zvatinoshandisa pamutambo; kana kuti ape varombo chimwe chinhu." 
John13:30 Iye akati agamuchira chimedu, akabuda pakarepo; bwakanga bwuri vusiku." 
John13:31 Zvino wakati abuda Jesu akati: Zvino Mwanakomana womunhu wakudzwa, naMwari wakudzwa maari." 
John13:32 kana Mwari akudzwa maari, Mwari uchamukudzavo maari, uchamukudza pakarepo." 
John13:33 Vana vaduku, ndichiri nemwi chinguva chiduku. Muchanditsvaka, asi sezvandakareva kuvaJudha, \add ndichiti\add*: kwandinoenda, imwi hamungagoni kuvuyako, zvino ndinoreva saizvozvovo kwamuri." 
John13:34 Murairo mutsva ndinokupai, kuti mudanane; sezvandakakudai, nemwi mudanevo." 
John13:35 Nokuda kwaizvozvo vachaziva kuti muri vadzidzi vangu, kana munorudo mumwe kunomumwe." 
John13:36 Simoni Petro akati kwaari: Ishe, munoendepiko? Jesu akamupindura, \add akati\add*: Kwandinoenda, haunganditeveri ikozvino; asi uchanditevera pashure." 
John13:37 Petro akati kwaari: Ishe, handingagoni kukuteverai zvino neiko? Ndicharadzika upenyu bwangu pasi nokuda kwako." 
John13:38 Jesu akamupindura, \add akati\add*: ucharadzikira upenyu bwako ini here? Zvirokwazvo, zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwauri: Jongwe haringariri usati wandiramba katatu." 
John14:1 Moyo yenyu irege kutambudzika; imwi munotenda kunaMwari, mutendevo kwandiri." 
John14:2 Mumusha maBaba vangu mune dzimba zhinji; dai kusaiva kudaro, ndingadai ndaikuvudzai; ndinoenda kundokugadzirirai nzvimbo." 
John14:3 Kana ndikaenda kundokugadzirirai nzvimbo, ndichavuyazve ndikugamuchirei kwandiri; kuti apo pandiri, nemwi muvepovo." 
John14:4 Uye pandinoenda munopaziva, nenzira munoiziva." 
John14:5 Tomasi akati kwaari: Ishe, hatizivi pamunoenda; ko nzira tingaiziva seiko?" 
John14:6 Jesu akati kwaari: Ndini nzira, nechokwadi, noupenyu; hapana unovuya kuna Baba, asi nokwandiri." 
John14:7 Dai makanga mandiziva ini, mungadai maizivavo Baba vangu; kubva zvino munovaziva, makavaona." 
John14:8 Firipi akati kwaari: Ishe, tiratidzei Baba, zvigotiringana." 
John14:9 Jesu akati kwaari: Ndakava nemwi nguva refu yakadai, ko hauzati wandiziva here, Firipi? Wandivona ini, wavona Baba; zvino unoreva seiko, \add uchiti\add*: Tiratidzei Baba?" 
John14:10 Hautendi here kuti ndiri munaBaba, naBaba vari mandiri? Mashoko andinoreva kwamuri, handiarevi pachangu; asi Baba, vanogara mandiri, ndivo vanoita mabasa." 
John14:11 Nditendei kuti ini \add ndiri\add* munaBaba, naBaba \add vari\add* mandiri; kana zvimwe nditendei nokuda kwamabasa amene." 
John14:12 Zvirokwazvo, zvirokwazvo, ndinoti kwamuri: Unotenda kwandiri mabasa andinoita, iye uchaaitavo, uchaita makuru kunawawa; nokuti ndinoenda kunaBaba vangu." 
John14:13 Uye chipi nechipi chamunokumbira muzita rangu, ndichachiita, kuti Baba varumbidzwe muMwanakomana." 
John14:14 Kana muchikumbira chinhu chipi kwandiri muzita rangu, ndicha\add chi\add*ita." 
John14:15 Kana muchindida, chengetai mirairo yangu." 
John14:16 Neni ndichakumbira Baba, naivovo vachakupai mumwe Munyaradzi, kuti agare nemwi nokusingaperi," 
John14:17 Mweya wechokwadi, haugoni kugamuchirwa nenyika, nokuti haimuvoni, kana kumuziva; asi imwi munomuziva, nokuti ugere nemwi, uchava mukati menyu." 
John14:18 Handingakusiyiyi muri nherera; ndichavuya kwamuri. 
John14:19 Asi kwechinguvana, nyika haichazondivoni; asi imwi munondivona, nokuti ini ndiri mupenyu, nemwivo muchava vapenyu." 
John14:20 Nezuva iro muchandiziva kuti ndiri muna baba, nemwi mandiri, neni mamuri." 
John14:21 Unemirairo yangu, achiichengeta, ndiye unondida; unondida uchadikamwa naBaba vangu; neni ndichamuda, ndichazviratidza kwaari." 
John14:22 Judhasi usati ari iye Isikariyoti) akati kwaari: Ishe, munodireiko kuzviratidza kwatiri, musingazviratidzi kunyika?" 
John14:23 Jesu akapindura akati kwaari: Kana munhu achindida, uchachengeta shoko rangu, naBaba vangu vachamuda, tichavuya kwaari, tikaita vugaro bwedu maari." 
John14:24 Usingandidi, haachengeti mashoko angu; neshoko ramunonzwa, harizi rangu, asi nderababa vakandituma." 
John14:25 Zvinhu izvozvi ndakuvudzai ndichigere nemwi. 
John14:26 Asi Munyaradzi, Mweya Mutsvene, uchatumwa naBaba muzita rangu, iye uchakudzidzisai zvinhu zvose, uye akuyevudzirei zvinhu zvose, zvandakareva kwamuri." 
John14:27 Ndinokusiyirai rugare; rugare rwangu ndinokupai kwete sokupa kwenyika ini ndinopa kwamuri. Moyo yenyu irege kutambudzika, irege kutya." 
John14:28 Makanzwa kuti ini ndakati kwamuri: Ndinoenda, ndigovuyazve kwamuri. Kana maindida, maifara, nokuti ndati ndinoenda kunaBaba; nokuti Baba vangu vakuru kwandiri." 
John14:29 Zvino ndakuvudzai zvisati zvaitika, kuti musi wazvinoitika mugotenda." 
John14:30 Kubva zvino handichazotauri zvizhinji nemwi, nokuti muchinda wenyika ino unovuya; asi haanechinhu kwandiri;" 
John14:31 asi kuti nyika izive kuti ndinoda Baba, uye kuti Baba sezvavakandiraira, ndizvo zvandinoita. Simukai, ngatibve pano." 
John15:1 Ndini muzambiringa wechokwadi, baba vangu ndivo murimi." 
John15:2 Davi rimwe nerimwe riri mandiri risingabereki chibereko vanoribvisa; rimwe nerimwe rinobereka chibereko, vanorichekerera, kuti riwedzere zvibereko." 
John15:3 Imwi matonatswa neshoko randareva kwamuri. 
John15:4 Garai mandiri, neni mamuri. Sedavi risingagoni kubereka zvibereko roga, kana risingagari mumuzambiringa, saizvozvo nemwivo, kana musingagari mandiri." 
John15:5 Ini ndiri muzambiringa, imwi matavi. Unogara mandiri, neni maari, ndiye unobereka zvibereko zvakawanda; nokuti kunze kwangu hamugoni kuita chinhu." 
John15:6 Kana munhu asingagari mandiri, unorashwa kunze sedavi, ndokuwoma; vanoavunganidza, ndokukandira mumoto apiswe." 
John15:7 Kana muchigara mandiri, namashoko angu achigara mamuri, muchakumbira zvamunoda, muchazviitirwa." 
John15:8 Baba vangu vanokudzwa naizvozvi, kuti mubereke zvibereko zvakawanda; uye muchava vadzidzi vangu." 
John15:9 Baba sezvavakandida, saizvozvovo ndakakudai; garai murudo rwangu." 
John15:10 Kana muchichengeta mirairo yangu, muchagara murudo rwangu, seni ndakachengeta mirairo yaBaba vangu, ndinogara murudo rwavo." 
John15:11 Zvinhu izvozvi ndakazvitaura kwamuri, kuti mufaro wangu ugare mamuri, nomufaro wenyu uzare." 
John15:12 Uyu ndiwo murairo wangu, kuti mudanane, sezvandakakudai." 
John15:13 Hakunomunhu unorudo rukuru kunourwu, kuti munhu aradzikire pasi shamwari dzake upenyu bwake." 
John15:14 imwi muri shamwari dzangu, kana muchiita chipi nechipi chandinokurairai." 
John15:15 Handichakuidziyi varanda; nokuti muranda haazivi zvinoitwa nashe wake, asi ndinokuidzai shamwari; nokuti zvose zvandakanzwa naBaba vangu, ndakakuzivisai izvo." 
John15:16 Imwi hamuna kundisanangura, asi ini ndakakusanangurai ndikakugadzai, kuti muende mubereke zvibereko, uye zvibereko zenyu zvigare; kuti chinhu chipi nechipi chamuchakumbira kunaBaba muzita rangu, vakupei." 
John15:17 Izvi zvinhu ndinokurairai, kuti mudanane." 
John15:18 Kana nyika ichikuvengai, muzive kuti yakandivenga isati \add yakuvengai\add* imwi." 
John15:19 Kana maiva venyika, nyika yaida vayo; asi nokuti hamusi venyika, asi ini ndakakusanangurai kubva panyika, naizvozvo nyika inokuvengai." 
John15:20 Rangarirai shoko randakareva kwamuri: Muranda haazi mukuru kunashe wake. Kana vakatambudza ini, vachakutambudzaivo, kana vakachengeta shoko rangu nerenyuvo vachachengeta." 
John15:21 Asi izvi zvose vachakuitirai nokuda kwezita rangu, nokuti havamuzivi iye wakandituma." 
John15:22 Dai ndisina kuvuya ndikataura kwavari, vangadai vasina chivi; asi zvino havana manzvengero ezvivi zvavo." 
John15:23 Unondivenga, unovenga Baba vanguvo." 
John15:24 Dai ndisina kuita pakati pavo mabasa asina kumboitwa nomumwe munhu, vangadai vasina zvivi; asi zvino vakavona ndokuvenga zvose ini naBaba vangu." 
John15:25 Asi zvakaitwa, kuti shoko rizadzisike rakanyorwa pamurairo wavo, \add rinoti\add*: Vakandivenga ndisinemhosva."

John15:27 Nemwivo muchapupura, nokuti maiva neni kubva pakutanga." 
John16:1 Zvinhu izvi ndakazvitaura kwamuri kuti murege kugumburwa. 
John16:2 Vachakubudisai mumasinagoge; hongu nguva inovuya, apo mumwe nomumwe unokuvurayai, uchati unobatira Mwari basa." 
John16:3 Nezvinhu izvozvi vachazviita kwamuri, nokuti havana kuziva baba, kana ini." 
John16:4 Asi ndataura zvinhu izvi kwamuri, kuti kana nguva yasvika mugozvirangarira, kuti ndakakuvudzai pamusoro pazvo. Handina kukuvudzai izvi kubva pakutanga, nokuti ndaiva nemwi." 
John16:5 Asi zvino ndinoenda kunowakandituma; hakunomumwe wenyu unondibvunza, \add achiti\add*: Munoendepiko?" 
John16:6 Asi nokuti ndareva zvinhu izvi kwamuri kushungurudzika kwazadza moyo yenyu. 
John16:7 Asi ini ndinokuvudzai chokwadi: Zviri nani kwamuri kuti ndiende, nokuti kana ndisingaendi, Munyaradzi haangavuyi kwamuri; asi kana ndikaenda, ndichamutumira kwamuri." 
John16:8 Zvino kana asvika, uchatsiura nyika pamusoro pezvivi, napamusoro pokururama, napamusoro pokutongwa;" 
John16:9 pamusoro pezvivi, nokuti havatendi kwandiri;" 
John16:10 pamusoro pokururama, nokuti ndinoenda kunaBaba vangu, hamungazondivonizve;" 
John16:11 pamusoro pokutongwa, nokuti muchinda wenyika ino watongwa." 
John16:12 Ndichine zvizhinji zvokutaura kwamuri, asi hamugoni kuzvitakura zvino." 
John16:13 Asi kana iye asvika, Mweya wechokwadi, uchakutungamirirai muchokwadi chose; nokuti haangatauri zvomusoro wake, asi choga choga chaakanzwa uchachitaura, uye uchakuvudzai zvinovuya." 
John16:14 Uchandikudza, nokuti uchatora pane zvangu, uye ucha\add zvi\add*kumikidza kwamuri." 
John16:15 Zvose Baba zvavanazvo, ndezvangu; saka ndichiti: Uchatora pane zvangu, akaratidza kwamuri." 
John16:16 Kwechinguvana, hamuchazondivoni; uyezve chinguvana, muchandivona nokuti ndinoenda kunaBaba." 
John16:17 Zvino \add vamwe\add* vavadzidzi vake vakataurirana \add vachiti\add*: Chinyiko ichi chaanoreva kwatiri: Kwechinguva chiduku, hamuchazondivoni; uyezve kwechinguvana muchandivona, uye: Nokuti ndinoenda kunaBaba?" 
John16:18 Naizvozvo vakati: Chinyiko chaanoti: Chinguvana? Hatizivi chaanotaura. 
John16:19 Jesu akaziva kuti vakanga vachida kumubvunza, akati kwavari: Munobvunzana here kuti ndati: Chinguvana hamuchazondivoni, uyezve chinguvana muchandivona?" 
John16:20 Zvirokwazvo, zvirokwazvo, ndinoti kwamuri: Imwi mucharira nokuchema, asi nyika ichafara; uye imwi muchashungurudzika, asi kushungurudzika kwenyu kuchashanduka mufaro." 
John16:21 Mukadzi kana achisununguka, unoshungurudzika, nokuti nguva yake yasvika; asi kana apona mwana, haachafungizve kutambudzika, nokufara kuti munhu waponwa panyika." 
John16:22 Naizvozvo nemwi zvino mune shungu; asi ndichakuvonaizve, nomoyo yenyu ichafara; hakunomunhu ungakutorerai mufaro wenyu." 
John16:23 Zvino nezuva iro hamungazondibvunzi chinhu. Zvirokwazvo, zvirokwazvo, ndinoti kwamuri: Chipi nechipi chamuchakumbira kunaBaba muzita rangu vachakupai." 
John16:24 Kusvikira zvino hamuna kukumbira chinhu muzita rangu; kumbirai muchagamuchira, mufaro wenyu uzare." 
John16:25 Zvinhu izvi ndataura kwamuri nemifananidzo, nguva inovuya yandisingazotauri kwamuri nemifananidzo; asi ndichakuvudzai pachena zvaBaba;" 
John16:26 Nezuva iro muchakumbira muzita rangu; handikuvudziyi, kuti ndichakukumbirirai kunaBaba;" 
John16:27 nokuti Baba vamene vanokudai, nokuti imwi makandida, mukatenda, kuti ini ndakabva kunaMwari." 
John16:28 Ndakabva kuna Baba, ndikavuya panyika; ndinobvazve panyika, ndichienda kunaBaba." 
John16:29 Vadzidzi vake vakati kwaari: Tarirai, zvino motaura pachena, musingatauri nemadimikira." 
John16:30 Zvino toziva zvirokwazvo kuti munoziva zvinhu zvose, hamutsvaki kuti munhu akubvunzei; naizvozvi tinotenda kuti makabuda kunaMwari." 
John16:31 Jesu akavapindura \add akati\add*: Motenda zvino here? 
John16:32 Tarirai, nguva inovuya, hongu yatosvika, yamuchaparadzirwa, mumwe nomumwe kune zvake, mundisiye ndiri ndoga; asi handizi ndoga, nokuti Baba vaneni." 
John16:33 Ndakareva zvinhu izvi kwamuri, kuti muve norugare mandiri. Panyika muchava namatambudziko; asi tsungai moyo, ini ndakakunda nyika." 
John17:1 Jesu wakataura izvozvi, akasimudzira meso ake kudenga, akati: Baba, nguva yasvika; kudzai Mwanakomana wenyu, kuti Mwanakomana wenyu akukudzeivo imwi," 
John17:2 sezvamakamupa simba pamusoro penyama yose, kuti vose vamakamupa, avape upenyu bwusingaperi." 
John17:3 Zvino ubwu ndibwo upenyu bwusingaperi, kuti vakuzivei imwi Mwari woga wechokwadi, naJesu Kristu wamakatuma." 
John17:4 Ndakakukudzai panyika; ndapedza basa ramakandipa kuti ndiriite; 
John17:5 uye zvino imwi baba, mundikudze pamberi penyu nokukudzwa kwandaiva nako nemwi, nyika isati yavapo." 
John17:6 Ndakaratidza zita renyu kuvanhu vamakandipa kubva panyika; vakanga vari venyu, uye makavapa ini, vakachengeta shoko renyu." 
John17:7 Zvino vanoziva kuti zvose-zvose, zvamakandipa zvinobva kwamuri." 
John17:8 Nokuti ndakapa kwavari mashoko amakandipa; vakaagamuchira, vakaziva zvirokwazvo kuti ndakabuda kwamuri, vakatenda kuti makandituma." 
John17:9 Ndinovanyengeterera ivo; handinyengetereri nyika, asi avo vamakandipa, nokuti ndivo venyu." 
John17:10 Zvino zvose zvangu ndezvenyu, nezvenyu ndezvangu; ndakakudzwa mavari." 
John17:11 Uye zvino ini handichiri munyika, asi iva vari munyika; ini ndinovuya kwamuri Baba vatsvene, vachengetei muzita renyu, avo vamakandipa, kuti vave vamwe, sesu." 
John17:12 Pandaiva navo panyika, ini ndaivachengeta muzita renyu, avo vamakandipa; ndikachengeta panyika, hapanomumwe wavo wakarashika, asi mwanakomana wokurashwa, kuti rugwaro ruitike." 
John17:13 Asi zvino ndovuya kwamuri, uye ndinotaura izvi panyika, kuti vave nomufaro wangu, wakazadziswa mavari." 
John17:14 Ini ndakavapa shoko renyu, nyika ikavavenga, nokuti havazi venyika, seni ndisi wenyika." 
John17:15 Handinyengeteri kuti muvabvise panyika, asi kuti muvachengete kune zvakaipa" 
John17:16 Havazi venyika, seni ndisi wenyika," 
John17:17 Vaitei vatsvene muchokwadi chenyu; shoko renyu ichokwadi. 
John17:18 Sezvamakandituma panyika, saizvozvo nenivo ndakavatuma panyika." 
John17:19 Ndinozviita mutsvene nokuda kwavo, kuti naivovo vaitwe vatsvene muchokwadi." 
John17:20 Uye handinyengetereri ava chete, asi naivo vachatendavo kwandiri neshoko ravo;" 
John17:21 kuti vose vave vamwe; semwi Baba mandiri, neni mamuri; kuti naivovo vave mumwe matiri, kuti nyika itende kuti makandituma." 
John17:22 Nokubwinya kwamakandipa, ndakavapa, kuti vave mumwe, sesu tiri mumwe." 
John17:23 Ini mavari, nemwi mandiri, vazadziswe kuva mumwe; uye kuti nyika izive kuti makandituma, uye kuti makavada, sezvamakada ini." 
John17:24 Baba, ndinoda kuti naivovo vamakandipa, vave neni apo pandiri, kuti vavone kubwinya kwangu, kwamakandipa, nokuti makandida nyika isati yavambwa." 
John17:25 Haiwa Baba vakarurama, nyika haina kukuzivai, asi ini ndakakuzivai, naivava vakaziva kuti makandituma;" 
John17:26 uye ndakazivisa kwavari zita renyu, uye ndicha\add ri\add*zivisa, kuti rudo rwamakandida narwo ruve mavari, neni mavari." 
John18:1 Jesu wakati areva izvozvo akabuda navadzidzi vake, akaenda mhiri kkwerukova rweKedhironi paiva nomunda, akapinda mauri iye navadzidzi vake."

John18:3 Naizvozvo Judhasi, atora boka ravarwi, navatariri vaibva kuvaprista vakuru navaFarisi, akasvikapo nematochi nemarambi, nezvombo zvokurwa nazvo." 
John18:4 Zvino Jesu, zvaakanga achiziva zvose zvaifanira kumuwira, akabuda, akati kwavari: Munotsvaka aniko?" 
John18:5 Vakamupindura, \add vakati\add*: Jesu weNazareta. Jesu akati kwavari: Ndini, naJudhasivo wakamutengesa, wakanga amirevo navo."

John18:10 Zvino Simoni Petro wakanga anomunondo, akauvhomora akatema muranda womuprista mukuru, akagura nzeve yake yorudyi. Zita romuranda uyo rainzi Marikosi." 
John18:11 Zvino Jesu akati kunaPetro: Isa munondo wako mumuhara; mukombe wandakapiwa naBaba, handingaumwi here?" 
John18:12 Zvino boka ravarwi nomukuru wechuru navatariri vavaJudha vakabata Jesu, vakamusunga,"

John18:14 Zvino Kayafasi ndiye wakanga apa vaJudha zano, kuti zvakanaka kuti munhu mumwe afire vanhu." 
John18:15 Zvino Simoni Petro wakatevera Jesu, nomumwe mudzidzi. Mudzidzi uyu waizikamwa nomuprista mukuru, akapinda naJesu muruvazhe rwomuprista mukuru;" 
John18:16 asi Petro wakanga amire panze pamukova. Zvino uya mumwe mudzidzi, waizikamwa nomuprista mukuru, akataura nomukadzi wairinda mukova, akapinza Petro." 
John18:17 Zvino musikana wairinda mukova akati kunaPetro: Newevo hausi mumwe wavadzidzi vomunhu uyu here? Akati: Handizi.

John18:19 Zvino muprista mukuru akabvunza Jesu zvavadzidzi vake, nedzidziso yake."

John18:21 Unondibvunzireiko ini? Bvunza ava vainzwa zvandaitaura kwavari; tarirai ava vanoziva zvandaireva. 
John18:22 Wakati areva zvinhu izvozvo, mumwe wavatariri wakanga amirepo, akarova Jesu nembama, achiti: Unopindura muprista mukuru uchidaro nhai?" 
John18:23 Jesu akamupindura \add akati\add*: Kana ndareva zvakaipa, pupura zvakaipa zvacho; asi kana zvakanaka wagondirovereiko?" 
John18:24 Zvino Anasi akamutumira akasungwa kunaKayafasi, muprista mukuru." 
John18:25 Zvino Simoni Petro wakanga amirepo, achidziya \add moto\add*; vakati kwaari: Hausivo mumwe wavadzidzi vake here? Akaramba, akati: Handizati."

John18:27 Petro akarambazve; pakarepo jongwe rikarira. 
John18:28 Zvino vakabvisa Jesu kuna Kayafasi vakaenda kuimba yomutongi; aiva mangwanani, asi ivo havana kupinda mumba momubati, kuti varege kusvibiswa, vagodya paseka." 
John18:29 Ipapo Pirato akabudira kwavari, akati: Munomupa mhosva yeiko munhu uyu?" 
John18:30 Vakapindura, vakati kwaari: Dai munhu uyu asaiva muiti wezvivi, tingadai tisina kumukumikidza kwamuri." 
John18:31 Zvino Pirato akati kwavari: Chimutorai imwi, mumutonge nomurairo wenyu. Naizvozvo vaJudha vakati kwaari: Hatina kutenderwa isu kuti tivuraye munhu;" 
John18:32 kuti shoko raJesu raakareva riitike, achidudzira kufa kwaaifanira kufa nako." 
John18:33 Zvino Pirato akapindazve mumba momubati, akadana Jesu, akati kwaari: Ndiwe mambo wavaJudha here?" 
John18:34 Jesu akapindura, \add akati\add*: Unozvireva izvi pachako here, kana wazvivudzwa navamwe pamusoro pangu?" 
John18:35 Pirato akapindura, \add akati\add*: Ini ndiri muJudha here? Rudzi rwako navaprista vakuru vakakukumikidza kwandiri; waiteiko?" 
John18:36 Jesu akapindura, \add akati\add*: Ushe bwangu habwuzi bwenyika ino; dai ushe bwangu bwaiva bwenyika ino, varanda vangu vangadai vairwa, kuti ndirege kukumikidzwa kuvaJudha; asi zvino ushe bwangu habwuzi bwapano." 
John18:37 Ipapo Pirato akati kwaari: Saka iwe uri mambo here? Jesu akapindura akati: Unoreva iwe kuti ndiri mambo. Ndakaberekerwa izvozvo, ndakavuyira izvozvo munyika kuti ndipupurire chokwadi. Mumwe nomumwe wechokwadi unonzwa inzwi rangu." 
John18:38 Pirato akati kwaari: chokwadi chinyiko? Akati areva izvozvi, akabudirazve kuvaJudha, akati kwavari: Ini handiwani mhosva kwaari." 
John18:39 Asi imwi munetsika kuti ndikusunungurirei mumwe papaseka; zvino munoda kuti ndikusunungurirei mambo wavaJudha here? 
John18:40 Ipapo vakadanidzirazve vose, vachiti: kwete munhu uyu, asi Bharabhasi! Zvino Bharabhasi wakanga ari gororo." 
John19:1 Zvino Pirato wakatora Jesu, akamurova netyava." 
John19:2 Varwi vakaruka korona yemhinzwa, vakaisa pamusoro wake, vakamupfekedza nguvo shava." 
John19:3 Vakati: Hekanhi, Mambo wavaJudha! Vakamurova nembama." 
John19:4 Ipapo Pirato akabudazve panze, akati kwavari: Tarirai, ndinomubudisira kwamuri, kuti muzive kuti handiwani mhosva kwaari." 
John19:5 Jesu akabuda panze, akadzika korona yemhinzwa, anenguvo shava. \add Pirato\add* akati kwavari: Tarirai munhu uyu!" 
John19:6 Zvino vaprista vakuru navatariri vakati vachimuvona, vakadanidzira, vachiti: Rovera, rovera! Pirato akati kwavari: Chimutorai imwi, murovere; nokuti ini handiwani mhosva kwaari." 
John19:7 VaJudha vakamupindura, \add vakati\add*: Isu tinomurairo, zvino nomurairo wedu unofanira kufa, nokuti wakazviita Mwanakomana waMwari." 
John19:8 Zvino Pirato wakati anzwa shoko iri, akanyanya kutya." 
John19:9 Akapindazve mumba momutongi, akati kuna Jesu Unobvepiko iwe? Asi Jesu haana kumupa mhinduro." 
John19:10 Ipapo Pirato akati kwaari: Hautauri neni here? Hauzivi here kuti ndine simba rokukurovera uye ndine simba rokukusunungura? 
John19:11 Jesu akapindura, \add akati\add*: Haungatongovi nesimba pamusoro pangu, kana usina kuripiwa richibva kumusoro; naizvozvo wakandikumikidza kwauri, unezvivi zvinokunda zvako." 
John19:12 Zvino kubva ipapo Pirato akatsvaka kumusunungura; asi vaJudha vakadanidzira, vachiti: Kana mukasunungura munhu uyu, hamuzi shamwari yaKesari; mumwe nomumwe unozviita mambo, unoramba Kesari." 
John19:13 Zvino Pirato wakati anzwa shoko iroro, akabudisa Jesu, akagara pachigaro chokutonga, panzvimbo inonzi Pakarongwa naMambwe, asi nechiHebheru Gabhata." 
John19:14 Zvino raiva \add zuva re\add*gadziriro yepaseka; yaiva nguva inenge yechitanhatu. Akati kuvaJudha: Tarirai Mambo wenyu! 
John19:15 Asi vakadanidzira, \add vachiti\add*: Bvisa, bvisa, umurovere! Pirato akati kwavari: Ndorovera Mambo wenyu here? Vaprista vakuru vakapindura vachiti: Hatina mambo, asi Kesari chete." 
John19:16 Naizvozvo akamukumikidza kwavari, kuti aroverwe. Zvino vakatora Jesu vakaenda naye." 
John19:17 Akabuda akatakura muchinjikwa wake, akaenda kunzvimbo yainzi yeDehenya, nechiHebheru ichinzi Gorogota;" 
John19:18 apo pavakamurovera navamwe vaviri naye, mumwe parutivi, mumwe parutivi, Jesu pakati." 
John19:19 Pirato akanyoravo chiziviso akachiisa pamuchinjikwa; chakanga chakanyorwa \add kuti\add*: JESU MUNAZARETA MAMBO WAVAJUDHA. 
John19:20 Zvino vazhinji vavaJudha vakarava chiziviso ichi; nokuti nzvimbo iyo pakanga pakaroverwa Jesu yaiva pedo neguta; rwakanyorwa nechiHebheru, nechiRoma, nechiGiriki." 
John19:21 Ipapo vaprista vakuru vavaJudha vakati kuna Pirato: Musanyora \add muchiti\add*: Mambo wavaJudha, asi kuti uye wakati: Ndiri mambo wavaJudha." 
John19:22 Pirato akapindura \add akati\add*: Zvandanyora, ndanyora." 
John19:23 Zvino varwi vakati varovera Jesu, vakatora nguvo dzake, vakaita migove mina, murwi mumwe nomumwe mugove; nenguvo yapasivo. Zvino nguvo iyi yakanga isina pakasonwa, asi yakanga yakarukwa yose kubva kumusoro kwayo." 
John19:24 Naizvozvo vakataurirana, vachiti: Ngatirege kuibvarura, asi tikande mijenya pamusoro payo, kuti ichava yaani; kuti rugwaro ruzadzisike runoti: Vakagovana nguvo dzangu pakati pavo. Vakakanda mijenya pamusoro pechokufuka changu. Ndizvo zvakaitwa navarwi." 
John19:25 Zvino pamuchinjikwa waJesu pakanga pamire mai vake, nomunin'ina wamai vake, Maria, \add mukadzi\add* waKiropasi, naMaria Magadharini." 
John19:26 Zvino Jesu wakati achivona mai vake, nomudzidzi waaida, amirepo, akati kunamai vake: Mukadzi, tarira, mwanakomana wako." 
John19:27 Shure kwaizvozvo akati kumudzidzi: Tarira mai vako. Kubva panguva iyo mudzidzi akavatora, akavaisa \add kumba\add* kwake." 
John19:28 Shure kwaizvozvi, Jesu wakati achiziva kuti zvinhu zvose zvapera, kuti rugwaro ruzadzisike, akati: Ndinenyota." 
John19:29 Zvino pakanga pakagadzikwapo hari izere nevhiniga; zvino vakazadza chipanje nevhiniga vakaisa parutanda rwehisopi, vakaisa kumuromo wake." 
John19:30 Zvino Jesu wakati agamuchira vhiniga, akati: Zvapera! Akakotamisa musoro wake, akapa Mweya \add wake\add*." 
John19:31 Naizvozvo vaJudha nokuti wakanga uri musi wokugadzirira, kuti mitumbi isagara pamuchinjikwa nezuva resabata (nokuti zuva resabata raiva zuva guru), vakakumbira Pirato kuti makumbo avo avhuniwe, kuti vabviswe." 
John19:32 Naizvozvo varwi vakavuya, vakavhuna makumbo owokutanga, noomumwe wakanga aroverwa pamuchinjikwa pamwe chete naye;" 
John19:33 asi vakati vachisvika kunaJesu, vakavona kuti watofa hake, havana kuvhuna makumbo ake," 
John19:34 asi mumwe murwi wakabaya rutivi rwake nepfumo, pakarepo ropa nemvura zvikabuda." 
John19:35 Uyo wakavona, ndiye wakapupura, uye kupupura kwake ndokwechokwadi; iye unoziva kuti unoreva zvirokwazvo, kuti imwi mutende." 
John19:36 Nokuti zvinhu izvi zvakaitwa kuti rugwaro ruzadzisike runoti: Fupa rake haringavhunwi. 
John19:37 Norumwe Rugwarozve runoti: Vachatarira uyo wavakabvovora. 
John19:38 Shure kwaizvozvi Josefa weArimatia, waiva mudzidzi waJesu, asi pakavanda nokutya vaJudha, wakakumbira kuna Pirato kuti abvise mutumbi waJesu; Pirato akamutendera. Naizvozvo akavuya akabvisa mutumbi waJesu." 
John19:39 Kwakavuyavo naNikodhimo, iye pakutanga wakambovuya kuna Jesu vusiku, anemura* nearosi* zvakavhenganiswa, mapaundi anenge zana." 
John19:40 Ipapo vakatora mutumbi waJesu, vakamuputira nemicheka yerineni pamwe chete nezvinonhuhwira, setsika yavaJudha yokuviga." 
John19:41 Zvino panzvimbo iyo paakaroverwa pakanga pane bindu, mubindu imomo maiva nebwiro vutsva, makanga musina kumboiswa munhu." 
John19:42 Zvino vakaisa Jesu ipapo nokuda kwegadziriro yavaJudha, nokuti bwiro bwakanga bwuri pedo." 
John20:1 Zvino no\add musi\add* wokutanga wevhiki Maria Magadarene wakasvika pabwiro mambakwedza kuchakasviba, akavona ibwe rabviswa pabwiro." 
John20:2 Akamhanya, akasvika kuna Simoni Petro nokunomumwe mudzidzi waidikamwa naJesu, akati kwavari: Vabvisa Ishe mubwiro, hatizivi pavakamuradzika." 
John20:3 Zvino Petro akabuda nouya mumwe mudzidzi, vakasvika kubwiro." 
John20:4 Vakamhanya vari vaviri pamwechete; uya mumwe mudzidzi akamhanyisa akakunda Petro, akatanga kusvika pabwiro." 
John20:5 Wakati akotama achidongorera akavona micheka yerineni pasi, asi haana-kupinda." 
John20:6 Zvino Simoni Petro akasvikavo achimutevera akapinda mubwiro, akavona micheka iri pasi," 
John20:7 nemucheka wekumeso wakanga wakamonera mumusoro wake, usati uri kune micheka yerineni, asi wakapetwa uri pamwe woga." 
John20:8 Zvino uya mumwe mudzidzi wakatanga kusvika pabwiro akapindavo akavona, akatenda;" 
John20:9 nokuti vakanga vachigere kunzwisisisa rugwaro, kuti unofanira kumuka kuvakafa." 
John20:10 Zvino vadzidzi vakabva vakaenda kwavo. 
John20:11 Asi Maria wakamira kunze pabwiro achichema; zvino achachema akakotama akadongorera mubwiro. 
John20:12 Akavona vatumwa vaviri, vane\add nguvo\add* chena vagere, mumwe kumusoro, mumwe kumakumbo, ipapo pakambenge parere mutumbi waJesu." 
John20:13 Ivo vakati kwaari: Mai, munochemeiko? Akati kwavari: Nokuti vakabvisa Ishe wangu, zvino handizivi kwavakamuisa." 
John20:14 Zvino wakati achireva izozvo akatendevukira shure, akavona Jesu amire, asi haana-kuziva kuti ndiJesu." 
John20:15 Jesu akati kwaari: Mai, munochemeiko? Munotsvaka aniko? Iye achifunga kuti ndiye murimi womunda, akati kwaari: Ishe, kana muri imwi mamubvisa, ndivudzei pamamuisa, ndindomutora." 
John20:16 Jesu akati kwaari: Maria! Iye akatendevuka akati kwaari: Rabhoni! ndokuti Mudzidzisi," 
John20:17 Jesu akati kwaari: Usandibata, nokuti ndichigere kukwira kunaBaba vangu; asi enda kuhama dzangu, uti kwavari: Ndinokwira kunababa vangu naBaba venyu naMwari wangu naMwari wenyu." 
John20:18 Maria Magidharini akaenda akavudza vadzidzi kuti wavona Ishe, uye wakanga amuvudza zvinhu izvi." 
John20:19 Zvino ava madeko pazuva iroro, rokutanga revhiki, mikova yapfigwa pakanga pakavungana vadzidzi nokutya vaJudha, Jesu akasvika, akamira pakati, akati kwavari: Rugare kwamuri." 
John20:20 Zvino wakati areva izvozvo akavaratidza zvanza \add zvake\add* norutivi \add rwake\add*. Vadzidzi vakafara vachivona Ishe," 
John20:21 Jesu akatizve kwavari: Rugare kwamuri; Baba sezvavakandituma, neni ndinokutumaivo." 
John20:22 Zvino wakati areva izvozvi akafemera \add kwavari\add*, akati kwavari: Gamuchirai Mweya Mutsvene." 
John20:23 Vose vamunokangamwira zvivi zvavo, vazvikangamwirwa; vose vamunobata zvavo zvabatwa." 
John20:24 Asi Tomasi, mumwe wavanegumi navaviri wainzi Batya, wakanga asipo pavari pakuvuya kwaJesu." 
John20:25 Zvino vamwe vadzidzi vakati kwaari: Tavona Ishe. Asi iye wakati kwavari: Kana ndikasavona mavanga embambo muzvanza zvake, nokuisa mumwe wangu paiva nembambo, nokuisa ruvoko rwangu murutivi rwake, handingatongotendi." 
John20:26 Mushure mamazuva maserezve vadzidzi vakanga vari mukati, naTomasi anavo. Jesu akasvika, mikova yapfigwa, akamira pakati pavo akati: Rugare kwamuri." 
John20:27 Ipapo akati kunaTomasi: Vuyisa pano mumwe wako, uvone zvanza zvangu; vuyisa ruvoko rwako uise murutivi rwangu, usava usina kutenda, asi unotenda." 
John20:28 Tomasi akapindura, akati kwaari: Ishe wangu, naMwari wangu!" 
John20:29 Jesu akati kwaari: Tomasi, watenda nokuti wandivona? Vakaropafadzwa vasina-kuvona asi vakatenda." 
John20:30 Zvino Jesu wakaita zvimwe zvishamiso zvizhinji pamberi pavadzidzi vake, zvisina kunyorwa mubhuku iyi;" 
John20:31 asi izvi zvakanyorwa, kuti mutende kuti Jesu ndiye Kristu, Mwanakomana waMwari; uye kuti muchitenda muve noupenyu muzita rake." 
John21:1 Shure kwaizvozvi Jesu wakazviratidzazve kuvadzidzi vake pagungwa reTiberiasi; akazviratidza kudai: 
John21:2 VanaSimoni Petro, naTomasi, wainzi Batya, naNatanieri weKana yeGariri, navanakomana vaZebhedhi, navamwe vaviri vavadzidzi vake, vakanga vari pamwe chete." 
John21:3 Simoni Petro akati kwavari: Ndondobata hove. Vakati kwaari: Nesu tinoendavo newe. Vakabuda vakapinda muchikepe pakarepo; asi vusiku ubwo havana-kubata chinhu. 
John21:4 Zvino kwakati kwaidza, Jesu akamira pamhenderekedzo, asi vadzidzi vakanga vasingazivi kuti ndiJesu." 
John21:5 Zvino Jesu akati kwavari: Vana, mune chokudya here? Vakamupindura, \add vachiti\add*: Kwete." 
John21:6 Akati kwavari: Kandai mumbure kurutivi rworudyi rwechikepe mugowana. Ipapo vakakanda, vakasagona zvino kurukweva nokuwanda kwehove." 
John21:7 Zvino mudzidzi uya waidikamwa naJesu akati kunaPetro: NdiShe. Ipapo Simoni Petro wakati achinzwa kuti ndiShe, akasunga nguvo yake yokunze, nokuti wakanga asina kusimira, akazviwisira mugungwa." 
John21:8 Asi vamwe vadzidzi vakavuya nechikepe chidiki, vachikweva mumbure unehove, nokuti vakanga vasi kure nenyika asi makubhiti* anenge mazana maviri." 
John21:9 Zvino vakati vachangosvika panyika, vakavona moto wamazimbe ipapo, nehove yakaradzikwa pamusoro pawo, nechingwa." 
John21:10 Jesu akati kwavari: Vuyai \add nedzimwe\add* dzehove dzamabata ikozvino. 
John21:11 Simoni Petro akakwira akakwevera mumbure panyika, wakanga uzere nehove huru, zana namakumi mashanu nenhatu; asi kunyange dzaiva zhinji dzakadai, mumbure hauna kubvaruka." 
John21:12 Jesu akati kwavari: Vuyai mudye. Asi kwakanga kusinomumwe wavadzidzi vake wakatsunga kumubvunza \add kuti\add*: Ndimwi aniko? Vachiziva kuti ndiyeShe. 
John21:13 Zvino Jesu wakauya, akatora chingwa, akavapa, nehovevo saizvozvo." 
John21:14 Urwu rwaiva rwechitatu Jesu achizviratidza kuvadzidzi vake, amuka kuvakafa." 
John21:15 Zvino vakati vadya, Jesu akati kunaSimoni Petro: Simoni, waJona, unondida kupfuvura ava here? Akati kwaari: Hongu, Ishe; munoziva kuti ndinokudai. Akati kwaari: Fudza makwayana angu," 
John21:16 Akati kwaaarizve rwechipiri: Simoni waJona unondida here? akati kwaari Hongu, Ishe; munoziva kuti ndinokudai. Jesu akati kwaari: Fudza makwai angu." 
John21:17 Akati kwaari rwechitatu: Simoni waJona; Unondida here? Petro akarwadziwa moyo nokuti wakati kwaari rwechitatu: Unondida here? Akati kwaari: Ishe, imwi munoziva zvinhu zvose; munoziva kuti ndinokudai. Jesu akati kwaari: Fudza makwai angu." 
John21:18 Zvirokwazvo, zvirokwazvo, ndinoti kwauri: Uchiri muduku, waizvisunga chivuno, uchifamba kwawaida; asi kana wakwegura, uchatambanudza mavoko ako, mumwe uchakusunga chivuno, achi\add ku\add*isa kwausingadi." 
John21:19 Wakareva izvozvi, achitaridza kufa kwaaizokudza Mwari nako. Zvino wakati areva izvozvo, akati kwaari: Nditevere." 
John21:20 Petro akatendevuka akavona uya mudzidzi waidikamwa naJesu achitevera, ndiyevo wakasendamira pachifuva chake pachirayiro akati: Ishe, ndianiko uchakupandukirai?" 
John21:21 Zvino Petro wakati achimuvona akati kunaJesu: Ishe, ko uyu?" 
John21:22 Jesu akati kwaari: Kana ndikada kuti agare kusvikira ndichivuya, uneiko nazvo? Nditevere iwe." 
John21:23 Zvino shoko iro rakapararira pakati pehama, kuti mudzidzi uyu haangazofi; asi Jesu haana kureva kwaari, kuti haangazofi; asi \add wakati\add*: Kana ndichida kuti agare kusvikira ndichivuya, uneiko nazvo iwe?" 
John21:24 Ndiyeyu mudzidzi unopupura zvinhu izvi, nokunyoravo zvinhu izvi; zvino tinoziva kuti kupupura kwake ndokwechokwadi." 
John21:25 Zvimwe zvizhinji zviriko zvakaitwa naJesu; kana zvainyorwa chimwe nechimwe, ndinoti: Kunyange nenyika yose haizairingana bhuku dzinganyorwa. Amen." 
Acts1:1 Rondedzero yokutanga ndakaiita Teofiro, nezvose Jesu zvaakatanga zvose kuita nokudzidzisa," 
Acts1:2 kusvikira zuva raakakwidzwa, amboraira noMweya Mutsvene kuvapositora vaakanga asanangura;" 
Acts1:3 vaakazviratidzavo kwavari ari mupenyu shure kokutambudzika kwake neuchapupu uzhinji, husingagoni kurambwa, achivonekwa navo mazuva anamakumi mana, achitaura zvinhu zvovushe bwaMwari;" 
Acts1:4 zvino avungana navo, akavaraira kuti varege kubva Jerusarema asi vamirire chivimbiso chaBaba, chamakanzwa neni;" 
Acts1:5 nokuti Johwani zvirokwazvo wakabhabhatidza nemvura, asi imwi muchabhabhatidzwa noMweya Mutsvene kusati kwapfuura mazuva mazhinji." 
Acts1:6 Naizvozvo ivo vakati vavungana, vakamubvunza vachiti: Ishe, muchadzosera vushe kuvaIsraeri nenguva ino here?" 
Acts1:7 Akati kwavari: Hazvisi zvenyu kuziva nguva kana misi yakatarwa naBaba vamene nesimba ravo; 
Acts1:8 Asi muchagamuchira simba, Mweya Mutsvene avuya pamusoro penyu; ipapo muchava zvapupu zvangu kose paJerusarema neJudhiya rose neSamaria, nokumugumo wenyika." 
Acts1:9 Zvino wakati areva izvozvi, akakwidzwa, vakatarira negore rikamubvisa pazviso zvavo." 
Acts1:10 Zvino vachitarisisa kudenga, achikwira, zvino tarira, varume vaviri vamire navo nenguvo chena;" 
Acts1:11 ivovo vakati: Imwi varume veGariri, makamirireiko makatarira kudenga? iyeyu Jesu, unobviswa kwamuri, \add achikwidzwa\add* kudenga, uchavuya saizvozvo nenzira yamunomuona achienda nayo kudenga." 
Acts1:12 Zvino vakadzokera Jerusarema, vachibva pagomo rinonzi reMiorivhi, riri pedo neJerusarema, \add chinhambwe\add* cherwendo rwesabata." 
Acts1:13 Vakati vapinda, vakakwira muimba yepamusoro, apo pavaigara, Peturo naJohwani naJakobho naAndiriya, Firipi naTomasi, Bhatironomiyo naMatewu, Jakobho waAerfeo naSimoni Zeroti, naJudhasi waJakobho." 
Acts1:14 Ava vose vakatsungirira nomoyo mumwe mukunyengetera nokukumbira, pamwe navakadzi, naMaria mai vaJesu, uye navanun'una vake." 
Acts1:15 Zvino namazuva iwayo Peturo wakasimuka pakati pevadzidzi, kwaiva nechaunga navanhu pamwechete vanenge zana namakumi maviri, akati:" 
Acts1:16 Varume hama, zvakafanira kuti rugwaro urwu rwuzadziswe, Mweya Mutsvene warwakagara wataura nomuromo waDhavhidhi, pamusoro paJudhasi, wakanga ari mutungamiriri wavaya vakabata Jesu." 
Acts1:17 Nokuti wakanga achiverengwa pamwe chete nesu, akagamuchira mugove wake pabasa iri." 
Acts1:18 Zvino munhu uyu wakatenga munda nomubairo wezvisakarurama, akawa nemusoro, akaparuka napakati, ura hwake hwese hwukabvajukira kunze." 
Acts1:19 Zvikanzwika navose vaigara Jerusarema; kusvikira nharaunda iyo yatumidzwa norurimi rwavo \add kuti\add* Akeridhama, ndokuti: Nharaunda yeropa." 
Acts1:20 Nokuti zvakanyorwa mubhuku raMapisarema, \add zvichinzi\add*: Musha wake ngauitwe dongo, kurege kuva nomunhu unogaramo; vuye: Mumwe ngaatore vutariri bwake." 
Acts1:21 Naizvozvo zvakafanira pavarume vaifamba nesu nguva yose, apo Ishe Jesu aipinda nokubuda pakati pedu," 
Acts1:22 kutanga parubhabhatidzo rwaJohwani, kusvikira pazuva raakabviswa kwatiri, achikwidzwa, mumwe wavo unofanira kuva chapupu chokumuka kwake pamwe chete nesu." 
Acts1:23 Zvino vakamisa vaviri: Josefa, wainzi Bhasabha, wakatumidzwavo Jusito, naMatiasi." 
Acts1:24 Vakanyengetera, vachiti: Ishe, munoziva moyo yavose, sarudzai pavaviri ratidzai kuti wamunosanangura kunaivava vaviri ndoupi" 
Acts1:25 kuti apiwe chikamu pabasa novuapositora uhwu, Judhasi hwaakatorerwa nokudarika, kuti iye aende panzvimbo yake." 
Acts1:26 Zvino vakavapa mijenya ikabata Matia; akaverengwa pamwe chete navapositora vanegumi nomumwe. 
Acts2:1 Zvino zuva rePendekosita* rakati razadzisika, vose vakanga vari pamwechete nomoyo mumwe." 
Acts2:2 Pakarepo kukauya kutinhira kubva kudenga sokwemhepo inovhuvhuta nesimba, kukazadza imba yose mavakanga vagere," 
Acts2:3 kukavonekwa kwavari ndimi dzakaparadzaniswa dzinenge dzomoto, ndokumhara pamusoro womumwe nomumwe wavo." 
Acts2:4 Vose vakazadzwa noMweya Mutsvene, vakatanga kutaura nedzimwe ndimi, sokupiwa kwavakaita noMweya kutaura." 
Acts2:5 Zvino pakanga pagere paJerusarema vaJudha, varume vakarurama, vaibva kumarudzi ose avari pasi pedenga." 
Acts2:6 Zvino nokunzwikwa kokutinhira uku, chaunga chaungana pamwechete chakakanganiswa, nokuti mumwe nomumwe wakavanzwa vachitaura norurimi rwake." 
Acts2:7 Vakakatyamara vose vakashamiswa vakataura mumwe kunomumwe vachiti: Tarirai, ava vose vanotaura havazi vaGariri here?" 
Acts2:8 Zvino tinonzwa seiko mumwe nomumwe norurimi rwedu, rwatakaberekwa narwo?" 
Acts2:9 VaPatia, navaMedia, navaEramu navagari veMesopotamia naveJudhiya, neKapadokia, nePonto, neAsia," 
Acts2:10 neFrigia, nePamfiria, neIjipiti, namativi eRibia, ari pedo neKurini, navaeni veRoma, navaJudha, navakatendeukira kuvaJudha," 
Acts2:11 vaKrete, navaAraAbhiya, tinovanzwa vachitaura nendimi dzedu mabasa anoshamisa aMwari." 
Acts2:12 Vakakatyamara vose, vakakahadzika vachiti mumwe kune mumwe: Izvi zvingava chiiko?" 
Acts2:13 Asi vamwe vakasweveredza vachiti: Vaguta waini itsva. 
Acts2:14 Zvino Peturo amire navanegumi nomumwe, akasimudza inzwi rake akati kwavari: Varume imwi maJudha navose vagere Jerusarema, chinhu ichi ngachizikamwe kwamuri, muteerere mashoko angu." 
Acts2:15 nokuti ava havana kudhakwa sezvamunofunga imwi, nokuti inguva yechitatu yezuva," 
Acts2:16 asi ichi ndicho chiya chakarebwa nomuporofita Joweri \add achiti\add*: 
Acts2:17 Zvino zvichaitika mumazuva okupedzisira ndizvo zvinotaura Mwari, ndichadurura zvoMweya wangu pamusoro penyama yose; navanakomana venyu navanasikana venyu vachaporofita; majaya enyu achavona zviratidzo, navatariri venyu vacharota hope." 
Acts2:18 Napamusoro pavaranda vangu napamusoro pavarandakadzi vangu, namazuva iwayo ndichadurura zvomweya wangu; uye vachaporofita." 
Acts2:19 Zvino ndichauyisa zvishamiso kudenga kumusoro, nezviratidzo panyika pasi; ropa, nomoto, nemhute yovutsi." 
Acts2:20 Zuva richashandurwa rive rima, nomwedzi uve ropa, risati rasvika zuva guru raShe rinembiri;" 
Acts2:21 zvino zvichaitika \add kuti\add* aninani unodana zita raShe uchaponeswa. 
Acts2:22 Varume vaIsraeri, donzwai mashoko awa; Jesu weNazareta, murume wakapupurirwa naMwari pakati penyu namabasa esimba nezvishamiso, nezviratidzo zvakaitwa naMwari pakati penyu naye, sezvamunoziva imwi mumene," 
Acts2:23 iye, wakakumikidzwa kwamuri nezano nokuziva zviri mberi kwaMwari, imwi makamutora, uye namavoko akaipa mukarovera nokuvuraya;" 
Acts2:24 iye Mwari waakamutsa, asunungura marwadzo erufu, nokuti zvakanga zvisingabviri kuti abatwe narwo." 
Acts2:25 Nokuti Dhavhidhi wakataura pamusoro pake: Ndakavona Ishe pamberi pangu nguva dzose; nokuti uri kuruoko rworudyi rwangu, kuti ndirege kuzununguswa." 
Acts2:26 Naizvozvo moyo wangu wakafara, norurimi rwangu rwakafarisisa; uye kunyange, nenyama yangu ichazorora mutariro." 
Acts2:27 Nokuti hamungasiyi mweya wangu mugehena, hamungatenderi Mutsvene wenyu kuti avone kuvora." 
Acts2:28 Makazivisa kwandiri nzira dzovupenyu; Muchandizadza nomufaro pamberi penyu. 
Acts2:29 Varume hama, regai nditaure kwamuri pachena zvateteguru Dhavhidhi, kuti vakafa vakavigwa, bwiro bwavo bwuri pakati pedu kusvikira zuva ranhasi." 
Acts2:30 Zvino zvaari muporofita, achizivavo kuti Mwari wakapika nemhiko kwaari kuti kunomumwe wezvibereko zvechivuno chake munyama, uchasimudza Kristu uchagadza pachigaro chake chovushe." 
Acts2:31 achivona zviri mberi, wakareva pamusoro pokumuka kwaKristu, kuti mweya wake hauna kusiyiwa paHad, nenyama yake haina kuvona kuvora." 
Acts2:32 Uyu Jesu Mwari wakamumutswa, zvatiri zvapupu zvazvo tose." 
Acts2:33 Zvino wakati asimudzirwa kurudyi rwaMwari, agamuchira kunaBaba chipikirwa choMweya Mutsvene, akadurura izvi zvamunovona nezvamunonzwa ikozvino." 
Acts2:34 Nokuti Dhavhidhi haana kukwira kudenga, asi unoti amene: Ishe wakati kunaShe wangu; Gara kurudyi rwangu," 
Acts2:35 kusvikira ndichiita vavengi vako vave chitsiko chetsoka dzako. 
Acts2:36 Zvino imba yose yavaIsraeri ngaizive kwazvo, kuti Mwari wakaita iyeyu Jesu wamakarovera pamuchinjikwa, Ishe naKristu." 
Acts2:37 Zvino vakati vachinzwa \add izvozvo\add*, vakabayiwa pamoyo, vakati kunaPeturo nokunavamwe vapositora: Varume, hama, tichaiteiko?" 
Acts2:38 Ipapo Peturo akati kwavari: Tendevukai mubhabhatidzwe, mumwe nomumwe wenyu nezita raJesu Kristu, kuti mukangamwirwe zvivi, zvino muchagamuchira Mweya Mutsvene." 
Acts2:39 Nokuti chipikirwa ndechenyu, nechevana venyu, navose vari kure, uwandu sehwevanozodamwa naShe, Mwari wedu." 
Acts2:40 Namamwe mashoko mazhinji, akapupura kwazvo akavasimudzira, achiti: Muzviponese parudzi urwu rwakakombama." 
Acts2:41 Zvino avo vakagamuchira nomufaro shoko rake, vakabhabhatidzwa; uye nezuva iro vakawedzera mweya inenge zvuru zvitatu." 
Acts2:42 Vakatsungirira pakudzidzisa kwavapositora, napakuyanana, napakumedura chingwa, napaminyengetero." 
Acts2:43 Kutya kukawira mweya woga woga; zvinoshamisa zvizhinji nezviratidzo zvakaitwa navapositora. 
Acts2:44 Navaitenda vose vaiva pamwe chete, vakati zvinhu zvose ndezvavose;" 
Acts2:45 vakatengesa fuma yavo nenhumbi, vakagovana navose, mumwe nomumwe paakashaiwa napo." 
Acts2:46 Zuva rimwe nerimwe vakanga vachitsungirira mutembere nomoyo mumwe, vachimedura chingwa imba neimba, vachidya zvokudya zvavo nomufaro nomoyo wakachena," 
Acts2:47 vachirumbidza Mwari, vachidikamwa navanhu vose. Ishe akawedzera kukereke zuva rimwe nerimwe avo vaifanira kuponeswa." 
Acts3:1 Zvino Peturo naJohwani vakakwira pamwechete kutembere nenguva yokunyengetera yepfumbamwe. 
Acts3:2 Zvino mumwe murume, waikamhina kubva mudumbu ramai vake, waitakurirwa zuva rimwe nerimwe pamukova wetembere, wainzi Wakanaka, kuti akumbire zvipo kunavaipinda mutembere." 
Acts3:3 Iye wakati achivona Peturo naJohwani voda kupinda mutembere, akakumbira chipo." 
Acts3:4 Zvino Peturo akamudzvokora, anaJohwani, akati: Titarire!" 
Acts3:5 Akavadzvokora, achitarisira kugamuchira chinhu kwavari." 
Acts3:6 Ipapo Peturo akati: Sirivheri nendarama handina; asi icho chandinacho ndicho chandinokupa: Nezita raJesu weNazareta, simuka ufambe." 
Acts3:7 Akamubata ruvoko rworudyi, aka\add mu\add*simudza; pakarepo tsoka dzake nezviziso zvetsoka dzake zvakasimbiswa." 
Acts3:8 Akavhazuka, akamira, ndokufamba; ndokupinda navo mutembere, akafamba achipembera achirumbidza Mwari." 
Acts3:9 Vanhu vose vakamuvona achifamba, achirumbidza Mwari." 
Acts3:10 Vakaziva, kuti ndiye waigarira zvipo pamukova Wakanaka wetembere; vakazadzwa nekukatyamara nokushamiswa nezvaakaitika kwaari." 
Acts3:11 Zvino murume waikamhina, wakanga aporeswa achakabatira Peturo naJohwani, vanhu vose vakamhanyira pamwechete kwavari pabiravira, rainzi raSoromoni, vachishamiswa kwazvo." 
Acts3:12 Zvino Peturo wakati achivona \add izvozvo\add*, akapindura vanhu, \add akati\add*: Varume vaIsraeri, mashamisirweiko pamusoro pezvizvi? Munotidzvokorereiko, setinenge tamufambisa nesimba redu kana nokunamata kwedu Mwari?" 
Acts3:13 Mwari waAbhurahamu, nowaIsaka, nowaJakobho, Mwari wamadzibaba edu, ndiye wakakudza Mwanakomana wake Jesu, wamakakumikidza imwi \add kuvatongi\add* mukamuramba pamberi paPirato, iye azvipira kumusunungura." 
Acts3:14 Asi imwi makaramba uyo Mutsvene, nohwakarurama, mukakumbira kuti mupiwe muvurayi:" 
Acts3:15 mukavuraya Muvambi wovupenyu; iye Mwari, waakamutswa kuvakafa; iye, watiri zvapupu zvake." 
Acts3:16 Nokutenda kuzita rake, munhu uyu wamunovona nowamunoziva, nezita rake ramusimbisa; vuye, kutenda kunobva kwaari, ndiko kwakamuporesa zvakanaka kudai pamberi penyu mose." 
Acts3:17 Asi zvino, hama dzangu ndinoziva kuti makaita nokusaziva, savabati venyuvo." 
Acts3:18 Asi zvinhu izvo Mwari zvaakamboreva nomuromo wavaporofita vose, kuti Kristu uchazotambudzika wakazvizadzisa." 
Acts3:19 Naizvozvo tendevukai, mudzoke, kuti zvivi zvenyu zvidzimwe, kuti nguva dzokuvandudzwa dzinobva pamberi pechiso chaShe, dzisvike;" 
Acts3:20 Uchatuma Jesu Kristu, wakaparidzwa kwamuri kare;" 
Acts3:21 wakafanira kuti denga rimugamuchire kusvikira nguva yokugadzirwa kwezvinhu zvose, yakarebwa naMwari nomuromo wavaporofita vake vatsvene vose kubva pakutanga kwenyika." 
Acts3:22 Nokuti Mozisi zvirokwazvo wakati: Ishe, Mwari wenyu, uchamumutsira Muporofita pahama dzenyu, wakafanana neni; muchamuteerera pazvose, zvaanotaura kwamuri." 
Acts3:23 Zvino zvichaitika, mweya mumwe nomumwe kana asingateereri Muporofita uyo, uchaparadzwa kwazvo pakati pavanhu." 
Acts3:24 Navaporofita vosevo kubva kunaSamueri, navakamutevera, naivo vose vakataura vakaporofitavo zvinhu izvozvi." 
Acts3:25 Imwi muri vanakomana vavaporofita, navesungano, yakaitwa naMwari namadzibaba edu, achiti kunaAbhurahamu: Muvana vako marudzi ose enyika acharopafadzwa." 
Acts3:26 Mwari wakatanga kukumutsirai imwi Mwanakomana wake Jesu, akamutuma kukuropafadzai, achidzora mumwe nomumwe wenyu pazvakaipa zvake." 
Acts4:1 Zvino vakati vachataura kuvanhu, vaprista nomukuru wetembere navaSajhusi vakavuya kwavari," 
Acts4:2 vashungurudzika kuti va vaidzidzisa vanhu, vachiparidza kumuka kwavakafa munaJesu." 
Acts4:3 Vakavabata, vakaisa mutirongo kusvikira kwaedza; nokuti akanga ava madekwana." 
Acts4:4 Asi vazhinji kunavakanzwa shoko vakatenda; uwandu hwavarume vanosvika zvuru zvinenge zvishanu pakuverengwa kwavo. 
Acts4:5 Zvino zvakaitika chifume kwakaungana vabati vavo, navakuru, navanyori paJerusarema;" 
Acts4:6 naAnasi, muprista mukuru, naKayafasi, naJohwani, naArekizandira, nehama dzose dzomuprista mukuru vakavungana vose paJesursarema." 
Acts4:7 Vakavaisa pakati pavo, vakabvunza, vachiti: Makazviita izvozvi nesimba rei, kana nezita ripiko?" 
Acts4:8 Zvino Peturo, akazadzwa noMweya Mutsvene, akati kwavari: imwi vabati vavanhu,navakuru vavaIsraeri." 
Acts4:9 kana isu tichibvunzwa nhasi pamusoro pebasa rakanaka, rakaitirwa munhu chirema, \add kuti\add* wakaponeswa sei;" 
Acts4:10 ngazvizikamwe kwamuri mose, nokuvanhu vose vaIsraeri, kuti nezita raJesu Kristu weNazareta, wamakarovera, iye wakamutswa naMwari kuvakafa, naye munhu uyu umire pano pamberi penyu apora." 
Acts4:11 Iri ndiro ibwe rakarashwa nemwi vavaki, rakazova musoro wekona." 
Acts4:12 Uyezve hakuna kuponeswa kunomumwe; nokuti hakunerimwe zita pasi pedenga, rakapiwa pakati pavanhu, ratingaponeswa naro." 
Acts4:13 Zvino vakati vachivona kusatya kwaPeturo naJohwani, vachinzwisisa kuti vaiva vanhu vasina kudzidza, vasingazivi chinhu, vakashamiswa; vakavaziva kuti vaiva naJesu." 
Acts4:14 Vakavonavo munhu wakanga aporeswa amire navo, vakashaiwa chavanga\add zvi\add*pikisa." 
Acts4:15 Zvino vakati vavaraira kuti vabude parutivi kunze kwevungano, vakarangana pakati pavo," 
Acts4:16 vachiti: Tichavaita seiko navanhu ava? Nokuti chiratidzo chinoonekwa chaitwa navo kuratidza kuvanhu vose vagere Jerusarema, hatigoni kuzviramba." 
Acts4:17 Asi kuti zvirege kuramba zvichipararira pakati pevanhu, ngativanyevere kuti varege kuzotaura nomunhu upi noupi nezita iri." 
Acts4:18 Vakavadana, vakavaraira kuti varege kutongotaura kana kudzidzisa nezita raJesu." 
Acts4:19 Asi Peturo naJohwani vakapindura, vakati kwavari: Tongai henyu imwi, kana zvingava zvakarurama pamberi paMwari, kuteerera imwi kupfuvura Mwari." 
Acts4:20 Nokuti hatingaregi isu kurega kutaura zvatakavona, nezvatakanzwa." 
Acts4:21 Zvino vakati vawedzera kuvayambira, vakavaregedza, vasingawani chinhu chavangavarangira nokuda kwavanhu; nokuti vose vairumbidza Mwari pamusoro pezvakaitwa;" 
Acts4:22 nokuti munhu wakanga wakanga anamakore anopfuura makumi mana akaitirwa chiratidzo paari. 
Acts4:23 Vakati varegedzwa, vakaenda kunovokwavo, vakandopira zvose zvavakanga vavudzwa navaprista vakuru navakuru." 
Acts4:24 Ivo vakati vanzwa, vakasimudzira inzwi kunaMwari nomoyo mumwe, vakati: Tenzi, ndimwi Mwari makaita denga napasi, negungwa nezvose zviri mukati mazvo;" 
Acts4:25 wamakareva nomuranda wenyu Dhavhidhi, muranda wenyu, muchiti: Vahedheni vakaitireiko hasha, Navanhu vakafungireiko zvisina maturo?" 
Acts4:26 Madzimambo enyika akasimuka, navabati vakavungana pamwe chete, kumirisana naShe naKristu wake." 
Acts4:27 Nokuti zvirokwazvo vose Herodhe, naPondio Pirato, navahedheni, navanhu vaIsraeri vakaungana kumirisana naJesu Muranda wenyu mutsvene wamakazodza," 
Acts4:28 kuti zvose ruoko rwenyu nezano renyu zvazvakatema; nezviratidzo nezvishamiso zviitwe nezita raJesu, Muranda wenyu mutsvene." 
Acts4:29 Zvino, Ishe, tarirai kuyambira kwavo, mupe varanda venyu kuti vataure shoko renyu varingatongotyi," 
Acts4:30 Mukutambanudza ruvoko rwenyu kuporesa; neziratidzo nezvishamiso zviitwe nezita raJesu Mwanakomana wenyu mutsvene. 
Acts4:31 Zvino vakati vanyengetera nzvimbo yavakanga vakavungana pairi ikazununguswa; vakazadzwa vose noMweya Mutsvene, vakataura shoko raMwari vasingatyi." 
Acts4:32 Zvino chaunga chose chavaitenda vaiva nomoyo mumwe nomweya mumwe; kwakanga kusinomumwe waiti chimwe chaaiva nacho ndechake, asi zvinhu zvose vakati ndezvavose." 
Acts4:33 Nesimba guru vapositora vakapa vuchapupu hwokumuka kwaJesu; nyasha huru ikavapo pamusoro pavo vose. 
Acts4:34 Nokuti pakanga pasina pakati pavo waishaiwa, nokuti vose vaiva neminda kana dzimba, vakazvitengesa, vakavuya nomutengo wezvakate ngeswa." 
Acts4:35 vakazviisa patsoka dzavapositora; mumwe nomumwe akagoverwa paakashaiwa napo. 
Acts4:36 NaJosefa, wakatumidzwa navapositora, Bhanabhasi, (ndokuti Mwanakomana wokunyaradza, kana zvichishandurwa), muRevhi, munhu weKupro parudzi rwake," 
Acts4:37 waiva nomunda, akautengesa, akavuya nemari akaisa patsoka dzavapositora." 
Acts5:1 Asi mumwe murume, wainzi Ananiasi, wakatengesa fuma yake anaSafira mukadzi wake," 
Acts5:2 akasara nemumwe mugove pamutengo, mukadzi wake achizvizivavo, akavuya nomumwe mugove, ndokuuisa patsoka dzavapositora." 
Acts5:3 Asi Peturo akati: Ananiasi, Satani wazadzireiko moyo wako, kuti unyengere Mweya Mutsvene, nokuzvikamurira zvomutengo womunda?" 
Acts5:4 Iwo uchiripo, wakanga usi wako here? Watengeswa, wakanga usi musimba nazvo here? Nemhaka yeiko waisa mumoyo mako chinhu ichi? Hauna kureva nhema kuvanhu, asi kunaMwari." 
Acts5:5 Ananiasi, wakati achinzwa mashoko iwayo, akawira pasi, akabudisa mweya; kutya kukuru kukawira vose vakazvinzwa." 
Acts5:6 Majaya akasimuka akamuputira ndokumutakurira kunze ndokumuviga. 
Acts5:7 Nguva dzinege senhatu dzakati dzapfuvura, mukadzi wake akapinda asingazivi zvaitwa." 
Acts5:8 Peturo akapindura, akati: Ndivudze kana makatengesa munda nemari yakadai? Iye akati: Hongu, neyakadai." 
Acts5:9 Peturo akati kwaari: Maita seiko zvamarangana kuidza Mweya waShe? Tarira, tsoka dzavaviga murume wako, pamukova, vachakutakuriravo kunze." 
Acts5:10 Ipapo akawira pasi pakarepo patsoka dzake, akabudisa mweya; majaya akapinda, akamuwana afa, ndokumutakurira kunze, ndokumuviga kumurume wake." 
Acts5:11 Kutya kukuru kukawira kereke yose navose vakanzwa zvinhu izvi. 
Acts5:12 Uye namaoko avapositora kwakaitwa zviratidzo nezvinoshamisa zvizhinji zvakaitwa pakati pavanhu; vose vaiva nomoyo mumwe pabiravira raSoromoni. 
Acts5:13 Asi pakati pavamwe kwakanga kusinomunhu wakatsunga kuzvisanganisa kwavari; asi vanhu vaivakudza zvikuru 
Acts5:14 Vatendi vakawedzerwa vakawanda kwazvo kunaIshe zvaunga zviviri vakadzi navarume, varume navakadzi, vairamba vachiwedzerwa kunaShe." 
Acts5:15 Kusvikira vatakurira varwere munzira dzomumusha, vakaradzika pamibhedha napanhovo, kuti mumvuri waPeturo achipfuura ufukidze umwe wavo." 
Acts5:16 Uye kwakauyawo chaunga chemaguta akapoteredza Jerusarema, vachivuya navarwere, navaitambudzwa nemweya yetsvina, vakaporeswa vose." 
Acts5:17 Zvino muprista mukuru akasimuka, navose vaiva naye vaiva vechikamu chevaSajusi, vanegodo kwazvo;" 
Acts5:18 vakabata vapositora vakavaisa mutirongo maipinzwa vanhu vose. 
Acts5:19 Asi mutumwa waShe wakazarura mikova yetirongo vusiku akavabudisa akati: 
Acts5:20 Endai, mumire muchitaura mutembere kuvanhu mashoko ose ovupenyu ubwu." 
Acts5:21 Vakati vachinzwa, vakapinda mutembere mangwanani, vakadzidzisa. Zvino muprista mukuru akasvika navaiva naye, vakakokera makurukota nevungano yose yavakuru vavana vaIsraeri; vakatumira \add vanhu\add* kutirongo kuti vavuye navo." 
Acts5:22 Asi varanda vakati vachisvikapo, vakawana vasimo mutirongo; vakadzoka, vakavavudza izvozvo," 
Acts5:23 tvachiti irongo zvirokwazvo takaiwana yakazarirwa zvakasimba kwazvo, navarindi vamire panze pamikova; asi tati tichizarura, tikasawana munhu mukati." 
Acts5:24 Zvino Muprista nomukuru wetembere navaprista vakuru vakati vachinzwa mashoko iwayo, vakakahadzika pamusoro pazvo, vasingazivi kuti zvinozodini." 
Acts5:25 Ipapo mumwe munhu akasvika akavavudza achiti: Tarirai, varume vamakaisa mutirongo, vamire mutembere, vachidzidzisa vanhu." 
Acts5:26 Zvino mutungamiriri wavarwi, navatariri, vakaenda, vakavuya navo, vasingaiti nesimba, nokuti vakanga vachitya vanhu kuti zvimwe vangatakwa namabwe." 
Acts5:27 Vakati vasvika navo, vakavaisa kumakurukota. Muprista mukuru akavabvunza" 
Acts5:28 achiti: Ko hatina kukurairai zvikuru kuti musadzidzisa nezita iri here? Zvino tarirai, mazadza Jerusarema nedzidziso yenyu; muchida kuti ropa romunhu uyu rivuye pamusoro pedu." 
Acts5:29 Zvino Peturo navapositora vakapindura vakati: Tinofanira kuteerera Mwari panokuteerera vanhu. 
Acts5:30 Mwari wamadzibaba edu wakamutsa Jesu iye wamakavuraya imwi muchimuturika pamuti," 
Acts5:31 Mwari wakamusimudza iye noruvoko rwake rworudyi, \add ave\add* Mutungamiriri noMuponesi, kuti ape vaIsraeri kutendevuka nekangamwiro yezvivi." 
Acts5:32 Isu tiri zvapupu zvamashoko iwawa; noMweya Mutsvenevo, Mwari waakapa ivo vanomuteerera." 
Acts5:33 Zvino ivo vakati vanzwa vakafa neshungu, vakarangana kuvavuraya." 
Acts5:34 Ipapo mumwe muFarisi akasimuka pamakurukota, wainzi Gamarieri, mudzidzisi womurairo, waikudzwa navanhu vose, akaraira kuti vapositora vabudiswe chinguva chiduku;" 
Acts5:35 akati kwavari: Varume vaIsraeri, zvichenjererei maererano nezvamunoda kuitira vanhu ava." 
Acts5:36 Nokuti mberi kwemazuva awa kwakambomuka Tudasi, achizvikudza \add kuti\add* munhu, vanhu vanenge mazana mana vakazvisanganisa naye; iye akavurawa, navose vaimuteerera vakaparadzirwa, nokuparadzwa." 
Acts5:37 Shure komunhu uyu kukamuka Judhasi weGariri, pamazuva okuverengwa, akatsausa vanhu kuti vamutevere; iye akaparara, navose vakamuteerera, vakaparadzirwa." 
Acts5:38 Zvino ndinoti kwamuri: Sudurukai kuvanhu ava, muvasiye vakadaro, nokuti kana zano iri nebasa iri zviri zvavanhu, zvichaparadzwa." 
Acts5:39 Asi kana zviri zvaMwari, hamungagoni kuzviparadza; kuti zvimwe muwanikwe muchirwa naMwari." 
Acts5:40 Vakamuteerera; ipapo vakati vadana vapositora vakarova, vakavaraira kuti varege kutaura nezita raJesu; vakavaregedza." 
Acts5:41 Ipapo vakabva pazviso zvamakurukota, vachifara, kuti vakafanirwa kunyadziswa nokuda kwezita rake." 
Acts5:42 Uye mazuva ose havana kurega kudzidzisa, nokuparidza zvaKristu Jesu, mutembere kana kudzimba dzavo." 
Acts6:1 Zvino namazuva iwayo, uwandu hwavadzidzi huchiwedzera, vaJudha, vaitaura chiGiriki vakanyunyutira vaHebheru, nokuti chirikadzi dzavo dzaidarikwa pakugoverwa komusi mumwe nomumwe." 
Acts6:2 Zvino vanegumi navaviri vakadanira kwavari chaunga chevadzidzi, vakati: Hazvifaniri kuti isu tirege shoko raMwari, tishumire pamatafura." 
Acts6:3 Naizvozvo hama, sanangurai pakati penyu varume vanomwe vanopupurirwa zvakanaka, vazere noMweya Mutsvene novuchenjeri, vatingaisa pabasa iri." 
Acts6:4 Asi isu tichatsungirira pakunyengetera napabasa reshoko. 
Acts6:5 Shoko iri rikafadza chaunga chose, vakasanangura Stefano, murume wakanga azere nokutenda noMweya Mutsvene, naFiripi, naProkoro, Nikanori, naTimoni, naPamenasi, naNikorasi, muproserite weAntiokia." 
Acts6:6 Vakavaisa pamberi pavapositora; vakati vanyengetera vakaisa mavoko pamusoro pavo. 
Acts6:7 Shoko raMwari rikakura, vadzidzi vakawanda zvikuru paJerusarema; navaprista vazhinji vakateerera kutenda." 
Acts6:8 Zvino Stefano azere nenyasha nesimba wakaita zvinoshamisa nezviratidzo zvikuru pakati pavanhu. 
Acts6:9 Ipapo kukamuka vamwe vesinagoge rinonzi raVasununguki, navaKureni, navaAreksandira, naveKirikia, neveEzhiya, vakaita nharo naStefano." 
Acts6:10 Asi vakanga vasingagoni kumirisana novuchenjeri noMweya waaitaura nawo. 
Acts6:11 Ipapo vakamutsa varume, vaiti: Takamunzwa achitaura mashoko anomhura maererano naMozisi naMwari." 
Acts6:12 Vakakurudzira vanhu, navakuru navanyori, vakamusvikira vakamubata vakamuisa kumakurukota." 
Acts6:13 vakaisapo zvapupu zvenhema, zvaiti: Munhu uyu haaregi kutaura mashoko anomhura imba iyi tsvene nomurairo," 
Acts6:14 nokuti takamunzwa achiti: Uyu Jesu weNazareta uchaparadza nzvimbo iyi nokushandura tsika dzatakapiwa naMozisi. 
Acts6:15 Zvino vose vakanga vagere pamakurukota, vakamudzvokora, vakavona chiso chake chakaita sechiso chomutumwa." 
Acts7:1 Ipapo muprista mukuru akati: Zvinhu izvi ndizvo nhai? 
Acts7:2 Iye akati: Varume, hama namadzibaba, teererai. Mwari wokubwinya wakazviratidza kunababa vedu Abhurahamu, vachiri Mesopotamia, vasati vagara Harani," 
Acts7:3 akati kwavari: Buda munyika yako, nokuhama dzako, uende kunyika yandichakuratidza." 
Acts7:4 Ipapo akabuda munyika yavaKaradhia, akagara Harani; zvino kubva ipapo baba vake vakati vafa, Mwari akamubvisa akamugarisa kunyika ino yamugere." 
Acts7:5 Asi haana kumupa nhaka mairi, kunyange paangatsika rutsoka rwake, asi wakamupikira kuti uchamupa iyo, ive yake neyavana vake vaizomutevera, asati a\add tongo\add*va nomwana." 
Acts7:6 Mwari akataura saizvozvo achiti, vana vake vachava vatorwa kunyika yavamwe; uye kuti vacha\add va\add*ita varanda, nokuvavonesa nhamo makore anamazana mana." 
Acts7:7 Rudzi rwavachava varanda kwarwuri, ndicharutonga ini, ndizvo zvinoreva Mwari; shure kwaizvozvo vachabuda vagondishumira panzvimbo iyi." 
Acts7:8 Akamupa sungano yedzingiso, Naizvozvo wakabereka Isaka, akamudzingisa zuva rorusere, Isaka Jakobho; naJakobho mateteguru anegumi namaviri." 
Acts7:9 Mateteguru zvaakanga anegodo vakatengesa Josefa, kuIjipiti; asi Mwari akava naye." 
Acts7:10 Akamusunungura pamatambudziko ake ose, akamupa nyasha nenjere pamberi paFarao, mambo weIjipiti; iye akamuita mutariri pamusoro peimba yake yose." 
Acts7:11 Zvino nzara ikasvika paIjipiti yose neKanani, nedambudziko guru; madzibaba edu akashaiwa zvokudya." 
Acts7:12 Asi Jakobho, wakati anzwa kuti kunezviyo Ijipiti, akatuma pakutanga madzibaba edu." 
Acts7:13 Zvino rwechipiri Josefa wakaziviswa kuvakuru vake; rudzi rwaJosefa rukaratidzwa naFarao. 
Acts7:14 Zvino Josefa akavatumira kundodana baba vake Jakobho, nehama dzake dzose, vanhu vaiva namakumi manomwe navashanu." 
Acts7:15 Jakobho akaburukira Ijipiti, akazofa iye namadzibaba edu;" 
Acts7:16 vakatakurirwa Shekemi, vakavigwa pabwiro bwakanga bwatengwa naAbhurahamu nomutengo wesirivheri kuvanakomana vaEmori weShekemi." 
Acts7:17 Zvino nguva yechipikirwa chaMwari chaakanga apikira Abhurahamu, yakati ichiswedera, vanhu vakawanda, vakaita vazhinji muIjipiti;" 
Acts7:18 kusvikira mumwe mambo amuka muIjipiti, wakanga asina kuziva Josefa." 
Acts7:19 Iye akabata rudzi rwedu namano, akatambudza madzibaba edu, akavarashira vacheche vavo, kuti varege kurarama." 
Acts7:20 Nenguva iyoyo Mozisi akaberekwa, wakanga akaisvonaka kwazvo kunaMwari; akarerwa mwedzi mitatu mumba mababa vake." 
Acts7:21 Zvino wakati arashwa, mukunda waFarao akamunonga, akamurera kuti ave mwanakomana \add wake\add*." 
Acts7:22 Mozisi akadzidziswa vuchenjeri bwose bwavaIjipiti; akava nesimba pamashoko napamabasa. 
Acts7:23 Zvino wakati asvika makore anamakumi mana akazara zvikasvika mumoyo make kushanyira hama dzake, vana vaIsraeri." 
Acts7:24 Zvino wakavona mumwe achiitirwa zvisakarurama, ndoku\add mu\add*rwira, achitsiva wakanga achitambudzwa akavuraya muIjipiti." 
Acts7:25 Aifunga kuti zvimwe hama dzake dzichanzwisisa kuti Mwari wakanga achida kuvaponesa noruvoko rwake; asi havana kunzwisisa. 
Acts7:26 Zvino fume mangwana wakazvionesa kwavari akavawana vachikakavadzana, akavayananisa nesimba, achiti: Varume, muri hama, munoitirana zvisakarurama neiko?" 
Acts7:27 Zvino iye wakanga achiitira muvakidzani wake zvisakarurama akamusundira kure, achiti: Ndianiko wakakuita mubati nomutongi wedu?" 
Acts7:28 Unoda kundivuraya, sezvawakavuraya muIjipiti zuro kanhi?" 
Acts7:29 Neshoko iri Mozisi akatiza, akandova mutorwa kunyika yeMidiani, kwaakandobereka vanakomana vaviri." 
Acts7:30 Zvino makore makumi mana akati apera, kwakaonekwa kwaari murenje regomo reSinai mutumwa waShe, mumurazvo womoto mugwenzi." 
Acts7:31 Mozisi wakati achi\add zvi\add*vona, akashamiswa nezvaakavona; zvino akati achiswedera kuzocherekedza, inzwi raShe rikasvika kwaari \add richiti\add*:" 
Acts7:32 Ndini Mwari wamadzibaba ako, Mwari waAbhurahamu, nowaIsaka, nowaJakobho, ipapo Mozisi akadedera akatya kucherekedza." 
Acts7:33 Zvino Ishe akati kwaari: Bvisa shangu patsoka dzako, nokuti nzvimbo yaumire pairi itsvene." 
Acts7:34 Ndaona nokuona kutambudzika kwavanhu vangu vari muIjipiti, ndikanzwa kugomera kwavo, ndaburuka kuzovasunungura; zvino vuya ndikutume Ijipiti." 
Acts7:35 Uyu Mozisi wavakaramba,vachiti: Ndiani wakakuita mubati nomutongi? Ndiye Mwari waakatuma \add kuti ave\add* mutongi nomudzukunuri noruoko rwomutumwa naMwari, akavonekwa naye mugwenzi." 
Acts7:36 Iye akavabudisa, akaita zvinoshamisa nezviratidzo munyika yeIjipiti, nepaGungwa Dzvuku, nomurenje, makore anamakumi mana."
