Acts7:37 Ndiyeye Mozisi wakati kuvana vaIsraeri: Ishe Mwari wenyu uchakumutsirai Muporofita pakati pehama dzenyu, wakafanana neni uyu ndiye wamuchanzwa." 
Acts7:38 Ndiyeye wakanga ari kuvungano murenje, anomutumwa wakataura naye mugomo reSinai, anamadzibaba edu vo, wakagamuchira mashoko mapenyu kuzotipa." 
Acts7:39 Ndiye, wavakanga vasingadi kumutevera ivo madzibaba edu; vakamuramba, vakadzokera Ijipiti nemoyo yavo." 
Acts7:40 Vakati kunaAroni: Tiitire vamwari, vangatitungamirira; nokuti kana ari Mozisi uyu, wakatibudisa munyika yeIjipiti, hatizivi zvakaitika kwaari." 
Acts7:41 Zvino vakaita mhuru namazuva iwayo, vakavuya nechibayiro kuchifananidzo chavo, vakafarira mabasa amavoko avo." 
Acts7:42 Zvino Mwari akavafuratira, akavarega kuti vashumire hondo yokudenga, sezvakanyorwa mubhuku ravaporofita, zvichinzi: Ko makandivigira zvipfuwo zvakabayiwa nezvibayiro Makore makumi mana murenje, imi, imba yavaIsraeri here?" 
Acts7:43 Makatakura tabhenekeri yaMoroki, Nenyeredzi yamwari wenyu Remfani, Zvifananidzo zvamakaita kuti muzvinamate; Ndichakutamisai mberi kweBhabhironi." 
Acts7:44 Madzibaba edu aiva netabhenekeri yovuchapupu murenje, yakanga yakavakwa sezvaakaraira iye, wakataura naMozisi achiti aite nomufananidzo waakavona." 
Acts7:45 Yakati yagamuchirwa namadzibaba edu, vakapinda nayo naJoshua munyika yavahedheni,vakadzingwa naMwari pamberi pamadzibaba edu, kusvikira pamazuva aDhavhidhi." 
Acts7:46 iye akanzwirwa nyasha pamberi paMwari, akakumbira kuvakira Mwari waJakobho pokugara." 
Acts7:47 Soromoni akamuvakira imba. 
Acts7:48 Asi Wokumusoro haagari mudzimba dzakavakwa namavoko, sezvakarebwa nomuporofita, achiti:" 
Acts7:49 Denga ndicho chigaro changu chovushe. Nenyika chitsiko chetsoka dzangu; Muchandivakira imba yakadiniko? Ndizvo zvinoreva Ishe; Kana nzvimbo yandingazorora pairi ndeipi? 
Acts7:50 Ko ruvoko rwangu haruna kuita izvozvi zvose here? 
Acts7:51 imwi vemitsipa mikukutu, musinakudzingiswa pamoyo nenzeve, munogara muchidzivisa Mweya Mutsvene; samadzibaba enyu, nemivo." 
Acts7:52 Ndoupiko pakati pavaporofita, usinakutambudzwa namadzibaba enyu? Vakavuraya avo vaiparidza kuvuya koWakarurama, iye wamakapandukira nokumuvuraya zvino." 
Acts7:53 Iyemi, makapiwa murairo sezvawakarairwa navatumwa, mukasauchengeta." 
Acts7:54 Zvino vakati vachinzwa izvozvo, vakafa neshungu kwazvo, vakamugeda-gedera meno." 
Acts7:55 Asi iye azere noMweya Mutsvene, akatarisisa kudenga, akavona kubwinya kwaMwari, naJesu amire kuruvoko rwurudyi rwaMwari," 
Acts7:56 akati: Tarirai, ndinovona denga rakazarurwa, noMwanakomana womunhu amire kuruvoko rworudyi rwaMwari." 
Acts7:57 Zvino vakadanidzira nenzwi guru, vakadzivira nzeve dzavo, vakamhanyira kwaari vose pamwe chete;" 
Acts7:58 vakamubudisira kunze kweguta, ndokumutaka namabwe; zvapupu zvikaisa nguvo dzazvo patsoka dzejaya, rainzi Sauro." 
Acts7:59 Vakataka Stefano, achidana achiti: Ishe Jesu, gamuchirai mweya wangu." 
Acts7:60 Akafugama, akadanidzira nenzwi guru, achiti: Ishe, musavapa mhosva yechivi ichi, Akati areva izvozvo, akavata rufu." 
Acts8:1 Sauro wakanga achitenda kuvurawa kwake. Zvino nenguva iyo kereke yapaJerusarema yakatambudzwa zvikuru, vakaparadzirwa vose kunyika yeJudhiya neSamaria, vakasara vapositora bedzi." 
Acts8:2 Varume vakarurama vakaviga Stefano, vakamuchema zvikuru." 
Acts8:3 Zvino Sauro akaparadza kereke, achipinda mudzimba dzose, achikakata varume navakadzi, nokuvaisa mutirongo." 
Acts8:4 Zvino avo vakaparadzirwa, vakapotenyika, vachiparidza shoko." 
Acts8:5 NaFiripi wakaburukira kuguta reSamaria, akavaparidzira Kristu." 
Acts8:6 Vanhu vazhinji vakateerera nomoyo mumwe zvairebwa naFiripi, vachinzwa nokuvona zviratidzo zvaakanga achiita." 
Acts8:7 Nokuti mweya yetsvina yakabuda kuvazhinji vaiva nayo, ichidanidzira nenzwi guru; navazhinji vakanga vakawoma mitezo navaikamhina vakaporeswa." 
Acts8:8 Mufaro mukuru ukavapo paguta iro. 
Acts8:9 Zvino kwakanga kunomumwe murume, wainzi Simoni, waiva n'anga kare paguta iro, waishamisa vanhu veSamaria, achizviita munhu mukuru." 
Acts8:10 Vose, vaduku navakuru, vakamuteerera, vachiti: Uyu munhu isimba guru raMwari," 
Acts8:11 Vakamuteerera, nokuti wakanga avashamisa novun'anga bwake nguva huru." 
Acts8:12 Zvino vakati vatenda Firipi, wakaparidza mashoko ovushe bwaMwari nezita raJesu Kristu, vakabhabhatidzwa varume navakadzi." 
Acts8:13 Naiye Simoni akatendavo, ndokubhabhatidzwavo, akagara naFiripi; akashamiswa, achivona zviratidzo namabasa esimba makuru, akanga achiitwa." 
Acts8:14 Zvino vapositora vaiva paJerusarema, vakati vanzwa kuti vaSamaria vakanga vagamuchira shoko raMwari, vakatuma Peturo naJohwani kwavari." 
Acts8:15 Ivo vakaburukira'ko, vakavanyengeterera kuti vapiwe Mweya Mutsvene;" 
Acts8:16 nokuti wakanga asina kuburukira pamusoro pomumwe wavo; vakanga vangobhabhatidzwa muzita raShe Jesu bedzi. 
Acts8:17 Ipapo vakaisa mavoko avo pamusoro pavo, vakagamuchira Mweya Mutsvene." 
Acts8:18 Zvino Simoni wakati achivona kuti Mweya Mutsvene wapiwa nokuiswa kwamavoko avapositora, akavuya kwavari nemari," 
Acts8:19 achiti: Ndipei nenivo simba iri, kuti wandinenge ndichiisa mavoko pamusoro pake, apiwe Mweya Mutsvene." 
Acts8:20 Zvino Peturo akati kwaari: Sirivheri yako ngaiparadzwe pamwechete newe, nokuti wakafunga kutenga chipo chaMwari nemari." 
Acts8:21 Hauna mugove, kana chikamu, pachinhu ichi, nokuti moyo wako hauna kururama pamberi paMwari." 
Acts8:22 Naizvozvo tendevuka pakuipa kwako, ukumbire kunaShe, kuti zvimwe ukangamwirwe murangariro womwoyo wako." 
Acts8:23 Nokuti ndinovona kuti wapinda munduru inovava, napakusungwa kusakarurama." 
Acts8:24 Simoni akapindura, akati: Mundikumbirire zvikuru imwi kunaShe, kuti ndirege kuwirwa nechimwe chaizvozvo zvamareva." 
Acts8:25 Zvino vakati vapupura kwazvo nokutaura shoko raShe, vakadzokera zve Jerusarema, vachiparidza evhangeri mumisha mizhinji yavaSamaria." 
Acts8:26 Zvino mutumwa waShe akataura naFiripi, akati: Simuka, uende Zasi kunzira inobva Jerusarema ichiburukira Gaza; iyo nyika irenje." 
Acts8:27 Akasimuka, akaenda; zvino kwakanga kunomurume weEtiopia, muranda mukuru kwazvo waKandase, mambokadzi weEtiopia, waichengeta fuma yake yose, wakanga avuya Jerusarema kuzonamata;" 
Acts8:28 wakanga achidzoka, agere mungoro yake achirava muporofita Isaya." 
Acts8:29 Mweya akati kunaFiripi: Swedera, urambire pangoro iyo." 
Acts8:30 Firipi akamhanyira'ko, akamunzwa achirava muporofita Isaya, akati: Unonzwisisa zvaunorava here?" 
Acts8:31 Iye akati: Ndingagona seiko, kana mumwe asingandidudziri? Akakumbira zvikuru kunaFiripi kuti akwire, agare naye." 
Acts8:32 Zvino paakanga achirava paRugwaro paiti: Wakaiswa pakubayiwa segwai; Segwayana rinyerere pamberi pomuvevuri waro, Saizvozvo haana kushamisa muromo wake;" 
Acts8:33 Pakuzvidzwa kwake kutongwa kwake kwakabviswa; Ndianiko ucharondedzera rudzi rwake? Nokuti vupenyu bwake bwunobviswa panyika. 
Acts8:34 Muranda akapindura Firipi, akati: Ndinokumbira kwauri, undivudze kuti muporofita unoreva aniko achidaro? Unozvireva iye amene, kana mumwe?" 
Acts8:35 Ipapo Firipi akashamisa muromo wake; akatanga parugwaro urwu, akamuparidzira Jesu." 
Acts8:36 Zvino vakati vachifamba munzira akati: Heyi mvura; chinyiko chingadzivisa ndirege kubhabhatidzwa? 
Acts8:37 [Firipi akati: Kana uchitenda nomoyo wako wose, zvingaitwa. Akapindura, akati: Ndinotenda kuti Jesu ndiye Mwanakomana waMwari.]" 
Acts8:38 Akaraira kuti ngoro imire; vakaburukira vose mumvura, iye Firipi nomuranda; akamubhabhatidza." 
Acts8:39 Zvino vakati vachibuda mumvura, Mweya waShe ukabvisa Firipi; muranda akasazomuvona zve; nokuti wakafamba rwendo rwake, achifara." 
Acts8:40 Asi Firipi wakawanika paAzoto, akapota nyika achiparidza evhangeri pamaguta ose, kusvikira paKesaria." 
Acts9:1 Asi Sauro achingorangarira kutyisa nokuvuraya vadzidzi vaShe, wakaenda kumuprista mukuru,," 
Acts9:2 akakumbira kwaari magwaro okuenda nawo Dhamaseko kumasinagoge, kuti kana awana vamwe vaiva veNzira iyo, varume kana vakadzi, avuye navo Jerusarema vakasungwa." 
Acts9:3 Zvino wakati ari parwendo, oswedera pedo neDhamaseko, kamwe-kamwe chiedza chakabva kudenga chikamupenyera pamativi ose," 
Acts9:4 akawira pasi, akanzwa inzwi richiti kwaari: Sauro, Sauro, unonditambudzireiko?" 
Acts9:5 Iye akati: Ndimi aniko, Ishe? Akati: Ndini Jesu waunotambudza; [zvinokuremera kupfura zvibayiso." 
Acts9:6 Iye achidedera nokutya, akati: Ishe, munoda kuti ndiiteiko? Ishe akati kwaari:] Simuka, uende muguta, uchandovudzwa zvaunofanira kuita." 
Acts9:7 Varume vaiva parwendo naye, vakamira vanyerere, vachinzwa inzwi, asi vasingavoni munhu." 
Acts9:8 Zvino Sauro akasimuka pasi; asi achisvunudza meso ake, haana kuvona chinhu; vakamubata ruvoko, vakaenda naye Dhamaseko." 
Acts9:9 Akaita mazuva matatu, asingavoni, asingadyi, asingamwi chinhu." 
Acts9:10 Zvino paDhamaseko pakanga panomumwe mudzidzi, wainzi Ananiasi; Ishe akati kwaari nezvaakaratidzwa: Ananiasi! Iye akati: Ndiri pano Ishe!" 
Acts9:11 Ishe akati kwaari: Simuka, uende munzira yomuguta inonzi Yakarurama, ubvunze mumba maJudhasi, munhu unonzi Sauro weTaso; nokuti tarira, unonyengetera;" 
Acts9:12 naiye wakavona murume, unonzi Ananiasi achipinda, achiisa mavoko ake pamusoro pake, kuti avone zve." 
Acts9:13 Zvino Ananiasi akapindura, akati: Ishe, ndakanzwa navanhu vazhinji zvomunhu uyu, kuti wakaitira vatsvene venyu paJerusarema zvakaipa zvizhinji;" 
Acts9:14 napano unesimba raakapiwa navaprista vakuru, kuti asunge vose vanonamata nezita renyu." 
Acts9:15 Asi Ishe, akati kwaari: Enda, nokuti iye mudziyo wakasanangurwa neni, kuti aende nezita rangu kuvahedheni, namadzimambo, nokuvana vaIsraeri;" 
Acts9:16 nokuti ndichamuratidza zvose, zvaachafanira kutamburira nokuda kwezita rangu." 
Acts9:17 Ipapo Ananiasi akaenda akapinda mumba, akaisa mavoko ake pamusoro pake, akati: Sauro, hama, Ishe Jesu, wakazviratidza kwauri munzira yawakavuya nayo, wakandituma, kuti uvone zve, uzadzwe noMweya Mutsvene." 
Acts9:18 Pakarepo pameso ake pakabva zvinhu zvinenge mafunhurwa, akavona zve; akasimuka, ndokusimbiswa." 
Acts9:19 Akagara navadzidzi paDhamaseko mamwe mazuva. 
Acts9:20 Pakarepo akaparidza Kristu mumasinagoge, kuti ndiye Mwanakomana waMwari." 
Acts9:21 Vose vakazvinzwa vakashamiswa, vakati: Ko uyu haazi iye waiparadza vaidana kuzita iri paJerusarema here, akavuyira izvozvo pano, kuti aende navo vakasungwa kuvaprista vakuru?" 
Acts9:22 Asi Sauro wakaramba achisimbiswa, akakunda vaJudha vakanga vagere Dhamaseko, achiratidza kuti Jesu ndiye Kristu." 
Acts9:23 Zvino mazuva mazhinji akati apera, vaJudha vakarangana kuti vamuvuraye." 
Acts9:24 Asi kurangana kwavo kwakazikamwa naSauro. Vakarindavo masuvo masikati novusiku, kuti vamuvuraye." 
Acts9:25 Zvino vadzidzi vake vakamutora vusiku, vakamuburusa naparusvingo, vamuisa mudengu." 
Acts9:26 Zvino wakati asvika Jerusarema, akaidza kufambidzana navadzidzi; asi ivo vakamutya vose vasingatendi kuti wava mudzidzi." 
Acts9:27 Zvino Bharnabhasi akamutora, akaenda naye kuvapositora, ndokuvarondedzera kuti wakavona Ishe munzira, uye kuti wakataura naye, uye kuti wakaparidza nezita raJesu paDhamaseko asingatyi." 
Acts9:28 Akagara navo paJerusarema, achifambidzana navo," 
Acts9:29 akaparidza nezita raShe asingatyi. Akataura nokuita nharo navaJudha vaitaura chiGiriki; asi ivo vakaidza kumuvuraya. 
Acts9:30 Zvino hama dzakati dzichizviziva, dzikamuburusira Kesaria, ndokumutumira Taso." 
Acts9:31 Zvino kereke yakanga inorugare paJudhiya rose neGariri, neSamaria, ikasimbiswa; ikawedzerwa, ichifamba ichitya Ishe, ichinyaradzwa noMweya Mutsvene." 
Acts9:32 Zvino Peturo wakati achipota nyika kose, akaburukiravo kuvatsvene vakanga vagere Ridha," 
Acts9:33 Akawanapo mumwe munhu, wainzi Eneasi, wakanga avete panhovo makore masere, akawoma mitezo." 
Acts9:34 Peturo akati kwaari: Eneasi, Jesu Kristu unokuporesa; simuka,, uwarure nhovo dzako! Akasimuka pakarepo." 
Acts9:35 Zvino vose vakanga vagere Ridha neSaroni vakamuvona, vakatendevukira kunaShe." 
Acts9:36 Zvino paJopa pakanga panomukadzi waiva mudzidzi, wainzi Tabhita, ndokuti Dorkasi, kana zvichishandurwa. Iye wakashingaira zvikuru pamabasa akanaka nezvipo." 
Acts9:37 Zvino namazuva iwayo iye akarwara, ndokufa. Vakati vamushambidza, vakamuisa muimba yokumusoro," 
Acts9:38 Zvino Ridha zvawakanga uri pedo neJopa, vadzidzi vakati vanzwa kuti Peturo uripo, vakatumira kwaari vanhu vaviri, kuti vandokumbira zvikuru kwaari, vachiti: Usanonoka hako kuvuya kwatiri." 
Acts9:39 Ipapo Peturo akasimuka, akaenda navo. Wakati asvika, vakamuisa kuimba yokumusoro chirikadzi dzose dzikamira naye dzichichema, vakamuratidza zvokupfeka nenguvo, dzavakanga vaitirwa naDorkasi, achiri navo." 
Acts9:40 Zvino Peturo akavabudisira panze vose, akafugama, akanyengetera, ndokutendevukira kumutumbi, akati: Tabhita, muka! Akasvunura meso ake; zvino wakati achivona Peturo, akagara." 
Acts9:41 Akamubata noruvoko rwake, akamusimudza; akadana vatsvene nechirikadzi, akamuisa pamberi pavo ari mupenyu." 
Acts9:42 Zvikazikamwa navose paJopa; vazhinji vakatenda kunaShe. 
Acts9:43 Ipapo akagara mazuva mazhinji paJopa, kunomumwe Simoni, musuki wamatebwe." 
Acts10:1 Zvino kwakanga kunomumwe murume paKesaria, wainzi Kornerio, mukuru wezana wehondo yainzi yeItaria," 
Acts10:2 Munhu, wainamata nowaitya Mwari, iye neveimba yake yose, waipa vanhu zvipo zvizhinji, nokunyengetera kunaMwari misi yose." 
Acts10:3 Zvino nenguva inenge yepfumbamwe yezuva akavona kwazvo, nezvaakaratidzwa, mutumwa waMwari achipinda kwaari, achiti kwaari: Kornerio!" 
Acts10:4 Iye akamutarisisa, akatya, akati; Chinyiko Ishe? Akati kwaari: Minyengetero yako nezvipo zvako zvakwira pamberi paMwari, zvarangarirwa." 
Acts10:5 Zvino tuma varume Jopa kundodana Simoni, unotumidzwa Peturo." 
Acts10:6 Unogara nomumwe unonzi Simoni, musuki wamatebwe, imba yake iri pagungwa iye uchakuvudza zvaunofanira kuita." 
Acts10:7 Zvino mutumwa, wakataura naye, wakati abva, akadana varanda vake vaviri nomurwi wakarurama pakati pavaisimushumira," 
Acts10:8 akavavudza zvose, ndokuvatumira Jopa." 
Acts10:9 Zvino fume mangwana vachiri parwendo, vava pedo neguta, Peturo akakwira pamusoro peimba kundonyengetera nenguva inenge yechitanhatu." 
Acts10:10 Akaziya kwazvo, akada kudya; zvino vakati vachagadzira akabatwa nomweya;" 
Acts10:11 akavona denga razarurwa, nechimwe chinhu chichiburuka somucheka mukuru unoburusirwa pasi wakasungwa miromo mina." 
Acts10:12 Maiva nemhuka dzose dzinamakumbo mana nezvinokambaira zvenyika, neshiri dzedenga." 
Acts10:13 Inzwi rikavuya kwaari, richiti: Simuka Peturo, baya, udye." 
Acts10:14 Asi Peturo akati: Kwete, Ishe, nokuti handina kutongodya chinhu chisakanaka, chinetsvina." 
Acts10:15 ipapo inzwi rikavuya zve kwaari rwechipiri, richiti: Chakanatswa naMwari, usati, chine tsvina iwe." 
Acts10:16 Izvozvo zvakaitwa katatu, chinhu chikakwidzwa pakarepo kudenga." 
Acts10:17 Zvino Peturo wakati achakanganiswa mumoyo make kuti chiratidzo chaakanga avona chairevei, tarira varume vakanga vatumwa naKornerio, vamira pasuvo vachibvunza imba yaSimoni;" 
Acts10:18 vakadana, vakabvunza kana Simoni, unonzi Peturo, agerepo." 
Acts10:19 Zvino Peturo, achafunga chiratidzo, Mweya akati kwaari: Tarira, varume vatatu vanokutsvaka." 
Acts10:20 Zvino simuka, uburuke, uende navo, usinganyunyuti, nokuti ndini ndava tuma." 
Acts10:21 Ipapo Peturo akaburukira kuvarume avo, akati kwavari: Tarirai, ndini wamunotsvaka; shoko ramavuyira ndereiko?" 
Acts10:22 Vakati: Kornerio, mukuru wezana, murume wakarurama, unotya Mwari, unorumbidzwa norudzi rwose rwavaJudha, wakarairwa naMwari nomutumwa mutsvene, kuti anzwe mashoko kwamuri." 
Acts10:23 Ipapo akavadana mumba, akati vagarepo. Fume mangwana akasimuka, akaenda navo; nedzimwe hama dzapaJopa dzikamuperekedza." 
Acts10:24 Fume zve mangwana akapinda Kesaria, Zvino Kornerio wakanga akavamirira, akakokera hama dzake neshamwari dzake dzaidikamwa." 
Acts10:25 Zvino Peturo wakati achipinda, Kornerio akamuchingamidza, akawira pasi petsoka dzake, akamunamata." 
Acts10:26 Asi Peturo wakamusimudza, akati: Simuka, neni ndiri munhuvo." 
Acts10:27 Zvino wakati achataura naye, akapinda, akawana vazhinji vakavungana," 
Acts10:28 akati kwavari: imwi munoziva kuti hazvina kufanira kuti muJudha afambidzane nomunhu worumwe rudzi, kana kuvuya kwaari: Asi Mwari wakandiratidza, kuti ndirege kuti munhu haana kunaka, kana kuti unetsvina;" 
Acts10:29 naizvozvo ndavuya, ndisingarambi, zvandadamwa; zvino ndinobvunza kuti mandidanireiko." 
Acts10:30 Kornerio akati: Ava mazuva mana kusvikira nguva ino, ini ndakanga ndichinyengetera mumba mangu nenguva yepfumbamwe, ipapo ndikavona murume amire pamberi pangu, anenguvo dzinopenya." 
Acts10:31 akati: Kornerio, kunyengetera kwako kwanzwika, nezvipo zvako zvarangarirwa naMwari." 
Acts10:32 Naizvozvo chitumira vanhu Jopa, udane Simoni, unonzi Peturo; unogara mumba maSimoni musuki wamatebwe, pagungwa iye kana auya uchataura newe." 
Acts10:33 Naizvozvo ndakakurumidza kutuma kwamuri; zvino maita zvakanaka, zvamavuya. Zvino isu tose tiri pano pamberi paMwari, kuti tinzwe zvamarairwa naShe." 
Acts10:34 Ipapo Peturo akashamisa muromo wake, akati: Zvirokwazvo, ndinovona kuti Mwari haazi mutsauri wavanhu;" 
Acts10:35 asi parudzi rupi norupi, munhu, unomutya, achiita zvakarurama, unogamuchirwa naye." 
Acts10:36 Ndiro shoko raakatuma kuvana vaIsraeri achiparidza mashoko akanaka orugare naJesu Kristu (ndiye Ishe wavose)," 
Acts10:37 imwi munoziva shoko iro rakaparidzwa paJudhiya rose, rakatanga paGariri, shure kokubhabhatidzwa kwakaparidzwa naJohwani;" 
Acts10:38 raJesu weNazareta, kuti Mwari wakamuzodza noMweya Mutsvene nesimba; iye waipotenyika, achiita zvakanaka, achiporesa vose vakamanikidzwa naDhiabhorosi; nokuti Mwari waiva naye." 
Acts10:39 Nesu tiri zvapupu zvazvose, zvaakaita munyika yavaJudha nomuJerusarema; ndiye wavakavuraya, vachimuturika pamuti." 
Acts10:40 Ndiye wakamutswa naMwari nezuva retatu, akamupa simba kuti avonekwe pachena;" 
Acts10:41 akasavonekwa navanhu vose, asi nezvapupu zvakagara zvatsaurwa naMwari, iyesu taidya nokumwa naye, amuka kuvakafa." 
Acts10:42 Akatiraira kuti tiparidzire vanhu, nokupupura kwazvo kuti ndiye wakagadzwa naMwari kuti ave Mutongi wavapenyu navakafa." 
Acts10:43 Vaporofita vose vanomupupurira kuti nezita rake mumwe nomumwe unotenda kwaari uchapiwa kangamwiro yezvivi. 
Acts10:44 Peturo wakati achataura mashoko awa, Mweya Mutsvene akaburuka pamusoro pavose, vakanzwa shoko." 
Acts10:45 Zvino vatendivokudzingisa, vakanga vavuya naPeturo, vakashamiswa, nokuti chipo choMweya Mutsvene chakanga chadururwa pamusoro pavahedhenivo;" 
Acts10:46 nokuti vakavanzwa vachitaura nedzimwe ndimi, vachirumbidza Mwari. Ipapo Peturo akapindura akati:" 
Acts10:47 Kunomunhu here ungadzivisa mvura, kuti ava, vakapiwa Mweya Mutsvene sesu, varege kubhabhatidzwa?" 
Acts10:48 Zvino akaraira kuti vabhabhatidzwe muzita raJesu Kristu. Ipapo vakakumbira kwaari, kuti ambogara mamwe mazuva." 
Acts11:1 Zvino vapositora nehama, vaiva paJudhiya, vakanzwa kuti vahedheni vakagamuchiravo shoko raMwari" 
Acts11:2 Zvino Peturo wakati akwira Jerusarema,vatendi vokudzingisa vakaita nharo naye," 
Acts11:3 vachiti: Wakapinda iwe kuvarume vasina kudzingiswa, ukadya navo." 
Acts11:4 Zvino Peturo akatanga kuvarondedzera zvose, zvichitevedzana, achiti:" 
Acts11:5 Ndakanga ndiri muguta reJopa, ndichinyengetera; ndikabatwa nomweya, ndikavona chiratidzo; chimwe chinhu chakaburuka, chinenge mucheka mukuru unoburuswa kudenga wakasungwa miromo mina, chikasvika kwandiri;" 
Acts11:6 ndakati ndachitarisisa, nokucherekedza, ndikavona mhuka dzenyika dzinamakumbo mana nezvikara, nezvinokambaira, neshiri dzedenga," 
Acts11:7 ndikanzwavo inzwi richiti kwandiri: Simuka Peturo, baya, udye." 
Acts11:8 Asi ini ndikati: Kwete Ishe, nokuti mumuromo mangu hamuna kumbopinda chinhu chisakanaka, chinetsvina." 
Acts11:9 Asi inzwi rakapindura rwechipiri, richibva kudenga, richiti: Icho chakanatswa naMwari, iwe usati, hachinakunaka." 
Acts11:10 Izvozvi zvakaitwa katatu, zvose zvikakwidzwa zve kudenga." 
Acts11:11 Ipapo tarira pakarepo varume vatatu vamire pamberi peimba matakanga tiri vakanga vatumirwa kwandiri vachibva Kesaria. 
Acts11:12 Ipapo ndikakokerwa noMweya, kuti ndienda navo, ndisinganyunyuti. Nehama idzi nhanhatuvo dzakandiperekedza, tikapinda mumba momurume uyu." 
Acts11:13 Iye akativudzavo kuti wakavona mutumwa amire mumba make, achiti: Tumira Jopa, udane Simoni, unonzi Peturo;" 
Acts11:14 iye uchakuvudza mashoko auchaponeswa nawo, iwe nemhuri yako yose." 
Acts11:15 Zvino ndakati ndichatanga kutaura, Mweya Mutsvene akaburuka pamusoro pavo, sapamusoro peduvo pakutanga." 
Acts11:16 Ini ndikarangarira shoko raShe, rokuti: Johwani wakabhabhatidza nemvura, asi imwi muchabhabhatidzwa noMweya Mutsvene." 
Acts11:17 Zvino kana Mwari akavapa chipo icho chaakatipa isu, pakutenda kwedu kunaShe Jesu Kristu, ini ndaigova ani, waigona kudzivisa Mwari?" 
Acts11:18 Zvino vakati vanzwa izvozvo, vakanyarara, vakakudza Mwari vachiti: Zvirokwazvo, Mwari wakapa vahedhenivo kutendevuka kovupenyu." 
Acts11:19 Zvino avo vakaparadzirwa nokutambudzika kwakamuka pamusoro paSitefano, vakaenda kusvikira paFenikia neKupuro, neAndiokia, vasingatauri shoko kumunhu, asi kunavaJudha bedzi." 
Acts11:20 Zvino pakati pavo paiva navamwe varume veKupro neKurini ivo vakati vasvika Antiokia, vakataura kuvaGirikivo, vachiparidza Ishe Jesu." 
Acts11:21 Ruvoko rwaShe rukava navo, vazhinji vakatenda, vakatendevukira kunaShe." 
Acts11:22 Mashoko avo akanzwika nekereke paJerusarema, vakatuma Bharnabhasi kuti aende Antiokia." 
Acts11:23 Iye wakati asvika, avona nyasha dzaMwari, akafara; akaraira vose kuti vanamatire Ishe nomoyo wakasimba;" 
Acts11:24 nokuti waiva murume wakanaka, uzere noMweya Mutsvene nokutenda; vazhinji-zhinji vakawedzerwa kunaShe." 
Acts11:25 Iye akaenda Taso achindotsvaka Sauro. 
Acts11:26 Zvino wakati amuwana, akavuya naye Antiokia. Ipapo vakavungana nekereke gore rose, vakadzidzisa vanhu vazhinji-zhinji; paAndiokia vadzidzi vakatanga kunzi Vakristu." 
Acts11:27 Namazuva iwayo vaporofita vakaburuka vachibva Jerusarema, vakaenda Antiokia." 
Acts11:28 Mumwe wavo wainzi Agabho, akasimuka, ndokuvazivisa noMweya kuti nzara huru ichavapo panyika yose; iyo ikasvika panguva yaKiraudhio." 
Acts11:29 Ipapo vadzidzi vakatenderana, kuti mumwe nomumwe paaigona napo atume zvingabatsira hama dzigere Judhiya." 
Acts11:30 Vakaita kudaro, vakazvitumira naBharnabhasi naSauro kuvakuru." 
Acts12:1 Zvino nenguva inenge iyeyo mambo Herodhe akatambanudza mavoko ake kuti atambudze vamwe vekereke; 
Acts12:2 akavuraya Jakobho, mukuru waJohwani, nomunondo." 
Acts12:3 Zvino wakati achivona kuti zvafadza vaJudha, ndokupfuvura akabata Peturovo. Aiva mazuva ezvingwa zvisinembiriso." 
Acts12:4 Zvino wakati amubata, akamusunga mutirongo, akamuisa kumapoka mana, rimwe nerimwe rinavarwi vana, kuti vamurinde, achiti amuise pamberi pavanhu, kana paseka yapfuvura." 
Acts12:5 Naizvozvo Peturo akachengetwa mutirongo,; asi wakanga achinyengetererwa zvikuru nekereke kunaMwari." 
Acts12:6 Zvino Herodhe wakati oda kumubudisa, vusiku ibwobwo Peturo wakanga avete pakati pavarwi vaviri, akasungwa namaketani maviri; navarindi vakanga vachirinda tirongo pamberi pomukova." 
Acts12:7 Ipapo, tarira, mutumwa waShe wakamirapo, chiedza chikapenya mumba; akarova Peturo parutivi, ndokumumutsa, achiti: Muka, ukurumidze. Ipapo maketani akawa pamavoko ake." 
Acts12:8 Mutumwa akati kwaari: Zvisunge chivuno, usungire shangu dzako. Akaita saizvozvo. Akati kwaari: Fuka nguvo yako, unditevere." 
Acts12:9 Akabuda, akamutevera, asingazivi kuti zvirokwazvo zvinoitwa nomutumwa; asi wakati ndinovona chiratidzo." 
Acts12:10 Zvino vakati vapfuvura murindi wokutanga nowechipiri, vakasvika pasuvo ramatare, pavaipinda napo paguta; rikangovazarukira roga; vakabuda, vakapfuvura neimwe nzira, mutumwa ndokubva kwaari pakarepo." 
Acts12:11 Peturo wakati apengenuka, akati: Zvino ndinoziva zvirokwazvo kuti Ishe wakatuma mutumwa wake, akandirwira paruvoko rwaHerodhe napazvose zvakanga zvichifungwa navanhu vavaJudha." 
Acts12:12 Zvino wakati arangarira izvozvo, akaenda kumba kwaMaria, mai vaJohwani, wainzi Marko; vazhinji vakanga vakavunganapo, vachinyengetera." 
Acts12:12 Zvino wakati arangarira izvozvo, akaenda kumba kwaMaria, mai vaJohwani, wainzi Marko; vazhinji vakanga vakavunganapo, vachinyengetera." 
Acts12:13 Zvino wakati agogodza pagonhi resuvo, musikana wainzi Rodha akavuya kuzoteerera." 
Acts12:14 Iye akati achinzwa inzwi raPeturo, akasazarura suvo nomufaro, asi wakamhanyira mukati akavavudza kuti Peturo umire pasuvo." 
Acts12:15 Ivo vakati kwaari: Unopenga. Asi iye wakasimbisa achiti ndizvozvo. Ivo vakati: Mutumwa wake. 
Acts12:16 Asi Peturo wakaramba achigogodza; vakazozarura, vakamuvona, vakashamiswa." 
Acts12:17 Zvino iye akavaninira noruvoko kuti vanyarare, akavarondedzera mutovo waakabudiswa nawo naShe patirongo. Akati: Vudzai Jakobho nehama zvinhu izvozvi; ndokubva akaenda kumwe." 
Acts12:18 Zvino kwakati kwaedza, bope guru rikavapo pakati pavarwi, vachiti Peturo waitiwa sei?" 
Acts12:19 Herodhe wakati amutsvaka, akamushaiwa, ndokubvunzisisa varindi, akaraira kuti vavurawe. Zvino akaburuka Judhiya, akaenda Kesaria, akandogara'ko." 
Acts12:20 Zvino akatsamwira zvikuru vanhu veTire neSidhoni; ivo ndokuvuya kwaari vose pamwe chete, vakaita vushamwari naBrasto, mutariri weimba yamambo, vakakumbira rugare, nokuti nyika yavo yaipiwa zvokudya nenyika yamambo." 
Acts12:21 Ipapo nezuva rakanga ratarwa, Herodhe akafuka nguvo dzovumambo, akagara pachigaro chake chovushe, akataura kwavari." 
Acts12:22 Ipapo vanhu vakadanidzira vachiti: Inzwi raMwari, harizi romunhu." 
Acts12:23 Pakarepo mutumwa waShe ukamurova, nokuti wakanga asina kukudza Mwari; akadyiwa nehonye, akafa." 
Acts12:24 Asi shoko raMwari rakakura rikawanda. 
Acts12:25 Zvino Bharnabhasi naSauro vakati vapedzisa basa ravo, vakadzokera Jerusarema, vakaenda naJohwani, wainzi Marko." 
Acts12:25 Zvino Bharnabhasi naSauro vakati vapedzisa basa ravo, vakadzokera Jerusarema, vakaenda naJohwani, wainzi Marko." 
Acts13:1 Zvino pakereke yapaAntiokia paiva navaporofita navadzidzisi, vaiti: Bharnabhasi naSimiyoni, wainzi Nigeri, naRukio weKurini, naManaeni wakanga arerwa pamwe chete naHerodhe mubati, naSauro." 
Acts13:2 Vakati vachishumira Ishe, nokutsanya, Mweya Mutsvene akati: Nditsaurirei Barnabhasi naSauro kubata basa randakavadanira." 
Acts13:3 Ipapo vakatsanya, vakanyengetera, vakaisa mavoko pamusoro pavo, ndokuvaendisa." 
Acts13:4 Naizvozvo vakati vatumwa noMweya Mutsvene, vakaburukira Serukia; vakabvapo vakaenda Kupro nechikepe." 
Acts13:5 Vachisvika paSarami, vakaparidza shoko raMwari mumasinagoge avaJudha. Vakanga vanaJohwanivo, waiva mubatsiri wavo." 
Acts13:6 Vakati vagura chiwi chose kusvikira paPafosi, vakawana imwe n'anga, waiva muporofita wenhema, muJudha, zita rake rainzi Bari-Jesu." 
Acts13:7 Waigara pamubati wenyika, wainzi Sejiyo Pauro, munhu wakachenjera. Iye ndokudana Bharnabhasi naSauro, achitsvaka kunzwa shoko raMwari." 
Acts13:8 Asi n'anga iyo Erimasi (nokuti ndiro zita rake, kana richishandurwa), akavadzivisa, achitsvaka kutsausa mubati pakutenda." 
Acts13:9 Asi Sauro (ndiye Paurovo), azere noMweya Mutsvene, akamutarisisa, akati:" 
Acts13:10 Iwe, uzere nokunyengera kose namano akaipa ose, mwanakomana waDhiabhorosi, muvengi wokururama kose, hauregi here kutsausa nzira dzakarurama dzaShe?" 
Acts13:11 Zvino, tarira, ruvoko rwaShe ruri pamusoro pako; uchava bofu, uchaita nguva usingavoni zuva. Pakarepo mhute nerima zvikamuwira; akapota-pota, achitsvaka vangamusesedza noruvoko." 
Acts13:12 Zvino mubati wakati achivona zvaitika, akatenda, akashamiswa nedzidziso yaShe." 
Acts13:13 Zvino Pauro navaiva naye, vakabva Pafosi, ndokusvika Perga muPamfiria; Johwani akabva kwavari, ndokudzokera Jerusarema." 
Acts13:14 Asi ivo vakabva Perga, vakasvika Antiokia paPisidia; vakapinda musinagoge nezuva resabata, ndokugara pasi." 
Acts13:15 Zvino murairo navaporofita zvakati zvarabwa, vabati vesinagoge vakatuma shoko kwavari, vachiti: Varume, hama, kana muneshoko rokuvaraidza vanhu, taurai henyu." 
Acts13:16 Ipapo Pauro akasimuka, akavaninira noruvoko, akati: Varume vaIsraeri, nemwi munotya Mwari, teererai:" 
Acts13:17 Mwari wavanhu ava vaIsraeri wakasanangura madzibaba edu, akakudza vanhu ava, vachiri vatorwa munyika yeIjipiti; akavabudisa mairi noruvoko runesimba," 
Acts13:18 akava nomoyo murefu namafambire avo murenje makore anenge makumi mana," 
Acts13:19 akaparadza marudzi manomwe munyika yeKanani, akavagovera nyika yavo nemijenya, ive nhaka yavo makore anenge mazana mana namakumi mashanu." 
Acts13:20 Shure kwaizvozvo akavapa vatongi kusvikira kumuporofita Samueri. 
Acts13:21 Pashure vakakumbira mambo; Mwari akavapa Sauro, mwanakaomana waKisi, murume worudzi rwaBenjamini, makore makumi mana." 
Acts13:22 Akamubvisa akamutsa Dhavhidhi, kuti ave mambo wavo, waakapupura achiti: Ndawana Dhavhidhi, mwanakomana waJese murume womoyo wangu, uchaita kuda kwangu kose." 
Acts13:23 Parudzi rwaiyeyo, Mwari akamutsira vaIsraeri Muponesi Jesu, se zvaakanga avapikira;" 
Acts13:24 iye asati asvika, Johwani akamboparidzira vanhu vaIsraeri rubhabhatidzo rwokutendevuka." 
Acts13:25 Zvino Johwani wakati opedzisa basa rake, akati: Munoti, ndini aniko? Handizi iye. Asi tarirai, shure kwangu mumwe unovuya, wandisakafanira kuti ndisunungure shangu dzetsoka dzake." 
Acts13:26 Varume, hama, vana vorudzi rwaAbhurahamu, navari pakati penyu vanotya Mwari, shoko roruponeso urwu rakatitumirwa isu." 
Acts13:27 Nokuti vaigara Jerusarema navabati vavo, zvavakanga vasingamuzivi iye, kana manzwi avaporofita, anorabwa sabata rimwe nerimwe vakaazadzisa pakumupa mhaka kwavo." 
Acts13:28 Kunyange vasina kuwana mhosva yorufu kwaari, vakakumbira kunaPirato kuti avurawe." 
Acts13:29 Zvino vakati vapedza zvose zvakanyorwa pamusoro pake, vakamuturura pamuti, vakamuviga mubwiro." 
Acts13:30 Asi Mwari wakamumutsa kuvakafa. 
Acts13:31 Akavonekwa mazuva mazhinji navakanga vakwira naye Jerusarema, vachibva Gariri, avo vari zvapupu zvake zvino kuvanhu." 
Acts13:32 zvino tinokuparidzirai mashoko emufaro kuti chipikirwa chakaitwa kumadzibaba edu. 
Acts13:33 Kuti Mwari wakachizadzisa kwatiri isu vana vavo pakuti wakasimudzazve Jesu sezvazvakanyorwa mupisarema rechipiri ndiwe mwanakomana wangu nhasi ndakubereka. 
Acts13:34 Zvino zvaanoti wakamumutsa kuvakafa kuti asazodzokerazve kukuvora wakareva kudai ndichakupai mikomborera mitsvene inotendwa yaDhavhidhi. 
Acts13:35 Nokuti unoreva panerimwe Pisarema, achiti: Hamungaisi Mutsvene wenyu kuti avone kuvora." 
Acts13:36 Nokuti Dhavhidhi wakati aita kuda kwaMwari parudzi rwake, akavata rufu, akavigwa kunamadzibaba ake, akavona kuvora." 
Acts13:37 Asi uyu, wakamutswa naMwari haana kuvora." 
Acts13:38 Naizvozvo varume, hama, muzive imi, kuti kangamwiro yezvivi noyuyu inokuparidzirwai imi." 
Acts13:39 Noyuyu, mumwe nomumwe unotenda, unoruramiswa pazvose, zvamakanga musingagoni kururamiswa pazviri nomurairo waMozisi." 
Acts13:40 Naizvozvo chenjerai, kuti murege kuwirwa nezvakarebwa navaporofita, zvinoti:" 
Acts13:41 Tarirai, imwi vazvidzi, mushamiswe, muparare; Nokuti ndinobata basa pamazuva enyu, Basa ramucharamba kutongotenda, kana muchizvivudzwa nomunhu." 
Acts13:42 Zvino vakati vachibuda musinagoge, vakakumbira zvikuru kuti vaparidzirwezve mashoko iwayo nesabata rinotevera." 
Acts13:43 Zvino vesinagoge vakati vapararira, vaJudha vazhinji navaproserite vainamata Mwari, vakatevera Pauro naBharnabhasi; ivo vakataurirana navo, vakavaraira kuti varambire panyasha dzaMwari." 
Acts13:44 Nesabata rakatevera guta rinenge rose. Rakavungana kuzonzwa shoko raMwari. 
Acts13:45 Zvino vaJudha vakati vachivona vanhu vazhinji, vakazara negodo, vakaramba zvakarebwa naPauro, vachimhura Mwari." 
Acts13:46 Ipapo Pauro, naBharnabhasi vakataura vasingatyi, vakati: Zvakanga zvakafanira kuti shoko raMwari ritange kutaurirwa imi, asi zvamariramba, muchiti, hamufanirwi novupenyu bwusingaperi, tarirai, zvino toenda kuvahedheni." 
Acts13:47 Nokuti Ishe wakatiraira saizvozvo, achiti: Ndakakuisa kuti uve chiedza chavahedheni, Kuti uve ruponeso kusvikira kumugumo wenyika." 
Acts13:48 Zvino vahedheni vakati vachinzwa izvozvo, vakafara, vakakudza shoko raShe; navose vakanga vatarirwa vupenyu bwusingaperi vakatenda." 
Acts13:49 Shoko raShe rikaparidzirwa kunyika yose. 
Acts13:50 Asi vaJudha vakakurudzira vakadzi vainamata Mwari, vaikudzwa, navakuru veguta; vakamutsira Pauro naBharnabhasi dambudziko, vakavadzinga munyika yavo." 
Acts13:51 Asi ivo vakazuza guruva patsoka dzavo, vakaenda Ikonio." 
Acts13:52 Vadzidzi vakaramba vachizadzwa nomufaro noMweya Mutsvene. 
Acts14:1 Zvino paIkonio vakapinda pamwechete vose musinagoge ravaJudha, vakataura nokudaro kuti vazhinji-zhinji vavaJudha navaGiriki vakatenda." 
Acts14:2 Asi vaJudha vasina kuteerera, vakamutsa moyo yavahedheni, kuti vavenge hama." 
Acts14:3 Naizvozvo vakagarapo nguva refu, vachitaura munaShe vasingatyi; iye akapupurira shoko renyasha dzake, akavapa simba kuti zviratidzo nezvishamiso zviitwe namavoko avo." 
Acts14:4 Asi vanhu vazhinji veguta vakapesana, vamwe vakava kuvaJudha, vamwe kuvapositora." 
Acts14:5 Zvino vahedheni, navaJudha, navabati vavo vakati vachivavarira kuvaitira zvakaipa nokuvataka namabwe;" 
Acts14:6 ivo vakazviziva, vakatizira Ristra neDerbe, aiva maguta eRikaonia, nokunyika yakapoteredza;" 
Acts14:7 vakaparidzira evhangeri ikoko. 
Acts14:8 Zvino paRistra paigara mumwe murume wakanga asinesimba patsoka dzake, chirema kubva padumbu ramai vake, asina kutongofamba." 
Acts14:9 Iye wakanzwa Pauro achitaura; zvino iye wakati achimutarisisa, akavona kuti unokutenda kuti ungaporeswa," 
Acts14:10 akati nenzwi guru: Mira kwazvo netsoka dzako. Iye akavhazuka, akafamba." 
Acts14:11 Vanhu vazhinji vakati vavona zvaitwa naPauro, vakadanidzira norurimi rwavaRikaonia, vachiti: Vamwari vaburukira kwatiri, vakaita savanhu." 
Acts14:12 Bharnabhasi vakamutumidza Jupiteri, naPauro Merkurio, nokuti ndiye waiva mutauri mukuru." 
Acts14:13 Ipapo muprista waJupiteri waiva netembere yake pamberi peguta, akavuya pamasuvo nenzombe namaruva okushonga, achida kuvabayira, anavanhu vazhinji naye." 
Acts14:14 Zvino vapositora, Bharnabhasi naPauro, vakati vachinzwa izozvo, vakabvarura nguvo dzavo, vakamhanyira pakati pavanhu vazhinji, vakadanidzira." 
Acts14:15 vachiti: Varume, munoitireiko izvozvi? Nesu tiri vanhu semivo; tinokuparidzirai mashoko akanaka, kuti mubve panaizvozvo zvisinamaturo, mutendevukire kunaMwari mupenyu wakaita denga napasi, negungwa, nezvose zviri mukati mazvo." 
Acts14:16 Iye, panguva dzakapfuvura wakatendera vahedheni vose kufamba nenzira dzavo." 
Acts14:17 Asi haana kurega kuzvipupurira, achiita zvakanaka, achikupai mvura yokudenga, nenguva dzezviyo zvizhinji, achizadza moyo yenyu nezvokudya nomufaro." 
Acts14:18 Nokutaura kwavo saizvozvo, vakatambura kwazvo kudzivisa vanhu kuti varege kuvabayira." 
Acts14:19 Ipapo vaJudha vakabva Antiokia neIkonio, vakasvika, vakamutsa moyo yavanhu vazhinji, vakataka Pauro namabwe, vakamukwevera kunze kweguta vachiti wafa." 
Acts14:20 Asi vadzidzi vakati vamukomba, iye akasimuka, akapinda muguta. Fume mangwana akaenda Dhebhe naBharnabhasi." 
Acts14:21 Vakati vaparidza evhangeri paguta iro, vakaita vadzidzi vazhinji, ndokudzokera Ristra, neIkonio, neAntiokia," 
Acts14:22 vachisimbisa mweya yavadzidzi, vachivaraira kuti vatsungirire pakutenda, vachiti, tinofanira kupinda vushe bwaMwari namatambudziko mazhinji." 
Acts14:23 Vakavasanangurira vakuru pakereke imwe neimwe, vakanyengetera, vachitsanya, vakavaisa kunaShe, wavaitenda." 
Acts14:24 Vakagura nePisidia, ndokusvika Pamfiria." 
Acts14:25 Vakati vaparidza shoko paPerga, vakaburukira Ataria." 
Acts14:26 Vakabvapo, vakaenda Antiokia nechikepe, apo pavakanga vaiswa panyasha dzaMwari kubata basa ravakanga vapedzisa zvino." 
Acts14:27 Vakati vasvika, vakavunganidza kereke, vakarondedzera zvose zvakanga zvaitwa naMwari navo, uye kuti wakanga azarurira vahedheni mukova wokutenda." 
Acts14:28 Vakagara nguva huru navadzidzi. 
Acts15:1 Zvino vamwe vakaburuka Judhiya, vakadzidzisa hama, vachiti: Kana musingadzingiswi netsika yaMozisi, hamungaponeswi." 
Acts15:2 Asi Pauro naBharnabhasi vakapesana kwazvo navo, nokuita nharo navo, vakazotenderana kuti Pauro naBharnabhasi navamwe vavo vakwire Jerusarema kuvapositora navakuru pamusoro peshoko iri." 
Acts15:3 Naizvozvo vakaperekedzwa nekereke, vakagura neFenike neSamaria, vakataura zvokutendevuka kwavahedheni; vakafadza zvikuru hama dzose." 
Acts15:4 Zvino vakati vasvika Jerusarema, vakagamuchirwa nekereke, navapositora, navakuru; vakarondedzera zvose zvakaitwa naMwari navo." 
Acts15:5 Asi vamwe vedzidziso yavaFarisi, vaitenda, vakasimuka, vakati, vanofanira kudzingiswa nokurairwa kuti vachengete murairo waMozisi." 
Acts15:6 Ipapo vapositora navakuru vakavungana kuti varangane pamusoro peshoko iri. 
Acts15:7 Zvino, nharo huru dzakati dzavapo. Peturo akasimuka akati kwavari: Varume, hama, munoziva kuti kubva pamazuva akare Mwari wakandisanangura pakati penyu, kuti vahedheni vanzwe shoko reevhangeri nomuromo wangu, vatende." 
Acts15:8 Zvino Mwari, muzivi womoyo, wakavapupurira, akavapa Mweya Mutsvene sesu;" 
Acts15:9 haana kutsaura pakati pedu navo, zvaakanatsa moyo yavo nokutenda." 
Acts15:10 Naizvozvo zvino munoidzirei Mwari, muchiisa pamitsipa yavadzidzi joko, rakanga risingagoni kutakurwa namadzibaba edu kunyange nesu?" 
Acts15:11 Asi tinotenda kuti isu tichaponeswa nenyasha dzaShe Jesu Kristu nomutovo mumwe navo. 
Acts15:12 Ipapo vanhu vazhinji vose vakaramba vanyerere, vakateerera vana Bharnabhasi naPauro vachirondedzera zviratidzo nezvishamiso, zvakaitwa naMwari navo pakati pavahedheni." 
Acts15:13 Zvino vakati vanyarara, Jakobho akapindura, akati: Varume, hama, nditeererei." 
Acts15:14 Simiyoni wakarondedzera mutangire waMwari kumutsa vahedheni, kuti atore kwavari vanhu vezita rake." 
Acts15:15 Namashoko avaporofita anobvumira izvozvi; sezvazvakanyorwa zvichinzi: 
Acts15:16 Shure kwaizvozvi ndichadzoka, Ndivake tabhenekeri yaDhavhidhi, yakawa;Ndichavaka zve matongo ayo, Ndichiimutsa;" 
Acts15:17 Ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe, Navahedheni vose vakadamwa nezita rangu," 
Acts15:18 Mabasa ake ose kubva pakuvamba kwenyika anozikamwa kunaMwari. 
Acts15:19 Naizvozvi ini ndinoti, ngatirege kugumbusa avo pakati pavahedheni vakatendevukira kunaMwari;" 
Acts15:20 asi tivanyorere kuti varege zvakashatiswa nezvifananidzo, novupombwe, ne zvakadzipwa, neropa." 
Acts15:21 Nokuti Mozisi kubva pamarudzi ekare, waiva navanomuparidza paguta rimwe nerimwe, achirabwa mumasinagoge sabata rimwe nerimwe." 
Acts15:22 Ipapo vapositora, navakuru, nekereke yose, vakati zvakanaka kuti vasanangure varume pakati pavo, vavatumire Antiokia pamwe chete naPauro naBharnabhasi, naSirasi, vakuru pakati pehama." 
Acts15:23 Vakanyora mwadhi, vakaituma navo, yaiti: vapositora navakuru kuhama, dzokuvahedheni paAntiokia, napaSiria, napaKirikia; Mufaro!" 
Acts15:24 Zvatakanzwa, kuti vamwe vakabva kwatiri, vatisina kuraira, vakakukanganisai namashoko, vachidziyanisa mweya yenyu vachiti munofanira kudzingiswa nokuchengeta murairo." 
Acts15:25 takati nomwoyo mumwe zvakanaka kuti tisanangure varume, tivatumire kwamuri, pamwe chete naBharnabhasi naPauro, vadikamwa vedu;" 
Acts15:26 vanhu vakazvidza vupenyu bwavo nokuda kwezita raShe wedu Jesu Kristu. 
Acts15:27 Zvino tatuma Judhasi naSirasi, ivo vanozokuvudzai vamene izvozvi nomuromo." 
Acts15:28 Nokuti Mweya Mutsvene nesu takati zvakanaka, kuti tirege kukutakudzai mutoro mukuru kunezvinhu izvi zvakafanira," 
Acts15:29 zvinoti: Regai zvakabayirwa zvifananidzo, neropa, nezvakadzipwa, novupombwe; kana mukazvidzora pazviri, muchaita zvakanaka. Sarai zvakanaka." 
Acts15:30 Zvino vakati vaendiswa, vakaburukira Antiokia; vakavunganidza vanhu vazhinji,vakavapa mwadhi." 
Acts15:31 Ivo vakati vairava, vakafara zvikuru pamusoro pokuvaraidzwa." 
Acts15:32 Judhasi naSirasi, vaiva vaporofita vamene, vakavaraidza hama namashoko mazhinji, nokuvasimbisa." 
Acts15:33 Vakati vagara'ko nguva, vakaendiswa nehama nomufaro, vakaenda kunavakanga vavatuma." 
Acts15:34 [Kunyange zvakadaro Sirasi wakavona zvakanaka kugarapo.] 
Acts15:35 Pauro naBaranabasi vakagara Antiokia, vachidzidzisa nokuparidza shoko raShe, navamwe vazhinjivo." 
Acts15:36 Zvino mamwe mazuva akati apfuvura, Pauro akati kunaBharnabhasi: Ngatidzoke zve tindoshanyira hama muguta rimwe nerimwe matakaparidza shoko raShe, tivone kuti vakadini." 
Acts15:37 Zvino Bharnabhasi wakanga achida kutora Johwanivo, wainzi Marko;" 
Acts15:37 Zvino Bharnabhasi wakanga achida kutora Johwanivo, wainzi Marko;" 
Acts15:38 asi Pauro wakati hazvina kunaka kumutora iye, wakambovasiya paPamfiria, akasaenda navo kubasa." 
Acts15:39 Ipapo kupesana kukavapo, nokudaro vakaparadzana, Bharnabhasi akatora Marko, akaenda Kupro nechikepe;" 
Acts15:39 Ipapo kupesana kukavapo, nokudaro vakaparadzana, Bharnabhasi akatora Marko, akaenda Kupro nechikepe;" 
Acts15:40 asi Pauro wakasanangura Sirasi; akenda, akaiswa nehama panyasha dzaShe;" 
Acts15:41 akagura neSiria neKirikia, achisimbisa kereke." 
Acts16:1 Akasvikavo paDerbe neRistra. Zvino ipapo paiva nomumwe mudzidzi, wainzi Timotio, mwanakomana womukadzi mutendi, waiva muJudha; asi baba vake vaiva muGiriki." 
Acts16:2 Iye waipupurirwa zvakanaka nehama dzapaRistra neIkonio. 
Acts16:3 Pauro akada kuti aende naye, akamutora, akamudzingisa nokuda kwavaJudha vaiva kunzvimbo idzo; nokuti vose vakanga vachiziva kuti baba vake muGiriki." 
Acts16:4 Vakafamba namaguta, vakavapa zvirevo zvakatemwa navapositora navakuru vapaJerusarema, kuti vazvichengete." 
Acts16:5 Naizvozvo kereke dzakasimbiswa pakutenda, dzikawanda pakuverengwa kwadzo zuva rimwe nerimwe." 
Acts16:6 Vakagura nenyika yeFrigia neyeGaratia, vambodziviswa noMweya Mutsvene kuparidza shoko paAsia." 
Acts16:7 Zvino vakati vasvika pakatarisana neMisia, vakaidza kuenda Bitinia, asi Mweya haana kuvatendera." 
Acts16:8 Vakati vapfuvura Misia, vakaburukira Troa." 
Acts16:9 Chiratidzo chikavonekwa naPauro vusiku; murume weMakedhonia wakanga amire, akakumbira zvikuru kwaari, achiti: Yambukira Makedhonia, utibatsire." 
Acts16:10 Zvino wakati avona chiratidzo, pakarepo tikatsvaka kuenda Makedhonia, tichiti, Mwari watidana kuti tindovaparidzira evhangeri." 
Acts16:11 Naizvozvo takabva Troa nechikepe, tikaruramira Samotrake; fume mangwana tikasvika Neapori;" 
Acts16:12 tikabvapo, tikaenda Firipi, guta guru renyika yeMakedhonia, raiva koroni yeRoma; tikagara mamwe mazuva muguta iro" 
Acts16:13 Nezuva resabata tikabuda kunze kwesuvo kurwizi, pataiti vanenge vanonyengeterapo; tikagara pasi, tikaparidzira vakadzi vakanga vavunganapo." 
Acts16:14 Zvino mumwe mukadzi, wainzi Ridia, mutengesi wenguvo tsvuku, womusha weTiatira, wainamata Mwari, akatinzwa; Ishe akazarura moyo wake, kuti ateererae zvaitaurwa naPauro." 
Acts16:15 Wakati abhabhatidzwa, iye naveimba yake, akakumbira zvikuru; achiti: Kana muchiti ndakatenda kunaShe, pindai mumba mangu mugare. Akatitendisa." 
Acts16:16 Zvino takati tichipinda panzvimbo yokunyengetera, tikasongana nomumwe musikana waiva nomweya wokuvuka, waiwanira vatenzi vake mari zhinji nokuvuka kwake." 
Acts16:17 Iye akatevera Pauro nesu, akadanidzira achiti: Vanhu ava varanda vaMwari Wokumusoro-soro, vanokuparidzirai nzira yokuponeswa nayo." 
Acts16:18 Akaita izvozvo mazuva mazhinji. Zvino Pauro akafa neshungu, akatendevuka, akati kumweya: Ndinokuraira muzita raJesu Kristu kuti ubude kwaari. Ukabuda nenguva iyeyo." 
Acts16:19 Zvino vatenzi vake vakati vachivona kuti tariro yokufumiswa kwavo yaenda, vakabata Pauro naSirasi, vakavakakatira, kudare pamberi pavabati," 
Acts16:20 vakaenda navo kuvatongi, vakati: Vanhu ava vaJudha, vanopesanisa guta redu," 
Acts16:21 vachiparidza tsika dzatisinakutenderwa kugamuchira, kana kuita, isu vaRoma." 
Acts16:22 Ipapo vanhu vazhinji vakavamukira vose, vatongi vakava bvarurira nguvo dzavo, vakaraira kuti varobwe neshamhu." 
Acts16:23 Zvino vakati vavarova zvikuru, vakavaisa mutirongo, vakaraira murindi wetirongo kuti ava chengete kwazvo." 
Acts16:24 Iye akati arairwa kudaro, akavaisa mutirongo yomukati, akasunga makumbo avo mumatanda." 
Acts16:25 Zvino panenge pakati povusiku, Pauro naSirasi vakanga vachinyengetera nokuimbira Mwari nziyo; vakanga vakasungwa vakavateerera." 
Acts16:26 Pakarepo kudengenyeka kwenyika kukuru kukavapo, naizvozvo nheyo dzeimba dzikazununguswa; pakarepo mikova yose yeimba ikazarurwa, nemisungo yavose ikasununguka." 
Acts16:27 Ipapo murindi wetirongo akapepuka, ndokuvona mikova yetirongo yakazaruka, akavhomora munondo wake, akada kuzvivuraya, achiti vasungwa vatiza." 
Acts16:28 Ipapo Pauro akadanidzira nenzwi guru, akati: Usazvikuvadza, nokuti tiri muno tose." 
Acts16:29 Zvino wakati akumbira mwenje, akamhanyiramo, ndokuwira pasi pamberi paPauro naSirasi, a chibvunda;" 
Acts16:30 akavabudisira kunze, akati: Vatenzi, ndinofanira kuitei kuti ndiponeswe?" 
Acts16:31 Vakati: Tenda kunaShe Jesu Kristu, ugoponeswa, iwe nemhuri yako." 
Acts16:32 Vakaparidza shoko raMwari kwaari navose vaiva mumba make. 
Acts16:33 Akavatora nenguva iyeyo yovusiku, akakupa mavanga avo, ndokubhabhatidzwa pakarepo, iye navose vake." 
Acts16:34 Akaenda navo mumba make, ndokuisa zvokudya pamberi pavo, akafara zvikuru, iye nemhuri yake yose, achitenda kunaMwari." 
Acts16:35 Zvino kwakati kwaedza, vatongi vakatuma mapurisa, vachiti: Sunungurai vanhu vaya." 
Acts16:36 Murindi wetirongo akavudza Pauro mashoko iwayo, achiti: Vatongi vatuma shoko kuti musunungurwe; naizvozvo budai henyu zvino, muende norugare." 
Acts16:37 Asi Pauro wakati kwavari: Vakatirova pachena, isu vanhu vaRoma tisina kutongwa, vakatiisa mutirongo; zvino vodokutibudisa chinyararire here? Haiwa, kwete! Ngavavuye vamene vatibudise." 
Acts16:38 Mupurisa akavudza vatongi mashoko iwayo; vakatya vachinzwa kuti vaRoma; 
Acts16:39 vakasvika, vakakumbira zvikuru kwavari; vakavabudisa, ndokukumbira kuti vabve muguta ravo." 
Acts16:40 Ipapo vakabuda mutirongo, vakapinda mumba maRidia; vakavona hama, vakavanyaradza, ndokuenda." 
Acts17:1 Zvino vakati vagura neAmfipori neAporonia, vakasvika paTesaronika paiva nesinagoge ravaJudha." 
Acts17:2 Zvino Pauro, sezvaaisiita, akapinda kwavari; akataurirana navo zvaMagwaro masabata matatu," 
Acts17:3 achivazarurira nokuvazivisa, kuti Kristu waifanira kutambudzika nokumuka kuvakafa, uye kuti Jesu uyu, wandinokuparidzirai, ndiye Kristu." 
Acts17:4 Vamwe vavo vakatendiswa, vakatevera Pauro naSirasi, navazhinji vavaGiriki, vainamata Mwari, navakadzi vaikudzwa vazhinji." 
Acts17:5 Asi vaJudha vakanga vasingatendi vakaita godo, vakatora vamwe varume vakaipa, dzaiva simbe, vakavunganidza vanhu vazhinji, vakakanganisa guta; vakawira imba yaJasoni, vachida kuvabudisira kuvanhu." 
Acts17:6 Vakati vachivashaiwa, vakakakatira Jasoni nedzimwe hama pamberi pavabati veguta, vakadana, vachiti: Ava vakakanganisa nyika yose, vakasvika napanovo," 
Acts17:7 Jasoni akavagamuchira; ava vose vanoita zvinopesana nezvirevo zvaKesari, vachiti, mumwe mambo uri'ko, unonzi Jesu." 
Acts17:8 Vakapesanisa vanhu navabati veguta, vachinzwa izvozvo." 
Acts17:9 Zvino, vakati vatora rubatso kunaJasoni navamwe, vakavarega." 
Acts17:10 Pakarepo hama dzikatuma Pauro naSirasi Bheriya vusiku. Ivo vakati vachisvikapo, vakapinda musinagoge ravaJudha." 
Acts17:11 Ava vakanga vachinzwisisa kukunda veTesaronika, vakagamuchira shoko nomwoyo wose, vachinzvera Magwaro zuva rimwe nerimwe, kana zvinhu izvozvo zviri izvo." 
Acts17:12 Naizvozvo vazhinji vavo vakatenda, navakadzi vaikudzwa vavaGiriki, navarume vazhinji." 
Acts17:13 Asi vaJudha veTesaronika, vakati vachinzwa kuti shoko raMwari roparidzwa naPauro paBheriya, vakasvikavo ipapo, vakamutsa nokupesanisa vazhinji." 
Acts17:14 Ipapo hama dzakatuma Pauro pakarepo kusvikira kugungwa, asi Sirasi naTimotio vakasarapo." 
Acts17:15 Zvino avo vakaperekedza Pauro, vakamusvitsa Atene; vakati varairwa kuvudza Sirasi naTimotio, kuti vakurumidze kuvuya kwaari, vakabva." 
Acts17:16 Zvino Pauro, achakavagarira paAtene, akanzwa shungu pamoyo, achivona kuti guta rizere nezvifananidzo." 
Acts17:17 Naizvozvo akataurirana musinagoge navaJudha, navainamata Mwari, napadare zuva rimwe nerimwe, navaakasongana navo." 
Acts17:18 Zvino vamwe vakachenjera vavaEpikuro navaStoiko, vakaita nharo naye; vamwe vakati: Ko uyu mutauri wezvisinamaturo unoda kureveiko? Vamwe zve vakati: Unenge muparidzi wavamwari vasingazikamwi; nokuti wakavaparidzira Jesu nokumuka kwavakafa." 
Acts17:19 ipapo vakamubata, vakamuisa paAreopago, vakati: Ngatinzwevo kuti dzidziso iyi itsva, inotaurwa newe, ndeyeiko?" 
Acts17:20 Nokuti unoreva zvimwe zvinoshamisa panzeve dzedu; naizvozvo tinoda kunzwa, kuti zvinhu izvi ndezveiko?" 
Acts17:21 (Zvino vaAtene vose, navatorwa vaigarapo, vaingofarira chinhu chimwe chete, kutaura kana kunzwa chinhu chitsva.)" 
Acts17:22 Zvino Pauro, amire pakati peAreopago, akati: imwi varume veAtene, pazvinhu zvose ndinovona kuti munonamata zvikuru." 
Acts17:23 Nokuti ndakati ndichipfuvura, ndichicherekedza zvamunonamata, ndakawanavo aritari yakanyorwa izvi: KUNAMWARI USINGAZIKAmwI. Zvino chamunonamata musingachizivi, ndicho chandinokuparidzirai." 
Acts17:24 Mwari wakasika nyika nezvose zviri mairi, iye Tenzi wedenga napasi, haagari mutembere dzakaitwa namavoko." 
Acts17:25 Haashumirwi namavoko avanhu, saachinge achishaiwa chinhu, zvaari iye amene unopa vose vupenyu, nokufema, nezvose;" 
Acts17:26 wakaita neropa rimwe marudzi ose avanhu, achibva kunomumwe chete, kuti agare pose panyika; ambotara nguva dzavakatemerwa, nemiganhu yukugara kwavo;" 
Acts17:27 kuti vatsvake Mwari, zvimwe vamutsvangadzire vamuwane, kunyange asiri kure nomumwe nomumwe wedu." 
Acts17:28 Nokuti maari tinovupenyu, tinofamba, tiripo; sezvavakareva vamwe vanyori venziyo vokwenyu, vachiti: Nokuti tiri rudzi rwakevo," 
Acts17:29 Zvatiri rudzi rwaMwari, hatifaniri kufunga kuti vuMwari bwakafanana nendarama, kana sirivheri, kana ibwe, rakavezwa novumhizha kana kuchenjera komunhu." 
Acts17:30 Naizvozvo Mwari wakarega hake kurangarira nguva dzokusaziva; asi zvino unoraira vanhu vose kose-kose kuti vatendevuke. 
Acts17:31 Nokuti wakatara zuva, raachatonga nyika naro nokururama, nomurume waakagadza; akasimbisa shoko iro kunavose, pakumumutsa kuvakafa." 
Acts17:32 Zvino vakati vachinzwa zvokumuka kwavakafa, vamwe vakaseka, asi vamwe vakati: Tichazokunzwa zve pamusoro paizvozvi," 
Acts17:33 Naizvozvo Pauro akabuda pakati pavo," 
Acts17:34 Asi vamwe varume vakamunamatira, vakatenda; pakati pavo kwaiva naDhionisio, muAreopago, nomukadzi wainzi Dhamari, navamwe pamwe chete navo." 
Acts18:1 Shure kwaizvozvo, Pauro wakabva Atene, akasvika Korinde;" 
Acts18:2 akawana mumwe muJudha, wainzi Akwira, chizvagwa chePonto, achangobva Itaria, naPrisira mukadzi wake; (nokuti Kraudio wakanga araira kuti vaJudha vose vabve Roma); akaenda kwavari;" 
Acts18:3 zvino zvaakanga anebasa rimwe navo, akagara navo vachibata; nokuti basa ravo raiva rokuita matende." 
Acts18:4 Sabata rimwe nerimwe akataurirana navo musinagoge, akaidza kugombedzera vaJudha navaGiriki." 
Acts18:5 Zvino Sirasi naTimotio vakati vachizoburuka vachibva Makedhonia, Pauro akamanikidzwa neshoko, achipupurira vaJudha kwazvo kuti Jesu ndiye Kristu." 
Acts18:6 Zvino vakati vachimudzivisa, nokumutuka, akazuza nguvo dzake, akati kwavari: Ropa renyu ngarive pamusoro penyu; ini ndakachena, kubva zvino ndichaenda kuvahedheni." 
Acts18:7 Akabvapo, akapinda mumba momumwe, wainzi Tito Justo, wainamata Mwari, imba yake yaiva pedo nesinagoge." 
Acts18:8 NaKrispo, mukuru wesinagoge. Akatenda kunaShe naveimba yake yose; navazhinji veKorinde vakanzwa, vakatenda, vakabhabhatidzwa." 
Acts18:9 Zvino Ishe akati kunaPauro vusiku nechiratidzo: Usatya hako, asi taura, usanyarara;" 
Acts18:10 nokuti ini ndinewe; hapanomunhu ungakumukira akakuitira zvakaipa, nokuti ndinavanhu vazhinji muguta rino." 
Acts18:11 Akagarapo gore rimwe nemwedzi mitanhatu, achidzidzisa shoko raMwari pakati pavo." 
Acts18:12 Zvino Gario wakati ava mubati weAkaya, vaJudha vakamukira Pauro nomwoyo mumwe, vakavuya naye pachigaro chokutonga," 
Acts18:13 vachiti: Uyu unogombedzera vanhu kuti vanamate Mwari nenzira isingatenderwi nomurairo. 
Acts18:14 Zvino Pauro wakati oda kushamisa muromo wake, Gario akati kuvaJudha: Dai yaiva mhosva yezvisakarurama, kana kutadza kwakaipa, ndaifanira kuva nomoyo murefu kwamuri, imwi vaJudha" 
Acts18:15 Asi kana dziri nharo pamusoro pamashoko namazita nomurairo wenyu, tambai henyu imwi mhosva iyo; ini handidi kuva mutongi waizvozvo." 
Acts18:16 Akavadzinga pachigaro chokutonga. 
Acts18:17 Zvino vose vakabata Sositeni, mukuru wesinagoge, vakamurova pamberi pechigaro chokutonga; asi Gario haana kuva nehanya nechinhu chimwe chaizvozvo." 
Acts18:18 Pauro wakati agarapo mazuva mazhinji, akawonekana nehama, akabvapo, akaenda Siria nechikepe, anaPrisira naAkwira, avevura musoro wake paKenkrea, nokuti wakanga apika." 
Acts18:19 Vakasvika Efeso, akavasiyapo; asi iye amene wakapinda musinagoge, akataurirana navaJudha." 
Acts18:20 Zvino vakati vachikumbira kuti agare navo nguva refu, haana kutenda;" 
Acts18:21 akawonekana navo, achiti: Ndinofanira chose kuchengeta mutambo uyu unoitwa muJerusarema. Ndichadzokerazve kwamuri, kana Mwari achida, akabva paEfeso nechikepe." 
Acts18:22 Wakati asvika Kesaria, akakwira kundokwazisa kereke, akaburukira Antiokia." 
Acts18:23 Wakati agarapo nguva, akabva, akagura nenyika dzeGaratia neFrigia achidzitevedzanisa, achisimbisa vadzidzi vose." 
Acts18:24 Zvino mumwe muJudha wainzi Aporo, worudzi rwapaArekasandira, murume wakanga akadzidza zvikuru, wakasvika Efeso; wakanga anesimba pamagwaro." 
Acts18:25 Uyu wakanga adzidziswa nzira yaShe, akashingaira nomweya, achitaura nokunyatsodzidzisa zvaJesu, achiziva rubhabhatidzo rwaJohwani bedzi." 
Acts18:26 Iye akatanga kutaura musinagoge asingatyi. Zvino Prisira naAkwira vakati vamunzwa, vakamutora, vakanatsomududzira nzira yaMwari." 
Acts18:27 Zvino wakati achida kuyambukira Akaya, hama dzikamusimbisa, vakanyorera vadzidzi kuti vamugamuchire. Zvino wakati asvika, akabatsira zvikuru ivo vakatenda nenyasha." 
Acts18:28 Nokuti wakakunda vaJudha nesimba pachena, achiratidza naMagwaro, kuti Jesu ndiyeKristu." 
Acts19:1 Zvino Aporo achiri paKorinde, Pauro wakati agura namativi enyika okumusoro, akasvika Efeso, akawana vamwe vadzidzi," 
Acts19:2 akati kwavari: Makagamuchira Mweya Mutsvene pakutenda kwenyu here? vakati kwaari kwete, hatina kutongonzwa kuti Mweya Mutsvene uripo." 
Acts19:3 Akati: ko makabhabhatidzwa norubhabhatidzo rwupiko? Vakati: Norubhabhatidzo rwaJohwani. 
Acts19:4 Zvino Pauro akati: Johwani wakabhabhatidza norubhabhatidzo rwokutendevuka, achivudza vanhu kuti vatende kunaiye unozovuya shure kwake, iye Jesu Kristu." 
Acts19:5 Vakati vazvinzwa izvozvo, vakabhabhatidzwa muzita raShe Jesu," 
Acts19:6 Zvino Pauro wakati aisa mavoko ake pamusoro pavo, Mweya Mutsvene akavuya pamusoro pavo, vakataura nendimi, vakaporofita." 
Acts19:7 Ivavo vose vaiva varume vanenge gumi navaviri. 
Acts19:8 Zvino wakapinda musinagoge, akataura asingatyi mwedzi mitatu, achitaurirana navo, achivagombedzera namashoko ovushe bwaMwari." 
Acts19:9 Asi vamwe vakati vachiwomesa moyo, vasingateereri, vachizvidza Nzira iyo pamberi pavazhinji akabva kwavari, akataura navadzidzi, akataurirana navo zuva rimwe nerimwe muchikoro chaTirano." 
Acts19:10 Izvozvo zvikaitwa makore maviri; nokudaro vose vakanga vagere paAsia vakanzwa shoko raShe Jesu, vaJudha navaGiriki." 
Acts19:11 NaMwari akaita zvishamiso nemavoko aPauro," 
Acts19:12 nokudaro micheka nenguvo, zvaibva pamuviri wake, zvaiiswa kuvarwere, hosha dzikabva kwavari, nemweya yakaipa ikabuda." 
Acts19:13 Zvino vamwe vaJudha, vavuki, vaipota-pota, vakaidza kudana zita raShe Jesu pamusoro pavaiva nemweya yakaipa, vachiti: Ndinokupikirai naJesu unoparidzwa naPauro." 
Acts19:14 Vaiva vanakomana vanomwe vomumwe muJudha, wainzi Sikevha, muprista mukuru, vaiita izvozvo." 
Acts19:15 Mweya wakaipa ukapindura, ukati kwavari: Jesu ndinomuziva, naPauro ndinomuziva, asi imwi ndimi vana aniko?" 
Acts19:16 Ipapo munhu waiva nomweya wakaipa akavamukira simba, akavakurira vose vari vaviri, akavakunda; nokudaro vakatiza mumba imomo, vasinenguvo, vakuvadzwa." 
Acts19:17 Izvozvo zvakazikamwa navose vaJudha navaGiriki, vakanga vagere Efeso vakatya vose, zita raShe Jesu rikakudzwa." 
Acts19:18 Zvino vazhinji vavakanga vatenda vakavuya, vakazvirevurura, nokurondedzera mabasa avo." 
Acts19:19 Navamwe vazhinji vaiita zvovun'anga, vakavunganidza bhuku dzavo, vakadzipisa pamberi pavose; vakaverenga mutengo wadzo, vakawana kuti waiva masirivheri anezvuru zvinamakumi mashanu.*" 
Acts19:20 Naizvozvo shoko raShe rikakura nesimba, rikakunda." 
Acts19:21 Izvozvo zvakati zvapedziswa, Pauro akafunga mumoyo make kuenda Jerusarema, kana ambogura napaMakedhonia neAkaya, achiti: Kana ndamboenda ikoko, ndinofanira kundovona Romavo." 
Acts19:22 Zvino akatumira Makedhonia vaviri vavaimushumira, vanaTimoito naErasto, iye amene akagara Ezhiya nguva duku." 
Acts19:23 Zvino nenguva iyo bope guru rikavapo pamusoro peNzira iyo. 
Acts19:24 Nokuti mumwe, wainzi Dhemetrio, mupfuri wesirivheri, waiita zvitembere zvaDhiana zvesirivheri, waifumisa zvikuru mhizha dzapo." 
Acts19:25 Akavavunganidza ivo pamwe chete navamwe vabati vezvakadaro, akati: Varume, munoziva kuti nebasa iri tinowana fuma yedu." 
Acts19:26 Zvino munovona, nokunzwa, kuti Pauro uyu wakatendisa nokutsausa vazhinji, pasati pari paEfeso bedzi, asi panenge paAsia yose, achiti, zvakaitwa namavoko havazi vamwari." 
Acts19:27 Zvino njodzi ndiyo kuti habwuzi vumhizha bweduchetebwungazvidzwa, asi kuti tembere yamwarikadzi mukuru Dhiana ichashovorwa, naiye amene, unonamatwa paAsia yose nenyika yose, abviswe pavukuru bwake." 
Acts19:28 Zvino vakati vachinzwa izvozvo, vakafa neshungu kwazvo, vakadanidzira, vachiti: Dhiana wavaEfeso mukuru!" 
Acts19:29 Guta rikakanganiswa kwazvo; vakamhanyira nomoyo mumwe panzvimbo paitambwa, vabata Gayo naAristarko, varume veMakedhonia, vaiperekedza Pauro." 
Acts19:30 Zvino Pauro akada kupinda kuvanhu, vadzidzi vakasamutendera." 
Acts19:31 Navamwe vakuru veAsia, vaiva shamwari dzake, vakatuma shoko kwaari, vachikumbira zvikuru kwaari kuti arege kupinda panzvimbo paitambwa." 
Acts19:32 Zvino vamwe vakadanidzira zvimwe, vamwe zvimwe zve; nokuti vungano yakanga yanyonganiswa, vazhinji vasingazivi zvavakavunganira." 
Acts19:33 Ipapo vakabudisa Arekisandro mukati mavanhu vazhinji, vaJudha vachimusundira mberi; zvino Areksandro akaninira noruvoko, achida kuzvidavirira pamberi pavanhu." 
Acts19:34 Ipapo vakati vachivona kuti iye muJudha, inzwi rimwe rikamuka kuna vose, vakadanidzira nguva dzinenge mbiri, vachiti: Dhiana wavaEfeso mukuru!" 
Acts19:35 Zvino munyori weguta wakanyaradza vanhu, akati: Varume veEfeso, munhu ndoupiko usingazivi, kuti guta ravaEfeso ndiro mushumiri wamwari kadzi mukuru Dhiana nowechifananidzo chakawa kubva kunaJupiteri." 
Acts19:36 Zvazvisingagoni kurambwa izvozvi, maifanira kunyarara musingaiti chinhu nokusarangarira kwazvo." 
Acts19:37 Nokuti mavuya navarume ava, vasati vari mbavha dzetembere kana vamhuri vamwarikadzi wedu." 
Acts19:38 Zvino kana Dhemetrio nedzimwe mhizha dzinaye vanemhosva nomunhu, misi yokutonga iripo, navatongi varipo; ngavakwirirane havo." 
Acts19:39 Asi kana muchitsvaka chimwe chinhu pamusoro pedzimwe mhosva, zvingatemwa pavungano yakafanira." 
Acts19:40 Nokuti njodzi ndiyo kuti tingakwirirwa pamusoro pebope ranhasi, zvakusinemhosva; kana chiri chinhu ichi hatingagoni kupindura pamusoro pemhere-mhere iyi." 
Acts19:41 Wakati ataura izvozvo, akaendisa vungano." 
Acts20:1 Bopoto rakati ranyarara, Pauro akadana vadzidzi, akavaraira, ndokuwonekana navo, akabva achida kuenda Makedhonia." 
Acts20:2 Akagura namativi enyika idzo, akaraira vatendi namashoko mazhinji, ndokusvika panyika yavaGiriki." 
Acts20:3 Akati agara mwedzi mitatu, rangano yakaipa ikaitwa navaJudha pamusoro pake, oda kuenda Siria nechikepe, akati ndodzokera napaMakedhonia." 
Acts20:4 Akaperekedzwa naSopatro weBheriya, mwanakomana waPiro; naAristarko naSekundo, veTesaronika; naGayo weDerbe, naTimotio; uye Tikiko naTrofimo veAsia." 
Acts20:5 Ivo vakatungamira, vakatimirira paTroa." 
Acts20:6 Isu tikabva Firipi nechikepe mazuva ezvingwa zvisinembiriso apfuvura; tikasvika kwavari paTroa namazuva mashanu; tikagarapo, mazuva manomwe." 
Acts20:7 Zvino nomusi wokutanga wevhiki, takavungana kuti timedure chingwa, Pauro akataurirana navo, achida kuenda mangwana; akaramba achiparidza shoko kusvikira pakati povusiku." 
Acts20:8 Kwakanga kunemwenje mizhinji muimba yokumusoro matakanga tavungana. 
Acts20:9 Zvino pahwindi pakanga pagere rimwe jaya, rainzi Yutiko, rikabatwa nehope kwazvo, zvino Pauro, wakati achingoramba achiparidza, iye akabatwa nehope, akawira pasi, achibva paimba yechitatu yokumusoro, akasimudzwa afa." 
Acts20:10 Ipapo Pauro akaburuka, akazviwisira pamusoro pake, akamufungatira, akati: Musaita bopoto, nokuti mweya wake uchiri maari." 
Acts20:11 Zvino wakati akwirazve kumusoro, akamedura chingwa, akadya, akataura navo nguva refu kusvikira kuchiedza, ndokuenda." 
Acts20:12 Vakavuya nomukomana ari mupenyu, vakanyaradzwa kwazvo." 
Acts20:13 Asi isu takatungamira kuchikepe, tikaenda Aso, tichida kutora Pauro ipapo, nokuti wakanga araira saizvozvo, iye achida kufamba namakumbo." 
Acts20:14 Takati tasongana naye paAso, tikamutora, tikandosvika Mitirene;" 
Acts20:15 tikabva ipapo nechikepe, fume mangwana tikasvika pakatarisana neKiyo; fume mangwana tikapfuvura napaSamo; fume mangwana zve tikasvika Mireto." 
Acts20:16 Nokuti Pauro wakanga achiti: Ndichapfuvura Efeso nechikepe, kuti arege kunonoka paAsia; nokuti wakanga achikurumidza kuti kana zvichibvira ave Jerusarema nezuva rePendekosita." 
Acts20:17 Zvino iye ari paMireto, akatumira Efeso kundodana vakuru vekereke." 
Acts20:18 Vakati vasvika kwaari, akati kwavari: imwi munoziva mugarire wangu pakati penyu nguva dzose, kubva pazuva rokutanga randakasvika naro paAsia;" 
Acts20:19 ndichibatira Ishe nokuzvininipisa zvikuru, nemisodzi, namatambudziko akandiwira nerangano dzakaipa dzavaJudha;" 
Acts20:20 kuti handina kutya kukuparidzirai zvingakubatsirai nokukudzidzisai pachena padzimba dzose; 
Acts20:21 ndichipupurira kwazvo vaJudha navaGiriki, kuti vatendevukire kunaMwari, nokutenda kunaShe wedu Jesu Kristu." 
Acts20:22 Zvino tarirai, ndinoenda Jerusarema ndakasungwa pamweya ndisingazivi zvichandiwira ikoko;" 
Acts20:23 asi kuti Mweya Mutsvene unondipupurira kwazvo muguta rimwe nerimwe, kuti kusungwa nenhamo zvakandigarira." 
Acts20:24 Asi hakuna chimwe chezvinhu izvi chinondidzosera shure uye handiverengi kuti upenyu hwangu hunokosha kwandiri kuti ndipedze rwendo rwangu nomufaro nebasa randakagamuchira kuna Ishe Jesu rokupupura kwazvo evhangeri yenyasha dzaMwari. 
Acts20:25 Zvino tarirai, ndinoziva kuti imwi mose, vandakafamba pakati penyu, ndichiparidza vushe bwaMwari hamuchazovoni chiso changu." 
Acts20:26 Naizvozvo ndinokupupurirai nhasi kuti ndakachena paropa ravanhu vose. 
Acts20:27 Nokuti handina kutya kukuparidzirai kuda kose kwaMwari. 
Acts20:28 Zvichenjererei imi, neboka rose ramakaitwa vatariri varo noMweya Mutsene, kuti mufudze kereke yaMwari, yaakatenga neropa rake." 
Acts20:29 Ini ndinoziva kuti kana ndaenda mapere anoparadza achapinda pakati penyu, asingaregi boka." 
Acts20:30 Vuye, napakati penyu pamene pachamuka varume, vachataura zvinopesanisa, kuti vatsause vadzidzi vavatevere." 
Acts20:31 Naizvozvo rindai, murangarire kuti makore matatu handina kurega vusiku namasikati kuraira mumwe nomumwe nemisodzi." 
Acts20:32 Zvino hama dzangu ndinokuisai kunaShe, neshoko renyasha dzake, iye unesimba rokukuvakisai, nokukupai nhaka pakati pavakaitwa vatsvene vose." 
Acts20:33 Handina kuchochora sirivheri, kana ndarama, kana nguvo dzomunhu mumwe." 
Acts20:34 Hongu munoziva imwi mumene, kuti mavoko awa akabatira kushaiwa kwangu nokwavanhu vandaiva navo." 
Acts20:35 Pazvinhu zvose ndakakuratidzai, kuti muchibata muchidai, munofanira kubatsira vasinesimba, nokurangarira mashoko aShe Jesu, sezvaakataura amene achiti: Kupa kuna maropafadzo kupfuvura kugamuchira." 
Acts20:36 Wakati ataura izvozvo, akafugama, akanyengetera navo vose." 
Acts20:37 Vakachema zvikuru vose; vakawira pamutsipa waPauro, vakawonekana naye nokumusveta," 
Acts20:38 vaneshungu kwazvo neshoko raakataura rokuti havachazovoni chiso chake. Ipapo vakamuperekedza kuchikepe. 
Acts21:1 Zvino takati taparadzana navo, tikabva nechikepe, tikarurama, tikasvika Kose; fume mangwana tikasvika Rodhe; tikabvapo, tikasvika Patara." 
Acts21:2 Takati tawanapo chikepe, chaiyambukira Finikia, tikapinda mukati macho, tikaenda." 
Acts21:3 Takati tavona Kupro, tikaisiya kuruboshwe, tichienda Siria, tikasvika Tire; nokuti chikepe chaifanira kututunura mutoro ipapo;" 
Acts21:4 zvino takati tawanapo vadzidzi, tikagarapo mazuva manomwe; ivo vakati nomweya kunaPauro kuti arege kukwira Jerusarema." 
Acts21:5 Zvino takati tapedzapo mazuva tikabva, tikaenda; ivo vose, navakadzi navana, vakatiperekedza kusvikira tabuda paguta; ipapo tikafugama pamhenderekedzo, tikanyengetera." 
Acts21:6 Tikawonekana, isu tikaenda kuchikepe, ivo vakadzokera kumusha kwavo." 
Acts21:7 Isu takati tapedza rwendo tichibva Tire, tikasvika Toremai, tikakwazisa hama, ndokuswera zuva rimwe navo." 
Acts21:8 Fume mangwana isu taiva veboka raPauro tikabvapo, tikasvika Kesaria; ipapo tikapinda mumba maFiripi, Muevhangeri, mumwe wavanomwe, tikagara naye." 
Acts21:9 Iye wakanga anavakunda vana, mhandara, vaiporofita." 
Acts21:10 Zvino takati tichigarapo mazuva mazhinji, mumwe muporofita, wainzi Akabho, akaburuka achibva Judhiya," 
Acts21:11 akavuya kwatiri, akatora bhanire raPauro, akazvisunga makumbo namavoko ake, akati: Mweya Mutsvene unoreva kudai: Saizvozvo vaJudha paJerusarema vachasunga murume, mwene webhanire iri, nokumuisa pamavoko avahedheni." 
Acts21:12 Takati tichinzwa izvozvo, isu navamwe vaipapo tikakumbira zvikuru kwaari, kuti arege kukwira Jerusarema." 
Acts21:13 Ipapo Pauro akapindura, akati; Munoiteiko, muchichema nokuputsa moyo wangu? Nokuti ini handina kuzvigadzirira kusungwa bedzi, asi kunyange kufira zita raShe Jesu paJerusarema." 
Acts21:14 Zvino wakati achiramba kukundwa, tikanyarara, tikati: Kuda kwaShe ngakuitwe." 
Acts21:15 Mazuva iwayo akati apera, tikarongedza, tikakwira Jerusarema." 
Acts21:16 Navamwe vadzidzi veKesaria vakaenda nesu, vakavuya vo nomumwe, wainzi Naasoni, mudzidzi wakare weKupro, wataindogara naye." 
Acts21:17 Zvino takati tichisvika Jerusarema, hama dzikatigamuchira nomufaro." 
Acts21:18 Fume mangwana Pauro akapinda nesu kunaJakobho; navakuru vakanga varipo vose. 
Acts21:19 Akavakwazisa, ndokuvarondedzera, chimwe nechimwe, zvakaitwa naMwari pakati pavahedheni nebasa rake." 
Acts21:20 Ivo vakati vazvinzwa, vakakudza Mwari, vakati kwaari: Hama, unovona kuti zvuru zvingani zvavaJudha vanotenda; vose vanoshingairira murairo;" 
Acts21:21 zvino vakavudzwa kuti iwe unodzidzisa vaJudha vose vari pakati pavahedheni, kuti varambe Mozisi, uchiti, varege kudzingisa vana vavo, kana kufamba netsika dzomurairo." 
Acts21:22 Zvino todiniko? Vachanzwa havo kuti wasvika. 
Acts21:23 Naizvozvo ita izvi zvatinotaura kwauri: Tinavarume vana vakazvisunga nokupika; 
Acts21:24 uvatore, uzvinatse pamwe chete navo, uvaripire, vagovevura misoro yavo; ipapo vose vachaziva, kuti haazi mashoko echokwadi, avakavudzwa pamusoro pako; asi kuti iwevo unofamba zvakanaka uchichengeta murairo umene." 
Acts21:25 Asi kana vari vahedheni vakatenda, takavanyorera kuti vasachengeta zvinhu zvakadai, asi kuti vazvidzore panezvakabayirwa zvifananidzo, neropa nezvakadzipwa novupombwe." 
Acts21:26 Ipapo Pauro akatora varume avo, akazvinatsa pamwe chete navo nezuva rakatevera, akapinda mutembere kuti azivise kupera kwamazuva okunatsa, kusvikira mumwe nomumwe abayirwa chibayiro." 
Acts21:27 Zvino mazuva manomwe akati opera, vaJudha veAsia vakamuvona mutembere, vakamutsa vanhu vazhinji, vakamubata." 
Acts21:28 vakadanidzira, vachiti: Varume vaIsraeri, batsirai! Uyu ndiye munhu unodzidzisa vanhu kose-kose zvinopesana navanhu, nomurairo, nenzvimbo ino, uye zve vakavuya navaGiriki mutembere, akasvibisa nzvimbo ino tsvene." 
Acts21:29 Nokuti vakanga vavona Trofimo muEfeso, anaye muguta, vakati zvimwe Pauro wapinda naye mutembere." 
Acts21:30 Ipapo guta rose rakanyonganiswa, vanhu vakamhanyira pamwe chete; vakabata Pauro, vakamukwevera kunze kwetembere, mikova ikazarirwa pakarepo." 
Acts21:31 Zvino vakati vachitsvaka kumuvuraya, shoko rikakwira kumukuru wechuru chamazana, kuti Jerusarema rose ranyonganiswa." 
Acts21:32 Iye akatora pakarepo varwi navakuru vezana, akaburuka achimhanyira kwavari: ivo vakati vachivona mukuru wechuru chemazana navarwi, vakarega kurova Pauro." 
Acts21:33 Zvino mukuru wechuru chemazana akaswedera, akamubata, ndokuraira kuti asungwe namaketani maviri; akabvunza kuti ndiani, uye kuti waiteiko." 
Acts21:34 Zvino vamwe pakati pavazhinji vakadanidzira chimwe chinhu, vamwe chimwe chinhu; zvino iye asingagoni kuziva chokwadi nokuda kwebopoto, akaraira kuti vamuise kuimba yavarwi." 
Acts21:35 Wakati achisvika pazvikwiriso, akaita sokutakurwa navarwi, nokuda kwesimba ravanhu vazhinji;" 
Acts21:36 nokuti vanhu vazhinji vakatevera, vachidanidzira, vachiti: Mubvisei!" 
Acts21:37 Zvino oda kupinzwa muimba yavarwi, Pauro akati kumukuru wechuru chamazana; Ko ndingataura nemwi here? Iye akati unoziva chiGiriki here?" 
Acts21:38 Ko hauzi uya muIjipiti, wakadeya kukanganisa vanhu panguva yapfuvura, akaenda navavurayi vanezvuru zvina kurenje here?" 
Acts21:39 Ipapo Pauro akati: Ini ndiri muJudha weTaso muKirikia, munhu weguta rakakurumbira. Ndinokumbira kuti munditendere nditaure navanhu." 
Acts21:40 Zvino wakati amutendera, Pauro akamira pazvikwiriso, akaninira vanhu noruvoko rwake; zvino vakati vanyarara kwazvo, akataura norurimi rwechiHebheru, achiti:" 
Acts22:1 Varume, hama, namadzibaba, inzwai kuzvidavirira kwangu pamberi penyu zvino." 
Acts22:2 Ivo vakati vachinzwa, kuti wotaura navo norurimi rwechiHebheru, vakanyanya kunyarara. Iye akati:" 
Acts22:3 Ini ndiri muJudha, ndakaberekwa paTaso muKirikia, asi ndakarerwa muguta rino, pamakumbo aGamarieri, ndikadzidziswa netsika kwadzo dzomurairo wamadzibaba edu, ndichishingairira Mwari, semi mose nhasi;" 
Acts22:4 ndikatambudza veNzira Iyi kusvikira pakuvuraya, ndichisunga varume navakadzi nokuvaisa mutirongo.," 
Acts22:5 muprista mukuru sezaangandipupuriravo namakurukota ose; ndikapiwa mwadhi navo kuhama, ndikaenda Dhamaseko kuti ndiise Jerusarema avo vaigara'ko, vakasungwa, kuti varobwe." 
Acts22:6 Zvino ndakati ndichifamba, ndoswedera Dhamaseko, anenge masikati, pakarepo ndikapenyerwa kose nechiedza chikuru, chaibva kudenga." 
Acts22:7 Ndikawira pasi, ndikanzwa inzwi richiti kwandiri: Sauro, Sauro, unonditambudzireiko?" 
Acts22:8 Ndikapindura, ndikati: Ndimi aniko Ishe? Akati kwandiri: Ndini Jesu weNazareta, waunotambudza." 
Acts22:9 Zvino vaiva neni vakavona chiedza, vakatya asi havana kunzwa inzwi rowakataura neni." 
Acts22:10 Ndikati: Ndodiniko, Ishe? Ishe akati kwandiri: Simuka, uende Dhamaseko; apo uchavudzwa zvose zvakatarwa kuti uzviite." 
Acts22:11 Zvino zvandakanga ndisingagoni kuvona nokupenya kwechiedza icho, ndikasesedzwa noruvoko navaiva neni, ndikasvika Dhamaseko." 
Acts22:12 Zvino mumwe murume, wainzi Ananiasi, munhu wainamata Mwari sezvinoreva murairo, waipupurirwa zvakanaka navaJudha vose vakanga vagerepo," 
Acts22:13 akavuya kwandiri akamira, akati kwandiri: Sauro, hama, chivona! Nenguva iyo ndikamuvona." 
Acts22:14 Iye akati: Mwari wamadzibaba edu wakakusanangura, kuti uzive kuda kwake, nokumuvona iye wakarurama, nokunzwa inzwi rinobva mumuromo make." 
Acts22:15 Nokuti iwe uchava chapupu chake kuvanhu vose chezvawakavona nezvawakanzwa. 
Acts22:16 Zvino uchanonokereiko? Simuka, ubhabhatidzwe, usukwe zvivi zvako, udane zita raShe." 
Acts22:17 Zvino ndakati ndadzokera Jerusarema, ndichinyengetera mutembere, ndikaita sokubatwa nomweya," 
Acts22:18 ndikamuvona, achiti kwandiri: Kurumidza, ubve Jerusarema zvino-zvino, nokuti havangagamuchiri kupupura kwako pamusoro pangu." 
Acts22:19 Ipapo ndikati: Ishe, vanoziva vamene kuti ini ndaiisa mutirongo, nokurova mumasinagoge, avo vaitenda kwamuri;" 
Acts22:20 vuye, musi wakadururwa ropa raStafano, chapupu chenyu, nenivo ndakanga ndimirepo, ndichibvumira, kuvurawa kwake ndikachengeta nguvo dzavaimuvuraya." 
Acts22:21 Ipapo akati kwandiri: Enda, ndichakutuma kure kuvahedheni." 
Acts22:22 Vakamuteerera kusvikira pashoko iro; ipapo vakadanidzira, vachiti: Wakadai ngaabviswe panyika; nokuti haafaniri kurarama." 
Acts22:23 Vakadanidzira, vakakandira nguvo dzavo pasi, vachikushira ivhu kudenga," 
Acts22:24 mukuru wechuru chamazana akaraira, kuti aiswe kuimba yavarwi, achiti abvunzwe nokurobwa zvikuru, kuti azive mhosva yavaimupopotera kudai." 
Acts22:25 Zvino vakati vamusunga namakashu, Pauro akati kumukuru wezana, wakanga amirepo: Makatenderwa kurova munhu uri muRoma, asina kutongwa here?" 
Acts22:26 Zvino mukuru wezana wakati achizvinzwa, akaenda kumutungamiri mukuru, akati kwaari chenjerai zvamunoita, Nokuti munhu uyu muRoma." 
Acts22:27 Mutungamiri mukuru akavuya akati kwaari: Ndivudze, uri muRoma here? Akati: Hongu." 
Acts22:28 Mutungamiri mukuru akati: Ini ndakatenga simba iri rokuve muRoma nomutengo mukuru. Pauro akati: Ini ndakaberekwa ndiri muRoma. 
Acts22:29 Zvino vakanga vomubvunzisisa, vakabva kwaari pakarepo, nomutungamiri mukuru wakatyavo achiziva kuti iye muRoma, uye nokuti wakanga amusunga." 
Acts22:30 Zvino fume mangwana, achida kuziva kwazvo kuti vaJudha vakamupomera mhosva yei, akamusunungura, akaraira kuti vaprista vakuru namakurukota ose vavungane, akaburusa Pauro, ndokumuisa pamberi pavo." 
Acts23:1 Zvino Pauro wakati achitarisisa kumakurukota, akati: Varume, hama, ini ndakafamba pamberi paMwari nehana yakarurama kusvikira zuva ranhasi." 
Acts23:2 Ipapo Ananiasi, muprista mukuru, akaraira vakanga vamire naye kuti vamurove muromo." 
Acts23:3 Ipapo Pauro akati kwaari: Mwari uchakurova iwe, rusvingo rwakacheneswa; ugerepo kuti unditonge nomurairo, zvino woraira kuti ndirobwe, uchidarika murairo here?" 
Acts23:4 Vakanga vamirepo vakati: Ko unotuka muprista mukuru waMwari here? 
Acts23:5 Pauro akati: Hama dzangu, ndakanga ndisingazivi kuti ndiye muprista mukuru; nokuti kwakanyorwa, kuchinzi: Usataura zvakaipa pamusoro pomubati wavanhu vako." 
Acts23:6 Zvino Pauro wakati achivona kuti vamwe ndivaSajusi navamwe vaFarisi, akadanidzira mumakurukota, akati: Varume, hama, ini ndiri muFarisi, mwanakomana wavaFarisi, ndotongwa pamusoro petariro nokumuka kwavakafa." 
Acts23:7 Wakati adaro, kupesana kukavapo pakati pavaFarisi navaSaduse; vungano ikaparadzana." 
Acts23:8 Nokuti vaSajusi vaiti hapana kumuka kwavakafa, kana mutumwa, kana mweya; asi vaFarisi vaitenda izvozvo zvose." 
Acts23:9 Zvino bope guru rikavapo; vamwe vanyori vokuvaFarisi vakasimuka, vakaita nharo, vachiti: Ngatirege kugwa naMwari, hativoni chinhu chakaipa kumunhu uyu; zvimwe mweya wakataura naye, kana mutumwa." 
Acts23:10 Zvino kupesana kukuru kuchida kumuka, mutungamiri Mukuru akatya kuti Pauro ungabvamburwa navo, akaraira varwi kuti vaburuke, vamubvute pakati pavo, vamuise muimba yavarwi." 
Acts23:11 Vusiku; bwakatevera, Ishe akamira naye, akati: Tsunga moyo, sezvawakandipupurira kwazvo paJerusarema, unofanira kupupura paRomavo." 
Acts23:12 Zvino kwakati kwaedza, vaJudha vakaita rangano, vakazvisunga nokupika, vachiti, havangadyi kana kumwa kusvikira vavuraya Pauro." 
Acts23:13 Vakanga vaita rangano iyo, vakapfuvura makumi mana." 
Acts23:14 Ava vakaenda kuvaprista vakuru navakuru, vakati: Tazvisunga nokupika kukuru, kuti hatingadyi chinhu, kusvikira tavuraya Pauro." 
Acts23:15 Naizvozvo zvino imi, namakurukota, mutaridzire mutungamiri mukuru, kuti amuburusire kwamuri mangwana, muchiita somunoda kunatso-bvunzisisa mhosva yake; isu tazvigadzira kuti timuvuraye, asati aswedera." 
Acts23:16 Zvino mwanakomana wehanzvadzi yaPauro akanzwa zvokuvandira kwavo, akaenda, akapinda mumba mavarwi, akavudza Pauro." 
Acts23:17 Ipapo Pauro akadana mumwe wavakuru vezana, akati: Isa jaya iri kumutungamiri Mukuru; nokuti uneshoko raanoda kumuvudza." 
Acts23:18 Naizvozvo akamutora, akaenda naye kumutungamiri Mukuru, akati: Pauro musungwa, wakandidana akakumbira, kuti ndivuye nejaya iri kwamuri; uneshoko raanoda kukuvudzai." 
Acts23:19 Mutungamiri Mukuru akabata ruvoko rwake, akaenda naye vari voga, akamubvunza vari voga, akati: Uneshoko reiko, raunoda kundivudza?" 
Acts23:20 Iye akati: VaJudha vakatenderana kukumbira kwamuri, kuti muburuse Pauro kumakurukota mangwana, vachiita savanoda kumubvunzisisa mhosva yake." 
Acts23:21 Naizvozvo musavatendera; nokuti pakati pavo kunavarume vanopfuvura makumi mana vanomuvandira vakazvisunga nokupika, kuti havangadyi, kana kumwa, kusvikira vamuvuraya; zvino vakazvigadzirira vachimirira chivimbiso, chinobva kwamuri." 
Acts23:22 Naizvozvo Mutungamiri Mukuru akaendesa jaya amuraira achiti: Usavudza munhu, kuti wandizivisa izvozvo." 
Acts23:23 Zvino akadana vakuru vezana vaviri, akati: Gadzirai varwi vanamazana maviri, navanotasva mabhiza vanamakumi manomwe, navanamapfumo vanamazana maviri, vaende Kesaria nenguva yechitatu yovusiku;" 
Acts23:24 muvatsvakire zvipfuwo, kuti vatasvise Pauro, vagonyatsomuisa kumubati Feriksi." 
Acts23:25 Akanyora mwadi yakanga ichiti: 
Acts23:26 Kraudio Risia, kunaFeriksi, mubati wakakurumbira kwazvo, kwaziwai!" 
Acts23:27 Uyu munhu wakabatwa navaJudha, akanga oda kuvurawa navo, ini ndikasvika navarwi, ndikamurwira, zvandakanzwa kuti muRoma." 
Acts23:28 Zvino ndakati ndichida kuziva mhosva yavakamukwirira nayo, ndikamuburusira kumakurukota avo;" 
Acts23:29 ndakawana kuti wakwirirwa pamusoro pamashoko omurairo wavo, asi asinemhosva yechinhu chingafanira rufu kana kusungwa." 
Acts23:30 Zvino ndakati ndavudzwa, kuti voda kuvandira munhu uyu, ndikamutumira kwamuri pakarepo, ndikaraira vanomukwirira kuti vataure pamberi penyu mhosva yake." 
Acts23:31 Zvino varwi vakatora Pauro sezvavakarairwa, vakamuisa Antipatri vusiku." 
Acts23:32 Fume mangwana vakarega vatasvi vamabhiza, kuti vaende naye, ivo vakadzokera kuimba yavarwi." 
Acts23:33 Vaya vakati vasvika Kesaria, vakapa mubati mwadhi, vakaisavo Pauro pamberi pake." 
Acts23:34 Wakati arava, akabvunza kuti ndowenyika ipi; zvino wakati anzwa kuti ndoweKirikia," 
Acts23:35 akati: Ndichakunzwa kwazvo, kana vanokukwirira vasvikavo; akaraira kuti achengetwe mumba maHerodhe." 
Acts24:1 Zvino mazuva mashanu akati apfuvura, Ananiasi, muprista mukuru, akaburuka navamwe vakuru, nomumwe mureveri, wainzi Terturo; vakamhan'arira Pauro kumubati." 
Acts24:2 Iye akati adamwa, Terturo akatanga kumupomera mhosva achiti: Zvatinovona rugare rukuru nemi, norudzi urwu zvarunoruramisirwa mhosva nokubata kwenyu kwakanaka;" 
Acts24:3 tinozvigamuchira nemitovo yose napanzvimbo dzose nokuvonga kukuru, imi, Feriksi wakakurumbira zvikuru." 
Acts24:4 Asi, zvandisingadi kukunonosai, ndinokumbira zvikuru kwamuri, kuti mutinzwei nengoni dzenyu zvishomanene." 
Acts24:5 Nokuti takavona kuti murume uyu wakashata kwazvo, unomutsa bope pavaJudha vose panyika dzose, ari mutungamiriri weboka ravaNazareni." 
Acts24:6 Iye wakaidzavo kushatisa tembere, tikamubata, [tichida kumutonga nomurairo wedu." 
Acts24:7 Asi Risia, mutungamiri mukuru, ndokuvuya, akamubvisa mumavoko edu nesimba guru," 
Acts24:8 akaraira vanomupomera kuti vavuye pamberi penyu.] Kana mukamubvunzisisa mumene, muchagona kuziva izvozvo zvose zvatakamukwirira nazvo." 
Acts24:9 NavaJudha vakabvumiravo pakumhangara, vakasimbisa kuti zvinhu izvozvo ndizvo." 
Acts24:10 Zvino mubati wakati amuninira kuti ataure, Pauro akapindura, akati: Zvandinoziva kuti mava mutongi wavanhu ava makore mazhinji, ndinozvidavirira nomufaro," 
Acts24:11 nokuti munzwisise kuti mazuva achigere kupfuvura gumi namaviri, kubvira panguva yandakakwira Jerusarema kundonamata." 
Acts24:12 Havana kundiwana ndichiita nharo mutembere nomunhu, kana muguta;" 
Acts24:13 havangagonivo kusimbisa kwamuri izvo zvavanondipomera nazvo zvino. 
Acts24:14 Asi ndinotenda hangu kwamuri, kuti ndinoshumira Mwari wamadzibaba edu neNzira, yavanoti idzidziso yakatsauka, ndichitenda zvose zvomurairo nezvakanyorwa pavaporofita;" 
Acts24:15 ndinetariro kunaMwari, iyo yavanotendavo vamene, kuti kuchavapo kumuka kwavakafa kwavakarurama navasakarurama." 
Acts24:16 Pachinhu ichi ndinoidza zvikuru kuti misi yose ndive nehana isinemhosva kunaMwari nokuvanhu. 
Acts24:17 Zvino makore mazhinji akati apfuvura, ndakavuya nezvipo nezvibayiro kuvanhu vangu."
