Acts24:18 Ndizvozvo zvavakandiwana ndichiita mutembere, ndanatswa, ndisina vanhu vazhinji, kana bopoto;" 
Acts24:19 asi vamwe vaJudha veAsia vaivapo ivo vaifanira kuva pano pamberi penyu, kundipomera mhosva, kana vaiva nechinhu neni." 
Acts24:20 Kunyange naivava ngavareve vamene chisakarurama chavakawana, musi wandakamira pamberi pamakurukota" 
Acts24:21 asi shoko iri bedzi, randakadanidzira, ndimire pakati pavo, ndichiti: Ndinotongwa nhasi pamusoro pokumuka kwavakafa." 
Acts24:22 Asi Feriksi, zvaakazivisisa zvakanaka. Nzira iyo, akavavetsa, achiti: Kana Risia, mutungamiri mukuru aburukira pano, ndichanatso-bvunzisisa mhaka yenyu." 
Acts24:23 Akaraira mukuru wezana kuti Pauro achengetwe, arerusirwe, uye kuti varege kudzivisa mumwe wokwake kumushumira." 
Acts24:24 Zvino mamwe mazuva akati apfuvura, Feriksi akasvika, nomukadzi wake Drusira, waiva muJudha, akadana Pauro, akamunzwa pamusoro pokutenda kunaKristu Jesu." 
Acts24:25 Zvino wakati achitaura zvokururama, nokuzvidzora, nokutonga kunovuya, Feriksi akatya zvikuru, akapindura, akati: Enda hako zvino; kana ndikazova nenguva yakanaka, ndichakudana." 
Acts24:26 Wakativo zvimwe uchazopiwa mari naPauro; amusunungure naizvozvo wakamudana kazhinji, achitaura naye." 
Acts24:27 Asi makore maviri akati apera, Porkio Festo akapinda panzvimbo yaFerikisi, zvino Ferikisi achida kufadza vaJudha, akasiya Pauro akasungwa." 
Acts25:1 Zvino Festo wakati asvika panyika iyo, mazuva matatu apfuvura, akakwira Jerusarema, achibva Kesaria." 
Acts25:2 vaprista vakuru navakuru vavaJudha vakamhangarira Pauro kwaari, vakamunyengetera," 
Acts25:3 vakakumbira kuti avafadze pamusoro pake, amudanire Jerusarema, kuti vamuvandire vamuvuraye panzira." 
Acts25:4 Asi Festo wakapindura, achiti Pauro wakachengetwa Kesaria, uye kuti iye amene wakanga okurumidza kuenda'ko." 
Acts25:5 Akati: Avo vanesimba pakati penyu, ngavaburuke neni; kana kunechinhu chisakafanira kumunhu uyu, ngavamupomere mhosva." 
Acts25:6 Akagara pakati pavo mazuva asingapfuvuri masere kana gumi, ndokuburukira Kesaria; fume mangwana akagara pachigaro chokutonga, akaraira kuti vavuye naPauro." 
Acts25:7 Wakati asvika, vaJudha vakabva Jerusarema, vakamukomba, vakamupomera mhosva zhinji dzakaipa, dzavakanga vasingagoni kusimbisa." 
Acts25:8 Zvino Pauro akazvidavirira, akati: Handina kutadzira murairo wavaJudha, kana tembere, kana Kesari." 
Acts25:9 Zvino Festo achida kufadza vaJudha, akapindura Pauro akati: Unoda here kukwira Jerusarema, undotongwa'ko pamberi pangu pamusoro pezvinhu izvi?" 
Acts25:10 Ipapo Pauro akati: Ndinomira pamberi pechigaro chokutonga chaKesari, pandinofanira kutongwa; handina kuitira vaJudha zvisakarurama, sezvamunoziva nemivo zvakanaka." 
Acts25:11 Zvino kana ndinemhosva kana kuti ndakaita chinhu chakafanira rufu handirambi kufa; asi kana pasinechinhu chechokwadi pazvinhu zvavanondipomera, hakunomunhu ungandiisa mumavoko avo.Ndinozviisa kunaKesari." 
Acts25:12 Ipapo Festo akataurirana namakurukota, akapindura, akati: Wazviisa kunaKesari; kunaKesari uchaenda." 
Acts25:13 Zvino mamwe mazuva akati apfuvura, mambo Agripa naBernike vakasvika Kesaria kuzokwazisa Festo." 
Acts25:14 Vakati vagara mazuva mazhinji, Festo akaisa mhosva yaPauro kunamambo, achiti: Kunomumwe murume wakasiyiwa pano naFeriksi, akasungwa;" 
Acts25:15 ndichiri paJerusarema, vaprista vakuru navakuru vavaJudha vakamumhangarira, vachikumbira kuti atongerwe rufu." 
Acts25:16 Ndikavapindura, ndikati; haizi tsika yavaRoma kutongera munhu rufu, uyo unopomerwa asati ambotarisana navanomupomera, akapiwa chinguva yokuzvipindurira pamusoro penyaya yaanopomerwa." 
Acts25:17 Zvino vakati vavungana pano, handina kunonoka, asi fume mangwana ndakagara pachigaro chokutonga, ndikaraira kuti vavuye nomurume uyo." 
Acts25:18 Zvino vapomeri vakasimuka, asi havana kumupomera mhosva yezvinhu zvakaipa zvandakanga ndichiti vachamupomera nazvo;" 
Acts25:19 asi vakanga vanamamwe mashoko okupira kwavo, nomumwe Jesu wakanga afa, wainzi naPauro mupenyu." 
Acts25:20 Zvino ini, zvandakanga ndisingazivi mubvunzire wezvinhu zvakadai, ndikabvunza kana achida kuenda Jerusasrema kundotongwa ikoko pamusoro pezvinhu izvozvo." 
Acts25:21 Pauro wakati azviisa kuna mambo mukuru ndikaraira kuti achengetwe kusvikira ndichimutumira kuna Kesari. 
Acts25:22 Ipapo Agripa akati kunaFesto; Neni ndinoda kunzwa munhu uyu ndimene. Iye akati: Mangwana muchamunzwa. 
Acts25:23 Fume mangwana Agripa wakati asvika naBhenike, vashonga kwazvo, vakapinda mumba maitambirwa mhaka, navatungamiriri vakuru, navakuru veguta, vakavuya naPauro varairwa naFesto." 
Acts25:24 Zvino Festo akati: Mambo Agripa, nemwi varume vose vaneni, munovona munhu uyu, wandakanyengeterwa navaJudha vose paJerusarema napano, vakadanidzira, vachiti: Haafaniri kuva mupenyu." 
Acts25:25 Asi ini ndakawana kuti haana kuita chinhu chakafanira rufu, uye zvaakakumbira kuiswa kunamambo mukuru, ndakati, ndichamutuma." 
Acts25:26 Asi handineshoko kwaro rechokwadi randinganyorera ishe pamusoro pake, saka ndavuya naye pamberi penyu, zvikuru pamberi penyu, imwi mambo Agripa, kuti kana abvunzisiswa nemi, ndigova nezvandinganyora." 
Acts25:27 Nokuti kwandiri zvakaita sezvisina kufanira kutuma musungwa, mhosva dzaakakwirirwa nadzo dzisingaziviswivo." 
Acts26:1 Zvino Agripa akati kuna Pauro: Unotenderwa kuzvidavirira. Ipapo Pauro akatambanudza ruvoko rwake, akazvidavirira, achiti;" 
Acts26:2 Mambo Agripa, ndinozvikorokotedza, zvandingazvidavirira nhasi pamberi penyu pamusoro pezvose zvandinokwirirwa nazvo navaJudha;" 
Acts26:3 zvikuru nokuti munoziva tsika dzose namashoko ose pakati pavaJudha; naizvozvo ndinokumbira kwamuri, kuti mundinzwe nomoyo murefu." 
Acts26:4 VaJudha vose vanoziva mufambire wangu, kubva pavuduku bwangu, waiva pakati porudzi rwangu napaJerusarema kubva pakutanga;" 
Acts26:5 vakandiziva kare kana vachida kupupura, kuti ndaiva muFarisi, nedzidziso yokupira kwedu yakaisvorurama." 
Acts26:6 Nazvino ndinomira pano, kuti nditongwe nokuda kokutarira chipikirwa chakapikirwa madzibaba edu naMwari." 
Acts26:7 Marudzi edu anegumi namaviri anoshumira Mwari vusiku namasikati, achiti achasvika pachipikirwa icho.Pamusoro pokutarira uku, imwi mambo, ndinokwirirwa navaJudha." 
Acts26:8 Munofungireiko imwi kuti hazvingatendwi kuti Mwari ungamutsa vakafa? 
Acts26:9 Zvino neni ndaiti ndinofanira kuita zvinhu zvizhinji zvinopesana nezita raJesu weNazareta. 
Acts26:10 Ndakazviitavo paJerusarema, ndikapfigira vatsvene vazhinji mutirongo, ndapiwa simba navaprista vakuru; uye kana vaivurawa, neni ndaibvumiravo." 
Acts26:11 Nomumasinagoge ose ndaivatambudza, ndichivaroverera kuti vamhure Mwari; ndikanyanya kuvapengera, ndikavatambudza kusvikira kumaguta ari kure nenyika ino." 
Acts26:12 Ndakati ndichaita izvozvi, ndikaenda Dhamaseko nesimba uye nomurairo wavaprista vakuru," 
Acts26:13 zvino, mambo masikati makuru, ndiri munzira, ndikavona chiedza chaibva kudenga, chaikunda kupenya kwezuva, chichindipenyera kumativi ose navandaifamba navo." 
Acts26:14 Zvino takati tawira pasi tose, ndikanzwa izwi richiti kwandiri norurimi rwechiHebheru: Sauro! Sauro! Unonditambudzireiko? Zvinokuremera kupfura zvibayiso." 
Acts26:15 Ndakati: Ndimi aniko, Ishe akati: Ndini Jesu, waunotambudza." 
Acts26:16 Asi simuka, umire namakumbo ako; nokuti ndazviratidza kwauri nezvizvi, kuti ndikuite munyai nechapupu chezvawakavona, nezvandichazviratidza nazvo kwauri;" 
Acts26:17 ndichakurwira kuvanhu nokuvahedheni, vandinokutumira kwavari;" 
Acts26:18 kuti usvinudze meso avo, vabve murima, vaende kuchiedza, nokubva pasimba raSatani, vaende kunaMwari. Kuti vagamuchire kangamwiro yezvivi zvavo, nenhaka pakati pavakaitwa vatsvene, nokutenda kwandiri." 
Acts26:19 Naizvozvo, mambo Agripa handina kuramba kuteerera chiratidzo chokudenga;" 
Acts26:20 asi ndakatanga kuparidza kuna veDhamaseko, nokuna veJerusarema, nenyika yose yeJudhiya, nokuvahedheni, kuti vatendevuke, varingire kunaMwari, vaite mabasa akafanira kutendevuka." 
Acts26:21 Pamusoro paizvozvi vaJudha vakandibata mutembere, vakaidza kundivuraya." 
Acts26:22 Asi ndakabatsirwa naMwari, ndikamira kusvikira zuva ranhasi, ndichipupurira vaduku navakuru, ndisingarevi zvimwe zvinhu asi zvakataurwa navaporofita naMozisi, kuti zvichaitika;" 
Acts26:23 zvokuti Kristu wakafanira kutambudzika, uye kuti ave wokutanga kumuka kuvakafa, aparidzire vanhu navahedheni chiedza." 
Acts26:24 Zvino wakati achizvidavirira saizvozvo Festo akati nenzwi guru: Pauro, unopenga; kudzidza kwako kukuru kunokupenza." 
Acts26:25 Asi Pauro akati: Handipengi, Festo wakakurumbira; asi ndinotaura mashoko echokwadi novuchenjeri." 
Acts26:26 Nokuti mambo wandinotaura naye ndisingatyi, unoziva izvozvi, nokuti ndinoziva kuti hapane chinhu chaizvozvo chakavanzika kwaari, nokuti chinhu ichi hachina kuitwa pakavanda." 
Acts26:27 Mambo Agripa, munotenda vaporofita here? Ndinoziva kuti munotenda." 
Acts26:28 Agripa akati kunaPauro: Unenge unoda kundiita mukristu nenguva duku. 
Acts26:29 Pauro akati: ndinonyengetera kunaMwari kana nenguva duku, kana nehuru, kuti musava imwi moga, asi vose vanondinzwa nhasi, vaitwe seni, asi vasinezvisungo izvi." 
Acts26:30 Ipapo mambo akasimuka, nomubati naBerinike, navakanga vagere navo;" 
Acts26:31 vakabuda vakataurirana, vakati: Munhu uyu haaiti chinhu chakafanira rufu kana kusungwa." 
Acts26:32 Ipapo Agripa akati kunaFesto: Munhu uyu dai asina kuzviisa kuna Kesari ungadai asunungurwa. 
Acts27:1 Zvino kwakati kwatemwa kuti tiende Itaria nechikepe, vakaisa Pauro navamwe vasungwa kumukuru wezana, wainzi Jurio, wehondo yaAugusto." 
Acts27:2 Zvino takati tapinda muchikepe cheAdramiteni, chakanga choenda napamisha yemhenderekedzo dzeAsia, tikabva tinaAristarko muMakedhonia, waibva Tesaronika." 
Acts27:3 Fume mangwana tikasvika Sidhoni, Jurio akaitira Pauro zvakanaka, akamutendera kuti aende kushamwari dzake, achengetwe navo." 
Acts27:4 Tikabva ipapo, tikapfuvura nenyasi kweKupro, nokuti mhepo yakatidzivisa." 
Acts27:5 Zvino tayambuka gungwa reKirikia nePamfiria, tikasvika Mira, musha weRikia." 
Acts27:6 Mukuru wezana akawanapo chikepe cheAreksandira, chaienda Itaria, ndokutipinzamo." 
Acts27:7 Zvino takanyatsofamba mazuva mazhinji, tikasvika pakatarisana neKinido tichitambudzika, mhepo zvayakanga isingatitenderi kufamba, tikapfuvura nenyasi kweKrita, napakatarisana neSarmoni." 
Acts27:8 Tikapfuvura napo tichitambudzika, ndokusvika pamwe painzi Zororo Rakanaka, pedo neguta reRasea." 
Acts27:9 Zvino nguva huru yakati yapfuvura, nokufamba negungwa kwava nenjodzi, nokuti nguva yokutsanya yakanga yatopfuvura, Pauro akavaraira," 
Acts27:10 akati kwavari: Varume, ndinovona kuti rwendo rwedu ruchava nokutambudzika nokurashikirwa kukuru, zvisani zviri zvomutoro nechikepe bedzi, asi nokuvupenyu bwedu vo." 
Acts27:11 Asi mukuru wezana wakateerera mufambisi wechikepe, nomwene wacho, kupfuvura zvakarebwa naPauro," 
Acts27:12 nokuti zororo zvarakanga risina kunaka kuti vagarepo chando, vamwe vazhinji vakati zvirinani kuti vabvepo kuti zvimwe vangasvika Fenika vagarepo chando; ndiro zororo reKrita, rakanga rakatarira mabvazuva kumusoro nezasi." 
Acts27:13 Zvino mhepo yezasi yakati ichirira zvishoma, vakati tawana zvatakanga tichivavarira, vakabvapo, vakafamba pedo neKirita." 
Acts27:14 Zvino gare-gare mhepo inesimba, yainzi Yura-kuro, ikaburuka ichibva kwairi, ikatiwira." 
Acts27:15 Zvino chikepe chakati chichibatwa, tisingagoni kufamba tichingotorwa." 
Acts27:16 Zvino tikafamba nyasi kwechimwe chiwi chiduku, chainzi Krauda, tikanga tokoniwa kusunga igwa." 
Acts27:17 Vakati varisimudza, vakatora zvibatsiro, vakasunga chikepe nenyasi; zvino vakatya kuti vachakandirwa pajecha reSirtisi, vakaderedza maseiri, ndokungotorwa." 
Acts27:18 Fume mangwana, zvatakatambura kwazvo nedutu remhepo, vakakandira nhumbi kunze;" 
Acts27:19 nezuva retatu, vakakandira zvinhu zvechikepe kunze namavoko avo." 
Acts27:20 Zvino zvatakanga tisina kubudirwa nezuva kana nyeredzi mazuva mazhinji, nedutu guru remhepo richiramba riripo, takatorerwa tariro yose yokuti tichaponeswa." 
Acts27:21 Zvino vakati vagara nguva refu vasingadyi, Pauro akamira pakati pavo, akati: Varume, maifanira kunditeerera, mukasabva Krita, mukasawirwa nokutambudzika nokurashikirwa uku." 
Acts27:22 Asi zvino ndinokurairai kuti mutsunge moyo; nokuti hakuna ungarashikirwa novupenyu bwake pakati penyu, asi chikepe bedzi." 
Acts27:23 Nokuti vusiku bwuno mutumwa waMwari, wandiri wake, nowandinoshumira vo, wakamira neni," 
Acts27:24 akati: Pauro, usatya; unofanira kumira pamberi paKesari; tarira, Mwari wakakupa vose vanofamba newe muchikepe." 
Acts27:25 Naizvozvo, varume, tsungai moyo nokuti ndinotenda Mwari kuti zvichaitika sezvandakavudzwa." 
Acts27:26 Asi tinofanira kukandirwa pane chimwe chiwi. 
Acts27:27 Zvino vusiku bwegumi novuna bwakati bwasvika, tichangotorwa-torwa mugungwa reAdra, pakati povusiku vafambisi vechikepe vakati voswedera kuneimwe nyika." 
Acts27:28 Vakayera kudzika kwemvura, vakawana pakati mafadomi* makumi maviri; vakapfuvura zvishoma, ndokuyerazve, vakawana pakaita mafadomi* anegumi namashanu." 
Acts27:29 Zvino vakatya kuti zvimwe tichawira pamabwe, vakakanda zvimiso zvina neshure kwechikepe, vakachema vachiti kuedze." 
Acts27:30 Zvino vafambisi vakati vachida kutiza muchikepe, vakaburusira igwa mugungwa, vachiita savanenge vokanda zvimiso kumuromo wacho." 
Acts27:31 Pauro akati kumukuru wezana navarwi: Hamungararami kana ava vasingagari muchikepe. 
Acts27:32 Ipapo varwi vakagura mabote egwa, vakarirega, rikawa." 
Acts27:33 Zvino kwakati koedza, Pauro akakumbira zvikuru kwavari vose kuti vadye, achiti: Nhasi rava zuva regumi nerechina, ramakagara muchizvinyima kudya, musingadyi chinhu." 
Acts27:34 Saka ndinokumbira zvikuru kuti mudye, nokuti ndizvo zvichakuponesai; nokuti hakunoruvudzi rumwe ruchaparadzwa pamusoro womumwe wenyu." 
Acts27:35 Wakati areva izvozvo akatora chingwa akavonga Mwari pamberi pavo vose, akachimedura, ndokutanga kudya iye." 
Acts27:36 Ipapo vakatsunga moyo vose vakadyavo vamene. 
Acts27:37 Isu tose taive muchikepe, taiva mazana maviri namakumi manomwe navatanhatu." 
Acts27:38 Zvino vakati vaguta, vakarerusa chikepe, vachikandira zviyo mugungwa." 
Acts27:39 Kwakati koedza, vakasaziva nyika; asi vakavona zororo raiva nejecha, vakarangana kana zvaibvira kuitika, kuti vaise chikepe pariri." 
Acts27:40 Ipapo vakagura zvimiso, vakazviisa mugungwa, vakasunungura zvisungo zvokudzoresa nazvo, vakasimudzira seiri rapamberi kumhepo, vakaruramira kumhenderekedzo." 
Acts27:41 Zvino vakati vachisvika paidira makungwa maviri, vakagumirisa chikepe pasi; muromo wacho ukabatwa kwazvo usingazununguki, asi rutivi rwacho rweshure rukavhunika nesimba remvura." 
Acts27:42 Zvino varwi vakati zvirinani kuti vasungwa vavurawe, kuti vamwe varege kutiza vachishambira." 
Acts27:43 Asi mukuru wezana wakada kuponesa Pauro, akavadzivisa zvavakanga vachida kuita; akaraira kuti vanogona kushambira, vatange kuzviwisira mumvura, vabude kunyika;" 
Acts27:44 vamwe, vasara, vabude vamwe pamatanda, vamwe panezvimwe zvinhu zvechikepe. Naizvozvo zvakaitika kuti vose vakasvika kunyika vari vapenyu." 
Acts28:1 Zvino takati taponeswa, tikaziva kuti chiwi chinonzi Merita." 
Acts28:2 Vanhu venyika iyi vakatiitira vunyoro kwazvo; nokuti vakabatidza moto, vakatigamuchira tose nokuda kwemvura yakanga ichinaya uye nokuda kwechando." 
Acts28:3 Zvino Pauro wakati avunganidza svinga rovutsotso, akabwuisa pamoto, kukabuda nyoka nokudziya, ikanamatira paruvoko rwake." 
Acts28:4 Vanhu venyika iyo vakati vachivona chikara chakaremberera paruvoko rwake, vakataurirana, vachiti: Zvirokwazvo munhu uyu muvurayi, nokuti kunyange adoponeswa hake pagungwa, Kururama hakumutenderi kuti ave mupenyu." 
Acts28:5 Asi iye wakazuzira chikara mumoto, akasanzwa kurwadzwa." 
Acts28:6 Ivo vakati uchazvimba, kana kuwira pasi pakarepo, akafa; zvino vakati vatarira nguva refu, vakavona kuti haana kusvikirwa nenjodzi, vakashanduka voti: Iye ndimwari." 
Acts28:7 Zvino pedo ipapo paiva neminda yomukuru wechiwi, wainzi Pubhirio; iye wakatigamuchira, akatigarisa zvakanaka mazuva matatu." 
Acts28:8 Zvino baba vaPubhirio vakanga vavete pasi, vakabatwa nefivhiri nokubudisa ropa; Pauro akapinda kwavari, akanyengetera, ndokuisa mavoko ake pamusoro pavo, akavaporesa." 
Acts28:9 Izvo zvakati zvaitwa, navamwevo vechiwi, vairwara, vakavuya, vakaporeswa." 
Acts28:10 Vakatikudza nokukudza kukuru; tichizoenda vakaisa pachikepe zvinhu zvatakanga tichishaiwa. 
Acts28:11 Mwedzi mitatu yakati yapfuvura, tikaenda nechikepe cheArekizandiria, chakanga chagara chando pachiwi, chaiva nechiratidzo chokuti Dioskuri." 
Acts28:12 Zvino tikaenda napaSirakuse, tikagara.po mazuva matatu." 
Acts28:13 Tikabvapo, tikapota ndokusvika Regio; zuva rimwe rikati rapfuvura, mhepo yaibva zasi ikasimuka, tikasvika Puteori nezuva repiri;" 
Acts28:14 tikawanapo hama, dzakakumbira zvikuru kuti tigare nadzo mazuva manomwe; naizvozvo tikasvika Roma." 
Acts28:15 Zvino hama dzakati dzatinzwa, dzikabvapo, dzikavuya kuzotichingamidza, dzikasvika Apio Foro napaTaberne Nhatu; Pauro akati adzivona idzo, akavonga Mwari, akatsunga moyo." 
Acts28:16 Zvino takati tapinda Roma, mubati wechuru akaisa vasungwa kumutungamiriri mukuru, Pauro akatenderwa kugara ari oga, anomurwi waimurinda." 
Acts28:17 Mazuva matatu akati apfuvura, akakokera avo, vakanga vari vakuru vavaJudha. Vakati vavungana, akati kwavari: Varume, hama, kunyange ndisina kuitira vanhu chinhu chakaipa, kana tsika dzamadzibaba edu, ndakabva Jerusarema ndakasungwa, ndaiswa pamavoko avaRoma;" 
Acts28:18 ivo, vakati vandibvunzisisa, vakada kundisunungura, nokuti pakanga pasinemhosva yorufu kwandiri." 
Acts28:19 Asi vaJudha vakaramba, ndikarovererwa kuzviisa kuna Kesari; kusi kuti ndaiva nechinhu chokupomera rudzi rwangu." 
Acts28:20 Zvino ndakakudanai pamusoro pemhosva iyi, kuti ndikuvonei, nditaurirane nemi, nokuti ndakasungwa neketani iri nokuda kwetariro yavaIsraeri." 
Acts28:21 Vakati kwaari: Hatina kugamuchira mwadhi pamusoro pako, dzaibva Judhiya, uye hakunomumwe wehama wakasvika akativudza zvako, kana kutaura zvakaipa pamusoro pako." 
Acts28:22 Asi tinoda kunzwa kwauri zvaunofunga; nokuti kana iri dzidziso iyi, tinoziva kuti inorambwa kose-kose." 
Acts28:23 Zvino vakati vamutarira zuva, vakavuya kwaari vari vazhinji, kwaakanga agere, akavadudzira, achivapupurira kwazvo vushe bwaMwari, akavagombedzera pamusoro paJesu, nomurairo waMozisi navaporofita, kubva mangwanani kusvikira madekwana." 
Acts28:24 Vamwe vakatenda zvakataurwa, asi vamwe havana kutenda." 
Acts28:25 Zvino zvavakanga vasinganzwani, vakaenda, Pauro akataura shoko rimwe chete kwavari, rokuti: Mweya Mutsvene wakataura zvakanaka nomuporofita Isaya kunamadzibaba enyu," 
Acts28:26 achiti: Enda kuvanhu ava uti: Nokunzwa muchanzwa, musingatongonzwisisi nokuvona muchavona musingatongovonesesi." 
Acts28:27 Nokuti moyo yavanhu ava yava mikukutu, Nzeve dzavo hadzinzwi zvakanaka, Vakatsinzina meso avo; Kuti varege kutongovona nemeso avo, Nokunzwa nenzeve dzavo, Nokunzwisisa nemoyo yavo, Vatendevuke, Ndivaponese" 
Acts28:28 Zvino zivai imi, kuti ruponeso urwu rwakatumirwa vahedheni; ivo vachanzwavo." 
Acts28:29 [Wakati ataura izvozvo, vaJudha vakaenda, vachiita nyaya huru pakati pavo.]" 
Acts28:30 Iye akapedza makore maviri agere muimba yake yairipirwa mari, akagamuchira vose vaipinda kwaari," 
Acts28:31 achiparidza vushe bwaMwari, achidzidzisa zvaShe Jesu Kristu, asingatongotyi, asingadziviswi nomunhu." 
Romans1:1 Pauro, muranda waKristu Jesu, wakadamwa kuti ave muapositora, wakatsaurirwa evhangeri yaMwari," 
Romans1:2 yaakapikira kare navaporofita vake muMagwaro matsvene," 
Romans1:3 zvoMwanakomana wake, wakabva kurudzi rwaDhavhidhi panyama," 
Romans1:4 wakaratidzwa nesimba paMweya wovutsvene, kuti ndiye Mwanakomana waMwari, nokumuka kwake kuvakafa; ndiye Jesu Kristu, Ishe wedu," 
Romans1:5 watakagamuchira naye nyasha novuapositora, kuti pakati pavahedheni vose, pave nokuteerera kokutenda nokuda kwezita rake;" 
Romans1:6 nemivo muri pakati pavo, makadamwa kuti muve vaJesu Kristu;" 
Romans1:7 kunavose vari muRoma, vadikamwa vaMwari, vakadamwa kuti vave vatsvene: Nyasha ngadzive nemwi norugare, zvinobva kunaMwari, baba vedu, nokunaShe Jesu Kristu." 
Romans1:8 Pakutanga, ndinovonga Mwari wangu munaJesu Kristu, pamusoro penyu mose, nokuti kutenda kwenyu kunoparidzirwa panyika yose." 
Romans1:9 Nokuti Mwari chapupu changu, iye wandinoshumira mumweya wangu muevhangeri yoMwanakomana wake, kuti handiregi kukurangarirai," 
Romans1:10 ndichikumbira nguva dzose pakunyengetera kwangu, kuti zvimwe ndifambiswe hangu zvakanaka ndivuye kwamuri nokuda kwaMwari." 
Romans1:11 Nokuti ndinoda zvikuru kukuvonai, kuti ndikupei chimwe chipo chomweya, kuti musimbiswe." 
Romans1:12 Ndokuti ini ndinyaradzwe pamwe chete nemwi pakati penyu, mumwe nomumwe nokutenda komumwe, kwenyu nokwangu." 
Romans1:13 Handidi kuti musaziva, hama dzangu, kuti kazhinji ndaida kuvuya kwamuri, (ndikadziviswa kusvikira zvino), kuti ndive nezvibereko kwamurivo, sapakati pavamwe vahedheni." 
Romans1:14 Ndinengava kuvaGiriki nokuvatorwa, nokuvakachenjera navasina kuchenjera." 
Romans1:15 Naizvozvo, kana ndirini, ndakazvigadzira kukuparidziraivo evhangeri, imwi muri paRoma." 
Romans1:16 Nokuti handinyari pamusoro peevhangeri; nokuti isimba raMwari rokuponesa mumwe nomumwe unotenda, kutanga muJudha, uye muGirikivo." 
Romans1:17 Nokuti mairi kururama kwaMwari kunoratidzwa kunobva pakutenda kuchienda kukutenda; sezvazvakanyorwa, zvichinzi: Wakarurama uchararama nokutenda." 
Romans1:18 Nokuti kutsamwa kwaMwari kunoratidzwa, kuchibva kudenga, pamusoro pokusada Mwari kose nokusarurama kwavanhu, vanodzivisa chokwadi nokusarurama;" 
Romans1:19 nokuti izvo zvingazikamwa zvaMwari zvinovonekwa mukati mavo; nokuti Mwari wakazviratidza izvo kwavari. 
Romans1:20 Nokuti kubvira pakusikwa kwenyika, izvo zvake zvisingavonekwi, iro simba rake risingaperi novuMwari bwake, zvinovonekwa kwazvo, zvichizikamwa pazvinhu zvakaitwa; kuti varege kuva nepembedzo;" 
Romans1:21 nokuti vaiziva Mwari, asi havana kumukudza saMwari, kana kumuvonga; asi vakafunga zvisina maturo, nemoyo yavo isinezivo, ikasvibiswa." 
Romans1:22 Vachiti, takachenjera, vakava mapenzi;" 
Romans1:23 vakashandura kubwinya kwaMwari usingafi, vakakuita mufananidzo wakafanana nomunhu unofa, neshiri, nemhuka dzinamakumbo mana, nezvinokambaira." 
Romans1:24 Saka Mwari, mukuchiva kwemoyo yavo, akavaisa kutsvina, kuti vanyadzise miviri yavo pakati pavo." 
Romans1:25 Avo vakatsinhanha chokwadi chaMwari nenhema, vakanamata nokushumira chisikwa kupfuvura musiki, iye unokudzwa nokusingaperi. Ameni." 
Romans1:26 Mwari wakavaisa pakuchiva kunonyadzisa; nokuti vanhukadzi vavo vakashandura basa ravakasikirwa, rive basa ravasina kusikirwa;" 
Romans1:27 saizvozvo vanhurumevo vakasiya basa rakasikirwa munhukadzi, vakakundwa nokuchiva pakati pavo, vanhurume vachiita zvinonyadza navanhurume, vakapiwa mukati mavo mubairo wakafanira wokurashika kwavo." 
Romans1:28 Sezvavakanga vasingadi kugara vachiziva Mwari, Mwari akavaisa kumurangariro wakarashika, kuti vaite zvisakafanira;" 
Romans1:29 vakazadzwa nokusarururama kose, nokuipa, noruchiva, nokuvenga; vakazara negodo, nokuvuraya, norukave, nokunyengera, nechinya; vanhu vanoita zeve-zeve," 
Romans1:30 navacheri, navanovenga Mwari, navanodada, navanozvikudza, navanozvirumbidza, navavambi vezvakaipa, navasingatereri vabereki," 
Romans1:31 namapenzi, navanoputsa sungano, navasinorudo kwarwo, vasinengoni." 
Romans1:32 Avo, kunyange vachiziva havo chirevo chaMwari, kuti vanoita zvakadai vakafanirwa norufu, havaiti izvo bedzi, asi vanotenderana navanozviita." 
Romans2:1 Saka haunepembedzo iwe munhu, upi noupi, unotonga vamwe; nokuti pachinhu icho chaunotonga mumwe nacho, unozvipa mhosva iwe, nokuti iwe, unotonga unoita zvinhu izvozvo." 
Romans2:2 Tinoziva kuti kutonga kwaMwari ndokwechokwadi kunavanoita zvinhu zvakadai. 
Romans2:3 Iwe munhu, unotonga vamwe vanoita zvinhu zvakadai, iwe uchizviita vo, ko unoti ungatiza kutonga kwaMwari here?" 
Romans2:4 Unozvidza kanhi fuma yovunyoro bwake, nomoyo wake munyoro, nomoyo wake murefu, usingazivi here kuti vunyoro bwaMwari bwunokuisa pakutendevuka?" 
Romans2:5 Asi novukukutu bwako, nomoyo usingadi kutendevuka, unozvivunganidzira kutsamwa nezuva rokutsamwa, nokuratidzwa kokutonga kwakarurama kwaMwari;" 
Romans2:6 iye uchapa mumwe nomumwe paakaita napo: 
Romans2:7 Vanotsvaka kubwinya, nokukudzwa, nokusafa, vachitsungirira pakuita zvakanaka, uchavapa vupenyu hwusingaperi." 
Romans2:8 Asi kunavanenharo, vasingateereri chokwadi, vanoteerera zvisakarurama, kuchavapo kutsamwa nehasha." 
Romans2:9 nokutambudzika nenhamo kumweya mumwe nomumwe womunhu kunoita zvakaipa, pakutanga womuJudha, nowomuGiriki;" 
Romans2:10 asi kubwinya, nokukudzwa, norugare kunomumwe nomumwe unoita zvakanaka, ku muJudha pakutanga, muGirikivo." 
Romans2:11 Nokuti Mwari haatendi zvinovonekwa zvomunhu. 
Romans2:12 Nokuti vose vakatadza vasinomurairo; vachaparadzwavo vasinomurairo; vose vakatadza vanomurairo, vachatongwa nomurairo;" 
Romans2:13 nokuti vanzwi vomurairo havazi ivo vakarurama pamberi paMwari, asi vaiti vomurairo ndivo vanoruramiswa;" 
Romans2:14 (nokuti kana vahedheni vasinomurairo vachiita pachavo zvinhu zvomurairo, vachava murairo wavo vamene;" 
Romans2:15 nokuti vanoratidza basa romurairo wakanyorwa mumoyo yavo, hana yavo ichipupura pamwe chete nazvo, nezvavanofunga pakati pavo zvichivapa mhosva kana kuvapembedza;)" 
Romans2:16 nezuva iro, Mwari raanozotonga naro zvakavanzika zvavanhu, naJesu Kristu, sezvinoreva evhangeri yangu." 
Romans2:17 Zvino kana iwe unonzi muJudha, unovimba nomurairo, unozvirumbidza munaMwari," 
Romans2:18 unoziva kuda kwake, nokutsaura kuti zvakanaka ndezvipi, uchidzidziswa nomurairo," 
Romans2:19 unozviti iwe uri mutungamiriri wamapofu, nechiedza chavari murima," 
Romans2:20 nomurairi wamapenzi, nomudzidzisi wavacheche, zvaunomufananidzo wokuziva nowechokwadi pamurairo;" 
Romans2:21 zvino iwe unodzidzisa mumwe, unoregereiko kuzvidzidzisa? Iwe unoparidza kuti munhu arege kuba, unobireiko iwe?" 
Romans2:22 Iwe unoti munhu arege kuita vupombwe, unoitireiko vupombwe iwe? Iwe unosema zvifananidzo, unobireiko iwe tembere dzavo?" 
Romans2:23 Iwe unozvirumbidza nomurairo, unoshovora Mwari nokudarika murairo neiko?" 
Romans2:24 Nokuti, sezvazvakanyorwa zita raMwari rinomhurwa pakati pavahedheni nokuda kwenyu." 
Romans2:25 Nokuti kudzingiswa kunobatsira, kana iwe uri muiti womurairo; asi kana uri mudariki womurairo, kudzingiswa kwako kwava kusadzingiswa." 
Romans2:26 Zvino. Kana iye usina kudzingiswa achichengeta zvirevo zvomurairo, ko kusadzingiswa kwake hakunganzi kudzingiswa here?" 
Romans2:27 Nousina kudzingiswa kubva pakuzvarwa kwake, kana achichengeta murairo, haangakutongi here iwe unodarika murairo, iwe unomurairo wakanyorwa, vuyevo kudzingiswa?" 
Romans2:28 Nokuti uyo haazi muJudha, uri muJudha pakuvonekwa chete; nokudzingiswa hakuzi iko kunovonekwa, kuri panyama;" 
Romans2:29 asi muJudha ndiye uri muJudha nechomukati; nokudzingiswa ndiko komoyo, mumweya, kusati kuri kwezvakanyorwa; iye haarumbidzwi navanhu, asi naMwari." 
Romans3:1 Ko muJudha unopfuvura vamwe neiko? Kana kudzingiswa kunobatsireiko? 
Romans3:2 Zvizhinji, nemitovo yose: Pakutanga, kuti ndivo vakapiwa mashoko aMwari." 
Romans3:3 Nokuti zvinodiniko kana vamwe vasinokutenda? Ko kusatenda kwavo kuchakonesa kutendeka kwaMwari here? 
Romans3:4 Haiswa! Mwari ngaave wechokwadi, asi vanhu vose vave venhema; sezvazvakanyorwa. Zvichinzi: Kuti mururamiswe pamashoko enyu, Mukunde pakutonga kwenyu." 
Romans3:5 Asi kana kusarurama kwedu kuchiratidza kururama kwaMwari, tichatiiko? Kuti Mwari haana kururama here, zvaanoita nehasha?(Ndinotaura nokutaura komunhu.)" 
Romans3:6 Haisva! Mwari ungagozotonga nyika seiko? 
Romans3:7 Zvino kana chokwadi chaMwari yawanzwa nenhema dzangu, iye akakudzwa nazvo ko nenivo ndichatongerwei somutadzi?" 
Romans3:8 Ticharegereiko kutaura (sezvatinopomerwa, uye sezvinoreva vamwe vachiti tinodaro), tichiti: Ngatiite zvakaipa, kuti zvakanaka zvibudepo? Kutongwa kwavo kwakarurama." 
Romans3:9 Zvino todiniko? Tinovapfuvura here? Kwete napaduku; nokuti tambopa vose mhosva, vaJudha navaGiriki, tichiti vose vakasungwa nezvivi;" 
Romans3:10 sezvazvakanyorwa, zvichinzi: Hakuna wakarurama, kunyange nomumwe." 
Romans3:11 Hakuna unonzwisisa.Hakuna unotsvaka Mwari; 
Romans3:12 Vakatsauka vose, vakava vanhu vasinamaturo, Hakuna unoita zvakanaka, kunyange nomumwe chete;" 
Romans3:13 Huro dzavo bwiro bwakashama; Vakanyengera nendimi dzavo;Vuturu bwenyoka bwuri mumiromo yavo; 
Romans3:14 Muromo wavo uzere nokutuka nokuvava; 
Romans3:15 Tsoka dzavo dzinokurumidza kutevura ropa; 
Romans3:16 Kuparadza nenhamo zviri munzira dzavo; 
Romans3:17 Nenzira yorugare havana kuiziva. 
Romans3:18 Kutya Mwari hakupo pamberi pavo," 
Romans3:19 Zvino tinoziva kuti zvose zvinorebwa nomurairo, unozvireva kunavose vari pasi pomurairo; kuti miromo yose idzivirwe, nenyika yose ive nemhosva pamberi paMwari." 
Romans3:20 Nokuti hakunenyama ingaruramiswa pamberi pake namabasa omurairo; nokuti zvivi zvinoziviswa nomurairo. 
Romans3:21 Asi zvino kururama kwaMwari kwakaratidzwa kunze komurairo, kuchipupurirwa nomurairo navaporofita;" 
Romans3:22 ndiko kururama kwaMwari kunovuya nokutenda kunaJesu Kristu kunavose vanotenda; nokuti havasiyani," 
Romans3:23 nokuti vose vakatadza vakasasvika pakubwinya kwaMwari. 
Romans3:24 Vanongoruramiswa nenyasha dzake nokudzikunura kuri munaKristu Jesu. 
Romans3:25 Iye wakagadzwa naMwari, kuti ave muyananiso nokutenda muropa rake, kuti kururama kwake kuratidzwe, nokuti zvivi zvakaitwa kare zvakaregerwa, Mwari achivaitira moyo murefu;" 
Romans3:26 kuti kururama kwake kuratidzwe, nenguva ino, kuti arurame iye amene, uye aruramise uyo unotenda kunaJesu." 
Romans3:27 Zvino kuzvikudza kuripiko? Kwabviswa, Nomurairo upiko? Wamabasa here? Kwete, asi nomurairo wokutenda." 
Romans3:28 Naizvozvo tinoti, munhu unoruramiswa nokutenda kunze kwamabasa omurairo." 
Romans3:29 Ko Mwari ndiye wavaJudha voga here? Haazi wavahedheni vo here? Hongu, wavahedheni vo." 
Romans3:30 Mwari zvaari mumwe chete, ucharuramisa vakadzingiswa pamusoro pokutenda, navasina kudzingiswa nokutenda." 
Romans3:31 Zvino tinokonesa murairo nokutenda here? Haiswa! Asi tinosimbisa murairo. 
Romans4:1 Zvino tichatiiko? Abhurahamu, teteguru vedu panyama, wakawaneiko?" 
Romans4:2 Nokuti dai Abhurahamu akaruramiswa namabasa ake, ungadai anechinhu chaangazvirumbidza nacho; asi haana pamberi paMwari." 
Romans4:3 Nokuti Rugwaro runoti kudiniko? Runoti: Abhurahamu wakatenda Mwari, kukanzi kwaari ndiko kururama." 
Romans4:4 Zvino kuno unobate-basa, mubairo haunzi ndowenyasha, asi ndowengava." 
Romans4:5 Kunousingabati, asi unotenda kunaiye unoruramisa munhu usingadi Mwari, kutenda kwake kunonzi kwaari ndiko kururama." 
Romans4:6 Sezvinorevavo Dhavhidhi, kuti wakaropafadzwa munhu unonzi naMwari wakarurama, kunze kwamabasa," 
Romans4:7 achiti: Vakaropafadzwa vakakangamwirwa zvisakarurama zvavo, Navakafukidzirwa zvivi zvavo;" 
Romans4:8 Wakaropafadzwa munhu usinganzi naShe unezvivi. 
Romans4:9 Zvino kuropafadzwa uku ndokwavakadzingiswa, kana kwavasina kudzingiswa here? Nokuti tinoti, kunaAbhurahamu kutenda kwake kwakanzi ndiko kururama." 
Romans4:10 Zvino zvakanzarwo seiko? Atodzingiswa, kana asinakudzingiswa here? Hazvina kunzarwo adzingiswa, asi asina kudzingiswa;" 
Romans4:11 wakapiwa chiratidzo chokudzingiswa, kuti chive chisimbiso chokururama kokutenda, kwaakanga ana'ko asati adzingiswa; kuti ave baba vavose vanotenda, kunyange vasina kudzingiswa, kuti vagonzi vakarurama;" 
Romans4:12 ave baba vokudzingiswa kunaivo vasina kudzingiswa bedzi, asi vanofambavo mumakwara okutenda kwababa vedu Abhurahamu, kwavaiva nako vasati vadzingiswa." 
Romans4:13 Nokuti chipikirwa chokuti uchava mugari wenhaka yenyika hachina kupiwa Abhurahamu kana rudzi rwake nomurairo, asi nokururama kokutenda." 
Romans4:14 Nokuti dai vomurairo vari vagari venhaka, kutenda hakunamaturo, nechipikirwa chinokoneswa;" 
Romans4:15 nokuti murairo unovuyisa kutsamwa; pasina murairo hapana kudarika vo. 
Romans4:16 Saka ndezvokutenda, kuti, zvive zvenyasha; kuti chipikirwa chive nesimba kurudzi rwose; rusati ruri rwomurairo bedzi, asi norwokutenda kwaAbhurahamuvo, iye baba vedu tose," 
Romans4:17 (sezvazvakanyorwa, zvichinzi: Ndakakuita baba vamarudzi mazhinji) pamberi paiye waakatenda, iye Mwari unopa vakafa vupenyu, nokudana zvisipo sezvinenge zviripo." 
Romans4:18 Wakatenda netariro pasinetariro, kuti ave baba vamarudzi mazhinji,sezvazvakanga zvataurwa Rudzi rwako ruchadaro" 
Romans4:19 Haana kushaiwa simba pakutenda, achifunga muviri wake wakanga watofa hawo(zvaiva namakore anenge zana), nokufa kwechizvaro chaSara;" 
Romans4:20 akatarira chipikirwa chaMwari, haana kunyunyuta nokusatenda, asi wakasimbiswa pakutenda, akakudza Mwari," 
Romans4:21 achiziva kwazvo, kuti icho chaakapikira, wakanga anesimba rokuchiitavo." 
Romans4:22 Saka zvakanzi kwaari ndiko kururama. 
Romans4:23 Zvino hazvina kunyorwa nokuda kwake bedzi, kuti zvakanzarwo kwaari;" 
Romans4:24 asi nokuda kweduvo; nesu tichanzarwo, iyesu, tinotenda kunowakamutsa Jesu Ishe wedu, kuvakafa." 
Romans4:25 iye wakaiswa kurufu nokuda kokudarika kwedu, akamutswa nokuda kokururamiswa kwedu." 
Romans5:1 Naizvozvo zvitinoruramiswa nokutenda ngative norugare kunaMwari naShe wedu, Jesu Kristu;" 
Romans5:2 watakawana naye mapindire nokutenda munyasha idzi, dzatinomira madziri; ngatifare netariro yokuvona kubwinya kwaMwari." 
Romans5:3 Zvisati zviri izvo bedzi, asi ngatifarevo mumatambudziko, tichiziva kuti kutambudzika kunovuyisa kutsungirira;" 
Romans5:4 kutsungirira kunovuyisa kuidzwa; kuidzwa kunovuyisa tariro; 
Romans5:5 tariro hainyadzisi; nokuti rudo rwaMwari rwakadirwa mumoyo yedu noMweya Mutsvene watakapiwa. 
Romans5:6 Nokuti tichiri pakushaiwa simba, Kristu panguva yakafanira wakafira vasingadi Mwari." 
Romans5:7 Nokuti zvinorema kuti munhu afire wakarurama; nokuti zvimwe mumwe ungatsunga kufira wakanaka. 
Romans5:8 Asi Mwari unoratidza rudo rwake kwatiri pakuti Kristu wakatifira, tichiri vatadzi." 
Romans5:9 Zvino, zvatakaruramiswa muropa rake, tichaponeswa zvikuru sei naye pakutsamwa." 
Romans5:10 Nokuti zvatakayananiswa naMwari nokufa koMwanakomana wake, tichiri vavengi vake, zvikuru tichaponeswa kana tayananiswa novupenyu bwake;" 
Romans5:11 zvisati zviri izvo bedzi, asi tinofara zvikuruvo munaMwari naShe wedu Jesu Kristu, watakapiwa zvino naye iko kuyananiswa." 
Romans5:12 Saka, zvivi sezvazvakapinda munyika nomunhu mumwe, norufu rukapinda nezvivi; saizvozvo rufu rwakasvika kuvanhuvose, nokutivose vakatadza;" 
Romans5:13 nokuti murairo usati wavapo, zvivi zvakanga zviri panyika; asi zvivi hazviverengerwi munhu, kana kusinomurairo." 
Romans5:14 Asi rufu rwakabata vushe kubva kunaAdhamu kusvikira kunaMozisi, kunyange napakativo pavasina kutadza nokudarika kwaAdhamu, waiva mufananidzo wowakanga achizovuya." 
Romans5:15 Asi chipo chokungopiwa hachifanani nokudarika. Nokuti kana vazhinji vakafa nokudarika komumwe, zvikuru nyasha dzaMwari nechipo chakavuya nenyasha dzomunhu mumwe, Jesu Kristu, zvakawandira vazhinji." 
Romans5:16 uye chipo hachifanani nezvivi zvomunhu mumwe wakatadza; nokuti kutonga kwakavuya nomunhu mumwe kuti vapiwe mhosva; asi chipo chokungopiwa chakavuya nokudarika kuzhinji, kuti varuramisirwe." 
Romans5:17 Nokuti kana nokudarika komumwe rufu rwakabata vushe nomunhu uyu mumwe; zvikuru avo, vakapiwa kuwanda kwenyasha nokwechipo chokururama, vachabata vushe pavupenyu nomumwe, iye Jesu Kristu." 
Romans5:18 Naizvozvo, kutonga sezvakwakavuya kuvanhu vose nokudarika kumwe, kuti vapiwe mhosva; saizvozvo nokururamisa kumwe chipo chokungopiwa chakavuya kuvanhu vose, kururamisirwa kovupenyu kukavapo." 
Romans5:19 Nokuti vazhinji sezvavakaitwa vatadzi nokusateerera komumwe, saizvozvo vazhinji vachaitwa vakarurama nokuteerera komumwe." 
Romans5:20 Murairo wakapindavo kuti kudarika kuwande; zvino zvivi pazvakawanda, nyasha dzakawanda nokupfuvurisa;" 
Romans5:21 kuti zvivi sezvazvakabata vushe parufu, saizvozvo nyasha dzibate vushe nokururama, zviise kuvupenyu bwusingaperi naJesu Kristu Ishe wedu." 
Romans6:1 Zvino tichatiyiko? Torambira muzvivi kuti nyasha dziwande here? 
Romans6:2 Haiswa! Isu takafa kuzvivi, tichagara seiko mukati mazvo?" 
Romans6:3 Ko hamuzivi here kuti isu takabhabhatidzwa muna Kristu Jesu, takabhabhatidzwa murufu rwake?" 
Romans6:4 Naizvozvo pakubhabhatidzwa takavigwa pamwe chete naye murufu; kuti saiye Kristu akamutswa kuvakafa nokubwinya kwaBaba, saizvozvo nesuvo tifambe novupenyu bwutsva." 
Romans6:5 Nokuti kana takava vamwe naye pakufanana naye, parufu rwake, tichadarovo pakumuka kwake;" 
Romans6:6 tichiziva izvi, kuti munhu wedu wekare wakaroverwa pamuchinjikwa pamwe chete naye, kuti muviri wezvivi ushaiswe simba, tirege kuzova varanda vezvivi;" 
Romans6:7 nokuti wakafa, waruramiswa pazvivi." 
Romans6:8 Zvino kana takafa pamwe chete naKristu, tinotenda kuti tichararamavo pamwe chete naye;" 
Romans6:9 tichiziva kuti Kristu amutswa kuvakafa, haachazofi; rufu haruchavi nesimba pamusoro pake." 
Romans6:10 Nokuti pakufa kwake, wakafa kamwe kwazvo kuzvivi; zvino pakurarama kwake, unorarama kunaMwari." 
Romans6:11 Saizvozvo nemivo muzviti makafa kuzvivi, asi kuti muri vapenyu kunaMwari, munaKristu Jesu, Ishe wedu." 
Romans6:12 Naizvozvo zvivi ngazvirege kubata vushe mumuviri wenyu unofa, kuti muteerere kuchiva kwawo;" 
Romans6:13 uye musapa zvivi mitezo yenyu, kuti dzive nhumbi dzokuita zvisakarurama; asi muzvipei imwi kunaMwari, savanhu vakararama kuvakafa, nemitezo yenyu kuti dzive nhumbi dzokururama kunaMwari." 
Romans6:14 Nokuti zvivi hazvingavi nesimba pamusoro penyu; nokuti hamuzi pasi pomurairo asi pasi penyasha. 
Romans6:15 Zvino tichatiyiko? Titadze, nokuti hatizi pasi pomurairo here, asi pasi penyasha? Haiswa!" 
Romans6:16 Hamuzivi here, kuti uyo wamunozvipa kwaari kuti muve varanda vake kumuteerera, kuti muri varanda vaiye wamunoteerera; kana vezvivi zvinoisa kurufu, kana vokuteerera kunoisa kukururama?" 
Romans6:17 Asi Mwari ngaavongwe, nokuti imwi maiva varanda vezvivi, mukazoteerera nomoyo rudzi urwu rwedzidziso yamakaiswa kwairi." 
Romans6:18 Makasunungurwa pazvivi, mukava varanda vokururama." 
Romans6:19 Ndinotaura nokutaura kwavanhu, nokuda kokushaiwa simba kwenyama yenyu; nokuti sezvamakapa mitezo yenyu kuti ive varanda vetsvina, navezvisakarurama zvinoisa kunezvisakarurama, saizvozvo ipai mitezo yenyu zvino ive varanda vekururama kunoisa kuvutsvene." 
Romans6:20 Nokuti panguva iyo muchiri varanda vezvivi, makanga makasununguka pakururama." 
Romans6:21 Zvino maiva nezvibereko zveiko panguva iyo pazvinhu izvo zvamunonyadziswa nazvo zvino? Nokuti kuguma kwazvo ndirwo rufu. 
Romans6:22 Asi zvino makasunungurwa pazvivi, mava varanda vaMwari, munezvibereko zvenyu zvinoisa kuvutsvene, uye kuguma kwazvo ndibwo vupenyu bwusingaperi." 
Romans6:23 Nokuti mubairo wezvivi ndirwo rufu; asi chipo chokungopiwa chaMwari ndibwo vupenyu bwusingaperi munaKristu Jesu, Ishe wedu." 
Romans7:1 Hamuzivi here, hama dzangu, (nokuti ndinotaura navanhu vanoziva murairo), kuti murairo unobata munhu nguva yose yovupenyu bwake?" 
Romans7:2 Nokuti mukadzi, unomurume, wakasungwa nomurairo kumurume wake, iye achiri mupenyu; asi kana murume afa, wasunungurwa pamurairo womurume." 
Romans7:3 Naizvozvo zvino kana akawanikwa nomumwe murume, murume wake achiri mupenyu, uchanzi chifeve asi kana murume wake afa,wasununguka pamurairo, zvino haazi chifeve kunyange akawanikwa nomumwe murume." 
Romans7:4 Saka, hama dzangu nemivo makaitwa vakafa kumurairo nomuviri waKristu; kuti muve womumwe, iye wakamutswa pavakafa, kuti tiberekere Mwari zvibereko." 
Romans7:5 Nokuti panguva iyo tichiri munyama, kuchiva kwezvivi, kwakamutswa nomurairo, kwakabata mumitezo yedu kuti kubereke zvibereko zvinoisa kurufu." 
Romans7:6 Asi zvino takasunungurwa pamurairo, takafa kunaizvozvo zvatakanga takasungwa nazvo; naizvozvo tinobatira Mwari nomweya mutsva, tisingabatiri nezvakanyorwa zvakare." 
Romans7:7 Zvino tichatiyiko? Murairo zvivi here? Haiswa! Asi handizaiziva zvivi kana murairo usipo; nokuti handizaiziva kuchiva, kana murairo usina kuti: Usachiva;" 
Romans7:8 zvino zvivi zvakawana nzira nomurairo, zvikaita mandiri mitovo yose yokuchiva; nokuti kunze komurairo zvivi zvakafa." 
Romans7:9 Ini ndaiva mupenyu kare kunze komurairo, asi mutemo uchizosvika, zvivi zvakamuka, ini ndikafa;" 
Romans7:10 nomutemo iwo waifanira kuisa muvupenyu, ndakauwana uchiisa kurufu;" 
Romans7:11 nokuti zvivi zvakawana nzira nomutemo, zvikandinyengera zvikandivuraya nawo." 
Romans7:12 Naizvozvo murairo mutsvene, nomutemo mutsvene, wakarurama, wakanaka." 
Romans7:13 Ko zvino zvakanaka zvakazova rufu kwandiri here? Haiswa! Asi ndizvo zvivi, kuti zviratidzwe kuti zvivi, zvakandiitira rufu nezvakanaka; kuti nomutemo zvivi zvive zvakaipa kwazvo-kwazvo." 
Romans7:14 Nokuti tinoziva kuti murairo ndowomweya; asi ini ndiri wenyama, ndakatengeswa pasi pezvivi." 
Romans7:15 Nokuti zvandinoita handizvizivi; nokuti zvandinoita hazvizi izvo zvandinoda; zvandinoda; handizvo zvandinoita; asi zvandinovenga ndizvo zvandinoita.. 
Romans7:16 Zvino kana ndichiita izvo zvandisingadi, ndinobvumira kuti murairo wakanaka." 
Romans7:17 Zvino handizati ndichiri ini ndinozviita, asi zvivi zvinogara mandiri." 
Romans7:18 Nokuti ndinoziva kuti mukati mangu, imo munyama yangu, hamugari chinhu chakanaka; nokuti kuda kuripo kwandiri, asi kuita zvakanaka hakupo." 
Romans7:19 Nokuti zvakanaka, zvandinoda, handizviiti; asi zvakaipa, zvandisingadi, ndizvo zvandinoita." 
Romans7:20 Zvino kana ndichiita zvandisingadi, handisini ndinozviita, asi zvivi zvinogara mandiri." 
Romans7:21 Naizvozvo ndinowana murairo uyu kuti kana ndichida kuita zvakanaka, zvakaipa zviripo kwandiri." 
Romans7:22 Nokuti ndinofarira murairo waMwari nomunhu womukati; 
Romans7:23 asi ndinovona mumwe murairo pamitezo yangu, unorwa nomurairo womurangariro wangu, unonditapira kumurairo wezvivi uri pamitezo yangu." 
Romans7:24 Ndiri munhu uri pakutambudzika! Ndianiko uchandisunungura pamuviri worufu urwu? 
Romans7:25 Mwari ngaavongwe, naJesu Kristu, Ishe wedu. Naizvozvo nomurangariro ndinobatira Mwari, asi nenyama murairo wezvivi." 
Romans8:1 Naizvozvo hakuchina kupiwa mhosva kunavari munaKristu Jesu vasingafambi nenyama asi nomweya. 
Romans8:2 Nokuti murairo woMweya wovupenyu munaKristu Jesu wakandisunungura pamurairo wezvivi noworufu. 
Romans8:3 Nokuti, zvakanga zvisingakwaniswi nomurairo, pakushaiwa kwawo simba nokuda kwenyama, Mwari pakutuma kwake Mwanakomana, wake nomufananidzo wenyama yezvivi, nokuda kwezvivi, wakapa mhosva zvivi zviri munyama;" 
Romans8:4 kuti zvakarebwa nomurairo zviitike matiri, isu tisingafambi nenyama, asi nomweya." 
Romans8:5 Nokuti vari vomweya, vanofunga zvomweya." 
Romans8:6 Nokuti kufunga kwenyama ndirwo rufu; asi kufunga komweya ndibwo vupenyu norugare; 
Romans8:7 nokuti kufunga kwenyama kunovengana naMwari; nokuti hakuzviisi pasi pomurairo waMwari; hakugoni vo; 
Romans8:8 zvino vari munyama havagoni kufadza Mwari. 
Romans8:9 Asi imwi hamuzi munyama, asi mumweya, kana Mweya waMwari achigara zvirokwazvo mukati menyu. Asi kana munhu asinoMweya waKristu, haazi wake." 
Romans8:10 Kana Kristu ari mukati menyu, muviri wakafa nokuda kwezvivi, asi mweya mupenyu nokuda kokururama." 
Romans8:11 Zvino kana Mweya waiyeyo wakamutsa Jesu kuvakafa achigara mukati menyu, iye wakamutsa Kristu Jesu kuvakafa, uchaponesa miviri yenyu inofa noMweya wake, unogara mukati menyu." 
Romans8:12 Naizvozvo, hama dzangu, hatinengava nenyama, kuti tirarame netsika dzenyama." 
Romans8:13 Nokuti kana muchifamba netsika dzenyama, muchafa; asi kana muchivuraya mabasa omuviri noMweya, muchararama;" 
Romans8:14 nokuti vose vanotungamirirwa noMweya waMwari, ndivo vana vaMwari." 
Romans8:15 Nokuti hamuna kupiwa mweya wovuranda kuti mutye zve, asi makapiwa mweya wokuitwa vana, watinodana nawo, tichiti: Aba, baba." 
Romans8:16 Mweya womene unopupurirana nomweya wedu, kuti tiri vana vaMwari;" 
Romans8:17 zvino kana tiri vana, tiri vadyi venhaka; vadyi venhaka yaMwari, vadyi venhaka pamwe chete naKristu; kana tichitambudzika pamwe chete naye, tichakudzwavo pamwe chete naye." 
Romans8:18 Nokuti ndinoti matambudziko enguva ino haana kufanira kuenzaniswa nokubwinya kuchazoratidzwa kwatiri. 
Romans8:19 Nokuti zvisikwa zvinotarisisa zvikuru zvichimirira kuratidzwa kwavanakomana vaMwari. 
Romans8:20 Nokuti zvisikwa zvakaiswa pasi pezvisingagari, zvisingadi hazvo, asi nokuda kwaiye wakazviisa pasi pazvo." 
Romans8:21 zvichitarira kuti zvisikwa zvimene zvisunungurwevo pavuranda bwokuvora, zviiswe pakusunungurwa kokubwinya kwavana vaMwari." 
Romans8:22 Nokuti tinoziva kuti zvisikwa zvose zvinogomera nokurwadziwa pamwe chete kusvikira zvino. 
Romans8:23 Zvisati zviri izvo bedzi, asi nesuvo, kunyange tinezvibereko zvokutanga zvoMweya, nesu timene tinogomera mukati medu, tichimirira kuitwa kwedu vana, ndiko kudzikinurwa komuviri wedu." 
Romans8:24 Nokuti takaponeswa netariro; nokuti ndiani unotarira chaanovona? 
Romans8:25 Asi kana tichitarira chatisingavoni, tinochimirira nokutsungirira." 
Romans8:26 Saizvozvo Mweya unobatiranavo nokusava nesimba kwedu; nokuti hatizivi kunyengetera zvakafanira; asi Mweya amene unotinyengeterera nokugomera kusingataurwi; 
Romans8:27 uyo unonzera moyo, ndiye unoziva kufunga koMweya, nokuti unonyengeterera vatsvene sezvinoda Mwari." 
Romans8:28 Tinoziva kuti zvinhu zvose zvinobata pamwechete kuti zviitire zvakanaka avo vanoda Mwari, avo vakadamwa sezvaakafunga." 
Romans8:29 Nokuti vaakaziva kare, ndivo vaakatemeravo kare, kuti vafanane nomufananidzo woMwanakomana wake, kuti ave dangwe pakati pehama zhinji;" 
Romans8:30 avo vaakatemera kare, ndivo vaakadanavo; vaakadana, ndivo vaakaruramisavo; vaakaruramisa, ndivo vaakakudzavo." 
Romans8:31 Zvino tichatiyiko pazvinhu izvi? Kana Mwari achitirwira, ndianiko uchatirwisa?" 
Romans8:32 Iye usina kuramba kunyange noMwanakomana wake, asi wakamupa chose nokuda kwedu tose, ungarega seiko kutipavo zvose pamwe chete naye?" 
Romans8:33 Ndianiko uchakwirira vasanangurwa vaMwari? Mwari ndiye unoruramisa; 
Romans8:34 ndianiko uchavapa mhosva? Kristu Jesu ndiye wakafa, zvikuru ndiye wakamutswa kuvakafa, uri kurudyi rwaMwari, unotinyengetereravo." 
Romans8:35 Ndianiko uchatiparadzanisa norudo rwaKristu? Kutambudzika, kana nhamo, kana kuvengwa, kana nzara, kana kushaiwa zvokufuka, kana njodzi, kana munondo here?" 
Romans8:36 Sezvazvakanyorwa, zvichinzi: Nokuda kwenyu tinovurawa zuva rose; Takanzi tiri makwai anobayiwa." 
Romans8:37 Kwete, pazvinhu izvi zvose tiri vakundi nokupfuvurisa naiye wakatida." 
Romans8:38 Nokuti ndinoziva kwazvo kuti kunyange rufu, kana vupenyu, kana vatumwa, kana vanesimba, kana zvazvino, kana zvinovuya kana masimba." 
Romans8:39 kana kwakakwirira, kana kwakadzika, kana chinhu chimwe chakasikwa, hazvingagoni kutiparadzanisa norudo rwaMwari, ruri munaKristu Jesu, Ishe wedu." 
Romans9:1 Ndinotaura zvirokwazvo munaKristu, handirevi nhema, hana yangu ichindipupurira muMweya Mutsvene," 
Romans9:2 kuti ndineshungu kwazvo nokuchema kusingaperi mumoyo mangu. 
Romans9:3 Nokuti ndaida kuti ini ndimene ndive munhu wakatukwa, wakaparadzaniswa naKristu nokuda kwehama dzangu, ivo vorudzi rwangu panyama;" 
Romans9:4 ndivo vaIsraeri; kuitwa vana, nokubwinya, nesungano, nokupiwa murairo, nokunamata Mwari, nezvipikirwa, ndezvavo;" 
Romans9:5 madzibaba ndaavo, naKristu wakabva kwavari panyama, uri pamusoro pavose, Mwari unokudzwa nokusingaperi. Ameni." 
Romans9:6 Asi handiti shoko raMwari rakakona. Nokuti vakabva kuvaIsraeri havazi vaIsraeri vose; 
Romans9:7 navari vorudzi rwaAbhurahamu havazi vana vake vose; asi zvinonzi: KunaIsaka ndiko kuchatumidzwa rudzi rwako. 
Romans9:8 Ndokuti havazi vana venyama vari vana vaMwari; asi vana vokupikirwa, ndivo vanonzi rudzi." 
Romans9:9 Nokuti shoko rakapikirwa ndirori: Nenguva yakaita seino ndichavuya, Sara uchava nomwanakomana." 
Romans9:10 Hazvizi izvozvo bedzi; asi Rebekavo, wakati ava nemimba kunomumwe, iye Isaka, baba vedu" 
Romans9:11 nokuti vana vasati vaberekwa, vasati vaita zvakanaka kana zvakaipa, kuti kufunga kwaMwari pakusanangura kwake kusimbiswe, kusingabvi pamabasa, asi kunaiye unodana," 
Romans9:12 zvakanzi kwaari: Mukuru uchashumira mudoko. 
Romans9:13 Sezvazvakanyorwa, zvichinzi: Jakobho ndakamuda, asi Esau ndakamuvenga." 
Romans9:14 Zvino tichatiyiko? Kusarurama kuripo kunaMwari here? Haiswa! 
Romans9:15 Nokuti unoti kunaMozisi: Ndichanzwira ngoni wandinonzwira ngoni, ndichanzwira tsitsi wandinonzwira tsitsi." 
Romans9:16 Naizvozvo hazvibvi kunounoda, kana kunounomhanya, asi kunaMwari, munzwiri wengoni." 
Romans9:17 Nokuti Rugwaro runoti kunaFarao: Ndizvo zvandakakumutsira, kuti zita rangu riparidzwe panyika yose." 
Romans9:18 Naizvozvo unonzwira ngoni waanoda; uye unowomesera moyo waanoda. 
Romans9:19 Zvino iwe ungati kwandiri: Iye uchapireiko mhosva? Nokuti ndianiko unoramba kuda kwake? 
Romans9:20 Ko zvino iwe munhu, ndiwe aniko, unopindura Mwari? Ko chakavumbwa chingati kunowakachivumba: Wandiitireiko kudai?" 
Romans9:21 Ko muvumbi wehari haanesimba pamusoro pevhu here, kuti nebundu rimwe aite mudziyo mumwe wakakudzwa, nomumwe usina kukudzwa?" 
Romans9:22 Zvino tichatiyiko kana Mwari, kana akanga achida kuratidza kutsamwa kwake, nokuzivisa simba rake, akaita nomoyo murefu zvikuru pamusoro pemidziyo yokutsamwirwa, yakagadzirirwa kuparadzwa," 
Romans9:23 kuti azivise kufuma kokubwinya kwake pamusoro pemidziyo yengoni, yaakanga agadzirira kubwinya," 
Romans9:24 iyesu vakadamwavo naye, tisingabvi kuvaJudha bedzi, asi kuvahedhenivo?" 
Romans9:25 Sezvaanorevavo pabhuku yaHosiya, achiti: Avo vakanga vasi vanhu vangu; Ndichavaidza vanhu vangu; Naiye wakanga asi mudikamwa, ndichamuidza mudikamwa." 
Romans9:26 Zvichaitika kuti paya pakanga parebwa kwavari: Hamuzi vanhu vangu, Ipapo vachaidzwa vanakomana vaMwari mupenyu." 
Romans9:27 NaIsaya unodana pamusoro pavaIsraeri achiti kunyange kuwanda kwavana vaIsraeri kwakaita sejecha regungwa, vakasara vachaponeswa;" 
Romans9:28 nokuti Ishe uchaita panyika shoko rake, nokuripedzisa, nokukurumidza nokururama." 
Romans9:29 Sezvaakamboreva Isayavo, achiti: Dai Ishe wehondo asina kutisiyira rudzi, Tingadai takava seSodhoma, takaitwa seGomora." 
Romans9:30 Zvino tichatiyiko? Tichati, vahedheni vasina kutsvaka kururama, ndivo vakawana kururama, iko kururama kokutenda;" 
Romans9:31 asi vaIsraeri vakati vachitsvaka murairo wokururama havana kusvika pamurairo wokururama. 
Romans9:32 Neiko? Nokuti havana kutsvaka nokutenda, asi zvinenge namabasa omurairo. Vakagumburwa nebwe rinogumbusa." 
Romans9:33 Sezvazvakanyorwa, zvichinzi: Tarira, ndinoisa paZiyoni ibwe rokugumbusa, nedombo rokupinganidza; Unotenda kwaari, haanganyadziswi." 
Romans10:1 Hama dzangu, kuda komoyo wangu nokukumbira kwangu kunaMwari pamusoro paIsraeri ndiko, kuti vaponeswe." 
Romans10:2 Nokuti ndinovapupurira kuti vanoshingairira Mwari, asi havaiti nokuziva." 
Romans10:3 Nokuti, zvavakanga vasingazivi kururama kwaMwari, vakatsvaka kumisa kururama kwavo vamene, vakasazviisa pasi pokururama kwaMwari." 
Romans10:4 Nokuti Kristu ndimugumo womurairo pakutsvaka kururama, kuno mumwe nomumwe unotenda." 
Romans10:5 Nokuti Mozisi unonyora, achiti, munhu, unoita kururama, kunorebwa nomurairo, uchararama nazvo." 
Romans10:6 Asi kururama kunobva pakutenda, kunoreva kudai: Usati mumoyo mako: Ndianiko uchakwira kudenga? (ndiko kuburusa Kristu;)" 
Romans10:7 kana, ndianiko uchaburukira kwakadzikadzika? (ndiko kubudisa Kristu kuvakafa.)" 
Romans10:8 Asi kunoreveiko? Shoko riri pedo newe, mumuromo mako, nomumoyo mako; ndiro shoko rokutenda ratinoparidza;" 
Romans10:9 kuti, kana uchipupura nomuromo wako kuti Jesu ndiye Ishe, nokutenda mumoyo mako, kuti Mwari wakamumutsa kuvakafa, uchaponeswa;" 
Romans10:10 nokuti munhu unotenda nomoyo, ndokururamiswa; unopupura nomuromo, ndokuponeswa." 
Romans10:11 Nokuti Rugwaro runoti: Aninani unotenda kwaari, haanganyadziswi," 
Romans10:12 Nokuti muJudha nomuGiriki havasiyani; nokuti mumwe ndiye Ishe wavose, wakafuma kunavose vanodana kwaari;" 
Romans10:13 nokuti aninani unodana kuzita raShe, uchaponeswa." 
Romans10:14 Zvino vachagodana seiko kunaiye, wavasina kutenda kwaari? Vachatenda seiko kunaiye, wavasina kunzwa? Vachanzwa seiko kana kusina muparidzi?" 
Romans10:15 Vachaparidza seiko, kana vasingatumwi? Sezvazvakanyorwa, zvichinzi: Dzakanaka sei tsoka dzavanoparidza evhangeri yorugare, namashoko omufaro ezvinhu zvakanaka?" 
Romans10:16 Asivose havana kuteerera mashoko omufaro. Nokuti Isaya unoti: Ishe, ndianiko wakatenda zvatakaparidza?" 
Romans10:17 Naizvozvo kutenda kunovuya nokunzwa, nokunzwa kunovuya neshoko raMwari." 
Romans10:18 Asi ndinoti: Havana kunzwa here? Hongu, zvirokwazvo, Inzwi ravo rakabuda kunyika yose, Namashoko avo kumigumo yenyika." 
Romans10:19 Asi ndinoti: VaIsraeri havanakuziva here? Pakutanga Mozisi unoti: Ndichamutsa kutsamwa kwenyu norudzi rusinganzwisisi. 
Romans10:20 NaIsaya, asingatyi, unoti: Ndakavonekwa navasina kundibvunza." 
Romans10:21 Asi kuvaIsraeri unoti: Ndakatambanudzira mavoko angu zuva rose kuvanhu vasingateereri, navanokakavara." 
Romans11:1 Zvino ndinoti: Ko Mwari wakarasha vanhu vake here? Haiswa! Nokuti nenivo ndiri muIsraeri, worudzi rwaAbhurahamu, weimba yaBenjanimi." 
Romans11:2 Mwari haana kurasha vanhu vake vaakaziva pakutanga. Ko hamuzivi kuti Rugwaro runoti kudini pamashoko aEria here? Kuti unokumbira kunaMwari pamusoro pavaIsraeri, achiti:" 
Romans11:3 Ishe, vakavuraya vaporofita venyu, vakaputsa aritari dzenyu, ini ndakasiyiwa ndoga, zvino vanotsvaka kundivuraya." 
Romans11:4 Asi Mwari unomupindureiko? Unoti: Ndakazvisiyira varume vanezvuru zvinomwe, vasina kufugamira Baari." 
Romans11:5 Zvino saizvozvo nenguva inovo vari'ko vakasara, vakasanangurwa nenyasha." 
Romans11:6 Zvino kana kusanangura kuri kwenyasha, hakuzati kuchiri kwamabasa; kana zvisakadaro, nyasha hadzichiri nyasha. Asi kana kuri kwamabasa hakuzati kuchiri kwenyasha. Kana zvisakadaro basa harizati richibasa." 
Romans11:7 Zvino tichatiyiko? VaIsraeri havana kuwana zvavakanga vachitsvaka, asi vakasanangurwa ndivo vakazviwana; vamwe vakawomeswa," 
Romans11:8 sezvazvakanyorwa, zvichinzi: Mwari wakavapa mweya wehope; meso, kuti varege kuvona, nenzeve, kuti varege kunzwa, kusvikira zuva ranhasi." 
Romans11:9 NaDhavhidhivo unoti: Tafura yavo ngaiitwe musungo, neriva," 
Romans11:10 Meso avo ngaasvibirwe, varege kuvona; Mukotamise musana yavo misi yose." 
Romans11:11 Zvino ndinoti: Vakagumbuswa kuti vawe here? Haisva! Asi nokuwa kwavo ruponeso rwakasvika kuvahedheni, kuti vamutsirwe godo." 
Romans11:12 Zvino kana kuwa kwavo kwakafumisa nyika, nokutapudzwa kwavo kwakafumisa vahedheni, zvikuru sei kuzara kwavo?" 
Romans11:13 Ndinotaura kwamuri, imwi vahedheni. Zvandiri muapositora wavahedheni, ndinokudza basa rangu." 
Romans11:14 Zvimwe ndingamutsa godo kunavenyama yangu, ndiponese vamwe vavo." 
Romans11:15 Nokuti kana kurashwa kwavo kuri kuyananiswa kwenyika, kugamuchirwa kwavo kuchagoveiko, asi vupenyu pakufa?" 
Romans11:16 Zvino kana chibereko chokutanga chiri chitsvene, bundu rose rakadarovo; kana mudzi uri mutsvene, matavi akadarovo;" 
Romans11:17 Zvino, kana mamwe matavi akavhuniwa, iwe, muorivhi wokudondo ukabatanidzwa pakati pawo, ukava nomugove pamwe chete nawo pamudzi napamafuta omuorivhi;" 
Romans11:18 usazvikudza kumatavi; kana uchizvikudza, hauzi iwe unotakura mudzi, asi mudzi ndiwo unokutakura iwe." 
Romans11:19 Zvino iwe uchati, matavi akavhuniwa, kuti ini ndibatanidzwe." 
Romans11:20 Ndizvozvo; vakavhuniwa nokusatenda kwavo, iwe unomira nokutenda kwako. Usazvikudza, asi utye;" 
Romans11:21 nokuti kana Mwari asina kurega matavi awo, haangakuregi newevo." 
Romans11:22 Zvino tarira vunyoro nokukasharara kunavakawa, asi kwauri vunyoro bwaMwari, kana uchigara pavunyoro bwake;kana zvisakadaro, newe uchatemwavo." 
Romans11:23 Naivovo, kana vasingagari pakusatenda kwavo, vachabatanidzwa; nokuti Mwari unogona kuvabatanidza zve." 
Romans11:24 Nokuti kana iwe wakatemwa kumuorivhi, uri wokudondo pakusikwa kwawo, ukabatanidzwa pamuorivhi wakanaka, zvichipesana nokusikwa kwazvo zvikuru sei ava vari matavi awo,vangabatanidzwa pamuorivhi wavo!" 
Romans11:25 Nokuti hama dzangu, handidi kuti musaziva chakavanzika ichi, kuti murege kuva namanyawi; kuti kuwomeswa komoyo kwakavuya pamusoro pavamwe vavaIsraeri kusvikira kuzara kwavahedheni kwapinda;" 
Romans11:26 naizvozvo rudzi rwose rwavaIsraeri ruchaponeswa; sezvazvakanyorwa zvichinzi: PaZiyoni pachabuda Musununguri; Uchabvisa kusada Mwari kunaJakobho; 
Romans11:27 Iyi ndiyo sungano yangu navo, Musi wandichabvisa zvivi zvavo." 
Romans11:28 Kana iri evhangeri, ivo vavengi vaMwari nokuda kwenyu; asi kana kuri kusanangurwa, vadikamwa nokuda kwamadzibaba." 
Romans11:29 Nokuti zvipo zvaMwari nokudana kwake hazvishandurwi. 
Romans11:30 Nokuti semi kare makanga musingateereri Mwari, asi zvino makanzwirwa ngoni nokusateerera kwavo," 
Romans11:31 saizvozvo naivo zvino havana kuteerera, kuti nengoni dzakaitirwa imwi naivo vanzwirwevo ngoni." 
Romans11:32 Nokuti Mwari wakavapfigira vose pakusateerera kwavo, kuti avanzwire ngoni vose." 
Romans11:33 Haiwa kufuma kokuchenjera nokuziva kwaMwari kwakadzika sei! Kutonga kwake hakunganzverwi, nenzira dzake hadzingarondwi!" 
Romans11:34 Nokuti ndianiko wakanga ari murairi wake? 
Romans11:35 Ndianiko wakatanga kumupa, kuti aripirwe zve?" 
Romans11:36 Nokuti zvose zvinobva kwaari, zviripo naye, zviripo nokuda kwake. Ngaave nokubwinya nokusingaperi. Ameni." 
Romans12:1 Naizvozvo ndinokumbira zvikuru kwamuri, hama dzangu, netsitsi dzaMwari, kuti muise miviri yenyu, chive chibayiro chipenyu, chitsvene, chinofadza Mwari, ndiko kunamata kwenyu komoyo." 
Romans12:2 Musaenzaniswa nenyika ino; asi mushandurwe murangariro wenyu uchivandudzwa, kuti muidze muzive kuda kwaMwari kwakanaka, kunofadza, kwakakwana." 
Romans12:3 Nokuti nenyasha dzandakapiwa, ndinovudza mumwe nomumwe uri pakati penyu, kuti arege kuzvifunga kuti mukuru kupfuvura paanofanira kufunga napo; asi afunge nokufunga kwakachenjera, mumwe nomumwe nechiyero chokutenda, sezvaakagoverwa naMwari." 
Romans12:4 Nokuti sezvatinemitezo mizhinji pamuviri mumwe, asi mitezo yose hainebasa rimwe chete;" 
Romans12:5 saizvozvo isu, tiri vazhinji, tiri muviri mumwe chete munaKristu, mumwe nomumwe ari mutezo wavamwe." 
Romans12:6 Tinezvipo zvakasiyana, patakapiwa nyasha napo; kana kuri kuporofita, ngatiprofite zvakaenzana nokutenda kwedu;" 
Romans12:7 kana kuri kushumira, ngazvivonekwe pakushumira kwedu; kana kuri kudzidzisa, pakudzidzisa kwedu;" 
Romans12:8 kana kuri kuraira, pakuraira kwedu; unopa, ngaape nomoyo wose; uri mukuru, ngaabate nokushingaira; unoitira ngoni, ngaaite nomufaro." 
Romans12:9 Rudo ngarurege kuva nokunyengera. Vengai zvakaipa; namatirai zvakanaka. 
Romans12:10 Kana ruri rudo pakati pavatendi, danai norudo rukuru; pakukudzana tungamiriranai." 
Romans12:11 Regai kuva novusimbe pakushingaira; pisai pamweya; batirai Ishe; 
Romans12:12 farai patariro; tsungirirai pakutambudzika; rambai muchinyengetera; 
Romans12:13 govanai navatsvene pakushaiwa kwavo; itirai vaeni rudo. 
Romans12:14 Ropafadzai vanokutambudzai; ropafadzai, musatuka." 
Romans12:15 Farai navanofara; chemai navanochema. 
Romans12:16 Ivai nomoyo mumwe pakati penyu. Musatsvaka zvinorumbidzwa, asi mufambidzane navanozvininipisa. Musati pamoyo yenyu makachenjera." 
Romans12:17 Musatsiva munhu chakaipa kana akakuitirai chakaipa. Tsvakai zvakarurama pamberi pavanhu vose. 
Romans12:18 Kana zvichibvira, pamunogona napo, ivai norugare navanhu vose." 
Romans12:19 Musatsiva, vadikamwa, asi munzvenge kutsamwa; nokuti kwakanyorwa, kuchinzi: kutsiva ndokwangu, ini ndicharipira ndizvo zvinoreva Ishe." 
Romans12:20 Asi kana muvengi wako aziya, umupe kudya; kana afa nenyota, umupe kumwa; nokuti kana uchiita izvozvo, uchatutira mazimbe omoto pamusoro wake." 
Romans12:21 Usakundwa nezvakaipa, asi ukunde zvakaipa nezvakanaka." 
Romans13:1 Munhu mumwe nomumwe ngaazviise pasi pamasimba makuru; nokuti hakunesimba risina kubva kunaMwari; iwo aripo akaiswapo naMwari. 
Romans13:2 Saka unoramba simba, unodzivisa zvakaiswapo naMwari; zvino ivo vanodzivisa, vanozvitorera mhosva." 
Romans13:3 Nokuti vabati havatyisi unobata basa rakanaka, asi rakaipa. Unoda kusatya simba here? Ita zvakanaka, ugorumbidzwa navo;" 
Romans13:4 nokuti ndiye mushumiri waMwari kwauri, kuti akuiitire zvakanaka. Asi kana uchiita zvakaipa, chitya; nokuti iye haabati munondo pasina; nokuti ndiye mushumiri waMwari, mutsivi wokutsamwa kunounoita zvakaipa." 
Romans13:5 Naizvozvo munofanira kuzviisa pasi pavo, musingadaro nokuda kokutsamwa bedzi, asi nokuda kwehanavo." 
Romans13:6 Nokuti nemhaka iyo munoripavo mutero; nokuti ndivo varanda vaMwari vanoramba vachingobatira chinhu icho. 
Romans13:7 Ripirai vose zvavanofanira kuripirwa: Mutero kuna vanofanira kuteererwa; muripo kunavanofanira kuripirwa; kutya kuna vanofanira kutyiwa; kukudza kuna vanofanira kukudzwa. 
Romans13:8 Musava nechikwereti nomunhu, asi chokudana; nokuti unoda mumwe, wazadzisa murairo." 
Romans13:9 Nokuti izvo zvokuti: Usaita vupombwe, usavuraya, usaba, usapupurira wokwako nhema, usachiva; kana murairo upi noupi, zvakavunganidzwa pashoko rokuti: Ude wokwako sezvaunozvida iwe." 
Romans13:10 Rudo haruitiri wokwako zvakaipa; naizvozvo rudo runozadzisa murairo. 
Romans13:11 Zvikuru ndinoreva izvozvi, zvatinoziva nguva, kuti zvino yatova nguva yokumuka kwenyu pahope; nokuti zvino kuponeswa kwedu kwava pedo kupfuvura zuva ratakatanga kutenda naro." 
Romans13:12 Vusiku bwapfuvura, koedza; naizvozvo ngatirashe mabasa erima, ngatishonge nhumbi dzokurwa dzechiedza." 
Romans13:13 Ngatifambe nenzira yakafanira sapamasikati; tisingafambi nokutamba kwakaipa, nokubatwa, kana novupombwe, novutere, kana negakava, negodo." 
Romans13:14 Asi pfekai Ishe Jesu Kristu, musatsvaka kufadza nyama pakuchiva kwayo." 
Romans14:1 Zvino gamuchirai usinesimba pakutenda kwake musingaiti gakava naye pamusoro pokufunga kwake. 
Romans14:2 Mumwe munhu unokutenda kuti ungadya zvose; asi usinesimba unodya mirivo. 
Romans14:3 Unodya ngaarege kuzvidza usingadyi; usingadyi ngaarege kupa mhosva unodya; nokuti Mwari wakamugamuchira. 
Romans14:4 Iwe ndiwe aniko unopa muranda womumwe munhu mhosva? Iye unomira kana unowa pamberi paShe wake. Uchamiswa hake, nokuti Ishe unesimba rokumumisa." 
Romans14:5 Mumwe munhu unoti zuva rimwe rinopfuvura rimwe; mumwe unoti mazuva ose akafanana. Mumwe nomumwe ngaazive kwazvo mumoyo make. 
Romans14:6 Uyo unochengeta zuva, unorichengeta nokuda kwaShe; uyo usingachengeti zuva haarichengeti kunaShe, uyo unodya, unodya nokuda kwaShe, nokuti unovonga Mwari. Uyo usingadyi kunaShe haadyi asi unovonga Mwari." 
Romans14:7 Nokuti hakunomumwe wedu unozviraramira iye oga, hakuna unozvifira iye oga." 
Romans14:8 Nokuti kana tichirarama tinoraramira Ishe; kana tichifa, tinofira Ishe; zvino kana tichirarama, kana tichifa tiri vaShe." 
Romans14:9 Nokuti Kristu wakafira izvezvi, akamukiravo izvezvi akararama kuti ave Ishe wavapenyu navakafa." 
Romans14:10 Zvino iwe, unopireiko hama yako mhosva? Kana newevo, unozvidzireiko hama yako? Nokuti isu tose tichamira pachigaro chokutonga chaKristu." 
Romans14:11 Nokuti kwakanyorwa, kuchinzi: Novupenyu bwangu ndizvo zvinoreva Ishe ibvi rimwe nerimwe richandifugamira, Rurimi rumwe norumwe ruchakudza Mwari." 
Romans14:12 Naizvozvo mumwe nomumwe we du uchazvidavirira kunaMwari. 
Romans14:13 Naizvozvo ngatirege kuramba tichitongana; asi zvirinani kuti mutonge, kuti munhu arege kuisa chigumbuso kana chinopinganidza pamberi pehama yake." 
Romans14:14 Ndinoziva, nokuzivisisa kwazvo munaShe Jesu, kuti hakunechinhu chinetsvina chimene; asi uyo unoti, chinetsvina, kwaari chinetsvina." 
Romans14:15 Nokuti kana hama yako ichisvibiswa moyo nokuda kwezvokudya, iwe hauchafambi norudo. Usaparadza nezvokudya zvako uyo wakafirwa naKristu." 
Romans14:16 Naizvozvo kunaka kwenyu ngakurege kuzvidzwa. 
Romans14:17 Nokuti vushe bwaMwari hazvizi zvokudya kana zvokumwa, asi kururama, norugare, nomufaro muMweya Mutsvene." 
Romans14:18 Nokuti unobatira Kristu pazvinhu izvi, unofadza Mwari, uye unotendwa navanhu." 
Romans14:19 Naizvozvo ngatitsvake izvo zvinovuyisa rugare nezvatingasimbisana nazvo. 
Romans14:20 Regai kuparadza basa raMwari nokuda kwezvokudya. Zvinhu zvose zvakanaka hazvo: asi zvakaipa kunounodya akagumbuka. 
Romans14:21 Zvakanaka kusadya nyama, kana kusamwa waini, kana kusaita chimwe chinhu chingagumbusa hama yako, kana kuipa vutera." 
Romans14:22 Unokutenda here? Iva nako kuve kwako pamberi paMwari, wakaropafadzwa usingazvipi mhosva pachinhu chaanotendera." 
Romans14:23 Asi uyo unonyunyuta wava nemhosva kana achidya, nokuti haadyi nokutenda; zvose zvisingabvi pakutenda zvivi." 
Romans15:1 Zvino isu, tinesimba, tinofanira kutakura vutera bwavasinesimba, tisingazvifadzi." 
Romans15:2 Mumwe nomumwe wedu ngaafadze wokwake pane zvakanaka zvinosimbisa. 
Romans15:3 Nokuti Kristuvo haana kuzvifadza; asi sezvazvakanyorwa, zvichinzi: Kuzvidza kwavakakuzvidza nako kwakawira pamusoro pangu." 
Romans15:4 Nokuti zvose zvakanyorwa kare, zakanyorwa kuti isu tidzidze kuti tive netariro inobva pakutsungirira napakunyaradza kwaMagwaro." 
Romans15:5 Zvino Mwari wokutsungirira nowokunyaradza ngaakupei moyo mumwe pakati penyu, sezvinoda Kristu Jesu;" 
Romans15:6 kuti mukudze Mwari, baba vaShe wedu Jesu Kristu, nomoyo mumwe uye nomuromo mumwe." 
Romans15:7 Saka gamuchirai, Kristu sezvaakatigamuchira, kuti Mwari akudzwe." 
Romans15:8 Nokuti ndinoti: Jesu Kristu wakaitwa mushumiri wokudzingiswa kuratidza chokwadi chaMwari, kuti asimbise zvakapikirwa madzibaba." 
Romans15:9 Vuye, kuti vahedheni vakudze Mwari nokuda kwengoni dzake; sezvazvakanyorwa, zvichinzi: Naizvozvo ndichakurumbidzai pakati pavahedheni, Nokukuimbirai zita renyu." 
Romans15:10 Vuyezve unoti: Farai imwi vahedheni, navanhu vake." 
Romans15:11 Vuyezve: Rumbidzai Ishe, imwi vahedheni vose; Marudzi ose ngaamukudze." 
Romans15:12 uye zve, Isaya unoti: Mudzi waJese uchavapo, Naiye unomuka, kuti abate vahedheni; Vahedheni vachamutarira iye;" 
Romans15:13 Zvino Mwari wetariro ngaakuzadzei nomufaro wose norugare pakutenda kwenyu, kuti muve netariro yakawandisa, nesimba roMweya Mutsvene." 
Romans15:14 Zvino, hama dzangu, ini ndimene, ndinoziva kwazvo pamusoro penyu, kuti imwi mumene muzere nokunaka, makazadzwa nokuziva kose, munogonavo kurairana." 
Romans15:15 Asi ndinokunyorerai zvimwe ndichinyanya kutsunga, ndichiita sendinokunyevudzai nenyasha dzandakapiwa naMwari," 
Romans15:16 kuti ndive muranda waKristu Jesu kuvahedheni, ndichiita basa rovuprista paevhangeri yaMwari, kuti chibayiro chavahedheni chifadze Mwari, chakaitwa chitsvene noMweya Mutsvene." 
Romans15:17 Naizvozvo ndingazvirumbidza munaKristu Jesu pazvinhu zvaMwari. 
Romans15:18 Nokuti ndingatya kutaura zvimwe zvinhu, asi izvo Kristu zvaakaita neni, kuti vahedheni vateereswe neshoko namabasa," 
Romans15:19 nesimba re zviratidzo nezvinoshamisa, nesimba roMweya Mutsvene; nokudaro kubva Jerusarema nenyika yakapoteredza, kusvikira Iriko, ndakaparidza kwazvo evhangeri yaKristu;" 
Romans15:20 ndichishingarira chinhu ichi kuti ndiparidze evhangeri, apo pasina kumborebwa zita raKristu, kuti ndirege kuvaka pamusoro penheyo dzomumwe munhu;" 
Romans15:21 asi, sezvazvakanyorwa, zvichinzi: Avo, vasina kuvudzwa zvake; vachavona; Naivo vasina kunzwa vachanzwisisa." 
Romans15:22 Naizvozvo ndakadziviswavo kazhinji kuvuya kwamuri; 
Romans15:23 zvino zvandisina pokubata panyika idzi, uye zvaava makore mazhinji ndichida zvikuru kuvuya kwamuri," 
Romans15:24 kana ndichienda Spania, ndichavuya kwamuri; (nokuti ndinotarira kukuvonai parwendo rwangu, ndiperekedzwe nemwi ikoko, kana ndamboguta zvishoma nemi.)" 
Romans15:25 Asi zvino ndomboenda Jerusarema kundoshumira vatsvene. 
Romans15:26 Nokuti veMakedhonia naveAkaya vakati zvakanaka kuti vagovane navarombo pavatsvene vari paJerusarema. 
Romans15:27 Nokuti vakatiira zvakanaka; vanengava navo. Nokuti kana vahedheni vakaitwa vagovani navo pazvinhu zvoMweya, vanengavavo rokuvashumira pa zvinhu zvenyama." 
Romans15:28 Naizvozvo kana ndapedza chinhu ichi, ndikavavigira chibereko ichi, ndichaenda Spania nokwenyu." 
Romans15:29 Ndinoziva kuti kana ndichivuya kwenyu, ndichavuya nokuropafadza kwakazara kweevhangeri yaKristu." 
Romans15:30 Zvino ndinokumbira zvikuru, hama dzangu, naShe wedu, Jesu Kristu, uye norudo rwoMweya, kuti murwe pamwe chete neni pakunyengetera kwenyu kunaMwari pamusoro pangu;" 
Romans15:31 kuti ndisunungurwe kuna vasingateereri muJudhiya, uye kuti kushumira kwangu kunaveJerusarema kufadze vatsvene;" 
Romans15:32 kuti ndivuye kwamuri nomufaro nokuda kwaMwari, ndiwane zororo pamwe chete nemi." 
Romans15:33 Zvino Mwari worugare ngaave nemwi mose. Ameni. 
Romans16:1 Ndinoreverera kwamuri Fibi, hanzvadzi yedu, mushandiri wekereke iri paKenkrea." 
Romans16:2 Kuti mumugamuchire munaShe, sezvinofanira vatsvene, nokumubatsira pazvinhu zvose, zvaangashaiwa; nokuti iye amene wakabatsira vazhinji, nenivo ndimene." 
Romans16:3 Ndikwazisirei Priska naAkwira, vanobata neni munaKristu Jesu." 
Romans16:4 vakaisa mitsipa yavo kurwira vupenyu bwangu, vandisingavongi ini ndoga asi nekereke dzose dzavahedheni." 
Romans16:5 Ndikwazisireivo kereke iri paimba yavo. Ndikwazisirei Epeneto, mudikamwa wangu, ndiye chibereko chokutanga munaKristu paAsia." 
Romans16:6 Ndikwazisirei Maria, wakakubatsirai zvikuru." 
Romans16:7 Ndikwazisirei Andoroniko naJunia, worudzi rwangu, vakasungwa pamwe chete neni, vakakurumbira pakati pavapositora, vakanditangiravo kuva munaKristu." 
Romans16:8 Ndikwazisirei Ampriato, mudikamwa wangu munaShe." 
Romans16:9 Ndikwazisirei Urbano, unobata nesu munaKristu, naStako, mudikamwa wangu." 
Romans16:10 Ndikwazisirei Apere, wakatendwa munaKristu. Ndikwazisirei vokwaAristoburo." 
Romans16:11 Ndikwazisirei Herodhio worudzi rwangu. Ndikwazisireivo kwaNarkiso, vari munaShe." 
Romans16:12 Ndikwazisirei Trifania naTrifosa, vanobata munaShe. Ndikwazisirei Persisi, mudikamwa, wakabata zvikuru munaShe." 
Romans16:13 Ndikwazisirei Rufosi, musanangurwa munaShe, namai vake, navangu." 
Romans16:14 Ndikwazisirei Asinkrito, naFregoni, naHermesi, naPatrobasi, naHeramasi, nehama dziri kwavari." 
Romans16:15 Ndikwazisirei Firorogosi, naJuria, naNerea, nehanzvadzi yake, naOraimpasi, navatsvene vose vari kwavari." 
Romans16:16 Kwazisanai nokusveta kutsvene. Kereke dzose dzaKristu ndinokukwazisai. 
Romans16:17 Zvino ndinokumbira zvikuru kwamuri, hama dzangu, kuti mucherekedze avo vanopesanisa, navanogumbusa, vachiita zvinopesana nedzidziso yamakadzidziswa imi; muvanzvenge." 
Romans16:18 Nokuti vakadaro havabatiri Ishe wedu Jesu Kristu, asi dumbu ravo; vanonyengera moyo yavasina mano namashoko avo akanaka, nokubata kumeso." 
Romans16:19 Nokuti kuteerera kwenyu kwakasvika kuvanhu vose. Naizvozvo ndinofara pamusoro penyu; asi ndinoda kuti muve vakachenjera kunezvakanaka, asi vasinenjere kunezvakaipa." 
Romans16:20 Zvino Mwari worugare uchakurumidza kupwanya Satani pasi petsoka dzenyu. Nyasha dzaShe wedu Jesu Kristu ngadzive nemi. 
Romans16:21 Timotio, unobata neni, unokukwazisai; naRukio, naJasoni, naSosipatrosi, vorudzi rwangu." 
Romans16:22 Ini Tertiosi, unonyora mwadhi iyi, ndinokukwazisai munaShe." 
Romans16:23 Gaiosi,wakandigamuchira ini nekereke yose, unokukwazisai. Erastosi, muchengeti wemariyeguta, unokukwazisai, naKwaritosivo, hama." 
Romans16:24 Nyasha dzaShe wedu Jesu Kristu, ngadzive nemwi mose. Ameni." 
Romans16:25 Zvino iye, unogona kukusimbisai, sezvinoreva evhangeri yangu, nokuparidzwa kwaJesu Kristu, nokuzarurwa kwezvakavanzika, zvisina kurebwa nguva dzisingaperi." 
Romans16:26 asi zvino zvinoratidzwa nokuziviswa kumarudzi ose, naMagwaro avaporofita, sezvakarairwa naMwari usingaperi, kuti vateerere nokutenda.;" 
Romans16:27 iye Mwari wakachenjera oga, ngaave nokubwinya naJesu Kristu nokusingaperi. Ameni." 
1Corinthians1:1 Pauro, wakadamwa nokuda kwaMwari, kuti ave muapositora waKristu Jesu, naSostene, hama yedu," 
1Corinthians1:2 kukereke yaMwari iri paKorinde, kunavakaitwa vatsvene munaKristu Jesu, vakadamwa kuti vave vatsvene pamwe chete navose vanodana pose-pose zita raJesu Kristu, Ishe wedu, wavo nowedu:" 
1Corinthians1:3 Nyasha ngadzive nemi, norugare runobva kunaMwari, baba vedu, naShe Jesu Kristu." 
1Corinthians1:4 Ndinogara ndichivonga Mwari nguva dzose nokuda kwenyu, pamusoro penyasha dzaMwari dzamakapiwa munaKristu Jesu;" 
1Corinthians1:5 kuti makafumiswa pazvose maari, pakutaura kose, napakuziva kose;" 
1Corinthians1:6 nokudaro vuchapupu bwaKristu bwakasimbiswa mamuri; 
1Corinthians1:7 kuti hamushaiwi chipo chimwe; muchimirira kuratidzwa kwaShe wedu, Jesu Kristu;" 
1Corinthians1:8 uchakusimbisai kusvikira pakuguma, muve vasingapomerwi pazuva raShe Jesu Kristu." 
1Corinthians1:9 Mwari ndiye wakatendeka, wamakadamwa naye kuyanana noMwanakomana wake, Jesu Kristu, Ishe wedu." 
1Corinthians1:10 Zvino ndinokumbira zvikuru kwamuri, hama dzangu, nezita raShe wedu, Jesu Kristu, kuti imwi mose mutaure chinhu chimwe, kuti pakati penyu kurege kuva nokupesana; asi kuti musonganiswe zvakanaka pamurangariro mumwe nokufunga kumwe." 
1Corinthians1:11 Nokuti ndakavudzwa pamusoro penyu, hama dzangu, navari vokwaKroe, kuti kunegakava pakati penyu." 
1Corinthians1:12 Zvandinoreva ndizvo, kuti mumwe nomumwe wenyu unoti: Ini ndiri waPauro, ini waAporo, ini waKefasi, ini waKristu." 
1Corinthians1:13 Ko Pauro wakaroverwa pamuchinjikwa nokuda kwenyu here? Ko makabhabhatidzwa muzita raPauro here? 
1Corinthians1:14 Ndinovonga Mwari, kuti handina kubhabhatidza mumwe wenyu, asi Krispo naGayo;" 
1Corinthians1:15 kuti kurege kuva nomunhu ungati, makabhabhatidzwa muzita rangu." 
1Corinthians1:16 Ndakabhabhatidzavo veimba yaStefana; asi vamwe, handizivi kana ndakabhabhatidza mumwe." 
1Corinthians1:17 Nokuti Kristu haana kundituma kubhabhatidza, asi kuti ndiparidze evhangeri; ndisingaiti nenjere dzamashoko, kuti muchinjikwa waKrsitu urege kukoneswa." 
1Corinthians1:18 Nokuti shoko romuchinjikwa vupenzi kunavanoparadzwa; asi kwatiri., isu tinoponeswa, isimba raMwari." 
1Corinthians1:19 Nokuti kwakanyorwa kuchinzi: Ndichaparadza vuchenjeri bwavakachenjera, Ndichakonesa kuziva kwavanoziva." 
1Corinthians1:20 Wakachenjera uripiko? Munyori uripiko? Muiti wenharo wenyika ino uripiko? Mwari haana kuita vuchenjeri bwenyika bwuve vupenzi here? 
1Corinthians1:21 Nokuti pashure muvuchenjeri bwaMwari, nyika novuchenjeri bwayo haina kuziva Mwari, nokuti zvakafadza Mwari novupenzi bwokuparidza kuponesa vanotenda." 
1Corinthians1:22 Nokuti vaJudha vanokumbira chiratidzo, navaGiriki vanotsvaka vuchenjeri;" 
1Corinthians1:23 asi isu tinoparidza Kristu, wakaroverwa pamuchinjikwa, chigumbuso kuvaJudha, novupenzi kuvahedheni;" 
1Corinthians1:24 asi kunavakadamwa, vaJudha navaGiriki Kristu isimba raMwari novuchenjeri hwaMwari." 
1Corinthians1:25 Nokuti vupenzi bwaMwari bwakachenjera kupfuvura vanhu; novutera bwaMwari bwakasimba kupfuvura vanhu. 
1Corinthians1:26 Nokuti tarirai kudamwa kwenyu, hama dzangu, kuti havazi vazhinji vakachenjera panyama vakadamwa; havazi vazhinji vanesimba, havazi vazhinji vanokudzwa;" 
1Corinthians1:27 asi Mwari wakatsaura zvinhu zvovupenzi zvenyika, kuti anyadzise vakachenjera; Mwari wakatsaura zvinhu zvinozvidzwa zvenyika, kuti anyadzise izvo zvinesimba;" 
1Corinthians1:28 Mwari wakatsaura zvinhu zvinozidzwa zvenyika, nezvinoshovorwa, nezvinhu zvisipo, kuti ashaise zviripo simba razvo," 
1Corinthians1:29 kuti kurege kuva nenyama ingazvikudza pamberi paMwari. 
1Corinthians1:30 Asi naye muri munaKristu Jesu, iye wakatiitirwa isu vuchenjeri bwunobva kunaMwari, nokururama, nokuitwa vatsvene, norudzikinuro." 
1Corinthians1:31 Kuti unozvirumbidza, ngaazvirumbidze munaShe, sezvazvakanyorwa." 
1Corinthians2:1 Zvino ini, hama dzangu, pakuvuya kwangu kwamuri, handina kuvuya ndichikuparidzirai vuchapupu bwaMwari nokunaka kwamashoko, kana kovuchenjeri." 
1Corinthians2:2 Nokuti ndakati, handingazivi chinhu pakati penyu, asi Jesu Kristu, iye wakaroverwa pamuchinjikwa." 
1Corinthians2:3 Ndakanga ndiri pakati penyu novutera, nokutya, nokudedera kukuru," 
1Corinthians2:4 neshoko rangu nokuparidza kwangu hazvizaiva namashoko okugombedzera ovuchenjeri; hwavanhu asi nokuratidza koMweya nokwesimba; 
1Corinthians2:5 kuti kutenda kwenyu kurege kuva muvuchenjeri bwavanhu, asi musimba raMwari." 
1Corinthians2:6 Zvino tinotaura vuchenjeri pakati pavakakwana; asi vuchenjeri bwusati bwuri bwenyika ino, kana bwavabati venyika ino vanoshaiswa simba." 
1Corinthians2:7 Asi tinotaura vuchenjeri bwaMwari bwakavanzika, bwakafukidzwa, bwakatemerwa kubwinya kwedu naMwari, nyika isati yavapo;" 
1Corinthians2:8 bwusina kuzivikamwa nomumwe wavabati venyika ino; nokuti dai vaibwuziva, vangadai vaisarovera Ishe wokubwinya pamuchinjikwa." 
1Corinthians2:9 Asi sezvazvakanyorwa, zvichinzi: Izvo zvisina kuvonekwa neziso, kana kunzwika nenzeve, Nezvisina kupinda mumoyo womunhu, Ndizvo Mwari zvaakagadzirira vanomuda." 
1Corinthians2:10 Nokuti Mwari wakazviratidza izvo kwatiri isu noMweya; nokuti Mweya unonzvera zvose, nezvakadzika zvaMwari." 
1Corinthians2:11 Nokuti munhu ndoupiko unoziva zvomunhu, asi mweya womunhu, uri maari? Saizvozvo hakunomunhu unoziva zvaMwari, asi Mweya waMwari." 
1Corinthians2:12 Zvino isu hatina kugamuchira mweya wenyika, asi Mweya unobva kunaMwari; kuti tizive izvo zvatakangopiwa hedu naMwari." 
1Corinthians2:13 Ndizvo zvatinotauravo, tisingatauri namashoko atinodzidziswa novuchenjeri bwomunhu, asi anodzidziswa noMweya mutsvene; tichidudzira zvinhu zvoMweya kuvanhu voMweya." 
1Corinthians2:14 Zvino munhu sezvaakaberekwa haagamuchiri zvinhu zvoMweya waMwari; nokuti vupenzi kwaari; haazvinzwisisi, nokuti zvinonzwisiswa noMweya." 
1Corinthians2:15 Asi uri woMweya unonzwisisa zvose, asi iye amene haanzwisiswi nomunhu." 
1Corinthians2:16 Nokuti ndianiko wakaziva murangariro waShe, kuti amudzidzise? Asi isu tinomurangariro waKristu." 
1Corinthians3:1 Ini, hama dzangu, ndakanga ndisingagoni kutaura nemwi sokuna voMweya, asi sokuna venyama, sokuna vacheche munaKristu." 
1Corinthians3:2 Ndakakupai mukaka mumwe, handina kukupai zvokudya; nokuti makanga musingagoni kudya, nazvino hamugoni." 
1Corinthians3:3 Nokuti muchiri venyama; nokuti zvapachinegodo pakati penyu, negakava, ko hamuzi venyama, muchifamba nomutovo wavanhu here?" 
1Corinthians3:4 Nokuti kana mumwe achiti: Ini ndiri waPauro; mumwe; Ini ndiri waAporo; ko hamuzi venyama here? 
1Corinthians3:5 Zvino Pauro ndiani? Aporo ndiani? Asi vabati vamakatenda navo. 
1Corinthians3:6 Ini ndakasima, Aporo wakadiridza; asi Mwari wakameresa." 
1Corinthians3:7 Naizvozvo unosima haazi chinhu, kana unodiridza' asi Mwari unomeresa." 
1Corinthians3:8 Zvino unosima nounodiridza ndavamwe; asi mumwe nomumwe uchapiwa mubairo wake, sezvaakabata." 
1Corinthians3:9 Nokuti tiri vabati pamwe chete naMwari; muri munda waMwari, muri imba yaMwari." 
1Corinthians3:10 Nenyasha dzaMwari dzandakapiwa, ndakaronga nheyo somuvaki wakachenjera; mumwe unovaka pamusoro padzo. Zvino mumwe nomumwe ngaachenjere kuti unovaka sei pamusoro padzo." 
1Corinthians3:11 Nokuti hakunomumwe ungaronga dzimwe nheyo, asi idzo dzakarongwa kare, ndiye Jesu Kristu." 
1Corinthians3:12 Zvino kana munhu achivaka pamusoro penheyo idzi, ndarama, kana siravheri, kana mabwe anokosha, kana matanda, kana uswa, kana mashanga;" 
1Corinthians3:13 basa romumwe nomumwe richavonekwa; nokuti zuva iro richazvibudisa pachena, nokuti zvicharatidzwa nomoto; moto uchaidza basa romumwe nomumwe kuti rakadini." 
1Corinthians3:14 Kana basa romunhu raakavaka pamusoro padzo, richigara, uchapiwa mubairo." 
1Corinthians3:15 Kana basa romunhu rikapiswa, ucharashikirwa, asi iye amene uchaponeswa, asi sowakabuda pamoto." 
1Corinthians3:16 Ko hamuzivi kuti muri tembere yaMwari, uye kuti Mweya waMwari unogara mukati menyu here?" 
1Corinthians3:17 Kana munhu achitadzira tembere yaMwari Mwari uchamutadziravo; nokuti tembere yaMwari itsvene, ndimi iyo." 
1Corinthians3:18 Kurege kuva nomunhu unozvinyengera. Kana munhu achiti ndakachenjera pakati penyu panyika ino, ngaave benzi, kuti ave wakachenjera." 
1Corinthians3:19 Nokuti vuchenjeri bwenyika ino vupenzi kunaMwari. Nokuti kwakanyorwa kuchinzi: Unobata vakachenjera, pamano avo." 
1Corinthians3:20 Vuyezve: Ishe unoziva ndangariro dzavakachenjera, kuti hadzinamaturo." 
1Corinthians3:21 Naizvozvo ngakurege kuva nomunhu unovimba navanhu. Nokuti zvinhu zvose ndezvenyu;
