2Corinthians13:2 Ndakambokuvudzai, zvino ndokuvudzai sendakanga ndiripo, kechipiri sendakanga ndiripo, zvino ndisipo, ndinovanyorera avo vakatadza navamwe vose kuti kana ndavuya ikozvino handingavaregererizve." 
2Corinthians13:3 Zvamunotsvaka chiratidzo chaKristu, unotaura mandiri, iye usingashaiwi simba kwamuri, asi unesimba mamuri." 
2Corinthians13:4 Nokuti wakaroverwa pamuchinjikwa nokushaiwa simba, asi unoraramanesimba raMwari nesuvo hatina simba maari asi tichararama pamwe chete naye nesimba raMwari kwamuri." 
2Corinthians13:5 Zviidzei imwi mumene, muvone kana muri pakutenda; muzvinzverei imwi mumene, Hamuzivi here imwi mumene kuti Jesu Kristu uri mukati menyu? Kana zvimwe mava vakarashwa henyu." 
2Corinthians13:6 Asi ndinoti muchaziva henyu kuti isu hatina kuva vakarashwa. 
2Corinthians13:7 Zvino tinonyengetera Mwari kuti murege kuita chinhu chimwe chakaipa; handidaro kuti isu tiwanikwe kuti takatendeka, asi kuti imwi muite zvakarurama, kunyange isu takaita savakarashwa." 
2Corinthians13:8 Nokuti hatigoni kuita chinhu chinopesana nechokwadi, asi chinobatsira chokwadi." 
2Corinthians13:9 Nokuti tinofara kana isu tichishaiwa simba, imwi muchiva nesimba; ndizvo zvatinokumbiravo, kuti mukwaniswe." 
2Corinthians13:10 Saka ndinonyora izvi ndisipo, kuti kana ndavapo, ndirege kuita nehasha, sezvandakapiwa naShe simba rokusimbisa, risati riri rokuputsa." 
2Corinthians13:11 Pakupedzisira, hama dzangu, farai, mukwaniswe, munyaradzwe, ivai nomoyo mumwe, garai norugare; Mwari worudo norugare uchava nemi." 
2Corinthians13:12 Kwazisanai nokusveta kutsvene. 
2Corinthians13:13 Vatsvene vose vanokukwazisai. 
2Corinthians13:14 Nyasha dzaShe Jesu Kristu, norudo rwaMwari, nokuyanana koMweya Mutsvene, ngazvive nemwi mose. Ameni." 
Galatians1:1 Pauro, muapositora,usina kubva kuvanhu, kana kutumwa nomunhu, asi naJesu Kristu, naMwari Baba, wakamumutsa kuvakafa)," 
Galatians1:2 nehama dzose dziri kwandiri, kukereke dzeGaratia:" 
Galatians1:3 Nyasha norugare ngazvive nemi, zvinobva kunaMwari, Baba vedu, naShe Jesu Kristu," 
Galatians1:4 wakazvipa nokuda kwezvivi zvedu, kuti atisunungure kunyika yakaipa yazvino, nokuda kwaMwari, Baba vedu;" 
Galatians1:5 ngaave nokubwinya nokusingaperi-peri. Ameni. 
Galatians1:6 Ndinoshamiswa kuti munokurumidza mukadai kushandukira uyo wakakudanai munyasha dzaKristu, kuti mutsaukire kune imwe evhangeri;" 
Galatians1:7 isati iri imwe hayo; asi kuti vamwe varipo vanokukanganisai, vachida kushandura evhangeri yaKristu." 
Galatians1:8 Asi kunyange isu, kana mutumwa unobva kudenga, akakuparidzirai imwe evhangeri, inopesana neyatinokuparidzirai isu, ngaave wakatukwa." 
Galatians1:9 Sezvatakamboreva, zvino ndinoreva zve saizvozvo: Kana kunomunhu unokuparidzirai imwe evhangeri, inopesana naiyo yamakagamuchira, ngaave wakatukwa." 
Galatians1:10 Nokuti zvino ndinoita vushamwari navanhu here, kana naMwari? Kana ndinotsvaka kufadza vanhu here? Kana ndaifadza vanhu nazvino, handizaiva muranda waKristu." 
Galatians1:11 Nokuti ndinokuzivisai, hama dzangu, kuti evhangeri yakaparidzwa neni, haina kuita seyavanhu." 
Galatians1:12 Nokuti handina kuipiwa kana kuidzidziswa nomunhu, asi ndakairatidzwa naJesu Kristu." 
Galatians1:13 Nokuti makanzwa zvomufambire wangu kare pakunamata kwavaJudha, kuti ndaitambudza kereke yaMwari zvikuru kwazvo, ndikaiparadza;" 
Galatians1:14 pakunamata kwavaJudha ndaipfuvura vazhinji vezero rangu parudzi rwangu, ndichinyanya kushingairira tsika dzamadzibaba angu." 
Galatians1:15 Zvino Mwari, akati afadzwa nazvo, iye wakandisanangura kubva padumbu ramai vangu, akandidana nenyasha dzake." 
Galatians1:16 kuti aratidze Mwanakomana wake mandiri, ndimuparidze pakati pavahedheni, pakarepo handina kurangana nenyama neropa." 
Galatians1:17 handina kukwira Jerusarema kunaavo vakanditangira kuva vaapostra, asi ndakaenda ArAbhiya, ndikadzokera Dhamaseko zve." 
Galatians1:18 Ipapo, makore matatu akati apfuvura, ndikakwira Jerusarema kundovona Kefasi, ndikagara naye mazuva anegumi namashanu." 
Galatians1:19 Asi handina kuvona mumwe wavapositora, asi Jakobho bedzi, munun'una waShe." 
Galatians1:20 Izvi zvandinokunyorerai, tarirai, pamberi paMwari handirevi nhema." 
Galatians1:21 Ipapo ndakasvika kunyika dzeSiria neKirikia. 
Galatians1:22 Asi ndakanga ndisingazikamwi pachiso nekereke dzeJudhiya dziri munaKristu. 
Galatians1:23 asi vakanga vanzwa bedzi, kuti uya, waititambudza kare, zvino woparidza kutenda kwaaiparadza kare;" 
Galatians1:24 vakarumbidza Mwari mandiri. 
Galatians2:1 Zvino, makore anegumi namana akati apfuvura, ndakakwira zveJerusarema naBharnabhasi, ndikaendavo naTitosi." 
Galatians2:2 Ndakakwira nokuda kokuratidzwa; ndikarondedzera pamberi pavo evhangeri yandinoparidza pakati pavahedheni, asi kuna vakanga vachikudzwa vari voga, kuti zvimwe ndirege kumhanyira pasina, kana kuti zvimwe ndatomhanyira pasina." 
Galatians2:3 Asi naTitosi, waiva neni, ari muGiriki, haana kurovererwa kuti adzingiswe;" 
Galatians2:4 nokuda kwehama dzenhema, vakanga vapinzwa nokunyanga, vakanga vapinda pakavanda kuti vashore kusununguka kwedu kwatinako munaKristu Jesu, kuti vatisunge;" 
Galatians2:5 hatina kuvatsedukira ivava, tichivateerera nguva imwe; kuti chokwadi cheevhangeri chirambe ichigara nemi." 
Galatians2:6 Zvino kana vari ivo vanonzi vakuru handine mhaka kuti vaiva vakadini kare; Mwari haatendi zvinovonekwa zvomunhu kana vari ivo vanonzi vakuru, havana kundiwedzera chinhu;" 
Galatians2:7 asi ivo vakati vavona kuti ini ndakapiwa evhangeri kunovasina kudzingiswa, saPetro kuna vakadzingiswa;" 
Galatians2:8 (nokuti iye wakapa Petro simba rokuva muapositora kuna vakadzingiswa, ndiye wakapavo ini simba rokuva muapositora kuvahedheni);" 
Galatians2:9 vakati vavona nyasha dzandakanga ndapiwa, Jakobho, naKefasi, naJohwani avo vainzi mbiru vakatibata isu tose naBharnabhasi namavoko orudyi okuyanana, kuti isu tiende kuvahedheni, ivo kuna vakadzingiswa;" 
Galatians2:10 vakada chete kuti tirangarire varombo; ndizvo zvandakashingairiravo kuti ndizviite. 
Galatians2:11 Zvino Kefasi wakati asvika Antiokia ndakamudzivisa pachena, nokuti wakanga anemhosva." 
Galatians2:12 Nokuti vamwe, vakanga vabva kunaJakobho, vasati vasvika, iye waidya navahedheni; asi vakati vasvika, akadzoka, akazviravura, achitya vakadzingiswa." 
Galatians2:13 Navamwe vaJudha vakaita mano-manovo pamwe chete naye; zvikaita kuti naiye Bharnabhasivo akatsauswa namano-mano avo. 
Galatians2:14 Asi ndakati ndichivona kuti havafambi zvakarurama nechokwadi cheevhangeri, ndakati kunaKefasi pamberi pavose: Kana iwe, uri muJudha, uchifamba savahedheni, usingaiti savaJudha, unoroverera seiko vahedheni, kuti vafambe savaJudha?" 
Galatians2:15 Isu vaJudha pakuzvarwa kwedu, tisati tiri vatadzi vanobva kuvahedheni," 
Galatians2:16 zvatinoziva kuti munhu haaruramiswi namabasa omurairo, asi nokutenda kunaKristu Jesu, nesuvo takatenda kuna Kristu Jesu, kuti tiruramiswe nokutenda kunaKristu, tirege kururamiswa namabasa omurairo; nokuti hakune nyama icharuramiswa namabasa omurairo." 
Galatians2:17 Zvino kana isu pakutsvaka kwedu kururamiswa munaKristu, tikawanikwa tiri vatadzivo timene, ko Kristu wava mushumiri wezvivi here? Haisva!" 
Galatians2:18 Nokuti kana ndikavaka zve izvo zvandamboputsa, ndinozviita mudariki." 
Galatians2:19 Nokuti nomurairo ini ndakafa kumurairo, kuti ndirarame kunaMwari," 
Galatians2:20 Ndakaroverwa pamuchinjikwa pamwe chete naKristu; handichiri ini ndinorarama, asi Kristu unorarama mandiri; kurarama uku, kwandinorarama nako munyama zvino, ndinorarama nokutenda kuri muMwanakomana waMwari; wakandida akazvipa nokuda kwangu" 
Galatians2:21 Handikonesi nyasha dzaMwari nokuti kana kururamiswa kuchibva kumurairo, Kristu wakafa pasina." 
Galatians3:1 imwi vaGaratia vokusafunga, ndianiko wakakurunzirai, kuti murege kuteerera chokwadi iyemi, makaratidzwa Jesu Kristu pachena pamberi pameso enyu akaroverwa pamuchinjikwa pakati penyu?" 
Galatians3:2 Ichechichetendinoda kunzwa kwamuri: Makapiwa Mweya namabasa omurairo here, kana nokunzwa kokutenda?" 
Galatians3:3 Muri vokusafunga vakadaro seiko? Makatanga muMweya, ko zvino mopedzisa munyama here?" 
Galatians3:4 Makatambudzika zvikuru mukadai pasina here? Kana zvaiva pasina hazvo! 
Galatians3:5 Naizvozvo uyo unokupai Mweya, nokuita mabasa esimba pakati penyu, unozviita izvo namabasa omurairo here, kana nokunzwa kokutenda?" 
Galatians3:6 Abhurahamu sezvaakatenda kunaMwari kukanzi kwaari ndiko kururama. 
Galatians3:7 Naizvozvo zivai kuti vokutenda ndivo vana vaAbhurahamu. 
Galatians3:8 Norugwaro zvarwakaziva zviri mberi kuti Mwari ucharuramisa vahedheni nokutenda, rwakaparidza evhangeri kare kunaAbhurahamu, ruchiti: Mauri marudzi ose acharopafadzwa." 
Galatians3:9 Naizvozvo vokutenda vanoropafadzwa pamwe chete naAbhurahamu, wakatenda." 
Galatians3:10 Nokuti vose vari vamabasa omurairo, vari pakutukwa; nokuti kwakanyorwa, kuchinzi: Vakatukwa vose vasingarambiri pazvinhu zvose zvakanyorwa mubuku yomurairo, kuti vazviite." 
Galatians3:11 Zvino, zvinovonekwa kuti hakunomunhu unoruramiswa nomurairo pamberi paMwari, nokuti: Wakarurama uchararama nokutenda." 
Galatians3:12 Zvino murairo haubvi pakutenda; asi uyo wakaita zvinhu izvozvi uchararama nazvo. 
Galatians3:13 Kristu wakatidzikunura pakutuka komurairo, iye akaitwa chakatukwa nokuda kwedu, nokuti kwakanyorwa, kuchinzi: Vakatukwa vose vanoturikwa pamuti!" 
Galatians3:14 Kuti kuropafadzwa kwaAbhurahamu kusvike kuvahedheni munaJesu Kristu; kuti tipiwe nokutenda chipikirwa choMweya. 
Galatians3:15 Hama dzangu, ndinoreva nokureva kwavanhu, ndichiti: Kunyange iri sungano yavanhu hayo, kana yasimbiswa, hakunomunhu unoikonesa kana kuwedzera kwairi." 
Galatians3:16 Zvino, izvo zvipikirwa zvakarebwa kunaAbhurahamu nokumwana wake. Haarevi, achiti: Kuvana vako, savanenge vari vazhinji; asi saanenge ari mumwe, unoti; Kumwana wako; uyu ndiye Kristu." 
Galatians3:17 Zvino ndinoreva chinhu ichi, ndichiti; Sungano yakasimbiswa kare naMwari, munaKristu, haitorerwi simba rayo nomurairo wakazotevera makore mazana mana namakumi matatu apfuvura, kuti chipikirwa chikoneswe." 
Galatians3:18 Nokuti kana nhaka ichibva kumurairo, haichabvi kuchipikirwa;; asi Mwari wakaipa Abhurahamu nokupikira." 
Galatians3:19 Naizvozvo murairo chinyiko? Wakazowedzerwa nokuda kwezvivi, kusvikira mwana wakapikirwa izvozvo achizovuya; iwo wakarairwa navatumwa noruvoko rwomurevereri." 
Galatians3:20 Zvino murevereri haazi womumwe chete, asi Mwari ndomumwe." 
Galatians3:21 Ko murairo unorwisana nezvipikirwa zvaMwari here? Haisva! Nokuti dai vakanga vapiwa murairo waigona kuraramisa, zvirokwazvo Kururamiswa kungadai kwakabva kumurairo." 
Galatians3:22 Asi Rugwaro rwakapfigira zvose pasi pezvivi, kuti chipikirwa chinobva pakutenda munaJesu Krisitu chipiwe vanotenda." 
Galatians3:23 Asi kutenda kusati kwasvika, taichengetwa pasi pomurairo, takapfigirwa nokuda kokutenda kwaizoratidzwa." 
Galatians3:24 Saizvozvo murairo wakanga uri muperekedzi wedu, kutiisa kunaKristu kuti tiruramiswe nokutenda." 
Galatians3:25 Zvino kutenda zvakwakasvika, hatichiri pasi pomuperekedzi." 
Galatians3:26 Nokuti imwi mose muri vana vaMwari nokutenda munaKristu Jesu; 
Galatians3:27 nokuti vose pakati penyu, vakabhabhatidzwa munaKristu, makafuka Kristu." 
Galatians3:28 Hakuchina muJudha kana muGiriki, hakuchina wakasungwa kana wakasununguka, hakuchina munhurume kana munhukadzi; nokuti imwi mose muri vamwe munaKristu Jesu." 
Galatians3:29 Zvino kana muri vaKristu, muri vana vaAbhurahamu, vadyi venhaka sezvamakapikirwa." 
Galatians4:1 Zvino ndinoti, mudyi wenhaka, kana achiri mwana, haatongosiyani nomuranda, kunyange ari ishe wazvose;" 
Galatians4:2 asi uri pasi pavatariri navachengeti kusvikira panguva yakatarwa nababa. 
Galatians4:3 Saizvozvo nesuvo, tichiri vana, takanga takasungwa pasi pezvokuvamba zvenyika;" 
Galatians4:4 zvino nguva yakati yazara kwazvo, Mwari akatuma Mwanakomana wake, wakaberekwa nomukadzi, wakaberekwa pasi pomurairo," 
Galatians4:5 kuti adzikinure vari pasi pomurairo, kuti tipiwe vumwana bwedu." 
Galatians4:6 Zvino zvamuri vanakomana, Mwari wakatuma Mweya woMwanakomana wake mumoyo menyu, unodana, achiti: Aba, Baba!" 
Galatians4:7 Saka iwe hauchiri muranda, asi mwanakomana; kana wava mwanakomana, wava mudyi wenhaka yaMwari muna Kristu." 
Galatians4:8 Asi nenguva iyo, zvamakanga musingazivi Mwari, maiva varanda vavamwari vasati vari vechokwadi;" 
Galatians4:9 asi zvino, zvamunoziva Mwari, zvikuru zvamunozikamwa naMwari modzokerazve seiko kune zvokuvamba zvisine simba, zvovurombo, muchidazve kutanga kuva varanda vazvo?" 
Galatians4:10 Munochengeta misi nemwedzi, nenguva namakore." 
Galatians4:11 Ndinotya pamusoro penyu, kuti zvimwe ndakabate-basa kwamuri pasina." 
Galatians4:12 Ndinokumbira kwamuri, hama dzangu, kuti muve seni, nokuti ini ndakaita semi. Hamuna kundiitira chinhu chimwe chisakarurama;" 
Galatians4:13 zvino munoziva kuti ndakakuparidzirai evhangeri pakutanga nokuda kokurwara panyama; 
Galatians4:14 nechinhu icho panyama yangu, chakanga chiri muidzo kwamuri, hamuna kuchizvidza, kana kuchisema; asi makandigamuchira somutumwa waMwari, saiye Kristu Jesu." 
Galatians4:15 Zvino kufara kwenyu kuripiko? Nokuti ndinokupupurirai, kuti kana maigona, maitumbura meso enyu mukandipa iwo." 
Galatians4:16 Zvino ndava muvengi wenyu, zvandakakuvudzai chokwadi here?" 
Galatians4:17 Vanokushingairirai nomutovo usakanaka; asi vanoda kukupfigirai kunze, kuti imwi muvashingairire." 
Galatians4:18 Zvino zvakanaka kuti pachinhu chakanaka kushingairirwe nguva dzose, zvirege kuitwa kana ndiri kwamuri bedzi." 
Galatians4:19 Vana vangu vaduku, vandinotamburira zve kubereka, kusvikira Kristu avumbwa mukati menyu." 
Galatians4:20 Ndaida kuti ndive nemwi zvino, ndishandure inzwi rangu; nokuti ndinokanganiswa nokuda kwenyu." 
Galatians4:21 Ndivudzei, imwi munoda kuva pasi pomurairo, hamuteereri murairo here?" 
Galatians4:22 Nokuti kwakanyorwa kuti Abhurahamu wakanga anavanakomana vaviri, mumwe womurandakadzi, mumwe womukadzi wakasununguka." 
Galatians4:23 Zvino womurandakadzi wakaberekwa nenzira yenyama; asi womukadzi wakasununguka wakaberekwa sezvaakapikirwa. 
Galatians4:24 Zvinhu izvi zvinofananidzira; nokuti vakadzi ava vaviri isungano mbiri; imwe inobva pagomo reSinai inobereka vana vovuranda ndiye Agari; 
Galatians4:25 zvino Agari ndiro gomo reSinai muArAbhiya, rakaenzana neJerusarema razvino nokuti uri pavuranda iye navana vake" 
Galatians4:26 Zvino Jerusarema riri kumusoro rakasununguka ndivo mai vedu. 
Galatians4:27 nokuti kwakanyorwa kuchinzi: Fara, iwe usingabereki, usingazvari, Pururudza, udanidzire, iwe usingatamburi nokubereka, Nokuti vana vomusiyiwa vazhinji kunowaiye unomurume." 
Galatians4:28 Zvino imi, hama dzangu, muri vana vokupikirwa saIsaka." 
Galatians4:29 Asi sapanguva iyo, uyo wakaberekwa nenzira yenyama wakatambudza wakaberekwa nenzira yoMweya, zvakadarovo nazvino." 
Galatians4:30 Asi Rugwaro runotiyiko? Dzinga murandakadzi nomwanakomana wake; nokuti mwanakomana womurandakadzi haangadyi nhaka pamwe chete nomwanakomana wowakasununguka. 
Galatians4:31 Saka, hama dzangu, hatizi vana vomurandakadzi, asi vowakasununguka." 
Galatians5:1 Kristu wakatisunungura kuti tive vakasununguka; naizvozvo mirai nesimba, murege kusungwa zve nejoko rovuranda." 
Galatians5:2 Tarirai, ini Pauro, ndinoti kwamuri, kuti kana muchidzingiswa, Kristu haangakubatsiriyi chinhu." 
Galatians5:3 Ndinopupurira mumwe nomumwe unodzingiswa, kuti iye unengava rokuti aite murairo wose." 
Galatians5:4 Makaparadzaniswa naKristu, iyemi munoda kururamiswa nomurairo; mabudiswa panyasha." 
Galatians5:5 Nokuti isu noMweya tinomirira nokutenda tariro yokururamiswa. 
Galatians5:6 Nokuti munaKristu Jesu kudzingiswa kana kusadzingiswa hazvibatsiri chinhu; asi kutenda kunobata norudo. 
Galatians5:7 Makanga muchimhanya zvakanaka; ndianiko wakakudzivisai kuti murege kuteerera chokwadi? 
Galatians5:8 Hamuna kugombedzerwa naiye wakakudanai. 
Galatians5:9 Mbiriso shoma inovirisa bundu rose. 
Galatians5:10 Ndinotenda pamusoro penyu munaShe, kuti hamungatongorangariri chimwe chinhu; asi uyo, unokupesanisai uchafanira hake kutongwa, kunyange ari aninani." 
Galatians5:11 Asi ini, hama dzangu, kana ndichiparidza kuti vanhu vadzingiswe, ndinoramba ndichitambudzwa neiko? Naizvozvo kugumbusa komuchinjikwa kwabviswa." 
Galatians5:12 Dai avo vanokupesanisai vachizviguravo. 
Galatians5:13 Nokuti imi, hama dzangu, makadanirwa kusununguka; asi kusununguka kwenyu ngakurege kuva nzira yenyama, asi batiranai norudo." 
Galatians5:14 Nokuti murairo wose unozadziswa neshoko rimwe chete, rokuti: Ude wokwako sezvaunozvida iwe;" 
Galatians5:15 asi kana muchirumana nokudyana, chenjerai kuti murege kupedzana." 
Galatians5:16 Zvino ndinoti: Fambai noMweya, ipapo hamungaiti kuchiva kwenyama." 
Galatians5:17 Nokuti nyama inochiva ichirwa noMweya, noMweya uchirwa nenyama; nokuti izvi zvinorwisana; kuti murege kuita zvamunoda." 
Galatians5:18 Asi kana muchitungamirirwa noMweya, hamuzi pasi pomurairo." 
Galatians5:19 Zvino mabasa enyama anovonekwa, anoti: Vupombwe, netsvina, novutere," 
Galatians5:20 nokunamata zvifananidzo, novuroyi, nokuvengana, negakava, negodo, nokutsamwa, nokupesana, nokuparadzana, nedzidziso dzakatsauka," 
Galatians5:21 nokugodorana, nokuvuraya nokubatwa, nokutamba kwakaipa, nezvinhu zvakadai; izvo zvandinokuvudzai zvino, sezvandakambokuvudzai kare, kuti vanoita zvakadai havangadyi nhaka yovushe bwaMwari." 
Galatians5:22 Zvino chibereko choMweya ndirwo rudo, nomufaro, norugare, nomoyo murefu, nomoyo munyoro, nokunaka, nokutendeka." 
Galatians5:23 novunyoro, nokuzvidzora; hakuna murairo unodzivisa zvinhu zvakadai." 
Galatians5:24 Asi avo vari vaKristu Jesu vakarovera pamuchinjikwa nyama, pamwe chete nokuda kwayo, nokuchiva kwayo." 
Galatians5:25 Kana tichirarama noMweya, ngatifambevo noMweya," 
Galatians5:26 tirege kuzvikudza, tichimutsana moyo, tichigodorana." 
Galatians6:1 Hama dzangu, kunyange munhu akabatwa panokumwe kudarika, im ivoMweya mudzose wakadai nomoyo wovunyoro; uchizvichenjerera iwe, kuti urege kuidzwavo." 
Galatians6:2 Takuriranai mitoro yenyu, mugozadzisa murairo waKristu saizvozvo." 
Galatians6:3 Nokuti kana munhu achiti, ndiri chinhu, asati ari chinhu, unozvinyengera iye." 
Galatians6:4 Zvino munhu mumwe nomumwe ngaaidze basa rake amene, ipapo ungazvirumbidza pamusoro pake iye amene oga, asingazviiti pamusoro pomumwe." 
Galatians6:5 Nokuti munhu mumwe nomumwe uchafanira kutakura mutoro wake. 
Galatians6:6 Zvino unodzidziswa Shoko, ngaagovane nounodzidzisa pazvinhu zvose zvakanaka." 
Galatians6:7 Musanyengerwa; Mwari haasekwi; nokuti izvo zvinodzvara munhu, ndizvo zvaanochekazve." 
Galatians6:8 Nokuti unodzvarira nyama yake, uchacheka kuvora, kunobva panyama; asi unodzvarira mweya, uchacheka vupenyu bwusingaperi, bwunobva kumweya." 
Galatians6:9 Zvino ngatirege kuneta pakuita zvakanaka, nokuti tinozocheka nenguva yakafanira, kana tisingavori moyo." 
Galatians6:10 Zvino zvatinenguva, ngatiitire vose zvakanaka, zvikuru kunaveimba yokutenda." 
Galatians6:11 Tarirai, kukura kwamaretere andinokunyorerai nawo noruvoko rwangu." 
Galatians6:12 Vose vanoda kunzi vakanaka pane zvinovonekwa panyama, ndivo vanokurovererai kuti mudzingiswe; vanodarochetekuti varege kutambudzwa nokuda komuchinjikwa waKristu." 
Galatians6:13 Nokuti kunyange vakadzingiswa,havachengeti murairo vamene, asi vanoda kuti imwi mudzingiswe, kuti vazvirumbidze panyama yenyu." 
Galatians6:14 Asi kana ndirini, ngandirege kutongozvirumbidza napaduku, asichetemumuchinjikwa waShe wedu, Jesu Kristu; naye nyika yakaroverwa pamuchinjikwa kwandiri, neni ndakaroverwa kunyika." 
Galatians6:15 Nokuti kudzingiswa kana kusadzingiswa hachizi chinhu, asi chisikwa chitsva." 
Galatians6:16 Vose vanofamba nomurairo uyu rugare ngaruve pamusoro pavo, nenyasha, napamusoro pavaIsraeri vaMwari." 
Galatians6:17 Kubvira zvino ngakurege kuva nomunhu unonditambudza; nokuti ndinamavanga aShe Jesu pamuviri wangu. 
Galatians6:18 Nyasha dzaShe wedu Jesu Kristu, ngadzive nomweya wenyu, hama dzangu. Ameni." 
Ephesians1:1 Pauro, muapositora waKristu Jesu, nokuda kwaMwari, kuvatsvene vari paEfeso, nokuna vanotenda munaKristu Jesu:" 
Ephesians1:2 Nyasha ngadzive nemi, norugare runobva kunaMwari, Baba vedu, naShe Jesu Kristu." 
Ephesians1:3 Ngaavongwe Mwari naBaba vaShe wedu Jesu Kristu, wakatiropafadza nokuropafadza kose koMweya, kudenga munaKristu," 
Ephesians1:4 sezvaakatisanangura maari nyika isati yavambwa, kuti tive vatsvene vasinemhosva pamberi pake murudo;" 
Ephesians1:5 akatitemera kare, kuti naJesu Kristu tiitwe vanakomana vake, sezvaakafadzwa pakuda kwake," 
Ephesians1:6 kuti kunaka kukuru kwenyasha dzake dzaakangotipa hake muMudikamwa wake, kurumbidzwe;" 
Ephesians1:7 uyo watine dzikinuro maari neropa rake, iko kukangamwirwa kokudarika kwedu, nokuwanda kwenyasha dzake;" 
Ephesians1:8 dzaakawanza kwatiri nokuchenjera kose nokuziva; 
Ephesians1:9 akatizivisa zvakavanzika zvokuda kwake, sezvaakafadzwa pakufunga kwake maari;" 
Ephesians1:10 kuti afambise kuzara kwenguva, avunganidze munaKristu zvose zviri kudenga, nezviri pasi." 
Ephesians1:11 munaiye, watakaitwavo nhaka maari, yatakatemerwa kare nokuraira kwaiye, unoita zvose nokufunga kokuda kwake;" 
Ephesians1:12 kuti tirumbidze kubwinya kwake, isu takatarira kare kunaKristu;" 
Ephesians1:13 munaiye, nemivo, makanzwa shoko rechokwadi maari, iyo evhangeri yokuponeswa kwenyu; munaiye, wamakatenda kwaari, mukaisirwa chisimbiso noMweya Mutsvene wamakapikirwa;" 
Ephesians1:14 uri rubatso rwenhaka yedu, kuratidza kudzikinurwa kwavanhu vaMwari chaivo, kuti kubwinya kwake kurumbidzwe." 
Ephesians1:15 Saka nenivo, ndakati ndanzwa kutenda munaShe Jesu kuri pakati penyu, norudo kuvatsvene vose," 
Ephesians1:16 handiregi kuvonga pamusoro penyu, ndichikurangarirai paminyengetero yangu;" 
Ephesians1:17 kuti Mwari waShe wedu Jesu Kristu, Baba vokubwinya kukuru, akupei mweya wokuchenjera nowokuzarurirwa pakumuziva;" 
Ephesians1:18 Mavhenekerwa meso omoyo wenyu kuti muzive kuti kudana kwake kunetariro yei, nefuma yokubwinya kwenhaka yake pakati pavatsvene." 
Ephesians1:19 novukuru bwakapfuvurisa bwesimba rake kwatiri isu tinotenda, nokubata kwesimba rake guru," 
Ephesians1:20 raakabata munaKristu, achimumutsa kuvakafa, nokumugarisa kurudyi rwake kudenga.," 
Ephesians1:21 kumusoro-soro kwavabati vose, novukuru, nesimba, novushe, namazita ose anorebwa, pasati pari panyika ino bedzi, asi paneinozovuyavo;" 
Ephesians1:22 akaisa zvose pasi petsoka dzake, akapa kereke iye, kuti ave musoro wazvose," 
Ephesians1:23 ndiwo muviri wake, kuzara kwaiye unozadzisa zvose munavose." 
Ephesians2:1 Wakakuraramisai imi, makanga makafa mukudarika kwenyu nomuzvivi zvenyu," 
Ephesians2:2 izvo zvamaifamba mukati mazvo kare, netsika dzenyika ino, nenzira dzomuchinda wesimba redenga, dzomweya unobata zvino muvana vokusateerera;" 
Ephesians2:3 vataifamba tose pakati pavo kare, mukuchiva kwenyama yedu, tichiita kuda kwenyama nokokufunga kwedu, napakuzvarwa kwedu isu navamwe vose taiva vana vokutsamwirwa." 
Ephesians2:4 Zvino Mwari unenyasha zhinji-zhinji, nokuda korudo rwake rukuru, rwaakatida narwo," 
Ephesians2:5 kunyange takanga takafa mukudarika kwedu, wakatiraramisa pamwe chete naKristu (makaponeswa nenyasha;" 
Ephesians2:6 akatimutsa pamwe naye, akatigarisa kudenga pamwe chete naye, munaKristu Jesu;." 
Ephesians2:7 kuti nenguva dzinovuya aratidze fuma huru huru yenyasha dzake pavunyoro bwake kwatiri munaKristu Jesu; 
Ephesians2:8 nokuti makaponeswa nenyasha, nokutenda; izvo zvisingabvi kwamuri, asi chipo chaMwari;" 
Ephesians2:9 hazvibvi pamabasa, kuti kurege kuva nomunhu unozvikudza." 
Ephesians2:10 Nokuti tiri basa rake, takasikwa kuti munaKristu Jesu tiite mabasa akanaka, akagadzirwa kare naMwari kuti tifambe maari." 
Ephesians2:11 Naizvozvo rangarirai, kuti imwi vahedheni munyama, mainzi vasina kudzingiswa naivo vanonzi vokudzingiswa, kuri munyama, kunoitwa namavoko;" 
Ephesians2:12 kuti nenguva iyo makanga musina Kristu, muri vatorwa pavushe bwavaIsraeri, muri vaeni pasungano dzechipikirwa musina tariro, musina Mwari panyika." 
Ephesians2:13 Asi zvino munaKristu Jesu imi, makanga muri kure kare, makaswededzwa muropa raKristu." 
Ephesians2:14 Nokuti ndiye rugare rwedu, iye wakaita zvinhu zviviri kuti chive chinhu chimwe, akaputsa rusvingo rwapakati rwokuparadzanisa;" 
Ephesians2:15 zvaakaparadza munyama yake kuvengana, iwo murairo wezvakarairwa pazvirevo; kuti asike ava vaviri vave munhu mutsva maari, aite rugare saizvozvo;" 
Ephesians2:16 kuti mumuchinjikwa ayananisezve vose vaviri, vave muviri mumwe kunaMwari, zvaakavuraya kuvengana naiwo muchinjikwa;" 
Ephesians2:17 akasvika, akaparidza rugare kwamuri, imwi maiva kure, norugare kunaivo vaiva pedo;" 
Ephesians2:18 nokuti isu tose tinopinda naiye noMweya mumwe kunaBaba. 
Ephesians2:19 Naizvozvo, hamuzati muchiri vaeni navatorwa, asi vobwo pamwe chete navatsvene, naveimba yaMwari." 
Ephesians2:20 Makavakwa pamusoro penheyo dzavapositora navaporofita, Kristu Jesu amene ari ibwe rapakona." 
Ephesians2:21 Maari imba yose yakasonganiswa ichikura kuti ive tembere tsvene munaMwari. 
Ephesians2:22 Maari nemivo makavakwa pamwe chete, kuti muve vugaro bwaMwari muMweya." 
Ephesians3:1 Nemhaka iyi, ini Pauro, ndiri musungwa waKristu Jesu nokuda kwenyu, imwi vahedheni," 
Ephesians3:2 kana makanzwa henyu kugoverwa kwenyasha dzaMwari dzandakapiwa pamusoro penyu; 
Ephesians3:3 kuti zvakanga zvakavanzika zvakandiziviswa pakuzarurirwa, sezvandakambokunyorerai namashoko mashoma;" 
Ephesians3:4 kana muchirava iwo, mungavona kuziva kwangu zvakavanzika zvaKristu;" 
Ephesians3:5 zvakanga zvisina kuziviswa vanakomana vavanhu panedzimwe nguva, sezvazvakazarurirwa vapositora vatsvene, navaporofita zvino muMweya;" 
Ephesians3:6 Kuti Vahedheni vave vadyi venhaka pamwe chete nesu, nomuviri mumwe nesu vagovani vechipikirwa chake pamwe chete nesu muna Kristu neevhangeri" 
Ephesians3:7 yandakaitwa mushumiri wayo nechipo chenyasha dzaMwari, chandakapiwa nokubata kwesimba rake." 
Ephesians3:8 Ini, muduku kwazvo kuvatsvene vose, ndakapiwa nyasha idzi, kuti ndiparidzire vahedheni fuma isinganzverwi yaKristu," 
Ephesians3:9 nokuratidza vose kuti kugoverwa kwakadiniko kwezvakavanzika, zvakanga zvakafukidzwa munaMwari, wakasika zvose, naKristu Jesu kubva panguva yokutanga;" 
Ephesians3:10 kuti zvino vabati navanesimba kudenga vaziviswe nekereke kuchenjera kukuru kwaMwari; 
Ephesians3:11 sechirevo chokutanga-tanga chaakatema munaKristu Jesu, Ishe wedu;" 
Ephesians3:12 maari tinokutsunga kwedu nokupinda kwedu tisingatyi, nokutenda kwake." 
Ephesians3:13 Saka ndinokumbira kuti murege kupera moyo nokutambudzika kwangu pamusoro penyu; ndiko kukudzwa kwenyu. 
Ephesians3:14 Nemhaka iyi ndinofugama namabvi angu kunaBaba, vaShe wedu Jesu Kristu" 
Ephesians3:15 avo, rudzi rwose kudenga napanyika runotumidzwa nezita ravo," 
Ephesians3:16 kuti vakupei pafuma yokubwinya kwavo kukuru, simba kuti musimbiswe noMweya wavo mumunhu womukati;" 
Ephesians3:17 kuti Kristu agare pamoyo yenyu nokutenda; kuti imi, munemidzi yenyu nenheyo dzenyu murudo;" 
Ephesians3:18 muve nesimba rokunzwisisa pamwe chete navatsvene vose, kuti kufara, nokureba, nokukwirira, nokudzika kwakadiniko," 
Ephesians3:19 nokuziva rudo rwaKristu, runopfuvura kuziva, kuti muzadziswe nokuzara kose kwaMwari." 
Ephesians3:20 Zvino, iye unesimba rokuita zvikuru kwazvo zvinopfuvura zvose zvatinokumbira kana zvatinofunga, nesimba rinobata mukati medu," 
Ephesians3:21 ngaave nokubwinya mukereke munaKristu Jesu, kusvikira kumarudzi ose nokusingaperi-peri, Ameni." 
Ephesians4:1 Naizvozvo ini musungwa munaShe, ndinokumbira zvikuru kuti mufambe zvakafanira kudamwa kwamakadamwa nako," 
Ephesians4:2 nokuzvininipisa kose novunyoro, nomoyo murefu, muchiitirana moyo murefu murudo;" 
Ephesians4:3 muchishingaira kuchengeta vumwe bwoMweya muchisungo chorugare. 
Ephesians4:4 Kuno muviri mumwe, noMweya mumwe, sezvamakadamwavo mutariro imwe yokudamwa kwenyu;" 
Ephesians4:5 Ishe mumwe, nokutenda kumwe, norubhabhatidzo rumwe," 
Ephesians4:6 naMwari mumwe, naBaba vavose, uri pamusoro pavose, unobata navose, uri mukati menyu mose." 
Ephesians4:7 Asi mumwe nomumwe wedu wakapiwa nyasha nechiyero chechipo chaKristu. 
Ephesians4:8 Naizvozvo unoti: Wakakwira kumusoro akatapa vatapwa, Akapa vanhu zvipo," 
Ephesians4:9 (Zvino kuti: Wakakwira, chinyiko, asi kuti, wakaburuka pakutangavo kumativi ari pasi panyika?" 
Ephesians4:10 Wakaburuka ndiye wakakwiravo kumusoro-soro kwedenga rose, kuti azadzise zvose.)" 
Ephesians4:11 Zvino wakapa vamwe kuti vave vapositora, vamwe vaporofita, vamwe vaevhangeri, vamwe vafudzi navadzidzisi;" 
Ephesians4:12 kuti vatsvene vakwanisirwe basa ravo rokushumira, nerokuvaka muviri waKristu;" 
Ephesians4:13 kudzimana isu tose tisvike pavumwe bwokutenda nokuziva Mwanakomana waMwari, napamunhu wakura, napachiyero chovukuru bwokuzara kwaKristu;" 
Ephesians4:14 kuti tirege kuramba tichingova vacheche, tichizununguswa nokudzingwa nemhepo ipi neipi yokudzidzisa nokunyengera kwavanhu, namano, kuti vatsause nokunyengera;" 
Ephesians4:15 asi tireve chokwadi murudo, tigokura maari pazvose, iye Kristu, Musoro;" 
Ephesians4:16 muviri wose wakasonganiswa zvakanaka maari nokubatanidzwa nenhengo dzose dzino simbisa, mutezo mumwe nomumwe uchibata nechiyero chawo, kuti muviri ukuriswe pakuvakwa kwawo murudo." 
Ephesians4:17 Naizvozvo ndinoreva nokupupura chinhu ichi munaShe, ndichiti, musafamba savamwe vahedheni, vanofambavo novupenzi bwokurangarira kwavo," 
Ephesians4:18 vakasvibirwa pakunzwisisa kwavo, vari vatorwa pavupenyu bwaMwari nokuda kokusaziva kuri mukati mavo, nokuda kovukukutu bwomoyo yavo;" 
Ephesians4:19 vakazvipa vasine hanya kuvutere, kuti vabate mabasa ose etsvina nokuchiva." 
Ephesians4:20 Asi imwi hamuna kudzidza Kristu saizvozvo," 
Ephesians4:21 kana ari iye hake wamakanzwa, nokudzidziswa maari, sechiri chokwadi munaJesu:" 
Ephesians4:22 kuti pamufambire wenyu wokutanga mubvise munhu wekare, unovodzwa nokuchiva kokunyengera;" 
Ephesians4:23 muvandudzwe mumweya wokurangarira kwenyu," 
Ephesians4:24 mufuke munhu mutsva, wakasikwa akafanana naMwari pakururama, novutsvene bwechokwadi." 
Ephesians4:25 Naizvozvo bvisai nhema, mutaure chokwadi, mumwe nomumwe kuno wokwake; nokuti tiri mitezo, mumwe womumwe." 
Ephesians4:26 Tsamwai, musingatadzi; zuva ngarirege kuvira muchakatsamwa;" 
Ephesians4:27 musapa Dhiabhorosi nzvimbo. 
Ephesians4:28 Wakaba, ngaarege kuba zve; asi zvirinani kuti atambudzike, abate namavoko ake basa rakanaka, kuti ave nechaangapa unoshaiwa." 
Ephesians4:29 Mumuromo wenyu murege kubuda shoko rakavora, asi rakanaka, ringasimbisa pakafanira, rivigire nyasha avo vanonzwa." 
Ephesians4:30 Regai kuchemedza Mweya Mutsvene waMwari, wamakaisirwa chisimbiso maari kusvikira pazuva rokudzikinurwa." 
Ephesians4:31 Shungu dzose, nokutsamwa, nehasha, nokupopota, nokutuka, nezvakaipa zvose, ngazvibviswe kwamuri;" 
Ephesians4:32 muitirane moyo munyoro, munzwirane tsitsi, mukangamwirane, se zvamakakangamwirwa naMwari." 
Ephesians5:1 Naizvozvo ivai vateveri vaMwari savana vanodikamwa; 
Ephesians5:2 fambai murudo, Kristu sezvaakakudaivo, akazvipa nokuda kwedu, kuti ave chipo nechibayiro kunaMwari, zviite bwema bwunonhuhwira." 
Ephesians5:3 Asi vupombwe, netsvina yose, kana kuchiva, ngazvirege kurebwa pakati penyu, sezvinofanira vatsvene;" 
Ephesians5:4 nezvakaipa, nokutaura zvovupenzi, nokunemera, izvo zvisina kufanira; asi zvirinani kuvonga." 
Ephesians5:5 Nokuti munoziva kwazvo, kuti hakune mhombwe, kana munhu unetsvina, kana unochiva, ndiye unonamata zvifananidzo, ungadya nhaka muvushe bwaKristu nobwaMwari." 
Ephesians5:6 Ngakurege kuva nomunhu unokunyengerai namashoko asinamaturo; nokuti nemhaka yezvinhu izvi kutsamwa kwaMwari kunovuya pamusoro pavanakomana vokusateerera. 
Ephesians5:7 Naizvozvo regai kushamwaridzana navo; 
Ephesians5:8 nokuti kare maiva rima, asi zvino muri chiedza munaShe; fambai savana vechiedza." 
Ephesians5:9 (Nokuti chibereko chemweya chiri mukunaka kose, nokururama, nechokwadi)," 
Ephesians5:10 muchiidza kuti ndezvipi zvinofadza Ishe. 
Ephesians5:11 Regai kuyanana namabasa erima asi nezvibereko, asi zvirinani kuti muraire;" 
Ephesians5:12 nokuti izvo, zvinoitwa navo pakavanda, zvinonyadza kana zvichirebwa." 
Ephesians5:13 Asi zvinhu zvose, kana zvarairwa, zvinoratidzwa nechiedza; nokuti zvose, zvinoratidzwa, chava chiedza." 
Ephesians5:14 Saka iye unoti: Muka iwe uvete, muka kuvakafa, Kristu uchakuvhenekera." 
Ephesians5:15 Naizvozvo chenjerai kwazvo pakufamba kwenyu, kuti murege kufamba savasina kuchenjera asi savakachenjera;" 
Ephesians5:16 mungwarire nguva yenyu, nokuti mazuva akaipa." 
Ephesians5:17 Saka musava mapenzi, asi muzive kuda kwaShe." 
Ephesians5:18 Regai kubatwa newaini, nokuti ndipo pano kusazvidzora, asi muzadzwe noMweya;" 
Ephesians5:19 mutaurirane pakati penyu namapisarema, nenziyo, nezviimbo zvoMweya, muimbire, muridzire Ishe mumoyo yenyu;" 
Ephesians5:20 muchivonga Mwari, Baba, nguva dzose pamusoro pezvinhu zvose, muzita raShe wedu, Jesu Kristu;" 
Ephesians5:21 muchizviisa mumwe pasi pomumwe, muchitya Mwari." 
Ephesians5:22 imwi vakadzi, muzviise pasi pavarume venyu chaivo, sezvamunoita kunaShe." 
Ephesians5:23 Nokuti murume musoro womukadzi, saKristuvo musoro wekereke; iye amene ndiye muponesi womuviri." 
Ephesians5:24 Asi kereke sezvairi pasi paKristu, vakadzi ngavadaro pazvinhu zvose kuvarume vavo." 
Ephesians5:25 imwi varume, idai vakadzi venyu, Kristu sezvaakadavo kereke, akazvipa nokuda kwayo;" 
Ephesians5:26 kuti aiite tsvene achiinatsa nokushambidza kwemvura pashoko," 
Ephesians5:27 kuti azviisire pamberi pake kereke, inobwinya, isinegwapa, kana kuwonyana, kana chinhu chakadai; asi ive tsvene, isinemhosva." 
Ephesians5:28 Saizvozvovo varume vanofanira kuda vakadzi vavo semiviri yavo. Unoda mukadzi wake, unozvida;" 
Ephesians5:29 nokuti hakuno munhu wakatongovenga nyama yake; asi unoipa zvokudya nokuichengeta, Kristu sezvaanoitira kereke;" 
Ephesians5:30 nokuti isu tiri mitezo yomuviri wake, yenyama yake neyamafupa ake." 
Ephesians5:31 Naizvozvo munhu uchasiya baba vake namai vake, anamatire mukadzi wake; ivavo vaviri vachava nyama imwe." 
Ephesians5:32 Chakavanzika ichi, chikuru, asi ndinotaura zvaKristu nezvekereke." 
Ephesians5:33 Asi imivo, mumwe nomumwe ngaade mukadzi wake sezvaanozvida iye; nomukadzi ngaatye murume wake." 
Ephesians6:1 imwi vana, teererai vabereki venyu munaShe; nokuti ndizvo zvakarurama." 
Ephesians6:2 Kudza baba vako namai ndiwo murairo wokutanga unechipikirwa 
Ephesians6:3 kuti uitirwe zvakanaka, ugare nguva refu panyika." 
Ephesians6:4 nemwi madzibaba, regai kutsamwisa vana venyu; asi varerei pakuranga nokuraira kwaShe." 
Ephesians6:5 imwi varanda, teererai avo vari vatenzi venyu panyama, nokutya nokudedera, nemoyo yakarurama, muchizviita sokunaKristu;" 
Ephesians6:6 musingabati kana muchivonekwa bedzi, savafudzi vavanhu, asi savaranda vaKristu, vanoita kuda kwaMwari nomoyo wose;" 
Ephesians6:7 muchibata nomoyo wakanaka, muchizviita sokunaShe, musingaitiri vanhu;" 
Ephesians6:8 muchiziva kuti chinhu chipi nechipi chakanaka, chinoitwa nomunhu mumwe nomumwe, uchachipiwa zve naShe, kana akasungwa kana akasununguka." 
Ephesians6:9 nemwi madzishe, muvaitire saizvozvo, murege kuvatyisa; nokuti munoziva kuti Ishe wavo nowenyu uri kudenga; haatendi zvinovonekwa zvomunhu." 
Ephesians6:10 Pakupedzisira hama dzangu,ivai nesimba munaShe, nomusimba rake guru." 
Ephesians6:11 Shongai nhumbi dzose dzokurwa nadzo dzaMwari, mugone kumira muchirwa namano aDhiabhorosi." 
Ephesians6:12 Nokuti hatirwi nenyama neropa, asi navabati, navanesimba, namadzishe enyika erima rino, nemweya yakaipa yedenga." 
Ephesians6:13 Saka torai nhumbi dzose dzokurwa nadzo dzaMwari, kuti mugone kudzivisa pazuva rakaipa, nokuramba mumire mapedza zvose." 
Ephesians6:14 Naizvozvo mirai makasunga zvivuno zvenyu nechokwadi, makapfeka chidzitiro chechifuva chokururama," 
Ephesians6:15 makasunga patsoka dzenyu kugadzirwa kweevhangeri yorugare; 
Ephesians6:16 pamusoro paizvozvi makatora nhovo huru yokutenda, yamungagona kudzima nayo miseve yose yomoto yowakaipa." 
Ephesians6:17 Torai ngowani yoruponeso, nomunondo woMweya, iro Shoko raMwari;" 
Ephesians6:18 munyengetere nguva dzose nokunyengetera kose nokukumbira muMweya, muchirinda pazvinhu izvi nokutsunga kose nokukumbirira vatsvene vose." 
Ephesians6:19 nenivo, kuti ndipiwe shoko kana ndichishamisa muromo wangu, kuti ndidudzire ndisingatyi zvakavanzika zveevhangeri," 
Ephesians6:20 yandiri nhume yayo yakasungwa namatare; kuti ndizvitaure ndisingatyi, sezvandinofanira kutaura." 
Ephesians6:21 Zvino kuti muzivevo zvangu, kuti ndakadiniko, Tikiko, hama inodikamwa, nomushumiri wakatendeka munaShe, uchakuzivisai zvose;" 
Ephesians6:22 ndakamutuma kwamuri neshoko iri, kuti muzive zvinhu zvedu, anyaradze moyo yenyu." 
Ephesians6:23 Rugare ngaruve nehama, norudo pamwe chete nokutenda, zvinobva kunaMwari, Baba,naShe Jesu Kristu," 
Ephesians6:24 Nyasha ngadzive navose vanoda Ishe wedu, Jesu Kristu, norudo rusingavori." 
Philippians1:1 Pauro naTimotio, varanda vaKristu Jesu, kuvatsvene vose munaKristu Jesu, vari paFiripi, navatariri navaranda vekereke:" 
Philippians1:2 Nyasha ngadzive nemi, norugare runobva kunaMwari, baba vedu, naShe Jesu Kristu." 
Philippians1:3 Ndinovonga Mwari wangu nguva imwe neimwe kana ndichikurangarirai," 
Philippians1:4 ndichikumbira nomufaro nguva dzose pakukumbira kwangu kose, pamusoro penyu mose" 
Philippians1:5 nokuda kokusongana kwenyu paevhangeri kubva pazuva rokutanga kusvikira zvino; 
Philippians1:6 ndichiziva chinhu ichi, kuti iye wakatanga basa rakanaka mukati menyu, ucharipedzisa kusvikira pazuva raKristu Jesu;" 
Philippians1:7 sezvazvakanaka kwandiri kuti ndifunge saizvozvo pamusoro penyu mose, zvandinokurangarirai mumoyo mangu, nokuti pakusungwa kwangu napakutavirira nokusimbisa evhangeri, imwi makagoverwa nyasha pamwe chete neni." 
Philippians1:8 Nokuti Mwari chapupu changu kuti ndinokushuvai mose zvikuru netsitsi dzaKristu Jesu. 
Philippians1:9 Ndizvo zvandinonyengetera, kuti rudo rwenyu rurambe ruchingowanda pakunzva nokunzwisisa kose;" 
Philippians1:10 kuti muidze muzive kuti zvinhu zvakanaka ndezvipi, kuti muve vakarurama, navasine mhosva, kusvikira pazuva raKristu;" 
Philippians1:11 muzere nechibereko chokururama, chinovuya naJesu Kristu, kuti Mwari ave nokubwinya nokurumbidzwa." 
Philippians1:12 Zvino ndinoda kuti muzive, hama dzangu, kuti izvo zvakandiwira zvakatofambisa evhangeri;" 
Philippians1:13 nokudaro kuti kusungwa kwangu kwakazikamwa muimba yashe yose, nokuna vamwe vose kuti kuri munaKristu." 
Philippians1:14 Nehama zhinji munaShe, dzakasimbiswa nokusungwa kwangu, vonyanya kutsunga kuparidza shoko raMwari vasingatyi." 
Philippians1:15 Vamwe havo vanoparidza Kristu negodo negakava, vamwe nomoyo wakanaka;" 
Philippians1:16 mumwe unoparidza Kristu nenharo, asingaiti nomoyo wakachena, vachiti vawedzere nhamo pakusungwa kwangu." 
Philippians1:17 Vamwe havo vanoita norudo, vachiziva kuti ndakagadzwa kuti nditavirire evhangeri." 
Philippians1:18 Zvisinei hazvo? asi kuti Kristu unoparidzwa hake nenzira dzose, kana namanomano, kana nechokwadi; ndinofara nazvo, uye ndichasifara hangu nazvo." 
Philippians1:19 Nokuti ndinoziva kuti nokuda kokukumbira kwenyu nokusimbiswa koMweya waJesu Kristu, izvozvi zvichava kuponeswa kwangu," 
Philippians1:20 zvandinotarira zvikuru netariro, kuti handinganyadziswi pachinhu chimwe asi kuti zvino, sapanguva dzose, nokusatya kwangu kose Kristu uchakudzwa mumuviri wangu, kana novupenyu, kana nokufa." 
Philippians1:21 Nokuti kwandiri kurarama ndiKristu, kufa kufuma." 
Philippians1:22 Zvino kana ndichirarama panyama, izvo zvichandipa zvibereko zvokubata kwangu; handizivi chandichasanangura;" 
Philippians1:23 zvino ndinomanikidzwa nezvinhu zviviri: ndinoda kubva, kuti ndive naKristu, nokuti ndizvo zvinopfuvura nokunaka;" 
Philippians1:24 asi nokuda kwenyu zvakanaka kuti ndigare panyama. 
Philippians1:25 Zvino ndichitenda chinhu ichi, ndinoziva kuti ndichagara, ndicharamba ndigere nemwi mose, kuti mupfuvurire mberi, mufare pakutenda;" 
Philippians1:26 kuti muzvirumbidze zvikuru munaKristu Jesu pamusoro pangu nokuda kokudzokera kwangu kwamuri. 
Philippians1:27 Asi fambaichetezvakafanira evhangeri yaKristu; kuti kunyange ndikavuya ndikakuvonai, kunyange ndisipo, ndinzwe pamusoro penyu kuti mumire nesimba nomweya mumwe, nomoyo mumwe, muchirwira kutenda kweevhangeri;" 
Philippians1:28 musingatyiswi pachinhu chimwe navanorwa nemi. Ndizvo zvichava chiratidzo chokuparadzwa kwavari, asi kwamuri chokuponeswa; chinhu ichi chinobva kunaMwari." 
Philippians1:29 Nokuti nokuda kwaKristu imwi makatenderwa kuti murege kutenda kwaari bedzi, asi kuti mutambudzike vo nokuda kwake;" 
Philippians1:30 imwi muchirwa vo nokurwa uku kwamakavona kwandiri, kwamunonzwa kuti ndinorwa nazvino." 
Philippians2:1 Zvino kana kuvaraidzwa kuripo kunaKristu, kana kunyaradza korudo, kana kuyanana koMweya, kana mumoyo nokunzwira tsitsi," 
Philippians2:2 zadzisai mufaro wangu, muve nokufunga kumwe, muchiva norudo rumwe, nomweya mumwe, nendangariro imwe," 
Philippians2:3 musingaiti chinhu nenharo, kana nokuzvikudza, asi mumwe nomumwe ngaati nomoyo unozvininipisa, vamwe vanomupfuvura iye pakunaka;" 
Philippians2:4 mumwe nomumwe ngaarege kutarira zvake, asi ngaatarire zvavamwe vo." 
Philippians2:5 Ivai nomoyo uyo, wakanga uri munaKristu Jesu vo;" 
Philippians2:6 iye, kunyange akanga akafanana naMwari, haana kuti kuenzana naMwari ndechinhu chinofanira kubatisiswa;" 
Philippians2:7 asi wakazviita usina maturo, akazvitorera chimiro chomuranda, akaitwa nomufananidzo womunhu." 
Philippians2:8 akati awanikwa anomufananidzo womunhu, akazvininipisa, akateerera kusvikira parufu, irwo rufu rwomuchinjikwa." 
Philippians2:9 Saka Mwari wakamukudza zvikuru, akamupa zita rinopfuvura mazita ose;" 
Philippians2:10 kuti muzita raJesu mabvi ose afugame, ezviri kudenga nezviri panyika, nezviri pasi penyika," 
Philippians2:11 kuti ndimi dzose dzibvumire dziti, Jesu Kristu ndiyeShe, kuti Mwari, baba, arumbidzwe." 
Philippians2:12 Naizvozvo, vadikamwa vangu, sezvamakateerera nguva dzose, ndisati ndiripo, pedzisai kuponeswa kwenyu nokutya nokudedera;" 
Philippians2:13 nokuti ndiMwari unobata mukati menyu, kuti mude uye muite kuda kwake kwakanaka." 
Philippians2:14 Itai zvose musinganyunyuti, musinenharo;" 
Philippians2:15 kuti muve vanhu vasina chavangapomerwa, navasina kusarurama, vana vaMwari vasine mhosva pakati porudzi rwakakombama, rwakatsauka, rwamunopenya pakati parwo semwenje panyika;" 
Philippians2:16 makabatisisa shoko rovupenyu; kuti ndive nechandinga zvirumbidza nacho nezuva raKristu, ndizive kuti handina kumhanya pasina, kana kubata pasina." 
Philippians2:17 Kunyange ndikadururwa pamusoro pechibayiro nebasa rokutenda kwenyu, ndinofara nokufarisisa nemwi mose." 
Philippians2:18 Nokuda kwaizvozvo nemwi vo mufare nokufarisisa neni. 
Philippians2:19 MunaShe Jesu ndinoti ndichakurumidza kutuma Timotio kwamuri, kuti neni ndifare kana ndanzwa zvenyu." 
Philippians2:20 Nokuti handino mumwe munhu unomoyo wakaita sowake, uchava nehanya kwazvo nezvenyu." 
Philippians2:21 Nokuti vose vanozvitsvakira zvavo, zvisati zviri zvaKristu Jesu." 
Philippians2:22 Asi munoziva kutendeka kwake, kuti akabata pamwe chete neni paEvangeri, somwana unobatira baba vake." 
Philippians2:23 Zvino ndiye wandinoti ndichatuma kwamuri pakarepo, kana ndavona kuti zvangu zvakadini;" 
Philippians2:24 asi ndinotenda munaShe kuti neni vo ndimene ndichakurumidza kuvuya. 
Philippians2:25 Asi ndakati ndinofanira kutuma kwamuri Epafrodito, hama yangu, nomubatsiri wangu pamabasa napakurwa, nhume yenyu nomushumiri wangu pakushaiwa kwangu;" 
Philippians2:26 zvaakanga achikushuvai zvikuru imwi mose, akatambudzika kwazvo, nokuti imwi makanga manzwa kuti unorwara." 
Philippians2:27 Nokuti wakanga achirwara kwazvo, ari pedo nokufa; asi Mwari wakamunzwira tsitsi; asati ari iye bedzi, asi neni vo, kuti ini ndirege kuwedzerwa nhamo pamusoro penhamo." 
Philippians2:28 Naizvozvo ndakashingaira kumutuma kwamuri, kuti mumuvone, mufarezve, neni ndirege kuva nenhamo." 
Philippians2:29 Naizvozvo mumugamuchirei munaShe nomufaro wose, uye mukudze vakadai;" 
Philippians2:30 nokuti nokuda kwebasa raKristu wakanga oda kufa, akasarangarira vupenyu bwake, achida kukwanisa pamakanga musingagoni kundishumira imi." 
Philippians3:1 Pakupedzisira, hama dzangu, farai munaShe. Ini handinetswi nokukunyorerai zve zvinhu zviya, asi zvinokusimbisai imi." 
Philippians3:2 Ityai imbwa, ityai vabati vakaipa, ityai vokucheka;" 
Philippians3:3 nokuti isu tiri vokudzingiswa, tinonamata Mwari muMweya, tinozvirumbidza munaKristu Jesu, tisingavimbi nenyama," 
Philippians3:4 kunyange ini hangu ndingavimba nenyama; kana kunomumwe munhu unoti ndinovimba nenyama, zvikuru ini." 
Philippians3:5 Ndakadzingiswa nomusi worusere, ndiri worudzi rwavaIsraeri veimba yaBenjamini, muHebheru wavaHebheru; pamurairo ndiri muFarisi;" 
Philippians3:6 pakushingaira kwangu, ndaitambudza kereke; pakururama kunorebwa nomurairo ndakanga ndisina chandingapomerwa." 
Philippians3:7 Asi izvozvo, zvaiva fuma kwandiri, ndakati ndiko kurashikirwa hako nokuda kwaKristu." 
Philippians3:8 Hongu, zvirokwazvo, ndinototi zvinhu zvose kurashikirwa hako nokuda kokunaka kokuziva Kristu Jesu, Ishe wangu,wandakarashikirwa nezvinhu zvose nokuda kwake, ndikazviidza marara, kuti ndiwane Kristu;" 
Philippians3:9 ndiwanikwe maari, ndisina kururama kwangu kuri komurairo, asi kuri kokutenda kunaKristu, ndiko kururama kunobva kunaMwari nenzira yokutenda" 
Philippians3:10 kuti ndimuzive iye, nesimba rokumuka kwake, nokusongana naye pamatambudziko ake, ndifanane naye pakufa kwake;" 
Philippians3:11 kuti zvimwe ndisvike pakumuka kwavakafa. 
Philippians3:12 Handiti ndatochiwana, kana ndatokwaniswa, asi ndinoshingairira 'ko, kuti zvimwe ndichibate, icho Kristu Jesu chaakambondibatira." 
Philippians3:13 Hama dzangu, ini handiti ndatochibata, asi ndinoita chinhu chimwe: ndinokangamwa zviri shure, ndichinanavira kunezviri mberi." 
Philippians3:14 ndinoshingairira kunharidzano, kuti ndipiwe mubairo wokudana kwaMwari kunobva kudenga, munaKristu Jesu." 
Philippians3:15 Naizvozvo isu tose, takakwana, ngative nomoyo wakadaro; kana imwi muno mumwe moyo, Mwari uchakuratidzai naizvozvo vo." 
Philippians3:16 Asi, apo patasvika ngatirambe tichifambachetenomurairo iwoyu tifunge chinhu chimwe." 
Philippians3:17 Hama dzangu, ivai vateveri vangu mose; natsai kutarira avo vanofamba saizvozvo sezvatakakutungamirirai su." 
Philippians3:18 Nokuti vazhinji, vandakakuvudzai kazhinji, nazvino ndinokuvudzai vo nokuchema, vanofamba vari vavengi vomuchinjikwa waKristu;" 
Philippians3:19 kuguma kwavo ndiko kuparadzwa, mwari wavo idumbu ravo, vanozvirumbidza pamusoro pezvinonyadzisa zvavo, vanofunga zvenyika." 
Philippians3:20 Nokuti nyika yedu iri kudenga, uko kwatakatarira kuvuya koMuponesi Ishe Jesu Kristu;" 
Philippians3:21 uyo uchavandudza muviri wokuninipiswa kwedu, kuti ufanane nomuviri wokubwinya kwake, nesimba iro raanogona vo naro kuzviisira zvose pasi pake." 
Philippians4:1 Naizvozvo, hama dzangu, vadikamwa vandinoshuva kwazvo, mufaro wangu, nekorona yangu, mirai nesimba saizvozvo munaShe, vadikamwa." 
Philippians4:2 Ndinokumbira zvikuru Yuodia, ndinokumbira zvikuru Sindike, kuti vave nomoyo mumwe munaShe." 
Philippians4:3 Hongu, newe vo, shamwari yangu yechokwadi pabasa, ndinokumbira kwauri kuti ubatsire vanhukadzi ava, nokuti vakabatirana neni paevhangeri, pamwe chete naKiremenzi, navamwe vakabata pamwe chete neni, mazita avo ari mubhuku yovupenyu." 
Philippians4:4 Farai munaShe nguva dzose; ndichapamhidza zve: Farai. 
Philippians4:5 Vunyoro bwenyu ngabwuzikamwe navanhu vose. Ishe uri pedo. 
Philippians4:6 Musafunganya pamusoro pechinhu chimwe; asi pazvinhu zvose, mikumbiro yenyu ngaiziviswe Mwari nokunyengetera nokukumbira, pamwe chete nokuvonga." 
Philippians4:7 Zvino rugare rwaMwari runopfuvura kunzwisisa kose, rucharinda moyo yenyu nemifungo yenyu munaKristu Jesu." 
Philippians4:8 Pakupedzisira, hama dzangu, zvose zvechokwadi, zvose zvinokudzwa, zvose zvakarurama, zvose zvakachena, zvose zvinodikamwa, zvose zvinorumbidzwa, kana kunaka kupi nokupi, kana chingarumbidzwa chipi nechipi, fungisisai izvozvo." 
Philippians4:9 Zvinhu izvo zvamakadzidza, nezvamakapiwa, nezvamakanzwa, nezvamakavona kwandiri, itai izvozvo; Mwari worugare ngaave nemi." 
Philippians4:10 Ndakafara zvikuru munaShe, nokuti zvino makapepukazve mukandirangarira; makanga marangarira henyu, asi makashaiwa nguva." 
Philippians4:11 Handirevi izvozvi nokuti ndinoshaiwa, nokuti ini ndakadzidza kutenda nezvose zvandinazvo." 
Philippians4:12 Ndinoziva vurombo, ndinozivavo kuva nezvakawanda; pachinhu chipi nechipi napazvinhu zvose ndakadzidziswa kuti ndizive kuguta nokunzwa nzara, kuva nezvizhinji nokushaiwa." 
Philippians4:13 Ndingaita zvinhu zvose naKristu unondisimbisa. 
Philippians4:14 Kunyange zvakadaro, makaita zvakanaka zvamakasongana neni pakutambudzika kwangu." 
Philippians4:15 Munoziva vo, imwi vaFiripi, kuti pakutanga kweevhangeri, ndichibva Makedhonia, pakanga pasinekereke imwe yakasongana neni pashoko rokupa nokugamuchira, asi imwi moga;" 
Philippians4:16 nokuti napaTesaronika makanditumira kamwe, norwechipiri zve, pakushaiwa kwangu." 
Philippians4:17 Handirevi kudaro kuti nditsvake chipo, asi ndinotsvaka chibereko chamunozofumiswa nacho." 
Philippians4:18 Zvino ndava nezvose, ndafumiswa; ndaguta, ndagamuchira kunaEpafrodito izvo, zvinobva kwamuri, zvakaita sobwema bwunonhuhwira, nechibayiro chakafanira, chinofadza Mwari." 
Philippians4:19 Zvino Mwari wangu uchazadzisa kushaiwa kwenyu kose pafuma yake, mukubwinya, munaKristu Jesu." 
Philippians4:20 Zvino Mwari, Baba vedu, ngaave nokubwinya nokusingaperi-peri. Ameni." 
Philippians4:21 Ndikwazisirei mutsvene mumwe nomumwe munaKristu Jesu. Hama dzineni dzinokukwazisai. 
Philippians4:22 Vatsvene vose vanokukwazisai, zvikuru avo veimba yaKesari." 
Philippians4:23 Nyasha dzaShe wedu Jesu Kristu ngadzive nemwi mose. Amen. 
Colossians1:1 Pauro, muapositora waKristu Jesu nokuda kwaMwari, naTimotio, hama yedu," 
Colossians1:2 kuvatsvene nehama dzakatendeka munaKristu vari paKorose: Nyasha ngadzive nemi, norugare zvinobva kunaMwari, Baba vedu." 
Colossians1:3 Tinovonga Mwari, Baba vaShe wedu Jesu Kristu, nguva dzose kana tichikunyengetererai," 
Colossians1:4 zvatakanzwa zvokutenda kwenyu munaKristu Jesu, norudo rwamunarwo kuvatsvene vose," 
Colossians1:5 pamusoro petariro yamakachengeterwa kudenga, yamakanzwa kare pashoko rechokwadi reevhangeri;" 
Colossians1:6 iyo yakasvika kwamuri, sezvayakasvika panyika yosevo; ichibereka zvibereko, ichikura, sezvainoita kwamurivo, kubvira pazuva ramakanzwa nokuziva kwazvo nyasha dzaMwari muchokwadi;" 
Colossians1:7 sezvamakadzidza kunaEpafrasi, muranda pamwe chete nesu, unodikamwa, mushumiri wakatendeka waKristu nokuda kwenyu," 
Colossians1:8 iye wakativudzavo zvorudo rwenyu muMweya. 
Colossians1:9 Saka nesuvo, kubvira pazuva ratakanzwa, hatiregi kukunyengetererai, nokukumbira kuti muzadziswe nokuziva kwazvo kuda kwake, pakuchenjera nokunzwisisa kose komeya;" 
Colossians1:10 kuti mufambe sezvinofanira Ishe, muchimufadza pazvose, muchibereka zvibereko pamabasa ose akanaka, muchikura pakuziva Mwari kwazvo;" 
Colossians1:11 muchisimbiswa nesimba rose, nesimba rokubwinya kwake, muve nomoyo murefu, nomufaro;" 
Colossians1:12 muvonge Baba, vakatikwanisa kuti tipiwe nhaka yavatsvene muchiedza." 
Colossians1:13 vakatisunungura pasimba rerima, vakatiisa muvushe bwoMwanakomana worudo rwavo;" 
Colossians1:14 watinedzikinuro maari, ndiko kukangamwirwa kwezvivi zvedu." 
Colossians1:15 Ndiye mufananidzo waMwari usingavonekwi, dangwe rezvisikwa zvose;" 
Colossians1:16 nokuti maari zvinhu zvose zvakasikwa, zviri kudenga napanyika, zvinovonekwa nezvisingavonekwi, kana zviri zvigaro zvovushe kana vushe, kana vabati, kana masimba; zvinhu zvose zvakasikwa naye, zviripo nokuda kwake." 
Colossians1:17 Ndiye unotangira zvose, zvose zvakabatana maari." 
Colossians1:18 Ndiye musoro womuviri, ndiyo kereke; ndiye wokutanga, dangwe ravakamuka kuvakafa; kuti iye ave mukuru pazvinhu zvose." 
Colossians1:19 Nokuti Baba vakafara nazvo, kuti kuzara kose kugare maari," 
Colossians1:20 kuti naye ayananise zvinhu zvose kwaari, amboita rugare neropa romuchinjikwa wake; naiye, kunyange zviri panyika, kunyange zviri kudenga." 
Colossians1:21 Nemivo, kare maiva vaeni navavengi pakufunga kwenyu pamabasa enyu akaipa," 
Colossians1:22 asi zino wakakuyananisai pamuviri wenyama yake, nokufa kwake, kuti akuisei pamberi pake muri vatsene, musinemhosa, musingapomerwi," 
Colossians1:23 kana muchingorambira pakutenda, makateyiwa, mumire makasimba, musingabviswi patariro yeevhangeri yamakanzwa, yakaparidzirwa zvisikwa zvose pasi pokudenga; iyo evhangeri yandakaitwa mushumiri wayo, ini Pauro." 
Colossians1:24 Zvino ndinofara pakutambudzika kwangu nokuda kwenyu, ndichizadzisa panyama yangu zvakasara pamatambudziko aKristu, nokuda komuviri wake, iyo kereke;" 
Colossians1:25 iyo yandakaitwa mushumiri wayo sezvandakagoverwa naMwari pamusoro penyu, kuti ndizadzise shoko raMwari;" 
Colossians1:26 ndicho chakavanzika, chakanga chakafukidzwa kubvira pakutanga kwenguva nendudzi, asi zvino chakaratidzwa vatsvene vake;" 
Colossians1:27 kunaivo Mwari waakada kuvazivisa vufumi bwokubwinya kwechakavanzika ichochi pakati pavahedheni, chokuti, Kristu mukati menyu, tariro yokubwinya;" 
Colossians1:28 iye watinoparidza isu, tichiraira munhu mumwe nomumwe, tichidzidzisa munhu mumwe nomumwe novuchenjeri bwose, kuti tiise munhu mumwe nomumwe akakwana munaKristu;" 
Colossians1:29 ndizvo zvandinobatiravo, ndichirwa, zvichiitwa nokubata kwake kunobata mukati mangu nesimba." 
Colossians2:1 Nokuti ndinoda kuti muzive kurwa kukuru kwandinako pamusoro penyu, navari paRaodikia, navose vasina kumbovona chiso changu panyama;" 
Colossians2:2 kuti moyo yavo isimbiswe, vasunganidzwe murudo, vave nefuma yose yokunzwisisa kwakakwana, kuti vazive kwazvo chakavanzika chaMwari, iye Kristu;" 
Colossians2:3 maari fuma yose yovuchenjeri nokuziva yakachengetwa. 
Colossians2:4 Ndinoreva izvi, kuti kurege kuva nomunhu unokurashai namashoko anonyengera." 
Colossians2:5 Nokuti kunyange ndisipo panyama, ndiripo nemwi pamweya, ndinofara ndichivona kunzwana kwenyu, nokusimba kokutenda kwenyu munaKristu." 
Colossians2:6 Naizvozvo sezvamakagamuchira Kristu Jesu, Ishe, fambai maari," 
Colossians2:7 munemidzi yenyu nokuvakwa kwenyu maari, makasimbiswa pakutenda, sezvamakadzidziswa, muchinyanya kuvonga." 
Colossians2:8 Chenjerai, kuti murege kutapwa nomunhu novuchenjeri, nokunyengera kusinamaturo, achitevera tsika dzavanhu nezvokuvamba zvenyika, asingateveri Kristu." 
Colossians2:9 Nokuti kuzara kovuMwari kunogara maari pamuviri. 
Colossians2:10 Maari nemivo makazadzwa, iye musoro wa vabativose namasimba;" 
Colossians2:11 iye wamakadzingiswavo maari nokudzingiswa kusingaitwi namavoko, muviri wenyama uchibviswa, nokudzingiswa kuri kwaKristu;;" 
Colossians2:12 maakavigwa pamwe chete naye pakubhabhatidzwa, pamakamutswavo pamwe chete naye nokutenda kwenyu simba raMwari wakamumutsa kuvakafa." 
Colossians2:13 Nemi, imwi makanga makafa pakudarika kwenyu napakusadzingiswa kwenyama yenyu, wakakupai vupenyu pamwe chete naye, akatikangamwira kudarika kwedu kose," 
Colossians2:14 akadzima rugwaro rwakanga ruchirwa nesu pazvirevo zvarwo, ruchipesana nesu; akarubvisa irwo pakati pedu, akarurovera pamuchinjikwa;" 
Colossians2:15 akaparadza vabati namasimba, akavabudisa pachena, akavakunda mauri." 
Colossians2:16 Naizvozvo munhu ngaarege kuvapo unokutongai pazvokudya, kana zvokumwa, kana nokuda komusi womutambo, kana pakugara komwedzi, kana pasabata;" 
Colossians2:17 izvi mumvuri wezvichavuya; asi muviri ndowaKristu. 
Colossians2:18 Munhu ngaarege kuvapo unokutorerai mubairo wenyu namavune, nokuzvininipisa nokunamata vatumwa, achivimba nezvaakavona, achizvikudza pasina nokufunga kwenyama," 
Colossians2:19 asingabatisisi Musoro, uyo, maari muviri wose unosanganiswa nokusunganidzwa nezvisungo namarunda, ndokukura nokukurisa kwaMwari." 
Colossians2:20 Zvino kana makafa pamwe chete naKristu kunezvokuvamba zvenyika, munozviisireiko pasi pemirairo, somugere munyika," 
Colossians2:21 mirairo inoti: Usabata, usaravira, usagunzva," 
Colossians2:22 (izvi zvose zvinofanira kuparadzwa kana zvobatwa nazvo); muchitevera mirairo nedzidziso dzavanhu? 
Colossians2:23 Zvinhu zvakadai zvakaita sezvinovuchenjeri, pakunamata Mwari nokuda kwavo, nokuzvininipisa, nokutambudza muviri; asi hazvina simba rokukunda kuchiva kwenyama." 
Colossians3:1 Naizvozvo, kana makamutswa pamwe chete naKristu, tsvakai zviri kumusoro, uko kunaKristu, ugere kurudyi rwaMwari." 
Colossians3:2 Fungai zviri kumusoro, musafunga zviri pasi." 
Colossians3:3 Nokuti makafa, vupenyu bwenyu bwakavigwa pamwe chete naKristu munaMwari." 
Colossians3:4 Kana Kristu, iye vupenyu bwedu, achivonekwa, nemivo muchavonekwa pamwe chete naye pakubwinya." 
Colossians3:5 Naizvozvo vurayai mitezo yenyu iri panyika, inoti: Vupombwe, netsvina, nokushumba, nokuda zvakaipa, nokuchiva, ndiko kunamata zvifananidzo." 
Colossians3:6 Nokuda kwaizvozvi kutsamwa kwaMwari kunovuya pamusoro pavanavokusateerera; 
Colossians3:7 nemivo maifamba mazviri kare, maigara muzvinhu izvi." 
Colossians3:8 Asi zvino, imivo, bvisai izvi zvose, zvinoti: Hasha, nokutsamwa, nokuvenga, nokutuka, nokutaura zvinonyadzisa nomuromo wenyu." 
Colossians3:9 Regai kureverana nhema, zvamakabvisa munhu wekare, namabasa ake," 
Colossians3:10 mukafuka munhu mutsva, unovandudzwa pakuziva, afanane nowakamusika;" 
Colossians3:11 apo hapana muGiriki nemuJudha, kudzingiswa kana kusadzingiswa, mutorwa kana muSitia, musungwa kana wakasununguka;asi Kristu ndiye zvose, uye uri munavose." 
Colossians3:12 Naizvozvo, savasanangurwa vaMwari, vatsvene navanodikamwa, fukai moyo unetsitsi, nomoyo munyoro, nokusazvikudza, novunyoro, nomoyo murefu;" 
Colossians3:13 muitirane moyo murefu, muchikangamwirana, kana munhu anemhosva nomumwe; Kristu sezvaakakukangamwirai, muite saizvozvo nemivo." 
Colossians3:14 Zvino pamusoro pezvinhu izvi zvose fukai rudo, ndicho chisungo chinokwanisa." 
Colossians3:15 Norugare rwaMwari ngaruteme zvirevo mumoyo yenyu, ndirwo rwamakadanirwavo mumuviri mumwe; ivai nokuvonga." 
Colossians3:16 Shoko raKristu ngarigare mukati menyu riwande; nokuchenjera kose mudzidzisane, nokurairana namapisarema, nenziyo, nezviimbo zvomweya, muimbire Mwari nenyasha mumoyo menyu;" 
Colossians3:17 uye zvose zvamunoita, kana zviri zveshoko kana basa, itai zvose nezita raShe Jesu, muchivonga Mwari Baba naye." 
Colossians3:18 Vakadzi muzviise pasi pavarume venyu, sezvazvakafanira munaShe." 
Colossians3:19 Varume, idai vakadzi venyu, regai kuva nehasha navo." 
Colossians3:20 Vana, teererai vabereki venyu pazvinhu zvose, nokuti ndizvo zvakanaka munaShe." 
Colossians3:21 Madzibaba, regai kunetsa vana venyu, kuti varege kuvora moyo." 
Colossians3:22 Varanda, teererai pazvinhu zvose vatenzi venyu panyama; regai kubata pamberi pameso avo, savafadzi vavanhu, asi nomoyo wakarurama muchitya Mwari." 
Colossians3:23 Zvose zvamunoita, muzviitei nomoyo wose, sokunaShe, musingaitiri vanhu;" 
Colossians3:24 muchiziva kuti muchapiwa naShe mubairo wenhaka; nokuti munobatira Ishe Kristu. 
Colossians3:25 Nokuti unoita zvisakarurama, uchapiwa zvisakarurama zvaakaita; hazvizi zvinovonekwa zvomunhu zvinotendwa." 
Colossians4:1 Madzishe, itirai varanda venyu zvakarurama, zvakaringana; muzive kuti nemivo munaShe kudenga." 
Colossians4:2 Tsungirirai pakunyengetera, murinde pakuri nokuvonga;" 
Colossians4:3 mutinyengeterere nesuvo, kuti Mwari atizarurire mukova weshoko, titaure chakavanzika chaKristu, chandakasungirwa icho;" 
Colossians4:4 kuti ndichiratidze, sezvandinofanira kutaura." 
Colossians4:5 Fambai nokuchenjera kunavari kunze, muchingwarira nguva. yenyu" 
Colossians4:6 Kutaura kwenyu ngakuve nenyasha nguva dzose, kwakarungwa nomunyu, kuti muzive kupindura mumwe nomumwe sezvamunofanira kuita." 
Colossians4:7 Muchaziviswa zvangu zvose naTikiko, hama inodikamwa, mushumiri wakatendeka, nomuranda pamwe chete neni munaShe." 
Colossians4:8 Ndakamutuma iye kwamuri nemhaka iyi, kuti muzive zvedu, anyaradze moyo yenyu;" 
Colossians4:9 pamwe chete naOnesimo, hama yakatendeka, inodikamwa, mumwe wokwenyu. Ivo vachakuzivisai zvose zvapano." 
Colossians4:10 Aristarko, musungwa pamwe chete neni, unokukwazisai, naMarko, hama yaBharnabhasi, (makarairwa pamusoro pake; kana achisvika, mumugamuchirei);" 
Colossians4:10 Aristarko, musungwa pamwe chete neni, unokukwazisai, naMarko, hama yaBharnabhasi, (makarairwa pamusoro pake; kana achisvika, mumugamuchirei);" 
Colossians4:11 naJesu, unonzi Justo, vari vokudzingiswa; ndivavachetevanobata neni pavushe bwaMwari, ivo vakandinyaradza." 
Colossians4:12 Epafrasi, mumwe wokwenyu, muranda waKristu Jesu, unokukwazisai, achirwa nguva dzose pakunyengetera nokuda kwenyu, kuti mumire makakwana, muchiziva kwazvo kuda kose kwaMwari." 
Colossians4:13 Nokuti ndinomupupurira, kuti unotambudzika zvikuru nokuda kwenyu, naveRaodikia, naveHirapori." 
Colossians4:14 Ruka, chiremba unodikamwa, naDhemasi, vanokukwazisai." 
Colossians4:15 Ndikwazisirei hama dziri Raodikia, naNimfa, nekereke iri mumba mavo." 
Colossians4:16 Kana mwadhi iyi yarabwa pakati penyu, ngairabwevo mukereke yavaRaodikia; imivo murave mwadhi inobva Raodikia." 
Colossians4:17 Vudzai Arkipo, muti: Tarira basa rawakapiwa naShe, kuti uripedzise kwazvo." 
Colossians4:18 Ndiko kukwazisa kwangu, ini Pauro, noruvoko rwangu. Rangarirai kusungwa kwangu. Nyasha ngadzive nemi." 
1Thessalonians1:1 Pauro, naSivhano, naTimotio, kukereke yavaTesaronika, iri munaMwari, Baba, naShe Jesu Kristu: Nyasha ngadzive nemwi norugare zvinobva kuna Mwari baba vedu naShe Jesu Kristu." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Tinovonga Mwari nguva dzose nokuda kwenyu mose, tichikurangarirai pakunyengetera kwedu;" 
1Thessalonians1:3 tichiramba tichirangarira basa renyu rinobva pakutenda, nokutamburira vamwe kunobva parudo, nokutsungirira kunobva patariro munaShe wedu, Jesu Kristu, pamberi paMwari, Baba vedu;" 
1Thessalonians1:4 tinoziva, hama dzinodikamwa naMwari, kusanangurwa kwenyu." 
1Thessalonians1:5 Nokuti evhangeri yedu haina kuvuya kwamuri neshoko bedzi, asi nesimbavo, noMweya Mutsvene, nokuziva kwazvo; sezvamunoziva kuti takanga takadini pakati penyu nokuda kwenyu." 
1Thessalonians1:6 nemwi makava vateveri vedu navaShe, zvamakagamuchira Shoko mumatambudziko mazhinji, nomufaro woMweya Mutsvene;" 
1Thessalonians1:7 naizvozvo makatungamirira vose vanotenda muMakedhonia neAkaya. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Nokuti shoko raShe, rakabva kwamuri, rakanzwika, kusati kuri kuMakedhonia neAkaya bedzi, asi kutenda kwenyu kunaMwari kwakasvika kose; naizvozvo hatifaniri kutaura chinhu." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Nokuti ivo vamene vanoparidza kupinda kwedu kwamuri, kuti kwakanga kwakadini; vuye, kuti makatendevukira kunaMwari, muchibva pazvifananidzo, kuti mubatire Mwari mupenyu wechokwadi," 
1Thessalonians1:10 nokumirira Mwanakomana wake pakubva kwake kudenga, iye wakamutswa kuvakafa, ndiye Jesu unotisunungura pakutsamwa kunovuya." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Nokuti Nemi, hama dzangu, munoziva kuti kupinda kwedu kwamuri hakuna kuva pasina." 
1Thessalonians2:2 Asi kunyange takatambudzika nokuitirwa zvakaipa paFiripi, sezvamunoziva, takatsunga munaMwari wedu, tikakuparidzirai evhangeri yaMwari pakati pokudziviswa kukuru." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Nokuti kuraira kwedu hakuna kubva pakurashika, kana pakufunga kwakaipa, kana pakunyengera;" 
1Thessalonians2:4 asi sezvatakatendiwa naMwari, kuti tipiwe evhangeri, ndizvo zvatinotaura; tisingaiti kuti tifadze vanhu, asi Mwari unoidza moyo yedu." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Nokuti, sezvamunoziva, hatina kutongoreva namashoko okubata kumeso, kana namano-mano okukarira fuma, Mwari chapupu;" 
1Thessalonians2:6 tisingatsvaki kukudzwa navanhu kana nemi, kana navamwe, kunyange taigona kukuremedzai, zvatiri vapositora vaKristu." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Asi takanga tiri vanyoro pakati penyu, somureri kana achivaraidza vana vake;" 
1Thessalonians2:8 saizvozvo takakushuvai kwazvo, tikati zvakanaka kuti tirege kugovana nemwi evhangeri yaMwari bedzi, asi kunyange nemweya yeduvo, nokuti makanga madikamwa nesu kwazvo." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Nokuti, hama dzangu, munorangarira kutambudzika nokurwa kwedu; taibata vusiku namasikati, kuti tirege kuremedza mumwe wenyu, tikakuparidzirai evhangeri yaMwari." 
1Thessalonians2:10 imwi muri zvapupu, naMwarivo, kuti taifamba novutsvene nokururama, tisina chatingapomerwa kwamuri, imwi vanotenda." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Sezvamunoziva, kuti takaita nemi, mumwe nomumwe wenyu, sababa vanoita navana vavo," 
1Thessalonians2:12 tichikurairai, tichikusimbisai, tichikupupurirai, kuti mufambe zvakafanira Mwari, iye unokudanirai kuvushe bwake nokubwinya kwake." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Saka isuvo tinoramba tichivonga Mwari, kuti panguva yamakagamuchira shoko, iro shoko raMwari, ramakanzwa kwatiri, hamuna kurigamuchira seshoko ravanhu, asi seshoko raMwari, (riri iro zvirokwazvo) rinobatavo mukati menyu, imwi munotenda." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Nokuti imi, hama dzangu, makava vateveri vekereke dzaMwari dziri muJudhiya munaKristu Jesu; nokuti nemivo makatambudzwa saizvozvo novokwenyu, sezvavakatambudzwa ivo navaJudha," 
1Thessalonians2:15 Ndivo vakavuraya Ishe Jesu navaporofita, vakatidzinga isu, vasingafadzi Mwari, vachirwa navanhu vose." 
1Thessalonians2:16 vanotidzivisa kuti tirege kuparidzira vahedheni, kuti vaponeswe; kuti varambe vachizadzisa zvivi zvavo; asi kutsamwa kwakaburukira pamusoro pavo kusvikira pakuguma." 
1Thessalonians2:17 Zvino isu, hama dzangu, zvatakaparadzaniswa nemwi chinguva chiduku pamuviri, pasati pari pamoyo, takashingairira zvikuru nokushuva kukuru kuti tivonane nemwi pachiso;" 
1Thessalonians2:18 naizvozvo taida kuvuya kwamuri, ini Pauro, kamwe uye zve rwechipiri, asi Satani wakatidzivisa." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Nokuti tariro yedu ndeipiko, kana mufaro, kana korona yokuzvirumbidza nayo? Hamuzimi here, pamberi paShe wedu Jesu Kristu pakuvuya kwake?" 
1Thessalonians2:20 Nokuti imwi muri kubwinya kwedu nomufaro wedu. 
1Thessalonians3:1 Saka zvatakanga tisingagoni kutsunga, takati zvakanaka kuti tisiyiwe tiri toga paAtene;" 
1Thessalonians3:2 tikatuma Timotio, hama yedu, mushumiri waMwari paevhangeri yaKristu, kuti akusimbisei, nokukutsungisai moyo pakutenda kwenyu;" 
1Thessalonians3:3 kuti kurege kuva nomunhu unozununguswa nenhamo idzi, nokuti munoziva mumene kuti takagadzirirwa izvozvo." 
1Thessalonians3:4 Nokuti tichiri kwamuri takambokuvudzai kuti tichatambudzwa; sezvazvakaitika, nemwi munoziva." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Saka inivo, zvandakanga ndisichagoni kutsunga, ndakamutuma kuti ndizive kutenda kwenyu, ndichiti zvimwe muidzi wakakuidzai, izvo zvatakabata zvikava pasina." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Asi zvino Timotio wakati asvika kwatiri achangobva kwamuri, akativudza mashoko akanaka okutenda kwenyu norudo rwenyu, uye kuti munongositifunga nomurangariro wakanaka, muchida zvikuru kutivona isu, sesuvo tichida kukuvonai imi;" 
1Thessalonians3:7 saka, hama dzangu, takanyaradzwa pamusoro penyu pakutambudzika kwedu kose nenhamo nokutenda kwenyu;" 
1Thessalonians3:8 nokuti zvino isu tinorarama, kana imwi mumire makasimba munaShe." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Nokuti tingavonga Mwari neiko pamusoro penyu nomufaro wose watinofara nawo pamberi paMwari wedu nokuda kwenyu," 
1Thessalonians3:10 tichingokumbira zvikuru vusiku namasikati kuti tivone chiso chenyu, kuti tizadzise zvakataira pakutenda kwenyu?" 
1Thessalonians3:11 Zvino iye Mwari, Baba vedu naShe wedu Jesu, ngaaruramisire nzira yedu kwamuri;" 
1Thessalonians3:12 ishe akukurisei, akuwanzirei rudo pakati penyu nokuna vose, sezvatinoita isu kwamuri," 
1Thessalonians3:13 asimbise moyo yenyu kuti ive isina chaingapomerwa pavutsvene pamberi paMwari, Baba vedu, pakuvuya kwaShe wedu Jesu pamwe chete navatsvene vake vose." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Naizvozvo pakupedzisira, hama dzangu, tinokumbira kwamuri, nokukurairai munaShe Jesu, kuti, sezvamakadzidza kwatiri mutovo wamunofanira kufamba nokufadza Mwari nawo, sezvamunofambavo, kuti muwanze nokuwanzisisa panaizvozvo." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Nokuti munoziva mirairo yatakakupai, naShe Jesu." 
1Thessalonians4:3 Nokuti kuda kwaMwari ndibwo vutsvene bwenyu, murege vupombwe;" 
1Thessalonians4:4 kuti mumwe nomumwe wenyu azive kuzviwanira mudziyo wake novutsvene nokukudzwa," 
1Thessalonians4:5 asingaiti nokukara kokuchiva, savahedheni, vasingazivi Mwari;" 
1Thessalonians4:6 munhu ngaarege kuitira hama yake zvakaipa kana kumunyengera pachinhu ichi, nokuti Ishe ndiye mutsivi wezvinhu izvozvo zvose, sezvatakakuvudzaivo nokukupupurirai kwazvo." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Nokuti Mwari haana kutidanira tsvina, asi muvutsvene." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Naizvozvo unoramba izvozvo, haarambi munhu, asi Mwari, unokupai Mweya wake, iwo Mutsvene." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Zvino, kana ruri rudo pakati pehama, hamufaniri kuti munyorerwe, nokuti imwi mumene makadzidziswa naMwari kuti mudane;" 
1Thessalonians4:10 nokuti ndizvovo zvamunoitira hama dzose dzeMakedhonia, yose asi tinokurairai, hama dzangu, kuti muwanze nokuwanzisisa panaizvozvi;" 
1Thessalonians4:11 Shingairirai kuva norugare, mumwe nomumwe abate zvake, muchibate basa namavoko enyu, sezvatakakurairai;" 
1Thessalonians4:12 kuti mufambe nomutovo wakafanira kuna vari kunze, musingashaiwi chinhu." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Zvino, hama dzangu, hatidi kuti mushaiwe kuziva pamusoro pavavete, kuti murege kuchema savamwe vasinetariro." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Nokuti kana tichitenda kuti Jesu wakafa, akamukazve, saizvozvovo avo vakavata munaJesu, Mwari uchavavuyisa pamwe chete naye." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Nokuti tinokuvudzai neshoko raShe, kuti isu vapenyu, vakasara kusvikira pakuvuya kwaShe, hatingatongotangiri vakavata." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Nokuti Ishe amene uchaburuka kudenga nokudanidzira, nenzwi romutumwa mukuru, nehwamanda yaMwari; vakafa munaKristu vachatanga kumuka;" 
1Thessalonians4:17 zvino isu vapenyu, vakasara, tichatorwa pamwe chete navo mumakore, kuti tichingamidze Ishe mudenga; naizvozvo tichava naShe nguva dzose." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Naizvozvo nyaradzanai namashoko awa. 
1Thessalonians5:1 Asi kana dziri nguva nemisi, hama dzangu, hamufaniri henyu kuti munyorerwe chinhu;" 
1Thessalonians5:2 nokuti imwi mumene munoziva kwazvo, kuti zuva raShe rinosvika sembavha vusiku." 
1Thessalonians5:3 Kana vachiti, Rugare, nokugarika ipapo kuparadzwa kuchakurumidza kuvawira, sokurwadzwa komukadzi unemimba; havangatongopukunyuki." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Asi imi, hama dzangu, hamuzi murima, kuti zuva iro rikubatei sembavha." 
1Thessalonians5:5 Nokuti imwi mose muri vana vechiedza, navana vamasikati; hatizi vovusiku, kana verima." 
1Thessalonians5:6 Naizvozvo ngatirege kuvata savamwe, asi tirinde, tisvinure." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Nokuti vanovata, vanovata vusiku; vanobatwa nedoro, vanobatwa vusiku." 
1Thessalonians5:8 Asi isu, zvatiri vamasikati, ngatisvinuke, takapfeka chidzitiro chechifuva chokutenda norudo; nengowani ive tariro yoruponeso." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Nokuti Mwari haana kutiisira kutsamwa, asi kuti tiwane ruponeso naShe wedu Jesu Kristu," 
1Thessalonians5:10 wakatifira isu, kuti, kana tichirinda, kana tichivata, tirarame pamwe chete naye." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Saka nyaradzanai, musimbisane, sezvamunoita." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Zvino tinokumbira kwamuri, hama dzangu, kuti muzive avo vanobata pakati penyu, vanokutungamirirai munaShe, vanokurairai;" 
1Thessalonians5:13 muvakudze zvikuru norudo, nokuda kwebasa ravo. Ivai norugare pakati penyu." 
1Thessalonians5:14 Tinokumbira zvikuru kwamuri, hama dzangu, kuti muraire vasingateereri murairo, musimbise vanopera moyo, mutsigire vasinesimba, muve nomoyo murefu kunavose." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Chenjerai kuti mumwe arege kutsiva mumwe zvakaipa nezvakaipa; asi nguva dzose mutevere zvinhu zvakanaka, mumwe kuno mumwe, nokunavose." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Farai nguva dzose. 
1Thessalonians5:17 Rambai muchinyengetera. 
1Thessalonians5:18 Vongai pazvinhu zvose; nokuti ndiko kuda kwaMwari kwamuri munaKristu Jesu. 
1Thessalonians5:19 Musadzima Mweya; 
1Thessalonians5:20 musazvidza zvinoporofitwa; 
1Thessalonians5:21 idzai zvinhu zvose; mubatisise zvakanaka; 
1Thessalonians5:22 regai marudzi ose ezvakaipa. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Mwari worugare amene ngaakuitei vatsvene kwazvo; Mweya wenyu, nomoyo, nomuviri, zvichengetwe kwazvo, zvisina zvazvingapomerwa pakuvuya kwaShe wedu Jesu Kristu." 
1Thessalonians5:24 wakatendeka ndiye unokudanai, uchazviitavo." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Hama dzangu tinyengetererei. 
1Thessalonians5:26 Kwazisai hama dzose nokusveta kutsvene. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Ndinokupikirai naShe, kuti mwadhi iyi iverengerwe hama tsvene dzose." 
1Thessalonians5:28 Nyasha dzaShe wedu Jesu ngadzive nemi. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Pauro, naSirivhano, naTimotio, kukereke yavaTesaronika munaMwari, baba vedu, naShe Jesu Kristu;" 
2Thessalonians1:2 Nyasha ngadzive nemwi norugare runobva kunaMwari, baba, naShe Jesu Kristu." 
2Thessalonians1:3 Tinofanira kuvonga Mwari nguva dzose pamusoro penyu, hama dzangu, se zvazvakafanira, nokuti kutenda kwenyu kunokura kwazvo, norudo rwenyu mose, mumwe nomumwe kunavamwe, runowanda;" 
2Thessalonians1:4 nokudaro isu timene tinozvirumbidza mamuri pakereke dzaMwari pamusoro pokutsungirira kwenyu, nokutenda kwenyu mukutambudzika kwenyu kose nenhamo dzose dzamunadzo." 
2Thessalonians1:5 Ndizvo zvinoratidza kutonga kwakarurama kwaMwari; kuti mugonzi makafanirwa novushe bwaMwari, bwamunotambudzikira vo;" 
2Thessalonians1:6 zvazvakarurama kunaMwari, kuti atsive nokutambudzika ivavo vanokutambudzai;" 
2Thessalonians1:7 nemwi munotambudzwa, kuti mupiwe kuzorora pamwe chete nesu pakuvonekwa kwaShe Jesu, kana achibva kudenga navatumwa vesimba rake," 
2Thessalonians1:8 mumoto unopfuta, achitsiva avo vasingazivi Mwari, navasingateereri evhangeri yaShe wedu, Jesu Kristu;" 
2Thessalonians1:9 ivo vacharobwa nokuparadzwa kusingaperi, kuti vabve pamberi paShe, napakubwinya kwesimba rake," 
2Thessalonians1:10 kana achivuya kuzorumbidzwa muvatsvene vake, nokuyemurwa navose vanotenda nezuva irero; (nokuti kupupura kwedu kwamuri kwakatendwa)." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Naizvozvo tinokunyengeteererai vo nguva dzose, kuti Mwari wedu ati, makafanirwa nokudamwa kwenyu akwanise nesimba rake kuda kwenyu kose kuita zvakanaka namabasa ose okutenda;" 
2Thessalonians1:12 kuti zita raShe wedu Jesu Kristu rirumbidzwe mamuri, nemwi maari, sezvadzakaita nyasha dzaMwari wedu nedzaShe Jesu Kristu." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Zvino tinokumbira kwamuri, hama dzangu, pamusoro pokuvuya kwaShe wedu Jesu Kristu, nokuvungana kwedu kwaari;" 
2Thessalonians2:2 kuti murege kukurumidza kuzununguswa pakufunga kwenyu,kana kuvhunduswa kana nemweya kana neshoko, kana nemwadhi, inonzi inobva kwatiri, muchiti zuva raKristu ratosvika;" 
2Thessalonians2:3 ngakurege kuva nomunhu unokunyengerai nomutovo upi noupi; nokuti zuva iro harisviki, kana kusati kwatanga kuvuya, nomunhu wezvivi, mwanakomana wokurashika, asati ambovonekwa," 
2Thessalonians2:4 iye, unorwa achizvikudza pamusoro pezvose zvinonzi Mwari, kana zvinonamatwa; nokudaro kuti unogara saMwari mutembere yaMwari, achizviita Mwari." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Hamurangariri here kuti ndichiri kwamuri, ndakakuvudzai izvozvi?" 
2Thessalonians2:6 Zvino munoziva chinodzivisa, kuti aratidzwe nenguva yake." 
2Thessalonians2:7 Nokuti chakavanzika chokusarurama chotobate-basa racho; asi zvichaitwachetekusvikira iye unodzivisa zvino achibviswa. 
2Thessalonians2:8 Ipapo iye usakarurama uchavonekwa, iye uchavurawa naShe Jesu nomweya womuromo wake, achiparadza nokuvonekwa kokuvuya kwake;" 
2Thessalonians2:9 kuvuya kwake iye kwakaita sebasa raSatani nesimba rose, nezviratidzo, nezvinoshamisa zvenhema," 
2Thessalonians2:10 nokunyengera kose kokusarurama kuna vanoparara; nokuti havana kugamuchira rudo rwechokwadi, kuti vaponeswe." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Saka Mwari unovatumira simba rokukanganisa, kuti vatende nhema," 
2Thessalonians2:12 kuti vose vasina kutenda chokwadi, asi vakafarira zvisakarurama, vatongwe." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Asi isu tinofanira kuvonga Mwari nguva dzose pamusoro penyu, hama dzangu, vadikamwa vaShe, nokuti Mwari wakakusanangurai kubva pakutanga, kuti muponeswe muvutsvene bwoMweya nokutenda chokwadi." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Izvo zvaakakudanirai neEvhangei yedu, kuti muwane kubwinya kwaShe wedu Jesu Kristu." 
2Thessalonians2:15 Naizvozvo, hama dzangu, mirai makasimba, muchengete mirairo yamakadzidziswa, kana neshoko kana nemwadhi yedu." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Zvino, Ishe wedu Jesu Kristu amene, naMwari, baba vedu, vakatida, vakatipa nenyasha dzavo kuvaraidzwa kusingaperi netariro yakanaka," 
2Thessalonians2:17 ngavavaraidze moyo yenyu, vakusimbisei pamabasa ose namashoko ose akanaka." 
2Thessalonians3:1 Pakupedzisira, hama dzangu, mutinyengeterere, kuti shoko raShe ripfuvure, rikudzwe, sezvazvinoitwa kwenyu vo;" 
2Thessalonians3:2 vuye, kuti tisunungurwe kuvanhu vasakarurama, vakaipa; nokuti havazi vose vanotenda." 
2Thessalonians3:3 Asi Ishe ndiye wakatendeka, uchakusimbisai, nokukuchengetai kunowakaipa." 
2Thessalonians3:4 Tinokutendai munaShe, kuti munoita, uye mucharamba muchiita,izvo zvatinokurairai." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Ishe ngaaruramise moyo yenyu murudo rwaMwari, nomukutsungirira kwaKristu." 
2Thessalonians3:6 Zvino, hama dzangu, tinokurairai nezita raShe wedu Jesu Kristu, kuti mubve pahama imwe neimwe isingafambi netsika dzakafanira, isingateereri mirairo yamakapiwa nesu;" 
2Thessalonians3:7 nokuti imwi munoziva mumene, kuti munofanira kutitevera isu, nokuti hatina kufamba netsika dzisakafanira pakati penyu;" 
2Thessalonians3:8 hatina kutongodya zvokudya zvomunhu tisingaripi, asi takabate basa vusiku namasikati, tichitambudzika nokushingaira, kuti tirege kuremedza mumwe wenyu;" 
2Thessalonians3:9 hakuzi kuti hatinesimba, asi kuti tikutungamirirei, mutitevere." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Nokuti, nenguva yataiva kwamuri, takakurairai izvozvo, kuti kana munhu achiramba kubate-basa, ngaarege kudya vo." 
2Thessalonians3:11 Nokuti tinonzwa kuti vamwe pakati penyu havafambi netsika dzakafanira, vasina chavanobata, vasingaregi zvavamwe." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Vanhu vakadaro tinovaraira nokukumbira kwavari munaShe Jesu Kristu, kuti vabate nokunyarara vadye zvokudya zvavo zvimene." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Asi imi, hama dzangu, musaneta pakuita zvakanaka." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Kana panomunhu usingateereri shoko redu remwadhi iyi, mutarisise munhu uyo, kuti murege kufambidzana naye, anyadzwiswe." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Regai henyu kumuidza muvengi, asi mumuraire sehama." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Zvino, Ishe worugare amene ngaakupei rugare misi yose nemitovo yose. Ishe ngaave nemwi mose." 
2Thessalonians3:17 Ndiko kukwazisa kwangu, ini Pauro, noruvoko rwangu, ndicho chiratidzo pamwadhi dzose; ndinonyora kudai," 
2Thessalonians3:18 Nyasha dzaShe wedu Jesu Kristu ngadzive nemwi mose. Ameni. 
1Timothy1:1 Pauro, muapositora waShe Kristu Jesu nokuraira kwaMwari, Muponesi wedu, naKristu Jesu, tariro yedu;" 
1Timothy1:2 kunaTimotio, mwana wangu chaiye pakutenda: Nyasha, nengoni, norugare, zvinobva kunaMwari Baba, naKristu Jesu, Ishe wedu, ngazvive newe." 
1Timothy1:3 Sezvandakakumbira zvikuru kwauri, ini ndichienda Makedhonia, ndinoti, usare paEfeso, kuti uraire vamwe varege kudzidzisa dzimwe dzidziso." 
1Timothy1:4 kana kurangarira ngano namazita amadzitetegeru asingaperi, zvinongomutsa nharo, zvisingatendisi zvakarairwa naMwari, zviri mukutenda." 
1Timothy1:5 Asi chinovavarirwa nomurairo ndirwo rudo runobva pamoyo wakachena, napahana yakanaka, napakutenda kusinganyengeri;" 
1Timothy1:6 vamwe vakarashika pazvinhu izvozvi, vakatsaukira kukutaura kusinamaturo;" 
1Timothy1:7 vachitsvaka kuti vave vadzidzisi vomurairo, vasingazivi zvavanoreva kana zvavanosimbisa." 
1Timothy1:8 Asi tinoziva kuti murairo wakanaka, kana munhu achiita nawo sezvinoreva murairo," 
1Timothy1:9 achiziva kuti murairo hauna kuitirwa wakarurama, asi vasinehanya nomurairo, navasingateereri, navasingadi Mwari, navatadzi, navasi vatsvene, navasinehanya naMwari, navanorova madzibaba, navanorova madzimai,navanovuraya vanhu;" 
1Timothy1:10 nemhombwe, navanopombora navarume,navanoba vanhu, navanoreva nhema, navanopika nhema, uye kana chimwe chiri'ko chinopesana nedzidziso yakarurama;" 
1Timothy1:11 sezvinoreva evhangeri yokubwinya kwaMwari womufaro, yandakapiwa ini." 
1Timothy1:12 Ndinomuvonga iye Kristu Jesu, Ishe wedu, wakandipa simba, nokuti wakati ndakatendeka, akandiisa pabasa rake;"
