1Timothy1:13 kunyange ini ndaimhura Mwari kare, nomutambudza ndichiitira vanhu zvakaipa; asi ndakaitirwa ngoni, nokuti ndakanga ndichizviita nokusaziva pakusatenda;" 
1Timothy1:14 asi nyasha dzaShe wedu dzakawanda zvikuru nokutenda, norudo ruri munaKristu Jesu." 
1Timothy1:15 Ishoko rechokwadi, rinofanira kutendwa kwazvo, kuti Kristu Jesu wakavuya panyika kuzoponesa vatadzi; avo, ini ndiri mukuru wavo;" 
1Timothy1:16 asi naizvozvo ndakaitirwa ngoni, kuti Jesu Kristu aratidze moyo wake wose murefu mandiri, ini mukuru wavatadzi, kuti ndive chiratidzo kuna vanozotenda kwaari, zvinovaisa kuvupenyu bwusingaperi." 
1Timothy1:17 Zvino iye Ishe usingaperi, usingafi, usingavonekwi, Mwari woga, wakachenjera ngaave nokukudzwa nokubwinya nokusingaperi-peri. Ameni." 
1Timothy1:18 Basa iri, rakarairwa, ndinokupa iro, iwe Timotio, mwana wangu, kuti sezvazvakaprofitwa kare pamusoro pako, urwe pfumo rakanaka mazviri;" 
1Timothy1:19 wakabata kutenda nehana yakarurama; iyo yakarashwa navamwe, vakarashikirwa nokutenda;" 
1Timothy1:20 vamwe vavo ndiHimenio naArekizandro, vandakaisa kunaSatani, vadzidziswe kuti varege kumhura Mwari." 
1Timothy2:1 Naizvozvo pakutanga kwezvose ndinoraira kuti vanhu vose vakumbirirwe, vanyengetererwe, varevererwe, vavongerwe;" 
1Timothy2:2 madzimambo, navose vari vakuru, kuti tigare norugare nokunyarara pakunamata Mwari kose, nomugarire unokudzwa." 
1Timothy2:3 Ndizvo zvakanaka, zvinofadza pamberi paMwari, Muponesi wedu;" 
1Timothy2:4 uyo unoda kuti vanhu vose vaponeswe, vasvike pakuziva chokwadi." 
1Timothy2:5 Nokuti kunongova naMwari mumwe chete, noMureveri mumwe chete vo, pakati paMwari navanhu, ndiye munhu Kristu Jesu," 
1Timothy2:6 wakazvipa iye, kuti ave rudzikinuro rwavose, chive chapupu panguva dzakafanira," 
1Timothy2:7 icho chandakaitirwa muparidzi nomuapositora (ndinoreva zvirokwazvo, muna Kristu handirevi nhema), nomudzidzisi wavahedheni pakutenda nechokwadi." 
1Timothy2:8 Naizvozvo ndinoda kuti varume vanyengetere panzvimbo dzose, vachisimudza mavoko matsvene, vasina kutsamwa nenharo." 
1Timothy2:9 Saizvozvovo, kuti vakadzi vashonge nguvo dzakafanira, vanokunyara nokuzvidzora; vasava nevhudzi rakarukwa, nendarama, kana maparera, kana nguvo dzinodya mari zhinji;" 
1Timothy2:10 asi ngavashonge mabasa akanaka, sezvinofanira vakadzi vanoti tinonamata Mwari." 
1Timothy2:11 Mukadzi ngaadzidze nokunyarara nokuzviisa pasi kose. 
1Timothy2:12 Asi handitenderi mukadzi kuti adzidzise, kana kuti ave nesimba pamusoro pomurume, asi ngaanyarare." 
1Timothy2:13 Nokuti Adhamu wakatanga kuvumbwa, tevere Evha;" 
1Timothy2:14 naAdhamu haana kunyengerwa, asi mukadzi wakanyengerwa akapinda pakudarika;" 
1Timothy2:15 asi uchaponeswa nokubereka vana, kana vachirambira mukutenda norudo, novutsvene pamwe chete nokuzvidzora." 
1Timothy3:1 Ishoko rechokwadi, rokuti, kana munhu achitsvaka basa romutariri, unoda basa rakanaka." 
1Timothy3:2 Naizvozvo mutariri unofanira kuva munhu usina chaangapomerwa, murume womukadzi mumwe chete, wakangwara, wakachenjera, unomugarire wakafanira, unoitira vaeni rudo, unoziva kudzidzisa," 
1Timothy3:3 usingadi waini, usingarwi; asi munyoro, usinegakava, usingakariri mari;" 
1Timothy3:4 unobata imba yake zvakanaka, unavana vanozviisa pasi nomugarire wose unokudzwa;" 
1Timothy3:5 (kana munhu asingazivi kubata imba yake, ungachengeta seiko kereke yaMwari?)" 
1Timothy3:6 Asava mutendi mutsva, kuti arege kuzvikudza, akawira mukutongwa kumwe naDhiabhorosi" 
1Timothy3:7 Vuyezve, unofanira kupupurirwa zvakanaka navari kunze, kuti arege kuzvidzwa nokubatwa nemusungo waDhiabhorosi." 
1Timothy3:8 Saizvozvo vo vashumiri ngavave vanokudzwa, vasinamanzwi maviri, vasingadi waini zhinji, vasingakariri fuma yakaipa;" 
1Timothy3:9 vanochengeta zvakavanzika zvokutenda muhana yakanaka. 
1Timothy3:10 Naivo ngavatange kuidzwa vo, ipapo vashumire, kana vasina chavangapomerwa." 
1Timothy3:11 Saizvozvo navakadzi ngavave vanokudzwa, vasingacheri vamwe, vakasvinuka, vakatendeka pazvose." 
1Timothy3:12 Vashumiri ngavave varume vanomukadzi mumwe chete, vanobata vana vavo nedzimba dzavo zvakanaka;" 
1Timothy3:13 nokuti avo vakashumira zvakanaka, vanozviwanira zita rinokudzwa nokutsunga kukuru pakutenda kwavo munaKristu Jesu." 
1Timothy3:14 Zvinhu izvi zvose ndinokunyorera, ndichiti ndichakurumidza kuvuya kwauri;" 
1Timothy3:15 zvino kana ndikanonoka, ndinoda kuti uzive kuti vanhu vanofanira kufamba sei mumba maMwari, iyo kereke yaMwari mupenyu, mbiru nechitsigiro chechokwadi." 
1Timothy3:16 Hakuna ungaramba kuti chakavanzika chokunamata chikuru kwazvo, chokuti: Iye Mwari wakaratidzwa panyama, wakaruramiswa pamweya, wakavonekwa navatumwa, wakaparidzwa pakati pavahedheni, wakatendwa panyika, wakakwidzwa mukubwinya." 
1Timothy4:1 Zvino Mweya unoreva pachena, kuti panguva dzinovuya vamwe va chatsauka pakutenda, vachiteerera mweya inonyengera nedzidziso dzemweya yakaipa," 
1Timothy4:2 vachinyengerwa navanoreva nhema, vakapiswa pahana dzavo nedare rinopisa," 
1Timothy4:3 vachidzivisa vanhu kuwanana, nokuraira kuti zvimwe zvokudya zviregwe, zvakasikwa naMwari, kuti zvigamuchirwe nokuvonga navanotenda, vanoziva chokwadi." 
1Timothy4:4 Nokuti zvose zvakasikwa naMwari zvakanaka, hakunechinhu chingafanira kurashwa, kana chichigamuchirwa nokuvonga;" 
1Timothy4:5 nokuti chinoitwa chitsvene neshoko raMwari nokunyengetera. 
1Timothy4:6 Kana uchiyevudzira hama zvinhu izvi, uchava mushumiri wakanaka waKristu Jesu, wakarerwa namashoko okutenda needzidziso yakanaka, yawakatevera nomoyo wose." 
1Timothy4:7 Asi urambe ngano dzisine hanya naMwari nedzechembere. Uzvirovedze kunamata Mwari. 
1Timothy4:8 Nokuti kurovedza muviri kunobatsira zvishoma hako, asi kunamata Mwari kunobatsira pazvinhu zvose, zvakune chipikirwa chovupenyu bwazvino nobwunovuya." 
1Timothy4:9 Ishoko rechokwadi, rinofanira kutendwa kwazvo." 
1Timothy4:10 Nokuti ndizvo zvatinotambudzikira nokurwira, nokuti tariro yedu iri kunaMwari mupenyu, Muponesi wavanhu vose, zvikuru wavanotenda." 
1Timothy4:11 Raira nokudzidzisa zvinhu izvi: 
1Timothy4:12 Munhu ngaarege kuvapo unozvidza vuduku bwako, asi uitire vanotenda makwara, pashoko napamufambire, naparudo, napaMweya napakutenda, napakuchena komoyo." 
1Timothy4:13 Shingaira pakurava, napakuraira, napakudzidzisa, kusvikira ndichivuya." 
1Timothy4:14 Usarega kuchengeta chipiwa chiri mauri, nokuporofita, nokuiswa mavoko avakuru." 
1Timothy4:15 Shingairira zvinhu izvi, uzviite nomoyo wose, kuti kupfuvurira mberi kwako kuvonekwe navanhu vose." 
1Timothy4:16 Uzvichengete iwe nedzidziso yako. Urambire pazvinhu izvi, nokuti kana uchiita izvozvi, uchazviponesa iwe navanokunzwa." 
1Timothy5:1 Usatuka mukuru, asi umuraire sababa, navaduku savanun'una," 
1Timothy5:2 navakadzi vakuru samadzimai, navaduku sehanzvadzi nokuchena komoyo kose." 
1Timothy5:3 Kudza chirikadzi, dziri chirikadzi chaidzo." 
1Timothy5:4 Asi kana chirikadzi inavana kana vazukuru, ngavatange ivo kudzidza kunamata Mwari paimba yavo, vadzosere zvakafanira kuvabereki vavo, nokuti ndizvo zvinofadza Mwari." 
1Timothy5:5 Zvino kana iri chirikadzi chaiyo, yakasiyiwa iri yoga, ndiyo inovimba naMwari, inogara ichikumbira nokunyengetera vusiku namasikati." 
1Timothy5:6 Asi iyo inokarira zvinofadza, yakafa ichiri mhenyu." 
1Timothy5:7 Raira vo zvinhu izvi, kuti varege kuva nechavangapomerwa." 
1Timothy5:8 Asi kana munhu asingachengeti vokwake, zvikuru veimba yake, warasha kutenda, wakaipa kukunda usingatendi." 
1Timothy5:9 Chirikadzi ngairege kunyorwa zita, asi kana yasvika makore makumi matanhatu, yaiva mukadzi womurume mumwe chete," 
1Timothy5:10 inorumbidzwa pamusoro pamabasa akanaka, kana yakarera vana, kana yaifarira vaeni, kana yaishambidza tsoka dzavatsvene, kana yaibatsira vari munjodzi, kana yaishingairira mabasa ose akanaka." 
1Timothy5:11 Asi urambe chirikadzi kana vachiri vakadzi vaduku, nokuti kana dzopesana naKristu, dzotsvaka kuwanikwa;" 
1Timothy5:12 dzava nemhosva, nokuti dzaramba kutenda kokutanga;" 
1Timothy5:13 uye zve, dzinodzidza kuva novusimbe dzichipota nedzimba; hadzizi simbe bedzi, asi vaiti vo vamakuhwa, dzisingaregi zvavamwe, dzichitaura zvisakafanira." 
1Timothy5:14 Naizvozvo ndinoda kuti chirikadzi duku dziwanikwe, dzibereke vana, dzichengete dzimba dzadzo, kuti dzirege kutongopa muvengi nzira yokupomera nayo." 
1Timothy5:15 Nokuti vamwe vatotsauka vachitevera Satani. 
1Timothy5:16 Kana murume kana mukadzi mutendi anechirikadzi, ngadzibatsire, kereke irege kuremedzwa kuti igobatsira chirikadzi chaidzo." 
1Timothy5:17 Vakuru vanobata kereke zvakanaka ngavanzi vanofanirwa nokukudzwa kaviri, zvikuru avo vanobata pashoko napakudzidzisa." 
1Timothy5:18 Nokuti Rugwaro runoti: Usasunga muromo wenzombe inopura; uye zve: Mubati wakafanirwa nomubairo wake. 
1Timothy5:19 Usangotenda mhaka inopomerwa mukuru, asi kana ichibva pamiromo yezvapupu zviviri kana zvitatu." 
1Timothy5:20 Vanotadza uvarange pamberi pavose, kuti vamwe vagotya." 
1Timothy5:21 Ndinokuraira kwazvo pamberi paMwari, naKristu Jesu, navatumwa vakasanangurwa, kuti uchengete zvinhu izvi usingatongi usati wambonzwa kwazvo, kana kuita chinhu uchitsaura vanhu." 
1Timothy5:22 Usakurumidza kuisa mavoko pamusoro pomunhu, kana kusongana pazvivi zvavamwe; uzvichengete kuti uve wakachena." 
1Timothy5:23 Usaramba uchingomwa mvura bedzi, asi umwe waini shoma nokuda komudumbu mako novutera bwako bwuzhinji." 
1Timothy5:24 Zvivi zvavamwe vanhu zvinovonekwa pachena, zvinotungamirira kutongwa kwavo vamwe zve vanoteverwa nazvo," 
1Timothy5:25 Saizvozvo vo kunamabasa akanaka anovonekwa pachena, naasina kudaro haangavanzwi." 
1Timothy6:1 Vose vari varanda pasi pejoko, ngavati vatenzi vavo vanofanirwa nokukudzwa kose, kuti zita raMwari nedzidziso zvirege kumhurwa." 
1Timothy6:2 Avo vana vatenzi vanotenda, ngavarege kuvazvidza zvadziri hama, asi zvikuru ngavavabatire, zvavari vatendi navanodikamwa vanobatsirwa nokubata kwavo kwakanaka. Dzidzisa zvinhu izvi, uzviraire." 
1Timothy6:3 Kana kunomunhu unodzidzisa imwe dzidziso, asingabvumiri mashoko akarurama, mashoko aShe wedu, Jesu Kristu, nedzidziso inofambirana nokunamata Mwari," 
1Timothy6:4 unongozvikudza, asingazivi chinhu, asi unongokarira mibvunzo nenharo dzinomutsa godo, negakava, nokutuka, nokufungidzira kwakaipa," 
1Timothy6:5 nokukakavadzana kusingaperi kwavanhu vanomurangariro wakavodzwa, vakatorerwa chokwadi, vachiti kunamata Mwari ndizvo zvinofumisa." 
1Timothy6:6 Zvino kunamata Mwari pamwechete nokugutsikana nezvatinazvo ndizvo zvinofumisa kwazvo; 
1Timothy6:7 nokuti hatina kuvuya nechinhu panyika, hatigonivo kubuda tine chinhu." 
1Timothy6:8 asi kana tine zvokudya nezvokufuka, tichatenda nazvo." 
1Timothy6:9 Asi vanotsvaka kufuma, vanowira mukuidzwa nomumusungo, nomukuchiva koupenzi kuzhinji kunokuvadza, zvinonyudza vanhu mukuparadzwa nokurashwa." 
1Timothy6:10 Nokuti kuda mari ndiwo mudzi wezvakaipa zvose; vamwe vakati vachiida zvikuru vakatsauswa pakutenda, vakazvibaya neshungu zhinji." 
1Timothy6:11 Asi iwe, munhu waMwari, tiza zvinhu izvi; utevere kururama nokunamata Mwari, nokutenda, norudo, nokutsungirira, novunyoro." 
1Timothy6:12 Urwe kurwa kwakanaka kokutenda, ubatisise vupenyu bwusingaperi, bwawakadanirwa kwabwuri, ukapupura kupupura kwakanaka pamberi pe zvapupu zvizhinji." 
1Timothy6:13 Ndinokuraira pamberi paMwari, unopa zvinhu zvose vupenyu bwazvo, napamberi paKristu Jesu, wakapupura kupupura kwakanaka pamberi paPontio Pirato;" 
1Timothy6:14 kuti uchengete murairo, usinoruvara, usina chaungapomerwa, kusvikira pakuvonekwa kwaShe wedu, Jesu Kristu;" 
1Timothy6:15 kwaachazoratidza panguva dzake, iye oga wakaropafadzwa nowamasimbaose, Mambo wamadzimambo, Ishe wamadzishe';" 
1Timothy6:16 iye oga usingafi, ugere pachiedza chisingagoni kuti munhu aswedere kwachiri; usina kumbovonekwa nomunhu, uye usingagoni kuvonekwa; kukudzwa nesimba risingaperi ngazvive kwaari. Ameni." 
1Timothy6:17 Raira vafumi panyika yazvino, kuti varege kuzvikudza, kana kuvimba nefuma isingagari, asi naMwari, unotipa zvose achiwanza, kuti tifare nazvo;" 
1Timothy6:18 kuti vaite zvakanaka, vave vafumi pamabasa akanaka, vafarire kupa vamwe, nokugovana;" 
1Timothy6:19 vazvirongedzere nheyo dzakanaka dzenguva inovuya, kuti vabatisise vupenyu chaibwo." 
1Timothy6:20 Iwe, Timotio, chengeta icho chawakapiwa, ufuratire kutaura kusinehanya naMwari nokuramba kunobva pazivo inonzi zivo., dziri nhema hadzo;" 
1Timothy6:21 iyo yakapupurwa navamwe, vakazorashika pakutenda. Nyasha ngadzive nemi." 
2Timothy1:1 Pauro, muapositora waJesu Kristu, nokuda kwaMwari, nokuda kwechipikirwa chovupenyu bwuri munaKristu Jesu," 
2Timothy1:2 kunaTimotio, mwana wangu unodikamwa: Nyasha, nengoni, norugare, zvinobva kunaMwari Baba, naKristu Jesu, Ishe wedu, ngazvive newe." 
2Timothy1:3 Ndinovonga Mwari, wandinoshumira samadziteteguru angu, nehana yakachena, kana ndichiramba ndichikurangarira pakukumbira kwangu vusiku namasikati," 
2Timothy1:4 ndichishuva zvikuru kukuvona, ndichirangarira misodzi yako, kuti ndizadzwe nomufaro;" 
2Timothy1:5 ndichiyevudzwa kutenda kusinganyengeri kuri mauri, kwaimbogara pakutanga muna mbuya vako Roisi, nomuna mai vako, vaJunika kwandinoziva kwazvo kuti kunogaravo mauri." 
2Timothy1:6 Nemhaka iyi ndinokuyevudzira kuti ukuchidzire chipiwa chaMwari chiri mauri nokuiswa kwamavoko angu. 
2Timothy1:7 Nokuti Mwari haana kutipa mweya wokutya asi wesimba, noworudo, nowechokwadi." 
2Timothy1:8 Naizvozvo usanyadziswa nokupupurira Ishe wedu, kana ini, musungwa wake, asi utambudzike pamwe chete neni nokuda kweevhangeri nesimba raMwari," 
2Timothy1:9 wakatiponesa, akatidana nokudana kutsvene, zvisingabvi pamabasa edu, asi nokufunga kwake, nenyasha dzaakatiitira munaKristu Jesu nguva dzisati dzavapo," 
2Timothy1:10 asi kwakaratidzwa zvino nokuvonekwa koMuponesi wedu, Kristu Jesu, iye wakaparadza rufu, akabudisa pachena vupenyu nokusavora nenzira yeevhangeri," 
2Timothy1:11 yandakaitwa muparidzi, nomuapositora, nomudzidzisi waVahedheni." 
2Timothy1:12 Nemhaka iyi ndinotambudzika vo nezvinhu izvi, asi handinyadziswi, nokuti ndinoziva wandakatenda, ndinoziva kwazvo, kuti unogona kuchengeta chandakamupa kusvikira zuva irero." 
2Timothy1:13 Batisisa zvawakaratidzwa zvamashoko akarurama, izvo zvawakanzwa kwandiri mukutenda norudo ruri munaKristu Jesu." 
2Timothy1:14 Icho chakanaka, chawakapiwa, uchichengete noMweya Mutsvene unogara matiri." 
2Timothy1:15 Unozviziva hako kuti vose vari paAsia vakandifuratira; pakati pavo panaFigero naHermogene. 
2Timothy1:16 Ishe ngaaitire imba yaOnesiforo ngoni, nokuti kazhinji wakandisimbisa, asi nganyadziswi neketani yangu." 
2Timothy1:17 Asi wakati asvika Roma, akanditsvaka zvikuru, akandiwana." 
2Timothy1:18 (Ishe ngaamuitire chinhu ichi kuti awane ngoni kunaShe nezuva irero); newe unoziva kwazvo vukuru bwokushumira kwake paEfeso. 
2Timothy2:1 Naizvozvo iwe, mwana wangu, iva nesimba munyasha dziri munaKristu Jesu." 
2Timothy2:2 Izvo zvawakanzwa kwandiri pamberi pezvapupu zvizhinji, uzvipe vanhu vakatendeka, vanogona vo kudzidzisa vamwe." 
2Timothy2:3 Utambudzike pamwe chete neni, somurwi wakanaka waKristu Jesu." 
2Timothy2:4 Hakunomunhu unorwa papfumo unozvipinganidza namabasa ovupenyu bwuno, kuti agone kufadza uyo wakakokera kuhondo." 
2Timothy2:5 Nomunhuvo kana achivivana navamwe, haashongedzwi korona, kana asina kuvivana sezvakarairwa." 
2Timothy2:6 Murimi unobate-basa ndiye unofanira kutanga kudya zvibereko. 
2Timothy2:7 Funga zvandinoreva, nokuti Ishe uchakupa kunzwisisa pazvinhu zvose." 
2Timothy2:8 Rangarira Jesu Kristu wakamuka kuvakafa, worudzi rwaDhavhidhi, sezvandinoparidza paevhangeri yangu;" 
2Timothy2:9 yandinotambudzikira kusvikira pakusungwa somunyangadzi; asi shoko raMwari harina kusungwa. 
2Timothy2:10 Saka ndinotsungirira pazvinhu zvose nokuda kwavakasanangurwa, kuti naivo vawane kuponeswa kuri munaKristu Jesu, pamwe chete nokubwinya kusingaperi." 
2Timothy2:11 Ishoko rechokwadi; nokuti kana tikafa pamwe chete naye, tichararama vo pamwe chete naye." 
2Timothy2:12 Kana tikatsungirira, tichabata vushe pamwe chete naye; kana tikamuramba, iye uchatirambavo." 
2Timothy2:13 Kana isu tisakatendeka, iye unoramba akatendeka, nokuti haangazvirambi iye." 
2Timothy2:14 Uvayevudzire zvinhu izvi, uvaraire pamberi paMwari, kuti varege kuita nharo dzisina maturo, zvinongoparadza vanonzwa." 
2Timothy2:15 Shingaira kuti uzviratidze pamberi paMwari uri munhu wakatendeka, mubati usingafaniri hake kunyadziswa, unonatsa kururamisa shoko rechokwadi." 
2Timothy2:16 Nzvenga kutaura kusinehanya naMwari; nokuti vacharamba vachingonyanya pakusanamata Mwari," 
2Timothy2:17 neshoko ravo richanyenga seronda; pakati pavo kunaHimenayo naFireto; 
2Timothy2:18 ivo vakarashika pachokwadi, vachiti, kumuka kwavakafa kwatopfuvura, vachikanganisa kutenda kwavamwe." 
2Timothy2:19 Kunyange zvakadaro, nheyo dzakasimba dzaMwari dzinomira, dzinechisimbiso ichi: Ishe unoziva vanhu vake; vuye: Mumwe nomumwe unoreva zita raShe ngaabve pakusarurama." 
2Timothy2:20 Zvino muimba huru hamuna midziyo yendarama neyesirvheri bedzi, asi mimwe yamatanda vo, neyevhu; mimwe inokudzwa, mimwe isingakudzwi." 
2Timothy2:21 Naizvozvo kana munhu achizvinatsa kwazvo pazvinhu izvi, uchava mudziyo unokudzwa, wakaitwa mutsvene, wakakwanira basa raTenzi, wakagadzirirwa mabasa ose akanaka." 
2Timothy2:22 Asi tiza kuchiva kovujaya, uvinge kururama, nokutenda, norudo, norugare, pamwe chete navanodana kunaShe nomoyo wakachena." 
2Timothy2:23 Asi urambe mibvunzo yovupenzi nokusaziva, uchiziva kuti zvinobereka kukakavara." 
2Timothy2:24 Zvino muranda waShe haafaniri kukakavara, asi ave munyoro kuvanhu vose, unoziva kudzidzisa, unotsungirira pakuitirwa zvakaipa," 
2Timothy2:25 unodzidzisa novunyoro avo vanomudzivisa, kuti zvimwe Mwari avape kutendevuka vagoziva chokwadi," 
2Timothy2:26 vapengenukezve, vabve pamusungo waDhiabhorosi, wavakanga vakabatwa naye kuti vaite kuda kwake." 
2Timothy3:1 Zvino uzive chinhu ichi, kuti namazuva okupedzisira nguva dzokutambudzika dzichasvika." 
2Timothy3:2 Nokuti vanhu vachava vanozvida, vanoda mari, vanozvirumbidza, vanozvikudza, vanotuka, vasingateereri vabereki, vasingavongi, vasati vari vatsvene," 
2Timothy3:3 vasinorudo chairwo, vasingadi kuyanana, vanochera vamwe, vasingazvidzori, vanehasha, vasingadi zvinhu zvakanaka," 
2Timothy3:4 vanonyengera, vasingarangariri, vanoita manyawi, vanoda zvinofadza zvenyika kupfuvura Mwari;" 
2Timothy3:5 vanomufananidzochetewokunamata Mwari, asi vakarasha simba rako; ufuratire vanhu ivavavo." 
2Timothy3:6 Nokuti pakati pavo varipo vanopinda mudzimba vachiverevedza, vachitapa zvikadzi zvakaremedzwa nezvivi, zvinokwebwa nokuchiva kuzhinji," 
2Timothy3:7 zvinongogara zvichidzidza, asi hazvitongogoni kusvika pakuziva chokwadi." 
2Timothy3:8 Jane naJambre sezvavakadzivisa Mozisi, saizvozvo ivo vanodzivisa chokwadi, vari vanhu vanendangariro dzakavodzwa, vakarashika pakutenda." 
2Timothy3:9 Asi havachapfuvuriri mberi, nokuti vupenzi bwavo bwuchavonekwa navose, sezvakazoita bwavo." 
2Timothy3:10 Asi iwe wakatevera kudzidzisa kwangu, nomufambire, nokufunga, nokutenda, nomoyo murefu, norudo, nokutsungirira," 
2Timothy3:11 namatambudziko, nenhamo, izvo zvakandiwira paAntiokia, napaIkonio, napaRistra; matambudziko makuru sei andakanzwa pazvinhu izvozvo zvose Ishe wakandisunungura." 
2Timothy3:12 Zvino, navose vanoda kunamata Mwari munaKristu Jesu vachatambudzwa." 
2Timothy3:13 Asi vanhu vakaipa navanyengeri va chanyanyisa pakuipa, vachitsausa vamwe nokutsauswa ivo." 
2Timothy3:14 Asi iwe, rambira pane zvawakadzidza zvikasimbiswa kwauri, uzive kuti wakazvidzidza kuna ani," 
2Timothy3:15 kuti kubvira pavucheche bwako wakaziva Manyoro Matsvene anogona kukupa vuchenjeri bwunoisa kukuponeswa nokutenda kuri munaKristu Jesu. 
2Timothy3:16 Rugwaro rwose rwakafuridzirwa naMwari, runobatsira pakudzidzisa, nokuraira, nokururamisa, nokuranga kuri mukururama," 
2Timothy3:17 kuti munhu waMwari akwane, agadzirirwa kwazvo mabasa ose akanaka." 
2Timothy4:1 Ndinokupupurira kwazvo naizvozvo pamberi paMwari, naShe Jesu Kristu, iye uchatonga vapenyu navakafa pakuvonekwa kwake novushe bwake;" 
2Timothy4:2 paridza shoko; ramba uchidaro nenguva yakafanira, kunyange isakafanira; raira, tuka, ranga nomoyo murefu zvikuru nokudzidzisa." 
2Timothy4:3 Nokuti nguva ichasvika yavacharamba kutendera dzidziso yakarurama, asi, vachida kufadzwa panzeve dzavo, vachizvivunganidzira vadzidzisi pakuchiva kwavo," 
2Timothy4:4 vachifuratidza nzeve dzavo pachokwadi, vachitsaukira kungano." 
2Timothy4:5 Asi iwe svinura pazvinhu zvose, tambudzika, bata basa romuevhangeri, upedzise basa rako kwazvo." 
2Timothy4:6 Nokuti ini ndotodururwa, nguva yokuenda kwangu yasvika." 
2Timothy4:7 Ndarwa kurwa kwakanaka, ndapedza rwendo rwangu, ndakachengeta kutenda;" 
2Timothy4:8 kubva zvino ndakachengeterwa, korona yokururama, yandichapiwa naShe, Mutongi wakarurama, nezuva irero; ndisini ndoga, asi navose vanoda kuvonekwa kwake." 
2Timothy4:9 Shingaira kuti ukurumidze kuvuya kwandiri. 
2Timothy4:10 Nokuti Dhemasi wakandisiya, akada nyika yazvino. Akaenda Tesaronika; Kreske wakaenda Garatia, naTito wakaenda Dharmatia." 
2Timothy4:11 Ruka oga uneni. Tora Mako uvuye naye nokuti unondibatsira kwazvo pabasa. 
2Timothy4:12 Asi Tikiko ndakamutuma Efeso. 
2Timothy4:13 Nguvo yandakasiya paTroa kunaKarpo, uvuye nayo pakuvuya kwako, nebhuku, zvikuru magwaro amatebwe." 
2Timothy4:14 Areksandro, mupfuri wendarira, wakandiitira zvakaipa zvizhinji; Ishe uchamutsiva paakaita napo;" 
2Timothy4:15 newevo umuchenjere, nokuti wakadzivisa zvikuru mashoko edu." 
2Timothy4:16 Pakuzvidavirira kwangu kokutanga kwakanga kusino munhu wakandibatsira, asi vose vakandisiya. Ngavarege kuravirwa izvozvi." 
2Timothy4:17 Asi Ishe wakamira neni, akandisimbisa, kuti ndipedzise kwazvo kuparidza kwangu, vahedheni vose vanzwe; ndikarwirwa pamuromo weshumba." 
2Timothy4:18 Ishe uchandirwira pamabasa ose akaipa, uchandiponesa ndipinde vushe bwake bwokudenga; kubwinya ngakuve kwaari nokusingaperi-peri. Ameni." 
2Timothy4:19 Ndikwazisirei Priska naAkwira, neimba yaOnesiforo." 
2Timothy4:20 Erasto wakasara paKorinde, asi Trofimo ndakamusiya paMireto achirwara." 
2Timothy4:21 Shingaira kuvuya, chando chisati chasvika. Yubhuro, naPudhe, naRina, naKraudhia nehama dzose vanokukwazisa." 
2Timothy4:22 Ishe Jesu Kristu ngaave nomweya wako. Nyasha ngadzive nemi. Ameni. 
Titus1:1 Pauro, muranda waMwari, nomuapositora waJesu Kristu, nokuda kokutenda kwavakasanangurwa vaMwari, nokokuzivisa chokwadi iri pakunamata Mwari," 
Titus1:2 patariro yovupenyu bwusingaperi, bwaakapikira iye Mwari, usingatongorevi nhema, nguva dzisingaperi dzisati dzavapo," 
Titus1:3 asi panguva dzakafanira wakazivisa shoko rake nokuparidza kwandakapiwa nomurairo waMwari, Muponesi wedu;" 
Titus1:4 kunaTito, mwana wangu chaiye pakutenda kwedu tose: Nyasha netsitsi norugare, zvinobva kunaMwari Baba, naIshe Jesu Kristu, Muponesi wedu, ngazvive newe." 
Titus1:5 Ndakakusiya paKrete nemhaka iyi, kuti upedzise kugadzira izvo zvakanga zvasara, nokugadza vakuru mumaguta ose, sezvandakakuraira;" 
Titus1:6 kana kunomunhu usina chaangapomerwa, murume womukadzi mumwe chete, unavana vakatendeka, vasingapiwi mhosva yokuti havazvidzori, kana kuti havateereri." 
Titus1:7 Nokuti mutariri unofanira kuva munhu usina chaangapomerwa, somuchengeti weimba yaMwari; asingaiti kuda kwake, asingakurumidzi kutsamwa, asingadi waini, asingarwi, asingakariri fuma yakaipa;" 
Titus1:8 asi unoitira vaeni rudo, unoda zvakanaka, wakachenjera, wakarurama, mutsvene, unozvidzora;" 
Titus1:9 unobatisisa shoko rechokwadi, sezvarinodzidziswa, kuti agone kuraira nedzidziso yakarurama, nokukunda vanokakavara." 
Titus1:10 Nokuti vazhinji varipo vasingateereri, vanotaura zvisina maturo, vanonyengera, zvikuru avo vokudzingiswa," 
Titus1:11 vanofanira kudzivirirwa miromo yavo; vanoparadza mhuri kwazvo, zvavanodzidzisa zvisakafanira nokuda kwefuma yakaipa." 
Titus1:12 Mumwe wavo, muporofita wokwavo, wakati: VaKrete vanogara vachireva nhema, zvikara zvakaipa, navanokara vanovusimbe." 
Titus1:13 Kupupura uku ndokwechokwadi. Nemhaka iyi uvarange zvikuru, kuti varurame pakutenda." 
Titus1:14 varege kuteerera ngano dzavaJudha, nemirairo yavanhu vanofuratira chokwadi." 
Titus1:15 Kuna vakachena zvose zvakachena; asi kuna vakasvibiswa, vasingatendi, hakunechinhu chakachena, asi kufunga kwavo nehana yavo zvakasvibiswa." 
Titus1:16 Vanoti, tinoziva Mwari, asi vanomuramba namabasa avo, zvavari vanhu vanonyangadza, vasingateereri, vasakafanira pamabasa ose akanaka." 
Titus2:1 Zvino iwe, taura zvakafanira dzidziso yakarurama." 
Titus2:2 Varume vakuru ngavave vakasvinuka, vanokudzwa, vakangwara, vakarurama pakutenda, naparudo, napakutsungirira;" 
Titus2:3 saizvozvovo vakadzi vakuru ngavave nomufambire wakafanira vatsvene, vasingacheri, kana kuda waini zhinji, asi vave vadzidzisi vezvakanaka;" 
Titus2:4 kuti vadzidzise vakadzi vaduku, kuti vade varume vavo, nokuda vana vavo." 
Titus2:5 vave vakangwara, vakachena, vanogara pamusha, vakanaka, vanoteerera varume vavo, kuti shoko raMwari rirege kumhurwa." 
Titus2:6 Saizvozvovo varume vaduku uvaraire kuti vave vakangwara; 
Titus2:7 pazvinhu zvose iwe umene uvaratidze makwara amabasa akanaka; uve nokusakanganisa pakudzidzisa, nomugarire unokudzwa.," 
Titus2:8 nokutaura kwakarurama, kusingagoni kushovorwa, kuti unopesana nesu anyadziswe, asi nechinhu chakaipa chaangareva pamusoro pedu." 
Titus2:9 Varanda ngavazviise pasi pavatenzi vavo, vavafadze pazvinhu zvose, vasingakakavari;" 
Titus2:10 vasingabi, asi varatidze kutendeka kwakanaka kose, kuti vashongedze dzidziso yaMwari, Muponesi wedu, pazvinhu zvose." 
Titus2:11 Nokuti nyasha dzaMwari dzakavonekwa, dzinovigira vanhu vose kuponeswa," 
Titus2:12 Dzichitidzidzisa isu kuti tirambe kusanamata Mwari nokuchiva zvenyika, tirarame nokungwara, nokururama, nokunamata Mwari panguva ino," 
Titus2:13 takatarira tariro inofadza, nokuvonekwa kokubwinya kwaMwari mukuru, noMuponesi wedu, Kristu Jesu." 
Titus2:14 wakazvipa nokuda kwedu, kuti atidzikinure pazvisakarurama zvose, kuti azvinatsire vanhu vave vake chaivo, vanhu vanoshingairira mabasa akanaka." 
Titus2:15 Taura zvinhu izvi, uraire, urange nesimba rose; ngakurege kuva nomunhu unokuzvidza." 
Titus3:1 Uvayevudzire kuti vazviise pasi pavabati navanesimba, kuti vateerere, kuti vave vanhu vakazvigadzira kubata mabasa ose akanaka," 
Titus3:2 varege kurevera mumwe zvakaipa, varege kuva negakava, vave vanyoro, vaitire vanhu vose vunyoro bwose." 
Titus3:3 Nokuti nesuvo kare taiva vokusafunga, tisingateereri, takarashika, tiri varanda vokuchiva kuzhinji navezvose zvinofadza, tigere mukati mokushata negodo, tichivengwa, tichivengana." 
Titus3:4 Asi vunyoro bwaMwari, Muponesi wedu, norudo rwake kuvanhu, zvakati zvavonekwa," 
Titus3:5 wakatiponesa, asingazviiti nokuda kwamabasa akarurama, atakanga taita isu, asi nokuda kwenyasha dzake, nenzira yokushambidzwa kokuberekwa kutsva nokuvandudzwa noMweya Mutsvene," 
Titus3:6 waakadurura achiwanza pamusoro pedu, naJesu Kristu Muponesi wedu," 
Titus3:7 kuti isu, taruramiswa nenyasha dzake, tiitwe vadyi venhaka nokuda kwetariro yovupenyu bwusingaperi." 
Titus3:8 Ishoko rechokwadi, uye ndinoda kuti usimbise kwazvo zvinhu izvi, zvokuti avo vakatenda Mwari vachenjere kuti varambe vachiita mabasa akanaka. Ndizvo zvakanaka, zvinobatsira vanhu;" 
Titus3:9 asi unzvenge mibvunzo yovupenzi, namazita amadziteteguru, negakava, nokukakavara pamusoro pomurairo, nokuti hazvina maturo, hazvinebasa." 
Titus3:10 Munhu unodzidzisa zvakatsauka, kana arairwa kamwe norwechipiri, umurambe," 
Titus3:11 zvaunoziva kuti wakadaro wakatsauka, unotadza, wazvipa mhosva amene." 
Titus3:12 Kana ndichituma Artema kwauri, kana Tikiko, ushingaire kuvuya kwandiri Nikopori; nokuti ndakati ndichagara chando ikoko." 
Titus3:13 Zenasi, nyanzvi yomutemo, naAporo, uvaise zvakanaka parwendo, varege kushaiwa chinhu." 
Titus3:14 Vanhu vedu ngavadzidzevo kuramba vachiita mabasa akanaka, kuti vabatsire panoshaikwa zvinofanira kuvapo, kuti varege kuva vanhu vasinezvibereko." 
Titus3:15 vose vari kwandiri vanokukwazisa. Ndikwazisire avo vanotida pakutenda. Nyasha ngadzive nemwi mose. 
Philemon1:1 Pauro, musungwa waKristu Jesu, naTimotio, hama yedu, kunaFiremoni, mudikamwa wedu nounobata nesu," 
Philemon1:2 nokunaApfia, hanzvadzi yedu, nokunaArkipo, murwi pamwe chete nesu, nokukereke iri mumba mako;" 
Philemon1:3 Nyasha ngadzive nemi, norugare zvinobva kunaMwari, baba vedu, naShe Jesu Kristu." 
Philemon1:4 Ndinovonga Mwari wangu nguva dzose kana ndichikurangarirai paminyengetero yangu. 
Philemon1:5 Zvandinonzwa zvorudo rwako nokutenda kwaunako kunaShe Jesu nokuvatsvene vose; 
Philemon1:6 Kuti kugovana kokutenda kwako kuve nesimba Nokuzivisa zvakanaka zvose zviri mauri munaKristu Jesu. 
Philemon1:7 Nokuti tinomufaro mukuru nokunyaradzwa murudo rwako, nokuti moyo yavatswene yakavaraidzwa newe hama yangu." 
Philemon1:8 Naizvozvo, kunyange ndisingatongotyi munaKristu kukuraira kuita zvakafanira," 
Philemon1:9 kunyange zvakadaro, nokuda korudo ndinoita zvokukumbira zvikuru, zvandakadai hangu, ini Pauro, mutana, uye zvino musungwa waKristu Jesu." 
Philemon1:10 Ndinokumbira zvikuru kwauri pamusoro pomwana wangu, wandakabereka pakusungwa kwangu, Onesimo," 
Philemon1:11 wakanga asingakubatsiri kare, asi zvino unokubatsira zvikuru, iwe neni;" 
Philemon1:12 wandatumirazve kwauri, naizvozvo iwe umugamuchire uyo uri vura hwangu chaibwo." 
Philemon1:13 ndaida kuti agare neni, kuti panzvimbo yako andishumire pakusungwa kwangu nokuda kweevhangeri;" 
Philemon1:14 asi ndakanga ndisingadi kuita chinhu, iwe usati watenda, kuti zvakanaka zvaungaita zvirege kuitwa nokurovererwa, asi nokuda kwako." 
Philemon1:15 Nokuti zvimwe wakaparadzaniswa newe chinguva nemhaka iyi, kuti ugozova naye nokusingaperi;" 
Philemon1:16 arege kuzova muranda, asi munhu unopfuvura muranda, ave hama inodikamwa, munyama nomunaShe, zvikuru kwandiri, asi zvikuru kwazvo kwauri." 
Philemon1:17 Zvino kana uchiti ndiri mugovani newe, umugamuchire sezvaungandigamuchira ini." 
Philemon1:18 Asi kana akakuitira chinhu chisakarurama, kunyange anengava newe, undiravireni izvozvo." 
Philemon1:19 Ini Pauro, ndinozvinyora noruvoko rwangu, ndicharipa; ndisingarevi hangu kuti pamusoro pezvose unengava kwandiri, ndiyewe umene." 
Philemon1:20 Hongu, hama, ngandive nomufaro kwauri munaShe; uzorodze moyo wangu munaKristu." 
Philemon1:21 Ndinokunyorera, nokuti ndinotenda kuteerera kwako, ndichiziva kuti uchaita vo kupfuvura pandinoreva napo." 
Philemon1:22 Asi ndigadzirirevo pokugara, nokuti ndinotarira kuti muchandipiwa ini nokuda kokunyengetera kwenyu." 
Philemon1:23 Epafrasi, musungwa pamwe chete neni munaKristu, unokukwazisa." 
Philemon1:24 NaMarko, naAristarko, naDemasi, naRuka, vanobate-basa pamwe chete neni." 
Philemon1:24 NaMarko, naAristarko, naDemasi, naRuka, vanobate-basa pamwe chete neni." 
Philemon1:25 Nyasha dzaShe Jesu Kristu ngadzive nomweya wenyu. 
Hebrews1:1 Mwari wakataura kare kunamadzibaba muvaporofita nemigove mizhinji, uye nemitovo mizhinji," 
Hebrews1:2 zvino pakupedzisira kwamazuva ano wakataura kwatiri muMwanakomana wake, waakaita mudyi wenhaka yezvinhu zvose, waakaitavo naye nyika;" 
Hebrews1:3 iye chadzera chokubwinya kwake, nomufananidzo wake chaiye, unotakura zvinhu zvose neshoko resimba rake, wakati anatsa zvivi zvedu iye pachake, akagara kurudyi rwoVumambo kudenga," 
Hebrews1:4 akapfuvura vatumwa nokunaka saizvozvo, sezita raakagara nhaka yaro," 
Hebrews1:5 Nokuti wakambotaura kunani wavatumwa, achiti: Ndiwe Mwanakomana wangu, Nhasi ndakubereka? uye zve: Ndichava Baba vake, Iye uchava Mwanakomana wangu?" 
Hebrews1:6 Vuye, kana achizovuyisazve dangwe rake panyika, unoti: Vatumwa vose vaMwari ngavamunamate." 
Hebrews1:7 Napamusoro pavatumwa unoti: Iye unoita vatumwa vake kuti vave Mhepo, Navaranda vake, kuti vave murazvo womoto;" 
Hebrews1:8 Asi pamusoro poMwanakomana, unoti: Chigaro chenyu chovushe, imwi Mwari, chiripo nokusingaperi-peri, Netsvimbo yokururama ndiyo tsvimbo yovushe bwako." 
Hebrews1:9 Makada kururama, mukavenga kusarurama; Saka Mwari, iye Mwari wenyu, wakakuzodzai Namafuta okufara kupfuvura shamwari dzenyu." 
Hebrews1:10 Vuye, Imi, Ishe, makateya nheyo dzenyika pakutanga, Nedenga ndiro basa ramavoko enyu;" 
Hebrews1:11 Iro richapera, asi imwi mucharamba muripo;Richasakara rose senguvo;" 
Hebrews1:12 Mucharipeta sechinofukwa, Senguvo, rikashandurwa; Asi imwi makangodaro, namakore enyu haangagumi." 
Hebrews1:13 Asi wakambotaura kunani wavatumwa, achiti: Gara kurudyi rwangu, Kusvikira ndichiita vavengi vako vave chitsiko chetsoka dzako?" 
Hebrews1:14 Ko havazi vose mweya inoshumira, yakatumwa, kuzobata nokuda kwavanodya nhaka yokuponeswa here?" 
Hebrews2:1 Saka tinofanira kuteerera zvikuru izvo zvatakanzwa, kuti tirege kukukurwa." 
Hebrews2:2 Nokuti kana shoko, rakanga rataurwa navatumwa, rakanga rakasimba, uye kana kudarika nokusateerera kose kwakapiwa mubairo wakarurama," 
Hebrews2:3 ko isu tichapukunyuka sei, kana tisinehanya nokuponeswa kukuru kwakadai? Uku kwakaparidzwa pakutanga naShe, kukasimbiswa kwatiri naivo vakanzwa;" 
Hebrews2:4 naiye Mwarivo achipupurirana navo nezviratidzo nezvinoshamisa, namabasa esimba mazhinji, nezvipo zvoMweya Mutsvene, nokuda kwake." 
Hebrews2:5 Nokuti nyika, inozovuya, yatinoreva, haana kuiisa pasi pavatumwa." 
Hebrews2:6 Asi mumwe wakapupura kwazvo paneimwe nzvimbo, achiti: Ko munhu chinyiko, zvamunomufunga? Kana mwanakomana womunhu, zvamunomushanyira?" 
Hebrews2:7 Makamuita muduku zvishoma kuvatumwa, Makamushongedza korona nokubwinya nokukudzwa, mukamubatisa vushe hwamabasa amavoko enyu." 
Hebrews2:8 Mukaisa zvinhu zvose pasi petsoka dzake. Nokuti pakuisa kwake zvinhu zvose pasi pake, haana kusiya chinhu chimwe, chisina kuiswa pasi pake. Asi zvino tigere kuvona kuti zvinhu zvose zvakaiswa pasi pake." 
Hebrews2:9 Asi tinomuvona, iye Jesu, wakaitwa muduku zvishoma kuvatumwa, nokuda kokutambudzika korufu, wakashongedzwa korona yokubwinya nokukudzwa,kuti nokuda kwenyasha dzaMwari aravire rufu achiitira munhu wose." 
Hebrews2:10 Nokuti zvakanga zvakafanira kuti iye, wakaitirwa zvinhu zvose, uye wakaita zvinhu zvose, pakuisa kwake vanakomana vazhinji pakubwinya, akwanise Mutungamiriri wokuponeswa kwavo nenzira yokutambudzika." 
Hebrews2:11 Nokuti uyo, unovaita vatsvene, naivo vanoitwa vatsvene, vose vakabva kunomumwe; nemhaka iyi haanenyadzi kuvaidza hama," 
Hebrews2:12 Zvaanoti: Ndichaparidzira hama dzangu zita renyu, Ndichakuimbirai pakati pekereke." 
Hebrews2:13 Vuyezve: Ndichavimba naye. Vuyezve: Tarirai, ini navana vandakapiwa naMwari." 
Hebrews2:14 Naizvozvo, vana zvavakagoverwa ropa nenyama, naiyevo wakagovana navo panaizvozvi; kuti nokufa kwake iye aparadze uyo unesimba rorufu, iye Dhiabhorosi;" 
Hebrews2:15 agosunungura avo vaiva varanda pavupenyu bwavo bwose nokuda kokutya rufu. 
Hebrews2:16 Nokuti zvirokwazvo, haana kutora chimiro chavatumwa, asi wakazvitorera vana vaAbhurahamu." 
Hebrews2:17 Naizvozvo wakafanira kuti aenzaniswe nehama dzake pazvinhu zvose, kuti ave muprista mukuru unengoni, wakatendeka pazvinhu zvaMwari, kuti adzikinure zvivi zvavanhu." 
Hebrews2:18 Nokuti zvaakatambudzika iye amene pakuidzwa kwake, unogona kubatsira vanoidzwa." 
Hebrews3:1 Naizvozvo, hama tsvene, vagoverani neni pakudamwa kunobva kudenga, fungai zvakanaka Muapositora noMuprista mukuru wokupupura kwedu, iye Jesu Kristu," 
Hebrews3:2 wakanga akatendeka kunaiye wakamugadza, saMozisivo muimba yake yose." 
Hebrews3:3 Nokuti uyu wakanzi wakafanira kukudzwa kupfuvura Mozisi, muvaki weimba sezvaanokudzwa kupfuvura imba;" 
Hebrews3:4 nokuti imba imwe neimwe inovakwa nomunhu, asi iye, wakavaka zvose, ndiye Mwari." 
Hebrews3:5 Zvino Mozisi wakanga akatendeka muimba yake yose somuranda, kuti ave chapupu chezvinhu zvinofanira kuzotaurwa," 
Hebrews3:6 asi Kristu soMwanakomana, wakaiswa pamusoro peimba yake; iye, tiri imba yake isu, kana tikabatisisa kusvika pakuguma kusatya kwedu netariro yatinozvirumbidza pamusoro payo." 
Hebrews3:7 Naizvozvo, sezvinotaura Mweya Mutsvene, achiti: Nhasi, kana muchinzwa inzwi rake," 
Hebrews3:8 Musawomese moyo yenyu, sapanguva yokutsamwiswa, nezuva rokuidzwa murenje" 
Hebrews3:9 Pandakaidzwa namadzibaba enyu, vachindinetsa, Vakavona mabasa angu makore Anamakumi mana." 
Hebrews3:10 Naizvozvo ndakanzwa shungu pamusoro porudzi urwu, Ndikati: Vanogara vachitsauka Pamoyo yavo; Asi havana kuziva nzira dzangu;" 
Hebrews3:11 Naizvozvo ndakapika pakutsamwa kwangu, ndikati: Havangapindi pazororo rangu. Vanotenda voga ndivo vanopinda pazororo." 
Hebrews3:12 Hama dzangu, chenjerai kuti mukati momumwe wenyu murege kuva nomoyo wakashata usingatendi, mutsauke muchibva kunaMwari mupenyu," 
Hebrews3:13 asi simbisanai zuva rimwe nerimwe, kana kuchinzi Nhasi; kuti kurege kuva nomumwe wenyu unowomeswa nokunyengera kwezvivi." 
Hebrews3:14 Nokuti tava vagoverani pamwe chete naKristu, kana tichibatisisa kuvamba kokutenda kwedu kusvikira pakuguma;" 
Hebrews3:15 zvichinzi: Nhasi, kana muchinzwa inzwi rake, Musawomesa moyo yenyu, sapanguva yokutsamwisa." 
Hebrews3:16 Nokuti ndivanani vakanzwa, vakamutsamwisa? Havazi ivo vose vakabva Ijipiti naMozisi here?" 
Hebrews3:17 Wakanzwa shungu makore anamakumi mana pamusoro pavanani? Havazi ivo vakatadza, mitumbu yavo ikawira murenje here?" 
Hebrews3:18 Wakapika pamusoro pavanani kuti havangapindi pazororo rake? Havazi ivo vasina kutenda here? 
Hebrews3:19 Zvino tinovona kuti vakanga vasingagoni kupinda nokusatenda kwavo. 
Hebrews4:1 Naizvozvo, chipikirwa chokupinda muzororo rake zvachichipo, tinofanira kutya kuti zvimwe kurege kuva nomumwe wenyu uchawanikwa asingafaniri kupindamo." 
Hebrews4:2 Nokuti nesuvo takaparidzirwa evhangeri, saivo; asi shoko ravakanzwa, harina kuvabatsira, nokuti harina kuvhenganiswa nokutenda kwaivo vakanzwa." 
Hebrews4:3 Nokuti isu vakatenda, tinopinda pazororo irero, sezvaakareva, achiti: Naizvozvo ndakapika pakutsamwa kwangu, ndikati: Havangapindi muzororo rangu; kunyange mabasa ake akanga akwaniswa kubva pakuvambwa kwenyika." 
Hebrews4:4 Nokuti paneimwe nzvimbo wakataura pamusoro pezuva rechinomwe, achiti: Mwari wakazorora nezuva rechinomwe pamabasa ake ose;" 
Hebrews4:5 napano zve: Havangapindi muzororo rangu. 
Hebrews4:6 Naizvozvo, shoko zvarichipo kuti vamwe vachapinda pariri, uye kuti avo vakaparidzirwa evhangeri kare havana kupinda nokusateerera kwavo," 
Hebrews4:7 unotara zve rimwe zuva, achiti muna Dhavhidhi, Nhasi nguva huru yakadai yapfuvura, sezvakwakambotaurwa kare, zvichinzi, Nhasi, kana muchinzwa inzwi rake, musawomesa moyo yenyu." 
Hebrews4:8 Nokuti dai Joshua akanga avapa zororo, haazaizoreva rimwe zuva pashure." 
Hebrews4:9 Zvino zororo resabata ravanhu vaMwari richipo. 
Hebrews4:10 Nokuti uyo wakapinda muzororo rake, wakazorora iye amene pamabasa ake, saMwari panaake." 
Hebrews4:11 Naizvozvo ngatishingaire kuti tipinde muzororo irero, kuti munhu arege kuvapo unozowa achitevera nzira iyo yokusateerera." 
Hebrews4:12 Nokuti shoko raMwari ibenyu, rinesimba, rinopinza kukunda munondo unocheka kumativi maviri, rinobaya kusvikira panoparadzana moyo nomweya, namafundo nomongo; rinotonga mifungo nendangariro dzomoyo." 
Hebrews4:13 Hakune chisikwa chisingavonekwi naye, asi zvinhu zvose zvakafukurwa nokuzarurwa pameso aiye watinofanira kuzvidavirira kwaari." 
Hebrews4:14 Naizvozvo, zvatinomuprista mukuru kwazvo, wakapinda napakati pokudenga, iye Jesu, Mwanakomana waMwari, ngatibatisise kupupura kwedu." 
Hebrews4:15 Nokuti hatinomuprista mukuru usingagoni kutinzwira tsitsi pavutera bwedu, asi wakaidzwa pazvinhu zvose sesu, asinezvivi." 
Hebrews4:16 Naizvozvo, ngatiswederei tisingatyi kuchigaro chovushe chenyasha, kuti tinzwirwe ngoni, tiwane nyasha, tibatsirwe nenguva yakafanira." 
Hebrews5:1 Nokuti muprista mukuru mumwe nomumwe, wakatorwa kuvanhu, unogadzwa nokuda kwavanhu pazvinhu zvaMwari, kuti abayire zvipo nezvibayiro pamusoro pezvivi;" 
Hebrews5:2 iye unogona kunzwira tsitsi avo vasingazivi navakatsauka, nokuti naiyevo amene wakakomberedzwa novutera." 
Hebrews5:3 Nemhaka iyo iye amene unofanira kuzvibayira pamusoro pezvivi zvake, sezvaanobayira zvavanhu." 
Hebrews5:4 Hakuna munhu ungazvitorera basa iri rinokudzwa, asi kana achidamwa naMwari saiye Aroni." 
Hebrews5:5 Saizvozvovo Kristu haana kuzvikudza iye, achiitwa muprista mukuru, asi wakakudzwa naiye, wakati kwaari; Ndiwe Mwanakomana wangu, Nhasi ndakubereka;" 
Hebrews5:6 Sezvaanorevavo paneimwe nzvimbo, achiti: Ndiwe Muprista nokusingaperi wegwara ""reimba"" yaMerkizedheki." 
Hebrews5:7 Iye, pamazuva enyama yake, wakavuya kunaiye wakanga achigona kumurwira parufu, neminyengetero nemikumbiro, achichema nokuchema kukuru nemisodzi, akanzwika nokuda kokutya kwake Mwari;" 
Hebrews5:8 kunyange aiva Mwanakomana, wakadzidza kuteerera nezvaakatambudzika;" 
Hebrews5:9 akati akwaniswa, akazova muvambi wokuponeswa kusingaperi kunavose vanomuteerera;" 
Hebrews5:10 akanzi naMwari Muprista mukuru wegwara reimba yaMerikizedheki. 
Hebrews5:11 Tinamashoko mazhinji atingataura pamusoro pake, anorema kududzira, zvamava vanhu vasichagoni kunzwisisa kwazvo." 
Hebrews5:12 Nokuti, kunyange maifanira kuva vadzidzisi zvino, kana tichitarira nguva, mofanirazve kuti muve nomumwe unokudzidzisai zvidzidzo zvokutanga zvokuvamba kwezvirevo zvaMwari; mava vanhu vanofanira kupiwazve mukaka, vasingapiwi zvokudya zvikukutu." 
Hebrews5:13 Nokuti mumwe nomumwe unodya mukaka haanzwisisi shoko rokururama, nokuti mucheche hake." 
Hebrews5:14 Asi zvokudya zvikukutu ndezvavakuru, vanokuziva kwakadzidziswa, nenzira yokurovedzwa, kuzivisisa zvakanaka nezvakaipa." 
Hebrews6:1 Naizvozvo ngatisiye shoko rokutanga kwaKristu, tipfuvurire mberi pakukwaniswa, tisingaisi zve nheyo dzokutendevuka pamabasa akafa, nedzokutenda kunaMwari," 
Hebrews6:2 nedzedzidziso dzebhabhatidzo, nedzokuisa mavoko, nedzokumuka kwavakafa, nedzokutongwa kusingaperi." 
Hebrews6:3 Ndizvo zvatichaita, kana Mwari achitendera." 
Hebrews6:4 Nokuti kana vari ivo, vakambovhenekerwa, vakaravira chipo chokudenga, vakagoverwa Mweya Mutsvene," 
Hebrews6:5 vakaravira shoko rakanaka raMwari, namasimba enyika inovuya," 
Hebrews6:6 kana vakazotsauka, hazvibviri kuvavandudzazve kuti vatendevuke, nokuti vanozvirovererazve Mwanakomana waMwari pamuchinjikwa, vachimunyadzisa pachena." 
Hebrews6:7 Nokuti nyika iyo, inoti kana yamwa mvura inosinaya pamusoro payo kazhinji, ikabereka mirivo yakafaniravo avo vanoirima, ndiyo inoropafadzwa naMwari;" 
Hebrews6:8 asi kana ikabereka mhinzwa norukato, inorashwa, yobva yotukwa; kuguma kwayo ndiko kupiswa." 
Hebrews6:9 Asi vadikamwa, kunyange tichitaura kudai, tinoziva kwazvo pamusoro penyu zvinhu zvinopfuvura nokunaka, zvinoisa kukuponeswa." 
Hebrews6:10 Nokuti Mwari haazati ari usakarurama, ungakangamwa basa renyu rorudo rwamakaratidza nokuda kwezita rake, zvamakashumira vatsvene, muchivashumira nazvino." 
Hebrews6:11 Zvino tinoda kuti mumwe nomumwe wenyu ashingaire saizvozvo, kuti muve netariro yakakwana kusvikira pakuguma." 
Hebrews6:12 Kuti murege kuva novusimbe, asi muve vateveri vaivo vanodya nhaka yezvipikirwa nenzira yokutenda nokutsungirira." 
Hebrews6:13 Nokuti Mwari pakupikira Abhurahamu, wakapika naiye amene, nokuti wakanga asinomukuru kwaari waangapika naye," 
Hebrews6:14 akati: Zvirokwazvo nokuropafadza ndichakuropafadza, nokuwanza ndichakuwanza." 
Hebrews6:15 Nokudaro, wakati atsungirira, akawana chipikirwa." 
Hebrews6:16 Nokuti vanhu vanopika nomukuru kwavari; nemhiko inosimbisa ndiyo inogumisa gakava rose pakati pavo. 
Hebrews6:17 Saizvozvo Mwari wakati achida zvikuru kuratidza vadyi venhaka yechipikirwa, kuti chirevo chake hachishandurwi, wakapinda pakati nokupika;" 
Hebrews6:18 kuti nezvinhu zviviri zvisingashandurwi, (nokuti pazviri Mwari haagoni kureva nhema), tive nesimbiso yakabata, iyesu, takatizira kutariro yakaiswa pamberi pedu, kuti tibate;" 
Hebrews6:19 yatinayo sechibatiso choMweya, tariro isingazununguswi, yakasimba, inopinda kunezviri mukati mechidzitiro chetembere;" 
Hebrews6:20 pakapinda mutungamiriri nokuda kwedu, iye Jesu wakaitwa muprista mukuru nokusingaperi,wegwara reimba yaMerikizedheki." 
Hebrews7:1 Nokuti Merikizedheki uyo, mambo weSaremi, muprista waMwari Wokumusoro-soro, wakasongana naAbhurahamu pakudzoka kwake andovuraya madzimambo, akamuropafadza;" 
Hebrews7:2 Abhurahamu akamupavo chegumi chezvose; iye pakutanga ari mambo wokururama, kana zvichishandurwa, uye zve, mambo weSaremi, ndokuti, mambo werugare;" 
Hebrews7:3 asinababa, asinamai, asinamadzisekuru, asina kutanga kwamazuva, kana kuguma kovupenyu, asi wakafananidzwa noMwanakomana waMwari, unogara ari muprista nokusingaperi." 
Hebrews7:4 Zvino fungai kukura komunhu uyu, wakapiwa nateteguru Abhurahamu chegumi chezvaakapamba." 
Hebrews7:5 Zvino avo, vari vanakomana vaRevhi, vanopiwa basa rovuprista, vakarairwa nomurairo kuti vatore chegumi kuvanhu, iko kuhama dzavo, kunyange vakabva muchivuno chaAbhurahamu," 
Hebrews7:6 asi uyu, asina kuravirwa rudzi rwake kwavari, wakapiwa zvegumi naAbhurahamu akamuropafadza iye wakanga anezvipikirwa." 
Hebrews7:7 Zvino hatingarambi kuti muduku ndiye unoropafadzwa nounopfuvura nokunaka. 
Hebrews7:8 uye pano, vanhu, vanofa, vanopiwa zvegumi; asi apo uyo unopiwa, unopupurirwa zvichinzi mupenyu." 
Hebrews7:9 Zvino tingati naRevhi, unopiwa zvegumi, iyevo wakapa zvegumi munaAbhurahamu;" 
Hebrews7:10 nokuti wakanga achiri muchivuno chababa vake, pakusongana kwaMerikizedheki naye." 
Hebrews7:11 Naizvozvo, kana kukwaniswa kwaivapo nenzira yovuprista bwaRevhi (nokuti vanhu vakapiwa murairo nokuda kwabwo), ko mumwe muprista waifanira kuzomuka seiko unorudzi naMerikizedheki, asinganzi unorudzi naAroni?" 
Hebrews7:12 Nokuti kana vuprista bwuchishandurwa, nomurairo unofanira kuti ushandurwevo." 
Hebrews7:13 Nokuti uyo unorebwa zvinhu izvi pamusoro pake, wakanga ari worumwe rudzi, rwakanga rusino munhu wakambobate-basa paaritari." 
Hebrews7:14 Nokuti zvinovonekwa pachena, kuti Ishe wedu wakabva kunaJudha; pamusoro porudzi urwu Mozisi haana kureva zvavaprista." 
Hebrews7:15 Izvi zvinoratidzwavo kwazvo, kana kuchimuka mumwe muprista wakafanana naMerikizedheki," 
Hebrews7:16 usina kuitwa muprista nomurairo wokuraira kwenyama, asi nesimba rovupenyu bwusingapedzwi." 
Hebrews7:17 Nokuti iye unopupurirwa, zvichinzi: Iwe uri muprista nokusingaperi, Unorudzi naMerikizedheki." 
Hebrews7:18 Nokuti murau wokutanga unokoneswa nokuda kovutera bwawo, uye nokuti haunamaturo," 
Hebrews7:19 (nokuti murairo hauna kukwanisa chinhu), zvino tariro, inopfuvura nokunaka, ikaiswapo, yatinoswedera nayo kuna Mwari." 
Hebrews7:20 uye zve, zvaasina kuitwa muprista kusinemhiko;" 
Hebrews7:21 (nokuti ivo vakaitwa vaprista kusinemhiko, asi iye nokupika kwaiye, wakati kwaari: Ishe wakapika, haangazvidyi moyozve, achiti: Iwe uri muprista nokusingaperi wegwara ""reimba"" yaMerikizedheki);" 
Hebrews7:22 Saizvozvo Jesu wakaitwa rubatso rwesungano inopfuvura nokunaka. 
Hebrews7:23 Ivo vaiva vaprista vazhinji, nokuti vakadziviswa norufu kugara nokusingaperi," 
Hebrews7:24 Asi iye zvaanogara nokusingaperi unovuprista bwusingapfuvudzwi. 
Hebrews7:25 Naizvozvo unesimba rokuponesa kwazvo-kwazvo avo vanovuya kunaMwari naye, zvaanorarama nokusingaperi kuti avareverere." 
Hebrews7:26 Nokuti muprista mukuru wakadai ndiye wataifanira kuva naye mutsvene, usinechakaipa, usina kusvibiswa, wakaparadzaniswa navatadzi, wakakwidzwa kumusoro kwedenga;" 
Hebrews7:27 usingafaniri, savaya vaprista vakuru, kubayira zuva rimwe nerimwe, pakutanga pamusoro pezvivi zvake, pashure pamusoro pezvivi zvavanhu; nokuti wakaita izvozvi kamwe chete, zvikapera, pakuzviita kwake chibayiro." 
Hebrews7:28 Nokuti murairo unogadza vanhu vanovutera, kuti vave vaprista vakuru; asi shoko rokupika, rakatevera murairo, rinogadza Mwanakomana, wakakwaniswa nokusingaperi." 
Hebrews8:1 Zvino, shoko guru panaizvozvo zvatataura, ndiro kuti: Tinomuprista mukuru wakadai wakagara kurudyi rwechigaro chovushe chovumambo kudenga;" 
Hebrews8:2 iye mushumiri wezvinhu zvitsvene, nowetabhernakeri chaiyo, yakamiswa naShe, isina kumiswa nomunhu." 
Hebrews8:3 Nokuti muprista mukuru mumwe nomumwe wakagadzwa, kuti abayire Mwari zvipo nezvibayiro; naizvozvo naiye waifanira kuti ave nechaangabayiravo;" 
Hebrews8:4 nokuti dai aiva panyika, ungadai asina kuva muprista, nokuti vaparista varipo, vanobayira Mwari zvipo sezvinorebwa nomurairo;" 
Hebrews8:5 ivo vanoshumira mufananidzo nomumvuri wezvokudenga, sezvaakarairwa iye Mozisi oda kuita tabhernakeri;nokuti wakati: Tarira, uite zvose nomufananidzo, wawakaratidzwa mugomo." 
Hebrews8:6 Asi zvino wakapiwa basa rakanyanya kunaka, sezvaari Murevereri wesungano inopfuvura nokunaka, yakasimbiswa nezvipikirwa zvinopfuvura nokunaka." 
Hebrews8:7 Nokuti dai iya yokutanga yakanga isina chaingapomerwa, yechipiri ingadai isina kutsvakirwa nzvimbo." 
Hebrews8:8 Nokuti unovapa mhosva, achiti: Tarirai, mazuva anovuya, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Andichaita nawo sungano itsva neImba yaIsraeri, uye neimba yaJudha." 
Hebrews8:9 Isina kuita sesungano yandakaita Namadzibaba avo, Pazuva randakabata ruvoko rwavo, kuti ndivabudise munyika yeIjipiti;Nokuti havana kurambira musungano yangu, Neni ndikasava nehanya navo, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe;" 
Hebrews8:10 Nokuti ndiyo sungano yandichaita neimba yaIsraeri Kana mazuva iwayo apfuvura, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe; Ndichaisa mirairo yangu pakufunga kwavo,Ivo vachava vanhu vangu;" 
Hebrews8:11 Mumwe nomumwe haangazodzidzisi wokwake, Kana mumwe nomumwe hama yake, achiti: Ziva Ishe; Nokuti vose vachandiziva, Kubva kumuduku kusvikira kumukuru pakati pavo." 
Hebrews8:12 Nokuti ndichava nengoni nokusarurama kwavo, Nezvivi zvavo nokuipa kwavo handichazozvirangariri." 
Hebrews8:13 Zvaanoti: Sungano itsva, yakasakadza yokutanga; zvino chinhu chosakara, chova chakare, choda kurova." 
Hebrews9:1 Zvino, neyiyi sungano yokutanga yakanga inemirairo yokushumira Mwari nayo, neimba tsvene yenyika." 
Hebrews9:2 Nokuti tabhernakeri, yaiva yokutanga, yakagadzirwa, makanga mune chigadziko chemwenje, netafura, nezvingwa zvokuratidza; ndipo panonzi Patsvene." 
Hebrews9:3 Zvino mberi kwechidzitiro chechipiri pakanga panetabhernakeri yainzi Patsvene-tsvene; 
Hebrews9:4 pakanga panendiro yendarama yezvinonhuhwira, neareka yesungano, yakanga yakanamwa nhivi dzose nendarama, imomo makanga munehari yendarama, yakanga inemana, netsvimbo yaAroni, yakadeya kutunga, namabwendefa esungano;" 
Hebrews9:5 pamusoro payo pakanga panamakerubhi okubwinya, akadzikatira chifunhiro chengoni; hatigoni kurondedzera izvozvo tichiita chimwe-chimwe zvino." 
Hebrews9:6 Zvinhu izvi zvakati zvagadzirwa saizvozvo, vaparista vaipinda mutabernakeri yokutanga nguva dzose, vachibata mabasa okushumira Mwari;" 
Hebrews9:7 asi muneyechipiri muprista mukuru waipinda ari oga, kamwe chete negore, asingapindi asineropa, raaizvibayirira iye nezvivi zvavanhu;" 
Hebrews9:8 Mweya Mutsvene achiratidza chinhu ichi, kuti nzira inoenda kuNzvimbo Tsvene yakanga isati yataridzwa, tabernakeri yokutanga ichimire;" 
Hebrews9:9 wakanga uri mufananidzo wenguva inoyavanobayira nayo zvipo nezvibayiro, zvisingagoni kukwanisa pahana yake iye unoshumira;" 
Hebrews9:10 nokuti yaingova mirairo yenyama, yezvokudya, nezvokumwa, nokushamba kuzhinji, yavakatemerwa kusvikira panguva yokuvandudzwa." 
Hebrews9:11 Asi Kristu wakati asvika ari muprista mukuru wezvinhu zvakanaka zvinozovuya, akapinda napatabhernakeri yakapfuvura pakukura napakukwana, isina kuitwa namavoko, ndiko kuti isati iri yokusikwa kuno," 
Hebrews9:12 haana kupinda neropa rembudzi kana remhuru, asi neropa rake chairo, kamwe, zvikapera, panzvimbo tsvene, akatiwanira rudzikinuro rusingaperi." 
Hebrews9:13 Nokuti kana ropa rembudzi nerenzombe namadota etsiru, kana zvichisaswa pamusoro pavakasvibiswa, zvichivaita vatsvene, kuti vanatswe panyama," 
Hebrews9:14 zvikuru sei ropa raKrsitu, iye wakazviita noMweya usingaperi chibayiro kunaMwari, chisina chachingapomerwa, richanatsa hana dzedu pamabasa akafa, kuti tishumire Mwari mupenyu." 
Hebrews9:15 Nemhaka iyo, iye ndiMurevereri wesungano itsva, kuti, rufu zvarwakasvika kuzodzikunura avo vakadarika pasungano yokutanga, vakadamwa vagopiwa chipikirwa chenhaka isingaperi." 
Hebrews9:16 Nokuti apo pane testamente, panofanira kuvapovo rufu rwaiye wakaiita." 
Hebrews9:17 Nokuti testamente inesimba kana vanhu vafa; nokuti haitongovi nesimba kana wakaiita achiri mupenyu. 
Hebrews9:18 Naizvozvo nesungano yokutanga haina kuvambwa pasine ropa. 
Hebrews9:19 Nokuti zvirevo zvose zvakati zvataurwa kuvanhu vose naMozisi sezvakareva murairo, iye akatora ropa remhuru nerembudzi, pamwe chete nemvura namakushe matsuku, nehisopi, akasasa bhuku imene navanhu vose," 
Hebrews9:20 achiti: Iri iropa resungano, yamakarairwa naMwari." 
Hebrews9:21 uye zve, wakasasa saizvozvo neropa tabhernakeri nemidziyo yose yokushumira nayo." 
Hebrews9:22 Zvirokwazvo tingati pamurairo zvinhu zvinenge zvose zvinonatswa neropa; uye kana kusineropa rinotevurwa, hakunekangamwiro." 
Hebrews9:23 Naizvozvo mifananidzo yezviri kudenga yaifanira kuti inatswe nezvibayiro izvi; asi zvinhu zvokudenga zvimene kuti zvinatswe nezvibayiro zvinopfuvura izvi nokunaka. 
Hebrews9:24 Nokuti Kristu haana kupinda panzvimbo tsvene yakaitwa namavoko, inofananidza iyo iri chaiyo, asi wakapinda kudenga kumene, kuti zvino azviise pamberi paMwari nokuda kwedu;" 
Hebrews9:25 uye haana kupinda kuti azviite chibayiro kazhinji, somuprista mukuru unopinda panzvimbo tsvene gore rimwe nerimwe, akabata ropa rezvimwe zvinhu;" 
Hebrews9:26 nokuti dai zvakanga zvakadaro, ungadai aitambura kazhinji kubva pakuvambwa kwenyika; asi zvino wakavonekwa kamwe chete pakupedzisira kwenguva, kuti aparadze zvivi, nokuzviita chibairo kwake." 
Hebrews9:27 uye vanhu zvavakatemerwa kuti vafe kamwe chete, kutongeswa kugotevera," 
Hebrews9:28 saizvozvo Kristu, wakaitwa chibayiro kamwe chete, kuti atakure zvivi zvavanhu vazhinji, uchazovonekwa rwechipiri, asingatakuri zvivi, naivo vanomutarira kuti avaponese." 
Hebrews10:1 Nokuti murairo zvaunomumvuri wezvinhu zvakanaka zvino vuya usati uri mufananidzo chaiwo wezvinhu izvozvo, haungatongogoni kukwanisa avo vanoswedera gore rimwe nerimwe naizvozvo zvibayiro zvavanoramba vachibayira Mwari." 
Hebrews10:2 dai zvakanga zvakadaro, zvingadai zvisina kupera kubayirwa here? Nokuti vanonamata, kana vakanga vanatswa kamwe chete, vangadai vasina kuzoyevudzwa zvivi zvavo." 
Hebrews10:3 Asi nezvibayiro izvozvo vanoyevudzirwa zvivi gore rimwe nerimwe. 
Hebrews10:4 Nokuti ropa renzombe nerembudzi haritongogoni kubvisa zvivi. 
Hebrews10:5 saka pakusvika kwake panyika, unoti: Chibayiro nechipo makazviramba, Asi makandigadzirira muviri;" 
Hebrews10:6 hamuna kuda zvibayiro zvinopiswa, nezvibayiro zvezvivi;" 
Hebrews10:7 Zvino ndikati: Tarirai, ndavuya, (Murugwaro makanyorwa pamusoro pangu) Kuti ndiite kuda kwenyu, imwi Mwari." 
Hebrews10:8 Zvaanoti pakutanga: Zvibayiro nezvipo, nezvibayiro zvinopiswa, nezvibayiro zvezvivi hamuna kuzvida, hamuna kufadzwa nazvo) zviri izvo zvinobayirwa Mwari sezvinoreva murairo)," 
Hebrews10:9 Ndokuzoti: Tarirai, ndinovuya kuzoita kuda kwenyu imwi Mwari. Unobvisa chokutanga kuti amise chechipiri." 
Hebrews10:10 Nokuda ikoku takaitwa vatsvene nechibayiro chomuviri waJesu Kristu, chakabayirwa kamwe." 
Hebrews10:11 Muprista mumwe nomumwe unomira zuva rimwe nerimwe achishumira, nokubayira kazhinji zvibayiro izvozvo zvisingagoni kubvisa zvivi;" 
Hebrews10:12 asi murume uyu wakati abayira chibayiro kamwe chete pamusoro pezvivi, akagara nokusingaperi kurudyi rwaMwari;" 
Hebrews10:13 kubva zvino achimirira kusvikira vavengi vake vaitwa chitsiko chetsoka dzake. 
Hebrews10:14 Nokuti nechibayiro chimwe chete wakakwanisa nokusingaperi avo vanoitwa vatsvene. 
Hebrews10:15 NoMweya Mutsvene unotipupuriravo; nokuti wakatanga, achiti:" 
Hebrews10:16 Iyi ndiyo sungano yandichaita navo Shure kwamazuva iwayo, ndizo zvinotaura Ishe; Ndichaisa mirairo yangu pamoyo yavo, Nokuinyora pakufunga kwavo; Ndokuzoti:" 
Hebrews10:17 Zvivi zvavo nokudarika kwavo handichatongozvirangariri. 
Hebrews10:18 Zvino, kana zvinhu izvi zvakangamwirwa, zvivi hazvichabayirwi." 
Hebrews10:19 Naizvozvo, hama dzangu, zvatingatsunga kupinda panzvimbo tsvene neropa raJesu," 
Hebrews10:20 nenzira itsva mhenyu, yaakativambira iye nokupinda kwake pachidzitiro chetembere, ndiyo nyama yake;" 
Hebrews10:21 uye zvatinomuprista mukuru paimba yaMwari," 
Hebrews10:22 ngatiswedere nomoyo wechokwadi, nokutenda kwakasimba, moyo yedu yasaswa kuti inatswe pahana yakaipa, nemiviri yedu yakashambidzwa nemvura yakanaka." 
Hebrews10:23 Ngatichengete kwazvo kupupura kwetariro yedu, kuti irege kuzununguka; nokuti iye, wakapikira, wakatendeka;" 
Hebrews10:24 ngatirangarirane, timutsane moyo kuti tive norudo namabasa akanaka," 
Hebrews10:25 tisarega kuvungana kwedu, sezvinoita vamwe, asi tirairane; zvikuru zvamunovona kuti zuva roswedera." 
Hebrews10:26 Nokuti kana tichitadza nobwoni, kana tambogamuchira zivo yechokwadi, hakuchinechibayiro pamusoro pezvivi," 
Hebrews10:27 asi kungomirira tichitya kutongeswa nokutsamwa kunopfuta somoto, kuchapedza vevengi." 
Hebrews10:28 Munhu, wakaramba murairo waMozisi, unofa asinganzwirwi tsitsi, kana panezvapupu zviviri kana zvitatu;" 
Hebrews10:29 hamufungi here kuti munhu, wakatsika Mwanakomana waMwari pasi petsoka dzake, uye akati ropa resungano raakaitwa mutsvene naro harinamaturo zvaro, uye akazvidza Mweya wenyasha, kuti iye haanganzi wakafanirwa nokurobwa kunopfuvura uku kwazvo here?" 
Hebrews10:30 Nokuti tinomuziva iye wakati: Kutsiva ndokwangu, ini ndicharipira ndizvo zvinotaura Mwari. uye zve: Ishe uchatonga mhosva dzavanhu vake." 
Hebrews10:31 Zvinotyisa kuwira pamavoko aMwari mupenyu. 
Hebrews10:32 Asi rangarirai mazuva akare, amakati mavhenekerwa, mukatsunga pakurwa kukuru kwedambudziko;" 
Hebrews10:33 pamwe nokuti makaitwa chinhu chinotarirwa nokuzvidzwa nokutambudzwa; pamwe nokuti makagovana naivo vakaitirwa izvozvo. 
Hebrews10:34 Nokuti makanzwira tsitsi kusungwa kwangu, makatendavo nomufaro kuti nhumbi dzenyu dzipambwe, muchiziva kuti imwi mumene munefuma yakapfuvura nokunaka, inogara iri kudenga." 
Hebrews10:35 Naizvozvo regai kurasha kusatya kwenyu kunomubayiro mukuru. 
Hebrews10:36 Nokuti munofanira kuva nokutsungirira, kuti, kana maita kuda kwaMwari, mugopiwa chipikirwa." 
Hebrews10:37 Nokuti kanguva kaduku-duku kachi'ko, Iye unovuya, uchavuya, asinganonoki." 
Hebrews10:38 Asi wakarurama wangu uchaponeswa nokutenda; Zvino kana akadzokera shure, moyo wangu haungafari naye." 
Hebrews10:39 Zvino isu hatizi ivo vokudzokera shure, kuti tiparadzwe; asi tiri vokutenda kuti tiponese mweya." 
Hebrews11:1 Zvino kutenda ndirwo rusimbiso rwezvinhu zvatinotaririra, umbowo bwezvinhu zvatisingavoni." 
Hebrews11:2 Nokuti naiko vanhu vakare vakapupurirwa zvakanaka. 
Hebrews11:3 Nokutenda tinonzwisisa kuti nyika dzakanatsorongedzwa nenzwi raMwari, naizvozvo zvinhu zvinovonekwa, hazvina kuitwa nezvinhu zvinovonekwa.." 
Hebrews11:4 Nokutenda Abheri wakabayira Mwari chibayiro chakanaka kunechaKaini; akapupurirwa nacho kuti wakanga akarurama, Mwari achipupurira zvipo zvake; naiko kutenda iye, kunyange afa hake, uchangotaura nazvino." 
Hebrews11:5 Nokutenda Enoki wakatorwa,kuti arege kuvona rufu; akasavonekwa, nokuti Mwari wakanga amutora; nokuti asati atorwa wakapupurirwa kuti wakanga achifadza Mwari." 
Hebrews11:6 Kana kusina kutenda hazvibviri kumufadza; nokuti unovuya kunaMwari, unofanira kutenda kuti iye uripo, uye kuti unopa vanomutsvaka mubairo wavo." 
Hebrews11:7 Nokutenda Nowa wakati anyeverwa pamusoro pezvinhu zvichigere kuvonekwa,nokutya Mwari, akagadzira areka, kuti aponese mhuri yake; akapa nyika mhosva nazvo, akagara nhaka yokururama kunovuya nokutenda." 
Hebrews11:8 Nokutenda Abhurahamu, wakati adamwa, akateerera, akabuda, akaenda kunzvimbo yaakanzi uchaipiwa ive nhaka yake; akabuda akaenda, asingazivi kwaanoenda." 
Hebrews11:9 Nokutenda wakandogara somutorwa munyika yechipikirwa, sapanyika yavamwe, akagara mumatente naIsaka naJakobho, vadyi venhaka yechipikirwa chimwe pamwe chete naye;" 
Hebrews11:10 nokuti wakanga achitarira guta rinenheyo, Mwari ari mhizha nomuvaki waro." 
Hebrews11:11 Nokutenda naiye Sara wakapiwa simba rokutora mimba akazvara mwana, kunyange akanga achembera, nokuti wakati iye wamupikira wakatendeka." 
Hebrews11:12 Saka kumunhu mumwe, wakanga akaita sowafa, kwakabva vana vakaita senyeredzi dzokudenga nokuwanda kwavo, uye sejecha riri pamhenderekedzo yegungwa risingaverengwi." 
Hebrews11:13 Ivava vose vakafa vachitenda, vasina kupiwa zvipikirwa, asi vakazvivona zviri kure, vakazvikwazisa, vakazvimbundikira vakatenda kuti ivo vaeni navafambi panyika." 
Hebrews11:14 Nokuti vanotaura zvakadaro, vanoratidza kuti vanotsvaka nyika yavo chaiyo." 
Hebrews11:15 Nokuti kana vairamba vachifunga nyika iyo yavakabva kwairi, vangadai vawana nguva yokudzoka." 
Hebrews11:16 Asi zvino vanoda imwe inopfuvura nokunaka, ndiyo yokudenga; naizvozvo Mwari haanenyadzi pamusoro pavo kuti aidzwe Mwari wavo; nokuti wakavagadzirira guta." 
Hebrews11:17 Nokutenda Abhurahamu, achiidzwa, wakabayira Isaka; iye wakanga agamuchira kwazvo zvipikirwa, wakanga achibayira mwana wake wakaberekwa mumwe woga;" 
Hebrews11:18 iye wakanga avudzwa, zvichinzi: MunaIsaka vana vako vachatumidzwa;" 
Hebrews11:19 nokuti wakati Mwari unogona kumutsa munhu kunyange kuvakafa; ndipapovo, kana tichitaura nomufananidzo, paakamudzoserwa." 
Hebrews11:20 Nokutenda Isaka wakaropafadza Jakobho naEsau pamusoro pezvinozoitika. 
Hebrews11:21 Nokutenda Jakobho pakufa kwake wakaropafadza mwanakomana mumwe nomumwe waJosefa; akanamata akasendamira pamusoro pomudonzvo wake. 
Hebrews11:22 Nokutenda Josefa, ofa, wakataura zvokubuda kwavana vaIsraeri, akavaraira pamusoro pamafupa ake." 
Hebrews11:23 Nokutenda Mozisi pakuberekwa kwake wakavanzwa navabereki vake mwedzi mitatu, nokuti vakavona kuti wakanga ari mwana wakanaka; havana kutya murairo wamambo." 
Hebrews11:24 Nokutenda Mozisi, akura, wakaramba kunzi mwanakomana womukunda waFarao," 
Hebrews11:25 akati zvirinani kuitirwa zvakaipa pamwe chete navanhu vaMwari panokufara muzvivi nguva duku; 
Hebrews11:26 akati kuzvidzwa kwaKristu ifuma huru kukufuma kose kweIjipiti; nokuti wakatarira mubairo. 
Hebrews11:27 Nokutenda wakabva Ijipiti, asingatyi kutsamwa kwamambo; nokuti wakatsungirira somunhu unovona iye usingavonekwi." 
Hebrews11:28 Nokutenda wakavamba paseka nokusasa ropa, kuti muvurayi wamatangwe avarege ivo." 
Hebrews11:29 Nokutenda vakayambuka Gungwa Dzvuku, sapanyika yakawoma; vaIjipiti vachiidza izvozvo, vakabitirirwa." 
Hebrews11:30 Nokutenda masvingo eJeriko akawira pasi, apoteredzwa mazuva manomwe." 
Hebrews11:31 Nokutenda Rakabi chifeve, haana kufa pamwe chete navasina kuteerera, nokuti wakanga agamuchira vashori norugare." 
Hebrews11:32 Ndichataurireiko zvimwe? Nokuti ndichapererwa nenguva, kana ndikataura zvaGideoni, naBaraki, naSamusoni, naJefta, naDhavhidhi, naSamueri, navaporofita;" 
Hebrews11:33 avo vakakunda vushe nokutenda kwavo vakaita zvakarurama, vakapiwa zvipikirwa, vakadzivira miromo yeshumba." 
Hebrews11:34 Vakadzima simba romoto, vakatiza minondo inopinza, vakasimbiswa pavutera, vakava nesimba pakurwa, vakadzinga hondo dzamamwe marudzi." 
Hebrews11:35 Vakadzi vakapiwa zve vakafa vavo, vamutswa; vamwe vakapurwa, vakasagamuchira kusunungurwa, kuti vawane kumuka kwakapfuvura nokunaka;" 
Hebrews11:36 vamwe vakaidzwa, vachisekwa, vachirobwa zvikuru, vuyezve vachisungwa, vachiiswa mutirongo;" 
Hebrews11:37 vakatakwa nambwe, vakatemwa-temwa nejeko, vakaidzwa, vakavurawa nomunondo; vakafamba vakafuka matebwe amakwai, nenguvo dzembudzi; vasinechinhu, va chitambudzika, vachiitirwa zvakaipa;" 
Hebrews11:38 (nyika haina kufanirwa navo), vachidzungaira mumarenje, nomumakomo, nomumapako, nomumakomba enyika." 
Hebrews11:39 Ava vose vakanga vapupurirwa nokutenda kwavo, asi havana kupiwa zvipikirwa," 
Hebrews11:40 nokuti Mwari wakanga atigadzirira chimwe chinhu chinopfuvura nokunaka, kuti ivo varege kukwaniswa kunze kwedu." 
Hebrews12:1 Naizvozvo, nesuvo, zvatakakomberedzwa negore rezvapupu rakakura rikadai, ngatibvisei zvose zvinoremedza nezvivi zvinongotinamatira, ngatimhanye nokutsungirira nhangemutange yatakaisirwa, mberi kwedu" 
Hebrews12:2 tichitarira kunaJesu, muvambi nomukwanisi wokutenda kwedu, iye wakatsunga pamuchinjikwa nokuda komufaro wakaiswa pamberi pake, akashovora kunyadziswa kwawo, akandogara kurudyi rwechigaro chovushe chaMwari." 
Hebrews12:3 Nokuti cherekedzai uyo wakatsunga pakukakavara kwakadai kwavatadzi, kuti imwi murege kuneta nokupera simba pamweya yenyu." 
Hebrews12:4 Muchigere kudzivirira kusvikira ropa richibuda pakurwa kwenyu nezvivi. 
Hebrews12:5 uye makakangamwa kwazvo kuraira kunotaura kwamuri sokuvanakomana, kuchiti: Mwanakomana wangu, usazvidza Kuranga kwaShe, Usapera moyo kana uchirairwa naye;" 
Hebrews12:6 Nokuti waanoda Ishe unomuranga, Unorova zvikuru mwanakomana mumwe nomumwe waanogamuchira." 
Hebrews12:7 Tsungai henyu moyo kuti murangwe; Mwari unobata nemwi savanakomana; nokuti mwanakomana ndoupi usingarangwi nababa? 
Hebrews12:8 Asi kana musingarangwi sezvinoitirwa vose, muri vana vovupombwe, hamuzi vanakomana chaivo." 
Hebrews12:9 uye zve isu taiva namadzibaba edu enyama, vaitiranga, tikavakudza; ko hatingazviisi zvikuru pasi paBaba vemweya, kuti tirarame here?" 
Hebrews12:10 Nokuti ivo, zvirokwazvo, vakatiranga mazuva mashoma, sezvavaifunga: asi iye unotiranga kuti tibatsirwe, tigogoverwa vutsvene bwake." 
Hebrews12:11 Zvino kuranga kose, kana kuchaitwa, kwakaita sokusingafadzi, asi mariro, asi pashure kunoberekera ivo, vakadzidziswa nako, zvibereko zvorugare, ndizvo zvibereko zvokururama." 
Hebrews12:12 Saka simbisaizve mavoko akarembera pasi, namabvi anoshaiwa simba;" 
Hebrews12:13 gadzirirai tsoka dzenyu nzira dzakarurama, kuti icho chinokamhina chirege kushodoka, asi chiporeswe." 
Hebrews12:14 Tsvakai rugare navanhu vose novutsvene, nokuti kunze kwabwo hakunomunhu uchavona Ishe;" 
Hebrews12:15 Muchichenjerera kuti kurege kuva nomunhu unokonewa panyasha dzaMwari; kuti mudzi wokuvava urege kumuka, ukutambudzei, vazhinji vagosvibiswa nawo;" 
Hebrews12:16 kurege kuvapo nemhombwe, kana nousinehanya naMwari, saEsau wakatengesa vudangwe bwake nokudya kamwe chete." 
Hebrews12:17 Nokuti munoziva kuti achizoda hake pashure kugara nhaka yokuropafadzwa, wakarambwa; nokuti haana kuwana nzvimbo yokutendevuka, kunyange akaitsvaka zvikuru nemisodzi. Sungano itsva inofananidzwa nesungano yekare" 
Hebrews12:18 Nokuti hamuna kuswedera kugomo ringabatwa namavoko, rinopfuta, uye kurima, nokusviba, nokudutu guru," 
Hebrews12:19 nokurira kwehwamanda, nokunzwi ramashoko;ivo vakarinzwa vakakumbira kuti shoko rimwe rirege kuzovataurirwa;" 
Hebrews12:20 nokuti vakakoniwa kutevera chakanga charairwa, chokuti: Kunyange nemhuka kana ikabata gomo, ichatakwa namabwe;kana kufugwa nomuseve." 
Hebrews12:21 icho chakavonekwa chakatyisa kudai, kuti naMozisi wakati: Ndinotya kwazvo, ndinodedera;" 
Hebrews12:22 asi imwi makaswedera kugomo reZiyoni, nokuguta raMwari mupenyu, Jerusarema riri kudenga, nokumazana namazana avatumwa vasingaverengwi," 
Hebrews12:23 nokuvungano huru, nokukereke yamatangwe akanyorwa kudenga, nokunaMwari, mutongi wavose, nokumweya yavakarurama vakakwaniswa," 
Hebrews12:24 nokunaJesu, Murevereri wesungno itsva, nokuropa rakasaswa, rinotaura zvakanaka kupfuvura ropa raAbheri." 
Hebrews12:25 Chenjerai kuti murege kuramba unotaura; nokuti kana avo vakamuramba nguva yaakavaraira panyika, vasina kupukunyuka, zvikuru isu kana tikafuratira iye wokudenga;" 
Hebrews12:26 inzwi rake rakazungusa nyika nenguva iyo; asi zvino wakapikira, achiti: Ndichabvundisa zve kamwe chete,isati iri nyika bedzi, asi nedengavo." 
Hebrews12:27 Zvino shoko iri rokuti, kamwe chete, rinoratidza kubviswa kwezvinozununguka, sezvinhu zvakaitwa, kuti izvo zvisingazununguki zvigare." 
Hebrews12:28 Saka, zvatinopiwa vushe bwusingazununguki, ngative nokuvonga kuti tishumire Mwari nako, tichimufadza nokukudza nokutya." 
Hebrews12:29 Nokuti Mwari wedu moto unoparadza. 
Hebrews13:1 Rudo pakati pehama ngarugare. 
Hebrews13:2 Musakangamwa kuitira vaeni rudo; nokuti vachidaro vamwe vakagarisa vatumwa mumba, vasingazvizivi." 
Hebrews13:3 Fungai vakasungwa, somunenge makasungwa pamwe chete navo; naivo vanoitirwa zvakaipa, somunenge muri mumuviri imivo." 
Hebrews13:4 Wanano ngaikudzwe navose, nenhovo ngairege kuva nemhosva; nokuti Mwari uchatongesa mhombwe navanofeva." 
Hebrews13:5 Musakarira mari pamugarire wenyu; tendai nezvamunazvo; nokuti iye amene wakati: Handingatongokuregeri, handingatongokusiyi." 
Hebrews13:6 Naizvozvo tinotsunga moyo, tichiti: Ishe ndiye mubatsiri wangu; handingatyi; Munhu ungandiiteiko?" 
Hebrews13:7 Rangarirai vatungamiriri venyu vaikuparidzirai shoko raMwari; cherekedzai kuguma kokufamba kwavo, mugotevera kutenda kwavo." 
Hebrews13:8 Jesu Kristu unogara akadaro zuro, nanhasi, nokusingaperi." 
Hebrews13:9 Musatorwa nedzidziso dzimwe dzisingazikamwi; nokuti zakanaka kuti moyo usimbiswe nenyasha; urege kusimbiswa nezvokudya zvisina kubatsira vakafamba mazviri. 
Hebrews13:10 Isu tine aritari, pasingatenderwi kudyiwa navanoshumira tabhernakeri." 
Hebrews13:11 Nokuti mitumbu yezvipfuwo, zvakaisirwa ropa razvo panzvimbo tsvene nomuprista mukuru nokuda kwe zvivi, inopiswa kunze kwemisasa." 
Hebrews13:12 Saka naiye Jesuvo wakatambudzika kunze kwesuvo, kuti aite vanhu vave vatsvene neropa rake." 
Hebrews13:13 Naizvozvo ngatibudire kwaari kunze kwemisasa, titakure kunyadziswa kwake." 
Hebrews13:14 Nokuti pano hatineguta richagara, asi tinotsvaka richazovapo." 
Hebrews13:15 Naizvozvo ngatirambe tichibayira Mwari naye chibayiro chokumurumbidza, ndicho chibereko chemiromo inopupura zita rake." 
Hebrews13:16 Asi musakangamwa kuita zvakanaka nokugovana; nokuti Mwari unofara nezvibayiro zvakadai. 
Hebrews13:17 teererai vatungamiriri venyu, muzviise pasi pavo; nokuti vanorinda mweya yenyu, savanhu vanozobvunzwa pamusoro penyu, kuti vaite izvozvo nomufaro, vasingazviiti neshungu; nokuti izvozvo hazvikubatsiriyi chinhu." 
Hebrews13:18 Tinyengetererei; nokuti tinoziva kwazvo kuti tinehana yakanaka, zvatinoda kufamba zvakanaka pazvinhu zvose." 
Hebrews13:19 Ndinokumbira zvikuru kwamuri kuti muite izvozvo, kuti ndikurumidze kudzoserwa kwamuri." 
Hebrews13:20 Zvino Mwari worugare, wakadzosa kuvakafa mufudzi mukuru wamakwai, iye Ishe wedu Jesu Kristu, neropa resungano isingaperi," 
Hebrews13:21 ngaakukwanisei pazvinhu zvose zvakanaka, kuti muite kuda kwake, iye achiita mukati medu izvo zvinofadza pamberi pake, naJesu Krisu ngaave nokubwinya nokusingaperi-peri. Ameni." 
Hebrews13:22 Asi ndinokurairai, hama dzangu,kuti mutende neshoko rokuraira, nokuti ndakakunyorerai mashoko mashoma." 
Hebrews13:23 Zivai kuti hama yedu Timotio wakasunungurwa; kana akakurumidza kusvika, ndinozokuvonai pamwe chete naye." 
Hebrews13:24 Ndikwazisirei vatungamiriri venyu vose navatsvene vose. VeItaria vanokukwazisai. 
Hebrews13:25 Nyasha ngadzive nemwi mose. Ameni. 
James1:1 Jakobho, muranda waMwari nowaShe Jesu Kristu, kumarudzi anegumi namaviri akapararira: Farai!" 
James1:2 Hama dzangu,zvitorei ""so""mufarochetekana muchiwira mumiidzo mizhinji;" 
James1:3 muchiziva kuti kuidzwa kokutenda kwenyu kunobereka kutsungirira. 
James1:4 Asi kutsungirira ngakuve nebasa rakakwaniswa, kuti mukwane, mururame kwazvo, musingashaiwi chinhu." 
James1:5 Zvino kana mumwe wenyu achishaiwa kuchenjera ngaakumbire kunaMwari, unongopa vose asingazotuki; uchapiwa hake." 
James1:6 Asi ngaakumbire nokutenda, asinganyunyuti napaduku; nokuti munhu unonyunyuta wakaita sefungu regungwa rinosundwa nemhepo richimutswa-mutswa." 
James1:7 Munhu uyu arege kufunga kuti uchazowana chinhu kunaShe; 
James1:8 munhu, unemoyo miviri, unoshanduka-shanduka panzira dzake dzose." 
James1:9 Asi hama iri muduku ngaafare nokukudzwa kwake; 
James1:10 nomufumi nokuninipiswa kwake, nokuti uchapfuvura seruva rovuswa." 
James1:11 Nokuti zuva rinobuda pamwe chete nemhepo inopisa, ndokuwomesa vuswa; ruva rabwo rinowira pasi, nokunaka kwabwo kwakanga kwavonekwa kunopera; saizvozvovo mufumi uchasvava panzira dzake." 
James1:12 Wakaropafadzwa munhu uyo unotsungirira pakuidzwa; nokuti kana atendwa, uchapiwa korona yovupenyu yakapikirwa avo vanomuda." 
James1:13 Kana munhu achiidzwa, ngaarege kuti ndinoidzwa naMwari; nokuti Mwari haangaidzwi nezvakaipa, naiye amene haangaidzi munhu." 
James1:14 Asi munhu mumwe nomumwe unoidzwa kana achikwebwa nokuchiva kwake achinyengerwa. 
James1:15 Zvino kuchiva, kana kwarema, kunozvara zvivi; nezvivi, kana zvakura, zvinobereka rufu." 
James1:16 Musanyengerwa, hama dzangu dzinodikamwa." 
James1:17 Zvipo zvose zvakanaka nezvipiwa zvose zvakakwana zvinobva kumusoro, zvichiburuka kunaBaba vezviedza, uyo usina kupinduka kana mumvuri wokushanduka." 
James1:18 Nokuda kwake wakatibereka neshoko rechokwadi, kuti isu tiite sechibereko chokutanga chezvisikwa zvake." 
James1:19 Munoziva henyu izvozvo hama dzangu dzinodikamwa. Asi munhu mumwe nomumwe ngaakurumidze kunzwa, anonoke kutaura, anonoke kutsamwa;" 
James1:20 nokuti kutsamwa komunhu hakuiti kururama kwaMwari. 
James1:21 Saka bvisai tsvina yose nokuipa kwakawanda, mugamuchire nomoyo munyoro shoko rakasimwa mukati menyu, rinogona kuponesa mweya yenyu." 
James1:22 Asi ivai vaiti veshoko, musava vanzwi voga, muchizvinyengera." 
James1:23 Nokuti kana ari munzwi weshoko, asati ari muiti waro, wakafanana nomunhu unovona chiso chake, chaakaberekwa nacho, muchivonivoni." 
James1:24 Nokuti unozvivona, ndokuenda, ndokukangamwa pakarepo kuti wakadini iye." 
James1:25 Asi munhu unocherekedza murairo wakakwana, iwo murairo wokusunungurwa, akaramba achidaro, asati ari munzwi, unokangamwa, asi muiti webasa, iye ucharopafadzwa panezvaanoita." 
James1:26 Kana munhu pakati penyu achiti ndinonamata Mwari, asingadzori rurimi rwake, asi achinyengera moyo wake, kutenda kwaiyeyo munhu hakuna maturo." 
James1:27 Kunamata, kwakarurama, kusine mhosva pamberi paMwari wedu naBaba, ndiko kufambira nherera nechirikadzi pakutambudzika kwavo, nokuzvichengeta, kuti arege kusvibiswa nenyika." 
James2:1 Hama dzangu, kutenda kwenyu kunaShe wedu Jesu Kristu, iye wokubwinya, ngakurege kuva nokutenda zvinovonekwa zvomunhu." 
James2:2 Nokuti kana musinagoge renyu mukapinda munhu unemhete yendarama, akapfeka nguvo dzakanaka, mukapindavo murombo, wakapfeka nguvo dzakaipa;" 
James2:3 mukatarira uyo wakapfeka nguvo dzakanaka, mukati: Gara pano pakanaka; mukati kumurombo: Mira ipapo, kana: Gara pasi pachitsiko chetsoka dzangu;" 
James2:4 ko hamuna kutsaura mumoyo yenyu, mukava vatongi vanemifungo yakaipa here?" 
James2:5 Inzwai, hama dzangu dzinodikamwa: Ko Mwari haana kusanangura varombo venyika here kuti vave vafumi pakutenda, navadyi venhaka yovushe bwakapikira vanomuda?" 
James2:6 Asi imwi makazvidza murombo. Ko havazi vafumi vanokuremedzai, naivo vanokukwirirai kuzvigaro zvokutonga here?" 
James2:7 Ko havazi ivo vanomhura zita rakanaka ramunotumidzwa naro here? 
James2:8 Asi zvino kana muchizadzisa murairo wovushe, sezvazvakanyorwa, zvichinzi: Ida wokwako sezvaunozvida iwe, munoita zvakanaka." 
James2:9 Asi kana muchitenda zvinovonekwa zvomunhu, munoita zvivi, munopiwa mhosva nomurairo muchinzi vadariki." 
James2:10 Nokuti munhu unochengeta murairo wose, akagumburwa kunechinhu chimwe chete, wava nemhosva kunezvose." 
James2:11 Nokuti iye, wakati: usaita vupobwe, ndiyevo: wakati usavuraya. Zvino kana usingaiti vupobwe, asi uchivuraya, wava mudariki womurairo." 
James2:12 Taurai, uye itai savanhu vanozotongwa nomurairo wokusunungurwa." 
James2:13 Nokuti kutonga hakungavi nengoni kunousina kuitira vamwe ngoni; ngoni dzinozvirumbidza dzichikunda kutonga. 
James2:14 Zvinobatsirei hama dzangu, kana munhu achiti: Ndinokutenda, asi asinamabasa? Ko kutenda uko kungamuponesa here?" 
James2:15 Kana kunehama, murume kana mukadzi, asina zvokufuka, unoshaiwa zvokudya zuva rimwe nerimwe," 
James2:16 mumwe wenyu akati kwavari: Endai henyu nomufaro, mudziyirwe, mugute, musingavapi izvo zvinodikamwa nomuviri, zvinogobatsirei?" 
James2:17 Saizvozvo,vo, nokutenda kana kusina mabasa, kwakafa hako." 
James2:18 Asi mumwe ungati: iwe unokutenda, neni ndinamabasa; ndiratidze kutenda kwako kusina mabasa,neni ndigokuratidza namabasa angu kutenda kwangu." 
James2:19 Iwe unotenda kuti Mwari ndiye mumwe chete; unoita zvakanaka; mweya yakaipa inotendavo izvozvo, ichidedera." 
James2:20 Zvino iwe munhu wovupenzi, unoda kuziva here kuti kutenda kusinamabasa kwakafa?" 
James2:21 Ko Abhurahamu, baba vedu, haana kururamiswa namabasa here, nguva yaakabayira mwanakomana wake Isaka paaritari?" 
James2:22 Unovona kuti kutenda kwake kwakabata pamwe chete namabasa ake, uye kuti kutenda kwake kwakakwaniswa namabasa;" 
James2:23 rugwaro rukaitika, runoti: Abhurahamu wakatenda Mwari, kukanzi kwaari ndiko kururama; akanzi hama yaMwari." 
James2:24 Munovona kuti munhu unoruramiswa namabasa, haaruramiswi nokutenda bedzi." 
James2:25 Saizvozvovo, Rakabhi, chifeve, haana kururamiswa here namabasa, nguva yaakachingamidza nhume, nokuvaendisa neimwe nzira?" 
James2:26 Nokuti somuviri usinomweya wakafa, saizvozvo kutenda kusinamabasa kwakafavo." 
James3:1 Hama dzangu, musava vadzidzisi vazhinji, zvamunoziva kuti tichatongwa nokupfuvurisa." 
James3:2 Nokuti tinogumburwa tose pazvinhu zvizhinji. Kana munhu asingagumburwi pakutaura, iye munhu wakakwana, unogona kudzora muviri wosevo." 
James3:3 Zvino kana tichiisa matare amabhiza mumiromo yawo, kuti atiteerere, tinodzoravo muviri wawo wose." 
James3:4 Tarirai magwa makuru, kunyange ari makuru akadai, achidzingwa nemhepo dzinesimba guru, anodzorwa nechidzoreso chiduku duku kose-kose nokuda komoyo womufambisi wawo." 
James3:5 Saizvozvovo rurimi mutezo muduku, runozvirumbidza zvikuru. Tarirai, moto muduku unotungidza huni zhinji sei!" 
James3:6 Rurimi moto, rwakaita senyika izere nezvisakarurama; ndizvo zvakaita rurimi pakati pemitezo yedu, runosvibisa muviri wose, runotungidza nzira yose yovupenyu, runotungidzwa irwo negehena." 
James3:7 Nokuti marudzi ose emhuka, neshiri, nezvinokambaira, nezviri mugungwa angapingudzwa, uye akambopingudzwa navanhu;" 
James3:8 asi hakunomunhu ungapingudza rurimi; ndicho chinhu chakaipa chinoshanduka-shanduka, chizere nomuti unovuraya." 
James3:9 Narwo tinorumbidza Ishe Baba; narwo tinotuka vanhu, vakaitwa nomufananidzo waMwari;" 
James3:10 mumuromo mumwe munobva kurumbidza nokutuka. Hama dzangu, hatifaniri kudaro." 
James3:11 Tsime rinobudisa pachitubu chimwe mvura inonaka neinovava here? 
James3:12 Hama dzangu, muvonde ungabereka maorivhi, kana muzambiringa mavonde here? Kunyange nemvura inovava haingabudisi inonaka." 
James3:13 Ndiani pakati penyu wakachenjera, wakangwara? Ngaaratidze nomufambiro wake wakanaka mabasa ake novunyoro bwovuchenjeri." 
James3:14 Asi kana munegodo rinovava norukave mumoyo menyu, musazvirumbidza nokurevera chokwadi nhema." 
James3:15 Kuchenjera uku hakuburuki kuchibva kumusoro, asi ndokwenyika, kwatakamuka nako, komweya wakaipa." 
James3:16 Nokuti panegodo norukave, ndipo panenyonganiso namabasa ose akaipa." 
James3:17 Asi kuchenjera, kunobva kumusoro, zvikuru kwakachena, uye kunorugare, kunyoro, kunoteerera, kuzere nengoni nezvibereko zvakanaka, kusingatsauri kusinganyengeri." 
James3:18 Chibereko chokururama chinodzwarwa parugare navanoita rugare. 
James4:1 Kurwa nokukakavara pakati penyu zvinobvepiko? Hazvibvi pakuchiva kwenyu, kunorwa pamitezo yenyu here?" 
James4:2 Munochiva, Munorwa asi hamune chinhu; munovuraya, munogodorana, musingagoni kuwana chinhu; munokakavara, muchirwa; hamunechinhu nokuti hamukumbiri.." 
James4:3 Munokumbira, musingapiwi; nokuti munokumbira zvakaipa, kuti muzviparadze pakuchiva kwenyu." 
James4:4 imwi vovutere,hamuzivi here kuti vushamwari bwenyika bwunovengana naMwari? Naizvozvo mumwe nomumwe, unoda kuva shamwari yenyika, unozviita muvengi waMwari." 
James4:5 Munofunga kuti Rugwaro runotaura pasina here, ruchiti: Mweya, wakagarisa mukati medu unotishuva negodo?" 
James4:6 Asi unopa nyasha dzakapfuvura. Saka Rugwaro runoti: Mwari unodzivisa vanozvikudza, asi unopa nyasha vanozvininipisa." 
James4:7 Naizvozvo muzviise pasi paMwari: dzivisai Dhiabhorosi, agokutizai." 
James4:8 Swederai kunaMwari, iye agoswedera kwamuri. Shambai mavoko enyu, imwi vatadzi; natsai moyo yenyu, imwi munemoyo miviri." 
James4:9 Suwai, mucheme, muraire; kuseka kwenyu ngakushandurwe kuve kuchema, nokufara kwenyu dzive shungu." 
James4:10 Muzvininipise pamberi paShe, agokukudzai."
