James4:11 Hama dzangu, musareverana zvakaipa. Unorevera hama yake zvakaipa, kana kutonga hama yake, unorevera murairo zvakaipa nokutonga murairo; zvino kana uchitonga murairo, hauzi muiti womurairo, asi mutongi." 
James4:12 Mumwe chete ndiye mutemi womurairo nomutongi, iye unogona kuponesa nokuparadza; asi iwe ndiwe aniko unotonga wokwako?" 
James4:13 Nhai imi, munoti: Nhasi, kana mangwana tichaenda kuguta rokuti, tigogarako gore, tichishambadzira, tifume" 
James4:14 imwi musingazivi zvamangwana. Vupenyu bwenyu chinyiko? Nokuti muri mhute, inovonekwa nguva duku, ndokunyangarika." 
James4:15 Mungadai muchiti: Kana Ishe achida, tichararama tiite zvokuti nezvokuti." 
James4:16 Asi zvino munozvirumbidza pakuzvikudza kwenyu; kuzvirumbidza kose kwakadai kwakaipa. 
James4:17 Naizvozvo uyo, unoziva kuita zvakanaka, akasazviita, iye unezvivi." 
James5:1 Tambirai, imwi vafumi, chemai muridze mhere nokuda kwamatambudziko achakuwirai." 
James5:2 Fuma yenyu yakavora, nguvo dzenyu dzapera nezvivundudzi." 
James5:3 Ndarama yenyu nesirivheri yenyu zvinengura; ngura yazvo ichakupupurirai zvakaipa, ichapedza nyama yenyu somoto. Makazvichengetera fuma pamazuva okupedzisira." 
James5:4 Tarirai, mubairo wavaranda venyu vakacheka minda yenyu, wamakaramba nawo nokunyengera, unodanidzira; nokudana kwavacheki kwakasvika kunzeve dzaShe wehondo." 
James5:5 Makagara mumufaro panyika muchikarira zvinofadza; makakodza moyo yenyu sapazuva rokubaya. 
James5:6 Makatongera wakarurama, mukamuvuraya; haakudzivisiyi." 
James5:7 Naizvozvo hama dzangu, tsungirirai kusvikira pakuvuya kwaShe. Tarirai, murimi unomirira chibereko chenyika chinokosha, achitsungirira pamusoro pazvo kusvikira zvapiwa mvura yokutanga neyokuguma." 
James5:8 Nemivo tsungirirai; simbisai moyo yenyu, nokuti kuvuya kwaShe kwava pedo," 
James5:9 Hama dzangu, musanyunyutirana kuti murege kutongwa; tarirai, mutongi umire pamukova." 
James5:10 Hama dzangu, pakutambudzika nokutsungirira teverai makwara avaporofita vakataura nezita raShe." 
James5:11 Tarirai, vakatsunga moyo tinoti vakaropafadzwa; makanzwa zvokutsungirira kwaJobho, makavona Ishe zvaakavavarira naye, kuti Ishe unomoyo munyoro kwazvo, unetsitsi." 
James5:12 Asi, hama dzangu, kupfuvura zvinhu zvose, musapika, kunyange nedenga, kana nenyika, kana nokupika kumwe kose; asi hongu yenyu ngaive hongu, kwete yenyu ngaive kwete; kuti murege kuwira mukutongwa." 
James5:13 Kunomumwe unotambudzika pakati penyu here? Ngaanyengetere. Kunomumwe unofara here? Ngaaimbe mapisarema. 
James5:14 Kunomumwe unorwara pakati penyu here? Ngaadane vakuru vekereke; ngavamunyengeterere, vamuzodze namafuta nezita raShe." 
James5:15 Kunyengetera kokutenda kuchaponesa unorwara, Ishe uchamumutsa; kana akaita zvivi, uchazvikangamwirwa." 
James5:16 Naizvozvo revururanai zvivi zvenyu munyengetererane kuti muporeswe. Kukumbira komunhu wakarurama kune simba guru pakubata kwako. 
James5:17 Eria wakanga ari munhu wakaita sesu, akanyengetera nomunyengetero kuti mvura irege kunaya; ikasanaya panyika makore matatu nemwedzi mitanhatu." 
James5:18 Akanyengeterazve; denga rikanisa mvura, nyika ikabereka zvibereko zvayo." 
James5:19 Hama dzangu, kana kunomunhu pakati penyu wakatsauka pachokwadi, mumwe akamudzora," 
James5:20 ngaazive kuti unodzora mutadzi panzira yokutsauka kwake, uchaponesa mweya parufu nokufukidza zvivi zvizhinji." 
1Peter1:1 Petro, muapositora waJesu Kristu, kunavakasanangurwa vari vaeni, vakapararira paPonto, neGaratia, neKapadhokia, neAsia, neBitinia," 
1Peter1:2 vakasanangurwa nokuziva zviri mberi kwaMwari Baba, muvutsvene bwoMweya, kuti vateerere, vasaswe neropa raJesu Kristu: Nyasha norugare ngazviwanzwe kwamuri." 
1Peter1:3 Mwari, Baba vaShe wedu, Jesu Kristu, ngaatendwe, wakatibereka zve nengoni dzake huru, kuti tive netariro mhenyu, inovuya nokumuka kwaJesu Kristu kuvakafa," 
1Peter1:4 kuti tive nenhaka isingavori, isina kusvibiswa, isingasvavi yamakachengeterwa kudenga," 
1Peter1:5 imwi munorindwa nesimba raMwari nokutenda, kuti mupiwe ruponeso, rwakagara rwakagadzirwa, kuti ruratidzwe nenguva yokupedzisira." 
1Peter1:6 Iyo yamunofarira zvikuru, kunyange zvino, kana zvichifanira, muchichemedzwa nguva duku nemiidzo mizhinji;" 
1Peter1:7 kuti kuidzwa kokutenda kwenyu kunokosha zvikuru kupfuvura ndarama inopera hayo, kunyange ichiidzwa nomoto, kuwanikwe kuchibereka kurumbidzwa, nokubwinya, nokukudzwa pakuvonekwa kwaJesu Kristu;" 
1Peter1:8 iye wamunoda, kunyange musina kumuvona iye wamunotenda kwaari, kunyange musingamuvoni zvino, muchifara zvikuru nomufaro usingagoni kutaurwa, uzere nokubwinya;" 
1Peter1:9 muchipiwa chinovavarirwa nokutenda kwenyu," 
1Peter1:10 Ndirwo ruponeso rwomweya yenyu.Ruponeso urwu rwakabvunzisiswa nokunzverwa kwazvo navaporofita, vakaporofita, zvenyasha dzamaizoitirwa imi," 
1Peter1:11 vachinzvera kuti nguva ndeipi kana yakadini, yakataurwa noMweya waKristu, wakanga uri mukati mavo, nguva yaakapupura kare zvokutambudzika kwaKristu, nokubwinya kunozotevera izvozvo." 
1Peter1:12 Avo, vakaratidzwa kuti vakanga vasingazvibatiri ivo, asi imi, pazvinhu izvo zvamakataurirwa zvino naivo vakakuparidzirai evhangeri noMweya Mutsvene wakatumwa achibva kudenga; zvinhu izvo vatumwa vanoda kuzvicherekedza." 
1Peter1:13 Saka zvisungei zvivuno zvendangarairo dzenyu, musvinure, mutarire nomoyo wose kunyasha dzamuchazopiwa pakuvonekwa kwaJesu Kristu;" 
1Peter1:14 muve savana vanoteerera, musingaenzanisi mufambire wenyu nokuchiva kwakare pakusaziva kwenyu;" 
1Peter1:15 asi saiye mutsvene wakakudanai, nemivo mumene muve vatsvene pamufambire wenyu wose;" 
1Peter1:16 nokuti kwakanyorwa, kuchinzi: Ivai vatsvene, nokuti ini ndiri mutsvene," 
1Peter1:17 Zvino kana muchimuidza Baba, iye unotonga achitarira zvakaitwa nomumwe nomumwe asingatariri zvinovonekwa zvomunhu, garai panguva yovutorwa bwenyu muchitya;" 
1Peter1:18 muchiziva kuti hamuna kudzikinurwa nezvinovora, nesirivheri kana ndarama, pamufambire wenyu usina maturo, wamakasiyirwa namadzibaba enyu;" 
1Peter1:19 asi neropa raKristu, seregwayana risina charingapomerwa, risinoruvara;" 
1Peter1:20 iye wakazikamwa kare, nyika isati yavambwa, asi wakaratidzwa pakuguma kwenguva nokuda kwenyu," 
1Peter1:21 imi, munotenda naye kunaMwari, wakamumutsa kuvakafa, akamupa kubwinya; kuti kutenda kwenyu netariro yenyu zvive kunaMwari." 
1Peter1:22 Zvamakanatsa mweya yenyu muchiteerera chokwadi Mumweya, kuti mude hama nokusanyengera, munofanira kudana zvikuru nomoyo wose;" 
1Peter1:23 nokuti makaberekwa kutsva, zvisingabvi pambeu inovora, asi pane isingavori, neshoko raMwari benyu rinogara nokusingaperi." 
1Peter1:24 Nokuti, Nyama yose yakaita sovuswa, Nokunaka kose seruva rovuswa, Vuswa bwunosvava, neruva rinowira pasi;" 
1Peter1:25 Asi shoko raShe rinogara nokusingaperi.Ndireri shoko romufaro ramakaparidzirwa. 
1Peter2:1 Naizvozvo rashai zvakaipa zvose, nokunyengera kose, namano, mano negodo, nokuchera kose," 
1Peter2:2 savacheche vachangoberekwa, pangai mukaka womweya, usina kushatiswa, kuti mukure nawo, mugoponeswa;" 
1Peter2:3 kana makaravira kuti Ishe unomoyo munyoro. 
1Peter2:4 Vuyai kwaari, iye ibwe benyu, rakarashwa navanhu, asi rakasanangurwa naMwari, rinokosha." 
1Peter2:5 nemwi vo, samabwe mapenyu, muvakwe muve imba yoMweya, muve vuprista vutsvene, kuti mubayire zvibayiro zvoMweya, zvinofadza Mwari nokuda kwaJesu Kristu." 
1Peter2:6 Nokuti muRugwaro zvirimo, zvinoti: Tarira, ndinoisa muZiyoni ibwe Rekona, rakasanangurwa, Rinokosha; nounotenda kwaari haanganyadziswi." 
1Peter2:7 Asi kwamuri imwi munotenda, unokosha asi kuna vasingateereri, ibwe rakarabwa navavaki, ndiro rakazova musoro wekona." 
1Peter2:8 uye Ibwe rokugumbusa, Nedombo rokupinganidza; Ndivo avo vanogumburwa neshoko, nokuti havariteereri; ndizvo zvavakaisirwa vo." 
1Peter2:9 Asi imwi muri rudzi rwakasanangurwa, vuprista bwamambo, rudzi rutsvene, vanhu vaakazviwanira, kuti muparidze kunaka kwaiye wakakudanai, kuti mubve parima muvuye kuchiedza chake chinoshamisa." 
1Peter2:10 imwi kare makanga musi vanhu, asi zvino muri vanhu vaMwari; makanga musinganzwirwi ngoni, asi zvino manzwirwa ngoni." 
1Peter2:11 Vadikamwa, ndinokumbira zvikuru kwamuri, zvamuri vatorwa navaeni, kuti muzvidzore pakuchiva kwenyama kunorwa nomweya;" 
1Peter2:12 mufambire wenyu uve wakanaka pakati pavahedheni; kuti pavanokupomerai vachiti munoita zvakaipa, varumbidze Mwari nezuva rokushanyigwa, kana vachivona mabasa enyu akanaka." 
1Peter2:13 Muzviise pasi pechirevo chimwe nechimwe chavanhu nokuda kwaShe: kana ari mambo, nokuti ndiye mukuru;" 
1Peter2:14 kana vari vabati, nokuti vakatumwa naye kuti vatsive vanoita zvakaipa, uye arumbidze vanoita zvakanaka." 
1Peter2:15 Nokuti ndiko kuda kwaMwari, kuti nokuita kwenyu zvakanaka munyaradze kusaziva kwamapenzi;" 
1Peter2:16 savanhu vakasununguka, musingaiti kusununguka kwenyu kuti chive chifukidzo chezvakaipa, asi muve varanda vaMwari." 
1Peter2:17 Kudzai vanhu vose. Idai hama dzose. Ityai Mwari. Kudzai mambo. 
1Peter2:18 Varanda, teererai vatenzi venyu nokutya kose, musingazviiti kunavakanaka navanyoro bedzi, asi kuna vasakarurama vo." 
1Peter2:19 Nokuti ndidzo nyasha kana munhu achitsungirira pakutambudzika nokuda kwehana kuna Mwari. Achitambudzika asinemhosva. 
1Peter2:20 Nokuti kunerumbidzo yeiko, kana muchitsungirira matadza, mukarobwa? Asi kana mukatsungirira kana muchiita zvakanaka mukatambudzika, izvozvo inyasha kunaMwari." 
1Peter2:21 Nokuti makadanirwa izvozvo, Kristu zvaakakutambudzikiraivo, akakusiyirai mufananidzo, kuti mutevere makwara ake;" 
1Peter2:22 iye usina kuita zvivi, nokunyengera hakuna kuvonekwa mumuromo make;" 
1Peter2:23 iye wakati achitukwa, haana kutukazve; wakati achitambudzika, haana kutyisidzira; asi wakaisa mhaka yake kunaiye unotonga zvakarurama;" 
1Peter2:24 iye wakatakura amene zvivi zvedu mumuviri wake pamuti, kuti isu, kana tafa kuzvivi, tiraramire zvakarurama; iye wamakaporeswa namavanga ake." 
1Peter2:25 Nokuti makanga makatsauka samakwai; asi zvino madzokera kumufudzi nomutariri wemweya yenyu. 
1Peter3:1 Saizvozvo, imwi vakadzi, ivai pasi pavarume venyu; kuti kunyange kana vamwe vasingateereri shoko, vadzorwe nomufambire wavakadzi vavo pasineshoko rinorebwa," 
1Peter3:2 kana vachivona mufambire wenyu, wakachena pamwe chete nokutya Mwari." 
1Peter3:3 Kushonga kwenyu ngakurege kuva kokunze, kokuruka vhudzi, nokushonga ndarama, kana kupfeka nguvo;" 
1Peter3:4 asi ngakuve munhu wakavanzika womoyo, wakashonga zvisingavori zvomweya munyoro wakanyarara, unokosha, zvikuru pamberi paMwari." 
1Peter3:5 Nokuti saizvozvovo kare vakadzi vatsvene, vaivimba naMwari, vakazvishongedza, vachizviisa pasi pavarume vavo," 
1Peter3:6 saSara waiteerera Abhurahamu, achimuidza ishe; mava vana vake zvino, kana muchiita zvakanaka, musingatyiswi nechinhu chipi nechipi chinovhundusa." 
1Peter3:7 Saizvozvo imwi varume, garai navakadzi venyu nokuziva, muchikudza mukadzi muchiti ndiye mudziyo unesimba duku kwamuri, zvavari vadyi venhaka yenyasha yovupenyu pamwe chete nemi; kuti minyengetero yenyu irege kudziviswa." 
1Peter3:8 Pakupedzisira, muve nomoyo mumwe mose, munzwirane ngoni, mude hama, muve nomoyo munyoro, muzvininipise;" 
1Peter3:9 musingatsivi zvakaipa nezvakaipa, kana kutuka nokutuka; asi muropafadze, nokuti ndizvo zvamakadanirwa, kuti mugare nhaka yokuropafadzwa." 
1Peter3:10 Nokuti, Uyo, unoda vupenyu, Nokuvona mazuva akanaka, Ngaadzore rurimi rwake panezvakaipa, Nemiromo yake, kuti irege kutaura zvinonyengera." 
1Peter3:11 Ngaanzvenge zvakaipa, aite zvakanaka; Ngaatsvake rugare, arutevere" 
1Peter3:12 Nokuti meso aShe ari pamusoro pavakarurama, Nenzeve dzake pakukumbira kwavo. Asi chiso chaShe chiri pamusoro pavanoita zvakaipa." 
1Peter3:13 Ndianiko uchakuitirai zvakaipa, kana muchishingairira zvakanaka?" 
1Peter3:14 Asi kana muchitambudzika nokuda kokururama, makaropafadzwa; musatya kutyisa kwavo, uye musakanganiswa." 
1Peter3:15 Asi itai Ishe Mwari mutsvene mumoyo menyu ave Ishe; mugare makazvigadzira kupindura mumwe nomumwe unokubvunzai pamusoro petariro iri mukati menyu, asi muchiita novunyoro nokutya;" 
1Peter3:16 ivai nehana yakanaka, kuti pavanokucherai, ivo vanomhura mufambire wenyu wakanaka munaKristu, vanyadziswe." 
1Peter3:17 Nokuti zvirinani, kana kuri kuda kwaMwari, kuti mutambudzike kana muchiita zvakanaka pakuti kana muchiita zvakaipa." 
1Peter3:18 Nokuti naKristu wakatambudzika vo kamwe chete pamusoro pezvivi, iye wakarurama nokuda kwavasakarurama, kuti atiise kunaMwari; wakavurawa hake panyama, asi wakararamiswa nomweya;" 
1Peter3:19 mauri wakandoparidziravo mweya iri pakusungwa," 
1Peter3:20 yakanga isina kuteerera kare, panguva iya moyo murefu waMwari uchimirira kugadzirwa kweareka pamazuva aNowa; mukati mayo vashoma, ivo vanhu vasere, vakaponeswa nemvura." 
1Peter3:21 Naiwo mufananidzo worubhabhatidzo, runokuponesai zvino, rusingarevi kubviswa kwesvina yenyama, asi kutsvaka hana yakanaka kunaMwari nokumuka kwaJesu Kristu;" 
1Peter3:22 iye uri kurudyi rwaMwari; wakapinda kudenga, vatumwa namadzishe namasimba zvikaiswa pasi pake." 
1Peter4:1 Naizvozvo, Kristu zvaakatamburira isu panyama, nemwi vo mushonge murangariro iwoyo; nokuti munhu wakatambudzika panyama warega zvivi;" 
1Peter4:2 kuti panguva yakasara panyama arege kurarama nokuchiva kwavanhu, asi nokuda kwaMwari." 
1Peter4:3 Nokuti nguva yakapfuvura yakaringana kuita kuda kwavahedheni, nokufamba novutere, nokuchiva, nokumwa waini, nokutamba kwakaipa, namabira, nokunamata zvifananidzo zvisakafanira;" 
1Peter4:4 vanoshamiswa nechinhu ichi, kuti hamufambidzani navo pakusazvidzora kwavo uku kwakawanda, vachikureverai zvakaipa." 
1Peter4:5 Ivo vachazvidavirira kunaiye wakazvigadzira kutonga vapenyu navakafa. 
1Peter4:6 Nokuti nokuda kwaizvozvi evhangeri yakaparidzirwa vakafa, kuti vatongwe havo panyama nomutovo wavanhu, asi vararame nomutovo waMwari pamweya." 
1Peter4:7 Zvino kuguma kwezvinhu zvose kwava pedo; naizvozvo ivai vakachenjera musvinure kuti munyengetere. 
1Peter4:8 Zvikuru kunezvose danai norudo rukuru, nokuti rudo runofukidzira zvivi zvizhinji." 
1Peter4:9 Itiranai rudo pakati penyu kana muri vaeni, musinganyunyuti." 
1Peter4:10 Mumwe nomumwe sezvaakapiwa chipo chenyasha, shumiranai nacho savatariri vakanaka venyasha zhinji dzaMwari." 
1Peter4:11 Kana munhu achitaura, ngaataure saanenge ari mashoko aMwari; kana munhu achishumira ngazviitwe nesimba raanopiwa naMwari; kuti Mwari akudzwe pazvose naJesu Kristu, iye unokubwinya nesimba nokusingaperi- peri. Ameni." 
1Peter4:12 Vadikamwa, musashamiswa nokunyanyisa kokuidzwa pakati penyu, kwakavuya kukuidzai, muchiti mawirwa nechisingazikamwi;" 
1Peter4:13 asi farai zvamunogovana naKristu pakutambudzika kwake, kuti pakuvonekwa kokubwinya kwake mufare vo nomufaro mukuru." 
1Peter4:14 Kana muchizvidzwa nokuda kwezita raKristu, makaropafadzwa, nokuti Mweya wokubwinya waMwari ugere pamusoro penyu; kwavari pakati pavo unotaurirwa zvakaipa asi pakati penyu unokudzwa." 
1Peter4:15 nokuti kurege kuva nomumwe wenyu uchatambudzika nemhaka yokuti muvurayi, kana mbavha, kana unoita zvakaipa, kana usingaregi zvavamwe;" 
1Peter4:16 asi kana munhu achitambudzika nokuda kokuti mukristu, ngaarege kunyadziswa; asi ngaakudze Mwari; nezita iri." 
1Peter4:17 Nokuti nguva yasvika yokuti kutonga kutange paimba yaMwari zvino kana kukatanga kwatiri, kuguma kwavasingateereri evhangeri yaMwari kuchagoveiko?" 
1Peter4:18 uye kana zvichiremera wakarurama kuti aponeswe, ko uyo, usingadi Mwari, nomutadzi, vachagovonekwepi?" 
1Peter4:19 Naizvozvo naivo, vanotambudzika nokuda kwaMwari, ngavaise mweya yavo kuMusiki wakatendeka vachiita zvakanaka." 
1Peter5:1 Naizvozvo ndinoraira vakuru pakati penyu, ini mukuru pamwe chete navo nechapupu chamatambudziko aKristu, nomugovani navo wokubwinya kuchazoratidzwa, ndichiti:" 
1Peter5:2 Fudzai boka raMwari riri pakati penyu, musingazviiti nokurovererwa, asi nomoyo unoda nokuda kwaMwari, musingazviiti nokuda kokukarira fuma yakaipa;" 
1Peter5:3 musingaiti nesimba nezvamakagoverwa asi muve vatungamiriri veboka. 
1Peter5:4 Kana Mufudzi mukuru achizovonekwa, muchawana korona yokubwinya isingasvavi." 
1Peter5:5 Saizvozvo imwi vaduku, muzviise pasi pavakuru, nemwi mose pfekai kuzvininipisa mumwe kunomumwe, nokuti Mwari unodzivisa vanozvikudza, asi unopa nyasha vanozvininipisa." 
1Peter5:6 Naizvozvo zvininipisei pasi poruvoko runesimba rwaMwari, kuti akukudzei nenguva yakafanira;" 
1Peter5:7 kandirai pamusoro pake kufunganya kwenyu kose, nokuti iye unokuchengetai." 
1Peter5:8 Svinurai, murinde; nokuti muvengi wenyu Dhiabhorosi, unofamba-famba seshumba inorira, ichitsvaka waingaparadza." 
1Peter5:9 Mumudzivisei, makamira nesimba pakutenda, muchiziva kuti kutambudzika ikoko kunoitirwa hama dzose dziri panyika." 
1Peter5:10 Zvino Mwari wenyasha dzose, iye wakakudanirai kukubwinya kwake kusingaperi munaJesu Kristu, kana mambotambudzika kanguva kaduku, uchakukwanisai, nokukumisai, nokukusimbisai, nokukuteyai." 
1Peter5:11 Kwaari ngakuve kubwinya nesimba nokusingaperi-peri. Ameni. 
1Peter5:12 Ndakakunyorerai mashoko mashomanene naSirivhano, hama yakatendeka pakufunga kwangu, ndichiraira, nokupupura kuti idzi ndidzo nyasha dzechokwadi dzaMwari; mirai madziri." 
1Peter5:13 Kereke iri muBhabhironi, yakasanangurwa pamwe chete nemi, naMarko, mwanakomana wangu, vanokukwazisai." 
1Peter5:13 Kereke iri muBhabhironi, yakasanangurwa pamwe chete nemi, naMarko, mwanakomana wangu, vanokukwazisai." 
1Peter5:14 Kwazisanai nokusveta korudo. Rugare ngaruve nemwi mose muri munaKristu. 
2Peter1:1 Simiyoni Petro, muranda nomuapositora waJesu Kristu, kunavakagoverwa kutenda kumwe nokwedu, kunokosha, nokururama kwaMwari wedu noMuponesi Jesu Kristu;" 
2Peter1:2 nyasha ngadzive nemwi norugare ngaruwanzwe pakuziva Mwari naJesu, Ishe wedu;" 
2Peter1:3 nokuti nesimba rovuMwari bwake takapiwa zvose zvinodikamwa pavupenyu napakunamata Mwari, nenzira yokumuziva iye wakatidana nokubwinya kwake nokunaka;" 
2Peter1:4 akatipa nazvo zvipikirwa zvinokosha zvakakura kwazvo; kuti nazvo muve vanhu vakagoverwa vuMwari, matiza kuvora kuri panyika nokuchiva." 
2Peter1:5 Zvino nemhaka iyi muchishingaira kwazvo wedzerai kunaka pakutenda kwenyu, napakunaka wedzerai kuziva;" 
2Peter1:6 napakuziva, kuzvidzora; napakuzvidzora, kutsungirira; napakutsungirira, kunamata Mwari;" 
2Peter1:7 napakunamata Mwari, kuda vatendi, napakuda vatendi, rudo." 
2Peter1:8 Nokuti kana zvinhu izvi zviri mamuri, zvichiramba zvichiwanzwa, zvichakuitai vanhu vasinovusimbe navasingashaiwi zvibereko pakuziva Ishe wedu, Jesu Kristu." 
2Peter1:9 Nokuti munhu, usina izvozvi ibofu, unovona zviri pedo bedzi, wakangamwa kusukwa kwezvivi zvake zvakare." 
2Peter1:10 Saka, hama dzangu, shingairai kwazvo kuti musimbise kudamwa nokusanangurwa kwenyu; nokuti kana muchiita izvozvi hamungatongogumburwi;" 
2Peter1:11 nokuti muchazviita muchazarurirwa zvakanaka kuti mupinde muvushe bwusingaperi bwaShe wedu, noMuponesi Jesu Kristu." 
2Peter1:12 Saka handingaregi kukuyevudzai zvinhu izvi nguva dzose, kunyange muchizviziva henyu, uye makasimba pachokwadi yamunayo." 
2Peter1:13 Ndinoti zvakanaka, kuti ndichiri mutabhernakeri ino ndikumutsei nokukuyevudzai;" 
2Peter1:14 ndichiziva kuti kubviswa kwetabhernakeri yangu kwava pedo, sezvandakaratidzwa naShe wedu Jesu Kristu." 
2Peter1:15 Zvino ndichashingaira, kuti mugogona kurangarira zvinhu izvi nguva dzose kana ndaenda." 
2Peter1:16 Nokuti hatina kutevera ngano dzokufungwa nenjere, nguva yatakakuzivisai simba nokuvuya kwaShe wedu Jesu Kristu, asi takanga tiri vanhu vakavona vumambo bwake." 
2Peter1:17 Nokuti iye wakapiwa kukudzwa nokubwinya naMwari, Baba, panguva iya, yakavuya inzwi rakadai kwaari.richibva kukubwinya kukuru-kuru, richiti: Uyu ndiye Mwanakomana wangu unodikamwa, unondifadza kwazvo." 
2Peter1:18 Inzwi iri takarinzwa isu, richibva kudenga, nguva yatakanga tinaye mugomo dzvene." 
2Peter1:19 uye tineshoko rovuporofita rakasimba kwazvo, ramunoita zvakanaka kana muchiriteerera, rakaita somwenje unovhenekera munerima, kusvikira vutonga bwuchitsuka, nenyamasase ichibudira moyo yenyu;" 
2Peter1:20 muchiziva pakutanga, kuti hakunovuporofita bworugwaro bwunongodudzirwa nomunhu;" 
2Peter1:21 nokuti hakunovuporofita bwakatongovuya nokuda komunhu, asi vanhu vatswene vaMwari vakataura, vachimutswa noMweya Mutsvene." 
2Peter2:1 Asi kwakanga kunavaporofita venhema pakati pavanhu, sezvavachavapo pakati penyu vo vadzidzisi venhema, vachapinza pakavanda dzidziso dzakatsauka dzinoparadza, vachiramba naiye Tenzi wakavatenga, vachizviwisira kuparadzwa kunokurumidza." 
2Peter2:2 Vazhinji vachatevera vutere bwavo; nokuda kwavo nzira yechokwadi ichazvidzwa. 
2Peter2:3 pakukarira kwavo mari vachakunyengerai namashoko amano-mano; kutongwa kwavo, kwakatarwa kare, hakunonoki, nokuparadzwa kwavo hakukotsiri." 
2Peter2:4 Nokuti kana Mwari asina kurega vatumwa vakatadza, asi wakavakandira muTartaro nokuvaisa kumakomba erima, kuti vachengeterwe kutongwa;"

2Peter2:9 Ishe unoziva kusunungura pamiidzo vanonamata Mwari, nokuchengeta vasakarurama vave pakurobwa kusvikira pazuva rokutongwa;" 
2Peter2:10 zvikuru ivo vanofamba nomutovo wenyama pakuchiva kunosvibisa nokuzvidza vakuru; vanotsunga, vachiita nokuda kwavo, asingatyi kutuka avo vanokubwinya;" 
2Peter2:11 vatumwa, kunyange vanovapfuvura nesimba novukuru, havavuyi pamberi paShe nemhosva yokuvapomera nayo."

2Peter2:13 vachiitirwa zvisakarurama, uri mubairo wokusarurama kwavo; savaya vanoti, mafaro kuita zvakaipa masikati, ivo makwapa namavara, vanofara nokunyengera kwavo kana vachidya nemi;" 
2Peter2:14 vanameso azere novupombwe, asingaregi kutadza; vanonyengera vanhu vasinesimba; vanomoyo wakadzidziswa kuchiva; ivo vana vokutukwa;"

2Peter2:16 asi wakarairwa pamusoro pokudarika kwake, nokuti mbongoro, isingagoni kutaura, yakataura nenzwi romunhu, ikadzivisa kupenga komuporofita." 
2Peter2:17 Ivava matsime asinemvura, mhute inodzingwa nemhepo; ivo vakachengeterwa kusviba kwerima nokusingaperi peri." 
2Peter2:18 Nokuti nokutaura kwavo mashoko mazhinji okuzvikudza asina maturo, vanonyengera pakuchiva kwenyama novutere, avo vachangotiza vachibva kuna vanogara pakutsauka;" 
2Peter2:19 vachivapikira kusunungurwa, nyamba ivo vamene varanda vokuvora; nokuti waakundwa naye, munhu unoitwa muranda wake."

2Peter2:21 Nokuti zvaiva nani kwavari kana vasaiziva nzira yokururama, pakuti vadzoke pamurairo mutsvene wavakapiwa, wavakanga vambouziva havo."

2Peter3:1 Vadikamwa, iyi ndiyo mwadhi yechipiri yandinokunyorerai zvino; panaidzedzi dzose mbiri ndinomutsa ndangariro dzenyu ndichiku yevudzirai;" 
2Peter3:2 kuti mugorangarira mashoko akataurwa kare navaporofita vatsvene, nomurairo waShe, Muponesi, wamakapiwa navapositora venyu;" 
2Peter3:3 pakutanga muzive henyu chinhu ichi, kuti pamazuva okupedzisira vaseki vachavuya vachiseka, vachifamba nokuchiva kwavo," 
2Peter3:4 vachiti: Chipikirwa chokuvuya kwake chiripiko zvino? Nokuti kubva pakuparara kwamadzibaba, zvinhu zvose zvinongoramba zvakaita sezvazvakanga zvakaita kubva pakutanga kokusikwa." 
2Peter3:5 Nokuti vanokangamwa nobwoni chinhu ichi, kuti kare denga raivapo, nenyika yakabudiswa mumvura, yakaitwa nemvura neshoko raMwari;" 
2Peter3:6 nazvo nyika, yaivapo nguva iyo. Yakafukidzwa nemvura ikaparadzwa." 
2Peter3:7 Asi denga riripo zvino nenyika zvakavigirwa moto neshoko ireri zvinochengeterwa zuva rokutongwa nerokuparadzwa kwavanhu vasingadi Mwari. 
2Peter3:8 Asi vadikamwa, musakangamwa chinhu chimwe ichi, kuti kunaShe zuva rimwe rakaita samakore anechuru, namakore anechuru, sezuva rimwe." 
2Peter3:9 Ishe haanonoki kuita sezvaakapikira, sezvinoreva vamwe vachiti: Hunonoka; asi unomoyo murefu kwatiri, nokuti haadi kuti vamwe varashike, asi kuti vose vasvike pakutendevuka." 
2Peter3:10 Asi zuva raShe richavuya sembavha; vusiku naro denga richapfuvura nokutinhira kukuru, nezvedenga zvichaparadzwa zvichipiswa, nenyika namabasa ari mairi achapiswa." 
2Peter3:11 Izvi zvose zvazvichaparadzwa saizvozvo, imwi munofanira kuva vanhu vakadiniko pamufambire wenyu mutsvene nokunamata Mwari," 
2Peter3:12 imwi munotarira nokushuva vo kwazvo kuvuya kwezuva raMwari; naro denga richaparadzwa nokutsva, nezvedenga zvichanyauka zvichipiswa." 
2Peter3:13 Asi sezvaakapikira, tinotarira denga idzva nenyika itsva, munogara kururama mazviri." 
2Peter3:14 Saka vadikamwa, zvamunotarira zvinhu izvi, shingairai kuti muwanikwe naye munorugare, musinoruvara, musinemhosva;" 
2Peter3:15 muchiti, moyo murefu waShe wedu ruponeso; saPauro, hama yedu inodikamwa, akakunyorerai vo nokuchenjera kwaakapiwa;" 
2Peter3:16 sezvaanotaura mumwadhi dzake dzose pamusoro pezvinhu izvi; madziri munezvimwe zvikukutu kunzwisiswa; zvino minamiswa, samamwe magwaro vo, navasingazivi navasinesimba, kusvikira vaparadzwa." 
2Peter3:17 Naizvozvo imwi vadikamwa, zvamunoziva zvinhu izvi zvisati zvaitwa, chenjerai kuti murege kurashwa nokutsauka kwavakashata, muwe pakusimba kwenyu." 
2Peter3:18 Asi kurai panyasha napakuziva Ishe wedu, Muponesi Jesu Kristu. Ngaave nokubwinya zvino, nokusingeperi. Ameni."
